papers.title: ViLL-E: Video LLM Embeddings for Retrieval
papers.abstract: Video Large Language Models (VideoLLMs) excel at video understanding tasks where outputs are textual, such as Video Question Answering and Video Captioning. However, they underperform specialized embedding-based models in Retrieval tasks, such as Text-toVideo Retrieval and Moment Retrieval. We introduce ViLL-E (Video-LLM-Embed), a unified VideoLLM architecture endowed with a novel embedding generation mechanism that allows the model to "think longer" for complex videos and stop early for easy ones. We train this model with a three-stage training methodology combining generative and contrastive learning: initial large-scale pre-training with video-caption pairs; followed by continual training on a smaller, detailed-caption dataset; and concluding with task-specific fine-tuning on a novel multi-task dataset covering Video QA, Temporal Localization, Video Retrieval, and Video-Text Matching. Our model significantly improves temporal localization (on avg. 7% over other VideoLLMs) and video retrieval (up to 4% over dual encoder models), achieving performance comparable to state-of-the-art specialized embedding models while remaining competitive on VideoQA tasks. Furthermore, our joint contrastive-generative training unlocks new zero-shot capabilities, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art methods in composed video retrieval (+5% over SotA) and retrieval from long text (+2% over SotA).

analysis.tldr: ViLL-E 通过统一 VideoLLM 架构与嵌入生成机制，在视频检索和时序定位上超越现有方法，同时保持视频问答竞争力。
analysis.research_motivation: VideoLLMs 在文本输出任务（如视频问答）上表现优异，但在检索任务（如文本到视频检索）上不如专用嵌入模型，需要统一架构以兼顾两者。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个 VideoLLM 架构，使其既能生成高质量嵌入用于检索，又能保持生成能力用于问答等任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VideoLLMs 在检索任务上表现不佳，而专用嵌入模型在问答任务上受限；现有方法难以同时优化两种能力。
analysis.method: 提出 ViLL-E 架构，包含新颖的嵌入生成机制（可自适应计算步数），采用三阶段训练：大规模视频-字幕预训练、详细字幕持续训练、多任务微调（视频QA、时序定位、检索、文本-视频匹配），结合生成式与对比学习。
contributions: 提出统一 VideoLLM 架构 ViLL-E，支持嵌入生成与文本生成。
设计三阶段训练方法，结合生成式与对比学习，提升检索与定位性能。
在时序定位（平均提升7%）和视频检索（提升4%）上达到与专用模型相当的性能，并在组合视频检索和长文本检索上实现零样本 SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估，包括时序定位（平均提升7%）、视频检索（提升4%）、组合视频检索（+5%）、长文本检索（+2%），并保持 VideoQA 竞争力。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模预训练数据，计算成本高。
零样本能力仅在特定任务上验证，泛化性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ViLL-E 通过统一 VideoLLM 架构与嵌入生成机制，在视频检索和时序定位上超越现有方法，同时保持视频问答竞争力。

papers.title: Evaluating Plan Compliance in Autonomous Programming Agents
papers.abstract: Agents aspire to eliminate the need for task-specific prompt crafting through autonomous reason-act-observe loops. Still, they are commonly instructed to follow a task-specific plan for guidance, e.g., to resolve software issues following phases for navigation, reproduction, patch, and validation. Unfortunately, it is unknown to what extent agents actually follow such instructed plans. Without such an analysis, determining the extent agents comply with a given plan, it is impossible to assess whether a solution was reached through correct strategic reasoning or through other means, e.g., data contamination or overfitting to a benchmark. This paper presents the first extensive, systematic analysis of plan compliance in programming agents, examining 16,991 trajectories from SWE-agent across four LLMs on SWE-bench Verified and SWE-bench Pro under eight plan variations. Without an explicit plan, agents fall back on workflows internalized during training, which are often incomplete, overfit, or inconsistently applied. Providing the standard plan improves issue resolution, and we observe that periodic plan reminders can mitigate plan violations and improve task success. A subpar plan hurts performance even more than no plan at all. Surprisingly, augmenting a plan with additional task-relevant phases in the early stage can degrade performance, particularly when these phases do not align with the model's internal problem-solving strategy. These findings highlight a research gap: fine-tuning paradigms that teach models to follow instructed plans, rather than encoding task-specific plans in them. This requires teaching models to reason and act adaptively, rather than memorizing workflows.

analysis.tldr: 首个系统分析自主编程智能体对任务计划遵循程度的研究，发现计划违规普遍存在且影响性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主编程智能体常被要求遵循任务特定计划，但缺乏对其实际遵循程度的分析，无法判断解决方案是否源于正确推理还是数据污染或过拟合。
analysis.problem: 评估自主编程智能体在执行任务时对给定计划的遵循程度，并分析计划遵循与任务成功之间的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 无明确计划时，智能体依赖训练内化的不完整、过拟合或不一致的工作流；提供标准计划可提升问题解决率，定期提醒可减少违规；次优计划比无计划更差；早期添加与模型内部策略不匹配的阶段会降低性能。
analysis.method: 在SWE-bench Verified和SWE-bench Pro上，使用SWE-agent对四种LLM在八种计划变体下收集16,991条轨迹，进行计划遵循的系统性分析。
contributions: 首次对编程智能体的计划遵循进行大规模系统分析
揭示了计划违规的模式及其对任务成功的影响
发现计划质量与智能体内部策略对齐的重要性
analysis.experiments: 在SWE-bench Verified和SWE-bench Pro上，使用SWE-agent对四种LLM在八种计划变体下进行实验，分析了16,991条轨迹。
limitations: 仅针对编程领域，可能不适用于其他任务类型
未深入探讨如何通过微调提升计划遵循能力
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个系统分析自主编程智能体对任务计划遵循程度的研究，发现计划违规普遍存在且影响性能。

papers.title: Beyond Factual Grounding: The Case for Opinion-Aware Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: RAG systems have transformed how LLMs access external knowledge, but we find that current implementations exhibit a bias toward factual, objective content, as evidenced by existing benchmarks and datasets that prioritize objective retrieval. This factual bias - treating opinions and diverse perspectives as noise rather than information to be synthesized - limits RAG systems in real-world scenarios involving subjective content, from social media discussions to product reviews. Beyond technical limitations, this bias poses risks to transparent and accountable AI: echo chamber effects that amplify dominant viewpoints, systematic underrepresentation of minority voices, and potential opinion manipulation through biased information synthesis. We formalize this limitation through the lens of uncertainty: factual queries involve epistemic uncertainty reducible through evidence, while opinion queries involve aleatoric uncertainty reflecting genuine heterogeneity in human perspectives. This distinction implies that factual RAG should minimize posterior entropy, whereas opinion-aware RAG must preserve it. Building on this theoretical foundation, we present an Opinion-Aware RAG architecture featuring LLM-based opinion extraction, entity-linked opinion graphs, and opinion-enriched document indexing. We evaluate our approach on e-commerce seller forum data, comparing an Opinion-Enriched knowledge base against a traditional baseline. Experiments demonstrate substantial improvements in retrieval diversity: +26.8% sentiment diversity, +42.7% entity match rate, and +31.6% author demographic coverage on entity-matched documents. Our results provide empirical evidence that treating subjectivity as a first-class citizen yields measurably more representative retrieval-a first step toward opinion-aware RAG. Future work includes joint optimization of retrieval and generation for distributional fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 提出观点感知RAG架构，通过显式建模主观性提升检索多样性，缓解事实偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RAG系统偏向事实性内容，忽视主观观点，导致回声室效应和少数群体声音被压制，限制了在社交媒体、产品评论等场景的应用。
analysis.problem: RAG系统在处理主观性查询时存在事实偏见，无法有效检索和综合多样化观点。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前RAG基准和数据集优先客观检索，将观点视为噪声；事实查询涉及认知不确定性（可减少），而观点查询涉及偶然不确定性（需保留）。
analysis.method: 提出观点感知RAG架构，包含基于LLM的观点提取、实体链接观点图和观点增强文档索引。
contributions: 从不确定性角度形式化RAG的事实偏见问题，区分认知不确定性和偶然不确定性。
提出观点感知RAG架构，通过显式建模主观性提升检索多样性。
在电商卖家论坛数据上验证，检索多样性指标显著提升（情感多样性+26.8%，实体匹配率+42.7%，作者人口覆盖+31.6%）。
analysis.experiments: 在电商卖家论坛数据上，将观点增强知识库与传统基线对比，评估检索多样性。
limitations: 仅评估检索阶段，未联合优化生成阶段。
实验数据局限于电商论坛，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出观点感知RAG架构，通过显式建模主观性提升检索多样性，缓解事实偏见。

papers.title: Observing the unobserved confounding through its effects: toward randomized trial-like estimates from real-world survival data
papers.abstract: Background: Randomized controlled trials (RCTs) are costly, time-consuming, and often infeasible, while treatment-effect estimation from observational data is limited by unobserved confounding. Methods: We developed a three-step framework to address unobserved confounding in observational survival data. First, we infer a latent prognostic factor (U) from restricted mean survival time (RMST) discrepancies between patients with similar observed factors, the same treatment, and divergent outcomes, leveraging the idea that the aggregate effect of unmeasured factors can be inferred even if individual factors cannot. Second, we balance U with observed baseline covariates using prognostic matching, entropy balancing, or inverse probability of treatment weighting. Third, we apply multivariable survival analysis to estimate hazard ratios (HRs). We evaluated the framework in three observational cohorts with RCT benchmarks, two RCT cohorts, and six multicenter observational cohorts. Results: In three observational cohorts (nine comparisons), balancing U improved agreement with trial HRs in all cases; in the strongest settings, it reduced absolute log-HR error by approximately ten-fold versus using observed covariates alone (mean reduction 0.344; p=0.001). In two RCT cohorts, U was balanced across arms (most SMDs <0.1) and adjustment had minimal impact on log-HRs (mean absolute change 0.08). Across six multicenter cohorts, balancing U within centers reduced cross-center dispersion in chemotherapy log-HR estimates (mean reduction 0.147; p=0.016); when populations were directly balanced across centers to account for case-mix differences, cross-center survival differences were narrowed in 75%-100% of comparisons. Conclusions: Inferring and balancing a latent prognostic signal may reduce unobserved confounding and improve treatment-effect estimation from real-world data.

analysis.tldr: 通过推断未观测混杂因素的代理变量并加以平衡，使观察性生存数据的治疗效果估计更接近随机对照试验结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 随机对照试验成本高、耗时长且常不可行，而观察性数据受未观测混杂因素限制，导致治疗效果估计有偏。
analysis.problem: 如何从观察性生存数据中消除未观测混杂因素对治疗效果估计的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三步框架：1) 从受限平均生存时间差异推断潜在预后因子U；2) 通过倾向评分匹配、熵平衡或逆概率加权平衡U与观测协变量；3) 多变量生存分析估计风险比。
contributions: 提出一种从观察性生存数据推断未观测混杂因素代理变量的方法
在多个真实世界队列中验证了该方法能显著提高治疗效果估计与RCT结果的一致性
analysis.experiments: 在三个观察性队列（九个比较）、两个RCT队列和六个多中心观察性队列中评估，结果显示平衡U后与RCT风险比的一致性提高，绝对对数风险比误差平均降低0.344（p=0.001）。
limitations: 方法依赖于RMST差异的假设，可能不适用于所有场景
未观测混杂因素的推断可能受数据质量影响
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过推断未观测混杂因素的代理变量并加以平衡，使观察性生存数据的治疗效果估计更接近随机对照试验结果。

papers.title: Towards Platonic Representation for Table Reasoning: A Foundation for Permutation-Invariant Retrieval
papers.abstract: Historical approaches to Table Representation Learning (TRL) have largely adopted the sequential paradigms of Natural Language Processing (NLP). We argue that this linearization of tables discards their essential geometric and relational structure, creating representations that are brittle to layout permutations. This paper introduces the Platonic Representation Hypothesis (PRH) for tables, positing that a semantically robust latent space for table reasoning must be intrinsically Permutation Invariant (PI). To ground this hypothesis, we first conduct a retrospective analysis of table-reasoning tasks, highlighting the pervasive serialization bias that compromises structural integrity. We then propose a formal framework to diagnose this bias, introducing two principled metrics based on Centered Kernel Alignment (CKA): (i) PI, which measures embedding drift under complete structural derangement, and (ii) rho, a Spearman-based metric that tracks the convergence of latent structures toward a canonical form as structural information is incrementally restored. Our empirical analysis quantifies an expected flaw in modern Large Language Models (LLMs): even minor layout permutations induce significant, disproportionate semantic shifts in their table embeddings. This exposes a fundamental vulnerability in RAG systems, in which table retrieval becomes fragile to layout-dependent noise rather than to semantic content. In response, we present a novel, structure-aware TRL encoder architecture that explicitly enforces the cognitive principle of cell header alignment. This model demonstrates superior geometric stability and moves towards the PI ideal. Our work provides both a foundational critique of linearized table encoders and the theoretical scaffolding for semantically stable, permutation invariant retrieval, charting a new direction for table reasoning in information systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出表格推理的柏拉图式表征假说，强调置换不变性，并设计结构感知编码器以提升检索鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有表格表征学习（TRL）采用NLP的序列化范式，破坏了表格的几何与关系结构，导致对布局置换敏感，影响检索和推理的语义稳定性。
analysis.problem: 表格线性化导致表征对排列变化脆弱，缺乏置换不变性，尤其在RAG系统中检索易受布局噪声干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现，即使微小的布局置换也会在LLM的表格嵌入中引起显著且不成比例的语义偏移，暴露了RAG系统的根本脆弱性。
analysis.method: 提出基于中心核对齐（CKA）的置换不变性（PI）和结构收敛性（rho）度量框架，并设计显式强制单元格标题对齐的结构感知TRL编码器。
contributions: 提出表格的柏拉图式表征假说（PRH），主张语义鲁棒的潜在空间必须具有内在置换不变性。
形式化诊断序列化偏差的度量（PI和rho），并量化LLM在表格嵌入中的置换脆弱性。
提出结构感知编码器，实现更好的几何稳定性，向置换不变理想迈进。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定表格结构上验证，泛化性待考。
编码器复杂度可能影响效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出表格推理的柏拉图式表征假说，强调置换不变性，并设计结构感知编码器以提升检索鲁棒性。

papers.title: Aethon: A Reference-Based Replication Primitive for Constant-Time Instantiation of Stateful AI Agents
papers.abstract: The transition from stateless model inference to stateful agentic execution is reshaping the systems assumptions underlying modern AI infrastructure. While large language models have made persistent, tool-using, and collaborative agents technically viable, existing runtime architectures remain constrained by materialization-heavy instantiation models that impose significant latency and memory overhead. This paper introduces Aethon, a reference-based replication primitive for near-constant-time instantiation of stateful AI agents. Rather than reconstructing agents as fully materialized objects, Aethon represents each instance as a compositional view over stable definitions, layered memory, and local contextual overlays. By shifting instantiation from duplication to reference, Aethon decouples creation cost from inherited structure. We present the conceptual framework, system architecture, and memory model underlying Aethon, including layered inheritance and copy-on-write semantics. We analyze its implications for complexity, scalability, multi-agent orchestration, and enterprise governance. We argue that reference-based instantiation is not merely an optimization, but a more appropriate systems abstraction for production-scale agentic software. Aethon points toward a new class of AI infrastructure in which agents become lightweight, composable execution identities that can be spawned, specialized, and governed at scale.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于引用的复制原语Aethon，实现有状态AI代理的近乎常数时间实例化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI代理运行时架构依赖物化重型实例化模型，导致高延迟和内存开销，难以支持大规模有状态代理的快速创建和编排。
analysis.problem: 如何实现有状态AI代理的轻量级、低延迟实例化，避免传统物化复制带来的性能瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Aethon通过引用而非复制来表示代理实例，利用分层继承和写时复制语义，将实例定义为稳定定义、分层内存和局部上下文覆盖的组合视图。
contributions: 提出Aethon引用复制原语，实现近常数时间代理实例化。
设计分层继承和写时复制内存模型，解耦创建成本与继承结构。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定系统假设，通用性待验证。
未讨论并发访问下的引用管理复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于引用的复制原语Aethon，实现有状态AI代理的近乎常数时间实例化。

papers.title: Long-Horizon Plan Execution in Large Tool Spaces through Entropy-Guided Branching
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have significantly advanced tool-augmented agents, enabling autonomous reasoning via API interactions. However, executing multi-step tasks within massive tool libraries remains challenging due to two critical bottlenecks: (1) the absence of rigorous, plan-level evaluation frameworks and (2) the computational demand of exploring vast decision spaces stemming from large toolsets and long-horizon planning. To bridge these gaps, we first introduce SLATE (Synthetic Large-scale API Toolkit for E-commerce), a large-scale context-aware benchmark designed for the automated assessment of tool-integrated agents. Unlike static metrics, SLATE accommodates diverse yet functionally valid execution trajectories, revealing that current agents struggle with self-correction and search efficiency. Motivated by these findings, we next propose Entropy-Guided Branching (EGB), an uncertainty-aware search algorithm that dynamically expands decision branches where predictive entropy is high. EGB optimizes the exploration-exploitation trade-off, significantly enhancing both task success rates and computational efficiency. Extensive experiments on SLATE demonstrate that our dual contribution provides a robust foundation for developing reliable and scalable LLM agents in tool-rich environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出熵引导分支算法，提升大语言模型在大型工具空间中执行长程计划的效率与成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工具增强型智能体在大型工具库中执行多步任务时，缺乏严格的计划级评估框架，且探索巨大决策空间的计算成本过高。
analysis.problem: 如何在大规模工具空间中高效执行长程计划，并建立可靠的评估基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前智能体在自我纠正和搜索效率方面存在困难，且现有静态指标无法适应多样但功能上有效的执行轨迹。
analysis.method: 提出熵引导分支（EGB）算法，一种不确定性感知的搜索算法，在预测熵高的位置动态扩展决策分支，优化探索-利用权衡。
contributions: 引入SLATE，一个大规模上下文感知的电商工具API基准，用于自动评估工具集成智能体。
提出EGB算法，显著提升任务成功率和计算效率。
analysis.experiments: 在SLATE基准上进行了大量实验，验证了EGB的有效性。
limitations: SLATE基准仅覆盖电商领域，泛化性待验证。
EGB的熵阈值可能需要针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出熵引导分支算法，提升大语言模型在大型工具空间中执行长程计划的效率与成功率。

papers.title: Beyond Perception Errors: Semantic Fixation in Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large vision-language models (VLMs) often rely on familiar semantic priors, but existing evaluations do not cleanly separate perception failures from rule-mapping failures. We study this behavior as semantic fixation: preserving a default interpretation even when the prompt specifies an alternative, equally valid mapping. To isolate this effect, we introduce VLM-Fix, a controlled benchmark over four abstract strategy games that evaluates identical terminal board states under paired standard and inverse rule formulations. Across 14 open and closed VLMs, accuracy consistently favors standard rules, revealing a robust semantic-fixation gap. Prompt interventions support this mechanism: neutral alias prompts substantially narrow the inverse-rule gap, while semantically loaded aliases reopen it. Post-training is strongly rule-aligned: training on one rule improves same-rule transfer but hurts opposite-rule transfer, while joint-rule training improves broader transfer. To test external validity beyond synthetic games, we evaluate analogous defamiliarization interventions on VLMBias and observe the same qualitative pattern. Finally, late-layer activation steering partially recovers degraded performance, indicating that semantic-fixation errors are at least partly editable in late representations. Project page, code, and dataset available at https://maveryn.github.io/vlm-fix/.

analysis.tldr: VLMs存在语义固着现象，即偏好默认语义映射，即使提示指定了同等有效的替代映射。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估无法区分VLMs的感知错误和规则映射错误，需要隔离研究语义固着这一认知偏差。
analysis.problem: VLMs在面对标准规则和逆规则时，性能存在系统性差距，即语义固着。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLMs在逆规则下准确率显著低于标准规则，且该差距可通过中性别名提示缩小，而语义负载别名会重新扩大差距；后训练具有强规则对齐性。
analysis.method: 构建VLM-Fix基准，包含四个抽象策略游戏，每个游戏有标准规则和逆规则两种表述，评估VLMs在相同棋盘状态下的表现。
contributions: 提出语义固着概念并设计VLM-Fix基准来隔离测量该现象
系统评估14个开源和闭源VLM，揭示一致的语义固着差距
通过提示干预、后训练分析和激活操控验证语义固着机制
analysis.experiments: 在14个开源和闭源VLM上评估VLM-Fix基准，并扩展到VLMBias数据集验证外部有效性。
limitations: 基准仅基于抽象策略游戏，可能不完全反映真实场景
激活操控仅部分恢复性能，语义固着可能难以完全消除
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLMs存在语义固着现象，即偏好默认语义映射，即使提示指定了同等有效的替代映射。

papers.title: The A-R Behavioral Space: Execution-Level Profiling of Tool-Using Language Model Agents in Organizational Deployment
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as tool-augmented agents capable of executing system-level operations. While existing benchmarks primarily assess textual alignment or task success, less attention has been paid to the structural relationship between linguistic signaling and executable behavior under varying autonomy scaffolds. This study introduces an execution-layer be-havioral measurement approach based on a two-dimensional A-R space defined by Action Rate (A) and Refusal Signal (R), with Divergence (D) capturing coor-dination between the two. Models are evaluated across four normative regimes (Control, Gray, Dilemma, and Malicious) and three autonomy configurations (di-rect execution, planning, and reflection). Rather than assigning aggregate safety scores, the method characterizes how execution and refusal redistribute across contextual framing and scaffold depth. Empirical results show that execution and refusal constitute separable behavioral dimensions whose joint distribution varies systematically across regimes and autonomy levels. Reflection-based scaffolding often shifts configurations toward higher refusal in risk-laden contexts, but redis-tribution patterns differ structurally across models. The A-R representation makes cross-sectional behavioral profiles, scaffold-induced transitions, and coordination variability directly observable. By foregrounding execution-layer characterization over scalar ranking, this work provides a deployment-oriented lens for analyzing and selecting tool-enabled LLM agents in organizational settings where execution privileges and risk tolerance vary.

analysis.tldr: 提出A-R行为空间用于分析工具型LLM代理在执行层的动作与拒绝信号分布，揭示不同自主性支架下的行为模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准主要评估文本对齐或任务成功率，忽略了语言信号与可执行行为之间的结构关系，尤其是在不同自主性支架下的执行层行为差异。
analysis.problem: 如何系统地表征和测量工具增强型LLM代理在执行层的动作与拒绝行为，以支持组织部署中的代理选择与风险评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建二维A-R行为空间（动作率A与拒绝信号R），并引入散度D衡量两者协调性；在四种规范场景（控制、灰色、困境、恶意）和三种自主性配置（直接执行、规划、反思）下评估模型。
contributions: 提出执行层行为测量方法A-R空间，将执行与拒绝视为可分离的行为维度。
通过跨场景和自主性水平的实证分析，揭示行为分布的系统性变化模式。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的工具型LLM代理，泛化性需验证。
A-R空间维度可能无法覆盖所有执行层行为特征。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出A-R行为空间用于分析工具型LLM代理在执行层的动作与拒绝信号分布，揭示不同自主性支架下的行为模式。

papers.title: HTDC: Hesitation-Triggered Differential Calibration for Mitigating Hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) achieve strong multimodal performance, but still suffer from hallucinations caused by unstable visual grounding and over-reliance on language priors. Existing training-free decoding methods typically apply calibration at every decoding step, introducing unnecessary computation and potentially disrupting stable predictions. We address this problem by identifying layer-wise hesitation, a simple signal of grounding instability reflected by fluctuations in token preference across intermediate layers. Based on this observation, we propose Hesitation-Triggered Differential Calibration (HTDC), a training-free decoding framework that preserves standard full-branch inference and activates calibration only at hesitation-prone steps. When triggered, HTDC contrasts the full branch with two lightweight probes, a visual-nullification probe and a semantic-nullification probe, to suppress hallucination-prone candidates while avoiding unnecessary intervention on stable steps. Experiments on representative hallucination benchmarks show that HTDC consistently reduces hallucinations while maintaining strong task accuracy, achieving a favorable trade-off between effectiveness and computational overhead.

analysis.tldr: HTDC通过检测层间犹豫信号触发差异化校准，在减少LVLM幻觉的同时保持计算效率。
analysis.research_motivation: LVLM存在幻觉问题，现有训练自由解码方法每步都校准，引入不必要计算且可能干扰稳定预测。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加过多计算开销的前提下，仅在必要时校准以缓解LVLM的幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到层间犹豫现象：中间层token偏好波动反映视觉基础的不稳定性，可作为触发校准的信号。
analysis.method: 提出HTDC框架：保留标准全分支推理，仅在犹豫步骤触发校准，通过对比全分支与视觉消融探针和语义消融探针来抑制幻觉候选。
contributions: 识别层间犹豫作为视觉基础不稳定的简单信号
提出HTDC，一种训练自由解码框架，仅在犹豫步骤触发差异化校准，减少计算开销
在多个幻觉基准上验证了HTDC在减少幻觉和保持任务准确性之间的平衡
analysis.experiments: 在代表性幻觉基准上实验，HTDC一致减少幻觉同时保持强任务准确性，实现效果与计算开销的良好权衡。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构的层间表示
未讨论在长序列或多轮对话中的表现
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HTDC通过检测层间犹豫信号触发差异化校准，在减少LVLM幻觉的同时保持计算效率。

papers.title: PR-MaGIC: Prompt Refinement Via Mask Decoder Gradient Flow For In-Context Segmentation
papers.abstract: Visual Foundation Models (VFMs) such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) have significantly advanced broad use of image segmentation. However, SAM and its variants necessitate substantial manual effort for prompt generation and additional training for specific applications. Recent approaches address these limitations by integrating SAM into in-context (one/few shot) segmentation, enabling auto-prompting through semantic alignment between query and support images. Despite these efforts, they still generate sub-optimal prompts that degrade segmentation quality due to visual inconsistencies between support and query images. To tackle this limitation, we introduce PR-MaGIC (Prompt Refinement via Mask Decoder Gradient Flow for In-Context Segmentation), a training-free test-time framework that refines prompts via gradient flow derived from SAM's mask decoder. PR-MaGIC seamlessly integrates into in-context segmentation frameworks, being theoretically grounded yet practically stabilized through a simple top-1 selection strategy that ensures robust performance across samples. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that PR-MaGIC consistently improves segmentation quality across various benchmarks, effectively mitigating inadequate prompts without requiring additional training or architectural modifications.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练、测试时优化的提示精炼方法，利用SAM掩码解码器梯度流提升上下文分割质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉基础模型（如SAM）在上下文分割中依赖手动提示或语义对齐生成次优提示，导致分割质量下降，且需要额外训练或架构修改。
analysis.problem: 解决支持图像与查询图像之间视觉不一致导致的次优提示问题，提升上下文分割性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法生成的提示因视觉不一致而次优，影响分割质量。
analysis.method: 提出PR-MaGIC，一种无需训练、测试时优化的框架，通过SAM掩码解码器的梯度流来精炼提示，并采用top-1选择策略确保鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练、测试时优化的提示精炼方法，利用SAM掩码解码器梯度流。
理论上有依据，并通过简单top-1选择策略实现实际稳定性能。
在多个基准上一致提升分割质量，无需额外训练或架构修改。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在多个基准上进行了广泛评估，但未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖SAM的梯度计算，增加测试时计算开销。
top-1选择策略可能在某些极端情况下不够鲁棒。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练、测试时优化的提示精炼方法，利用SAM掩码解码器梯度流提升上下文分割质量。

papers.title: LLM-Based Automated Diagnosis Of Integration Test Failures At Google
papers.abstract: Integration testing is critical for the quality and reliability of complex software systems. However, diagnosing their failures presents significant challenges due to the massive volume, unstructured nature, and heterogeneity of logs they generate. These result in a high cognitive load, low signal-to-noise ratio, and make diagnosis difficult and time-consuming. Developers complain about these difficulties consistently and report spending substantially more time diagnosing integration test failures compared to unit test failures. To address these shortcomings, we introduce Auto-Diagnose, a novel diagnosis tool that leverages LLMs to help developers efficiently determine the root cause of integration test failures. Auto-Diagnose analyzes failure logs, produces concise summaries with the most relevant log lines, and is integrated into Critique, Google's internal code review system, providing contextual and in-time assistance. Based on our case studies, Auto-Diagnose is highly effective. A manual evaluation conducted on 71 real-world failures demonstrated 90.14% accuracy in diagnosing the root cause. Following its Google-wide deployment, Auto-Diagnose was used across 52, 635 distinct failing tests. User feedback indicated that the tool was deemed "Not helpful" in only 5.8% of cases, and it was ranked #14 in helpfulness among 370 tools that post findings in Critique. Finally, user interviews confirmed the perceived usefulness of Auto-Diagnose and positive reception of integrating automatic diagnostic assistance into existing workflows. We conclude that LLMs are highly successful in diagnosing integration test failures due to their capacity to process and summarize complex textual data. Integrating such AI-powered tooling automatically into developers' daily workflows is perceived positively, with the tool's accuracy remaining a critical factor in shaping developer perception and adoption.

analysis.tldr: Auto-Diagnose 利用 LLM 自动诊断集成测试失败，在 Google 大规模部署中准确率达 90.14%，用户反馈仅 5.8% 认为无帮助。
analysis.research_motivation: 集成测试失败诊断因日志量大、非结构化、异构性强，导致认知负荷高、信噪比低，开发者耗时远超单元测试，亟需自动化工具。
analysis.problem: 如何利用 LLM 自动分析集成测试失败日志，生成简洁摘要并定位根因，以减轻开发者负担。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Auto-Diagnose 工具：基于 LLM 分析失败日志，提取关键日志行生成摘要，并集成到 Google 内部代码审查系统 Critique 中提供上下文辅助。
contributions: 提出 Auto-Diagnose，首个利用 LLM 自动诊断集成测试失败的工具。
在 71 个真实失败案例上达到 90.14% 的根因诊断准确率。
Google 全公司部署后，覆盖 52,635 个不同失败测试，用户仅 5.8% 认为无帮助，在 370 个工具中帮助度排名第 14。
analysis.experiments: 在 71 个真实失败案例上手动评估，准确率 90.14%；Google 全公司部署后覆盖 52,635 个失败测试，用户反馈仅 5.8% 认为无帮助，在 370 个工具中帮助度排名第 14。
limitations: 依赖 LLM 的准确性，可能对罕见或复杂日志处理不足。
用户感知受工具准确性影响，低准确率可能降低采用率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Auto-Diagnose 利用 LLM 自动诊断集成测试失败，在 Google 大规模部署中准确率达 90.14%，用户反馈仅 5.8% 认为无帮助。

papers.title: Spatial Atlas: Compute-Grounded Reasoning for Spatial-Aware Research Agent Benchmarks
papers.abstract: We introduce compute-grounded reasoning (CGR), a design paradigm for spatial-aware research agents in which every answerable sub-problem is resolved by deterministic computation before a language model is asked to generate. Spatial Atlas instantiates CGR as a single Agent-to-Agent (A2A) server that handles two challenging benchmarks: FieldWorkArena, a multimodal spatial question-answering benchmark spanning factory, warehouse, and retail environments, and MLE-Bench, a suite of 75 Kaggle machine learning competitions requiring end-to-end ML engineering. A structured spatial scene graph engine extracts entities and relations from vision descriptions, computes distances and safety violations deterministically, then feeds computed facts to large language models, thereby avoiding hallucinated spatial reasoning. Entropy-guided action selection maximizes information gain per step and routes queries across a three-tier frontier model stack (OpenAI + Anthropic). A self-healing ML pipeline with strategy-aware code generation, a score-driven iterative refinement loop, and a prompt-based leak audit registry round out the system. We evaluate across both benchmarks and show that CGR yields competitive accuracy while maintaining interpretability through structured intermediate representations and deterministic spatial computations.

analysis.tldr: 提出计算接地推理（CGR）范式，通过确定性计算解决空间推理子问题，构建空间感知研究Agent基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有空间推理Agent常依赖语言模型直接生成答案，导致幻觉和不可解释性，缺乏结构化、可验证的推理机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计空间感知Agent，使其在复杂空间问答和端到端ML工程任务中实现准确、可解释的推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出计算接地推理（CGR）范式，实例化为Spatial Atlas系统，包含结构化空间场景图引擎、熵引导动作选择、三层前沿模型栈和自愈ML流水线。
contributions: 提出计算接地推理（CGR）设计范式，将可回答子问题通过确定性计算解决后再由语言模型生成。
构建Spatial Atlas系统，集成A2A服务器，处理FieldWorkArena和MLE-Bench两个基准。
通过结构化中间表示和确定性空间计算实现竞争性精度和可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在FieldWorkArena（多模态空间问答）和MLE-Bench（75个Kaggle竞赛）上评估，显示CGR在保持可解释性的同时取得竞争性精度。
limitations: 可能依赖特定场景图引擎，泛化性需验证。
三层模型栈可能带来较高计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出计算接地推理（CGR）范式，通过确定性计算解决空间推理子问题，构建空间感知研究Agent基准。

papers.title: PC-MIL: Decoupling Feature Resolution from Supervision Scale in Whole-Slide Learning
papers.abstract: Whole-slide image (WSI) classification in computational pathology is commonly formulated as slide-level Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) with a single global bag representation. However, slide-level MIL is fundamentally underconstrained: optimizing only global labels encourages models to aggregate features without learning anatomically meaningful localization. This creates a mismatch between the scale of supervision and the scale of clinical reasoning. Clinicians assess tumor burden, focal lesions, and architectural patterns within millimeter-scale regions, whereas standard MIL is trained only to predict whether "somewhere in the slide there is cancer." As a result, the model's inductive bias effectively erases anatomical structure. We propose Progressive-Context MIL (PC-MIL), a framework that treats the spatial extent of supervision as a first-class design dimension. Rather than altering magnification, patch size, or introducing pixel-level segmentation, we decouple feature resolution from supervision scale. Using fixed 20x features, we vary MIL bag extent in millimeter units and anchor supervision at a clinically motivated 2mm scale to preserve comparable tumor burden and avoid confounding scale with lesion density. PC-MIL progressively mixes slide- and region-level supervision in controlled proportions, enabling explicit train-context x test-context analysis. On 1,476 prostate WSIs from five public datasets for binary cancer detection, we show that anatomical context is an independent axis of generalization in MIL, orthogonal to feature resolution: modest regional supervision improves cross-context performance, and balanced multi-context training stabilizes accuracy across slide and regional evaluation without sacrificing global performance. These results demonstrate that supervision extent shapes MIL inductive bias and support anatomically grounded WSI generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出PC-MIL框架，通过解耦特征分辨率与监督尺度，在弱监督全切片学习中引入解剖学意义的区域监督，提升跨上下文泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准全切片多实例学习（MIL）仅使用全局标签，导致模型缺乏解剖学定位能力，与临床医生依赖毫米级区域评估肿瘤负荷的推理方式不匹配。
analysis.problem: 现有MIL中监督尺度与临床推理尺度不匹配，模型无法学习解剖学有意义的位置信息，泛化性受限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：仅优化全局标签会鼓励模型聚合特征而不学习解剖学定位；监督范围是独立于特征分辨率的泛化轴；适度的区域监督可提升跨上下文性能，平衡的多上下文训练稳定精度。
analysis.method: 提出渐进上下文MIL（PC-MIL），将监督的空间范围作为设计维度，使用固定20x特征，以毫米为单位改变MIL包范围，锚定2mm临床尺度，渐进混合幻灯片级和区域级监督。
contributions: 提出监督尺度作为MIL中独立设计维度的概念，并实现解耦特征分辨率与监督尺度。
提出PC-MIL框架，通过渐进混合多尺度监督提升跨上下文泛化，在五个前列腺数据集上验证。
analysis.experiments: 在1,476张前列腺WSI（五个公开数据集）上进行二元癌症检测实验，显示解剖上下文是MIL中独立于特征分辨率的泛化轴，适度区域监督提升跨上下文性能，平衡多上下文训练稳定精度。
limitations: 仅在前列腺癌检测任务上验证，其他癌种或任务需进一步测试。
2mm监督尺度的选择可能依赖临床先验，不同任务需调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PC-MIL框架，通过解耦特征分辨率与监督尺度，在弱监督全切片学习中引入解剖学意义的区域监督，提升跨上下文泛化能力。

papers.title: LLM-HYPER: Generative CTR Modeling for Cold-Start Ad Personalization via LLM-Based Hypernetworks
papers.abstract: On online advertising platforms, newly introduced promotional ads face the cold-start problem, as they lack sufficient user feedback for model training. In this work, we propose LLM-HYPER, a novel framework that treats large language models (LLMs) as hypernetworks to directly generate the parameters of the click-through rate (CTR) estimator in a training-free manner. LLM-HYPER uses few-shot Chain-of-Thought prompting over multimodal ad content (text and images) to infer feature-wise model weights for a linear CTR predictor. By retrieving semantically similar past campaigns via CLIP embeddings and formatting them into prompt-based demonstrations, the LLM learns to reason about customer intent, feature influence, and content relevance. To ensure numerical stability and serviceability, we introduce normalization and calibration techniques that align the generated weights with production-ready CTR distributions. Extensive offline experiments show that LLM-HYPER significantly outperforms cold-start baselines in NDCG$@10$ by 55.9\%. Our real-world online A/B test on one of the top e-commerce platforms in the U.S. demonstrates the strong performance of LLM-HYPER, which drastically reduces the cold-start period and achieves competitive performance. LLM-HYPER has been successfully deployed in production.

analysis.tldr: LLM-HYPER 利用大语言模型作为超网络，直接生成冷启动广告的点击率模型参数，无需训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线广告中，新广告因缺乏用户反馈数据而面临冷启动问题，传统方法需要大量训练数据，难以快速适应。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有用户反馈的情况下，为新广告生成有效的点击率预测模型参数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将LLM作为超网络，通过少样本思维链提示处理多模态广告内容（文本和图像），生成线性CTR预测器的特征权重；利用CLIP嵌入检索相似历史广告作为示例，并引入归一化和校准技术确保数值稳定。
contributions: 提出LLM-HYPER框架，首次将LLM作为超网络用于冷启动CTR建模，无需训练即可生成模型参数。
在离线实验中NDCG@10提升55.9%，在线A/B测试显著缩短冷启动周期，并已成功部署。
analysis.experiments: 离线实验在NDCG@10上比冷启动基线提升55.9%，并在美国某顶级电商平台进行在线A/B测试，证明性能强劲。
limitations: 依赖LLM的推理能力，可能受限于模型规模和提示设计。
仅适用于线性CTR预测器，复杂模型可能不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM-HYPER 利用大语言模型作为超网络，直接生成冷启动广告的点击率模型参数，无需训练。

papers.title: INST-Align: Implicit Neural Alignment for Spatial Transcriptomics via Canonical Expression Fields
papers.abstract: Spatial transcriptomics (ST) measures mRNA expression while preserving spatial organization, but multi-slice analysis faces two coupled difficulties: large non-rigid deformations across slices and inter-slice batch effects when alignment and integration are treated independently. We present INST-Align, an unsupervised pairwise framework that couples a coordinate-based deformation network with a shared Canonical Expression Field, an implicit neural representation mapping spatial coordinates to expression embeddings, for joint alignment and reconstruction. A two-phase training strategy first establishes a stable canonical embedding space and then jointly optimizes deformation and spatial-feature matching, enabling mutually constrained alignment and representation learning. Cross-slice parameter sharing of the canonical field regularizes ambiguous correspondences and absorbs batch variation. Across nine datasets, INST-Align achieves state-of-the-art mean OT Accuracy (0.702), NN Accuracy (0.719), and Chamfer distance, with Chamfer reductions of up to 94.9\% on large-deformation sections relative to the strongest baseline. The framework also yields biologically meaningful spatial embeddings and coherent 3D tissue reconstruction. The code will be released after review phase.

analysis.tldr: INST-Align 通过隐式神经表示联合配准与重建，实现空间转录组学切片间对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 空间转录组学多切片分析面临大形变和批次效应两大难题，现有方法独立处理配准与整合，效果受限。
analysis.problem: 如何同时解决跨切片非刚性形变和批次效应，实现无监督的切片间对齐与表达重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 INST-Align 框架，包含坐标变形网络和共享规范表达场（隐式神经表示），通过两阶段训练策略联合优化变形与空间-特征匹配，并利用跨切片参数共享正则化对应关系、吸收批次变异。
contributions: 提出耦合变形网络与规范表达场的无监督对齐框架，实现联合配准与重建。
两阶段训练策略和跨切片参数共享机制有效处理大形变和批次效应。
analysis.experiments: 在九个数据集上，INST-Align 在平均 OT 准确率（0.702）、NN 准确率（0.719）和 Chamfer 距离上达到最优，大形变切片上 Chamfer 距离相比最强基线降低高达 94.9%。
limitations: 可能对初始配准敏感。
计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: INST-Align 通过隐式神经表示联合配准与重建，实现空间转录组学切片间对齐。

papers.title: Human-Inspired Context-Selective Multimodal Memory for Social Robots
papers.abstract: Memory is fundamental to social interaction, enabling humans to recall meaningful past experiences and adapt their behavior accordingly based on the context. However, most current social robots and embodied agents rely on non-selective, text-based memory, limiting their ability to support personalized, context-aware interactions. Drawing inspiration from cognitive neuroscience, we propose a context-selective, multimodal memory architecture for social robots that captures and retrieves both textual and visual episodic traces, prioritizing moments characterized by high emotional salience or scene novelty. By associating these memories with individual users, our system enables socially personalized recall and more natural, grounded dialogue. We evaluate the selective storage mechanism using a curated dataset of social scenarios, achieving a Spearman correlation of 0.506, surpassing human consistency ($ρ=0.415$) and outperforming existing image memorability models. In multimodal retrieval experiments, our fusion approach improves Recall@1 by up to 13\% over unimodal text or image retrieval. Runtime evaluations confirm that the system maintains real-time performance. Qualitative analyses further demonstrate that the proposed framework produces richer and more socially relevant responses than baseline models. This work advances memory design for social robots by bridging human-inspired selectivity and multimodal retrieval to enhance long-term, personalized human-robot interaction.

analysis.tldr: 受人类记忆启发，提出一种上下文选择性多模态记忆架构，使社交机器人能优先存储高情感或场景新颖性的文本与视觉记忆，实现个性化、上下文感知的交互。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前社交机器人依赖非选择性、纯文本记忆，无法支持个性化、上下文感知的交互，而人类记忆具有上下文选择性，能优先记住情感显著或新颖的经历。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种受人类认知启发的、上下文选择性的多模态记忆架构，使社交机器人能有效捕捉和检索文本与视觉记忆，并实现个性化回忆。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出人类记忆具有上下文选择性，而现有机器人记忆缺乏此特性。
analysis.method: 提出上下文选择性多模态记忆架构，包含选择性存储机制（优先存储高情感显著性或场景新颖性的文本和视觉片段）和多模态检索融合方法。
contributions: 提出受人类认知启发的上下文选择性多模态记忆架构，用于社交机器人。
在社交场景数据集上，选择性存储机制达到Spearman相关系数0.506，超过人类一致性（0.415）和现有图像记忆模型。
多模态检索融合方法在Recall@1上比单模态文本或图像检索提升高达13%。
analysis.experiments: 在社交场景数据集上评估选择性存储机制，使用Spearman相关系数；在多模态检索实验中评估Recall@1；进行运行时性能评估和定性分析。
limitations: 可能仅在特定社交场景数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未提及对长期记忆衰减或遗忘机制的处理。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受人类记忆启发，提出一种上下文选择性多模态记忆架构，使社交机器人能优先存储高情感或场景新颖性的文本与视觉记忆，实现个性化、上下文感知的交互。

papers.title: Narrative over Numbers: The Identifiable Victim Effect and its Amplification Under Alignment and Reasoning in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: The Identifiable Victim Effect (IVE) $-$ the tendency to allocate greater resources to a specific, narratively described victim than to a statistically characterized group facing equivalent hardship $-$ is one of the most robust findings in moral psychology and behavioural economics. As large language models (LLMs) assume consequential roles in humanitarian triage, automated grant evaluation, and content moderation, a critical question arises: do these systems inherit the affective irrationalities present in human moral reasoning? We present the first systematic, large-scale empirical investigation of the IVE in LLMs, comprising N=51,955 validated API trials across 16 frontier models spanning nine organizational lineages (Google, Anthropic, OpenAI, Meta, DeepSeek, xAI, Alibaba, IBM, and Moonshot). Using a suite of ten experiments $-$ porting and extending canonical paradigms from Small et al. (2007) and Kogut and Ritov (2005) $-$ we find that the IVE is prevalent but strongly modulated by alignment training. Instruction-tuned models exhibit extreme IVE (Cohen's d up to 1.56), while reasoning-specialized models invert the effect (down to d=-0.85). The pooled effect (d=0.223, p=2e-6) is approximately twice the single-victim human meta-analytic baseline (d$\approx$0.10) reported by Lee and Feeley (2016) $-$ and likely exceeds the overall human pooled effect by a larger margin, given that the group-victim human effect is near zero. Standard Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting $-$ contrary to its role as a deliberative corrective $-$ nearly triples the IVE effect size (from d=0.15 to d=0.41), while only utilitarian CoT reliably eliminates it. We further document psychophysical numbing, perfect quantity neglect, and marginal in-group/out-group cultural bias, with implications for AI deployment in humanitarian and ethical decision-making contexts.

analysis.tldr: LLM 继承并放大了人类的“可识别受害者效应”，对齐训练和推理链会显著影响该偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 在人道主义决策中扮演重要角色，但可能继承人类道德推理中的非理性偏差，如可识别受害者效应（IVE），这可能导致资源分配不公，亟需系统评估。
analysis.problem: LLM 是否表现出可识别受害者效应（IVE），以及对齐训练和推理能力如何影响该效应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: IVE 在 LLM 中普遍存在，指令微调模型表现出极端 IVE，推理专用模型则反转效应；标准思维链提示反而放大效应，只有功利主义思维链能消除它；还观察到心理麻木、数量完全忽视和群体文化偏见。
analysis.method: 通过 10 个实验，在 16 个前沿模型上（共 51,955 次 API 试验）移植和扩展经典 IVE 范式，系统测量 IVE 效应量及其受对齐和推理的影响。
contributions: 首次大规模系统实证 LLM 中的可识别受害者效应（IVE），涵盖 16 个前沿模型。
发现对齐训练（指令微调）放大 IVE，推理专用模型反转 IVE，标准思维链提示放大效应而功利主义思维链消除效应。
揭示了心理麻木、数量完全忽视和群体文化偏见等额外偏差。
analysis.experiments: 在 16 个前沿模型上进行 51,955 次 API 试验，包含 10 个实验，测量 IVE 效应量（Cohen's d），并与人类元分析基线比较。
limitations: 仅基于 API 试验，可能未覆盖所有模型变体或本地部署模型。
实验设计基于特定范式，可能无法完全推广到所有道德决策场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM 继承并放大了人类的“可识别受害者效应”，对齐训练和推理链会显著影响该偏差。

papers.title: OpenTME: An Open Dataset of AI-powered H&E Tumor Microenvironment Profiles from TCGA
papers.abstract: The tumor microenvironment (TME) plays a central role in cancer progression, treatment response, and patient outcomes, yet large-scale, consistent, and quantitative TME characterization from routine hematoxylin and eosin (H&E)-stained histopathology remains scarce. We introduce OpenTME, an open-access dataset of pre-computed TME profiles derived from 3,634 H&E-stained whole-slide images across five cancer types (bladder, breast, colorectal, liver, and lung cancer) from The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA). All outputs were generated using Atlas H&E-TME, an AI-powered application built on the Atlas family of pathology foundation models, which performs tissue quality control, tissue segmentation, cell detection and classification, and spatial neighborhood analysis, yielding over 4,500 quantitative readouts per slide at cell-level resolution. OpenTME is available for non-commercial academic research on Hugging Face. We will continue to expand OpenTME over time and anticipate it will serve as a resource for biomarker discovery, spatial biology research, and the development of computational methods for TME analysis.

analysis.tldr: OpenTME 是一个基于 TCGA 的 H&E 染色全切片图像计算肿瘤微环境特征的开源数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 肿瘤微环境（TME）对癌症进展和治疗反应至关重要，但缺乏大规模、一致且定量的 H&E 染色 TME 特征数据。
analysis.problem: 从常规 H&E 染色病理切片中获取大规模、一致且定量的 TME 特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用基于 Atlas 病理基础模型的 AI 应用 Atlas H&E-TME，对 TCGA 中五种癌症类型的 3,634 张 H&E 全切片图像进行组织质量控制、组织分割、细胞检测与分类以及空间邻域分析，生成每张切片超过 4,500 个定量指标。
contributions: 构建了 OpenTME 开源数据集，包含来自 TCGA 五种癌症类型的 3,634 张 H&E 全切片图像的预计算 TME 特征。
提供了基于 Atlas 病理基础模型的 AI 管道，实现细胞级分辨率的全面 TME 分析。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅涵盖五种癌症类型，泛化性有限。
数据集基于特定 AI 模型，可能引入模型偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OpenTME 是一个基于 TCGA 的 H&E 染色全切片图像计算肿瘤微环境特征的开源数据集。

papers.title: Neuromorphic Continual Learning for Sequential Deployment of Nuclear Plant Monitoring Systems
papers.abstract: Anomaly detection in nuclear industrial control systems (ICS) requires continuous, energy-efficient monitoring across multiple subsystems that are often deployed at different stages of plant commissioning. When a conventional neural network is sequentially trained to monitor new subsystems, it catastrophically forgets previously learned anomaly patterns, a safety-critical failure mode. We present the first spiking neural network (SNN)-based anomaly detection system with continual learning for nuclear ICS, addressing both challenges simultaneously. Our approach introduces spike-encoded asynchronous sensor fusion, a delta-based encoding that converts heterogeneous sensor streams into sparse spike trains at rates dictated by each sensor's natural dynamics, achieving 92.7% input sparsity. We evaluate five continual learning strategies, including sequential fine-tuning, Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC), Synaptic Intelligence (SI), experience replay, and a hybrid EWC+Replay approach, on the HAI 21.03 nuclear ICS security dataset across three sequentially deployed subsystems (boiler, turbine, water treatment). The hybrid EWC+Replay method achieves an average F1 score of 0.979 with near-zero average forgetting (AF = 0.000 single seed; 0.035 +/- 0.039 across three seeds), while requiring 12.6x fewer operations (an estimated 2.5x in energy based on published hardware specifications) than an equivalent artificial neural network. The system detects all tested attacks with a mean latency of 0.6 seconds. These results demonstrate that neuromorphic computing offers a viable path toward always-on, energy-efficient, and adaptable safety monitoring for next-generation nuclear facilities.

analysis.tldr: 首个基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的核工业控制系统异常检测系统，通过持续学习实现顺序部署下的高精度、低能耗监测。
analysis.research_motivation: 核工业控制系统需要持续、节能的异常检测，但传统神经网络在顺序学习新子系统时会灾难性遗忘旧模式，造成安全风险。
analysis.problem: 解决核电站监控系统顺序部署时，神经网络对先前学习的异常模式灾难性遗忘的问题，同时实现低能耗。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统神经网络在顺序训练时发生灾难性遗忘，而脉冲神经网络结合持续学习策略可有效缓解。
analysis.method: 提出基于SNN的异常检测系统，采用delta编码将异构传感器流转换为稀疏脉冲序列，并评估五种持续学习策略（包括混合EWC+Replay）。
contributions: 首个将SNN与持续学习结合用于核工业控制系统异常检测的工作。
提出delta编码实现异步传感器融合，达到92.7%输入稀疏性。
混合EWC+Replay方法在HAI 21.03数据集上达到平均F1=0.979，几乎零遗忘。
analysis.experiments: 在HAI 21.03核ICS安全数据集上，对三个顺序部署的子系统（锅炉、涡轮、水处理）进行评估，混合EWC+Replay方法平均F1=0.979，平均遗忘0.035±0.039，操作次数减少12.6倍，能耗估计降低2.5倍，检测延迟0.6秒。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
能耗估计基于硬件规格，实际效果待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的核工业控制系统异常检测系统，通过持续学习实现顺序部署下的高精度、低能耗监测。

papers.title: Robust Explanations for User Trust in Enterprise NLP Systems
papers.abstract: Robust explanations are increasingly required for user trust in enterprise NLP, yet pre-deployment validation is difficult in the common case of black-box deployment (API-only access) where representation-based explainers are infeasible and existing studies provide limited guidance on whether explanations remain stable under real user noise, especially when organizations migrate from encoder classifiers to decoder LLMs. To close this gap, we propose a unified black-box robustness evaluation framework for token-level explanations based on leave-one-out occlusion, and operationalize explanation robustness with top-token flip rate under realistic perturbations (swap, deletion, shuffling, and back-translation) at multiple severity levels. Using this protocol, we conduct a systematic cross-architecture comparison across three benchmark datasets and six models spanning encoder and decoder families (BERT, RoBERTa, Qwen 7B/14B, Llama 8B/70B; 64,800 cases). We find that decoder LLMs produce substantially more stable explanations than encoder baselines (73% lower flip rates on average), and that stability improves with model scale (44% gain from 7B to 70B). Finally, we relate robustness improvements to inference cost, yielding a practical cost-robustness tradeoff curve that supports model and explanation selection prior to deployment in compliance-sensitive applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一黑盒解释鲁棒性评估框架，发现解码器LLM比编码器模型解释更稳定，且规模越大鲁棒性越强。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业NLP系统需要鲁棒的解释以建立用户信任，但黑盒部署（仅API访问）下基于表示的解释器不可行，且现有研究对真实用户噪声下解释稳定性缺乏指导，尤其是从编码器分类器迁移到解码器LLM时。
analysis.problem: 如何评估黑盒NLP模型在真实扰动下token级解释的鲁棒性，并比较不同架构（编码器vs解码器）和规模的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 解码器LLM的解释稳定性显著优于编码器基线（平均翻转率降低73%），且模型规模增大（7B到70B）带来44%的稳定性提升。
analysis.method: 提出基于留一遮挡的统一黑盒鲁棒性评估框架，通过top-token翻转率在多种扰动（交换、删除、打乱、回译）和严重程度下量化解释鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出首个针对黑盒NLP模型token级解释的鲁棒性评估框架，适用于API-only场景。
通过大规模跨架构实验（6个模型、3个数据集、64,800个案例）系统比较了解释鲁棒性，发现解码器LLM更稳定且随规模提升。
建立了鲁棒性与推理成本之间的实用权衡曲线，支持合规敏感应用中的模型和解释选择。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准数据集上对BERT、RoBERTa、Qwen 7B/14B、Llama 8B/70B共6个模型进行64,800个案例的系统比较，使用四种扰动类型和多个严重程度。
limitations: 仅关注token级解释（留一遮挡），未覆盖其他解释方法（如基于梯度或注意力）。
扰动类型有限，可能未涵盖所有真实用户噪声模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一黑盒解释鲁棒性评估框架，发现解码器LLM比编码器模型解释更稳定，且规模越大鲁棒性越强。

papers.title: Privacy-Preserving Structureless Visual Localization via Image Obfuscation
papers.abstract: Visual localization is the task of estimating the camera pose of an image relative to a scene representation. In practice, visual localization systems are often cloud-based. Naturally, this raises privacy concerns in terms of revealing private details through the images sent to the server or through the representations stored on the server. Privacy-preserving localization aims to avoid such leakage of private details. However, the resulting localization approaches are significantly more complex, slower, and less accurate than their non-privacy-preserving counterparts. In this paper, we consider structureless localization methods in the context of privacy preservation. Structureless methods represent the scene through a set of reference images with known camera poses and intrinsics. In contrast to existing methods proposing representations that are as privacy-preserving as possible, we study a simple image obfuscation approach based on common image operations, e.g., replacing RGB images with (semantic) segmentations. We show that existing structureless pipelines do not need any special adjustments, as modern feature matchers can match obfuscated images out of the box. The results are easy-to-implement pipelines that can ensure both the privacy of the query images and the scene representations. Detailed experiments on multiple datasets show that the resulting methods achieve state-of-the-art pose accuracy for privacy-preserving approaches.

analysis.tldr: 通过简单图像混淆实现隐私保护的无结构视觉定位，无需修改现有管线即可达到SOTA精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 云视觉定位系统存在隐私泄露风险，现有隐私保护方法复杂、慢且精度低，亟需简单高效的方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护查询图像和场景表示隐私的同时，保持视觉定位的精度和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现代特征匹配器可以直接处理混淆图像（如语义分割图），无需调整现有无结构定位管线。
analysis.method: 采用常见图像操作（如替换为语义分割图）对查询图像和参考图像进行混淆，直接使用现成特征匹配器进行定位。
contributions: 提出一种简单易实现的图像混淆方法，同时保护查询图像和场景表示的隐私。
实验证明该方法在多个数据集上达到隐私保护定位的SOTA精度。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行了详细实验，与现有隐私保护方法比较，取得了最优位姿精度。
limitations: 混淆操作可能降低特征匹配质量，极端混淆下精度可能下降。
仅适用于无结构定位方法，对其他类型定位的适用性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过简单图像混淆实现隐私保护的无结构视觉定位，无需修改现有管线即可达到SOTA精度。

papers.title: Graph Propagated Projection Unlearning: A Unified Framework for Vision and Audio Discriminative Models
papers.abstract: The need to selectively and efficiently erase learned information from deep neural networks is becoming increasingly important for privacy, regulatory compliance, and adaptive system design. We introduce Graph-Propagated Projection Unlearning (GPPU), a unified and scalable algorithm for class-level unlearning that operates across both vision and audio models. GPPU employs graph-based propagation to identify class-specific directions in the feature space and projects representations onto the orthogonal subspace, followed by targeted fine-tuning, to ensure that target class information is effectively and irreversibly removed. Through comprehensive evaluations on six vision datasets and two large-scale audio benchmarks spanning a variety of architectures including CNNs, Vision Transformers, and Audio Transformers, we demonstrate that GPPU achieves highly efficient unlearning, realizing 10-20x speedups over prior methodologies while preserving model utility on retained classes. Our framework provides a principled and modality-agnostic approach to machine unlearning, evaluated at a scale that has received limited attention in prior work, contributing toward more efficient and responsible deep learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出图传播投影遗忘（GPPU），一种统一且可扩展的类级遗忘算法，适用于视觉和音频判别模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度神经网络中需要选择性且高效地擦除已学信息，以满足隐私、法规遵从和自适应系统设计的需求。现有方法在跨模态、大规模场景下效率低或缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何实现跨视觉和音频模态的高效、不可逆的类级遗忘，同时保持模型在保留类上的效用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GPPU使用图传播识别特征空间中特定类的方向，将表示投影到正交子空间，然后进行针对性微调，确保目标类信息被有效且不可逆地移除。
contributions: 提出GPPU，一个统一且可扩展的类级遗忘算法，适用于视觉和音频判别模型。
在六个视觉数据集和两个大规模音频基准上，使用多种架构（CNN、ViT、Audio Transformer）验证，实现10-20倍加速，同时保持模型效用。
analysis.experiments: 在六个视觉数据集和两个大规模音频基准上评估，涵盖CNN、Vision Transformers和Audio Transformers架构，实现10-20倍加速。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于类级遗忘，不适用于样本级或更细粒度的遗忘。
图传播和投影步骤的计算开销在极大规模数据集上可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图传播投影遗忘（GPPU），一种统一且可扩展的类级遗忘算法，适用于视觉和音频判别模型。

papers.title: Mathematics Teachers Interactions with a Multi-Agent System for Personalized Problem Generation
papers.abstract: Large language models can increasingly adapt educational tasks to learners characteristics. In the present study, we examine a multi-agent teacher-in-the-loop system for personalizing middle school math problems. The teacher enters a base problem and desired topic, the LLM generates the problem, and then four AI agents evaluate the problem using criteria that each specializes in (mathematical accuracy, authenticity, readability, and realism). Eight middle school mathematics teachers created 212 problems in ASSISTments using the system and assigned these problems to their students. We find that both teachers and students wanted to modify the fine-grained personalized elements of the real-world context of the problems, signaling issues with authenticity and fit. Although the agents detected many issues with realism as the problems were being written, there were few realism issues noted by teachers and students in the final versions. Issues with readability and mathematical hallucinations were also somewhat rare. Implications for multi-agent systems for personalization that support teacher control are given.

analysis.tldr: 研究了一个教师参与的多智能体系统，用于个性化生成中学数学题，发现教师和学生希望修改问题的真实世界背景细节。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型在教育任务中可适应学习者特征，但如何有效支持教师个性化生成题目并保证质量仍待探索。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个多智能体系统，让教师参与生成个性化数学题，并评估题目在数学准确性、真实性、可读性和现实性方面的质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 教师和学生希望修改问题的真实世界背景细节，表明真实性和适配性存在问题；智能体在写作时检测到许多现实性问题，但最终版本中教师和学生指出的现实性问题较少；可读性和数学幻觉问题也较少见。
analysis.method: 教师输入基础题目和期望主题，LLM生成题目，然后四个AI智能体分别评估数学准确性、真实性、可读性和现实性。
contributions: 提出了一个教师参与的多智能体系统用于个性化数学题生成。
通过教师和学生使用系统的实证研究，揭示了真实世界背景细节的个性化需求。
analysis.experiments: 八位中学数学教师在ASSISTments系统中使用该系统创建了212道题目并布置给学生，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 样本量较小（8位教师），可能不具广泛代表性。
未详细说明智能体评估的准确性和可靠性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究了一个教师参与的多智能体系统，用于个性化生成中学数学题，发现教师和学生希望修改问题的真实世界背景细节。

papers.title: Interpretable DNA Sequence Classification via Dynamic Feature Generation in Decision Trees
papers.abstract: The analysis of DNA sequences has become critical in numerous fields, from evolutionary biology to understanding gene regulation and disease mechanisms. While deep neural networks can achieve remarkable predictive performance, they typically operate as black boxes. Contrasting these black boxes, axis-aligned decision trees offer a promising direction for interpretable DNA sequence analysis, yet they suffer from a fundamental limitation: considering individual raw features in isolation at each split limits their expressivity, which results in prohibitive tree depths that hinder both interpretability and generalization performance. We address this challenge by introducing DEFT, a novel framework that adaptively generates high-level sequence features during tree construction. DEFT leverages large language models to propose biologically-informed features tailored to the local sequence distributions at each node and to iteratively refine them with a reflection mechanism. Empirically, we demonstrate that DEFT discovers human-interpretable and highly predictive sequence features across a diverse range of genomic tasks.

analysis.tldr: DEFT框架通过大语言模型动态生成生物信息特征，使决策树在DNA序列分类中兼具可解释性和高预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: DNA序列分析在进化生物学、基因调控和疾病机制研究中至关重要，但深度神经网络作为黑箱模型缺乏可解释性，而传统决策树因孤立考虑原始特征导致树深过大、可解释性和泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何让决策树在DNA序列分类中既能保持可解释性，又能避免因特征孤立导致树深过大和性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出轴对齐决策树在DNA序列分析中因每次分裂只考虑单个原始特征，表达能力受限，导致树深度过大，损害可解释性和泛化性能。
analysis.method: 提出DEFT框架，利用大语言模型在决策树构建过程中自适应生成高层序列特征，并根据节点局部序列分布进行迭代优化，同时引入反思机制。
contributions: 提出DEFT框架，将大语言模型与决策树结合，动态生成生物信息特征。
在多种基因组任务上验证DEFT能发现人类可解释且高预测性的序列特征。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖大语言模型的计算开销可能较大。
特征生成的质量可能受限于预训练语言模型的领域知识。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DEFT框架通过大语言模型动态生成生物信息特征，使决策树在DNA序列分类中兼具可解释性和高预测性能。

papers.title: Leveraging Weighted Syntactic and Semantic Context Assessment Summary (wSSAS) Towards Text Categorization Using LLMs
papers.abstract: The use of Large Language Models (LLMs) for reliable, enterprise-grade analytics such as text categorization is often hindered by the stochastic nature of attention mechanisms and sensitivity to noise that compromise their analytical precision and reproducibility. To address these technical frictions, this paper introduces the Weighted Syntactic and Semantic Context Assessment Summary (wSSAS), a deterministic framework designed to enforce data integrity on large-scale, chaotic datasets. We propose a two-phased validation framework that first organizes raw text into a hierarchical classification structure containing Themes, Stories, and Clusters. It then leverages a Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) to prioritize high-value semantic features, ensuring the model's attention remains focused on the most representative data points. By incorporating this scoring mechanism into a Summary-of-Summaries (SoS) architecture, the framework effectively isolates essential information and mitigates background noise during data aggregation. Experimental results using Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite across diverse datasets - including Google Business reviews, Amazon Product reviews, and Goodreads Book reviews - demonstrate that wSSAS significantly improves clustering integrity and categorization accuracy. Our findings indicate that wSSAS reduces categorization entropy and provides a reproducible pathway for improving LLM based summaries based on a high-precision, deterministic process for large-scale text categorization.

analysis.tldr: 提出wSSAS框架，通过信噪比和分层结构提升LLM文本分类的确定性与准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在文本分类等企业级分析中因注意力机制的随机性和噪声敏感性导致精度和可重复性不足，亟需确定性框架来保证大规模混乱数据集的数据完整性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个确定性框架，在LLM文本分类中抑制噪声、聚焦高价值语义特征，提升聚类完整性和分类准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出wSSAS框架，包含两阶段验证：首先将原始文本组织为层次分类结构（主题、故事、簇），然后利用信噪比（SNR）优先选择高价值语义特征，并集成到Summary-of-Summaries（SoS）架构中，隔离关键信息并抑制背景噪声。
contributions: 提出wSSAS确定性框架，通过SNR和SoS架构提升LLM文本分类的鲁棒性和可重复性。
在多个真实数据集上验证了wSSAS在降低分类熵、提升聚类完整性方面的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 使用Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite在Google商家评论、亚马逊产品评论和Goodreads书评数据集上进行实验，结果显示wSSAS显著提升了聚类完整性和分类准确性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的文本数据（如评论），泛化性需进一步验证。
框架依赖预定义的层次结构，对动态或非结构化数据的适应性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出wSSAS框架，通过信噪比和分层结构提升LLM文本分类的确定性与准确性。

papers.title: VISTA: Validation-Informed Trajectory Adaptation via Self-Distillation
papers.abstract: Deep learning models may converge to suboptimal solutions despite strong validation accuracy, masking an optimization failure we term Trajectory Deviation. This is because as training proceeds, models can abandon high generalization states for specific data sub-populations, thus discarding previously learned latent features without triggering classical overfitting signals. To address this problem we introduce VISTA, an online self-distillation framework that enforces consistency along the optimization trajectory. Using a validation-informed Marginal Coverage score, VISTA identifies expert anchors, which are earlier model states that retain specialized competence over distinct data regions. A coverage-weighted ensemble of these anchors is integrated online during training, regularizing the loss landscape and preserving mastered knowledge. When evaluated across multiple benchmarks, VISTA demonstrates improved robustness and generalization over standard training and prior self-distillation methods, while a lightweight implementation reduces storage overhead by 90% without performance loss.

analysis.tldr: VISTA通过验证信息引导的自蒸馏，在训练中保持优化轨迹一致性，防止模型遗忘已学知识。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型可能收敛到次优解，尽管验证准确率高，但存在优化失败模式（轨迹偏差），模型会放弃对特定数据子群体的高泛化状态，丢弃已学潜在特征而不触发过拟合信号。
analysis.problem: 解决训练过程中模型因轨迹偏差而遗忘已学知识的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到轨迹偏差现象：模型在训练中会放弃对特定数据子群体的高泛化状态，丢弃已学潜在特征，但验证准确率未下降，不触发经典过拟合信号。
analysis.method: 提出VISTA，一种在线自蒸馏框架，通过验证信息驱动的边际覆盖分数识别专家锚点（早期模型状态），并在训练中集成覆盖加权的锚点集成，正则化损失景观，保留已掌握知识。
contributions: 识别并形式化了轨迹偏差这一优化失败模式
提出VISTA框架，利用验证信息引导的自蒸馏保持优化轨迹一致性
轻量级实现减少90%存储开销且无性能损失
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估，VISTA相比标准训练和先前自蒸馏方法提升了鲁棒性和泛化性。
limitations: 可能依赖验证集质量，验证集噪声可能影响锚点选择
未讨论对超大规模模型或长训练周期的扩展性
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VISTA通过验证信息引导的自蒸馏，在训练中保持优化轨迹一致性，防止模型遗忘已学知识。

papers.title: SIR-Bench: Evaluating Investigation Depth in Security Incident Response Agents
papers.abstract: We present SIR-Bench, a benchmark of 794 test cases for evaluating autonomous security incident response agents that distinguishes genuine forensic investigation from alert parroting. Derived from 129 anonymized incident patterns with expert-validated ground truth, SIR-Bench measures not only whether agents reach correct triage decisions, but whether they discover novel evidence through active investigation. To construct SIR-Bench, we develop Once Upon A Threat (OUAT), a framework that replays real incident patterns in controlled cloud environments, producing authentic telemetry with measurable investigation outcomes. Our evaluation methodology introduces three complementary metrics: triage accuracy (M1), novel finding discovery (M2), and tool usage appropriateness (M3), assessed through an adversarial LLM-as-Judge that inverts the burden of proof -- requiring concrete forensic evidence to credit investigations. Evaluating our SIR agent on the benchmark demonstrates 97.1% true positive (TP) detection, 73.4% false positive (FP) rejection, and 5.67 novel key findings per case, establishing a baseline against which future investigation agents can be measured.

analysis.tldr: 提出SIR-Bench基准，用于评估安全事件响应智能体的调查深度，区分真实取证与警报复读。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全事件响应智能体评估多关注最终决策正确性，忽略调查过程是否真正发现新证据，存在“警报复读”的虚假能力问题。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能区分真实取证调查与表面警报复读的安全事件响应智能体评估基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含794个测试用例的SIR-Bench基准，基于129个专家验证的匿名事件模式，通过OUAT框架在受控云环境中重放真实事件模式生成遥测数据，并采用三项互补指标（M1: 分诊准确率、M2: 新发现发现、M3: 工具使用恰当性）及对抗性LLM裁判进行评估。
contributions: 提出SIR-Bench基准，包含794个测试用例，用于评估安全事件响应智能体的调查深度。
开发OUAT框架，可在受控云环境中重放真实事件模式并生成可测量调查结果的遥测数据。
引入三项互补评估指标及对抗性LLM裁判，要求具体取证证据才能认定调查有效。
analysis.experiments: 在SIR-Bench上评估SIR智能体，实现97.1%真阳性检测率、73.4%假阳性拒绝率，每案例平均发现5.67个新关键发现，建立了基线。
limitations: 基准基于特定事件模式，可能无法覆盖所有真实安全场景。
对抗性LLM裁判的可靠性可能受限于LLM自身能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SIR-Bench基准，用于评估安全事件响应智能体的调查深度，区分真实取证与警报复读。

papers.title: Does Visual Token Pruning Improve Calibration? An Empirical Study on Confidence in MLLMs
papers.abstract: Visual token pruning is a widely used strategy for efficient inference in multimodal large language models (MLLMs), but existing work mainly evaluates it with task accuracy. In this paper, we study how visual token pruning affects model calibration, that is, whether predicted confidence matches actual correctness. Using LLaVA-1.5-7B on POPE and ScienceQA-IMG, we evaluate Expected Calibration Error (ECE), Brier score, and AURC under several pruning strategies, including SCOPE with different saliency weights, saliency-only pruning, FastV, and random pruning, across multiple token budgets. Our results show that pruning does not simply trade reliability for efficiency. On POPE, a pure-coverage setting in SCOPE achieves substantially lower ECE than the full unpruned model while maintaining similar accuracy. An internal alpha-sweep further shows a consistent trend: reducing the saliency weight improves calibration at all tested token budgets, while accuracy changes only slightly. In contrast, saliency-based pruning leads to worse calibration, and real FastV causes severe performance degradation in our setting. On ScienceQA-IMG, pruning also reduces ECE, with accuracy remaining stable or slightly improving. We additionally study the gap power exponent in coverage-based selection and find that its default setting is not always optimal. Overall, our results suggest that visual token pruning should be evaluated not only by accuracy, but also by confidence quality, especially for multimodal systems that need reliable decisions.

analysis.tldr: 视觉token剪枝不一定损害校准，适当策略甚至能提升置信度质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉token剪枝工作主要关注任务准确率，忽略了模型校准（即预测置信度是否匹配实际正确性），而这对需要可靠决策的多模态系统至关重要。
analysis.problem: 研究视觉token剪枝如何影响多模态大语言模型的校准性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在POPE上，SCOPE的纯覆盖设置（低显著性权重）在保持相似准确率的同时显著降低ECE；基于显著性的剪枝导致校准变差；FastV导致严重性能下降。在ScienceQA-IMG上，剪枝也降低了ECE，准确率稳定或略有提升。覆盖选择中的gap power指数默认设置并非最优。
analysis.method: 在LLaVA-1.5-7B上，使用多种剪枝策略（SCOPE、显著性剪枝、FastV、随机剪枝）和多个token预算，评估ECE、Brier分数和AURC。
contributions: 首次系统研究视觉token剪枝对MLLM校准的影响。
发现适当剪枝策略（如低显著性权重）可改善校准，而基于显著性的剪枝会恶化校准。
揭示覆盖选择中gap power指数默认设置并非最优。
analysis.experiments: 在POPE和ScienceQA-IMG数据集上，使用LLaVA-1.5-7B模型，评估多种剪枝策略和token预算下的ECE、Brier分数和AURC。
limitations: 仅使用单一模型（LLaVA-1.5-7B）和两个数据集，泛化性需验证。
未深入分析校准改善的理论原因。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 视觉token剪枝不一定损害校准，适当策略甚至能提升置信度质量。

papers.title: Memory as Metabolism: A Design for Companion Knowledge Systems
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation remains the dominant pattern for giving LLMs persistent memory, but a visible cluster of personal wiki-style memory architectures emerged in April 2026 -- design proposals from Karpathy, MemPalace, and LLM Wiki v2 that compile knowledge into an interlinked artifact for long-term use by a single user. They sit alongside production memory systems that the major labs have shipped for over a year, and an active academic lineage including MemGPT, Generative Agents, Mem0, Zep, A-Mem, MemMachine, SleepGate, and Second Me. Within a 2026 landscape of emerging governance frameworks for agent context and memory -- including Context Cartography and MemOS -- this paper proposes a companion-specific governance profile: a set of normative obligations, a time-structured procedural rule, and testable conformance invariants for the specific failure mode of entrenchment under user-coupled drift in single-user knowledge wikis built on the LLM wiki pattern. The design principle is that personal LLM memory is a companion system: its job is to mirror the user on operational dimensions (working vocabulary, load-bearing structure, continuity of context) and compensate on epistemic failure modes (entrenchment, suppression of contradicting evidence, Kuhnian ossification). Five operations implement this split -- TRIAGE, DECAY, CONTEXTUALIZE, CONSOLIDATE, AUDIT -- supported by memory gravity and minority-hypothesis retention. The sharpest prediction: accumulated contradictory evidence should have a structural path to updating a centrality-protected dominant interpretation through multi-cycle buffer pressure accumulation, a failure mode no existing benchmark captures. The safety story at the single-agent level is partial, and the paper is explicit about what it does and does not solve.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向单用户LLM记忆的同伴知识系统设计，通过代谢机制对抗知识固化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM记忆系统（如RAG、个人wiki）在长期使用中会出现知识固化、抑制矛盾证据等失败模式，缺乏针对单用户同伴系统的治理框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种同伴知识系统，使其在操作维度上镜像用户，并在认知失败模式（如固化、抑制矛盾证据）上提供补偿。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出单用户知识wiki在用户耦合漂移下会出现固化（entrenchment）失败模式，且现有基准无法捕捉累积矛盾证据通过多周期缓冲压力更新中心保护解释的路径。
analysis.method: 提出一个包含五项操作（TRIAGE、DECAY、CONTEXTUALIZE、CONSOLIDATE、AUDIT）的设计，由记忆引力（memory gravity）和少数假设保留（minority-hypothesis retention）支持，并定义了一套规范性义务、时间结构程序和可测试的一致性不变量。
contributions: 提出同伴特定治理框架，包括规范性义务、时间结构程序和一致性不变量。
设计五项操作实现记忆代谢，并引入记忆引力和少数假设保留机制。
指出累积矛盾证据通过多周期缓冲压力更新中心解释的失败模式，现有基准未覆盖。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 单智能体级别的安全性故事是部分的，未解决多智能体或系统级问题。
设计尚未在真实用户场景中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向单用户LLM记忆的同伴知识系统设计，通过代谢机制对抗知识固化。

papers.title: Benchmarking Deflection and Hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) increasingly rely on retrieval to answer knowledge-intensive multimodal questions. Existing benchmarks overlook conflicts between visual and textual evidence and the importance of generating deflections (e.g., Sorry, I cannot answer...) when retrieved knowledge is incomplete. These benchmarks also suffer from rapid obsolescence, as growing LVLM training sets allow models to answer many questions without retrieval. We address these gaps with three contributions. First, we propose a dynamic data curation pipeline that preserves benchmark difficulty over time by filtering for genuinely retrieval-dependent samples. Second, we introduce VLM-DeflectionBench, a benchmark of 2,775 samples spanning diverse multimodal retrieval settings, designed to probe model behaviour under conflicting or insufficient evidence. Third, we define a fine-grained evaluation protocol with four scenarios that disentangle parametric memorization from retrieval robustness. Experiments across 20 state-of-the-art LVLMs indicate that models usually fail to deflect in the presence of noisy or misleading evidence. Our results highlight the need to evaluate not only what models know, but how they behave when they do not, and serve as a reusable and extensible benchmark for reliable KB-VQA evaluation. All resources will be publicly available upon publication.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态数据筛选管道和VLM-DeflectionBench基准，评估LVLM在冲突/不足证据下的回避与幻觉行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准忽视视觉与文本证据冲突及模型生成回避回答的能力，且因训练集增长导致基准快速过时。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估LVLM在检索知识不完整或冲突时能否正确回避（deflection）而非产生幻觉的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明模型在噪声或误导证据下通常无法正确回避。
analysis.method: 提出动态数据筛选管道保持基准难度，构建VLM-DeflectionBench（2775样本），定义四场景细粒度评估协议。
contributions: 提出动态数据筛选管道以维持基准时效性
构建VLM-DeflectionBench基准，覆盖多模态检索设置
定义四场景评估协议，区分参数记忆与检索鲁棒性
analysis.experiments: 在20个SOTA LVLM上实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准规模有限（2775样本）
未覆盖所有可能的冲突类型
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态数据筛选管道和VLM-DeflectionBench基准，评估LVLM在冲突/不足证据下的回避与幻觉行为。

papers.title: Curvelet-Based Frequency-Aware Feature Enhancement for Deepfake Detection
papers.abstract: The proliferation of sophisticated generative models has significantly advanced the realism of synthetic facial content, known as deepfakes, raising serious concerns about digital trust. Although modern deep learning-based detectors perform well, many rely on spatial-domain features that degrade under compression. This limitation has prompted a shift toward integrating frequency-domain representations with deep learning to improve robustness. Prior research has explored frequency transforms such as Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT), Fast Fourier Transform (FFT), and Wavelet Transform, among others. However, to the best of our knowledge, the Curvelet Transform, despite its superior directional and multiscale properties, remains entirely unexplored in the context of deepfake detection. In this work, we introduce a novel Curvelet-based detection approach that enhances feature quality through wedge-level attention and scale-aware spatial masking, both trained to selectively emphasize discriminative frequency components. The refined frequency cues are reconstructed and passed to a modified pretrained Xception network for classification. Evaluated on two compression qualities in the challenging FaceForensics++ dataset, our method achieves 98.48% accuracy and 99.96% AUC on FF++ low compression, while maintaining strong performance under high compression, demonstrating the efficacy and interpretability of Curvelet-informed forgery detection.

analysis.tldr: 首次将Curvelet变换用于深度伪造检测，通过楔形注意力与尺度感知空间掩膜增强频率特征，在FaceForensics++上取得高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测器多依赖空间域特征，在压缩条件下性能下降；频率域方法虽有探索，但Curvelet变换因其优异的方向性和多尺度特性尚未被用于该任务。
analysis.problem: 如何利用Curvelet变换提取鲁棒的频率特征，提升深度伪造检测在压缩场景下的准确性和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于Curvelet变换的检测方法：通过楔形注意力（wedge-level attention）和尺度感知空间掩膜（scale-aware spatial masking）选择性增强判别性频率分量，重构后输入修改的预训练Xception网络进行分类。
contributions: 首次将Curvelet变换引入深度伪造检测领域。
设计了楔形注意力和尺度感知空间掩膜机制，有效增强频率特征。
在FaceForensics++数据集上验证了方法在高低压缩下的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在FaceForensics++数据集上评估，低压缩下准确率98.48%，AUC 99.96%；高压缩下保持强性能。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集（FaceForensics++）上评估，泛化性需更多验证。
未与其他频率域方法（如DCT、FFT）进行直接对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次将Curvelet变换用于深度伪造检测，通过楔形注意力与尺度感知空间掩膜增强频率特征，在FaceForensics++上取得高精度。

papers.title: WiseOWL: A Methodology for Evaluating Ontological Descriptiveness and Semantic Correctness for Ontology Reuse and Ontology Recommendations
papers.abstract: The Semantic Web standardizes concept meaning for humans and machines, enabling machine-operable content and consistent interpretation that improves advanced analytics. Reusing ontologies speeds development and enforces consistency, yet selecting the optimal choice is challenging because authors lack systematic selection criteria and often rely on intuition that is difficult to justify, limiting reuse. To solve this, WiseOWL is proposed, a methodology with scoring and guidance to select ontologies for reuse. It scores four metrics: (i) Well-Described, measuring documentation coverage; (ii) Well-Defined, using state-of-the-art embeddings to assess label-definition alignment; (iii) Connection, capturing structural interconnectedness; and (iv) Hierarchical Breadth, reflecting hierarchical balance. WiseOWL outputs normalized 0-10 scores with actionable feedback. Implemented as a Streamlit app, it ingests OWL format, converts to RDF Turtle, and provides interactive visualizations. Evaluation across six ontologies, including the Plant Ontology (PO), Gene Ontology (GO), Semanticscience Integrated Ontology (SIO), Food Ontology (FoodON), Dublin Core (DC), and GoodRelations, demonstrates promising effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: WiseOWL 提出一种基于多维度评分的方法，帮助用户系统评估和选择可复用的本体。
analysis.research_motivation: 本体复用可加速开发并保证一致性，但当前缺乏系统化的选择标准，作者常凭直觉决策，难以证明合理性，限制了复用效果。
analysis.problem: 如何为本体复用提供客观、可量化的评估指标和选择指导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: WiseOWL 方法包含四个评分指标：Well-Described（文档覆盖度）、Well-Defined（标签-定义对齐，使用嵌入）、Connection（结构互联性）和 Hierarchical Breadth（层次平衡性），输出归一化 0-10 分并附带可操作反馈。实现为 Streamlit 应用，支持 OWL 格式输入并转换为 RDF Turtle，提供交互式可视化。
contributions: 提出本体复用选择的系统化方法论 WiseOWL，包含四个评估维度。
实现可交互的 Streamlit 工具，支持本体导入、评分和可视化。
analysis.experiments: 在六个本体（Plant Ontology、Gene Ontology、Semanticscience Integrated Ontology、Food Ontology、Dublin Core、GoodRelations）上评估，展示了方法的有效性。
limitations: 评估本体数量有限，可能未覆盖所有领域。
评分指标的有效性需更多用户研究验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WiseOWL 提出一种基于多维度评分的方法，帮助用户系统评估和选择可复用的本体。

papers.title: A Framework for Longitudinal Health AI Agents
papers.abstract: Although artificial intelligence (AI) agents are increasingly proposed to support potentially longitudinal health tasks, such as symptom management, behavior change, and patient support, most current implementations fall short of facilitating user intent and fostering accountability. This contrasts with prior work on supporting longitudinal needs, both within and beyond clinical settings, where follow-up, coherent reasoning, and sustained alignment with individuals' goals are critical for both effectiveness and safety.
