limitations: 可能依赖视图数量，收益递减。
未提及对极端遮挡或大视角变化的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SyncFix通过多视图同步扩散细化，修复3D重建中的跨视图不一致问题。

papers.title: C-ReD: A Comprehensive Chinese Benchmark for AI-Generated Text Detection Derived from Real-World Prompts
papers.abstract: Recently, large language models (LLMs) are capable of generating highly fluent textual content. While they offer significant convenience to humans, they also introduce various risks, like phishing and academic dishonesty. Numerous research efforts have been dedicated to developing algorithms for detecting AI-generated text and constructing relevant datasets. However, in the domain of Chinese corpora, challenges remain, including limited model diversity and data homogeneity. To address these issues, we propose C-ReD: a comprehensive Chinese Real-prompt AI-generated Detection benchmark. Experiments demonstrate that C-ReD not only enables reliable in-domain detection but also supports strong generalization to unseen LLMs and external Chinese datasets-addressing critical gaps in model diversity, domain coverage, and prompt realism that have limited prior Chinese detection benchmarks. We release our resources at https://github.com/HeraldofLight/C-ReD.

analysis.tldr: C-ReD是一个基于真实提示的综合中文AI文本检测基准，解决了现有基准模型多样性不足、数据同质化的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有中文AI文本检测基准存在模型多样性有限、数据同质化严重、提示不够真实等问题，限制了检测算法的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 构建一个覆盖多种LLM、多个领域、使用真实用户提示的中文AI生成文本检测基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 收集真实用户提示，构建包含多种LLM生成文本和多个领域的中文检测基准C-ReD。
contributions: 提出了C-ReD，一个基于真实提示的综合中文AI文本检测基准。
实验表明C-ReD支持可靠的域内检测和强泛化能力，弥补了模型多样性、领域覆盖和提示真实性方面的不足。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明C-ReD在域内检测和泛化到未见LLM及外部中文数据集上表现良好。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有中文LLM和领域。
基准的时效性可能随新模型出现而降低。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: C-ReD是一个基于真实提示的综合中文AI文本检测基准，解决了现有基准模型多样性不足、数据同质化的问题。

papers.title: LottieGPT: Tokenizing Vector Animation for Autoregressive Generation
papers.abstract: Despite rapid progress in video generation, existing models are incapable of producing vector animation, a dominant and highly expressive form of multimedia on the Internet. Vector animations offer resolution-independence, compactness, semantic structure, and editable parametric motion representations, yet current generative models operate exclusively in raster space and thus cannot synthesize them. Meanwhile, recent advances in large multimodal models demonstrate strong capabilities in generating structured data such as slides, 3D meshes, LEGO sequences, and indoor layouts, suggesting that native vector animation generation may be achievable. In this work, we present the first framework for tokenizing and autoregressively generating vector animations. We adopt Lottie, a widely deployed JSON-based animation standard, and design a tailored Lottie Tokenizer that encodes layered geometric primitives, transforms, and keyframe-based motion into a compact and semantically aligned token sequence. To support large-scale training, we also construct LottieAnimation-660K, the largest and most diverse vector animation dataset to date, consisting of 660k real-world Lottie animation and 15M static Lottie image files curated from broad Internet sources. Building upon these components, we finetune Qwen-VL to create LottieGPT, a native multimodal model capable of generating coherent, editable vector animations directly from natural language or visual prompts. Experiments show that our tokenizer dramatically reduces sequence length while preserving structural fidelity, enabling effective autoregressive learning of dynamic vector content. LottieGPT exhibits strong generalization across diverse animation styles and outperforms previous state-of-the-art models on SVG generation (a special case of single-frame vector animation).

analysis.tldr: 首个将矢量动画（Lottie）转化为token序列并实现自回归生成的框架，构建了大规模数据集LottieAnimation-660K。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成模型仅能处理光栅图像，无法生成矢量动画，而矢量动画具有分辨率无关、紧凑、语义结构化和可编辑参数化运动等优势，在互联网中广泛使用。
analysis.problem: 如何将矢量动画（Lottie格式）转化为适合自回归生成的token序列，并实现从自然语言或视觉提示生成连贯、可编辑的矢量动画。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计Lottie Tokenizer将分层几何图元、变换和关键帧运动编码为紧凑且语义对齐的token序列；构建LottieAnimation-660K数据集；基于Qwen-VL微调得到LottieGPT，实现多模态生成。
contributions: 首个矢量动画token化与自回归生成框架。
构建了最大规模的矢量动画数据集LottieAnimation-660K（66万动画+1500万静态图像）。
LottieGPT在SVG生成（单帧矢量动画特例）上超越先前最优模型。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明tokenizer大幅减少序列长度同时保持结构保真度，LottieGPT在多种动画风格上展现强泛化能力，并在SVG生成任务上超越先前最优模型。
limitations: 可能仅支持Lottie格式，未涵盖其他矢量动画标准。
生成动画的时长和复杂度可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个将矢量动画（Lottie）转化为token序列并实现自回归生成的框架，构建了大规模数据集LottieAnimation-660K。

papers.title: A Mechanistic Analysis of Looped Reasoning Language Models
papers.abstract: Reasoning has become a central capability in large language models. Recent research has shown that reasoning performance can be improved by looping an LLM's layers in the latent dimension, resulting in looped reasoning language models. Despite promising results, few works have investigated how their internal dynamics differ from those of standard feedforward models. In this paper, we conduct a mechanistic analysis of the latent states in looped language models, focusing in particular on how the stages of inference observed in feedforward models compare to those observed in looped ones. To this end, we analyze cyclic recurrence and show that for many of the studied models each layer in the cycle converges to a distinct fixed point; consequently, the recurrent block follows a consistent cyclic trajectory in the latent space. We provide evidence that as these fixed points are reached, attention-head behavior stabilizes, leading to constant behavior across recurrences. Empirically, we discover that recurrent blocks learn stages of inference that closely mirror those of feedforward models, repeating these stages in depth with each iteration. We study how recurrent block size, input injection, and normalization influence the emergence and stability of these cyclic fixed points. We believe these findings help translate mechanistic insights into practical guidance for architectural design.

analysis.tldr: 循环推理语言模型的潜在状态会收敛到循环不动点，其推理阶段与标准前馈模型高度相似。
analysis.research_motivation: 循环推理语言模型通过循环层来提升推理能力，但其内部动力学机制尚不明确，缺乏与标准前馈模型的对比分析。
analysis.problem: 揭示循环推理语言模型中潜在状态的动态行为，特别是循环层如何实现推理阶段以及其与标准前馈模型的异同。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 循环块中的每一层收敛到不同的不动点，形成一致的循环轨迹；注意力头行为在不动点处稳定；循环块学习的推理阶段与标准前馈模型高度相似，并在每次迭代中重复这些阶段。
analysis.method: 对循环语言模型的潜在状态进行机制分析，通过分析循环递归、不动点收敛、注意力头行为以及循环块大小、输入注入和归一化等因素的影响。
contributions: 发现循环语言模型中每层收敛到不同的不动点，形成循环轨迹。
揭示循环块学习的推理阶段与标准前馈模型高度相似。
分析了循环块大小、输入注入和归一化对循环不动点的影响。

未提供实际推理性能提升的定量结果。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 循环推理语言模型的潜在状态会收敛到循环不动点，其推理阶段与标准前馈模型高度相似。

papers.title: ClawGuard: A Runtime Security Framework for Tool-Augmented LLM Agents Against Indirect Prompt Injection
papers.abstract: Tool-augmented Large Language Model (LLM) agents have demonstrated impressive capabilities in automating complex, multi-step real-world tasks, yet remain vulnerable to indirect prompt injection. Adversaries exploit this weakness by embedding malicious instructions within tool-returned content, which agents directly incorporate into their conversation history as trusted observations. To address these vulnerabilities, we introduce \textsc{ClawGuard}, a novel runtime security framework that enforces a user-confirmed rule set at every tool-call boundary, transforming unreliable alignment-dependent defense into a deterministic, auditable mechanism that intercepts adversarial tool calls before any real-world effect is produced. By automatically deriving task-specific access constraints from the user's stated objective prior to any external tool invocation, \textsc{ClawGuard} blocks all three injection pathways without model modification or infrastructure change. Experiments across five state-of-the-art language models on six injection benchmarks covering web, local, MCP, and skill channels, as well as three utility benchmarks covering OS, web, and code tasks, demonstrate that \textsc{ClawGuard} achieves robust protection against indirect prompt injection without compromising agent utility or introducing significant token overhead. This work establishes deterministic tool-call boundary enforcement as an effective defense mechanism for secure agentic AI systems. Code is publicly available at github.com/Claw-Guard/ClawGuard/.

analysis.tldr: ClawGuard 通过在工具调用边界强制执行用户确认的规则集，为工具增强型 LLM 智能体提供运行时安全防护，有效防御间接提示注入攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 工具增强型 LLM 智能体在执行复杂任务时容易受到间接提示注入攻击，攻击者将恶意指令嵌入工具返回内容中，而现有依赖对齐的防御机制不可靠且难以审计。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改模型或基础设施的前提下，为工具增强型 LLM 智能体提供确定性的运行时防御，以阻断间接提示注入攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析。
analysis.method: ClawGuard 在每次工具调用边界强制执行用户确认的规则集，自动从用户目标中推导任务特定的访问约束，从而阻断所有三种注入路径。
contributions: 提出 ClawGuard，一种运行时安全框架，通过确定性工具调用边界执行防御间接提示注入。
在多个模型和基准上验证了 ClawGuard 在不影响智能体效用和引入显著 token 开销的情况下实现鲁棒保护。
analysis.experiments: 在五个最先进语言模型上，针对覆盖 web、local、MCP 和 skill 通道的六个注入基准以及覆盖 OS、web 和代码任务的三个效用基准进行了实验。
limitations: 可能仅适用于工具增强型 LLM 智能体，对其他类型智能体的适用性未知。
规则集的自动推导可能无法覆盖所有复杂任务场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ClawGuard 通过在工具调用边界强制执行用户确认的规则集，为工具增强型 LLM 智能体提供运行时安全防护，有效防御间接提示注入攻击。

papers.title: LMMs Meet Object-Centric Vision: Understanding, Segmentation, Editing and Generation
papers.abstract: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have achieved remarkable progress in general-purpose vision--language understanding, yet they remain limited in tasks requiring precise object-level grounding, fine-grained spatial reasoning, and controllable visual manipulation. In particular, existing systems often struggle to identify the correct instance, preserve object identity across interactions, and localize or modify designated regions with high precision. Object-centric vision provides a principled framework for addressing these challenges by promoting explicit representations and operations over visual entities, thereby extending multimodal systems from global scene understanding to object-level understanding, segmentation, editing, and generation. This paper presents a comprehensive review of recent advances at the convergence of LMMs and object-centric vision. We organize the literature into four major themes: object-centric visual understanding, object-centric referring segmentation, object-centric visual editing, and object-centric visual generation. We further summarize the key modeling paradigms, learning strategies, and evaluation protocols that support these capabilities. Finally, we discuss open challenges and future directions, including robust instance permanence, fine-grained spatial control, consistent multi-step interaction, unified cross-task modeling, and reliable benchmarking under distribution shift. We hope this paper provides a structured perspective on the development of scalable, precise, and trustworthy object-centric multimodal systems.

analysis.tldr: 综述大多模态模型与以对象为中心的视觉在理解、分割、编辑和生成方面的融合进展。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LMMs在细粒度对象级任务中表现不足，如实例识别、身份保持和精确区域定位，需要对象中心视觉框架来增强能力。
analysis.problem: LMMs缺乏精确的对象级定位、空间推理和可控视觉操作能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 综述了对象中心视觉的四个主题：理解、分割、编辑和生成，并总结了建模范式、学习策略和评估协议。
contributions: 系统梳理了LMMs与对象中心视觉交叉领域的最新进展
归纳了关键建模范式、学习策略和评估协议
指出了开放挑战和未来方向

papers.title: HDR Video Generation via Latent Alignment with Logarithmic Encoding
papers.abstract: High dynamic range (HDR) imagery offers a rich and faithful representation of scene radiance, but remains challenging for generative models due to its mismatch with the bounded, perceptually compressed data on which these models are trained. A natural solution is to learn new representations for HDR, which introduces additional complexity and data requirements. In this work, we show that HDR generation can be achieved in a much simpler way by leveraging the strong visual priors already captured by pretrained generative models. We observe that a logarithmic encoding widely used in cinematic pipelines maps HDR imagery into a distribution that is naturally aligned with the latent space of these models, enabling direct adaptation via lightweight fine-tuning without retraining an encoder. To recover details that are not directly observable in the input, we further introduce a training strategy based on camera-mimicking degradations that encourages the model to infer missing high dynamic range content from its learned priors. Combining these insights, we demonstrate high-quality HDR video generation using a pretrained video model with minimal adaptation, achieving strong results across diverse scenes and challenging lighting conditions. Our results indicate that HDR, despite representing a fundamentally different image formation regime, can be handled effectively without redesigning generative models, provided that the representation is chosen to align with their learned priors.

analysis.tldr: 利用预训练生成模型的先验和对数编码对齐，通过轻量微调实现高质量HDR视频生成。
analysis.research_motivation: HDR图像能忠实表示场景辐射，但与生成模型训练的低动态范围数据不匹配，现有方法需重新学习HDR表示，增加复杂性和数据需求。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新设计生成模型的前提下，利用预训练模型的先验知识生成HDR视频。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到，电影管线中常用的对数编码可将HDR图像映射到与预训练模型潜在空间自然对齐的分布，从而通过轻量微调直接适配。
analysis.method: 采用对数编码对齐HDR图像与预训练模型潜在空间，结合模拟相机退化的训练策略，鼓励模型从先验中推断缺失的高动态范围内容。
contributions: 发现对数编码能自然对齐HDR图像与预训练生成模型的潜在空间，实现轻量微调。
提出基于相机退化模拟的训练策略，使模型从先验中恢复HDR细节。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定预训练模型，泛化性需验证。
对数编码对齐的有效性可能受场景类型限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用预训练生成模型的先验和对数编码对齐，通过轻量微调实现高质量HDR视频生成。

papers.title: GenTac: Generative Modeling and Forecasting of Soccer Tactics
papers.abstract: Modeling open-play soccer tactics is a formidable challenge due to the stochastic, multi-agent nature of the game. Existing computational approaches typically produce single, deterministic trajectory forecasts or focus on highly structured set-pieces, fundamentally failing to capture the inherent variance and branching possibilities of real-world match evolution. Here, we introduce GenTac, a diffusion-based generative framework that conceptualizes soccer tactics as a stochastic process over continuous multi-player trajectories and discrete semantic events. By learning the underlying distribution of player movements from historical tracking data, GenTac samples diverse, plausible, long-horizon future trajectories. The framework supports rich contextual conditioning, including opponent behavior, specific team or league playing styles, and strategic objectives, while grounding continuous spatial dynamics into a 15-class tactical event space. Extensive evaluations on our proposed benchmark, TacBench, demonstrate four key capabilities: (1) GenTac achieves high geometric accuracy while strictly preserving the collective structural consistency of the team; (2) it accurately simulates stylistic nuances, distinguishing between specific teams (e.g., Auckland FC) and leagues (e.g., A-League versus German leagues); (3) it enables controllable counterfactual simulations, demonstrably altering spatial control and expected threat metrics based on offensive or defensive guidance; and (4) it reliably anticipates future tactical outcomes directly from generated rollouts. Finally, we demonstrate that GenTac can be successfully trained to generalize to other dynamic team sports, including basketball, American football, and ice hockey.

analysis.tldr: GenTac 是一个基于扩散模型的足球战术生成与预测框架，能够采样多样化的未来轨迹并支持反事实模拟。
analysis.research_motivation: 足球战术建模因随机性和多智能体特性极具挑战，现有方法仅能生成确定性轨迹或处理固定套路，无法捕捉真实比赛演化的多样性和分支可能性。
analysis.problem: 如何对开放式足球战术进行随机建模，生成多样、合理且长时域的未来轨迹，并支持上下文条件控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于扩散模型的生成框架，将足球战术建模为连续多智能体轨迹和离散语义事件的随机过程，学习历史追踪数据中的分布，支持对手行为、球队风格、战略目标等条件控制，并将连续空间动态映射到15类战术事件空间。
contributions: 提出 GenTac，首个将扩散模型用于足球战术生成与预测的框架。
构建 TacBench 基准，系统评估生成轨迹的几何精度、风格模拟、反事实控制和战术预测能力。
展示 GenTac 可泛化到篮球、美式足球、冰球等其他动态团队运动。
analysis.experiments: 在 TacBench 基准上评估，展示了高几何精度、风格区分、可控反事实模拟和战术预测能力，并验证了跨运动泛化性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量追踪数据，数据获取成本高。
15类战术事件空间可能无法覆盖所有战术细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GenTac 是一个基于扩散模型的足球战术生成与预测框架，能够采样多样化的未来轨迹并支持反事实模拟。

papers.title: MedConcept: Unsupervised Concept Discovery for Interpretability in Medical VLMs
papers.abstract: While medical Vision-Language models (VLMs) achieve strong performance on tasks such as tumor or organ segmentation and diagnosis prediction, their opaque latent representations limit clinical trust and the ability to explain predictions. Interpretability of these multimodal representations are therefore essential for the trustworthy clinical deployment of pretrained medical VLMs. However, current interpretability methods, such as gradient- or attention-based visualizations, are often limited to specific tasks such as classification. Moreover, they do not provide concept-level explanations derived from shared pretrained representations that can be reused across downstream tasks. We introduce MedConcept, a framework that uncovers latent medical concepts in a fully unsupervised manner and grounds them in clinically verifiable textual semantics. MedConcept identifies sparse neuron-level concept activations from pretrained VLM representations and translates them into pseudo-report-style summaries, enabling physician-level inspection of internal model reasoning. To address the lack of quantitative evaluation in concept-based interpretability, we introduce a quantitative semantic verification protocol that leverages an independent pretrained medical LLM as a frozen external evaluator to assess concept alignment with radiology reports. We define three concept scores, Aligned, Unaligned, and Uncertain, to quantify semantic support, contradiction, or ambiguity relative to radiology reports and use them exclusively for post hoc evaluation. These scores provide a quantitative baseline for assessing interpretability in medical VLMs. All codes, prompt and data to be released on acceptance. Ke

analysis.tldr: 提出无监督概念发现框架MedConcept，从医学VLM中提取可解释的潜在概念并量化评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学视觉-语言模型（VLM）在临床任务中表现优异，但其黑箱特性阻碍了临床信任和预测解释，现有可解释方法局限于特定任务且无法提供跨任务复用的概念级解释。
analysis.problem: 如何从预训练医学VLM中无监督地发现可解释的潜在医学概念，并对其进行定量评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MedConcept框架：无监督识别稀疏神经元级概念激活，将其转化为伪报告摘要；并利用独立预训练医学LLM作为外部评估器，定义对齐、未对齐和不确定三个概念分数进行定量验证。
contributions: 提出MedConcept，一种无监督发现医学VLM潜在概念并转化为可读文本的方法。
引入基于医学LLM的定量语义验证协议，定义三个概念分数用于评估概念与放射学报告的对齐程度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖外部医学LLM作为评估器，可能引入额外偏差。

analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无监督概念发现框架MedConcept，从医学VLM中提取可解释的潜在概念并量化评估。

papers.title: ClawGUI: A Unified Framework for Training, Evaluating, and Deploying GUI Agents
papers.abstract: GUI agents drive applications through their visual interfaces instead of programmatic APIs, interacting with arbitrary software via taps, swipes, and keystrokes, reaching a long tail of applications that CLI-based agents cannot. Yet progress in this area is bottlenecked less by modeling capacity than by the absence of a coherent full-stack infrastructure: online RL training suffers from environment instability and closed pipelines, evaluation protocols drift silently across works, and trained agents rarely reach real users on real devices. We present \textbf{ClawGUI}, an open-source framework addressing these three gaps within a single harness. \textbf{ClawGUI-RL} provides the first open-source GUI agent RL infrastructure with validated support for both parallel virtual environments and real physical devices, integrating GiGPO with a Process Reward Model for dense step-level supervision. \textbf{ClawGUI-Eval} enforces a fully standardized evaluation pipeline across 6 benchmarks and 11+ models, achieving 95.8\% reproduction against official baselines. \textbf{ClawGUI-Agent} brings trained agents to Android, HarmonyOS, and iOS through 12+ chat platforms with hybrid CLI-GUI control and persistent personalized memory. Trained end to end within this pipeline, \textbf{ClawGUI-2B} achieves 17.1\% Success Rate on MobileWorld GUI-Only, outperforming the same-scale MAI-UI-2B baseline by 6.0\%.

analysis.tldr: ClawGUI 是一个开源框架，统一了 GUI 智能体的训练、评估和部署流程，并通过 RL 训练和标准化评估提升了性能。
analysis.research_motivation: GUI 智能体通过视觉界面与任意软件交互，能覆盖 CLI 智能体无法触及的长尾应用，但进展受限于缺乏统一的训练、评估和部署基础设施。
analysis.problem: 现有 GUI 智能体研究缺乏开源的 RL 训练基础设施、标准化的评估协议以及从训练到真实设备的部署链路。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ClawGUI 框架，包含三个组件：ClawGUI-RL（首个开源 GUI 智能体 RL 基础设施，支持并行虚拟环境和真实物理设备，集成 GiGPO 和过程奖励模型）、ClawGUI-Eval（标准化评估管道，覆盖 6 个基准和 11+ 模型，复现率达 95.8%）、ClawGUI-Agent（将训练好的智能体部署到 Android、HarmonyOS 和 iOS 的 12+ 聊天平台，支持混合 CLI-GUI 控制和持久个性化记忆）。
contributions: 首个开源 GUI 智能体 RL 训练基础设施，支持并行虚拟环境和真实设备。
标准化评估管道，实现高复现率。
跨平台部署框架，支持多种操作系统和聊天平台。
训练出 ClawGUI-2B 模型，在 MobileWorld GUI-Only 上达到 17.1% 成功率，超越同规模基线 6.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在 6 个基准和 11+ 模型上评估，ClawGUI-2B 在 MobileWorld GUI-Only 上达到 17.1% 成功率，比 MAI-UI-2B 高 6.0%。
limitations: 可能仅在移动端 GUI 任务上验证，桌面端或 Web 端未提及。
RL 训练的计算开销和稳定性可能仍需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ClawGUI 是一个开源框架，统一了 GUI 智能体的训练、评估和部署流程，并通过 RL 训练和标准化评估提升了性能。

papers.title: General365: Benchmarking General Reasoning in Large Language Models Across Diverse and Challenging Tasks
papers.abstract: Contemporary large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable reasoning capabilities, particularly in specialized domains like mathematics and physics. However, their ability to generalize these reasoning skills to more general and broader contexts--often termed general reasoning--remains under-explored. Unlike domain-specific reasoning, general reasoning relies less on expert knowledge but still presents formidable reasoning challenges, such as complex constraints, nested logical branches, and semantic interference. To address this gap, we introduce General365, a benchmark specifically designed to assess general reasoning in LLMs. By restricting background knowledge to a K-12 level, General365 explicitly decouples reasoning from specialized expertise. The benchmark comprises 365 seed problems and 1,095 variant problems across eight categories, ensuring both high difficulty and diversity. Evaluations across 26 leading LLMs reveal that even the top-performing model achieves only 62.8% accuracy, in stark contrast to the near-perfect performances of LLMs in math and physics benchmarks. These results suggest that the reasoning abilities of current LLMs are heavily domain-dependent, leaving significant room for improvement in broader applications. We envision General365 as a catalyst for advancing LLM reasoning beyond domain-specific tasks toward robust, general-purpose real-world scenarios. Code, Dataset, and Leaderboard: https://general365.github.io

analysis.tldr: 提出General365基准，专门评估LLM在K-12背景知识下的通用推理能力，发现当前模型准确率仅62.8%，表明推理能力高度依赖领域。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在数学、物理等专业领域推理表现出色，但其通用推理能力（不依赖专家知识、面对复杂约束和逻辑分支）尚未被充分探索，缺乏针对性基准。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能有效评估LLM通用推理能力、且与领域专业知识解耦的基准，以揭示模型在广泛场景下的推理短板。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出通用推理面临复杂约束、嵌套逻辑分支和语义干扰等挑战。
analysis.method: 构建General365基准：包含365个种子问题和1095个变体问题，覆盖8个类别，背景知识限制在K-12水平，以解耦推理与专业知识。
contributions: 提出General365基准，专门评估LLM的通用推理能力，强调高难度和多样性。
通过26个主流LLM的评估，揭示当前模型通用推理准确率仅62.8%，远低于数学和物理基准，表明推理能力高度领域依赖。
analysis.experiments: 在26个主流LLM上评估，最佳模型准确率62.8%，与数学和物理基准的近乎完美表现形成对比。摘要未提供更详细实验设置。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖K-12背景知识，可能无法完全代表真实世界复杂推理场景。
未分析不同类别问题的具体失败模式，可能限制对模型短板的深入理解。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出General365基准，专门评估LLM在K-12背景知识下的通用推理能力，发现当前模型准确率仅62.8%，表明推理能力高度依赖领域。

papers.title: Efficient KernelSHAP Explanations for Patch-based 3D Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Perturbation-based explainability methods such as KernelSHAP provide model-agnostic attributions but are typically impractical for patch-based 3D medical image segmentation due to the large number of coalition evaluations and the high cost of sliding-window inference. We present an efficient KernelSHAP framework for volumetric CT segmentation that restricts computation to a user-defined region of interest and its receptive-field support, and accelerates inference via patch logit caching, reusing baseline predictions for unaffected patches while preserving nnU-Net's fusion scheme. To enable clinically meaningful attributions, we compare three automatically generated feature abstractions within the receptive-field crop: whole-organ units, regular FCC supervoxels, and hybrid organ-aware supervoxels, and we study multiple aggregation/value functions targeting stabilizing evidence (TP/Dice/Soft Dice) or false-positive behavior. Experiments on whole-body CT segmentations show that caching substantially reduces redundant computation (with computational savings ranging from 15% to 30%) and that faithfulness and interpretability exhibit clear trade-offs: regular supervoxels often maximize perturbation-based metrics but lack anatomical alignment, whereas organ-aware units yield more clinically interpretable explanations and are particularly effective for highlighting false-positive drivers under normalized metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种高效的KernelSHAP框架，通过缓存和区域限制加速3D医学图像分割的解释，并比较不同特征抽象对解释质量的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于扰动的可解释性方法（如KernelSHAP）在3D医学图像分割中计算成本极高，难以实际应用，需要高效且临床可解释的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地为基于块的3D医学图像分割模型生成KernelSHAP解释，同时保证解释的临床意义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：缓存可减少15%-30%冗余计算；规则超体素在扰动指标上表现最佳但缺乏解剖对齐，而器官感知单元提供更临床可解释的解释，尤其在归一化指标下对假阳性驱动因素有效。
analysis.method: 提出高效KernelSHAP框架：限制计算到用户定义的感兴趣区域及其感受野支持，通过补丁logit缓存重用基线预测，并比较三种特征抽象（全器官单元、规则FCC超体素、混合器官感知超体素）和多种聚合/价值函数。
contributions: 提出一种针对3D医学图像分割的高效KernelSHAP解释框架，利用缓存和区域限制大幅降低计算成本。
系统比较了不同特征抽象和聚合函数对解释忠实性和可解释性的影响，揭示了规则超体素与器官感知单元之间的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在全身体CT分割上实验，显示缓存节省15%-30%计算，并分析了忠实性与可解释性的权衡。
limitations: 仅针对nnU-Net和CT分割验证，可能不适用于其他架构或模态。
用户定义的感兴趣区域可能引入主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种高效的KernelSHAP框架，通过缓存和区域限制加速3D医学图像分割的解释，并比较不同特征抽象对解释质量的影响。

papers.title: Autonomous Diffractometry Enabled by Visual Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Automation underpins progress across scientific and industrial disciplines. Yet, automating tasks requiring interpretation of abstract visual information remain challenging. For example, crystal alignment strongly relies on humans with the ability to comprehend diffraction patterns. Here we introduce an autonomous system that aligns single crystals without access to crystallography and diffraction theory. Using a model-free reinforcement learning framework, an agent learns to identify and navigate towards high-symmetry orientations directly from Laue diffraction patterns. Despite the absence of human supervision, the agent develops human-like strategies to achieve time-efficient alignment across different crystal symmetry classes. With this, we provide a computational framework for intelligent diffractometers. As such, our approach advances the development of automated experimental workflows in materials science.

analysis.tldr: 用视觉强化学习实现单晶自动对齐，无需晶体学知识。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动化科学实验需要处理抽象视觉信息，但现有方法依赖人类专家，效率低且难以扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何让机器自主从劳厄衍射图案中学习识别并导航到高对称取向，实现单晶对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于无模型强化学习框架，智能体直接从劳厄衍射图案学习对齐策略，无需晶体学或衍射理论。
contributions: 提出首个无需晶体学知识的自主单晶对齐系统
智能体发展出类似人类的高效对齐策略，适用于不同晶体对称类
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定衍射图案类型
未提及在噪声或复杂环境下的鲁棒性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用视觉强化学习实现单晶自动对齐，无需晶体学知识。

papers.title: Disposition Distillation at Small Scale: A Three-Arc Negative Result
papers.abstract: We set out to train behavioral dispositions (self-verification, uncertainty acknowledgment, feedback integration) into small language models (0.6B to 2.3B effective parameters) through a four-stage all-MIT distillation pipeline, with follow-on experiments on inference-time attention-head interventions and a frozen-base confidence-gated sidecar. An internal draft reported +33.9-point MCAS and +15.3-point HumanEval gains on a Qwen3-0.6B student; a second-pass sanity check falsified both numbers before publication. The HumanEval delta was a truncation artifact (n_predict=512) that inverted to -8.0 points at n_predict=1024; the MCAS gain disappeared under apples-to-apples scoring. That falsification triggered three subsequent arcs. Across (1) SFT/DPO LoRA on three model families and two domains, (2) inference-time attention-head tempering on o_proj, and (3) a training-free frozen-base sidecar reading the final-token hidden state h_last, we find no operator that moves judge-measured disposition without damaging content or collapsing into stylistic mimicry. The failure is consistent across five models (Qwen3-0.6B, Qwen3-1.7B, Qwen3.5-0.8B, Gemma 4 E2B, and SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct). A within-distribution cross-validation pass (AUC=0.683) collapsed to chance on fresh prompts (AUC=0.516). We contribute a three-arc negative result with mechanism, a two-failure-mode taxonomy for linear h_last probes, and an honest falsification pipeline that converts the class of false positives we ourselves produced into publishable negatives. As an independent finding, Gemma 4 E2B exhibits near-complete confidence-correctness decoupling on the Chef domain (assertion asymmetry -0.009; the model asserts at 91% regardless of correctness).

analysis.tldr: 在小规模语言模型中，通过蒸馏、注意力头干预和冻结基座侧车三种方法均无法在不损害内容或陷入风格模仿的情况下植入行为倾向，且早期报告的显著提升被证实为伪影。
analysis.research_motivation: 将行为倾向（如自我验证、不确定性承认、反馈整合）注入小语言模型对于提升其可靠性和交互质量至关重要，但现有方法在小规模模型上的有效性尚不明确，且早期结果可能存在虚假阳性。
analysis.problem: 验证在小规模语言模型（0.6B-2.3B参数）中，通过蒸馏、推理时注意力头干预和冻结基座侧车三种方法能否有效植入行为倾向而不损害内容质量或陷入风格模仿。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 早期报告的显著提升（MCAS +33.9点，HumanEval +15.3点）在二次验证中被证伪：HumanEval提升是截断伪影（n_predict=512），MCAS提升在公平评分下消失。后续三个弧度的实验均未发现能有效植入倾向而不损害内容或陷入风格模仿的操作。Gemma 4 E2B在Chef领域表现出近乎完全的置信度-正确性解耦（断言不对称性-0.009，模型以91%置信度断言，无论正确与否）。
analysis.method: 四阶段全MIT蒸馏流程，后续实验包括推理时注意力头干预（o_proj）和基于冻结基座读取最后token隐藏状态h_last的置信门控侧车。
contributions: 提供了三个弧度的负面结果及其机制分析，证明在小规模模型中植入行为倾向的困难。
提出了线性h_last探针的两类失败模式分类法。
构建了一个诚实的假阳性验证流程，将自身产生的假阳性转化为可发表的负面结果。
analysis.experiments: 在五个模型（Qwen3-0.6B, Qwen3-1.7B, Qwen3.5-0.8B, Gemma 4 E2B, SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct）上进行了三个弧度的实验：SFT/DPO LoRA、推理时注意力头干预、冻结基座侧车。分布内交叉验证AUC=0.683，在新提示上降至随机水平AUC=0.516。
limitations: 仅在小规模模型（0.6B-2.3B参数）上验证，结论可能不适用于更大模型。
行为倾向的定义和测量可能不够全面，仅关注了自我验证、不确定性承认和反馈整合。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在小规模语言模型中，通过蒸馏、注意力头干预和冻结基座侧车三种方法均无法在不损害内容或陷入风格模仿的情况下植入行为倾向，且早期报告的显著提升被证实为伪影。

papers.title: MosaicMRI: A Diverse Dataset and Benchmark for Raw Musculoskeletal MRI
papers.abstract: Deep learning underpins a wide range of applications in MRI, including reconstruction, artifact removal, and segmentation. However, progress has been driven largely by public datasets focused on brain and knee imaging, shaping how models are trained and evaluated. As a result, careful studies of the reliability of these models across diverse anatomical settings remain limited. In this work, we introduce MosaicMRI, a large and diverse collection of fully sampled raw musculoskeletal (MSK) MR measurements designed for training and evaluating machine-learning-based methods. MosaicMRI is the largest open-source raw MSK MRI dataset to date, comprising 2,671 volumes and 80,156 slices. The dataset offers substantial diversity in volume orientation (e.g., axial, sagittal), imaging contrasts (e.g., PD, T1, T2), anatomies (e.g., spine, knee, hip, ankle, and others), and numbers of acquisition coils. Using VarNet as a baseline for accelerated reconstruction task, we perform a comprehensive set of experiments to study scaling behavior with respect to both model capacity and dataset size. Interestingly, models trained on the combined anatomies significantly outperform anatomy-specific models in low-sample regimes, highlighting the benefits of anatomical diversity and the presence of exploitable cross-anatomical correlations. We further evaluate robustness and cross-anatomy generalization by training models on one anatomy (e.g., spine) and testing them on another (e.g., knee). Notably, we identify groups of body parts (e.g., foot and elbow) that generalize well with each other, and highlight that performance under domain shifts depends on both training set size, anatomy, and protocol-specific factors.

analysis.tldr: MosaicMRI 是最大的开源原始肌肉骨骼 MRI 数据集，包含 2671 个体积和 80156 张切片，用于训练和评估基于深度学习的 MRI 重建方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有公开 MRI 数据集主要集中在脑部和膝盖成像，导致模型在不同解剖部位的可靠性研究不足，缺乏多样化的原始肌肉骨骼 MRI 数据。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、多样化的原始肌肉骨骼 MRI 数据集来训练和评估深度学习模型，特别是针对加速重建任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在低样本情况下，跨解剖部位训练的模型显著优于特定解剖部位的模型，表明解剖多样性有益且存在可利用的跨解剖相关性；不同身体部位（如脚和肘）之间具有良好的泛化性能，而域偏移下的性能取决于训练集大小、解剖部位和协议特定因素。
analysis.method: 构建了 MosaicMRI 数据集，包含多种方向、对比度、解剖部位和线圈数量的原始 MSK MRI 数据，并使用 VarNet 作为基线进行加速重建实验。
contributions: 发布了最大规模的开源原始 MSK MRI 数据集 MosaicMRI，包含 2671 个体积和 80156 张切片，具有高度多样性。
通过系统性实验揭示了跨解剖部位训练的优势，以及在低样本和域偏移下的泛化规律。
analysis.experiments: 使用 VarNet 作为基线，进行了加速重建任务实验，包括缩放行为研究（模型容量和数据集大小）、跨解剖部位泛化评估以及鲁棒性分析。
limitations: 数据集仅包含肌肉骨骼 MRI，未涵盖其他身体部位。
实验仅基于 VarNet 基线，其他模型可能表现不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MosaicMRI 是最大的开源原始肌肉骨骼 MRI 数据集，包含 2671 个体积和 80156 张切片，用于训练和评估基于深度学习的 MRI 重建方法。

papers.title: Retrieval Is Not Enough: Why Organizational AI Needs Epistemic Infrastructure
papers.abstract: Organizational knowledge used by AI agents typically lacks epistemic structure: retrieval systems surface semantically relevant content without distinguishing binding decisions from abandoned hypotheses, contested claims from settled ones, or known facts from unresolved questions. We argue that the ceiling on organizational AI is not retrieval fidelity but \emph{epistemic} fidelity--the system's ability to represent commitment strength, contradiction status, and organizational ignorance as computable properties. We present OIDA, a framework that structures organizational knowledge as typed Knowledge Objects carrying epistemic class, importance scores with class-specific decay, and signed contradiction edges. The Knowledge Gravity Engine maintains scores deterministically with proved convergence guarantees (sufficient condition: max degree $< 7$; empirically robust to degree 43). OIDA introduces QUESTION-as-modeled-ignorance: a primitive with inverse decay that surfaces what an organization does \emph{not} know with increasing urgency--a mechanism absent from all surveyed systems. We describe the Epistemic Quality Score (EQS), a five-component evaluation methodology with explicit circularity analysis. In a controlled comparison ($n{=}10$ response pairs), OIDA's RAG condition (3,868 tokens) achieves EQS 0.530 vs.\ 0.848 for a full-context baseline (108,687 tokens); the $28.1\times$ token budget difference is the primary confound. The QUESTION mechanism is statistically validated (Fisher $p{=}0.0325$, OR$=21.0$). The formal properties are established; the decisive ablation at equal token budget (E4) is pre-registered and not yet run.

analysis.tldr: 提出OIDA框架，通过知识对象、重要性衰减和矛盾边来提升组织AI的认知保真度，但实验受限于token预算差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有检索系统仅关注语义相关性，无法区分组织知识中的承诺强度、矛盾状态和未知问题，导致AI代理缺乏认知结构，限制了组织AI的上限。
analysis.problem: 如何构建能够表示组织知识中承诺强度、矛盾状态和未知问题的认知基础设施，以提升AI代理的认知保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前检索系统缺乏认知结构，无法区分绑定决策与废弃假设、有争议的主张与已解决的问题、已知事实与未解决问题。
analysis.method: 提出OIDA框架，包括：1) 带认知类别的知识对象；2) 重要性分数及类别特定衰减；3) 带符号的矛盾边；4) 知识引力引擎（确定性分数更新，收敛保证）；5) QUESTION机制（将问题建模为已知无知，具有逆衰减）；6) 认知质量评分（EQS）评估方法。
contributions: 提出OIDA框架，将组织知识结构化为认知对象，支持承诺强度、矛盾状态和未知问题的计算。
引入QUESTION机制，将问题作为已知无知原语，通过逆衰减增加未知问题的紧迫性。
提出EQS评估方法，包含五个组件和显式循环分析。
analysis.experiments: 在n=10个响应对的受控比较中，OIDA的RAG条件（3868 tokens）EQS为0.530，全上下文基线（108687 tokens）EQS为0.848，token预算差异28.1倍是主要混淆因素。QUESTION机制经Fisher检验显著（p=0.0325, OR=21.0）。决定性消融实验（E4）已预注册但尚未运行。
limitations: 实验规模小（n=10），且RAG条件与全上下文基线token预算差异巨大，结果不可直接比较。
决定性消融实验（E4）尚未运行，无法确认各组件贡献。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OIDA框架，通过知识对象、重要性衰减和矛盾边来提升组织AI的认知保真度，但实验受限于token预算差异。

papers.title: StarVLA-$α$: Reducing Complexity in Vision-Language-Action Systems
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for building general-purpose robotic agents. However, the VLA landscape remains highly fragmented and complex: as existing approaches vary substantially in architectures, training data, embodiment configurations, and benchmark-specific engineering. In this work, we introduce StarVLA-$α$, a simple yet strong baseline designed to study VLA design choices under controlled conditions. StarVLA-$α$ deliberately minimizes architectural and pipeline complexity to reduce experimental confounders and enable systematic analysis. Specifically, we re-evaluate several key design axes, including action modeling strategies, robot-specific pretraining, and interface engineering. Across unified multi-benchmark training on LIBERO, SimplerEnv, RoboTwin, and RoboCasa, the same simple baseline remains highly competitive, indicating that a strong VLM backbone combined with minimal design is already sufficient to achieve strong performance without relying on additional architectural complexity or engineering tricks. Notably, our single generalist model outperforms $π_{0.5}$ by 20\% on the public real-world RoboChallenge benchmark. We expect StarVLA-$α$ to serve as a solid starting point for future research in the VLA regime. Code will be released at https://github.com/starVLA/starVLA.

analysis.tldr: StarVLA-α 通过最小化架构和流程复杂度，证明强 VLM 骨干加简单设计即可在 VLA 任务上取得强性能。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA 模型领域高度碎片化和复杂，现有方法在架构、训练数据、本体配置和基准特定工程上差异巨大，缺乏统一可控的比较基准。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个简单且强的 VLA 基线，以在受控条件下系统研究关键设计选择，并减少实验混淆因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 StarVLA-α，通过最小化架构和流程复杂度，使用强 VLM 骨干和最小设计，在统一多基准训练下评估动作建模策略、机器人特定预训练和接口工程等关键设计轴。
contributions: 提出了一个简单且强的 VLA 基线 StarVLA-α，用于系统研究设计选择。
在多个基准上验证了强 VLM 骨干加最小设计即可达到强性能，无需额外架构复杂度。
analysis.experiments: 在 LIBERO、SimplerEnv、RoboTwin 和 RoboCasa 上进行统一多基准训练，并在真实世界 RoboChallenge 基准上单通用模型超越 π0.5 20%。
limitations: 可能未探索更复杂架构的潜在优势。
实验仅在特定基准和机器人配置下进行，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: StarVLA-α 通过最小化架构和流程复杂度，证明强 VLM 骨干加简单设计即可在 VLA 任务上取得强性能。

papers.title: Grounded World Model for Semantically Generalizable Planning
papers.abstract: In Model Predictive Control (MPC), world models predict the future outcomes of various action proposals, which are then scored to guide the selection of the optimal action. For visuomotor MPC, the score function is a distance metric between a predicted image and a goal image, measured in the latent space of a pretrained vision encoder like DINO and JEPA. However, it is challenging to obtain the goal image in advance of the task execution, particularly in new environments. Additionally, conveying the goal through an image offers limited interactivity compared with natural language. In this work, we propose to learn a Grounded World Model (GWM) in a vision-language-aligned latent space. As a result, each proposed action is scored based on how close its future outcome is to the task instruction, reflected by the similarity of embeddings. This approach transforms the visuomotor MPC to a VLA that surpasses VLM-based VLAs in semantic generalization. On the proposed WISER benchmark, GWM-MPC achieves a 87% success rate on the test set comprising 288 tasks that feature unseen visual signals and referring expressions, yet remain solvable with motions demonstrated during training. In contrast, traditional VLAs achieve an average success rate of 22%, even though they overfit the training set with a 90% success rate.

analysis.tldr: 提出接地世界模型(GWM)，在视觉-语言对齐的潜在空间中实现语义可泛化的规划，在WISER基准上显著优于传统VLA方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统视觉运动MPC依赖任务前获取的目标图像，在新环境中难以获得，且图像传达目标交互性差；而基于VLM的VLA方法在语义泛化上表现不足。
analysis.problem: 如何使视觉运动MPC能够根据自然语言指令进行规划，并实现语义级别的泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统VLA在训练集上过拟合（90%成功率），但在包含未见视觉信号和指代表达的测试集上泛化失败（平均22%成功率），表明其缺乏语义泛化能力。
analysis.method: 在视觉-语言对齐的潜在空间中学习接地世界模型(GWM)，用嵌入相似度衡量预测结果与任务指令的接近程度，从而将视觉运动MPC转化为VLA。
contributions: 提出GWM，将世界模型学习在视觉-语言对齐的潜在空间中，实现基于语言指令的规划。
在WISER基准上展示GWM-MPC在语义泛化上显著优于传统VLA方法。
analysis.experiments: 在提出的WISER基准上测试，包含288个任务，涉及未见视觉信号和指代表达。GWM-MPC达到87%成功率，传统VLA平均22%成功率。
limitations: 可能依赖训练时见过的运动模式，对于全新运动可能泛化有限。
WISER基准规模有限，需在更大规模任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出接地世界模型(GWM)，在视觉-语言对齐的潜在空间中实现语义可泛化的规划，在WISER基准上显著优于传统VLA方法。

papers.title: Discourse Diversity in Multi-Turn Empathic Dialogue
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) produce responses rated as highly empathic in single-turn settings (Ayers et al., 2023; Lee et al., 2024), yet they are also known to be formulaic generators that reuse the same lexical patterns, syntactic templates, and discourse structures across tasks (Jiang et al., 2025; Shaib et al., 2024; Namuduri et al., 2025). Less attention has been paid to whether this formulaicity extends to the level of discourse moves, i.e., what a response does for the person it is addressing. This question is especially consequential for empathic dialogue, where effective support demands not just a kind response at one moment but varied strategies as a conversation unfolds (Stiles et al., 1998). Indeed, prior work shows that LLMs reuse the same tactic sequences more than human supporters in single-turn settings (Gueorguieva et al., 2026). We extend this analysis to multi-turn conversations and find that the rigidity compounds: once a tactic appears in a supporter turn, LLMs reuse it in the next at nearly double the rate of humans (0.50-0.56 vs. 0.27). This pattern holds across LLMs serving as supporters in real emotional support conversations, and is invisible to standard similarity metrics. To address this gap, we introduce MINT (Multi-turn Inter-tactic Novelty Training), the first reinforcement learning framework to optimize discourse move diversity across multi-turn empathic dialogue. The best MINT variant combines an empathy quality reward with a cross-turn tactic novelty signal, improving aggregate empathy by 25.3% over vanilla across 1.7B and 4B models while reducing cross-turn discourse move repetition by 26.3% on the 4B model, surpassing all baselines including quality-only and token-level diversity methods on both measures. These results suggest that what current models lack is not empathy itself, but the ability to vary their discourse moves across a conversation.

analysis.tldr: 多轮共情对话中LLM存在话语动作重复问题，MINT框架通过强化学习优化跨轮话语多样性，提升共情质量并降低重复率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在单轮共情对话中表现良好，但在多轮对话中倾向于重复相同的话语策略，而人类支持者会灵活变化策略以提供有效支持。这种话语层面的公式化问题尚未被充分研究，且标准相似度指标无法检测。
analysis.problem: LLM在多轮共情对话中跨轮话语动作重复率高，缺乏多样性，导致共情支持效果受限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：LLM作为支持者时，一旦在某一轮使用某种话语策略，下一轮重复该策略的概率（0.50-0.56）几乎是人类（0.27）的两倍，且该模式在多个模型上一致，标准相似度指标无法捕捉。
analysis.method: 提出MINT（多轮跨策略新颖性训练），首个针对多轮共情对话优化话语动作多样性的强化学习框架。最佳变体结合共情质量奖励和跨轮策略新颖性信号。
contributions: 揭示LLM在多轮共情对话中话语动作重复的严重程度（重复率约为人类两倍）且标准指标无法检测。
提出MINT框架，首个通过强化学习优化多轮共情对话中话语多样性的方法，显著提升共情质量并降低重复率。
analysis.experiments: 在真实情感支持对话中，使用1.7B和4B模型进行实验。最佳MINT变体在4B模型上共情质量提升25.3%，跨轮话语动作重复率降低26.3%，超越所有基线（包括仅质量奖励和词级多样性方法）。
limitations: 未在更大规模模型（如70B）上验证效果。
仅针对共情对话领域，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多轮共情对话中LLM存在话语动作重复问题，MINT框架通过强化学习优化跨轮话语多样性，提升共情质量并降低重复率。

papers.title: Collaborative Multi-Agent Scripts Generation for Enhancing Imperfect-Information Reasoning in Murder Mystery Games
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown impressive capabilities in perceptual tasks, yet they degrade in complex multi-hop reasoning under multiplayer game settings with imperfect and deceptive information. In this paper, we study a representative multiplayer task, Murder Mystery Games, which require inferring hidden truths based on partial clues provided by roles with different intentions. To address this challenge, we propose a collaborative multi-agent framework for evaluating and synthesizing high-quality, role-driven multiplayer game scripts, enabling fine-grained interaction patterns tailored to character identities (i.e., murderer vs. innocent). Our system generates rich multimodal contexts, including character backstories, visual and textual clues, and multi-hop reasoning chains, through coordinated agent interactions. We design a two-stage agent-monitored training strategy to enhance the reasoning ability of VLMs: (1) chain-of-thought based fine-tuning on curated and synthetic datasets that model uncertainty and deception; (2) GRPO-based reinforcement learning with agent-monitored reward shaping, encouraging the model to develop character-specific reasoning behaviors and effective multimodal multi-hop inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly boosts the performance of VLMs in narrative reasoning, hidden fact extraction, and deception-resilient understanding. Our contributions offer a scalable solution for training and evaluating VLMs under uncertain, adversarial, and socially complex conditions, laying the groundwork for future benchmarks in multimodal multi-hop reasoning under imperfect information.

analysis.tldr: 提出协作多智能体框架生成高质量谋杀悬疑游戏剧本，通过两阶段训练增强VLM在不完美信息下的多跳推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在感知任务中表现优异，但在多人游戏场景下面对不完美和欺骗性信息时，复杂多跳推理能力显著下降，现有方法缺乏针对此类社交复杂环境的训练数据和推理策略。
analysis.problem: 如何提升VLM在多人游戏（如谋杀悬疑）中基于部分线索和角色意图进行隐藏真相推理的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM在多人游戏设置下，面对不完美和欺骗性信息时，多跳推理性能退化。
analysis.method: 提出协作多智能体框架生成高质量角色驱动游戏剧本，包含角色背景、视觉文本线索和多跳推理链；设计两阶段训练策略：1) 基于思维链的微调，2) GRPO强化学习与智能体监控奖励塑造。
contributions: 提出协作多智能体框架用于生成高质量、角色驱动的多人游戏剧本，支持细粒度交互模式。
设计两阶段训练策略（CoT微调+GRPO强化学习）增强VLM在不完美信息下的推理能力。
实验证明方法在叙事推理、隐藏事实提取和抗欺骗理解方面显著提升VLM性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及大量实验表明方法显著提升性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定游戏场景，泛化性需进一步验证。
多智能体框架的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出协作多智能体框架生成高质量谋杀悬疑游戏剧本，通过两阶段训练增强VLM在不完美信息下的多跳推理能力。

papers.title: Learning Long-term Motion Embeddings for Efficient Kinematics Generation
papers.abstract: Understanding and predicting motion is a fundamental component of visual intelligence. Although modern video models exhibit strong comprehension of scene dynamics, exploring multiple possible futures through full video synthesis remains prohibitively inefficient. We model scene dynamics orders of magnitude more efficiently by directly operating on a long-term motion embedding that is learned from large-scale trajectories obtained from tracker models. This enables efficient generation of long, realistic motions that fulfill goals specified via text prompts or spatial pokes. To achieve this, we first learn a highly compressed motion embedding with a temporal compression factor of 64x. In this space, we train a conditional flow-matching model to generate motion latents conditioned on task descriptions. The resulting motion distributions outperform those of both state-of-the-art video models and specialized task-specific approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种高效的运动嵌入方法，通过64倍时间压缩和流匹配模型生成长期、逼真的运动轨迹。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频模型虽然能理解场景动态，但通过完整视频合成探索多种未来可能性的效率极低，需要更高效的运动生成方法。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地生成长期、逼真的运动轨迹，并支持文本或空间提示指定的目标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从跟踪器模型的大规模轨迹中学习高度压缩的运动嵌入（时间压缩因子64倍），然后在该嵌入空间上训练条件流匹配模型，生成以任务描述为条件的运动潜变量。
contributions: 提出一种高效的运动嵌入表示，实现64倍时间压缩。
基于流匹配模型实现条件运动生成，支持文本和空间提示。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 运动嵌入可能依赖跟踪器质量。
生成的运动可能缺乏细粒度细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种高效的运动嵌入方法，通过64倍时间压缩和流匹配模型生成长期、逼真的运动轨迹。

papers.title: SCORP: Scene-Consistent Multi-agent Diffusion Planning with Stable Online Reinforcement Post-Training for Cooperative Driving
papers.abstract: Cooperative driving is a safety- and efficiency-critical task that requires the coordination of diverse, interaction-realistic multi-agent trajectories. Although existing diffusion-based methods can capture multimodal behaviors from demonstrations, they often exhibit weak scene consistency and poor alignment with closed-loop cooperative objectives. This makes post-training necessary for further improvement, yet achieving stable online post-training in reactive multi-agent environments remains challenging. In this paper, we propose SCORP, a scene-consistent multi-agent diffusion planner with stable online reinforcement learning (RL) post-training for cooperative driving. For pre-training, we develop a scene-conditioned multi-agent denoising architecture that couples inter-agent self-attention with a dual-path conditioning mechanism: cross-attention provides direct scene-information injection, while AdaLN-Zero enables additional flexible and stable conditional modulation, thereby improving the scene consistency and road adherence of joint trajectories. For post-training, we formulate a two-layer Markov decision process (MDP) that explicitly integrates the reverse denoising chain with policy-environment interaction. We further co-design dense, well-shaped planning rewards and variance-gated group-relative policy optimization (VG-GRPO) to mitigate advantage collapse and gradient instability during closed-loop training. Extensive experiments show that SCORP outperforms strong open-source baselines on WOMD, with 10.47%-28.26% and 1.70%-7.22% improvements in core safety and efficiency metrics, respectively. Moreover, compared with alternative post-training methods, SCORP delivers significant and consistent gains in both driving safety and traffic efficiency, highlighting stable and sustained advances in closed-loop cooperative driving.

analysis.tldr: 提出SCORP框架，通过场景一致的多智能体扩散规划与稳定在线强化学习后训练，提升协作驾驶的安全与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 协作驾驶需要协调多智能体轨迹，现有扩散方法虽能捕捉多模态行为，但场景一致性弱且与闭环协作目标对齐差，后训练在反应式多智能体环境中不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何实现场景一致的多智能体轨迹规划，并通过稳定的在线强化学习后训练提升闭环协作驾驶性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 预训练阶段提出场景条件多智能体去噪架构，结合交叉注意力与AdaLN-Zero实现场景信息注入与条件调制；后训练阶段构建双层MDP，设计密集奖励与方差门控组相对策略优化（VG-GRPO）以稳定闭环训练。
contributions: 提出场景一致的多智能体扩散规划架构，通过双路径条件机制提升轨迹场景一致性。
设计双层MDP与VG-GRPO算法，实现稳定的在线强化学习后训练。
analysis.experiments: 在WOMD数据集上，SCORP在核心安全指标上提升10.47%-28.26%，效率指标上提升1.70%-7.22%，且后训练方法带来持续增益。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量演示数据。
多智能体环境下的扩展性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SCORP框架，通过场景一致的多智能体扩散规划与稳定在线强化学习后训练，提升协作驾驶的安全与效率。

papers.title: Endogenous Information in Routing Games: Memory-Constrained Equilibria, Recall Braess Paradoxes, and Memory Design
papers.abstract: We study routing games in which travelers optimize over routes that are remembered or surfaced, rather than over a fixed exogenous action set. The paper develops a tractable design theory for endogenous recall and then connects it back to an explicit finite-memory micro model. At the micro level, each traveler carries a finite memory state, receives surfaced alternatives, chooses via a logit rule, and updates memory under a policy such as LRU. This yields a stationary Forgetful Wardrop Equilibrium (FWE); existence is proved under mild regularity, and uniqueness follows in a contraction regime for the reduced fixed-point map. The paper's main design layer is a stationary salience model that summarizes persistent memory and interface effects as route-specific weights. Salience-weighted stochastic user equilibrium is the unique minimizer of a strictly convex potential, which yields a clean optimization and implementability theory. In this layer we characterize governed implementability under ratio budgets and affine tying constraints, and derive constructive algorithms on parallel and series-parallel networks. The bridge between layers is exact for last-choice memory (B=1): the micro model is then equivalent to the salience model, so any interior salience vector can be realized by an appropriate surfacing policy. For larger memories, we develop an explicit LRU-to-TTL-to-salience approximation pipeline and add contraction-based bounds that translate surrogate-map error into fixed-point and welfare error. Finally, we define a Recall Braess Paradox, in which improving recall increases equilibrium delay without changing physical capacity, and show that it can arise on every two-terminal network with at least two distinct s-t paths. Targeted experiments support the approximation regime, governed-design predictions, and the computational advantages of the reduced layer.

analysis.tldr: 研究路径选择游戏中内生记忆对均衡的影响，提出遗忘型Wardrop均衡与显著性模型，并发现回忆Braess悖论。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统路径选择游戏假设出行者知道所有路径，但现实中记忆有限且信息呈现受接口影响，现有理论缺乏对记忆内生性的建模与设计。
analysis.problem: 如何建模出行者有限记忆下的路径选择行为，并设计信息呈现策略以优化交通均衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现回忆Braess悖论：改善回忆能力（如增加记忆容量）可能在不改变物理容量的情况下增加均衡延迟。
analysis.method: 构建双层模型：微观层为有限记忆状态、LRU更新策略与logit选择，得到遗忘型Wardrop均衡（FWE）；宏观层为显著性加权随机用户均衡，通过凸势函数唯一确定，并建立两层之间的精确或近似联系。
contributions: 提出遗忘型Wardrop均衡（FWE）并证明存在性与唯一性条件
定义回忆Braess悖论并证明其在任意两终端网络中的存在性
建立微观记忆模型与宏观显著性模型之间的精确（B=1）与近似（LRU-to-TTL-to-salience）桥梁
给出受控可实现性的刻画与并行/串并联网络上的构造算法
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及目标实验支持近似机制、受控设计预测和简化层的计算优势。
limitations: 微观模型假设LRU更新策略，可能不适用于其他记忆策略
近似桥梁的误差界依赖于收缩条件，可能在某些网络中不成立
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究路径选择游戏中内生记忆对均衡的影响，提出遗忘型Wardrop均衡与显著性模型，并发现回忆Braess悖论。

papers.title: Multimodal Ambivalence/Hesitancy Recognition in Videos for Personalized Digital Health Interventions
papers.abstract: Using behavioural science, health interventions focus on behaviour change by providing a framework to help patients acquire and maintain healthy habits that improve medical outcomes. In-person interventions are costly and difficult to scale, especially in resource-limited regions. Digital health interventions offer a cost-effective approach, potentially supporting independent living and self-management. Automating such interventions, especially through machine learning, has gained considerable attention recently. Ambivalence and hesitancy (A/H) play a primary role for individuals to delay, avoid, or abandon health interventions. A/H are subtle and conflicting emotions that place a person in a state between positive and negative evaluations of a behaviour, or between acceptance and refusal to engage in it. They manifest as affective inconsistency across modalities or within a modality, such as language, facial, vocal expressions, and body language. While experts can be trained to recognize A/H, integrating them into digital health interventions is costly and less effective. Automatic A/H recognition is therefore critical for the personalization and cost-effectiveness of digital health interventions. Here, we explore the application of deep learning models for A/H recognition in videos, a multi-modal task by nature. In particular, this paper covers three learning setups: supervised learning, unsupervised domain adaptation for personalization, and zero-shot inference via large language models (LLMs). Our experiments are conducted on the unique and recently published BAH video dataset for A/H recognition. Our results show limited performance, suggesting that more adapted multi-modal models are required for accurate A/H recognition. Better methods for modeling spatio-temporal and multimodal fusion are necessary to leverage conflicts within/across modalities.

analysis.tldr: 探索深度学习模型在视频中识别矛盾/犹豫情绪，发现现有方法性能有限，需更适配的多模态模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 数字健康干预中，矛盾/犹豫情绪是患者延迟或放弃干预的关键因素，但人工识别成本高且难以规模化，自动识别对个性化干预至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何利用深度学习模型从视频中自动识别多模态矛盾/犹豫情绪，以支持个性化数字健康干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，仅指出矛盾/犹豫情绪表现为跨模态或模态内的情感不一致。
analysis.method: 探索了三种学习设置：监督学习、无监督域适应（用于个性化）以及通过大语言模型进行零样本推理。
contributions: 首次在BAH视频数据集上系统评估了多种深度学习模型用于矛盾/犹豫情绪识别。
揭示了现有多模态模型在识别微妙情感上的局限性，并指出了改进方向。
analysis.experiments: 在BAH视频数据集上进行了实验，结果显示性能有限，表明需要更适配的多模态模型。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 现有模型性能有限，无法直接用于实际数字健康干预。
仅基于单一数据集，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探索深度学习模型在视频中识别矛盾/犹豫情绪，发现现有方法性能有限，需更适配的多模态模型。

papers.title: The Devil is in the Details -- From OCR for Old Church Slavonic to Purely Visual Stemma Reconstruction
papers.abstract: The age of artificial intelligence has brought many new possibilities and pitfalls in many fields and tasks. The devil is in the details, and those come to the fore when building new pipelines and executing small practical experiments. OCR and stemmatology are no exception. The current investigation starts comparing a range of OCR-systems, from classical over machine learning to LLMs, for roughly 6,000 characters of late handwritten church slavonic manuscripts from the 18th century. Focussing on basic letter correctness, more than 10 CS OCR-systems among which 2 LLMs (GPT5 and Gemini3-flash) are being compared. Then, post-processing via LLMs is assessed and finally, different agentic OCR architectures (specialized post-processing agents, an agentic pipeline and RAG) are tested. With new technology elaborated, experiments suggest, church slavonic CER for basic letters may reach as low as 2-3% but elaborated diacritics could still present a problem. How well OCR can prime stemmatology as a downstream task is the entry point to the second part of the article which introduces a new stemmatic method based solely on image processing. Here, a pipeline of automated visual glyph extraction, clustering and pairwise statistical comparison leading to a distance matrix and ultimately a stemma, is being presented and applied to two small corpora, one for the church slavonic Gospel of Mark from the 14th to 16th centuries, one for the Roman de la Rose in French from the 14th and 15th centuries. Basic functioning of the method can be demonstrated.

analysis.tldr: 本文比较了多种OCR系统用于18世纪手写教会斯拉夫语手稿，并提出了一种纯视觉的谱系重建方法。
analysis.research_motivation: OCR和谱系学在应用于历史手稿时面临细节挑战，尤其是罕见语言和手写文本，现有方法在准确性和下游任务适用性上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何提高教会斯拉夫语手写文本的OCR准确性，并利用OCR结果或纯视觉方法进行谱系重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，基本字母的CER可低至2-3%，但复杂变音符号仍构成问题；LLM后处理和智能体架构可改善OCR性能。
analysis.method: 比较了经典、机器学习和LLM OCR系统（包括GPT5和Gemini3-flash），评估LLM后处理，测试多种智能体OCR架构；提出基于纯图像处理的谱系重建方法，包括自动字形提取、聚类、成对统计比较和距离矩阵生成。
contributions: 系统比较了10多种OCR系统在教会斯拉夫语手稿上的表现，包括LLM和智能体架构。
提出了一种纯视觉的谱系重建方法，无需转录文本，适用于小语料库。
analysis.experiments: 在约6000个字符的18世纪手写教会斯拉夫语手稿上比较OCR系统，并在两个小语料库（14-16世纪教会斯拉夫语马可福音和14-15世纪法语玫瑰传奇）上应用谱系重建方法。
limitations: 仅针对基本字母评估，复杂变音符号问题未完全解决。
谱系重建方法仅在小语料库上验证，泛化性待确认。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文比较了多种OCR系统用于18世纪手写教会斯拉夫语手稿，并提出了一种纯视觉的谱系重建方法。

papers.title: Evaluating Cooperation in LLM Social Groups through Elected Leadership
papers.abstract: Governing common-pool resources requires agents to develop enduring strategies through cooperation and self-governance to avoid collective failure. While foundation models have shown potential for cooperation in these settings, existing multi-agent research provides little insight into whether structured leadership and election mechanisms can improve collective decision making. The lack of such a critical organizational feature ubiquitous in human society presents a significant shortcoming of the current methods. In this work we aim to directly address whether leadership and elections can support improved social welfare and cooperation through multi-agent simulation with LLMs. We present our open-source framework that simulates leadership through elected personas and candidate-driven agendas and carry out an empirical study of LLMs under controlled governance conditions. Our experiments demonstrate that having elected leadership improves social welfare scores by 55.4% and survival time by 128.6% across a range of high performing LLMs. Through the construction of an agent social graph we compute centrality metrics to assess the social influence of leader personas and also analyze rhetorical and cooperative tendencies revealed through a sentiment analysis on leader utterances. This work lays the foundation for further study of election mechanisms in multi-agent systems toward navigating complex social dilemmas.

analysis.tldr: 通过选举领导机制显著提升LLM多智能体系统的合作与社会福利。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM多智能体研究缺乏结构化领导与选举机制，而这是人类社会合作的关键组织特征，当前方法无法有效提升集体决策。
analysis.problem: 如何通过选举领导机制改善LLM多智能体在公共资源治理中的合作与社会福利。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出开源框架，通过选举角色和候选人议程模拟领导机制，在受控治理条件下进行LLM多智能体仿真。
contributions: 提出并验证了选举领导机制可显著提升LLM多智能体系统的社会福利和生存时间。
构建智能体社交图并分析领导角色的社会影响力及话语中的合作倾向。
analysis.experiments: 在多种高性能LLM上实验，选举领导使社会福利提升55.4%，生存时间提升128.6%。
limitations: 实验仅在模拟环境中进行，未涉及真实人类交互。
选举机制设计可能未覆盖所有现实复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过选举领导机制显著提升LLM多智能体系统的合作与社会福利。

papers.title: On the Robustness of Watermarking for Autoregressive Image Generation
papers.abstract: The proliferation of autoregressive (AR) image generators demands reliable detection and attribution of their outputs to mitigate misinformation, and to filter synthetic images from training data to prevent model collapse. To address this need, watermarking techniques, specifically designed for AR models, embed a subtle signal at generation time, enabling downstream verification through a corresponding watermark detector. In this work, we study these schemes and demonstrate their vulnerability to both watermark removal and forgery attacks. We assess existing attacks and further introduce three new attacks: (i) a vector-quantized regeneration removal attack, (ii) adversarial optimization-based attack, and (iii) a frequency injection attack. Our evaluation reveals that removal and forgery attacks can be effective with access to a single watermarked reference image and without access to original model parameters or watermarking secrets. Our findings indicate that existing watermarking schemes for AR image generation do not reliably support synthetic content detection for dataset filtering. Moreover, they enable Watermark Mimicry, whereby authentic images can be manipulated to imitate a generator's watermark and trigger false detection to prevent their inclusion in future model training.

analysis.tldr: 自回归图像生成的水印方案易受移除和伪造攻击，无法可靠支持数据集过滤。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归图像生成器广泛使用，需要可靠的水印技术来检测合成内容、防止虚假信息传播和模型崩溃，但现有水印方案的安全性尚未充分验证。
analysis.problem: 评估现有自回归图像生成水印方案的鲁棒性，并揭示其在移除和伪造攻击下的脆弱性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有水印方案在单张水印参考图像下即可被有效移除或伪造，且无需模型参数或水印密钥；此外，真实图像可被操纵模仿水印，触发误检测。
analysis.method: 提出三种新攻击：向量量化重生成移除攻击、对抗优化攻击和频率注入攻击，并评估现有攻击。
contributions: 系统评估了自回归图像生成水印方案的鲁棒性，揭示了其脆弱性。
提出了三种新的水印移除和伪造攻击方法。
发现水印方案无法可靠支持数据集过滤，且存在水印模仿风险。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 攻击可能依赖特定水印方案，泛化性未充分讨论。
未提出防御措施或改进方案。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自回归图像生成的水印方案易受移除和伪造攻击，无法可靠支持数据集过滤。

papers.title: SWE-AGILE: A Software Agent Framework for Efficiently Managing Dynamic Reasoning Context
papers.abstract: Prior representative ReAct-style approaches in autonomous Software Engineering (SWE) typically lack the explicit System-2 reasoning required for deep analysis and handling complex edge cases. While recent reasoning models demonstrate the potential of extended Chain-of-Thought (CoT), applying them to the multi-turn SWE task creates a fundamental dilemma: retaining full reasoning history leads to context explosion and ``Lost-in-the-Middle'' degradation, while discarding it would force the agent to redundantly re-reason at every step. To address these challenges, we propose SWE-AGILE, a novel software agent framework designed to bridge the gap between reasoning depth, efficiency, and context constraints. SWE-AGILE introduces a Dynamic Reasoning Context strategy, maintaining a ``sliding window'' of detailed reasoning for immediate continuity to prevent redundant re-analyzing, while compressing historical reasoning content into concise Reasoning Digests. Empirically, SWE-AGILE sets a new standard for 7B-8B models on SWE-Bench-Verified using only 2.2k trajectories and 896 tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/KDEGroup/SWE-AGILE.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态推理上下文管理框架SWE-AGILE，通过滑动窗口和推理摘要解决多轮SWE任务中的上下文爆炸与冗余推理问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有ReAct式SWE代理缺乏深度推理能力，而推理模型在多轮任务中面临上下文爆炸和冗余推理的两难困境。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲推理深度的情况下，高效管理多轮SWE任务中的推理上下文，避免上下文爆炸和冗余推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 保留完整推理历史导致上下文爆炸和Lost-in-the-Middle退化，丢弃历史则迫使代理每步重复推理。
analysis.method: 提出SWE-AGILE框架，采用动态推理上下文策略：对当前推理步骤维护滑动窗口以保持连续性，将历史推理内容压缩为推理摘要。
contributions: 提出SWE-AGILE框架，有效平衡推理深度、效率和上下文约束
在SWE-Bench-Verified上使用2.2k轨迹和896个任务达到7B-8B模型的新标准
analysis.experiments: 在SWE-Bench-Verified上评估，使用2.2k轨迹和896个任务，7B-8B模型取得新标准。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务领域，泛化性需进一步验证
推理摘要的压缩策略可能丢失关键细节
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态推理上下文管理框架SWE-AGILE，通过滑动窗口和推理摘要解决多轮SWE任务中的上下文爆炸与冗余推理问题。

papers.title: BEM: Training-Free Background Embedding Memory for False-Positive Suppression in Real-Time Fixed-Background Camera
papers.abstract: Pretrained detectors perform well on benchmarks but often suffer performance degradation in real-world deployments due to distribution gaps between training data and target environments. COCO-like benchmarks emphasize category diversity rather than instance density, causing detectors trained under per-class sparsity to struggle in dense, single- or few-class scenes such as surveillance and traffic monitoring. In fixed-camera environments, the quasi-static background provides a stable, label-free prior that can be exploited at inference to suppress spurious detections. To address the issue, we propose Background Embedding Memory (BEM), a lightweight, training-free, weight-frozen module that can be attached to pretrained detectors during inference. BEM estimates clean background embeddings, maintains a prototype memory, and re-scores detection logits with an inverse-similarity, rank-weighted penalty, effectively reducing false positives while maintaining recall. Empirically, background-frame cosine similarity correlates negatively with object count and positively with Precision-Confidence AUC (P-AUC), motivating its use as a training-free control signal. Across YOLO and RT-DETR families on LLVIP and simulated surveillance streams, BEM consistently reduces false positives while preserving real-time performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/Leo-Park1214/Background-Embedding-Memory.git

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的BEM模块，利用固定相机背景先验抑制实时检测中的假阳性。
analysis.research_motivation: 预训练检测器在真实部署中因分布偏移性能下降，尤其在密集单/少类场景（如监控）中假阳性高，而固定相机背景提供了稳定的无标签先验未被充分利用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练负担和推理延迟的前提下，利用固定相机背景先验抑制预训练检测器的假阳性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 背景帧余弦相似度与目标数量负相关、与P-AUC正相关，可作为训练无关的控制信号。
analysis.method: 提出BEM模块：估计干净背景嵌入、维护原型记忆，并用逆相似度排名加权惩罚重新评分检测logits。
contributions: 提出无需训练、权重冻结的BEM模块，可即插即用于预训练检测器。
在YOLO和RT-DETR系列上验证，在LLVIP和模拟监控流中有效抑制假阳性并保持实时性。
analysis.experiments: 在LLVIP和模拟监控流上评估YOLO和RT-DETR系列，BEM一致减少假阳性并保持实时性能。
limitations: 仅适用于固定相机场景，背景变化时可能失效。
未在更多样化数据集上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的BEM模块，利用固定相机背景先验抑制实时检测中的假阳性。

papers.title: Seeing Through the Tool: A Controlled Benchmark for Occlusion Robustness in Foundation Segmentation Models
papers.abstract: Occlusion, where target structures are partially hidden by surgical instruments or overlapping tissues, remains a critical yet underexplored challenge for foundation segmentation models in clinical endoscopy. We introduce OccSAM-Bench, a benchmark designed to systematically evaluate SAM-family models under controlled, synthesized surgical occlusion. Our framework simulates two occlusion types (i.e., surgical tool overlay and cutout) across three calibrated severity levels on three public polyp datasets. We propose a novel three-region evaluation protocol that decomposes segmentation performance into full, visible-only, and invisible targets. This metric exposes behaviors that standard amodal evaluation obscures, revealing two distinct model archetypes: Occluder-Aware models (SAM, SAM 2, SAM 3, MedSAM3), which prioritize visible tissue delineation and reject instruments, and Occluder-Agnostic models (MedSAM, MedSAM2), which confidently predict into occluded regions. SAM-Med2D aligns with neither and underperforms across all conditions. Ultimately, our results demonstrate that occlusion robustness is not uniform across architectures, and model selection must be driven by specific clinical intent-whether prioritizing conservative visible-tissue segmentation or the amodal inference of hidden anatomy.

analysis.tldr: 提出OccSAM-Bench基准，系统评估SAM系列模型在手术遮挡下的鲁棒性，揭示两类模型行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床内窥镜中，目标结构常被手术器械或组织遮挡，但现有基础分割模型对此鲁棒性研究不足，缺乏系统评估基准。
analysis.problem: 评估和解析基础分割模型在可控合成手术遮挡条件下的鲁棒性差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现两类模型原型：遮挡感知模型（SAM系列）优先分割可见组织并拒绝器械；遮挡无关模型（MedSAM系列）自信预测遮挡区域。SAM-Med2D表现不佳。
analysis.method: 构建OccSAM-Bench基准，包含两种遮挡类型（手术工具覆盖和切割）和三个严重级别，提出三区域评估协议（全目标、仅可见、不可见）。
contributions: 提出OccSAM-Bench基准，系统评估SAM系列模型在手术遮挡下的鲁棒性。
提出三区域评估协议，揭示标准非模态评估掩盖的模型行为差异。
发现两类模型原型，为临床模型选择提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开息肉数据集上评估SAM、SAM 2、SAM 3、MedSAM、MedSAM2、MedSAM3、SAM-Med2D等模型。
limitations: 遮挡类型和严重级别有限，可能无法覆盖所有临床场景。
仅评估SAM家族模型，未涵盖其他分割架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OccSAM-Bench基准，系统评估SAM系列模型在手术遮挡下的鲁棒性，揭示两类模型行为。

papers.title: A Mamba-Based Multimodal Network for Multiscale Blast-Induced Rapid Structural Damage Assessment
papers.abstract: Accurate and rapid structural damage assessment (SDA) is crucial for post-disaster management, helping responders prioritise resources, plan rescues, and support recovery. Traditional field inspections, though precise, are limited by accessibility, safety risks, and time constraints, especially after large explosions. Machine learning with remote sensing has emerged as a scalable solution for rapid SDA, with Mamba-based networks achieving state-of-the-art performance. However, these methods often require extensive training and large datasets, limiting real-world applicability. Moreover, they fail to incorporate key physical characteristics of blast loading for SDA. To overcome these challenges, we propose a Mamba-based multimodal network for rapid SDA that integrates multi-scale blast-loading information with optical remote sensing images. Evaluated on the 2020 Beirut explosion, our method significantly improves performance over state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at: https://github.com/IMPACTSquad/Blast-Mamba

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Mamba的多模态网络，融合多尺度爆炸荷载信息与遥感图像，实现快速结构损伤评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统结构损伤评估依赖现场检查，存在可达性差、安全风险高、耗时长等局限；现有机器学习方法需要大量训练数据且未利用爆炸荷载物理特征，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用有限数据并融合爆炸荷载物理信息，实现快速、准确的结构损伤评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于Mamba的多模态网络，集成多尺度爆炸荷载信息与光学遥感图像进行结构损伤评估。
contributions: 首次将Mamba架构用于多模态结构损伤评估，融合爆炸荷载物理信息与遥感图像。
在2020年贝鲁特爆炸数据集上取得优于现有方法的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在2020年贝鲁特爆炸数据集上评估，性能优于现有方法。摘要未提供具体实验细节。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定爆炸场景（如贝鲁特爆炸），泛化性需进一步验证。
多尺度爆炸荷载信息的获取可能依赖先验知识或模拟，实际应用中存在不确定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Mamba的多模态网络，融合多尺度爆炸荷载信息与遥感图像，实现快速结构损伤评估。

papers.title: Representations Before Pixels: Semantics-Guided Hierarchical Video Prediction
papers.abstract: Accurate future video prediction requires both high visual fidelity and consistent scene semantics, particularly in complex dynamic environments such as autonomous driving. We present Re2Pix, a hierarchical video prediction framework that decomposes forecasting into two stages: semantic representation prediction and representation-guided visual synthesis. Instead of directly predicting future RGB frames, our approach first forecasts future scene structure in the feature space of a frozen vision foundation model, and then conditions a latent diffusion model on these predicted representations to render photorealistic frames. This decomposition enables the model to focus first on scene dynamics and then on appearance generation. A key challenge arises from the train-test mismatch between ground-truth representations available during training and predicted ones used at inference. To address this, we introduce two conditioning strategies, nested dropout and mixed supervision, that improve robustness to imperfect autoregressive predictions. Experiments on challenging driving benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed semantics-first design significantly improves temporal semantic consistency, perceptual quality, and training efficiency compared to strong diffusion baselines. We provide the implementation code at https://github.com/Sta8is/Re2Pix

analysis.tldr: 提出语义优先的分层视频预测框架，先预测语义表征再生成像素，提升时序一致性与训练效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频预测方法在复杂动态场景（如自动驾驶）中难以同时保证高视觉保真度和一致的场景语义，直接预测RGB帧忽略了高层语义结构。
analysis.problem: 如何将视频预测分解为语义表征预测和表征引导的视觉合成，并解决训练与推理时表征分布不一致的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练时使用真实表征作为条件，推理时使用预测表征，两者存在分布差异，导致生成质量下降。
analysis.method: Re2Pix：先利用冻结视觉基础模型预测未来帧的语义特征，再以这些预测特征为条件，通过潜在扩散模型生成逼真帧；引入嵌套丢弃和混合监督两种条件策略缓解训练-测试不匹配。
contributions: 提出语义优先的分层视频预测框架，将预测分解为语义表征预测和表征引导的视觉合成。
设计嵌套丢弃和混合监督策略，提升对不完美自回归预测的鲁棒性。
在自动驾驶基准上验证了方法在时序语义一致性、感知质量和训练效率上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在多个自动驾驶视频预测基准上进行了实验，与强扩散基线相比，显著提升了时序语义一致性、感知质量和训练效率。
limitations: 依赖预训练的视觉基础模型，其表征质量可能影响整体性能。
框架在非自动驾驶场景（如通用视频预测）上的泛化能力未在摘要中提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义优先的分层视频预测框架，先预测语义表征再生成像素，提升时序一致性与训练效率。

papers.title: Agentic Driving Coach: Robustness and Determinism of Agentic AI-Powered Human-in-the-Loop Cyber-Physical Systems
papers.abstract: Foundation models, including large language models (LLMs), are increasingly used for human-in-the-loop (HITL) cyber-physical systems (CPS) because foundation model-based AI agents can potentially interact with both the physical environments and human users. However, the unpredictable behavior of human users and AI agents, in addition to the dynamically changing physical environments, leads to uncontrollable nondeterminism. To address this urgent challenge of enabling agentic AI-powered HITL CPS, we propose a reactor-model-of-computation (MoC)-based approach, realized by the open-source Lingua Franca (LF) framework. We also carry out a concrete case study using the agentic driving coach as an application of HITL CPS. By evaluating the LF-based agentic HITL CPS, we identify practical challenges in reintroducing determinism into such agentic HITL CPS and present pathways to address them.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于反应式计算模型的框架，用于在人类参与的网宇物理系统中恢复确定性，并以智能驾驶教练为例验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类用户和AI代理的不可预测行为以及动态变化的物理环境导致系统出现不可控的非确定性，亟需解决这一挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何使基于基础模型的AI代理在人类参与的网宇物理系统中实现确定性行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于反应式计算模型（reactor-model-of-computation）的方法，并通过开源框架Lingua Franca实现。
contributions: 提出一种基于反应式计算模型的方法，用于实现确定性的人类参与网宇物理系统。
通过智能驾驶教练案例，识别了在实际中恢复确定性的挑战并给出了解决路径。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定案例（智能驾驶教练）进行了验证，泛化性有待进一步研究。
未提供定量实验结果，实际效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于反应式计算模型的框架，用于在人类参与的网宇物理系统中恢复确定性，并以智能驾驶教练为例验证。

papers.title: Fairness is Not Flat: Geometric Phase Transitions Against Shortcut Learning
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Networks are highly susceptible to shortcut learning, frequently memorizing low-dimensional spurious correlations instead of underlying causal mechanisms. This phenomenon not only degrades out-of-distribution robustness but also induces severe demographic biases in sensitive applications. In this paper, we propose a geometric \textit{a priori} methodology to mitigate shortcut learning. By deploying a zero-hidden-layer ($N=1$) Topological Auditor, we mathematically isolate features that monopolize the gradient without human intervention. We empirically demonstrate a Capacity Phase Transition: once linear shortcuts are pruned, networks are forced to utilize higher geometric capacity ($N \geq 16$) to curve the decision boundary and learn ethical representations. Our approach outperforms L1 Regularization -- which collapses into demographic bias -- and operates at a fraction of the computational cost of post-hoc methods like Just Train Twice (JTT), successfully reducing counterfactual gender vulnerability from 21.18\% to 7.66\%.

analysis.tldr: 通过几何先验方法检测并剪枝线性捷径，迫使网络学习高容量几何表示，有效缓解捷径学习与人口统计偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度神经网络容易利用低维虚假相关（捷径）进行预测，导致分布外泛化差和人口统计偏见，现有方法如L1正则化会加剧偏见，后处理方法计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖人工干预的情况下，从几何角度识别并消除捷径特征，迫使网络学习因果机制和公平表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到容量相变现象：剪枝线性捷径后，网络必须使用更高几何容量（N≥16）来弯曲决策边界，从而学习伦理表示。
analysis.method: 提出零隐藏层（N=1）拓扑审计器，通过几何先验方法隔离垄断梯度的特征，并利用容量相变迫使网络使用高容量几何表示。
contributions: 提出一种几何先验方法，无需人工干预即可识别并剪枝线性捷径。
发现容量相变现象：剪枝线性捷径后网络被迫使用高几何容量。
在反事实性别脆弱性上从21.18%降至7.66%，计算成本低于JTT。
analysis.experiments: 在反事实性别脆弱性指标上，该方法将脆弱性从21.18%降至7.66%，优于L1正则化（导致偏见）和JTT（计算成本高）。
limitations: 仅针对线性捷径，可能无法处理非线性或更复杂的捷径。
拓扑审计器在极深网络中的可扩展性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过几何先验方法检测并剪枝线性捷径，迫使网络学习高容量几何表示，有效缓解捷径学习与人口统计偏见。

papers.title: DreamKG: A KG-Augmented Conversational System for People Experiencing Homelessness
papers.abstract: People experiencing homelessness (PEH) face substantial barriers to accessing timely, accurate information about community services. DreamKG addresses this through a knowledge graph-augmented conversational system that grounds responses in verified, up-to-date data about Philadelphia organizations, services, locations, and hours. Unlike standard large language models (LLMs) prone to hallucinations, DreamKG combines Neo4j knowledge graphs with structured query understanding to handle location-aware and time-sensitive queries reliably. The system performs spatial reasoning for distance-based recommendations and temporal filtering for operating hours. Preliminary evaluation shows 59% superiority over Google Search AI on relevant queries and 84% rejection of irrelevant queries. This demonstration highlights the potential of hybrid architectures that combines LLM flexibility with knowledge graph reliability to improve service accessibility for vulnerable populations effectively.

analysis.tldr: DreamKG 通过知识图谱增强对话系统，为无家可归者提供可靠、位置感知的服务信息查询。
analysis.research_motivation: 无家可归者获取社区服务信息面临障碍，而标准 LLM 容易产生幻觉，无法保证信息的准确性和时效性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够可靠回答关于社区服务的位置、时间等敏感查询的对话系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准 LLM 在服务信息查询中易产生幻觉，而知识图谱可提供结构化、可验证的数据。
analysis.method: 结合 Neo4j 知识图谱与结构化查询理解，实现空间推理（距离推荐）和时间过滤（营业时间）。
contributions: 提出 DreamKG 系统，融合知识图谱与 LLM 以提升服务信息查询的可靠性。
在相关查询上比 Google Search AI 优越 59%，并拒绝 84% 的不相关查询。
analysis.experiments: 初步评估显示，在相关查询上比 Google Search AI 优越 59%，不相关查询拒绝率为 84%。
limitations: 仅针对费城地区，可能无法直接迁移到其他城市。
初步评估规模有限，未报告更全面的性能指标。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DreamKG 通过知识图谱增强对话系统，为无家可归者提供可靠、位置感知的服务信息查询。
