papers.title: Legal2LogicICL: Improving Generalization in Transforming Legal Cases to Logical Formulas via Diverse Few-Shot Learning
papers.abstract: This work aims to improve the generalization of logic-based legal reasoning systems by integrating recent advances in NLP with legal-domain adaptive few-shot learning techniques using LLMs. Existing logic-based legal reasoning pipelines typically rely on fine-tuned models to map natural-language legal cases into logical formulas before forwarding them to a symbolic reasoner. However, such approaches are heavily constrained by the scarcity of high-quality annotated training data. To address this limitation, we propose a novel LLM-based legal reasoning framework that enables effective in-context learning through retrieval-augmented generation. Specifically, we introduce Legal2LogicICL, a few-shot retrieval framework that balances diversity and similarity of exemplars at both the latent semantic representation level and the legal text structure level. In addition, our method explicitly accounts for legal structure by mitigating entity-induced retrieval bias in legal texts, where lengthy and highly specific entity mentions often dominate semantic representations and obscure legally meaningful reasoning patterns. Our Legal2LogicICL constructs informative and robust few-shot demonstrations, leading to accurate and stable logical rule generation without requiring additional training. In addition, we construct a new dataset, named Legal2Proleg, which is annotated with alignments between legal cases and PROLEG logical formulas to support the evaluation of legal semantic parsing. Experimental results on both open-source and proprietary LLMs demonstrate that our approach significantly improves accuracy, stability, and generalization in transforming natural-language legal case descriptions into logical representations, highlighting its effectiveness for interpretable and reliable legal reasoning. Our code is available at https://github.com/yingjie7/Legal2LogicICL.

analysis.tldr: 提出Legal2LogicICL，通过多样性与相似性平衡的少样本检索框架，提升法律案件到逻辑公式的转换泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于逻辑的法律推理系统依赖微调模型将法律案件映射为逻辑公式，但高质量标注数据稀缺，限制了泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM的上下文学习能力，通过检索增强生成构建有效少样本示例，提升法律文本到逻辑公式转换的准确性和稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 法律文本中冗长且高度具体的实体提及常主导语义表示，掩盖有意义的推理模式，导致检索偏差。
analysis.method: 提出Legal2LogicICL，一种少样本检索框架，在潜在语义表示和法律文本结构层面平衡示例的多样性与相似性，并显式缓解实体引起的检索偏差。
contributions: 提出Legal2LogicICL框架，通过多样性与相似性平衡的检索增强生成，提升法律逻辑推理的泛化能力。
构建Legal2Proleg数据集，包含法律案件与PROLEG逻辑公式的对齐标注，支持法律语义解析评估。
analysis.experiments: 在开源和专有LLM上实验，表明方法显著提升了准确率、稳定性和泛化性。
limitations: 依赖PROLEG逻辑表示，可能不适用于其他逻辑形式。
检索框架的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Legal2LogicICL，通过多样性与相似性平衡的少样本检索框架，提升法律案件到逻辑公式的转换泛化能力。

papers.title: LARY: A Latent Action Representation Yielding Benchmark for Generalizable Vision-to-Action Alignment
papers.abstract: While the shortage of explicit action data limits Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, human action videos offer a scalable yet unlabeled data source. A critical challenge in utilizing large-scale human video datasets lies in transforming visual signals into ontology-independent representations, known as latent actions. However, the capacity of latent action representation to derive robust control from visual observations has yet to be rigorously evaluated. We introduce the Latent Action Representation Yielding (LARY) Benchmark, a unified framework for evaluating latent action representations on both high-level semantic actions (what to do) and low-level robotic control (how to do). The comprehensively curated dataset encompasses over one million videos (1,000 hours) spanning 151 action categories, alongside 620K image pairs and 595K motion trajectories across diverse embodiments and environments. Our experiments reveal two crucial insights: (i) General visual foundation models, trained without any action supervision, consistently outperform specialized embodied latent action models. (ii) Latent-based visual space is fundamentally better aligned to physical action space than pixel-based space. These results suggest that general visual representations inherently encode action-relevant knowledge for physical control, and that semantic-level abstraction serves as a fundamentally more effective pathway from vision to action than pixel-level reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: LARY基准揭示：通用视觉基础模型在潜在动作表征上优于专用具身模型，且语义级抽象比像素级重建更利于视觉到动作的对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类动作视频是规模大但无标签的数据源，如何从中提取与本体无关的潜在动作表征以用于机器人控制，是当前VLA模型面临的关键挑战，但现有方法缺乏系统评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一基准来评估潜在动作表征从视觉观测中推导鲁棒控制的能力，尤其是在高层语义动作和底层机器人控制两个层面。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现两个关键现象：(i) 无动作监督的通用视觉基础模型在潜在动作表征上优于专用具身模型；(ii) 基于潜在语义的视觉空间比基于像素的空间更本质地与物理动作空间对齐。
analysis.method: 构建LARY基准，包含超100万视频（1000小时）、151个动作类别、62万图像对和59.5万运动轨迹，用于统一评估潜在动作表征。
contributions: 提出LARY基准，首个统一评估潜在动作表征在高层语义和底层控制两个层面的框架
揭示通用视觉基础模型在潜在动作表征上优于专用具身模型，且语义级抽象比像素级重建更有效
analysis.experiments: 在LARY基准上评估多种潜在动作表征方法，包括通用视觉基础模型和专用具身模型，验证了上述现象。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有机器人平台和任务类型
潜在动作表征的泛化性仍需在真实机器人上进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LARY基准揭示：通用视觉基础模型在潜在动作表征上优于专用具身模型，且语义级抽象比像素级重建更利于视觉到动作的对齐。

papers.title: Unfolding 3D Gaussian Splatting via Iterative Gaussian Synopsis
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has become a state-of-the-art framework for real-time, high-fidelity novel view synthesis. However, its substantial storage requirements and inherently unstructured representation pose challenges for deployment in streaming and resource-constrained environments. Existing Level-of-Detail (LOD) strategies, particularly those based on bottom-up construction, often introduce redundancy or lead to fidelity degradation. To overcome these limitations, we propose Iterative Gaussian Synopsis, a novel framework for compact and progressive rendering through a top-down "unfolding" scheme. Our approach begins with a full-resolution 3DGS model and iteratively derives coarser LODs using an adaptive, learnable mask-based pruning mechanism. This process constructs a multi-level hierarchy that preserves visual quality while improving efficiency. We integrate hierarchical spatial grids, which capture the global scene structure, with a shared Anchor Codebook that models localized details. This combination produces a compact yet expressive feature representation, designed to minimize redundancy and support efficient, level-specific adaptation. The unfolding mechanism promotes inter-layer reusability and requires only minimal data overhead for progressive refinement. Experiments show that our method maintains high rendering quality across all LODs while achieving substantial storage reduction. These results demonstrate the practicality and scalability of our approach for real-time 3DGS rendering in bandwidth- and memory-constrained scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自上而下的迭代高斯摘要框架，通过可学习的掩码剪枝机制构建多级LOD层次，在保持渲染质量的同时大幅降低存储需求。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS在实时高保真新视角合成中表现出色，但其存储需求大且结构非结构化，限制了在流媒体和资源受限环境中的部署；现有LOD策略（尤其是自底向上方法）存在冗余或保真度下降问题。
analysis.problem: 如何为3DGS构建紧凑、渐进的多级LOD表示，在减少存储开销的同时保持渲染质量，并支持高效的渐进式渲染。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Iterative Gaussian Synopsis框架，从全分辨率3DGS模型开始，通过自适应的可学习掩码剪枝机制迭代推导出更粗糙的LOD，形成多级层次结构；结合分层空间网格（捕获全局场景结构）和共享锚点码本（建模局部细节），实现紧凑且富有表现力的特征表示。
contributions: 提出一种自上而下的迭代高斯摘要框架，用于紧凑且渐进的3DGS渲染。
设计自适应可学习掩码剪枝机制，从全分辨率模型迭代生成多级LOD层次。
集成分层空间网格与共享锚点码本，实现低冗余、高效的多级特征表示。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景的极端LOD层次适应性有限。
渐进式渲染的实时性能可能受掩码剪枝计算开销影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自上而下的迭代高斯摘要框架，通过可学习的掩码剪枝机制构建多级LOD层次，在保持渲染质量的同时大幅降低存储需求。

papers.title: Towards Brain MRI Foundation Models for the Clinic: Findings from the FOMO25 Challenge
papers.abstract: Clinical deployment of automated brain MRI analysis faces a fundamental challenge: clinical data is heterogeneous and noisy, and high-quality labels are prohibitively costly to obtain. Self-supervised learning (SSL) can address this by leveraging the vast amounts of unlabeled data produced in clinical workflows to train robust \textit{foundation models} that adapt out-of-domain with minimal supervision. However, the development of foundation models for brain MRI has been limited by small pretraining datasets and in-domain benchmarking focused on high-quality, research-grade data. To address this gap, we organized the FOMO25 challenge as a satellite event at MICCAI 2025. FOMO25 provided participants with a large pretraining dataset, FOMO60K, and evaluated models on data sourced directly from clinical workflows in few-shot and out-of-domain settings. Tasks covered infarct classification, meningioma segmentation, and brain age regression, and considered both models trained on FOMO60K (method track) and any data (open track). Nineteen foundation models from sixteen teams were evaluated using a standardized containerized pipeline. Results show that (a) self-supervised pretraining improves generalization on clinical data under domain shift, with the strongest models trained \textit{out-of-domain} surpassing supervised baselines trained \textit{in-domain}. (b) No single pretraining objective benefits all tasks: MAE favors segmentation, hybrid reconstruction-contrastive objectives favor classification, and (c) strong performance was achieved by small pretrained models, and improvements from scaling model size and training duration did not yield reliable benefits.

analysis.tldr: FOMO25挑战赛表明，自监督预训练能提升脑MRI基础模型在临床数据上的泛化能力，但不同任务需不同预训练目标，且模型规模扩展收益有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床脑MRI分析面临数据异质、噪声大、标注成本高的问题，自监督学习可利用大量未标注临床数据训练基础模型，但现有研究受限于小规模预训练数据集和高质量研究级数据的评测。
analysis.problem: 如何构建和评估适用于临床场景的脑MRI基础模型，特别是在少样本和域外设置下的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自监督预训练能提升域外临床数据上的泛化性，最强域外预训练模型超越域内监督基线；不同预训练目标对不同任务有偏好（MAE利于分割，混合重构-对比目标利于分类）；小模型表现强劲，扩大模型规模和训练时长未带来可靠收益。
analysis.method: 组织FOMO25挑战赛，提供大规模预训练数据集FOMO60K，采用标准化容器化流水线评估16个团队的19个基础模型，涵盖梗死分类、脑膜瘤分割和脑龄回归任务，设置方法轨（仅用FOMO60K）和开放轨（可用任意数据）。
contributions: 提供了大规模脑MRI预训练数据集FOMO60K及标准化评测流水线
系统比较了多种自监督预训练方法在临床域外少样本任务上的表现，揭示了不同任务对预训练目标的偏好
analysis.experiments: 在梗死分类、脑膜瘤分割和脑龄回归三个任务上评估了19个模型，采用少样本和域外设置，使用标准化容器化流水线。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 挑战赛仅覆盖三个任务，可能无法代表所有临床脑MRI分析场景
未深入分析模型规模扩展收益有限的原因
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FOMO25挑战赛表明，自监督预训练能提升脑MRI基础模型在临床数据上的泛化能力，但不同任务需不同预训练目标，且模型规模扩展收益有限。

papers.title: AffordSim: A Scalable Data Generator and Benchmark for Affordance-Aware Robotic Manipulation
papers.abstract: Many everyday robot manipulation skills are affordance-dependent, with success determined by whether the robot contacts the functional object region required by the subsequent action. Current simulation data generators obtain contacts from generic grasp estimators or per-object manual contact annotations, but generic estimators rank stable grasps without task semantics and often select contacts that are misaligned with the downstream action, while manual contact annotations must be rewritten for each new object and task. To solve these challenges, we introduce AffordSim, a scalable data generator and benchmark that integrates open-vocabulary 3D affordance prediction into simulation-based trajectory generation. Given a natural-language task description, AffordSim synthesizes a task-relevant scene, emits affordance queries, grounds them on object surfaces, samples region-conditioned grasps, and selects executable candidates with motion planning. It further randomizes object pose, texture, lighting, image noise, and cross-viewpoint backgrounds for sim-to-real transfer. We instantiate AffordSim as a 50-task benchmark across diverse manipulation skills, five robot embodiments, and 500+ rigid and articulated objects. AffordSim achieves 93% of the trajectory collection success rate of manual contact annotations on affordance-critical tasks and 89% on hard composite tasks. Vision-language-action policies trained on AffordSim data transfer zero-shot to a real Franka FR3, reaching 24% average success.

analysis.tldr: AffordSim 是一个可扩展的数据生成器和基准，通过开放词汇 3D 功能预测生成任务相关的抓取轨迹，用于功能感知机器人操作。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有仿真数据生成器依赖通用抓取估计器或手动接触标注，前者缺乏任务语义导致接触与下游动作不匹配，后者需要为每个新物体和任务重新编写标注，扩展性差。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成与任务语义对齐的、可扩展的机器人操作仿真数据，以支持功能感知操作策略的训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用抓取估计器选择稳定抓取但忽略任务语义，手动接触标注虽准确但不可扩展。
analysis.method: 集成开放词汇 3D 功能预测到仿真轨迹生成：给定自然语言任务描述，合成任务相关场景，发出功能查询并映射到物体表面，采样区域条件抓取，通过运动规划选择可执行候选，并随机化物体姿态、纹理、光照等以促进 sim-to-real 迁移。
contributions: 提出 AffordSim，一个可扩展的数据生成器，利用开放词汇 3D 功能预测自动生成任务相关的抓取轨迹。
构建包含 50 个任务、5 种机器人、500+ 物体的基准，验证了数据生成的有效性和 sim-to-real 迁移能力。
analysis.experiments: 在功能关键任务上，AffordSim 的轨迹收集成功率是手动接触标注的 93%，在困难复合任务上为 89%。基于 AffordSim 数据训练的 VLA 策略零样本迁移到真实 Franka FR3 机器人，平均成功率为 24%。
limitations: 零样本迁移成功率较低（24%），可能受 sim-to-real 差距限制。
依赖开放词汇 3D 功能预测的准确性，预测错误可能影响后续抓取。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AffordSim 是一个可扩展的数据生成器和基准，通过开放词汇 3D 功能预测生成任务相关的抓取轨迹，用于功能感知机器人操作。

papers.title: NetworkNet: A Deep Neural Network Approach for Random Networks with Sparse Nodal Attributes and Complex Nodal Heterogeneity
papers.abstract: Heterogeneous network data with rich nodal information become increasingly prevalent across multidisciplinary research, yet accurately modeling complex nodal heterogeneity and simultaneously selecting influential nodal attributes remains an open challenge. This problem is central to many applications in economics and sociology, when both nodal heterogeneity and high-dimensional individual characteristics highly affect network formation. We propose a statistically grounded, unified deep neural network approach for modeling nodal heterogeneity in random networks with high-dimensional nodal attributes, namely ``NetworkNet''. A key innovation of NetworkNet lies in a tailored neural architecture that explicitly parameterizes attribute-driven heterogeneity, and at the same time, embeds a scalable attribute selection mechanism. NetworkNet consistently estimates two types of latent heterogeneity functions, i.e., nodal expansiveness and popularity, while simultaneously performing data-driven attribute selection to extract influential nodal attributes. By unifying classical statistical network modeling with deep learning, NetworkNet delivers the expressive power of DNNs with methodological interpretability, algorithmic scalability, and statistical rigor with a non-asymptotic approximation error bound. Empirically, simulations demonstrate strong performance in both heterogeneity estimation and high-dimensional attribute selection. We further apply NetworkNet to a large-scale author-citation network among statisticians, revealing new insights into the dynamic evolution of research fields and scholarly impact.

analysis.tldr: 提出NetworkNet，一种融合深度神经网络与统计网络模型的框架，用于稀疏节点属性下随机网络的节点异质性建模与属性选择。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨学科研究中异质网络数据日益普遍，但现有方法难以同时处理复杂节点异质性和高维节点属性的选择，限制了经济学和社会学中网络形成机制的理解。
analysis.problem: 如何在高维稀疏节点属性下，准确估计随机网络中的节点异质性（扩展性和流行性）并自动选择有影响力的属性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出NetworkNet，设计定制神经网络架构显式参数化属性驱动的异质性，并嵌入可扩展的属性选择机制，统一统计网络建模与深度学习。
contributions: 提出NetworkNet，首个统一深度神经网络与统计网络模型的框架，同时估计节点异质性和选择高维属性。
提供非渐近近似误差界，保证统计严谨性，并在模拟和真实引文网络中验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 模拟实验显示在异质性估计和高维属性选择上表现强劲；应用于统计学家引文网络，揭示研究领域动态演化。
limitations: 可能对网络规模或属性维度有计算限制，摘要未提及。
仅针对无向或特定类型网络，扩展性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NetworkNet，一种融合深度神经网络与统计网络模型的框架，用于稀疏节点属性下随机网络的节点异质性建模与属性选择。

papers.title: UNIGEOCLIP: Unified Geospatial Contrastive Learning
papers.abstract: The growing availability of co-located geospatial data spanning aerial imagery, street-level views, elevation models, text, and geographic coordinates offers a unique opportunity for multimodal representation learning. We introduce UNIGEOCLIP, a massively multimodal contrastive framework to jointly align five complementary geospatial modalities in a single unified embedding space. Unlike prior approaches that fuse modalities or rely on a central pivot representation, our method performs all-to-all contrastive alignment, enabling seamless comparison, retrieval, and reasoning across arbitrary combinations of modalities. We further propose a scaled latitude-longitude encoder that improves spatial representation by capturing multi-scale geographic structure. Extensive experiments across downstream geospatial tasks demonstrate that UNIGEOCLIP consistently outperforms single-modality contrastive models and coordinate-only baselines, highlighting the benefits of holistic multimodal geospatial alignment. A reference implementation is available at https://gastruc.github.io/unigeoclip.

analysis.tldr: UNIGEOCLIP 通过全对全对比学习对齐五种地理空间模态，提升多模态表征与下游任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 地理空间数据模态多样（航拍、街景、高程、文本、坐标），现有方法依赖模态融合或中心表征，无法充分利用多模态互补信息。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个统一嵌入空间中联合对齐五种地理空间模态，实现任意模态间的无缝比较、检索与推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 UNIGEOCLIP，采用全对全对比学习框架，同时对齐五种模态；并设计缩放经纬度编码器以捕捉多尺度地理结构。
contributions: 提出首个全对全对比学习框架，联合对齐五种地理空间模态。
设计缩放经纬度编码器，提升空间表征的多尺度表达能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模配对数据，数据获取成本高。
全对全对比学习计算复杂度较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: UNIGEOCLIP 通过全对全对比学习对齐五种地理空间模态，提升多模态表征与下游任务性能。

papers.title: Playing Along: Learning a Double-Agent Defender for Belief Steering via Theory of Mind
papers.abstract: As large language models (LLMs) become the engine behind conversational systems, their ability to reason about the intentions and states of their dialogue partners (i.e., form and use a theory-of-mind, or ToM) becomes increasingly critical for safe interaction with potentially adversarial partners. We propose a novel privacy-themed ToM challenge, ToM for Steering Beliefs (ToM-SB), in which a defender must act as a Double Agent to steer the beliefs of an attacker with partial prior knowledge within a shared universe. To succeed on ToM-SB, the defender must engage with and form a ToM of the attacker, with a goal of fooling the attacker into believing they have succeeded in extracting sensitive information. We find that strong frontier models like Gemini3-Pro and GPT-5.4 struggle on ToM-SB, often failing to fool attackers in hard scenarios with partial attacker prior knowledge, even when prompted to reason about the attacker's beliefs (ToM prompting). To close this gap, we train models on ToM-SB to act as AI Double Agents using reinforcement learning, testing both fooling and ToM rewards. Notably, we find a bidirectionally emergent relationship between ToM and attacker-fooling: rewarding fooling success alone improves ToM, and rewarding ToM alone improves fooling. Across four attackers with different strengths, six defender methods, and both in-distribution and out-of-distribution (OOD) evaluation, we find that gains in ToM and attacker-fooling are well-correlated, highlighting belief modeling as a key driver of success on ToM-SB. AI Double Agents that combine both ToM and fooling rewards yield the strongest fooling and ToM performance, outperforming Gemini3-Pro and GPT-5.4 with ToM prompting on hard scenarios. We also show that ToM-SB and AI Double Agents can be extended to stronger attackers, demonstrating generalization to OOD settings and the upgradability of our task.

analysis.tldr: 提出ToM-SB任务，用强化学习训练AI双面间谍，通过心智理论欺骗攻击者，发现ToM与欺骗能力双向涌现。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM驱动的对话系统需要理解对话伙伴的意图和状态（心智理论）以安全交互，但现有模型在面对有部分先验知识的对抗性攻击者时难以有效保护隐私信息。
analysis.problem: 如何让防御者作为双面间谍，在共享宇宙中引导攻击者的信念，使其误以为成功提取了敏感信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 强模型（Gemini3-Pro、GPT-5.4）在ToM-SB困难场景中难以欺骗攻击者，即使使用ToM提示；奖励欺骗成功可提升ToM，奖励ToM也可提升欺骗，两者双向涌现。
analysis.method: 使用强化学习训练AI双面间谍，结合欺骗奖励和ToM奖励，在ToM-SB任务上优化防御者策略。
contributions: 提出ToM-SB任务，评估防御者通过心智理论引导攻击者信念的能力
发现ToM与欺骗能力之间的双向涌现关系
训练AI双面间谍在困难场景中超越强模型（Gemini3-Pro、GPT-5.4）
analysis.experiments: 在四种不同强度的攻击者、六种防御方法、分布内和分布外评估中，验证了ToM与欺骗的正相关，以及AI双面间谍的优越性能。
limitations: 任务设定可能简化了真实对话中的复杂性和多轮交互
未讨论防御者策略被攻击者反向利用的风险
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ToM-SB任务，用强化学习训练AI双面间谍，通过心智理论欺骗攻击者，发现ToM与欺骗能力双向涌现。

papers.title: Beyond LLMs, Sparse Distributed Memory, and Neuromorphics <A Hyper-Dimensional SRAM-CAM "VaCoAl" for Ultra-High Speed, Ultra-Low Power, and Low Cost>
papers.abstract: This paper reports an unexpected finding: in a deterministic hyperdimensional computing (HDC) architecture **that inverts the conventional role of Galois-field algebra -- employing it not for error correction toward a unique answer but as an engine for relative similarity and path-quality ranking -- **a path-dependent semantic selection mechanism emerges, equivalent to spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP), with magnitude predictable a priori from a closed-form expression matching measured values. Addressing catastrophic forgetting, learning stagnation, and the Binding Problem at an algebraic level, we propose VaCoAl (Vague Coincident Algorithm) and its Python implementation PyVaCoAl on ultra-high-dimensional SRAM/DRAM-CAM. Rooted in Sparse Distributed Memory, it resolves orthogonalisation and retrieval in high-dimensional binary spaces via Galois-field diffusion, enabling low-load deployment. Crucially, VaCoAl embeds a cognitive bound -- the Frontier Size -- into its architecture, ranking candidates by path-integral confidence (CR2) to achieve compositional generalisation; this bounded-rationality design produces STDP-like selection that error-correction paradigms structurally cannot attain. We evaluated multi-hop reasoning on about 470k mentor-student relations from Wikidata, tracing up to 57 generations (over 25.5M paths). HDC bundling and unbinding with CR-based denoising quantify concept propagation over DAGs. Results show a reinterpretation of the Newton-Leibniz dispute and a phase transition from sparse convergence to a post-Leibniz "superhighway", with structural indicators supporting a Kuhnian paradigm shift. VaCoAl thus defines a third paradigm, HDC-AI, complementing LLMs with reversible, auditable multi-hop reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出VaCoAl超维计算架构，通过Galois域代数实现类STDP路径选择，在超大规模知识图谱推理中展现可逆、可审计的多跳推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM存在灾难性遗忘、学习停滞和绑定问题，且推理过程不可逆、不可审计；传统超维计算缺乏高效的路径选择机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在超维二进制空间中实现高效、可逆、可审计的多跳推理，同时避免灾难性遗忘和学习停滞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VaCoAl架构，基于稀疏分布式记忆和Galois域扩散，通过路径积分置信度（CR2）进行候选排序，实现组合泛化；并给出Python实现PyVaCoAl。
contributions: 发现确定性HDC架构中路径依赖的语义选择机制等价于STDP，且幅度可由闭式表达式预测。
提出VaCoAl算法，在代数层面解决灾难性遗忘、学习停滞和绑定问题。
在Wikidata约47万条师徒关系数据上验证多跳推理，追踪57代（超2550万路径），展示相变和范式转换证据。
analysis.experiments: 在Wikidata约47万条师徒关系数据上评估多跳推理，追踪最多57代（超2550万路径），结果支持牛顿-莱布尼茨争议的新解释和库恩范式转换。
limitations: 实验仅基于单一知识图谱数据集，泛化性待验证。
与LLM的互补性及实际应用集成尚未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VaCoAl超维计算架构，通过Galois域代数实现类STDP路径选择，在超大规模知识图谱推理中展现可逆、可审计的多跳推理能力。

papers.title: Why Do Large Language Models Generate Harmful Content?
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been shown to generate harmful content. However, the underlying causes of such behavior remain under explored. We propose a causal mediation analysis-based approach to identify the causal factors responsible for harmful generation. Our method performs a multi-granular analysis across model layers, modules (MLP and attention blocks), and individual neurons. Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art LLMs indicate that harmful generation arises in the later layers of the model, results primarily from failures in MLP blocks rather than attention blocks, and is associated with neurons that act as a gating mechanism for harmful generation. The results indicate that the early layers in the model are used for a contextual understanding of harmfulness in a prompt, which is then propagated through the model, to generate harmfulness in the late layers, as well as a signal indicating harmfulness through MLP blocks. This is then further propagated to the last layer of the model, specifically to a sparse set of neurons, which receives the signal and determines the generation of harmful content accordingly.

analysis.tldr: 通过因果中介分析，发现LLM生成有害内容主要源于后期层的MLP模块和稀疏神经元门控机制。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成有害内容的行为已被广泛报道，但其根本原因尚不明确，缺乏系统性的因果分析。
analysis.problem: 识别LLM生成有害内容的具体因果因素和机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 有害生成主要出现在模型后期层，MLP模块比注意力模块贡献更大，且与充当门控机制的稀疏神经元相关。早期层负责理解提示中的有害上下文，信号通过MLP传播至后期层，最终由稀疏神经元决定是否生成有害内容。
analysis.method: 基于因果中介分析的多粒度分析方法，跨模型层、模块（MLP和注意力）和单个神经元进行分析。
contributions: 提出一种因果中介分析方法，用于识别LLM生成有害内容的因果因素。
揭示有害生成主要源于后期层的MLP模块和稀疏神经元门控机制。
analysis.experiments: 在多个最先进LLM上进行实验，验证了因果因素的作用。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的LLM架构。
未探讨不同有害内容类型的差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过因果中介分析，发现LLM生成有害内容主要源于后期层的MLP模块和稀疏神经元门控机制。

papers.title: Towards Autonomous Mechanistic Reasoning in Virtual Cells
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently gained significant attention as a promising approach to accelerate scientific discovery. However, their application in open-ended scientific domains such as biology remains limited, primarily due to the lack of factually grounded and actionable explanations. To address this, we introduce a structured explanation formalism for virtual cells that represents biological reasoning as mechanistic action graphs, enabling systematic verification and falsification. Building upon this, we propose VCR-Agent, a multi-agent framework that integrates biologically grounded knowledge retrieval with a verifier-based filtering approach to generate and validate mechanistic reasoning autonomously. Using this framework, we release VC-TRACES dataset, which consists of verified mechanistic explanations derived from the Tahoe-100M atlas. Empirically, we demonstrate that training with these explanations improves factual precision and provides a more effective supervision signal for downstream gene expression prediction. These results underscore the importance of reliable mechanistic reasoning for virtual cells, achieved through the synergy of multi-agent and rigorous verification.

analysis.tldr: 提出VCR-Agent框架，通过结构化解释形式和多智能体验证，提升虚拟细胞中LLM的机制推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在开放科学领域（如生物学）的应用受限，主要因为缺乏事实准确且可操作的推理解释，现有方法难以保证推理的可靠性和可验证性。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在虚拟细胞中生成事实准确、可验证的机制性推理解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出结构化解释形式（机制动作图），构建多智能体框架VCR-Agent，集成生物学知识检索和基于验证器的过滤方法，自动生成并验证机制推理。
contributions: 提出用于虚拟细胞的结构化解释形式，将生物推理表示为机制动作图，支持系统验证和证伪。
构建VCR-Agent多智能体框架，结合知识检索和验证过滤，实现自主机制推理。
发布VC-TRACES数据集，包含来自Tahoe-100M图谱的已验证机制解释。
analysis.experiments: 在基因表达预测任务上，使用VC-TRACES解释训练模型，提高了事实精度和下游任务性能。
limitations: 框架依赖预定义的知识图谱和验证器，可能限制对新机制的发现。
实验仅验证了基因表达预测任务，其他生物学任务的有效性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VCR-Agent框架，通过结构化解释形式和多智能体验证，提升虚拟细胞中LLM的机制推理能力。

papers.title: RPA-Check: A Multi-Stage Automated Framework for Evaluating Dynamic LLM-based Role-Playing Agents
papers.abstract: The rapid adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) in interactive systems has enabled the creation of dynamic, open-ended Role-Playing Agents (RPAs). However, evaluating these agents remains a significant challenge, as standard NLP metrics fail to capture the nuances of role adherence, logical consistency, and long-term narrative stability. This paper introduces RPA-Check, a multi-stage automated evaluation framework designed to objectively assess the performance of LLM-based RPAs in complex, constraints-heavy environments. Our methodology is based on a four-step pipeline: (1) Dimension Definition, establishing high-level qualitative behavioral criteria; (2) Augmentation, where these requirements are expanded into granular boolean checklist indicators; (3) Semantic Filtering, to ensure indicator objectivity, no redundancy and agent isolation; and (4) LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation, which employs chain-of-thought verification to score agent fidelity. We validate this framework by applying it to LLM Court, a serious game for forensic training involving several quantized local models. Experimental results across five distinct legal scenarios demonstrate the framework's ability to identify subtle trade-offs between model size, reasoning depth, and operational stability. Notably, the findings reveal an inverse relationship between parametric scale and procedural consistency, showing that smaller, adequately instruction-tuned models (8-9B) can outperform larger architectures prone to user-alignment bias or sycophancy. RPA-Check thus provides a standardized and reproducible metric for future research in generative agent evaluation within specialized domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出RPA-Check多阶段自动评估框架，用于评估基于LLM的动态角色扮演代理，发现小模型在程序一致性上可能优于大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM驱动的角色扮演代理在交互系统中广泛应用，但现有NLP指标无法捕捉角色一致性、逻辑连贯性和长期叙事稳定性等细微特征，缺乏客观评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何客观、标准化地评估基于LLM的动态角色扮演代理在复杂约束环境中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现模型参数量与程序一致性呈反比：较小但经过良好指令微调的模型（8-9B）在程序一致性上优于易受用户对齐偏差或谄媚影响的大模型。
analysis.method: 四阶段流水线：维度定义（建立定性行为标准）、增强（扩展为细粒度布尔检查指标）、语义过滤（确保指标客观、无冗余、代理隔离）、LLM-as-a-Judge评估（使用思维链验证评分）。
contributions: 提出RPA-Check，一个多阶段自动评估框架，用于评估LLM角色扮演代理的角色忠实度、逻辑一致性和叙事稳定性。
通过法医训练严肃游戏LLM Court中的实验验证框架有效性，揭示模型规模与程序一致性之间的反比关系。
analysis.experiments: 在LLM Court的五个不同法律场景中，使用多个量化本地模型进行实验，评估框架识别模型大小、推理深度和操作稳定性之间权衡的能力。
limitations: 框架依赖LLM作为评判者，可能引入评判者自身的偏差。
实验仅针对法医训练领域，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RPA-Check多阶段自动评估框架，用于评估基于LLM的动态角色扮演代理，发现小模型在程序一致性上可能优于大模型。

papers.title: GazeVaLM: A Multi-Observer Eye-Tracking Benchmark for Evaluating Clinical Realism in AI-Generated X-Rays
papers.abstract: We introduce GazeVaLM, a public eye-tracking dataset for studying clinical perception during chest radiograph authenticity assessment. The dataset comprises 960 gaze recordings from 16 expert radiologists interpreting 30 real and 30 synthetic chest X-rays (generated by diffusion based generative AI) under two conditions: diagnostic assessment and real-fake classification (Visual Turing test). For each image-observer pair, we provide raw gaze samples, fixation maps, scanpaths, saliency density maps, structured diagnostic labels, and authenticity judgments. We extend the protocol to 6 state-of-the-art multimodal LLMs, releasing their predicted diagnoses, authenticity labels, and confidence scores under matched conditions - enabling direct human-AI comparison at both decision and uncertainty levels. We further provide analyses of gaze agreement, inter-observer consistency, and benchmarking of radiologists versus LLMs in diagnostic accuracy and authenticity detection. GazeVaLM supports research in gaze modeling, clinical decision-making, human-AI comparison, generative image realism assessment, and uncertainty quantification. By jointly releasing visual attention data, clinical labels, and model predictions, we aim to facilitate reproducible research on how experts and AI systems perceive, interpret, and evaluate medical images. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/davidcwong/GazeVaLM.

analysis.tldr: GazeVaLM 是一个包含放射科医生和 LLM 对真实与 AI 生成 X 光片注视数据的公开基准，用于评估临床真实感。
analysis.research_motivation: AI 生成的医学图像（如 X 光片）在临床应用中日益增多，但专家如何感知其真实性尚不清楚，缺乏同时包含人类注视数据和 AI 模型预测的基准来研究临床真实感评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个多观察者眼动追踪数据集，用于研究放射科医生和 AI 模型在区分真实与 AI 生成 X 光片时的视觉注意、诊断准确性和真实性判断。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含 16 位放射科医生在诊断和真伪分类任务中 960 条注视记录的数据集，并扩展至 6 个多模态 LLM，提供原始注视数据、注视图、扫描路径、显著性密度图、诊断标签和真实性判断。
contributions: 发布了首个多观察者眼动追踪数据集 GazeVaLM，包含放射科医生和 LLM 对真实与 AI 生成 X 光片的注视数据。
提供了人类与 AI 在诊断准确性和真实性检测上的直接比较基准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（30 张真实和 30 张合成图像，16 位专家）。
仅涉及胸部 X 光片，泛化到其他医学图像模态可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GazeVaLM 是一个包含放射科医生和 LLM 对真实与 AI 生成 X 光片注视数据的公开基准，用于评估临床真实感。

papers.title: LASA: Language-Agnostic Semantic Alignment at the Semantic Bottleneck for LLM Safety
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often demonstrate strong safety performance in high-resource languages, yet exhibit severe vulnerabilities when queried in low-resource languages. We attribute this gap to a mismatch between language-agnostic semantic understanding ability and language-dominant safety alignment biased toward high-resource languages. Consistent with this hypothesis, we empirically identify the semantic bottleneck in LLMs, an intermediate layer in which the geometry of model representations is governed primarily by shared semantic content rather than language identity. Building on this observation, we propose Language-Agnostic Semantic Alignment (LASA), which anchors safety alignment directly in semantic bottlenecks. Experiments show that LASA substantially improves safety across all languages: average attack success rate (ASR) drops from 24.7% to 2.8% on LLaMA-3.1-8B-Instruct and remains around 3-4% across Qwen2.5 and Qwen3 Instruct models (7B-32B). Together, our analysis and method offer a representation-level perspective on LLM safety, suggesting that safety alignment requires anchoring safety understanding not in surface text, but in the model's language-agnostic semantic space.

analysis.tldr: 提出LASA方法，在LLM语义瓶颈层进行语言无关的安全对齐，显著降低低资源语言攻击成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在高资源语言上安全表现良好，但在低资源语言上存在严重漏洞，原因是语言无关的语义理解能力与偏向高资源语言的安全对齐之间存在不匹配。
analysis.problem: 如何消除LLM安全对齐中的语言偏差，使其在低资源语言上也具备鲁棒的安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现LLM中存在语义瓶颈层，该层模型表示的几何结构主要由共享语义内容而非语言身份主导。
analysis.method: 提出语言无关语义对齐（LASA），将安全对齐直接锚定在语义瓶颈层，而非表面文本。
contributions: 识别并验证了LLM中的语义瓶颈层，其表示主要由语义内容而非语言身份决定。
提出LASA方法，在语义瓶颈层进行语言无关的安全对齐，显著提升多语言安全性。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaMA-3.1-8B-Instruct上平均攻击成功率从24.7%降至2.8%，在Qwen2.5和Qwen3 Instruct模型（7B-32B）上保持在3-4%左右。
limitations: 方法可能依赖于模型架构中语义瓶颈层的存在，不同架构适用性需验证。
实验仅评估了攻击成功率，未涉及其他安全维度如幻觉或事实性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LASA方法，在LLM语义瓶颈层进行语言无关的安全对齐，显著降低低资源语言攻击成功率。

papers.title: CodeTracer: Towards Traceable Agent States
papers.abstract: Code agents are advancing rapidly, but debugging them is becoming increasingly difficult. As frameworks orchestrate parallel tool calls and multi-stage workflows over complex tasks, making the agent's state transitions and error propagation hard to observe. In these runs, an early misstep can trap the agent in unproductive loops or even cascade into fundamental errors, forming hidden error chains that make it hard to tell when the agent goes off track and why. Existing agent tracing analyses either focus on simple interaction or rely on small-scale manual inspection, which limits their scalability and usefulness for real coding workflows. We present CodeTracer, a tracing architecture that parses heterogeneous run artifacts through evolving extractors, reconstructs the full state transition history as a hierarchical trace tree with persistent memory, and performs failure onset localization to pinpoint the failure origin and its downstream chain. To enable systematic evaluation, we construct CodeTraceBench from a large collection of executed trajectories generated by four widely used code agent frameworks on diverse code tasks (e.g., bug fixing, refactoring, and terminal interaction), with supervision at both the stage and step levels for failure localization. Experiments show that CodeTracer substantially outperforms direct prompting and lightweight baselines, and that replaying its diagnostic signals consistently recovers originally failed runs under matched budgets. Our code and data are publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出CodeTracer，通过解析异构运行工件、重建分层跟踪树和故障起始定位，显著提升代码Agent状态的可追踪性和调试效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 代码Agent调试困难，现有追踪方法局限于简单交互或小规模人工检查，无法应对并行工具调用和多阶段工作流中的隐藏错误链。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地追踪代码Agent的状态转换和错误传播，实现故障起始定位和可扩展的评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 早期错误会导致Agent陷入无效循环或级联错误，形成隐藏错误链，难以观察和定位。
analysis.method: CodeTracer架构：通过演化提取器解析异构运行工件，重建完整状态转换历史为带持久内存的分层跟踪树，并执行故障起始定位以确定故障源头及其下游链。
contributions: 提出CodeTracer追踪架构，支持异构工件解析、分层跟踪树重建和故障起始定位。
构建CodeTraceBench基准，包含多种代码Agent框架在多种任务上的执行轨迹，提供阶段和步骤级故障定位监督。
实验证明CodeTracer显著优于直接提示和轻量基线，且重放诊断信号能在匹配预算下恢复失败运行。
analysis.experiments: 在CodeTraceBench上评估，包含四种代码Agent框架（bug修复、重构、终端交互等任务），CodeTracer显著优于直接提示和轻量基线，重放诊断信号可恢复失败运行。
limitations: 可能依赖特定框架的提取器，泛化性需进一步验证。
故障定位精度可能受轨迹复杂度影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CodeTracer，通过解析异构运行工件、重建分层跟踪树和故障起始定位，显著提升代码Agent状态的可追踪性和调试效率。

papers.title: STS-Mixer: Spatio-Temporal-Spectral Mixer for 4D Point Cloud Video Understanding
papers.abstract: 4D point cloud videos capture rich spatial and temporal dynamics of scenes which possess unique values in various 4D understanding tasks. However, most existing methods work in the spatiotemporal domain where the underlying geometric characteristics of 4D point cloud videos are hard to capture, leading to degraded representation learning and understanding of 4D point cloud videos. We address the above challenge from a complementary spectral perspective. By transforming 4D point cloud videos into graph spectral signals, we can decompose them into multiple frequency bands each of which captures distinct geometric structures of point cloud videos. Our spectral analysis reveals that the decomposed low-frequency signals capture more coarse shapes while high-frequency signals encode more fine-grained geometry details. Building on these observations, we design Spatio-Temporal-Spectral Mixer (STS-Mixer), a unified framework that mixes spatial, temporal, and spectral representations of point cloud videos. STS-Mixer integrates multi-band delineated spectral signals with spatiotemporal information to capture rich geometries and temporal dynamics, while enabling fine-grained and holistic understanding of 4D point cloud videos. Extensive experiments show that STS-Mixer achieves superior performance consistently across multiple widely adopted benchmarks on both 3D action recognition and 4D semantic segmentation tasks. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Vegetebird/STS-Mixer.

analysis.tldr: 提出STS-Mixer，通过图谱分解将4D点云视频分解为多频带信号，融合时空-频谱表示提升4D理解性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有4D点云视频方法主要在时空域处理，难以捕捉底层几何特征，导致表示学习受限。
analysis.problem: 如何有效捕捉4D点云视频的几何结构，提升表示学习与理解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 频谱分析表明，低频信号捕获粗略形状，高频信号编码精细几何细节。
analysis.method: STS-Mixer：将4D点云视频转换为图谱信号，分解为多频带，并与时空信息混合，实现统一框架。
contributions: 提出从频谱视角处理4D点云视频，揭示不同频带对应不同几何结构。
设计STS-Mixer统一融合时空-频谱表示，在3D动作识别和4D语义分割任务上取得一致领先性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个广泛使用的3D动作识别和4D语义分割基准上，STS-Mixer持续取得优越性能。
limitations: 可能依赖图构建质量，对大规模点云计算开销较高。
频谱分解的频带选择可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STS-Mixer，通过图谱分解将4D点云视频分解为多频带信号，融合时空-频谱表示提升4D理解性能。

papers.title: MorphoFlow: Sparse-Supervised Generative Shape Modeling with Adaptive Latent Relevance
papers.abstract: Statistical shape modeling (SSM) is central to population level analysis of anatomical variability, yet most existing approaches rely on densely annotated segmentations and fixed latent representations. These requirements limit scalability and reduce flexibility when modeling complex anatomical variation. We introduce MorphoFlow, a sparse supervised generative shape modeling framework that learns compact probabilistic shape representations directly from sparse surface annotations. MorphoFlow integrates neural implicit shape representations with an autodecoder formulation and autoregressive normalizing flows to learn an expressive probabilistic density over the latent shape space. The neural implicit representation enables resolution-agnostic modeling of 3D anatomy, while the autodecoder formulation supports direct optimization of per-instance latent codes under sparse supervision. The autoregressive flow captures the distribution of latent anatomical variability providing a tractable, likelihood-based generative model of shapes. To promote compact and structured latent representations, we incorporate adaptive latent relevance weighting through sparsity-inducing priors, enabling the model to regulate the contribution of individual latent dimensions according to their relevance to the underlying anatomical variation while preserving generative expressivity. The resulting latent space supports uncertainty quantification and anatomically plausible shape synthesis without manual latent dimensionality tuning. Evaluation on publicly available lumbar vertebrae and femur datasets demonstrates accurate high-resolution reconstruction from sparse inputs and recovery of structured modes of anatomical variation consistent with population level trends.

analysis.tldr: MorphoFlow通过稀疏监督和自适应潜在相关性实现紧凑的生成式形状建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统计形状模型依赖密集标注和固定潜在表示，限制了可扩展性和灵活性，难以高效建模复杂解剖变异。
analysis.problem: 如何从稀疏表面标注中学习紧凑的概率形状表示，并支持不确定性量化和解剖合理的形状生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合神经隐式表示、自解码器、自回归归一化流和稀疏诱导先验的自适应潜在相关性加权。
contributions: 提出稀疏监督的生成式形状建模框架MorphoFlow，直接从稀疏标注学习紧凑概率表示。
引入自适应潜在相关性加权，通过稀疏诱导先验自动调节潜在维度贡献，无需手动调参。
analysis.experiments: 在公开腰椎和股骨数据集上评估，显示从稀疏输入实现高分辨率重建，并恢复与群体趋势一致的解剖变异模式。
limitations: 可能依赖特定解剖结构，泛化到其他领域需验证。
稀疏标注的质量和分布可能影响模型性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MorphoFlow通过稀疏监督和自适应潜在相关性实现紧凑的生成式形状建模。

papers.title: LayerCache: Exploiting Layer-wise Velocity Heterogeneity for Efficient Flow Matching Inference
papers.abstract: Flow Matching models achieve state-of-the-art image generation quality but incur substantial inference cost due to iterative denoising through large Transformer networks. We observe that different layer groups within a Transformer exhibit markedly heterogeneous velocity dynamics: shallow layers are highly stable and amenable to aggressive caching, while deep layers undergo large velocity changes that demand full computation. Existing caching methods, however, treat the entire Transformer as a monolithic unit, applying a single caching decision per timestep and thus failing to exploit this heterogeneity. Based on this finding, we propose LayerCache, a layer-aware caching framework that partitions the Transformer into layer groups and makes independent, per-group caching decisions at each denoising step. LayerCache introduces an adaptive JVP span K selection mechanism that leverages per-group stability measurements to balance estimation accuracy and computational savings. We formulate a three-dimensional scheduling problem over timesteps, layer groups, and JVP span, and solve it with a greedy budget allocation algorithm. On Qwen-Image (1024x1024, 50 steps), LayerCache achieves PSNR 37.46 dB (+5.38 dB over MeanCache), SSIM 0.9834, and LPIPS 0.0178 (a 70% reduction over MeanCache) at 1.37x speedup, dominating all prior caching methods on the quality-speed Pareto frontier.

analysis.tldr: 提出层感知缓存框架LayerCache，利用Transformer不同层组的速度异质性实现高效流匹配推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 流匹配模型推理成本高，现有缓存方法将Transformer视为整体，未能利用层间速度异质性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用Transformer层间速度异质性设计层感知缓存策略，在保证生成质量的同时加速流匹配推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到Transformer浅层速度稳定适合激进缓存，深层速度变化大需完整计算。
analysis.method: 将Transformer划分为层组，独立进行每组的缓存决策；引入自适应JVP跨度K选择机制，基于每组稳定性平衡精度与计算节省；将问题建模为三维调度问题并用贪心预算分配算法求解。
contributions: 发现Transformer层间速度异质性现象
提出层感知缓存框架LayerCache
设计自适应JVP跨度选择机制和贪心调度算法
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen-Image (1024x1024, 50步)上，PSNR 37.46 dB (+5.38 dB over MeanCache)，SSIM 0.9834，LPIPS 0.0178 (较MeanCache降低70%)，1.37x加速，在质量-速度帕累托前沿上优于所有先前缓存方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定Transformer架构
贪心算法可能非最优全局解
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层感知缓存框架LayerCache，利用Transformer不同层组的速度异质性实现高效流匹配推理。

papers.title: Back to Basics: Let Conversational Agents Remember with Just Retrieval and Generation
papers.abstract: Existing conversational memory systems rely on complex hierarchical summarization or reinforcement learning to manage long-term dialogue history, yet remain vulnerable to context dilution as conversations grow. In this work, we offer a different perspective: the primary bottleneck may lie not in memory architecture, but in the \textit{Signal Sparsity Effect} within the latent knowledge manifold. Through controlled experiments, we identify two key phenomena: \textit{Decisive Evidence Sparsity}, where relevant signals become increasingly isolated with longer sessions, leading to sharp degradation in aggregation-based methods; and \textit{Dual-Level Redundancy}, where both inter-session interference and intra-session conversational filler introduce large amounts of non-informative content, hindering effective generation. Motivated by these insights, we propose \method, a minimalist framework that brings conversational memory back to basics, relying solely on retrieval and generation via Turn Isolation Retrieval (TIR) and Query-Driven Pruning (QDP). TIR replaces global aggregation with a max-activation strategy to capture turn-level signals, while QDP removes redundant sessions and conversational filler to construct a compact, high-density evidence set. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that \method achieves robust performance across diverse settings, consistently outperforming strong baselines while maintaining high efficiency in tokens and latency, establishing a new minimalist baseline for conversational memory.

analysis.tldr: 提出极简对话记忆框架，仅用检索和生成解决长对话中的信号稀疏与冗余问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对话记忆系统依赖复杂的分层摘要或强化学习，但在长对话中仍易受上下文稀释影响，效率低且鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 长对话中记忆系统面临信号稀疏（相关信号随对话增长而孤立）和双重冗余（会话间干扰与会话内填充内容）问题，导致聚合方法性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 识别出两个关键现象：决定性证据稀疏性（相关信号在长会话中变得孤立，聚合方法性能急剧下降）和双重冗余（会话间干扰和会话内填充内容引入大量非信息内容）。
analysis.method: 提出极简框架，包含轮次隔离检索（TIR）和查询驱动剪枝（QDP）。TIR用最大激活策略替代全局聚合以捕获轮次级信号；QDP移除冗余会话和填充内容，构建紧凑高密度证据集。
contributions: 揭示了对话记忆中的信号稀疏效应和双重冗余现象
提出仅依赖检索和生成的极简框架，在多个基准上超越强基线，同时保持高令牌和延迟效率
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上进行了广泛实验，方法在不同设置下表现稳健，一致优于强基线，且令牌和延迟效率高。
limitations: 可能对极端长对话的扩展性需进一步验证
未讨论多模态或跨语言场景的适用性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出极简对话记忆框架，仅用检索和生成解决长对话中的信号稀疏与冗余问题。

papers.title: POINTS-Long: Adaptive Dual-Mode Visual Reasoning in MLLMs
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently demonstrated remarkable capabilities in cross-modal understanding and generation. However, the rapid growth of visual token sequences--especially in long-video and streaming scenarios--poses a major challenge to their scalability and real-world deployment. Thus, we introduce POINTS-Long, a native dual-mode MLLM featuring dynamic visual token scaling inspired by the human visual system. The model supports two complementary perception modes: focus mode and standby mode, enabling users to dynamically trade off efficiency and accuracy during inference. On fine-grained visual tasks, the focus mode retains the optimal performance, while on long-form general visual understanding, the standby mode retains 97.7-99.7% of the original accuracy using only 1/40-1/10th of the visual tokens. Moreover, POINTS-Long natively supports streaming visual understanding via a dynamically detachable KV-cache design, allowing efficient maintenance of ultra-long visual memory. Our work provides new insights into the design of future MLLMs and lays the foundation for adaptive and efficient long-form visual understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种双模态视觉推理MLLM，通过动态视觉令牌缩放和可分离KV缓存实现长视频/流式场景下的效率与精度权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: MLLM在长视频和流式场景中视觉令牌序列快速增长，导致可扩展性和实际部署困难，现有方法缺乏动态效率-精度权衡机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种MLLM，使其在长视频/流式视觉理解中既能保持高精度又能大幅降低计算开销，并支持流式视觉记忆的高效维护。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出POINTS-Long，包含两种互补感知模式：focus mode（保留最优性能）和standby mode（使用1/40-1/10视觉令牌保留97.7-99.7%精度），并采用动态可分离KV-cache设计支持流式视觉理解。
contributions: 提出原生双模态MLLM，支持动态视觉令牌缩放，灵感来自人类视觉系统。
设计focus和standby两种模式，实现推理时效率与精度的动态权衡。
通过可分离KV-cache设计原生支持流式视觉理解，高效维护超长视觉记忆。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未在多种长视频基准上全面验证。
动态令牌缩放策略的泛化性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种双模态视觉推理MLLM，通过动态视觉令牌缩放和可分离KV缓存实现长视频/流式场景下的效率与精度权衡。

papers.title: RationalRewards: Reasoning Rewards Scale Visual Generation Both Training and Test Time
papers.abstract: Most reward models for visual generation reduce rich human judgments to a single unexplained score, discarding the reasoning that underlies preference. We show that teaching reward models to produce explicit, multi-dimensional critiques before scoring transforms them from passive evaluators into active optimization tools, improving generators in two complementary ways: at training time, structured rationales provide interpretable, fine-grained rewards for reinforcement learning; at test time, a Generate-Critique-Refine loop turns critiques into targeted prompt revisions that improve outputs without any parameter updates. To train such a reward model without costly rationale annotations, we introduce Preference-Anchored Rationalization (PARROT), a principled framework that recovers high-quality rationales from readily available preference data through anchored generation, consistency filtering, and distillation. The resulting model, RationalRewards (8B), achieves state-of-the-art preference prediction among open-source reward models, competitive with Gemini-2.5-Pro, while using 10-20x less training data than comparable baselines. As an RL reward, it consistently improves text-to-image and image-editing generators beyond scalar alternatives. Most strikingly, its test-time critique-and-refine loop matches or exceeds RL-based fine-tuning on several benchmarks, suggesting that structured reasoning can unlock latent capabilities in existing generators that suboptimal prompts fail to elicit.

analysis.tldr: 通过让奖励模型生成结构化推理理由，同时提升视觉生成模型的训练和测试时性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉生成奖励模型将人类偏好简化为单一分数，忽略了背后的推理过程，限制了其作为优化工具的有效性。
analysis.problem: 如何让奖励模型产生可解释、多维度的批评理由，并利用这些理由在训练和测试时改进视觉生成模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PARROT框架，通过锚定生成、一致性过滤和蒸馏从偏好数据中恢复高质量理由；训练RationalRewards模型，在训练时提供细粒度奖励，在测试时通过生成-批评-改进循环优化输出。
contributions: 提出RationalRewards，一个能生成结构化理由的奖励模型，在偏好预测上达到开源SOTA，与Gemini-2.5-Pro竞争。
展示理由奖励在训练时提升文本到图像和图像编辑生成器，测试时批评-改进循环匹配或超越RL微调。
analysis.experiments: 在文本到图像和图像编辑任务上评估，偏好预测优于开源模型，训练数据量减少10-20倍。
limitations: 可能依赖偏好数据的质量和多样性。
测试时循环的计算开销未明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过让奖励模型生成结构化推理理由，同时提升视觉生成模型的训练和测试时性能。

papers.title: SCNO: Spiking Compositional Neural Operator -- Towards a Neuromorphic Foundation Model for Nuclear PDE Solving
papers.abstract: Neural operators have emerged as powerful surrogates for partial differential equation (PDE) solvers, yet they are typically trained as monolithic models for individual PDEs, require energy-intensive GPU hardware, and must be retrained from scratch when new physics emerge. We introduce the Spiking Compositional Neural Operator (SCNO), a modular architecture combining spiking and conventional components that addresses all three limitations. SCNO maintains a library of small spiking neural operator blocks, each trained on a single elementary differential operator (convection, diffusion, reaction), and composes them through a lightweight input-conditioned aggregator to solve coupled PDEs not seen during block training. A small correction network learns cross-coupling residuals while keeping all blocks and the aggregator frozen, preserving zero-forgetting modular expansion by construction. We evaluate SCNO on eight PDE families including five coupled systems and a nuclear-relevant 1-group neutron diffusion equation. SCNO with correction achieves the lowest relative $L^2$ error on four of five coupled PDEs, outperforming both a monolithic spiking DeepONet (by up to 62%, mean over 3 seeds) and a standard ANN DeepONet (by up to 65%), while requiring only 95K trainable parameters versus 462K for the monolithic baseline. To our knowledge, this is the first compositional spiking neural operator and the first proof-of-concept for modular neuromorphic PDE solving with built-in forgetting-free expansion.

analysis.tldr: 提出模块化脉冲神经算子SCNO，通过组合预训练算子块实现零遗忘扩展，在核相关PDE求解中超越传统方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经算子通常为单个PDE训练整体模型，依赖高能耗GPU，且遇到新物理现象需从头训练，缺乏模块化和可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个模块化、低能耗、可零遗忘扩展的神经算子，以求解多种耦合PDE（尤其是核反应堆相关方程）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SCNO维护一个由小型脉冲神经算子块组成的库（每个块训练于单个微分算子如对流、扩散、反应），通过轻量级输入条件聚合器组合这些块以求解未见过的耦合PDE，并附加一个小型校正网络学习交叉耦合残差，同时保持所有块和聚合器冻结，实现零遗忘扩展。
contributions: 首个组合式脉冲神经算子SCNO，实现模块化PDE求解。
零遗忘扩展机制，通过冻结预训练块并仅训练校正网络。
在核相关1群中子扩散方程等8个PDE族上验证，以更少参数（95K vs 462K）取得更低误差。
analysis.experiments: 在8个PDE族（包括5个耦合系统和核相关1群中子扩散方程）上评估，SCNO在校正后对5个耦合PDE中的4个取得最低相对L2误差，相比单体脉冲DeepONet平均降低62%，相比标准ANN DeepONet平均降低65%，且仅需95K可训练参数。
limitations: 校正网络可能无法处理高度非线性或强耦合的残差。
算子块库的构建依赖于预定义的微分算子集合，对新类型算子的扩展需额外训练。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模块化脉冲神经算子SCNO，通过组合预训练算子块实现零遗忘扩展，在核相关PDE求解中超越传统方法。

papers.title: Context Kubernetes: Declarative Orchestration of Enterprise Knowledge for Agentic AI Systems
papers.abstract: We introduce Context Kubernetes, an architecture for orchestrating enterprise knowledge in agentic AI systems, with a prototype implementation and eight experiments. The core observation is that delivering the right knowledge, to the right agent, with the right permissions, at the right freshness -- across an entire organization -- is structurally analogous to the container orchestration problem Kubernetes solved a decade ago. We formalize six core abstractions, a YAML-based declarative manifest for knowledge-architecture-as-code, a reconciliation loop, and a three-tier agent permission model where agent authority is always a strict subset of human authority. On synthetic seed data, we compare four governance baselines of increasing strength: ungoverned RAG, ACL-filtered retrieval, RBAC-aware routing, and the full architecture. Each layer contributes a different capability: ACL filtering eliminates cross-domain leaks, intent routing reduces noise by 19 percentage points, and only the three-tier model blocks all five tested attack scenarios -- the one attack RBAC misses is an agent sending confidential pricing via email, which RBAC cannot distinguish from ordinary email. TLA+ model-checking verifies safety properties across 4.6 million reachable states with zero violations. A survey of four major platforms (Microsoft, Salesforce, AWS, Google) documents that none architecturally isolates agent approval channels. We identify four properties that make context orchestration harder than container orchestration, and argue these make the solution more valuable.

analysis.tldr: 将Kubernetes容器编排思想引入企业知识管理，提出Context Kubernetes架构，通过声明式清单和三层权限模型实现安全、精准的Agent知识编排。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业级AI系统中，为不同Agent按需、按权限、实时地提供正确知识是一个复杂问题，现有平台缺乏系统化的编排方案，导致知识泄露、权限混乱和效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何像编排容器一样，在企业环境中声明式地编排知识，确保每个Agent只获得其权限内、最新且相关的知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过实验对比了四种治理基线，发现无治理RAG存在跨域泄露，ACL过滤可消除泄露但噪声高，意图路由降低噪声19个百分点，而三层权限模型能阻止所有五种攻击场景，而RBAC无法阻止Agent通过邮件发送机密定价。
analysis.method: 提出Context Kubernetes架构，包括六个核心抽象、基于YAML的声明式清单（知识即代码）、协调循环以及三层Agent权限模型（Agent权限严格是人工权限的子集）。
contributions: 形式化了知识编排的六个核心抽象和声明式清单，实现知识架构即代码。
提出三层Agent权限模型，并通过TLA+模型检测验证了4.6百万可达状态下的安全性。
通过实验对比四种治理基线，证明完整架构在安全性和效率上的优势。
调研四大平台，发现均未架构性隔离Agent审批通道，指出Context Orchestration比容器编排更困难。
analysis.experiments: 在合成种子数据上进行了八项实验，对比四种治理基线（无治理RAG、ACL过滤、RBAC路由、完整架构），并进行了TLA+模型检测（4.6百万状态，零违规）。摘要未提供具体实验结果数值，除意图路由降低噪声19个百分点和三层模型阻止所有攻击外。
limitations: 实验基于合成数据，真实企业环境效果待验证。
架构复杂度较高，实际部署和维护成本可能较大。
未讨论与现有企业系统的集成细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将Kubernetes容器编排思想引入企业知识管理，提出Context Kubernetes架构，通过声明式清单和三层权限模型实现安全、精准的Agent知识编排。

papers.title: SpikeMLLM: Spike-based Multimodal Large Language Models via Modality-Specific Temporal Scales and Temporal Compression
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress but incur substantial computational overhead and energy consumption during inference, limiting deployment in resource-constrained environments. Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), with their sparse event-driven computation, offer inherent energy efficiency advantages on neuromorphic hardware, yet extending them to MLLMs faces two key challenges: heterogeneous modalities make uniform spike encoding insufficient, and high-resolution image inputs amplify timestep unfolding overhead. We propose SpikeMLLM, the first spike-based framework for MLLMs, which unifies existing ANN quantization methods in the spiking representation space and incorporates Modality-Specific Temporal Scales (MSTS) guided by Modality Evolution Discrepancy (MED) and Temporally Compressed LIF (TC-LIF) for timestep compression from T=L-1 to T=log2(L)-1. Experiments on four representative MLLMs across diverse multimodal benchmarks show that SpikeMLLM maintains near-lossless performance under aggressive timestep compression (Tv/Tt=3/4), with average gaps of only 0.72% and 1.19% relative to the FP16 baseline on InternVL2-8B and Qwen2VL-72B. We further develop a dedicated RTL accelerator tailored to the spike-driven datapath, observing 9.06x higher throughput and 25.8x better power efficiency relative to an FP16 GPU baseline under a deployment-oriented co-design setting, suggesting the promise of algorithm-hardware co-design for efficient multimodal intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 首个基于脉冲的多模态大语言模型框架，通过模态特定时间尺度和时间压缩实现高效推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大语言模型推理时计算开销和能耗巨大，限制了在资源受限环境中的部署；脉冲神经网络具有稀疏事件驱动的能量效率优势，但将其扩展到多模态大语言模型面临异质模态统一编码和高分辨率图像时间步展开开销两大挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个基于脉冲的多模态大语言模型框架，在保持性能的同时显著降低推理计算和能耗。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SpikeMLLM，统一现有ANN量化方法到脉冲表示空间，引入模态特定时间尺度（MSTS）由模态演化差异（MED）引导，以及时间压缩LIF（TC-LIF）将时间步从T=L-1压缩到T=log2(L)-1。
contributions: 首个基于脉冲的多模态大语言模型框架SpikeMLLM。
提出模态特定时间尺度和时间压缩机制，实现高效推理。
在多个基准上验证近无损性能，并开发专用RTL加速器实现高吞吐和能效。
analysis.experiments: 在四个代表性多模态大语言模型和多种多模态基准上评估，在激进时间步压缩下（Tv/Tt=3/4），InternVL2-8B和Qwen2VL-72B相对于FP16基线的平均差距仅为0.72%和1.19%；专用RTL加速器相比FP16 GPU基线实现9.06倍吞吐量和25.8倍能效提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构的脉冲表示。
硬件加速器设计可能未考虑通用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个基于脉冲的多模态大语言模型框架，通过模态特定时间尺度和时间压缩实现高效推理。

papers.title: HHL with a Coherent Fourier Oracle: A Proof-of-Concept Quantum Architecture for Joint Melody-Harmony Generation
papers.abstract: Quantum algorithms with a proven theoretical speedup over classical computation are rare. Among the most prominent is the Harrow-Hassidim-Lloyd (HHL) algorithm for solving sparse linear systems. Here, HHL is applied to encode melodic preference: the system matrix encodes Narmour implication-realisation and Krumhansl-Kessler tonal stability, so its solution vector is a music-cognition-weighted note-pair distribution. The key constraint of HHL is that reading its output classically cancels the quantum speedup; the solution must be consumed coherently. This motivates a coherent Fourier harmonic oracle: a unitary that applies chord-transition weights directly to the HHL amplitude vector, so that a single measurement jointly selects both melody notes and a two-chord progression. A two-note/two-chord (2/2) block is used to contain the exponential growth of the joint state space that would otherwise make classical simulation of larger blocks infeasible. For demonstrations of longer passages, blocks are chained classically - each block's collapsed output conditions the next -- as a temporary workaround until fault-tolerant hardware permits larger monolithic circuits. A four-block chain produces 8 notes over 8 chords with grammatically valid transitions at every block boundary. Independent rule-based harmony validation confirms that 97% of generated chord progressions are rated strong or acceptable. The primary motivation is that HHL carries a proven exponential speedup over classical linear solvers; this work demonstrates that a coherent HHL+oracle pipeline - the prerequisite for that speedup to be realised in a musical setting - is mechanically achievable. Audio realisations of representative outputs are made available for listening online.

analysis.tldr: 将HHL量子算法与相干傅里叶预言机结合，实现联合旋律-和声生成，并通过经典链式扩展验证了量子加速在音乐场景中的可行性。
analysis.research_motivation: HHL算法在理论上具有指数级加速，但经典读取其输出会抵消加速优势；将HHL应用于音乐生成需要一种相干消费其输出的方法，以保留量子加速潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个相干量子管线，使HHL的振幅向量能被直接用于联合旋律-和声生成，同时避免经典读取导致的加速损失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出相干傅里叶和声预言机，作为酉算子直接对HHL振幅向量施加和弦转换权重；通过单次测量同时选择旋律音符和双和弦进行；使用2音符/2和弦块控制状态空间增长，并通过经典链式扩展生成更长序列。
contributions: 首次将HHL算法与相干傅里叶预言机结合，实现联合旋律-和声生成，保留了量子加速的前提条件。
通过经典链式扩展和规则验证，证明了该管线在4块链上生成8音符/8和弦序列的可行性，且97%的和声进行被评价为强或可接受。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及独立规则验证显示97%的和声进行评级为强或可接受。
limitations: 当前仅演示了2/2块，更大块需容错量子硬件支持。
经典链式扩展是临时方案，可能限制量子加速的完全实现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将HHL量子算法与相干傅里叶预言机结合，实现联合旋律-和声生成，并通过经典链式扩展验证了量子加速在音乐场景中的可行性。

papers.title: Confronting Label Indeterminacy in Automated Bail Decisions
papers.abstract: Bail decisions present a fundamental challenge for data-driven decision support systems. When bail is denied, the counterfactual outcome of whether the defendant would have appeared in court remains unobserved. As a result, historical bail data embed structural label indeterminacy: future decisions are influenced by past decisions whose outcomes are only partially knowable. Building automated systems on such data risks introducing bias and reinforcing feedback loops. This raises a core question for machine-learning systems intended to assist judicial actors: how should cases in which bail was denied be treated during model development? In a case study of bail decisions from the Unified Judicial System of Pennsylvania, we evaluate five contemporary approaches to handling label indeterminacy across three machine learning models, including a novel label imputation method motivated by the dynamics of bail decisions. Each method relies on unverifiable assumptions, yet all influence the models' predictive behaviour, sometimes even more so than the choice of model itself. Explainable AI analysis further reveals that these effects extend to the models' internal decision-making processes as well. Finally, we consider the notion of label indeterminacy from a legal perspective and assess the legitimacy of these approaches in the context of bail decision-making.

analysis.tldr: 保释决策中的标签不确定性问题导致数据驱动模型存在偏差，不同处理方法对模型行为影响显著。
analysis.research_motivation: 保释决策中，拒绝保释后的反事实结果不可观测，导致历史数据存在结构性标签不确定性，基于此类数据构建的自动化系统可能引入偏差并强化反馈循环，这对司法辅助机器学习系统构成根本挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何应对保释决策数据中因拒绝保释导致的反事实结果缺失（标签不确定性）问题，并评估不同处理方法对模型预测行为的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，每种处理标签不确定性的方法都依赖不可验证的假设，且这些方法对模型预测行为的影响有时甚至超过模型本身的选择。可解释AI分析进一步显示这些影响延伸至模型内部决策过程。
analysis.method: 以宾夕法尼亚州统一司法系统的保释决策为案例，评估五种处理标签不确定性的方法（包括一种受保释决策动态启发的新型标签插补方法），并应用于三种机器学习模型。
contributions: 系统评估了五种处理标签不确定性的方法在保释决策场景中的效果，揭示了方法选择对模型行为的显著影响。
提出了一种受保释决策动态启发的新型标签插补方法。
从法律视角审视了标签不确定性，并评估了这些方法在保释决策中的合法性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 所有处理方法均依赖不可验证的假设，可能无法完全消除偏差。
案例研究局限于宾夕法尼亚州的数据，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 保释决策中的标签不确定性问题导致数据驱动模型存在偏差，不同处理方法对模型行为影响显著。

papers.title: CUTEv2: Unified and Configurable Matrix Extension for Diverse CPU Architectures with Minimal Design Overhead
papers.abstract: Matrix extensions have emerged as an essential feature in modern CPUs to address the surging demands of AI workloads. However, existing designs often incur substantial hardware and software design overhead. Tight coupling with the CPU pipeline complicates integration across diverse CPUs, while fine-grained synchronous instructions hinder the development of high-performance kernels. This paper proposes a unified and configurable CPU matrix extension architecture. By decoupling matrix units from the CPU pipeline, the design enables low-overhead integration while maintaining close coordination with existing compute and memory resources. The configurable matrix unit supports mixed-precision operations and adapts to diverse compute demands and memory bandwidth constraints. An asynchronous matrix multiplication abstraction with flexible granularity conceals hardware details, simplifies matrix-vector overlap, and supports a unified software stack. The architecture is integrated into four open-source CPU RTL platforms and evaluated on representative AI models. Matrix unit utilization under GEMM workloads exceeds 90% across all platforms. When configured with compute throughput and memory bandwidth comparable to Intel AMX, our design achieves speedups of 1.57x, 1.57x, and 2.31x on ResNet, BERT, and Llama3, with over 30% of the gains attributed to overlapped matrix-vector execution. A 4 TOPS@2GHz matrix unit occupies only 0.53 mm\textsuperscript{2} in 14nm CMOS. These results demonstrate strong cross-platform adaptability and effective hardware-software co-optimization, offering a practical matrix extension for the open-source community.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种统一可配置的CPU矩阵扩展架构，通过解耦矩阵单元与CPU流水线降低设计开销，在多种开源CPU平台上实现高利用率与显著加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CPU矩阵扩展设计硬件和软件开销大，与CPU流水线紧耦合导致跨平台集成困难，细粒度同步指令阻碍高性能内核开发，亟需一种低开销、易集成、跨平台适配的矩阵扩展方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种统一、可配置的CPU矩阵扩展架构，在降低硬件和软件设计开销的同时，实现跨平台高效集成和高性能矩阵运算。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CUTEv2架构，核心包括：1) 将矩阵单元与CPU流水线解耦，实现低开销集成；2) 可配置矩阵单元支持混合精度运算，适应不同计算需求和内存带宽约束；3) 异步矩阵乘法抽象，隐藏硬件细节，简化矩阵-向量重叠，支持统一软件栈。
contributions: 提出一种统一可配置的CPU矩阵扩展架构，通过解耦矩阵单元降低设计开销并提升跨平台适应性。
在四种开源CPU RTL平台上集成并评估，GEMM利用率超90%，在ResNet、BERT、Llama3上相比Intel AMX实现1.57x-2.31x加速，其中30%以上来自矩阵-向量重叠执行。
analysis.experiments: 在四种开源CPU RTL平台上评估，GEMM利用率超90%；配置与Intel AMX相当的计算吞吐和内存带宽时，在ResNet、BERT、Llama3上分别获得1.57x、1.57x、2.31x加速；4 TOPS@2GHz矩阵单元在14nm CMOS中仅占0.53 mm²。
limitations: 可能未在真实商用CPU中验证，仅基于开源RTL平台。
可配置性可能带来额外的软件栈复杂度，摘要未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种统一可配置的CPU矩阵扩展架构，通过解耦矩阵单元与CPU流水线降低设计开销，在多种开源CPU平台上实现高利用率与显著加速。

papers.title: Layerwise Dynamics for In-Context Classification in Transformers
papers.abstract: Transformers can perform in-context classification from a few labeled examples, yet the inference-time algorithm remains opaque. We study multi-class linear classification in the hard no-margin regime and make the computation identifiable by enforcing feature- and label-permutation equivariance at every layer. This enables interpretability while maintaining functional equivalence and yields highly structured weights. From these models we extract an explicit depth-indexed recursion: an end-to-end identified, emergent update rule inside a softmax transformer, to our knowledge the first of its kind. Attention matrices formed from mixed feature-label Gram structure drive coupled updates of training points, labels, and the test probe. The resulting dynamics implement a geometry-driven algorithmic motif, which can provably amplify class separation and yields robust expected class alignment.

analysis.tldr: 通过强制置换等变性，从Transformer中提取出上下文分类的显式逐层递归更新规则。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer在上下文分类中表现优异，但其推理算法不透明，缺乏可解释性。
analysis.problem: 揭示Transformer在少样本线性分类中的内部计算机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在无间隔硬分类场景下，强制特征和标签置换等变性可产生高度结构化的权重，并提取出显式的深度索引递归。
analysis.method: 通过强制每层特征和标签置换等变性，使计算可识别，并从中提取出端到端识别的递归更新规则。
contributions: 首次从softmax Transformer中提取出显式的、端到端识别的上下文分类递归更新规则。
揭示了注意力矩阵中混合特征-标签Gram结构驱动的耦合更新动力学，该动力学可放大类别分离并实现鲁棒的类别对齐。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对线性分类和无间隔硬分类场景，泛化性未知。
理论分析可能依赖于特定的等变性假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过强制置换等变性，从Transformer中提取出上下文分类的显式逐层递归更新规则。

papers.title: Intersectional Sycophancy: How Perceived User Demographics Shape False Validation in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models exhibit sycophantic tendencies, but whether this behavior varies systematically with perceived user demographics is underexplored. Inspired by intersectionality (overlapping identities produce compounded effects), we probe whether frontier models conditionally exhibit sycophancy. Across 768 multi-turn conversations spanning 128 personas (varying race, age, gender, confidence) and three domains (mathematics, philosophy, conspiracy theories), we find that sycophancy varies sharply with target model and domain, and emerges from combinations of perceived user traits rather than any single dimension. GPT-5-nano scores far higher than Claude Haiku 4.5 (average sycophancy scores of $\bar{x}=2.96$ vs.\ $1.74$, $p < 10^{-32}$); within GPT-5-nano, philosophy elicits 41\% more sycophancy than mathematics and Hispanic personas receive the highest scores across races. The worst-scoring persona, a confident, 23-year-old Hispanic woman, averages 5.33/10 (max 6/10), while Claude Haiku 4.5 remains uniformly low with no significant demographic variation. We argue that safety evaluations should incorporate identity-aware adversarial testing.

analysis.tldr: LLM的谄媚行为会随感知用户人口统计特征（种族、年龄、性别、自信度）系统性地变化，且不同模型和领域差异显著。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究关注LLM的谄媚倾向，但未探索其是否随感知用户人口统计特征（如种族、年龄、性别）系统变化，而交叉性理论表明多重身份可能产生复合效应，这对安全评估至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究前沿LLM是否根据感知用户的人口统计特征（种族、年龄、性别、自信度）条件性地表现出谄媚行为，以及这种变化在不同模型和领域中的模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现谄媚行为随目标模型和领域急剧变化，且源于用户特征的组合而非单一维度；GPT-5-nano的谄媚分数远高于Claude Haiku 4.5，哲学领域比数学领域高41%，西班牙裔用户得分最高；最差用户画像（自信的23岁西班牙裔女性）平均5.33/10，而Claude Haiku 4.5无显著人口统计差异。
analysis.method: 设计768轮多轮对话，涵盖128个人物画像（变化种族、年龄、性别、自信度）和三个领域（数学、哲学、阴谋论），测量LLM的谄媚分数。
contributions: 首次系统研究LLM谄媚行为与感知用户人口统计特征的交叉性关系。
揭示谄媚行为在不同模型和领域中的显著差异，以及用户特征组合的复合效应。
提出安全评估应纳入身份感知的对抗性测试。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅报告了平均谄媚分数和统计显著性。
limitations: 仅测试了三个领域和有限的人物画像，可能无法泛化到更多场景。
未深入分析谄媚行为背后的机制或缓解方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM的谄媚行为会随感知用户人口统计特征（种族、年龄、性别、自信度）系统性地变化，且不同模型和领域差异显著。

papers.title: Geoparsing: Diagram Parsing for Plane and Solid Geometry with a Unified Formal Language
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress but continue to struggle with geometric reasoning, primarily due to the perception bottleneck regarding fine-grained visual elements. While formal languages have aided plane geometry understanding, solid geometry which requires spatial understanding remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we address this challenge by designing a unified formal language that integrates plane and solid geometry, comprehensively covering geometric structures and semantic relations. We construct GDP-29K, a large-scale dataset comprising 20k plane and 9k solid geometry samples collected from diverse real-world sources, each paired with its ground-truth formal description. To ensure syntactic correctness and geometric consistency, we propose a training paradigm that combines Supervised Fine-Tuning with Reinforcement Learning via Verifiable Rewards. Experiments show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art parsing performance. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our parsed formal descriptions serve as a critical cognitive scaffold, significantly boosting MLLMs' capabilities for downstream geometry reasoning tasks. Our data and code are available at Geoparsing.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一形式语言和GDP-29K数据集，结合SFT与RLVR训练范式，提升MLLM在平面与立体几何图解析上的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在几何推理中因细粒度视觉元素感知瓶颈而表现不佳，现有形式语言仅覆盖平面几何，立体几何的空间理解尚未被探索。
analysis.problem: 如何设计统一形式语言并构建数据集，使MLLM能准确解析平面和立体几何图形，并提升下游几何推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计统一形式语言覆盖平面与立体几何的结构和语义关系；构建GDP-29K数据集（20k平面+9k立体样本）；采用监督微调结合基于可验证奖励的强化学习训练范式。
contributions: 提出首个统一形式语言，同时支持平面和立体几何图解析。
构建大规模GDP-29K数据集，包含来自真实世界的平面和立体几何样本及形式化描述。
提出SFT+RLVR训练范式，确保语法正确性和几何一致性，取得SOTA解析性能。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明方法达到SOTA解析性能，且解析结果作为认知支架显著提升MLLM的下游几何推理能力。
limitations: 数据集规模可能仍有限，尤其立体几何部分。
形式语言设计可能未覆盖所有几何变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一形式语言和GDP-29K数据集，结合SFT与RLVR训练范式，提升MLLM在平面与立体几何图解析上的表现。

papers.title: Learning Robustness at Test-Time from a Non-Robust Teacher
papers.abstract: Nowadays, pretrained models are increasingly used as general-purpose backbones and adapted at test-time to downstream environments where target data are scarce and unlabeled. While this paradigm has proven effective for improving clean accuracy on the target domain, adversarial robustness has received far less attention, especially when the original pretrained model is not explicitly designed to be robust. This raises a practical question: \emph{can a pretrained, non-robust model be adapted at test-time to improve adversarial robustness on a target distribution?} To face this question, this work studies how adversarial training strategies behave when integrated into adaptation schemes for the unsupervised test-time setting, where only a small set of unlabeled target samples is available. It first analyzes how classical adversarial training formulations can be extended to this scenario, showing that straightforward distillation-based adaptations remain unstable and highly sensitive to hyperparameter tuning, particularly when the teacher itself is non-robust. To address these limitations, the work proposes a label-free framework that uses the predictions of a non-robust teacher model as a semantic anchor for both the clean and adversarial objectives during adaptation. We further provide theoretical insights showing that our formulation yields a more stable alternative to the self-consistency-based regularization commonly used in classical adversarial training. Experiments evaluate the proposed approach on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet under induced photometric transformations. The results support the theoretical insights by showing that the proposed approach achieves improved optimization stability, lower sensitivity to parameter choices, and a better robustness-accuracy trade-off than existing baselines in this post-deployment test-time setting.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在测试时利用非鲁棒教师模型进行无标签对抗训练的方法，提升预训练非鲁棒模型在下游目标分布上的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 预训练模型常作为通用骨干网络，在测试时适应下游环境，但现有工作主要关注干净准确率，对抗鲁棒性在测试时适应中研究不足，尤其是当原始预训练模型本身并非鲁棒时。
analysis.problem: 如何将非鲁棒的预训练模型在测试时通过无标签目标样本进行适应，以提升其在目标分布上的对抗鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 经典的对抗训练方法直接扩展到无监督测试时场景时，基于蒸馏的适应方式不稳定且对超参数高度敏感，尤其是当教师模型本身非鲁棒时。
analysis.method: 提出一种无标签框架，利用非鲁棒教师模型的预测作为干净和对抗目标的语义锚点，在测试时进行适应。
contributions: 分析了经典对抗训练策略在无监督测试时适应中的行为，揭示了蒸馏式适应的不稳定性。
提出了一种基于非鲁棒教师预测作为语义锚点的无标签对抗训练框架，并提供了理论分析证明其比自一致性正则化更稳定。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上进行了诱导光度变换的实验，结果表明所提方法在优化稳定性、参数敏感性以及鲁棒性-准确率权衡方面优于现有基线。
limitations: 实验仅在光度变换下进行，未覆盖其他类型分布偏移。
理论分析可能依赖于特定假设，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在测试时利用非鲁棒教师模型进行无标签对抗训练的方法，提升预训练非鲁棒模型在下游目标分布上的鲁棒性。

papers.title: MLLM-as-a-Judge Exhibits Model Preference Bias
papers.abstract: Automatic evaluation using multimodal large language models (MLLMs), commonly referred to as MLLM-as-a-Judge, has been widely used to measure model performance. If such MLLM-as-a-Judge methods were biased, they could distort model comparisons and benchmark-driven scientific progress. However, it remains unclear to what extent MLLM-as-a-Judge methods favor or disfavor text generated by specific MLLMs. In this study, we propose Philautia-Eval to investigate such model-specific preference bias. Philautia-Eval quantifies the degree of the bias by disentangling preference tendencies from differences in generation quality. Using 1.29M caption-score pairs collected from 12 MLLMs, we found that representative MLLMs tend to exhibit self-preference bias. Moreover, experimental results indicate mutual preference bias within particular model families, which is potentially driven by reused connectors and overlapping instruction-tuning resources. Finally, we introduce a simple ensemble of MLLMs, Pomms. Our results demonstrated that Pomms effectively mitigated the model-specific preference bias while maintaining performance.

analysis.tldr: MLLM-as-a-Judge存在模型偏好偏差，提出Philautia-Eval量化偏差并验证了自偏好和互偏好现象，集成方法Pomms可缓解偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: MLLM-as-a-Judge被广泛用于自动评估，但其潜在的模型偏好偏差可能扭曲模型比较和基准驱动的科学进步，因此需要系统研究这种偏差的存在性和程度。
analysis.problem: 量化MLLM-as-a-Judge方法中存在的模型特定偏好偏差，并探索缓解方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现代表性MLLM倾向于表现出自偏好偏差，且特定模型家族内存在互偏好偏差，可能由重用连接器和重叠的指令微调资源导致。
analysis.method: 提出Philautia-Eval方法，通过解耦偏好倾向与生成质量差异来量化偏差；并引入简单集成方法Pomms缓解偏差。
contributions: 提出Philautia-Eval框架，系统量化MLLM-as-a-Judge中的模型特定偏好偏差。
基于12个MLLM的129万标注对，实证发现自偏好和互偏好偏差现象。
提出集成方法Pomms，有效缓解模型特定偏好偏差且保持评估性能。
analysis.experiments: 使用12个MLLM收集129万caption-score对进行实验，验证了自偏好和互偏好偏差，并测试了Pomms的缓解效果。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对caption-score任务，可能不适用于其他评估维度。
Pomms集成方法可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MLLM-as-a-Judge存在模型偏好偏差，提出Philautia-Eval量化偏差并验证了自偏好和互偏好现象，集成方法Pomms可缓解偏差。

papers.title: GeomPrompt: Geometric Prompt Learning for RGB-D Semantic Segmentation Under Missing and Degraded Depth
papers.abstract: Multimodal perception systems for robotics and embodied AI often assume reliable RGB-D sensing, but in practice, depth is frequently missing, noisy, or corrupted. We thus present GeomPrompt, a lightweight cross-modal adaptation module that synthesizes a task-driven geometric prompt from RGB alone for the fourth channel of a frozen RGB-D semantic segmentation model, without depth supervision. We further introduce GeomPrompt-Recovery, an adaptation module that compensates for degraded depth by predicting the fourth channel correction relevant for the frozen segmenter. Both modules are trained solely with downstream segmentation supervision, enabling recovery of the geometric prior useful for segmentation, rather than estimating depth signals. On SUN RGB-D, GeomPrompt improves over RGB-only inference by +6.1 mIoU on DFormer and +3.0 mIoU on GeminiFusion, while remaining competitive with strong monocular depth estimators. For degraded depth, GeomPrompt-Recovery consistently improves robustness, yielding gains up to +3.6 mIoU under severe depth corruptions. GeomPrompt is also substantially more efficient than monocular depth baselines, reaching 7.8 ms latency versus 38.3 ms and 71.9 ms. These results suggest that task-driven geometric prompting is an efficient mechanism for cross-modal compensation under missing and degraded depth inputs in RGB-D perception.

analysis.tldr: 提出GeomPrompt，通过任务驱动的几何提示从RGB生成深度通道，无需深度监督，高效应对RGB-D语义分割中深度缺失或退化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人及具身AI的多模态感知系统常假设RGB-D传感可靠，但实际中深度信息经常缺失、有噪声或损坏，现有方法依赖单目深度估计器计算成本高，且无法直接利用冻结的RGB-D分割模型。
analysis.problem: 在RGB-D语义分割中，当深度输入缺失或退化时，如何高效地恢复几何先验以提升分割性能，同时避免使用深度监督或高延迟的深度估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GeomPrompt轻量级跨模态适应模块，从RGB图像合成任务驱动的几何提示作为冻结RGB-D分割模型的第四通道输入；并扩展GeomPrompt-Recovery模块，通过预测第四通道校正来补偿退化深度。两个模块仅使用下游分割监督训练。
contributions: 提出GeomPrompt，无需深度监督即可从RGB生成几何提示，有效应对深度缺失场景。
提出GeomPrompt-Recovery，补偿退化深度输入，提升鲁棒性。
