在SUN RGB-D上验证，GeomPrompt相比仅RGB推理提升+6.1 mIoU，且延迟远低于单目深度估计基线（7.8 ms vs 38.3 ms和71.9 ms）。
analysis.experiments: 在SUN RGB-D数据集上评估，GeomPrompt在DFormer和GeminiFusion上分别提升+6.1和+3.0 mIoU；GeomPrompt-Recovery在严重深度退化下提升+3.6 mIoU。延迟对比显示GeomPrompt仅7.8 ms，远低于单目深度估计基线。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集SUN RGB-D上验证，泛化性未知。
方法依赖冻结的RGB-D分割模型，可能受限于模型架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GeomPrompt，通过任务驱动的几何提示从RGB生成深度通道，无需深度监督，高效应对RGB-D语义分割中深度缺失或退化问题。

papers.title: A Triadic Suffix Tokenization Scheme for Numerical Reasoning
papers.abstract: Standard subword tokenization methods fragment numbers inconsistently, causing large language models (LLMs) to lose positional and decimal structure - a primary driver of errors in arithmetic and scientific reasoning. We introduce Triadic Suffix Tokenization (TST), a deterministic scheme that partitions digits into three-digit triads and annotates each triad with an explicit magnitude marker. Critically, the scheme defines a fixed, one-to-one mapping between suffixes and orders of magnitude for the integer part (thousands, millions, billions, etc.) and a parallel system of replicated markers for fractional depth (tenths, thousandths, millionths, etc.). Unlike approaches that rely on positional inference, this method provides a consistent gradient signal, which should ensure stable convergence. Two implementation variants are proposed: (1) a vocabulary-based approach that adds at most 10,000 fixed tokens to an existing vocabulary, covering 33 orders of magnitude ($10^{-15}$ to $10^{18}$); and (2) a suffix-marker approach that uses a small set of special tokens to denote magnitude dynamically. Both variants preserve exact digits while making order-of-magnitude relationships transparent at the token level. While we focus on 3-digit groups (Triadic), the framework is inherently scalable to any group size for precise vocabulary optimization. Furthermore, it allows for linear vocabulary expansion to accommodate arbitrary precision and range. TST is architecture-agnostic and can be integrated as a drop-in preprocessing step. Experimental validation is deferred to future work.

analysis.tldr: 提出三连后缀分词方案（TST），通过三位分组和显式量级标记解决LLM数值推理中的位置与十进制结构丢失问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准子词分词方法对数字的不一致切分导致LLM丢失位置和十进制结构，这是算术和科学推理错误的主要来源。
analysis.problem: 现有分词方法无法保留数字的数值结构，导致LLM在数值推理任务中表现不佳。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准子词分词法对数字的切分不一致，破坏了数字的位置信息和十进制结构，从而引发推理错误。
analysis.method: 提出Triadic Suffix Tokenization (TST)，将数字按三位一组切分，并为每组附加显式的量级标记（整数部分如千、百万、十亿等，小数部分如十分之一、千分之一等），提供一致的梯度信号。
contributions: 提出TST方案，通过三位分组和显式量级标记解决数值结构丢失问题。
提供两种实现变体：基于词汇表（最多增加10000个固定token，覆盖10^{-15}到10^{18}的33个量级）和后缀标记（使用少量特殊token动态表示量级）。
框架可扩展至任意分组大小，支持线性词汇扩展以适应任意精度和范围，且架构无关，可作为预处理步骤集成。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，实验验证留待未来工作。
limitations: 实验验证尚未进行，实际效果未知。
基于词汇表的方法可能增加词汇量，对资源有限场景有影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三连后缀分词方案（TST），通过三位分组和显式量级标记解决LLM数值推理中的位置与十进制结构丢失问题。

papers.title: Seeing Through Touch: Tactile-Driven Visual Localization of Material Regions
papers.abstract: We address the problem of tactile localization, where the goal is to identify image regions that share the same material properties as a tactile input. Existing visuo-tactile methods rely on global alignment and thus fail to capture the fine-grained local correspondences required for this task. The challenge is amplified by existing datasets, which predominantly contain close-up, low-diversity images. We propose a model that learns local visuo-tactile alignment via dense cross-modal feature interactions, producing tactile saliency maps for touch-conditioned material segmentation. To overcome dataset constraints, we introduce: (i) in-the-wild multi-material scene images that expand visual diversity, and (ii) a material-diversity pairing strategy that aligns each tactile sample with visually varied yet tactilely consistent images, improving contextual localization and robustness to weak signals. We also construct two new tactile-grounded material segmentation datasets for quantitative evaluation. Experiments on both new and existing benchmarks show that our approach substantially outperforms prior visuo-tactile methods in tactile localization.

analysis.tldr: 提出触觉驱动的视觉定位方法，通过密集跨模态特征交互实现触觉条件材料分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉-触觉方法依赖全局对齐，无法捕捉细粒度局部对应关系，且数据集多为特写低多样性图像，限制了触觉定位性能。
analysis.problem: 如何根据触觉输入准确定位图像中具有相同材料属性的区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出密集跨模态特征交互模型，生成触觉显著性图用于触觉条件材料分割；引入野外多材料场景图像和材料多样性配对策略增强数据。
contributions: 提出基于密集跨模态特征交互的触觉定位模型，生成触觉显著性图。
构建两个新的触觉材料分割数据集，并设计材料多样性配对策略提升泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估，方法显著优于现有视觉-触觉方法。
limitations: 可能依赖触觉传感器精度。
跨模态对齐计算复杂度较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出触觉驱动的视觉定位方法，通过密集跨模态特征交互实现触觉条件材料分割。

papers.title: Minimizing classical resources in variational measurement-based quantum computation for generative modeling
papers.abstract: Measurement-based quantum computation (MBQC) is a framework for quantum information processing in which a computational task is carried out through one-qubit measurements on a highly entangled resource state. Due to the indeterminacy of the outcomes of a quantum measurement, the random outcomes of these operations, if not corrected, yield a variational quantum channel family. Traditionally, this randomness is corrected through classical processing in order to ensure deterministic unitary computations. Recently, variational measurement-based quantum computation (VMBQC) has been introduced to exploit this measurement-induced randomness to gain an advantage in generative modeling. A limitation of this approach is that the corresponding channel model has twice as many parameters compared to the unitary model, scaling as $N \times D$, where $N$ is the number of logical qubits (width) and $D$ is the depth of the VMBQC model. This can often make optimization more difficult and may lead to poorly trainable models. In this paper, we present a restricted VMBQC model that extends the unitary setting to a channel-based one using only a single additional trainable parameter. We show, both numerically and algebraically, that this minimal extension is sufficient to generate probability distributions that cannot be learned by the corresponding unitary model.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种仅增加一个可训练参数的受限VMBQC模型，以最小化经典资源开销，并证明其能生成酉模型无法学习的概率分布。
analysis.research_motivation: 变分测量基量子计算（VMBQC）利用测量随机性在生成建模中获得优势，但现有通道模型参数数量是酉模型的两倍（N×D），导致优化困难且可训练性差。
analysis.problem: 如何最小化VMBQC中经典资源（参数数量）的额外开销，同时保持其超越酉模型的生成能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种受限VMBQC模型，在酉模型基础上仅增加一个可训练参数，将确定性酉计算扩展为基于通道的变分模型。
contributions: 提出一种仅需一个额外可训练参数的受限VMBQC模型，显著减少经典资源需求。
通过数值和代数证明该模型能生成酉模型无法学习的概率分布。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的生成建模任务。
未讨论实际量子硬件实现中的噪声影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种仅增加一个可训练参数的受限VMBQC模型，以最小化经典资源开销，并证明其能生成酉模型无法学习的概率分布。

papers.title: Finetune Like You Pretrain: Boosting Zero-shot Adversarial Robustness in Vision-language Models
papers.abstract: Despite their impressive zero-shot abilities, vision-language models such as CLIP have been shown to be susceptible to adversarial attacks. To enhance its adversarial robustness, recent studies finetune the pretrained vision encoder of CLIP with adversarial examples on a proxy dataset such as ImageNet by aligning adversarial images with correct class labels. However, these methods overlook the important roles of training data distributions and learning objectives, resulting in reduced zero-shot capabilities and limited transferability of robustness across domains and datasets. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective paradigm AdvFLYP, which follows the training recipe of CLIP's pretraining process when performing adversarial finetuning to the model. Specifically, AdvFLYP finetunes CLIP with adversarial images created based on image-text pairs collected from the web, and match them with their corresponding texts via a contrastive loss. To alleviate distortion of adversarial image embeddings of noisy web images, we further propose to regularise AdvFLYP by penalising deviation of adversarial image features. We show that logit- and feature-level regularisation terms benefit robustness and clean accuracy, respectively. Extensive experiments on 14 downstream datasets spanning various domains show the superiority of our paradigm over mainstream practices. Our code and model weights are released at https://github.com/Sxing2/AdvFLYP.

analysis.tldr: 提出AdvFLYP方法，通过遵循CLIP预训练流程进行对抗微调，提升视觉语言模型的零样本对抗鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉语言模型如CLIP在零样本任务中表现优异，但易受对抗攻击；现有微调方法使用代理数据集和分类标签，忽略了训练数据分布和学习目标的重要性，导致零样本能力下降和鲁棒性迁移受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持零样本能力的同时，有效提升CLIP模型的对抗鲁棒性，并实现跨域鲁棒性迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有对抗微调方法使用代理数据集（如ImageNet）和分类标签，导致零样本能力下降和鲁棒性迁移受限；对抗图像嵌入在噪声网络图像上存在失真问题。
analysis.method: AdvFLYP遵循CLIP预训练流程，使用网络收集的图像-文本对生成对抗图像，并通过对比损失匹配文本；同时引入正则化项惩罚对抗图像特征的偏离，其中logit级正则化提升鲁棒性，特征级正则化提升干净准确率。
contributions: 提出AdvFLYP范式，通过遵循预训练流程进行对抗微调，显著提升零样本对抗鲁棒性。
设计正则化策略缓解对抗图像嵌入失真，分别提升鲁棒性和干净准确率。
在14个下游数据集上验证了方法的优越性，并开源代码和模型权重。
analysis.experiments: 在14个跨域下游数据集上进行实验，结果显示AdvFLYP优于主流方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模网络图像-文本对，数据收集成本较高。
正则化项的超参数调优可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AdvFLYP方法，通过遵循CLIP预训练流程进行对抗微调，提升视觉语言模型的零样本对抗鲁棒性。

papers.title: Training-Free Model Ensemble for Single-Image Super-Resolution via Strong-Branch Compensation
papers.abstract: Single-image super-resolution has progressed from deep convolutional baselines to stronger Transformer and state-space architectures, yet the corresponding performance gains typically come with higher training cost, longer engineering iteration, and heavier deployment burden. In many practical settings, multiple pretrained models with partially complementary behaviors are already available, and the binding constraint is no longer architectural capacity but how effectively their outputs can be combined without additional training. Rather than pursuing further architectural redesign, this paper proposes a training-free output-level ensemble framework. A dual-branch pipeline is constructed in which a Hybrid attention network with TLC inference provides stable main reconstruction, while a MambaIRv2 branch with geometric self-ensemble supplies strong compensation for high-frequency detail recovery. The two branches process the same low-resolution input independently and are fused in the image space via a lightweight weighted combination, without updating any model parameters or introducing an additional trainable module. As our solution to the NTIRE 2026 Image Super-Resolution ($\times 4$) Challenge, the proposed design consistently improves over the base branch and slightly exceeds the pure strong branch in PSNR at the best operating point under a unified DIV2K bicubic $\times 4$ evaluation protocol. Ablation studies confirm that output-level compensation provides a low-overhead and practically accessible upgrade path for existing super-resolution systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种免训练的输出级模型集成框架，通过强分支补偿提升单图像超分辨率性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有超分辨率模型性能提升依赖更高训练成本和部署负担，而实际场景中已有多个互补预训练模型，如何在不额外训练下有效组合其输出成为关键。
analysis.problem: 如何在不更新参数或引入可训练模块的情况下，利用多个预训练模型的互补性提升单图像超分辨率效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同架构（如混合注意力网络与MambaIRv2）在超分辨率任务中具有部分互补行为，输出级融合可稳定提升性能。
analysis.method: 构建双分支流水线：主分支使用带TLC推理的混合注意力网络提供稳定重建，强分支使用带几何自集成的MambaIRv2补偿高频细节；两分支独立处理低分辨率输入，在图像空间通过轻量加权组合融合。
contributions: 提出免训练的输出级模型集成框架，无需更新参数或添加可训练模块。
在NTIRE 2026超分辨率挑战中验证有效性，PSNR优于基分支并略超纯强分支。
analysis.experiments: 在DIV2K bicubic ×4协议下评估，消融研究证实输出级补偿为现有系统提供低开销升级路径。
limitations: 仅针对×4倍率超分辨率验证，其他倍率效果未知。
依赖预训练模型的互补性，若模型高度同质则收益有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种免训练的输出级模型集成框架，通过强分支补偿提升单图像超分辨率性能。

papers.title: Synthius-Mem: Brain-Inspired Hallucination-Resistant Persona Memory Achieving 94.4% Memory Accuracy and 99.6% Adversarial Robustness on LoCoMo
papers.abstract: Providing AI agents with reliable long-term memory that does not hallucinate remains an open problem. Current approaches to memory for LLM agents -- sliding windows, summarization, embedding-based RAG, and flat fact extraction -- each reduce token cost but introduce catastrophic information loss, semantic drift, or uncontrolled hallucination about the user. The structural reason is architectural: every published memory system on the LoCoMo benchmark treats conversation as a retrieval problem over raw or lightly summarized dialogue segments, and none reports adversarial robustness, the ability to refuse questions about facts the user never disclosed. We present Synthius-Mem, a brain-inspired structured persona memory system that takes a fundamentally different approach. Instead of retrieving what was said, Synthius-Mem extracts what is known about the person: a full persona extraction pipeline decomposes conversations into six cognitive domains (biography, experiences, preferences, social circle, work, psychometrics), consolidates and deduplicates per domain, and retrieves structured facts via CategoryRAG at 21.79 ms latency. On the LoCoMo benchmark (ACL 2024, 10 conversations, 1,813 questions), Synthius-Mem achieves 94.37% accuracy, exceeding all published systems including MemMachine (91.69%, adversarial score is not reported) and human performance (87.9 F1). Core memory fact accuracy reaches 98.64%. Adversarial robustness, the hallucination resistance metric that no competing system reports, reaches 99.55%. Synthius-Mem reduces token consumption by ~5x compared to full-context replay while achieving higher accuracy. Synthius-Mem achieves state-of-the-art results on LoCoMo and is, to our knowledge, the only persona memory system that both exceeds human-level performance and reports adversarial robustness.

analysis.tldr: Synthius-Mem 是一种受大脑启发的结构化人格记忆系统，在 LoCoMo 基准上达到 94.4% 准确率和 99.6% 对抗鲁棒性，超越人类表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM 记忆方法（滑动窗口、摘要、RAG 等）存在信息丢失、语义漂移或幻觉问题，且缺乏对抗鲁棒性评估。
analysis.problem: 如何为 AI 智能体构建可靠、抗幻觉的长期记忆系统，使其既能准确回忆用户信息，又能拒绝回答未披露的事实。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前记忆系统将对话视为检索问题，导致结构性问题；且无系统报告对抗鲁棒性。
analysis.method: 受大脑启发的结构化人格记忆系统，包含完整人格提取流水线，将对话分解为六个认知域，通过 CategoryRAG 检索结构化事实。
contributions: 提出 Synthius-Mem，首个在 LoCoMo 上超越人类表现并报告对抗鲁棒性的人格记忆系统。
实现 94.4% 准确率、99.6% 对抗鲁棒性，并降低约 5 倍 token 消耗。
analysis.experiments: 在 LoCoMo 基准（10 个对话，1813 个问题）上评估，与 MemMachine 和人类表现对比。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定对话场景，泛化性未验证。
对抗鲁棒性测试可能未覆盖所有攻击类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Synthius-Mem 是一种受大脑启发的结构化人格记忆系统，在 LoCoMo 基准上达到 94.4% 准确率和 99.6% 对抗鲁棒性，超越人类表现。

papers.title: The Impact of Federated Learning on Distributed Remote Sensing Archives
papers.abstract: Remote sensing archives are inherently distributed: Earth observation missions such as Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2, and Sentinel-3 have collectively accumulated more than 5 petabytes of imagery, stored and processed across many geographically dispersed platforms. Training machine learning models on such data in a centralized fashion is impractical due to data volume, sovereignty constraints, and geographic distribution. Federated learning (FL) addresses this by keeping data local and exchanging only model updates. A central challenge for remote sensing is the non-IID nature of Earth observation data: label distributions vary strongly by geographic region, degrading the convergence of standard FL algorithms. In this paper, we conduct a systematic empirical study of three FL strategies -- FedAvg, FedProx, and bulk synchronous parallel (BSP) -- applied to multi-label remote sensing image classification under controlled non-IID label-skew conditions. We evaluate three convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures of increasing depth (LeNet, AlexNet, and ResNet-34) and analyze the joint effect of algorithm choice, model capacity, client fraction, client count, batch size, and communication cost. Experiments on the UC Merced multi-label dataset show that FedProx outperforms FedAvg for deeper architectures under data heterogeneity, that BSP approaches centralized accuracy at the cost of high sequential communication, and that LeNet provides the best accuracy-communication trade-off for the dataset scale considered.

analysis.tldr: 系统研究联邦学习在分布式遥感图像分类中的性能，发现FedProx在数据异构下优于FedAvg，LeNet在精度-通信权衡上最优。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感数据分布式存储且规模巨大，集中训练不可行；联邦学习可保护数据隐私，但遥感数据的非独立同分布特性导致标准FL算法收敛困难。
analysis.problem: 在非独立同分布标签偏移条件下，如何选择联邦学习策略和模型架构以平衡遥感图像分类的精度与通信成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: FedProx在深度架构下优于FedAvg；BSP可达到集中式精度但通信成本高；LeNet在数据集规模下提供最佳精度-通信权衡。
analysis.method: 系统对比三种FL策略（FedAvg、FedProx、BSP）和三种CNN架构（LeNet、AlexNet、ResNet-34），在可控非独立同分布标签偏移下进行多标签遥感图像分类实验。
contributions: 首次系统评估联邦学习在分布式遥感图像分类中的性能，考虑多种算法和架构组合。
揭示FedProx在数据异构下对深度架构的优势，以及LeNet在精度-通信权衡上的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在UC Merced多标签数据集上进行实验，评估算法、模型容量、客户端比例、客户端数量、批量大小和通信成本的影响。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅使用单一数据集（UC Merced），可能不具广泛代表性。
未考虑更复杂的FL策略或更先进的模型架构（如Transformer）。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统研究联邦学习在分布式遥感图像分类中的性能，发现FedProx在数据异构下优于FedAvg，LeNet在精度-通信权衡上最优。

papers.title: bacpipe: a Python package to make bioacoustic deep learning models accessible
papers.abstract: 1. Natural sounds have been recorded for millions of hours over the previous decades using passive acoustic monitoring. Improvements in deep learning models have vastly accelerated the analysis of large portions of this data. While new models advance the state-of-the-art, accessing them using tools to harness their full potential is not always straightforward. Here we present bacpipe, a collection of bioacoustic deep learning models and evaluation pipelines accessible through a graphical and programming interface, designed for both ecologists and computer scientists. Bacpipe is a modular software package intended as a point of convergence for bioacoustic models. 2. Bacpipe streamlines the usage of state-of-the-art models on custom audio datasets, generating acoustic feature vectors (embeddings) and classifier predictions. A modular design allows evaluation and benchmarking of models through interactive visualizations, clustering and probing. 3. We believe that access to new deep learning models is important. By designing bacpipe to target a wide audience, researchers will be enabled to answer new ecological and evolutionary questions in bioacoustics. 4. In conclusion, we believe accessibility to developments in deep learning to a wider audience benefits the ecological questions we are trying to answer.

analysis.tldr: Bacpipe是一个Python软件包，旨在通过图形和编程接口简化生物声学深度学习模型的使用和评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 被动声学监测积累了数百万小时的录音数据，深度学习模型加速了数据分析，但现有工具难以让生态学家和计算机科学家方便地访问和利用这些模型。
analysis.problem: 如何让生物声学深度学习模型更易于访问、使用和评估，以支持生态学和进化生物学研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发了一个模块化Python软件包bacpipe，集成多种生物声学深度学习模型和评估流水线，提供图形和编程接口，支持特征提取、分类预测、可视化、聚类和探针分析。
contributions: 提供了一个统一的生物声学模型集合和评估流水线，降低使用门槛。
通过模块化设计和交互式可视化，支持模型基准测试和生态学问题探索。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型库，扩展性需验证。
未提及对大规模数据集的处理效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Bacpipe是一个Python软件包，旨在通过图形和编程接口简化生物声学深度学习模型的使用和评估。

papers.title: Progressively Texture-Aware Diffusion for Contrast-Enhanced Sparse-View CT
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based sparse-view CT (SVCT) imaging has achieved remarkable advancements in recent years, thanks to its more stable generative capability. However, recovering reliable image content and visually consistent textures is still a crucial challenge. In this paper, we present a Progressively Texture-aware Diffusion (PTD) model, a coarse-to-fine learning framework tailored for SVCT. Specifically, PTD comprises a basic reconstructive module PTD$_{\textit{rec}}$ and a conditional diffusion module PTD$_{\textit{diff}}$. PTD$_{\textit{rec}}$ first learns a deterministic mapping to recover the majority of the underlying low-frequency signals (i.e., coarse content with smoothed textures), which serves as the initial estimation to enable fidelity. Moreover, PTD$_{\textit{diff}}$ aims to reconstruct high-fidelity details for coarse prediction, which explores a dual-domain guided conditional diffusion to generate reliable and consistent textures. Extensive experiments on sparse-view CT reconstruction demonstrate that our PTD achieves superior performance in terms of structure similarity and visual appeal with only a few sampling steps, which mitigates the randomness inherent in general diffusion models and enables a better trade-off between visual quality and fidelity of high-frequency details.

analysis.tldr: 提出渐进式纹理感知扩散模型，用于稀疏视角CT重建，实现高质量纹理恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于扩散的稀疏视角CT成像虽取得进展，但恢复可靠图像内容和视觉一致纹理仍是关键挑战。
analysis.problem: 解决稀疏视角CT重建中纹理细节恢复的可靠性和一致性不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出渐进式纹理感知扩散模型，包含基础重建模块PTD_rec（恢复低频信号）和条件扩散模块PTD_diff（通过双域引导生成高频纹理）。
contributions: 提出PTD模型，实现从粗到细的稀疏视角CT重建。
设计双域引导条件扩散机制，生成可靠且一致的纹理。
analysis.experiments: 在稀疏视角CT重建任务上进行实验，仅需少量采样步骤即可在结构相似性和视觉吸引力上取得优越性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定稀疏视角设置，泛化性需进一步验证。
计算开销可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出渐进式纹理感知扩散模型，用于稀疏视角CT重建，实现高质量纹理恢复。

papers.title: UniToolCall: Unifying Tool-Use Representation, Data, and Evaluation for LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Tool-use capability is a fundamental component of LLM agents, enabling them to interact with external systems through structured function calls. However, existing research exhibits inconsistent interaction representations, largely overlooks the structural distribution of tool-use trajectories, and relies on incompatible evaluation benchmarks. We present UniToolCall, a unified framework for tool learning that standardizes the entire pipeline from toolset construction and dataset generation to evaluation. The framework curates a large tool pool of 22k+ tools and constructs a hybrid training corpus of 390k+ instances by combining 10 standardized public datasets with structurally controlled synthetic trajectories. It explicitly models diverse interaction patterns, including single-hop vs. multi-hop and single-turn vs. multi-turn, while capturing both serial and parallel execution structures. To support coherent multi-turn reasoning, we further introduce an Anchor Linkage mechanism that enforces cross-turn dependencies. Furthermore, we convert 7 public benchmarks into a unified Query--Action--Observation--Answer (QAOA) representation with fine-grained evaluation at the function-call, turn, and conversation levels. Experiments show that fine-tuning Qwen3-8B on our dataset substantially improves tool-use performance. Under the distractor-heavy Hybrid-20 setting, achieves 93.0% single-turn Strict Precision, outperforming commercial models including GPT, Gemini, and Claude.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一工具调用框架UniToolCall，标准化工具集构建、数据生成与评估流程，提升LLM Agent工具使用能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工具学习研究存在交互表示不一致、忽视轨迹结构分布、评估基准不兼容等问题，阻碍了LLM Agent工具使用能力的系统化发展。
analysis.problem: 如何统一工具学习的表示、数据与评估，以支持多样化交互模式并提升LLM Agent的工具调用性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含22k+工具的工具池和390k+实例的混合训练语料，显式建模单跳/多跳、单轮/多轮及串行/并行执行结构，引入Anchor Linkage机制实现跨轮依赖，并将7个公开基准统一为QAOA表示进行细粒度评估。
contributions: 提出UniToolCall统一框架，标准化工具学习的表示、数据与评估流程。
构建大规模工具池和混合训练语料，显式建模多种交互模式。
引入Anchor Linkage机制支持连贯多轮推理。
统一7个公开基准为QAOA格式，实现函数调用、轮次和对话级别的细粒度评估。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-8B上微调，在distractor-heavy Hybrid-20设置下，单轮Strict Precision达93.0%，超越GPT、Gemini、Claude等商业模型。
limitations: 可能仅在特定模型（Qwen3-8B）上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
工具池和语料可能覆盖领域有限，未提及跨领域迁移能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一工具调用框架UniToolCall，标准化工具集构建、数据生成与评估流程，提升LLM Agent工具使用能力。

papers.title: FM-Agent: Scaling Formal Methods to Large Systems via LLM-Based Hoare-Style Reasoning
papers.abstract: LLM-assisted software development has become increasingly prevalent, and can generate large-scale systems, such as compilers. It becomes crucial to strengthen the correctness of the generated code. However, automated reasoning for large-scale systems remains challenging due to code complexity. Hoare logic offers an approach to decomposing a large system into smaller components and reasoning about them separately (i.e., compositional reasoning). However, existing works still struggle to scale, because Hoare logic requires writing formal specifications for each function, imposing a heavy human burden. The problem is exacerbated when code is generated by LLMs, as developers lack a deep understanding of each function's expected behavior. This paper presents FM-Agent, the first framework that realizes automated compositional reasoning for large-scale systems. Leveraging LLMs, FM-Agent introduces a top-down paradigm to automatically generate function-level specifications. Specifically, FM-Agent derives the specification of a function from how its callers expect the function to behave, so the generated specifications can reflect the developer's intent of a function even if the implementation is buggy. Developers' intent is usually expressed in natural language, while existing verifiers only support formulas. Therefore, FM-Agent generalizes Hoare-style inference to reason about functions against natural-language specifications. Finally, to confirm bug existence and explain bug causes, FM-Agent automatically generates test cases to trigger potential bugs. In our evaluation, FM-Agent successfully reasons about large-scale systems within 2 days, each of which has up to 143k LoC. These systems have already been tested by their developers, but FM-Agent still finds 522 newly discovered bugs. These bugs can cause serious consequences, including system crashes and incorrect execution results.

analysis.tldr: FM-Agent利用LLM实现大规模系统的自动化组合推理，发现522个新bug。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM辅助开发生成的大规模系统（如编译器）的正确性验证至关重要，但现有Hoare逻辑方法需要人工编写函数规范，难以扩展，且LLM生成代码的开发者对函数预期行为理解不足。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化地对大规模系统进行组合推理，以验证代码正确性并发现bug。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FM-Agent框架，采用自上而下的范式，利用LLM从调用者期望自动生成函数级规范，并泛化Hoare风格推理以支持自然语言规范，最后自动生成测试用例触发bug。
contributions: 首个实现大规模系统自动化组合推理的框架FM-Agent。
提出从调用者期望生成函数规范的方法，支持自然语言规范推理。
analysis.experiments: 在多达143k行代码的大规模系统上评估，2天内完成推理，发现522个新bug，包括导致系统崩溃和错误结果的严重bug。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM生成规范的质量。
自然语言规范推理的完备性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FM-Agent利用LLM实现大规模系统的自动化组合推理，发现522个新bug。

papers.title: SemaClaw: A Step Towards General-Purpose Personal AI Agents through Harness Engineering
papers.abstract: The rise of OpenClaw in early 2026 marks the moment when millions of users began deploying personal AI agents into their daily lives, delegating tasks ranging from travel planning to multi-step research. This scale of adoption signals that two parallel arcs of development have reached an inflection point. First is a paradigm shift in AI engineering, evolving from prompt and context engineering to harness engineering-designing the complete infrastructure necessary to transform unconstrained agents into controllable, auditable, and production-reliable systems. As model capabilities converge, this harness layer is becoming the primary site of architectural differentiation. Second is the evolution of human-agent interaction from discrete tasks toward a persistent, contextually aware collaborative relationship, which demands open, trustworthy and extensible harness infrastructure. We present SemaClaw, an open-source multi-agent application framework that addresses these shifts by taking a step towards general-purpose personal AI agents through harness engineering. Our primary contributions include a DAG-based two-phase hybrid agent team orchestration method, a PermissionBridge behavioral safety system, a three-tier context management architecture, and an agentic wiki skill for automated personal knowledge base construction.

analysis.tldr: SemaClaw 通过缰绳工程（Harness Engineering）构建开源多智能体框架，实现通用个人 AI 代理的安全可控与持久协作。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着 OpenClaw 等个人 AI 代理大规模部署，模型能力趋同，代理的可靠性、可控性和可审计性成为瓶颈；同时人机交互从离散任务转向持久协作，需要开放、可信、可扩展的基础设施。
analysis.problem: 如何设计缰绳工程（Harness Engineering）来构建通用个人 AI 代理，使其在真实部署中安全、可控、可审计，并支持持久上下文协作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出两个关键转折点：AI 工程范式从提示/上下文工程转向缰绳工程，以及人机交互从离散任务转向持久协作关系。
analysis.method: 提出 SemaClaw 开源多智能体框架，包含 DAG 两阶段混合代理团队编排、PermissionBridge 行为安全系统、三层上下文管理架构和 agentic wiki 技能。
contributions: 提出 DAG 两阶段混合代理团队编排方法
设计 PermissionBridge 行为安全系统
提出三层上下文管理架构
开发 agentic wiki 技能用于自动个人知识库构建
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模真实用户实验验证
框架的通用性和可扩展性需进一步评估
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SemaClaw 通过缰绳工程（Harness Engineering）构建开源多智能体框架，实现通用个人 AI 代理的安全可控与持久协作。

papers.title: Time is Not a Label: Continuous Phase Rotation for Temporal Knowledge Graphs and Agentic Memory
papers.abstract: Structured memory representations such as knowledge graphs are central to autonomous agents and other long-lived systems. However, most existing approaches model time as discrete metadata, either sorting by recency (burying old-yet-permanent knowledge), simply overwriting outdated facts, or requiring an expensive LLM call at every ingestion step, leaving them unable to distinguish persistent facts from evolving ones. To address this, we introduce RoMem, a drop-in temporal knowledge graph module for structured memory systems, applicable to agentic memory and beyond. A pretrained Semantic Speed Gate maps each relation's text embedding to a volatility score, learning from data that evolving relations (e.g., "president of") should rotate fast while persistent ones (e.g., "born in") should remain stable. Combined with continuous phase rotation, this enables geometric shadowing: obsolete facts are rotated out of phase in complex vector space, so temporally correct facts naturally outrank contradictions without deletion. On temporal knowledge graph completion, RoMem achieves state-of-the-art results on ICEWS05-15 (72.6 MRR). Applied to agentic memory, it delivers 2-3x MRR and answer accuracy on temporal reasoning (MultiTQ), dominates hybrid benchmark (LoCoMo), preserves static memory with zero degradation (DMR-MSC), and generalises zero-shot to unseen financial domains (FinTMMBench).

analysis.tldr: 提出RoMem，通过连续相位旋转和语义速度门实现时间知识图谱的几何遮蔽，在多个基准上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有结构化记忆系统将时间视为离散元数据，无法区分持久事实与演化事实，导致旧知识被埋没或错误覆盖。
analysis.problem: 如何让知识图谱在时间维度上自然区分持久事实和演化事实，避免显式删除或排序。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同关系的时间演化速度不同，如“总统”变化快而“出生地”稳定，现有方法无法建模这种差异。
analysis.method: RoMem模块包含预训练的语义速度门（Semantic Speed Gate），根据关系文本嵌入预测波动性分数，结合连续相位旋转实现几何遮蔽，使过时事实相位偏移，正确事实自然胜出。
contributions: 提出RoMem，一种即插即用的时间知识图谱模块，适用于智能体记忆等系统。
引入语义速度门，从数据中学习关系的演化速度。
利用连续相位旋转实现几何遮蔽，无需显式删除即可处理时间冲突。
在时间知识图谱补全和智能体记忆任务上取得SOTA结果。
analysis.experiments: 在ICEWS05-15上MRR达72.6，在MultiTQ上MRR和答案准确率提升2-3倍，在LoCoMo上主导混合基准，在DMR-MSC上零退化，在FinTMMBench上零样本泛化。
limitations: 语义速度门依赖预训练文本嵌入，可能受嵌入质量影响。
连续相位旋转的维度选择需要调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RoMem，通过连续相位旋转和语义速度门实现时间知识图谱的几何遮蔽，在多个基准上取得SOTA。

papers.title: NovBench: Evaluating Large Language Models on Academic Paper Novelty Assessment
papers.abstract: Novelty is a core requirement in academic publishing and a central focus of peer review, yet the growing volume of submissions has placed increasing pressure on human reviewers. While large language models (LLMs), including those fine-tuned on peer review data, have shown promise in generating review comments, the absence of a dedicated benchmark has limited systematic evaluation of their ability to assess research novelty. To address this gap, we introduce NovBench, the first large-scale benchmark designed to evaluate LLMs' capability to generate novelty evaluations in support of human peer review. NovBench comprises 1,684 paper-review pairs from a leading NLP conference, including novelty descriptions extracted from paper introductions and corresponding expert-written novelty evaluations. We focus on both sources because the introduction provides a standardized and explicit articulation of novelty claims, while expert-written novelty evaluations constitute one of the current gold standards of human judgment. Furthermore, we propose a four-dimensional evaluation framework (including Relevance, Correctness, Coverage, and Clarity) to assess the quality of LLM-generated novelty evaluations. Extensive experiments on both general and specialized LLMs under different prompting strategies reveal that current models exhibit limited understanding of scientific novelty, and that fine--tuned models often suffer from instruction-following deficiencies. These findings underscore the need for targeted fine-tuning strategies that jointly improve novelty comprehension and instruction adherence.

analysis.tldr: 首个评估LLM学术论文新颖性判断能力的基准NovBench，发现现有模型理解不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 学术论文审稿量激增，人工评审压力大；LLM虽能生成评审意见，但缺乏专门基准评估其新颖性判断能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏系统评估LLM对学术论文新颖性判断能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前通用和专用LLM对科学新颖性理解有限，微调模型存在指令遵循缺陷。
analysis.method: 构建包含1684篇论文-评审对的NovBench基准，提出四维评估框架（相关性、正确性、覆盖度、清晰度）。
contributions: 首个大规模评估LLM新颖性判断能力的基准NovBench
提出四维评估框架并揭示当前模型局限性
analysis.experiments: 在通用和专用LLM上采用不同提示策略进行实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅基于单一NLP会议数据，可能缺乏领域泛化性
评估框架依赖专家标注，成本较高
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个评估LLM学术论文新颖性判断能力的基准NovBench，发现现有模型理解不足。

papers.title: A collaborative agent with two lightweight synergistic models for autonomous crystal materials research
papers.abstract: Current large language models require hundreds of billions of parameters yet struggle with domain-specific reasoning and tool coordination in materials science. Here, we present MatBrain, a lightweight collaborative agent system with two synergistic models specialization for crystal materials research. MatBrain employs a dual-model architecture: Mat-R1 (30B parameters) as the analytical model providing expert-level domain reasoning, and Mat-T1 (14B parameters) as the executive model orchestrating tool-based actions. Entropy analysis confirms that this architecture resolves the conflict between tool planning and analytical reasoning by decoupling their distinct entropy dynamics. Enabled by this dual-model architecture and structural efficiency, MatBrain significantly outperforms larger general-purpose models while reducing the hardware deployment barrier by over 95%. MatBrain exhibits versatility across structure generation, property prediction, and synthesis planning tasks. Applied to catalyst design, MatBrain generated 30,000 candidate structures and identified 38 promising materials within 48 hours, achieving approximately 100-fold acceleration over traditional approaches. These results demonstrate the potential of lightweight collaborative intelligence for advancing materials research capabilities.

analysis.tldr: MatBrain 通过双模型协作架构，用 30B+14B 参数超越千亿级大模型，实现晶体材料研究的百倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大语言模型参数规模巨大（千亿级），但在材料科学领域特定推理和工具协调方面表现不佳，且硬件部署成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何用轻量级模型实现材料科学领域的专家级推理与工具协调，同时大幅降低部署门槛。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 熵分析表明，工具规划与分析推理具有不同的熵动态，双模型架构通过解耦这两类任务解决了冲突。
analysis.method: 提出 MatBrain 双模型协作系统：Mat-R1（30B 参数）作为分析模型提供专家级领域推理，Mat-T1（14B 参数）作为执行模型协调基于工具的操作。
contributions: 提出轻量级双模型协作架构 MatBrain，通过解耦推理与执行任务提升性能。
在结构生成、性质预测、合成规划等任务上超越更大通用模型，硬件部署门槛降低超 95%。
在催化剂设计中 48 小时内生成 3 万候选结构并识别 38 种有前景材料，实现约百倍加速。
analysis.experiments: 在结构生成、性质预测、合成规划任务上评估，并在催化剂设计应用中验证，48 小时内生成 3 万候选结构并识别 38 种有前景材料。
limitations: 可能仅在晶体材料领域验证，泛化性未知。
双模型架构的协同机制可能依赖特定任务设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MatBrain 通过双模型协作架构，用 30B+14B 参数超越千亿级大模型，实现晶体材料研究的百倍加速。

papers.title: CLAY: Conditional Visual Similarity Modulation in Vision-Language Embedding Space
papers.abstract: Human perception of visual similarity is inherently adaptive and subjective, depending on the users' interests and focus. However, most image retrieval systems fail to reflect this flexibility, relying on a fixed, monolithic metric that cannot incorporate multiple conditions simultaneously. To address this, we propose CLAY, an adaptive similarity computation method that reframes the embedding space of pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as a text-conditional similarity space without additional training. This design separates the textual conditioning process and visual feature extraction, allowing highly efficient and multi-conditioned retrieval with fixed visual embeddings. We also construct a synthetic evaluation dataset CLAY-EVAL, for comprehensive assessment under diverse conditioned retrieval settings. Experiments on standard datasets and our proposed dataset show that CLAY achieves high retrieval accuracy and notable computational efficiency compared to previous works.

analysis.tldr: CLAY 通过文本条件调制视觉相似性，无需额外训练即可实现高效多条件图像检索。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像检索系统使用固定的相似性度量，无法根据用户兴趣和关注点灵活调整，缺乏适应性和主观性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练模型的情况下，实现可同时融入多个条件的自适应视觉相似性计算。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将预训练视觉-语言模型的嵌入空间重构为文本条件相似性空间，通过分离文本条件过程和视觉特征提取，实现高效多条件检索。
contributions: 提出 CLAY，一种无需额外训练的自适应相似性计算方法，支持多条件图像检索。
构建合成评估数据集 CLAY-EVAL，用于全面评估不同条件检索设置下的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在标准数据集和 CLAY-EVAL 上，CLAY 相比先前工作实现了高检索精度和显著的计算效率。
limitations: 依赖预训练 VLM 的质量，可能受限于其表示能力。
合成数据集 CLAY-EVAL 可能无法完全反映真实场景的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CLAY 通过文本条件调制视觉相似性，无需额外训练即可实现高效多条件图像检索。

papers.title: Problem Reductions at Scale: Agentic Integration of Computationally Hard Problems
papers.abstract: Solving an NP-hard optimization problem often requires reformulating it for a specific solver -- quantum hardware, a commercial optimizer, or a domain heuristic. A tool for polynomial-time reductions between hard problems would let practitioners route any supported problem to any supported solver through a single interface. Building such a library at scale, however, has remained out of reach. We show that harness engineering, the practice of designing constraints, verification systems, and feedback loops that channel AI coding agents, can overcome this barrier. Our harness combines a no-code contribution route for domain experts, a multilayer verification stack ranging from type-level checks to agentic feature tests (AI agents role-playing as end users), and a fully automated implementation-review-integration pipeline. In about three months, we built a command-line tool backed by a library of 100+ problem types and 200+ reduction rules in over 170k lines of Rust. The result suggests that a well-engineered harness lets agents build well-tested software at a scale and pace beyond prior reduction-library efforts. Because the reduction graph composes transitively, a new solver registered for any single problem type instantly becomes available to every problem connected by a reduction path. The source code is available at https://github.com/CodingThrust/problem-reductions.

analysis.tldr: 通过智能体工程构建大规模NP难问题归约库，实现任意问题到任意求解器的统一接口。
analysis.research_motivation: NP难优化问题通常需要针对特定求解器（如量子硬件、商业优化器或领域启发式算法）进行重新表述，缺乏统一的归约工具，导致实践者难以灵活切换求解器。
analysis.problem: 如何大规模构建多项式时间归约库，使得任何支持的问题类型都能通过单一接口路由到任何支持的求解器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种“harness engineering”方法，结合无代码贡献路径、多层验证栈（类型检查到智能体特征测试）和全自动实现-审查-集成流水线，利用AI编码智能体构建大规模归约库。
contributions: 展示了harness engineering可以克服大规模归约库构建的障碍，在三个月内构建了包含100+问题类型、200+归约规则和17万行Rust代码的命令行工具。
由于归约图可传递组合，新求解器注册后即可用于所有通过归约路径连接的问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定AI编码智能体的能力，泛化性有待验证。
归约的正确性和效率可能受限于验证栈的覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过智能体工程构建大规模NP难问题归约库，实现任意问题到任意求解器的统一接口。

papers.title: SVD-Prune: Training-Free Token Pruning For Efficient Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLM) have revolutionized multimodal learning by jointly processing visual and textual information. Yet, they face significant challenges due to the high computational and memory demands of processing long sequences of vision tokens. Many existing methods rely on local heuristics, such as attention scores or token norms. However, these criteria suffer from positional bias and information dispersion, limiting their ability to preserve essential content at high pruning ratios and leading to performance degradation on visually detailed images. To address these issues, we propose SVD-Prune, a trainingfree, plug-and-play token pruning method based on Singular Value Decomposition. It decomposes the vision token feature matrix and selects the top-K tokens using statistical leverage scores, ensuring only tokens contributing most to the dominant global variance are preserved. Experiments show that SVD-Prune consistently outperforms prior pruning methods under extreme vision token budgets, maintaining strong performance even with 32 and 16 vision tokens.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于奇异值分解的无训练视觉token剪枝方法SVD-Prune，在极端剪枝率下保持VLM性能。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM处理长序列视觉token导致高计算和内存开销，现有基于局部启发式的方法在高剪枝率下因位置偏差和信息分散而性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在不训练的情况下，高效剪枝视觉token并保留关键信息，避免高剪枝率下的性能退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法（如基于注意力分数或token范数）存在位置偏差和信息分散，在极端剪枝率下无法保留重要内容，导致视觉细节丰富的图像性能下降。
analysis.method: SVD-Prune：对视觉token特征矩阵进行奇异值分解，利用统计杠杆分数选择对全局方差贡献最大的top-K token。
contributions: 提出一种无训练、即插即用的视觉token剪枝方法SVD-Prune，基于奇异值分解和杠杆分数。
在极端视觉token预算（如32和16个token）下，SVD-Prune优于现有剪枝方法，保持强性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对动态输入或不同VLM架构的泛化性需进一步验证。
杠杆分数计算可能引入额外开销，但摘要未提及效率对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于奇异值分解的无训练视觉token剪枝方法SVD-Prune，在极端剪枝率下保持VLM性能。

papers.title: Limited Perfect Monotonical Surrogates constructed using low-cost recursive linkage discovery with guaranteed output
papers.abstract: Surrogates provide a cheap solution evaluation and offer significant leverage for optimizing computationally expensive problems. Usually, surrogates only approximate the original function. Recently, the perfect linear surrogates were proposed that ideally represent the original function. These surrogates do not mimic the original function. In fact, they are another (correct) representation of it and enable a wide range of possibilities, e.g., discovering the optimized function for problems where the direct transformation of the encoded solution into its evaluation is not available. However, many real-world problems can not be represented by linear models, making the aforementioned surrogates inapplicable. Therefore, we propose the Limited Monotonical Perfect Surrogate (LyMPuS), which overcomes this difficulty and enables the comparison of two solutions that differ by a single variable. Our proposition is suitable for limiting the cost of expensive local search procedures. The proposed surrogate is parameterless and can be trained on the fly without any separate surrogate-building step. It uses only the necessary fitness evaluations, and the already-paid costs are not wasted when the model is updated. Finally, it offers low-cost missing-linkage detection and low-cost linkage discovery, guaranteed to find a missing dependency in no more than $2\lceil\log_2(n)\rceil$ steps.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需参数、可在线训练的单调完美代理模型，用于高效优化计算昂贵的局部搜索问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算昂贵的优化问题中，代理模型通常只能近似原函数，而现有的完美线性代理无法处理非线性问题，限制了其应用范围。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一种适用于非线性问题的完美代理模型，使其能够精确表示原函数并支持低成本的局部搜索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Limited Monotonical Perfect Surrogate (LyMPuS)，一种参数无关、可在线训练的单调完美代理模型，通过低成本的递归链接发现保证在不超过2⌈log₂(n)⌉步内找到缺失依赖。
contributions: 提出LyMPuS，克服了线性完美代理无法处理非线性问题的局限。
实现无需单独训练步骤、参数无关的在线学习，并保证低成本的链接发现。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于局部搜索场景，全局优化能力未知。
单调性假设可能限制其在非单调问题上的应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需参数、可在线训练的单调完美代理模型，用于高效优化计算昂贵的局部搜索问题。

papers.title: PAC-BENCH: Evaluating Multi-Agent Collaboration under Privacy Constraints
papers.abstract: We are entering an era in which individuals and organizations increasingly deploy dedicated AI agents that interact and collaborate with other agents. However, the dynamics of multi-agent collaboration under privacy constraints remain poorly understood. In this work, we present $PAC\text{-}Bench$, a benchmark for systematic evaluation of multi-agent collaboration under privacy constraints. Experiments on $PAC\text{-}Bench$ show that privacy constraints substantially degrade collaboration performance and make outcomes depend more on the initiating agent than the partner. Further analysis reveals that this degradation is driven by recurring coordination breakdowns, including early-stage privacy violations, overly conservative abstraction, and privacy-induced hallucinations. Together, our findings identify privacy-aware multi-agent collaboration as a distinct and unresolved challenge that requires new coordination mechanisms beyond existing agent capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出PAC-Bench基准，揭示隐私约束会显著降低多智能体协作性能并导致协调崩溃。
analysis.research_motivation: 个人和组织越来越多地部署专用AI代理进行交互协作，但隐私约束下的多智能体协作动态尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 缺乏系统评估隐私约束下多智能体协作性能的基准，且现有代理能力无法应对隐私带来的协调挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 隐私约束显著降低协作性能，使结果更依赖发起方而非合作方；性能下降由重复协调崩溃驱动，包括早期隐私违规、过度保守抽象和隐私引发的幻觉。
analysis.method: 构建PAC-Bench基准，包含隐私约束下的多智能体协作任务，用于系统评估。
contributions: 提出PAC-Bench，首个系统评估隐私约束下多智能体协作的基准。
揭示隐私约束导致协作性能下降和协调崩溃的具体模式。
指出隐私感知多智能体协作是一个尚未解决的独特挑战。
analysis.experiments: 在PAC-Bench上进行实验，观察隐私约束对协作性能的影响及协调崩溃现象。
limitations: 摘要未提供具体任务类型或代理模型细节。
可能未涵盖所有隐私约束场景或协作模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PAC-Bench基准，揭示隐私约束会显著降低多智能体协作性能并导致协调崩溃。

papers.title: Continuous Adversarial Flow Models
papers.abstract: We propose continuous adversarial flow models, a type of continuous-time flow model trained with an adversarial objective. Unlike flow matching, which uses a fixed mean-squared-error criterion, our approach introduces a learned discriminator to guide training. This change in objective induces a different generalized distribution, which empirically produces samples that are better aligned with the target data distribution. Our method is primarily proposed for post-training existing flow-matching models, although it can also train models from scratch. On the ImageNet 256px generation task, our post-training substantially improves the guidance-free FID of latent-space SiT from 8.26 to 3.63 and of pixel-space JiT from 7.17 to 3.57. It also improves guided generation, reducing FID from 2.06 to 1.53 for SiT and from 1.86 to 1.80 for JiT. We further evaluate our approach on text-to-image generation, where it achieves improved results on both the GenEval and DPG benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出连续对抗流模型，用对抗目标训练连续时间流模型，显著提升图像生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有流匹配模型使用固定的均方误差准则，可能无法完美对齐目标数据分布，需要更灵活的训练目标来提升生成质量。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种训练目标，使连续时间流模型生成样本更贴近真实数据分布。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对抗目标诱导了不同的广义分布，经验上产生与目标分布更对齐的样本。
analysis.method: 提出连续对抗流模型，在连续时间流模型训练中引入判别器进行对抗训练，可对已有流匹配模型进行后训练或从头训练。
contributions: 提出连续对抗流模型，用对抗目标替代固定均方误差训练流模型。
在ImageNet 256px和文本到图像生成任务上显著提升FID和基准分数。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet 256px生成任务上，后训练将潜在空间SiT的无引导FID从8.26降至3.63，像素空间JiT从7.17降至3.57；引导生成中SiT的FID从2.06降至1.53，JiT从1.86降至1.80。文本到图像生成在GenEval和DPG基准上取得改进。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算开销或训练稳定性。
可能依赖判别器设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出连续对抗流模型，用对抗目标训练连续时间流模型，显著提升图像生成质量。

papers.title: From Translation to Superset: Benchmark-Driven Evolution of a Production AI Agent from Rust to Python
papers.abstract: Cross-language migration of large software systems is a persistent engineering challenge, particularly when the source codebase evolves rapidly. We present a methodology for LLM-assisted continuous code translation in which a large language model translates a production Rust codebase (648K LOC, 65 crates) into Python (41K LOC, 28 modules), with public agent benchmarks as the objective function driving iterative refinement. Our subject system is Codex CLI, a production AI coding agent. We demonstrate that: (1) the Python port resolves 59/80 SWE-bench Verified tasks (73.8%) versus Rust's 56/80 (70.0%), and achieves 42.5% on Terminal-Bench versus Rust's 47.5%, confirming near-parity on real-world agentic tasks; (2) benchmark-driven debugging, revealing API protocol mismatches, environment pollution, a silent WebSocket failure mode, and an API 400 crash, is more effective than static testing alone; (3) the architecture supports continuous upstream synchronisation via an LLM-assisted diff-translate-test loop; and (4) the Python port has evolved into a capability superset with 30 feature-flagged extensions (multi-agent orchestration, semantic memory, guardian safety, cost tracking) absent from Rust, while preserving strict parity mode for comparison. Our evaluation shows that for LLM-based agents where API latency dominates, Python's expressiveness yields a 15.9x code reduction with negligible performance cost, while the benchmark-as-objective-function methodology provides a principled framework for growing a cross-language port from parity into an extended platform.

analysis.tldr: 将生产级Rust AI Agent通过LLM辅助翻译为Python，以基准测试为驱动实现功能超集。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨语言迁移大型软件系统是持续工程挑战，尤其当源代码快速演进时，现有方法缺乏系统性的迭代优化框架。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地将生产级Rust代码库翻译为Python，并保持功能对等甚至扩展，同时利用基准测试驱动调试和优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基准驱动调试比静态测试更有效，能发现API协议不匹配、环境污染、静默WebSocket故障和API 400崩溃等问题。
analysis.method: LLM辅助连续代码翻译方法，以公共Agent基准作为目标函数驱动迭代优化，包括差异翻译-测试循环和持续上游同步。
contributions: 提出以基准测试为目标函数的LLM辅助跨语言代码翻译方法论
实现从Rust到Python的生产级AI Agent翻译，在SWE-bench上达到73.8%准确率，与Rust版本性能接近
发现基准驱动调试能揭示静态测试无法捕获的故障模式
Python端口发展为功能超集，包含30个特性扩展，同时保持严格对等模式
analysis.experiments: 在SWE-bench Verified和Terminal-Bench上评估，Python端口分别达到73.8%和42.5%，与Rust版本（70.0%和47.5%）性能接近。
limitations: 仅针对特定AI Agent系统，泛化性需进一步验证
依赖LLM翻译质量，可能引入新错误
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将生产级Rust AI Agent通过LLM辅助翻译为Python，以基准测试为驱动实现功能超集。

papers.title: EdgeCIM: A Hardware-Software Co-Design for CIM-Based Acceleration of Small Language Models
papers.abstract: The growing demand for deploying Small Language Models (SLMs) on edge devices, including laptops, smartphones, and embedded platforms, has exposed fundamental inefficiencies in existing accelerators. While GPUs handle prefill workloads efficiently, the autoregressive decoding phase is dominated by GEMV operations that are inherently memory-bound, resulting in poor utilization and prohibitive energy costs at the edge. In this work, we present EdgeCIM, a hardware-software co-design framework that rethinks accelerator design for end-to-end decoder-only inference. At its core is a CIM macro, implemented in 65nm, coupled with a tile-based mapping strategy that balances pipeline stages, maximizing parallelism while alleviating DRAM bandwidth bottlenecks. Our simulator enables design space exploration of SLMs up to 4B parameters, identifying Pareto-optimal configurations in terms of latency and energy. Compared to an NVIDIA Orin Nano, EdgeCIM achieves up to 7.3x higher throughput and 49.59x better energy efficiency on LLaMA3.2-1B, and delivers 9.95x higher throughput than Qualcomm SA8255P on LLaMA3.2-3B. Extensive benchmarks on TinyLLaMA-1.1B, LLaMA3.2 (1B, 3B), Phi-3.5-mini-3.8B, Qwen2.5 (0.5B, 1.5B, 3B), SmolLM2-1.7B, SmolLM3-3B, and Qwen3 (0.6B, 1.7B, 4B) reveal that our accelerator, under INT4 precision, achieves on average 336.42 tokens/s and 173.02 tokens/J. These results establish EdgeCIM as a compelling solution towards real-time, energy-efficient edge-scale SLM inference.

analysis.tldr: EdgeCIM通过硬件-软件协同设计，利用CIM宏和基于tile的映射策略，显著提升边缘设备上小语言模型的推理吞吐量和能效。
analysis.research_motivation: 在边缘设备（如笔记本电脑、智能手机）上部署小语言模型（SLM）时，现有加速器在自回归解码阶段因GEMV操作的内存瓶颈导致利用率低、能耗高，亟需高效的硬件-软件协同设计方案。
analysis.problem: 解决边缘设备上SLM推理中解码阶段GEMV操作的内存瓶颈和能效问题，实现高吞吐、低能耗的端到端推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出GPU在prefill阶段高效，但自回归解码阶段由内存受限的GEMV操作主导，导致利用率低和能耗过高。
analysis.method: 提出EdgeCIM框架，核心是65nm工艺实现的CIM宏，结合基于tile的映射策略平衡流水线阶段，最大化并行性并缓解DRAM带宽瓶颈；同时提供模拟器支持最多4B参数SLM的设计空间探索。
contributions: 提出EdgeCIM硬件-软件协同设计框架，针对SLM解码阶段优化。
实现CIM宏和tile映射策略，在65nm工艺下显著提升吞吐量和能效。
在多个SLM上验证，相比NVIDIA Orin Nano和Qualcomm SA8255P实现数倍性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在TinyLLaMA-1.1B、LLaMA3.2 (1B, 3B)、Phi-3.5-mini-3.8B、Qwen2.5 (0.5B, 1.5B, 3B)、SmolLM2-1.7B、SmolLM3-3B、Qwen3 (0.6B, 1.7B, 4B)等模型上，INT4精度下平均336.42 tokens/s和173.02 tokens/J。
limitations: 模拟器可能无法完全反映真实芯片的物理效应。
仅针对SLM（≤4B参数），未验证更大模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EdgeCIM通过硬件-软件协同设计，利用CIM宏和基于tile的映射策略，显著提升边缘设备上小语言模型的推理吞吐量和能效。

papers.title: Policy Split: Incentivizing Dual-Mode Exploration in LLM Reinforcement with Dual-Mode Entropy Regularization
papers.abstract: To encourage diverse exploration in reinforcement learning (RL) for large language models (LLMs) without compromising accuracy, we propose Policy Split, a novel paradigm that bifurcates the policy into normal and high-entropy modes with a high-entropy prompt. While sharing model parameters, the two modes undergo collaborative dual-mode entropy regularization tailored to distinct objectives. Specifically, the normal mode optimizes for task correctness, while the high-entropy mode incorporates a preference for exploration, and the two modes learn collaboratively. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms established entropy-guided RL baselines across various model sizes in general and creative tasks. Further analysis reveals that Policy Split facilitates dual-mode exploration, where the high-entropy mode generates distinct behavioral patterns to the normal mode, providing unique learning signals.

analysis.tldr: 提出Policy Split方法，通过双模式熵正则化在LLM强化学习中平衡探索与准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有熵正则化方法在LLM强化学习中难以同时保证探索多样性和任务准确性，需要一种新范式来解耦这两种目标。
analysis.problem: 如何在LLM强化学习中鼓励多样化探索而不牺牲生成准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将策略分为正常模式和高熵模式，共享参数但通过双模式熵正则化分别优化正确性和探索偏好，两模式协同学习。
contributions: 提出Policy Split范式，将策略分解为正常和高熵双模式。
设计双模式熵正则化方法，分别优化任务正确性和探索偏好。
实验证明该方法在多种模型规模和任务上优于现有熵引导RL基线。
analysis.experiments: 在多种模型规模的通用和创意任务上进行实验，结果显示方法一致优于基线。
limitations: 可能增加训练复杂度。
高熵模式的有效性可能依赖于任务类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Policy Split方法，通过双模式熵正则化在LLM强化学习中平衡探索与准确性。

papers.title: Not All Forgetting Is Equal: Architecture-Dependent Retention Dynamics in Fine-Tuned Image Classifiers
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning pretrained image classifiers is standard practice, yet which individual samples are forgotten during this process, and whether forgetting patterns are stable or architecture dependent, remains unclear. Understanding these dynamics has direct implications for curriculum design, data pruning, and ensemble construction. We track per-sample correctness at every epoch during fine-tuning of ResNet-18 and DeiT-Small on a retinal OCT dataset (7 classes, 56:1 imbalance) and CUB-200-2011 (200 bird species), fitting Ebbinghaus-style exponential decay curves to each sample's retention trace. Five findings emerge. First, the two architectures forget fundamentally different samples: Jaccard overlap of the top 10 percent most-forgotten is 0.34 on OCTDL and 0.15 on CUB-200. Second, ViT forgetting is more structured (mean $R^2 = 0.74$) than CNN forgetting ($R^2 = 0.52$). Third, per-sample forgetting is stochastic across random seeds (Spearman $ρ\approx 0.01$), challenging the assumption that sample difficulty is an intrinsic property. Fourth, class-level forgetting is consistent and semantically interpretable: visually similar species are forgotten most, distinctive ones least. Fifth, a sample's loss after head warmup predicts its long-term decay constant ($ρ= 0.30$ to $0.50$, $p < 10^{-45}$). These findings suggest that architectural diversity in ensembles provides complementary retention coverage, and that curriculum or pruning methods based on per-sample difficulty may not generalize across runs. A spaced repetition sampler built on these decay constants does not outperform random sampling, indicating that static scheduling cannot exploit unstable per-sample signals.

analysis.tldr: 微调图像分类器时，不同架构（CNN vs ViT）遗忘的样本不同，且遗忘模式随机，挑战了样本难度固有性的假设。
analysis.research_motivation: 微调预训练图像分类器是标准做法，但个体样本在微调过程中如何被遗忘、遗忘模式是否稳定或架构依赖尚不清楚，这对课程设计、数据剪枝和集成构建有直接影响。
analysis.problem: 研究微调过程中样本遗忘的动态特性，特别是遗忘模式是否依赖于架构以及是否具有可预测性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现五个现象：1) ResNet-18和DeiT-Small遗忘的样本根本不同；2) ViT的遗忘更结构化；3) 样本遗忘在不同随机种子间是随机的；4) 类别级遗忘一致且语义可解释；5) 头部热身后的损失可预测长期衰减常数。
analysis.method: 在微调过程中跟踪每个样本每个epoch的正确性，为每个样本的保留轨迹拟合Ebbinghaus式指数衰减曲线，并分析遗忘模式。
contributions: 揭示了CNN和ViT在微调中遗忘不同样本，且ViT遗忘更结构化。
发现样本遗忘是随机的，挑战了样本难度是固有属性的假设。
表明基于样本难度的课程或剪枝方法可能无法跨运行泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在视网膜OCT数据集（7类，56:1不平衡）和CUB-200-2011（200种鸟类）上微调ResNet-18和DeiT-Small，并进行了随机种子实验和间隔重复采样器实验。
limitations: 仅研究了两种架构和两个数据集，泛化性有限。
间隔重复采样器未优于随机采样，表明静态调度无法利用不稳定的样本信号。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 微调图像分类器时，不同架构（CNN vs ViT）遗忘的样本不同，且遗忘模式随机，挑战了样本难度固有性的假设。

papers.title: Deep Learning for Sequential Decision Making under Uncertainty: Foundations, Frameworks, and Frontiers
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is moving increasingly beyond prediction to support decisions in complex, uncertain, and dynamic environments. This shift creates a natural intersection with operations research and management sciences (OR/MS), which have long offered conceptual and methodological foundations for sequential decision-making under uncertainty. At the same time, recent advances in deep learning, including feedforward neural networks, LSTMs, transformers, and deep reinforcement learning, have expanded the scope of data-driven modeling and opened new possibilities for large-scale decision systems. This tutorial presents an OR/MS-centered perspective on deep learning for sequential decision-making under uncertainty. Its central premise is that deep learning is valuable not as a replacement for optimization, but as a complement to it. Deep learning brings adaptability and scalable approximation, whereas OR/MS provides the structural rigor needed to represent constraints, recourse, and uncertainty. The tutorial reviews key decision-making foundations, connects them to the major neural architectures in modern AI, and discusses leading approaches to integrating learning and optimization. It also highlights emerging impact in domains such as supply chains, healthcare and epidemic response, agriculture, energy, and autonomous operations. More broadly, it frames these developments as part of a wider transition from predictive AI toward decision-capable AI and highlights the role of OR/MS in shaping the next generation of integrated learning--optimization systems.

analysis.tldr: 从运筹学视角综述深度学习在不确定性下序贯决策中的应用，强调学习与优化的互补而非替代。
analysis.research_motivation: AI正从预测转向决策，但复杂动态环境下的序贯决策需要结合深度学习的适应性与运筹学的结构化严谨性，现有方法缺乏系统性整合视角。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地将深度学习（前馈网络、LSTM、Transformer、深度强化学习）与运筹学中的序贯决策框架（约束、补偿、不确定性建模）有效结合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 以运筹学为中心，综述决策基础、现代神经网络架构、学习与优化集成方法，并讨论供应链、医疗、农业等领域的应用。
contributions: 提出深度学习应作为优化的补充而非替代的核心理念
系统梳理从预测AI到决策AI的转型路径及运筹学的作用

limitations: 作为综述，未提出新算法或实验验证

papers.title: Lectures on AI for Mathematics
papers.abstract: This book provides a comprehensive and accessible introduction to the emerging field of AI for mathematics. It covers the core principles and diverse applications of using artificial intelligence to advance mathematical research. Through clear explanations, the text explores how AI can discover hidden mathematical patterns, assist in proving complicated theorems, and even construct counterexamples to challenge conjectures.

analysis.tldr: 一本系统介绍AI用于数学研究的入门书，涵盖原理与应用。
analysis.research_motivation: 数学研究面临复杂定理证明和模式发现的挑战，传统方法效率有限，AI有望加速数学发现。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地介绍AI在数学研究中的应用原理与方法。

analysis.method: 以教科书形式组织内容，涵盖AI发现数学模式、辅助定理证明和构造反例等核心应用。

涵盖模式发现、定理证明和反例构造等关键应用

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 一本系统介绍AI用于数学研究的入门书，涵盖原理与应用。

papers.title: METER: Evaluating Multi-Level Contextual Causal Reasoning in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Contextual causal reasoning is a critical yet challenging capability for Large Language Models (LLMs). Existing benchmarks, however, often evaluate this skill in fragmented settings, failing to ensure context consistency or cover the full causal hierarchy. To address this, we pioneer METER to systematically benchmark LLMs across all three levels of the causal ladder under a unified context setting. Our extensive evaluation of various LLMs reveals a significant decline in proficiency as tasks ascend the causal hierarchy. To diagnose this degradation, we conduct a deep mechanistic analysis via both error pattern identification and internal information flow tracing. Our analysis reveals two primary failure modes: (1) LLMs are susceptible to distraction by causally irrelevant but factually correct information at lower level of causality; and (2) as tasks ascend the causal hierarchy, faithfulness to the provided context degrades, leading to a reduced performance. We belive our work advances our understanding of the mechanisms behind LLM contextual causal reasoning and establishes a critical foundation for future research. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/SCUNLP/METER .

analysis.tldr: METER 是一个统一上下文设置下评估 LLM 三级因果推理能力的基准，揭示了随因果层级上升性能显著下降的现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有因果推理基准常以碎片化方式评估，缺乏上下文一致性且未覆盖完整因果层级，难以系统衡量 LLM 的因果推理能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个统一的上下文设置下，系统评估 LLM 在因果层级三个层次（观察、干预、反事实）上的推理能力，并诊断其失败原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM 在因果层级上升时性能显著下降；两个主要失败模式：1) 在低层级因果推理中易被因果无关但事实正确的信息干扰；2) 随着因果层级上升，对给定上下文的忠实度下降。
analysis.method: 构建 METER 基准，包含统一上下文的三级因果推理任务；通过错误模式识别和内部信息流追踪进行深度机制分析。
contributions: 提出 METER，首个在统一上下文设置下覆盖因果层级三个层次的 LLM 因果推理基准。
通过大规模评估揭示 LLM 在因果推理中的性能退化规律，并识别出两种主要失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在多种 LLM 上进行了广泛评估，并进行了错误模式分析和内部信息流追踪。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅关注特定类型的因果推理任务，泛化性有待验证。
机制分析可能依赖于特定模型架构，结论的普适性需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: METER 是一个统一上下文设置下评估 LLM 三级因果推理能力的基准，揭示了随因果层级上升性能显著下降的现象。

papers.title: Quantization Dominates Rank Reduction for KV-Cache Compression
papers.abstract: We compare two strategies for compressing the KV cache in transformer inference: rank reduction (discard dimensions) and quantization (keep all dimensions, reduce precision). At matched storage budgets across five models (124M-14B, MHA and GQA), we find that quantization consistently outperforms rank reduction by 4-364 PPL depending on model and compression level. The gap persists even when rank reduction is combined with quantization in hybrid baselines, and it grows with GQA aggressiveness. On LAMBADA, INT4 matches FP16 accuracy (+0.23 PPL on Mistral 7B, +0.58 on GPT-2) while rank-32 at identical storage collapses to 0.4%. We trace this gap to a structural asymmetry: under softmax attention routing, removing a dimension can flip which token is attended (a discrete failure), while quantization noise is bounded and typically preserves score ordering. We formalize this via a perturbation result showing projection damage exceeds quantization damage by 3 x 2^(2b) per direction under the softmax Fisher metric. A basis ablation confirms the finding is basis-independent (spread <0.4 PPL), establishing that the advantage comes from preserving dimensions, not from a better coordinate system. Joint K+V INT4 quantization achieves 75% total KV reduction at only +0.18 PPL on Mistral 7B.

analysis.tldr: 量化在KV缓存压缩中始终优于秩缩减，差距源于softmax注意力下维度移除导致离散注意力失败。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer推理中KV缓存占用大量内存，现有压缩策略包括秩缩减和量化，但缺乏系统比较，需要明确哪种方法更优及其原因。
analysis.problem: 比较秩缩减与量化两种KV缓存压缩策略的性能，并解释量化始终优于秩缩减的根本原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 量化在所有模型和压缩水平下一致优于秩缩减，差距可达4-364 PPL；秩缩减在softmax注意力下会因维度移除导致注意力翻转（离散失败），而量化噪声有界且通常保持分数排序。
analysis.method: 在相同存储预算下，对五种模型（124M-14B，MHA和GQA）进行秩缩减与量化的对比实验，并通过理论分析（softmax Fisher度量下的扰动结果）和基消融实验验证结论的基无关性。
contributions: 系统比较了秩缩减与量化在KV缓存压缩中的性能，发现量化始终优于秩缩减。
揭示了秩缩减在softmax注意力下导致离散注意力失败的结构性不对称，并给出理论形式化。
提出联合K+V INT4量化方案，在Mistral 7B上实现75%总KV缩减且仅增加0.18 PPL。
analysis.experiments: 在五种模型（124M-14B，MHA和GQA）上，于LAMBADA等基准测试中比较PPL和准确率，INT4量化匹配FP16精度，而秩-32在相同存储下准确率降至0.4%。
limitations: 实验仅覆盖部分模型和任务，可能不适用于所有注意力变体。
理论分析基于softmax Fisher度量，其他注意力机制（如线性注意力）可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 量化在KV缓存压缩中始终优于秩缩减，差距源于softmax注意力下维度移除导致离散注意力失败。

papers.title: TAG-Head: Time-Aligned Graph Head for Plug-and-Play Fine-grained Action Recognition
papers.abstract: Fine-grained human action recognition (FHAR) is challenging because visually similar actions differ by subtle spatio-temporal cues. Many recent systems enhance discriminability with extra modalities (e.g., pose, text, optical flow), but this increases annotation burden and computational cost. We introduce TAG-Head, a lightweight spatio-temporal graph head that upgrades standard 3D backbones (SlowFast, R(2+1)D-34, I3D, etc.) for FHAR using RGB only. Our pipeline first applies a Transformer encoder with learnable 3D positional encodings to the backbone tokens, capturing long-range dependencies across space and time. The resulting features are then refined by a graph in which (i) fully-connected intra-frame edges to resolve subtle appearance differences within frames, and (ii) time-aligned temporal edges that connect features at the same spatial location across frames to stabilise motion cues without over-smoothing. The head is compact (little parameter/FLOP overhead), plug-and-play across backbones, and trained end-to-end with the backbone. Extensive evaluations on FineGym (Gym99 and Gym288) and HAA500 show that TAG-Head sets a new state-of-the-art among RGB-only models and surpasses many recent multimodal approaches (video + pose + text) that rely on privileged information. Ablations disentangle the contributions of the Transformer and the graph topology, and complexity analyses confirm low latency. TAG-Head advances FHAR by explicitly coupling global context with high-resolution spatial interactions and low-variance temporal continuity inside a slim, composable graph head. The simplicity of the design enables straightforward adoption in practical systems that favour RGB-only sensors, while delivering performance gains typically associated with heavier or multimodal models. Code will be released on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: TAG-Head 是一种轻量级时空图头，仅用 RGB 即可提升 3D 骨干网络在细粒度动作识别上的性能，达到新 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 细粒度动作识别中视觉相似动作差异细微，现有方法依赖额外模态（如姿态、文本、光流）增加了标注负担和计算成本，亟需仅用 RGB 的高效方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入额外模态的前提下，利用标准 3D 骨干网络实现细粒度动作识别的高精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 TAG-Head，包含 Transformer 编码器（带可学习 3D 位置编码）捕获长程依赖，以及图模块：帧内全连接边区分外观差异，时间对齐边稳定运动线索。
contributions: 提出轻量级、即插即用的时空图头 TAG-Head，仅用 RGB 即可提升细粒度动作识别性能。
在 FineGym 和 HAA500 上达到 RGB-only 新 SOTA，并超越许多多模态方法。
analysis.experiments: 在 FineGym (Gym99, Gym288) 和 HAA500 上评估，进行了消融实验和复杂度分析。
limitations: 可能对极长视频或复杂场景的泛化能力有限。
Transformer 和图结构的超参数可能需针对不同骨干调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TAG-Head 是一种轻量级时空图头，仅用 RGB 即可提升 3D 骨干网络在细粒度动作识别上的性能，达到新 SOTA。

papers.title: Revisiting Compositionality in Dual-Encoder Vision-Language Models: The Role of Inference
papers.abstract: Dual-encoder Vision-Language Models (VLMs) such as CLIP are often characterized as bag-of-words systems due to their poor performance on compositional benchmarks. We argue that this limitation may stem less from deficient representations than from the standard inference protocol based on global cosine similarity. First, through controlled diagnostic experiments, we show that explicitly enforcing fine-grained region-segment alignment at inference dramatically improves compositional performance without updating pretrained encoders. We then introduce a lightweight transformer that learns such alignments directly from frozen patch and token embeddings. Comparing against full fine-tuning and prior end-to-end compositional training methods, we find that although these approaches improve in-domain retrieval, their gains do not consistently transfer under distribution shift. In contrast, learning localized alignment over frozen representations matches full fine-tuning on in-domain retrieval while yielding substantial improvements on controlled out-of-domain compositional benchmarks. These results identify global embedding matching as a key bottleneck in dual-encoder VLMs and highlight the importance of alignment mechanisms for robust compositional generalization.

analysis.tldr: 双编码器VLM的组合性瓶颈主要来自全局余弦相似度推理协议，而非表征缺陷；通过推理时局部对齐可显著提升组合泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 双编码器VLM（如CLIP）在组合性基准上表现差，常被归因于其词袋式表征，但这一限制是否源于表征本身或推理协议尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 揭示并解决双编码器VLM在组合性任务中性能低下的根本原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过控制实验发现，在推理时强制细粒度区域-片段对齐可大幅提升组合性能，而无需更新预训练编码器；全微调与端到端组合训练方法在域内检索有提升，但在分布偏移下泛化不一致。
analysis.method: 提出一种轻量级Transformer，直接从冻结的patch和token嵌入中学习局部对齐，并在推理时应用。
contributions: 识别全局嵌入匹配是双编码器VLM组合性瓶颈的关键因素。
提出一种轻量级推理时对齐方法，在不更新编码器的情况下匹配全微调性能，并在域外组合基准上显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在组合性基准上进行了受控诊断实验，并与全微调及端到端组合训练方法对比，评估了域内检索和域外分布偏移下的性能。
limitations: 方法依赖预训练编码器的冻结嵌入，可能无法利用编码器微调带来的表征改进。
轻量级Transformer的泛化能力在更复杂或大规模场景下未充分验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 双编码器VLM的组合性瓶颈主要来自全局余弦相似度推理协议，而非表征缺陷；通过推理时局部对齐可显著提升组合泛化。

papers.title: ADD for Multi-Bit Image Watermarking
papers.abstract: As generative models enable rapid creation of high-fidelity images, societal concerns about misinformation and authenticity have intensified. A promising remedy is multi-bit image watermarking, which embeds a multi-bit message into an image so that a verifier can later detect whether the image is generated by someone and further identify the source by decoding the embedded message. Existing approaches often fall short in capacity, resilience to common image distortions, and theoretical justification. To address these limitations, we propose ADD (Add, Dot, Decode), a multi-bit image watermarking method with two stages: learning a watermark to be linearly combined with the multi-bit message and added to the image, and decoding through inner products between the watermarked image and the learned watermark. On the standard MS-COCO benchmark, we demonstrate that for the challenging task of 48-bit watermarking, ADD achieves 100\% decoding accuracy, with performance dropping by at most 2\% under a wide range of image distortions, substantially smaller than the 14\% average drop of state-of-the-art methods. In addition, ADD achieves substantial computational gains, with 2-fold faster embedding and 7.4-fold faster decoding than the fastest existing method. We further provide a theoretical analysis explaining why the learned watermark and the corresponding decoding rule are effective.

analysis.tldr: 提出ADD方法，通过线性组合和点积解码实现高容量、高鲁棒性的多比特图像水印。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成模型可快速创建高保真图像，引发虚假信息和真实性担忧；多比特水印能嵌入消息并溯源，但现有方法在容量、鲁棒性和理论保证上不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种高容量、抗常见图像失真且具有理论依据的多比特图像水印方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在48比特水印任务中解码准确率低，且对图像失真敏感（平均性能下降14%）。
analysis.method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段学习一个水印向量，与多比特消息线性组合后加到图像上；第二阶段通过水印图像与学习水印的内积进行解码。
contributions: 提出ADD方法，在48比特水印任务中实现100%解码准确率，失真下性能下降不超过2%。
实现2倍嵌入加速和7.4倍解码加速，显著快于现有方法。
提供理论分析解释学习水印和解码规则的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在MS-COCO基准上评估48比特水印，ADD达到100%解码准确率，多种失真下性能下降最多2%，而现有方法平均下降14%。
limitations: 摘要未提及对更复杂攻击（如裁剪、JPEG压缩）的鲁棒性。
可能仅适用于特定图像域，泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ADD方法，通过线性组合和点积解码实现高容量、高鲁棒性的多比特图像水印。

papers.title: Anthropogenic Regional Adaptation in Multimodal Vision-Language Model
papers.abstract: While the field of vision-language (VL) has achieved remarkable success in integrating visual and textual information across multiple languages and domains, there is still no dedicated framework for assessing human-centric alignment in vision-language systems. We offer two contributions to address this gap. First, we introduce Anthropogenic Regional Adaptation: a novel paradigm that aims to optimize model relevance to specific regional contexts while ensuring the retention of global generalization capabilities. Second, we present a simple, but effective adaptation method named Geographical-generalization-made-easy (GG-EZ), which utilizes regional data filtering and model merging. Through comprehensive experiments on 3 VL architectures: large vision-language models, text-to-image diffusion models, and vision-language embedding models, and a case study in Southeast Asia (SEA) regional adaptation, we demonstrate the importance of Anthropogenic Regional Adaptation and the effectiveness of GG-EZ, showing 5-15% gains in cultural relevance metrics across SEA while maintaining over 98% of global performance and even occasionally surpassing it. Our findings establish Anthropogenic Regional Alignment as a foundational paradigm towards applicability of multimodal vision-language models in diverse regions and demonstrate a simple-yet-effective baseline method that optimizes regional value alignment while preserving global generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出人类中心区域适应范式GG-EZ，在保持全局性能的同时提升VLM的区域文化相关性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉-语言系统缺乏评估人类中心对齐的框架，导致模型在不同区域文化背景下表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲全局泛化能力的前提下，提升多模态视觉-语言模型对特定区域文化语境的适应性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GG-EZ方法，通过区域数据筛选和模型合并实现区域适应。
contributions: 提出Anthropogenic Regional Adaptation范式，用于优化模型对区域语境的关联性。
提出简单有效的GG-EZ方法，在3种VL架构上验证，在东南亚区域实现5-15%文化相关性提升，同时保持98%以上全局性能。
analysis.experiments: 在3种VL架构（大型视觉-语言模型、文本到图像扩散模型、视觉-语言嵌入模型）上进行实验，并以东南亚区域适应为案例，显示文化相关性指标提升5-15%，全局性能保持98%以上。
limitations: 仅以东南亚为案例，其他区域效果未知。
方法依赖区域数据筛选，数据质量可能影响结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出人类中心区域适应范式GG-EZ，在保持全局性能的同时提升VLM的区域文化相关性。

papers.title: NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Robust AI-Generated Image Detection in the Wild
papers.abstract: This paper presents an overview of the NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Robust AI-Generated Image Detection in the Wild, held in conjunction with the NTIRE workshop at CVPR 2026. The goal of this challenge was to develop detection models capable of distinguishing real images from generated ones in realistic scenarios: the images are often transformed (cropped, resized, compressed, blurred) for practical usage, and therefore, the detection models should be robust to such transformations. The challenge is based on a novel dataset consisting of 108,750 real and 185,750 AI-generated images from 42 generators comprising a large variety of open-source and closed-source models of various architectures, augmented with 36 image transformations. Methods were evaluated using ROC AUC on the full test set, including both transformed and untransformed images. A total of 511 participants registered, with 20 teams submitting valid final solutions. This report provides a comprehensive overview of the challenge, describes the proposed solutions, and can be used as a valuable reference for researchers and practitioners in increasing the robustness of the detection models to real-world transformations.

analysis.tldr: NTIRE 2026挑战赛聚焦于鲁棒性AI生成图像检测，提出新数据集并评估了20个团队的方法。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成图像检测在真实场景中面临图像变换（裁剪、缩放、压缩等）导致的鲁棒性不足问题，现有方法缺乏大规模、多样化的基准测试。
analysis.problem: 开发能够区分真实图像与AI生成图像，并对常见图像变换具有鲁棒性的检测模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含108,750张真实图像和185,750张AI生成图像的数据集，涵盖42个生成器及36种图像变换，通过ROC AUC评估模型在变换和未变换图像上的性能。
contributions: 发布了大规模、多样化的鲁棒AI生成图像检测数据集。
组织了NTIRE 2026挑战赛，提供了20个团队解决方案的全面概述。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有类型的图像变换或生成模型。
挑战赛结果可能受限于参赛团队的方法多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NTIRE 2026挑战赛聚焦于鲁棒性AI生成图像检测，提出新数据集并评估了20个团队的方法。

papers.title: AgentForge: Execution-Grounded Multi-Agent LLM Framework for Autonomous Software Engineering
papers.abstract: Large language models generate plausible code but cannot verify correctness. Existing multi-agent systems simulate execution or leave verification optional. We introduce execution-grounded verification as a first-class principle: every code change must survive sandboxed execution before propagation. We instantiate this principle in AGENTFORGE, a multi-agent framework where Planner, Coder, Tester, Debugger, and Critic agents coordinate through shared memory and a mandatory Docker sandbox. We formalize software engineering with LLMs as an iterative decision process over repository states, where execution feedback provides a stronger supervision signal than next-token likelihood. AGENTFORGE achieves 40.0\% resolution on SWE-BENCH Lite, outperforming single-agent baselines by 26--28 points. Ablations confirm that execution feedback and role decomposition each independently drive performance. The framework is open-source at https://github.com/raja21068/AutoCodeAI.

analysis.tldr: 提出执行验证优先的多智能体框架AgentForge，在SWE-Bench Lite上达40%修复率，比单智能体高26-28点。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成的代码无法自动验证正确性，现有多智能体系统仅模拟执行或使验证可选，缺乏可靠的监督信号。
analysis.problem: 如何让多智能体LLM框架在软件工程任务中利用真实执行反馈进行代码验证与修复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 执行反馈比下一个token似然提供更强的监督信号；角色分解和执行反馈各自独立提升性能。
analysis.method: 提出AgentForge框架，包含Planner、Coder、Tester、Debugger、Critic五个智能体，通过共享内存和强制Docker沙箱执行验证，将软件工程形式化为基于仓库状态的迭代决策过程。
contributions: 提出执行验证优先原则，要求每次代码变更必须通过沙箱执行才能传播。
开源多智能体框架AgentForge，在SWE-Bench Lite上达到40.0%修复率，显著优于单智能体基线。
analysis.experiments: 在SWE-Bench Lite上评估，AgentForge达到40.0%修复率，比单智能体基线高26-28点；消融实验证实执行反馈和角色分解各自独立驱动性能提升。
limitations: 依赖Docker沙箱，可能增加部署复杂性和资源消耗。
未在更大规模或更复杂的软件工程基准上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出执行验证优先的多智能体框架AgentForge，在SWE-Bench Lite上达40%修复率，比单智能体高26-28点。

papers.title: PACO: Proxy-Task Alignment and Online Calibration for On-the-Fly Category Discovery
papers.abstract: On-the-Fly Category Discovery (OCD) requires a model, trained on an offline support set, to recognize known classes while discovering new ones from an online streaming sequence. Existing methods focus heavily on offline training. They aim to learn discriminative representations on the support set so that novel classes can be separated at test time. However, their discovery mechanism at inference is typically reduced to a single threshold. We argue that this paradigm is fundamentally flawed as OCD is not a static classification problem, but a dynamic process. The model must continuously decide 1) whether a sample belongs to a known class, 2) matches an existing novel category, or 3) should initiate a new one. Moreover, prior methods treat the support set as fixed knowledge. They do not update their decision boundaries as new evidence arrives during inference. This leads to unstable and inconsistent category formation. Our experiments confirm these issues. With properly calibrated and adaptive thresholds, substantial improvements can be achieved, even without changing the representation.
