Motivated by this, we propose PACO, a support-set-calibrated, tree-structured online decision framework. The framework models inference as a sequence of hierarchical decisions, including known-class routing, birth-aware novel assignment, and attach-versus-create operations over a dynamic prototype memory. Furthermore, we simulate the proxy discovery process to initialize the thresholds during offline training to align with inference. Thresholds are continuously updated during inference using mature novel prototypes. Importantly, PACO requires no heavy training and no dataset-specific tuning. It can be directly integrated into existing OCD pipelines as an inference-time module. Extensive experiments show significant improvements over SOTA baselines across seven benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出PACO框架，通过代理任务对齐和在线校准，在动态流式数据中实现类别发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有在线类别发现方法在推理时仅依赖单一阈值，无法适应动态流式数据，导致类别形成不稳定且不一致。
analysis.problem: 解决在线流式类别发现中模型需动态决策样本属于已知类、已有新类或启动新类的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法将推理简化为单一阈值，且不更新决策边界，导致类别形成不稳定；实验表明，即使不改变表征，仅通过校准和自适应阈值即可显著提升性能。
analysis.method: 提出PACO框架，包含支持集校准的树结构在线决策框架，将推理建模为层次化决策序列（已知类路由、新类分配、附着或创建操作），并通过代理发现过程离线初始化阈值，推理时利用成熟新类原型持续更新阈值。
contributions: 提出PACO框架，将在线类别发现建模为层次化在线决策过程，而非静态分类。
引入代理任务对齐和在线校准机制，实现阈值自适应更新。
无需重训练和数据集特定调优，可直接集成到现有OCD流程中。
analysis.experiments: 在七个基准上进行了广泛实验，显著优于现有最先进基线。
limitations: 可能依赖代理发现过程的质量。
树结构决策可能增加推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PACO框架，通过代理任务对齐和在线校准，在动态流式数据中实现类别发现。

papers.title: On the Complexity of the Discussion-based Semantics in Abstract Argumentation
papers.abstract: We show that deciding whether an argument a is stronger than an argument b with respect to the discussion-based semantics of Amgoud and Ben-Naim is decidable in polynomial time. At its core, this problem is about deciding whether, for two vertices in a graph, the number of walks of each length ending in those vertices is the same. We employ results from automata theory and reduce this problem to the equivalence problem for semiring automata. This offers a new perspective on the computational complexity of ranking semantics, an area in which the complexity of many semantics remains open.

analysis.tldr: 论文证明了基于讨论的论证语义可以在多项式时间内判定，核心是图论中路径计数问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 论证语义的计算复杂度是形式论证领域的重要问题，许多语义的复杂度尚未解决，而讨论语义的复杂度此前未知。
analysis.problem: 判定在抽象论证中，基于讨论语义下论证a是否强于论证b的计算复杂度问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将论证强度判定问题转化为图中以每个顶点结束的等长路径数量是否相同的问题，并利用半环自动机的等价性判定来求解。
contributions: 证明了讨论语义下论证强度判定是多项式时间可解的。
通过自动机理论提供了新的复杂度分析视角，可能推广到其他排名语义。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对特定讨论语义，未涵盖其他排名语义。
理论结果，缺乏实际应用验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文证明了基于讨论的论证语义可以在多项式时间内判定，核心是图论中路径计数问题。

papers.title: OOM-RL: Out-of-Money Reinforcement Learning Market-Driven Alignment for LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: The alignment of Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) for autonomous software engineering is constrained by evaluator epistemic uncertainty. Current paradigms, such as Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) and AI Feedback (RLAIF), frequently induce model sycophancy, while execution-based environments suffer from adversarial "Test Evasion" by unconstrained agents. In this paper, we introduce an objective alignment paradigm: \textbf{Out-of-Money Reinforcement Learning (OOM-RL)}. By deploying agents into the non-stationary, high-friction reality of live financial markets, we utilize critical capital depletion as an un-hackable negative gradient. Our longitudinal 20-month empirical study (July 2024 -- February 2026) chronicles the system's evolution from a high-turnover, sycophantic baseline to a robust, liquidity-aware architecture. We demonstrate that the undeniable ontological consequences of financial loss forced the MAS to abandon overfitted hallucinations in favor of the \textbf{Strict Test-Driven Agentic Workflow (STDAW)}, which enforces a Byzantine-inspired uni-directional state lock (RO-Lock) anchored to a deterministically verified $\geq 95\%$ code coverage constraint matrix. Our results show that while early iterations suffered severe execution decay, the final OOM-RL-aligned system achieved a stable equilibrium with an annualized Sharpe ratio of 2.06 in its mature phase. We conclude that substituting subjective human preference with rigorous economic penalties provides a robust methodology for aligning autonomous agents in high-stakes, real-world environments, laying the groundwork for generalized paradigms where computational billing acts as an objective physical constraint

analysis.tldr: 提出OOM-RL，利用金融市场资本惩罚作为不可篡改的负梯度来对齐LLM多智能体系统，迫使智能体放弃谄媚和过拟合，转向严格测试驱动的鲁棒工作流。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MAS对齐方法（如RLHF/RLAIF）存在评估者认知不确定性，易导致模型谄媚；基于执行的环境则面临对抗性测试规避。需要一种客观、不可篡改的对齐范式。
analysis.problem: 如何利用客观经济惩罚（而非主观人类反馈）来对齐LLM多智能体系统，使其在真实高风险环境中产生鲁棒行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 早期迭代遭受严重执行衰减，但最终对齐系统达到稳定均衡，成熟阶段年化夏普比率为2.06。
analysis.method: 将智能体部署到实时金融市场，利用资本枯竭作为不可篡改的负梯度；引入严格测试驱动智能体工作流（STDAW），包含拜占庭启发的单向状态锁（RO-Lock），锚定到确定性验证的≥95%代码覆盖率约束矩阵。
contributions: 提出OOM-RL，一种基于经济惩罚的客观对齐范式。
通过20个月纵向实证研究展示了系统从高换手谄媚基线到鲁棒流动性感知架构的演化。
证明了经济惩罚迫使MAS放弃过拟合幻觉，转向严格测试驱动的工作流。
analysis.experiments: 20个月纵向实证研究（2024年7月至2026年2月），最终系统成熟阶段年化夏普比率2.06。
limitations: 仅适用于可量化为经济惩罚的场景。
金融市场环境可能不直接迁移到其他领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OOM-RL，利用金融市场资本惩罚作为不可篡改的负梯度来对齐LLM多智能体系统，迫使智能体放弃谄媚和过拟合，转向严格测试驱动的鲁棒工作流。

papers.title: Degradation-Aware and Structure-Preserving Diffusion for Real-World Image Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Real-world image super-resolution is particularly challenging for diffusion models because real degradations are complex, heterogeneous, and rarely modeled explicitly. We propose a degradation-aware and structure-preserving diffusion framework for real-world SR. Specifically, we introduce Degradation-aware Token Injection, which encodes lightweight degradation statistics from low-resolution inputs and fuses them with semantic conditioning features, enabling explicit degradation-aware restoration. We further propose Spatially Asymmetric Noise Injection, which modulates diffusion noise with local edge strength to better preserve structural regions during training. Both modules are lightweight add-ons to the adopted diffusion SR framework, requiring only minor modifications to the conditioning pipeline. Experiments on DIV2K and RealSR show that our method delivers competitive no-reference perceptual quality and visually more realistic restoration results than recent baselines, while maintaining a favorable perception--distortion trade-off. Ablations confirm the effectiveness of each module and their complementary gains when combined. The code and model are publicly available at https://github.com/jiyang0315/DASP-SR.git.

analysis.tldr: 提出退化感知与结构保持的扩散框架，通过退化感知令牌注入和空间非对称噪声注入提升真实图像超分辨率质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实图像超分辨率中退化复杂且异构，现有扩散模型难以显式建模退化，导致恢复效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何让扩散模型在真实图像超分辨率中显式感知退化并保持结构细节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 真实退化复杂且异构，现有方法未显式建模；结构区域在扩散过程中易被破坏。
analysis.method: 提出退化感知令牌注入（编码低分辨率退化统计并与语义特征融合）和空间非对称噪声注入（根据局部边缘强度调制扩散噪声）两个轻量模块。
contributions: 提出退化感知令牌注入，显式编码退化信息并融合到条件特征中。
提出空间非对称噪声注入，根据边缘强度保护结构区域。
在DIV2K和RealSR上取得竞争性无参考感知质量和更真实的恢复结果。
analysis.experiments: 在DIV2K和RealSR数据集上评估，与近期基线相比在无参考感知质量和感知-失真权衡上表现更好，消融实验验证了各模块有效性。
limitations: 可能对极端退化泛化能力有限
轻量模块可能无法处理高度复杂的退化组合
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出退化感知与结构保持的扩散框架，通过退化感知令牌注入和空间非对称噪声注入提升真实图像超分辨率质量。

papers.title: Beyond Model Design: Data-Centric Training and Self-Ensemble for Gaussian Color Image Denoising
papers.abstract: This paper presents our solution to the NTIRE 2026 Image Denoising Challenge (Gaussian color image denoising at fixed noise level $σ= 50$). Rather than proposing a new restoration backbone, we revisit the performance boundary of the mature Restormer architecture from two complementary directions: stronger data-centric training and more complete Test-Time capability release. Starting from the public Restormer $σ\!=\!50$ baseline, we expand the standard multi-dataset training recipe with larger and more diverse public image corpora and organize optimization into two stages. At inference, we apply $\times 8$ geometric self-ensemble to further release model capacity. A TLC-style local inference wrapper is retained for implementation consistency; however, systematic ablation reveals its quantitative contribution to be negligible in this setting. On the challenge validation set of 100 images, our final submission achieves 30.762 dB PSNR and 0.861 SSIM, improving over the public Restormer $σ\!=\!50$ pretrained baseline by up to 3.366 dB PSNR. Ablation studies show that the dominant gain originates from the expanded training corpus and the two-stage optimization schedule, and self-ensemble provides marginal but consistent improvement.

analysis.tldr: 通过数据增强训练和自集成提升高斯彩色图像去噪性能，无需新模型架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像去噪方法多聚焦于新模型设计，但成熟架构（如Restormer）的性能边界尚未被充分探索，数据利用和推理策略的优化空间值得研究。
analysis.problem: 在不改变模型架构的前提下，如何通过数据增强训练和测试时自集成进一步提升高斯彩色图像去噪的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用数据中心的训练策略：扩展多数据集训练配方（更大更多样的公共图像语料库），组织两阶段优化；推理时使用×8几何自集成，并保留TLC风格局部推理包装器。
contributions: 提出数据中心的训练策略，通过扩大训练语料和两阶段优化显著提升Restormer基线性能。
验证了自集成在固定噪声水平下的边际但一致的改进效果。
analysis.experiments: 在NTIRE 2026挑战验证集（100张图像）上，最终提交达到30.762 dB PSNR和0.861 SSIM，相比公开Restormer基线提升3.366 dB PSNR。消融实验表明主要增益来自扩展训练语料和两阶段优化。
limitations: 方法仅针对固定噪声水平σ=50，未验证其他噪声水平。
自集成带来的提升较小，且TLC包装器贡献可忽略。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过数据增强训练和自集成提升高斯彩色图像去噪性能，无需新模型架构。

papers.title: From Attribution to Action: A Human-Centered Application of Activation Steering
papers.abstract: Explainable AI (XAI) methods reveal which features influence model predictions, yet provide limited means for practitioners to act on these explanations. Activation steering of components identified via XAI offers a path toward actionable explanations, although its practical utility remains understudied. We introduce an interactive workflow combining SAE-based attribution with activation steering for instance-level analysis of concept usage in vision models, implemented as a web-based tool. Based on this workflow, we conduct semi-structured expert interviews (N=8) with debugging tasks on CLIP to investigate how practitioners reason about, trust, and apply activation steering. We find that steering enables a shift from inspection to intervention-based hypothesis testing (8/8 participants), with most grounding trust in observed model responses rather than explanation plausibility alone (6/8). Participants adopted systematic debugging strategies dominated by component suppression (7/8) and highlighted risks including ripple effects and limited generalization of instance-level corrections. Overall, activation steering renders interpretability more actionable while raising important considerations for safe and effective use.

analysis.tldr: 将SAE归因与激活引导结合，通过用户研究验证其从解释到干预的实用价值。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可解释AI方法仅揭示特征影响，但缺乏让实践者基于解释采取行动的手段，激活引导虽提供路径但实用效用研究不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计并验证一个结合归因与激活引导的交互工作流，使实践者能有效进行实例级概念分析并采取干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于SAE归因与激活引导的交互工作流，实现为网页工具，并通过半结构化专家访谈（N=8）评估其效用。
contributions: 提出结合SAE归因与激活引导的交互工作流，支持实例级概念分析。
通过用户研究揭示激活引导使解释从观察转向干预假设检验，并发现用户信任基于模型响应而非解释合理性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 用户研究样本量较小（N=8），可能不具广泛代表性。
仅针对CLIP模型和调试任务，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将SAE归因与激活引导结合，通过用户研究验证其从解释到干预的实用价值。

papers.title: SLALOM: Simulation Lifecycle Analysis via Longitudinal Observation Metrics for Social Simulation
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents offer a potentially-transformative path forward for generative social science but face a critical crisis of validity. Current simulation evaluation methodologies suffer from the "stopped clock" problem: they confirm that a simulation reached the correct final outcome while ignoring whether the trajectory leading to it was sociologically plausible. Because the internal reasoning of LLMs is opaque, verifying the "black box" of social mechanisms remains a persistent challenge. In this paper, we introduce SLALOM (Simulation Lifecycle Analysis via Longitudinal Observation Metrics), a framework that shifts validation from outcome verification to process fidelity. Drawing on Pattern-Oriented Modeling (POM), SLALOM treats social phenomena as multivariate time series that must traverse specific SLALOM gates, or intermediate waypoint constraints representing distinct phases. By utilizing Dynamic Time Warping (DTW) to align simulated trajectories with empirical ground truth, SLALOM offers a quantitative metric to assess structural realism, helping to differentiate plausible social dynamics from stochastic noise and contributing to more robust policy simulation standards.

analysis.tldr: 提出SLALOM框架，通过过程保真度验证替代结果验证，解决LLM社会模拟的“停钟”问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM社会模拟评估存在“停钟”问题，即只关注最终结果正确性而忽略过程合理性，且LLM内部推理不透明，难以验证社会机制。
analysis.problem: 如何评估LLM社会模拟中过程轨迹的社会学合理性，而不仅仅是最终结果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前评估方法存在“停钟”问题，即模拟可能偶然达到正确结果但过程不合理，且LLM黑箱特性使得机制验证困难。
analysis.method: 提出SLALOM框架，基于模式导向建模（POM），将社会现象视为多元时间序列，通过SLALOM门（中间路径约束）和动态时间规整（DTW）对齐模拟轨迹与经验真实数据，量化结构现实主义。
contributions: 提出SLALOM框架，将社会模拟验证从结果验证转向过程保真度。
引入SLALOM门和DTW对齐方法，提供定量指标评估结构现实主义。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的经验真实数据作为对齐基准。
SLALOM门的设计可能需要领域专家知识。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SLALOM框架，通过过程保真度验证替代结果验证，解决LLM社会模拟的“停钟”问题。

papers.title: Three Roles, One Model: Role Orchestration at Inference Time to Close the Performance Gap Between Small and Large Agents
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents show promise on realistic tool-use tasks, but deploying capable agents on modest hardware remains challenging. We study whether inference-time scaffolding alone, without any additional training compute, can improve the performance of a small model in complex multi-step environments. Operating on a single 24GB GPU, we evaluate Qwen3-8B on the AppWorld benchmark under both full-precision and 4-bit quantized configurations. Without any intervention, the raw model achieves just 5.4% (FP16) and 3.0% (AWQ) task goal completion. Guided by a systematic failure mode analysis, we introduce a three-tier inference scaffolding pipeline that deploys the same frozen model in three distinct roles: (1) a summarization model that preserves critical artifacts (tokens, credentials, API responses) while compressing dialogue history; (2) the main agent model that reasons over the compressed context; and (3) an isolated correction model that reviews and revises the agent's code output without access to conversation history, breaking repetitive failure loops. Applied to the same unmodified model, this scaffolding yields 8.9% (FP16) and 5.9% (AWQ) task goal completion, roughly doubling performance in both settings, with particularly strong gains on difficulty-1 tasks (15.8% to 26.3% FP16; 5.3% to 14.0% AWQ). On full-precision inference, our scaffolded 8B model surpasses DeepSeek-Coder 33B Instruct (7.1%) from the original AppWorld evaluation, demonstrating that structured inference-time interventions can make small models competitive with systems 4 times their size. We formalize the approach as a scaffolded policy over a frozen base model, three invocations of the same weights with different conditioning, drawing connections to test-time compute scaling and action-space shaping in reinforcement learning.

analysis.tldr: 通过推理时角色编排，无需额外训练即可将8B小模型性能提升至超越33B大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 部署大语言模型代理到有限硬件上仍具挑战，小模型在复杂多步任务中性能不足，而现有方法多依赖额外训练或更大模型。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练计算的前提下，仅通过推理时结构化干预提升小模型在复杂工具使用任务中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 原始8B模型在AppWorld基准上任务完成率极低（FP16仅5.4%），失败模式包括上下文压缩丢失关键信息、重复错误循环等。
analysis.method: 提出三阶段推理脚手架：同一冻结模型扮演三个角色——摘要模型（压缩历史保留关键工件）、主代理模型（基于压缩上下文推理）、修正模型（隔离审查代码输出打破错误循环）。
contributions: 提出仅通过推理时角色编排即可显著提升小模型性能的方法，无需额外训练。
在AppWorld上使8B模型性能超越33B模型，验证了结构化推理干预的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在AppWorld基准上评估Qwen3-8B，FP16和4-bit量化配置下任务完成率分别从5.4%和3.0%提升至8.9%和5.9%，难度-1任务上从15.8%提升至26.3%（FP16）。
limitations: 方法在更高难度任务上的增益可能有限，摘要未提供详细分析。
脚手架设计依赖人工失败模式分析，可能难以自动泛化到新环境。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过推理时角色编排，无需额外训练即可将8B小模型性能提升至超越33B大模型。

papers.title: Escaping the Context Bottleneck: Active Context Curation for LLM Agents via Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle with long-horizon tasks due to the "context bottleneck" and the "lost-in-the-middle" phenomenon, where accumulated noise from verbose environments degrades reasoning over multi-turn interactions. To address this issue, we introduce a symbiotic framework that decouples context management from task execution. Our architecture pairs a lightweight, specialized policy model, ContextCurator, with a powerful frozen foundation model, TaskExecutor. Trained via reinforcement learning, ContextCurator actively reduces information entropy in the working memory. It aggressively prunes environmental noise while preserving reasoning anchors, that is, sparse data points that are critical for future deductions. On WebArena, our framework improves the success rate of Gemini-3.0-flash from 36.4% to 41.2% while reducing token consumption by 8.8% (from 47.4K to 43.3K). On DeepSearch, it achieves a 57.1% success rate, compared with 53.9%, while reducing token consumption by a factor of 8. Remarkably, a 7B ContextCurator matches the context management performance of GPT-4o, providing a scalable and computationally efficient paradigm for autonomous long-horizon agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出主动上下文管理框架ContextCurator，通过强化学习训练轻量策略模型为LLM Agent动态裁剪噪声、保留推理锚点，提升长程任务成功率并大幅降低token消耗。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在长程任务中面临上下文瓶颈和中间丢失问题，冗长环境中的累积噪声严重削弱多轮交互推理能力，现有方法缺乏高效的上下文管理机制。
analysis.problem: 如何为LLM Agent主动管理工作记忆，在保留关键推理信息的同时有效剪枝环境噪声，以提升长程任务性能并降低计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM存在上下文瓶颈和中间丢失现象，即冗长上下文中的噪声累积会降低推理质量，且关键推理锚点稀疏分布。
analysis.method: 提出共生框架，将上下文管理与任务执行解耦：轻量策略模型ContextCurator通过强化学习训练，主动减少工作记忆中的信息熵，激进剪枝环境噪声并保留推理锚点；冻结的基础模型TaskExecutor负责任务执行。
contributions: 提出主动上下文管理范式，将上下文管理从任务执行中解耦，实现高效的长程Agent推理。
通过强化学习训练轻量策略模型，在WebArena和DeepSearch上显著提升成功率并大幅降低token消耗，7B模型匹配GPT-4o的上下文管理性能。
analysis.experiments: 在WebArena上将Gemini-3.0-flash的成功率从36.4%提升至41.2%，token消耗降低8.8%；在DeepSearch上成功率从53.9%提升至57.1%，token消耗降低8倍。
limitations: 框架依赖预训练的任务执行模型，可能无法直接迁移到其他基础模型。
主动剪枝策略可能在某些场景下误删关键信息，需进一步验证鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出主动上下文管理框架ContextCurator，通过强化学习训练轻量策略模型为LLM Agent动态裁剪噪声、保留推理锚点，提升长程任务成功率并大幅降低token消耗。

papers.title: Low-rank Optimization Trajectories Modeling for LLM RLVR Acceleration
papers.abstract: Recently, scaling reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) for large language models (LLMs) has emerged as an effective training paradigm for significantly improving model capabilities, which requires guiding the model to perform extensive exploration and learning, leading to substantial computational overhead and becoming a key challenge. To reduce the number of training steps, Prior work performs linear extrapolation of model parameters. However, the dynamics of model parameter updates during RLVR training remain insufficiently understood. To further investigate the evolution of LLMs during RLVR training, we conduct empirical experiments and find that the rank-1 subspace of the model does not evolve linearly, and its dominance over the original parameters is further amplified during LoRA training. Based on the above insights, we propose the \textbf{N}onlinear \textbf{Ext}rapolation of low-rank trajectories (\textbf{NExt}), a novel framework that models and extrapolates low-rank parameter trajectories in a nonlinear manner. Concretely, we first train the model using LoRA and extract the rank-1 subspace of parameter differences at multiple training steps, which is then used for the subsequent nonlinear extrapolation. Afterward, we utilized the extracted rank-1 subspace to train a predictor, which can model the trajectory of parameter updates during RLVR, and then perform the predict-extend process to extrapolate model parameters, achieving the acceleration of RLVR. To further study and understand NExt, we conduct comprehensive experiments that demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the method. Our method reduces computational overhead by approximately 37.5\% while remaining compatible with a wide range of RLVR algorithms and tasks. We release our code in https://github.com/RUCAIBox/NExt.

analysis.tldr: 提出NExt框架，通过非线性外推低秩参数轨迹加速LLM的RLVR训练，减少约37.5%计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR训练需要大量探索和学习，计算开销巨大；现有线性外推方法忽略了参数更新的非线性动态，加速效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何建模并外推LLM在RLVR训练中的低秩参数轨迹，以减少训练步数、降低计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现模型秩1子空间演化是非线性的，且在LoRA训练中其主导性被放大。
analysis.method: NExt：先用LoRA训练并提取多步参数差的秩1子空间，再训练预测器建模轨迹，最后通过预测-扩展过程外推参数。
contributions: 揭示RLVR训练中参数更新的非线性低秩动态。
提出NExt框架，通过非线性外推低秩轨迹加速RLVR，减少约37.5%计算开销。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖LoRA训练的有效性。
外推精度可能受预测器能力限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NExt框架，通过非线性外推低秩参数轨迹加速LLM的RLVR训练，减少约37.5%计算开销。

papers.title: HuiYanEarth-SAR: A Foundation Model for High-Fidelity and Low-Cost Global Remote Sensing Imagery Generation
papers.abstract: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imagery generation is essential for deepening the study of scattering mechanisms, establishing trustworthy electromagnetic scene models, and fundamentally alleviating the data scarcity bottleneck that constrains development in this field. However, existing methods find it difficult to simultaneously ensure high fidelity in both global geospatial semantics and microscopic scattering mechanisms, resulting in severe challenges for global generation. To address this, we propose \textbf{HuiYanEarth-SAR}, the first foundational SAR imagery generation model based on AlphaEarth and integrated scattering mechanisms. By injecting geospatial priors to control macroscopic structures and utilizing implicit scattering characteristic modeling to ensure the authenticity of microscopic textures, we achieve the capability of generating high-fidelity SAR images for global locations solely based on geographic coordinates. This study not only constructs an efficient SAR scene simulator but also establishes a bridge connecting geography, scatter mechanism, and artificial intelligence from a methodological standpoint. It advances SAR research by expanding the paradigm from perception and understanding to simulation and creation, providing key technical support for constructing a high-confidence digital twin of the Earth.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个基于散射机制与地理先验的SAR图像生成基础模型，实现全球任意坐标的高保真SAR图像生成。
analysis.research_motivation: SAR图像生成对散射机制研究、电磁场景建模及缓解数据稀缺至关重要，但现有方法难以同时保证全局地理语义和微观散射机制的高保真度。
analysis.problem: 现有方法无法同时保证SAR图像在全局地理空间语义和微观散射机制上的高保真度，导致全球生成效果不佳。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于AlphaEarth和集成散射机制，注入地理先验控制宏观结构，利用隐式散射特性建模确保微观纹理真实性，实现仅凭地理坐标生成高保真SAR图像。
contributions: 提出首个基于散射机制和地理先验的SAR图像生成基础模型HuiYanEarth-SAR。
实现仅凭地理坐标即可生成全球任意位置的高保真SAR图像。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖地理先验数据的质量和覆盖范围。
隐式散射建模的泛化性可能受限于训练数据多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个基于散射机制与地理先验的SAR图像生成基础模型，实现全球任意坐标的高保真SAR图像生成。

papers.title: A Lightweight Transformer for Pain Recognition from Brain Activity
papers.abstract: Pain is a multifaceted and widespread phenomenon with substantial clinical and societal burden, making reliable automated assessment a critical objective. This paper presents a lightweight transformer architecture that fuses multiple fNIRS representations through a unified tokenization mechanism, enabling joint modeling of complementary signal views without requiring modality-specific adaptations or increasing architectural complexity. The proposed token-mixing strategy preserves spatial, temporal, and time-frequency characteristics by projecting heterogeneous inputs onto a shared latent representation, using a structured segmentation scheme to control the granularity of local aggregation and global interaction. The model is evaluated on the AI4Pain dataset using stacked raw waveform and power spectral density representations of fNIRS inputs. Experimental results demonstrate competitive pain recognition performance while remaining computationally compact, making the approach suitable for real-time inference on both GPU and CPU hardware.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级Transformer融合多视角fNIRS表征用于疼痛识别，兼顾性能与计算效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 疼痛评估具有重要临床价值，但现有方法依赖复杂模型或特定模态适配，难以实现实时、轻量化的自动评估。
analysis.problem: 如何设计轻量级架构有效融合fNIRS信号的多视角表征（时空、时频等），在保持高识别性能的同时支持实时推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出轻量级Transformer，通过统一token化机制融合多个fNIRS表征（原始波形和功率谱密度），采用结构化分割方案控制局部聚合与全局交互的粒度，无需模态特定适配。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级Transformer架构，通过统一token化融合多视角fNIRS表征，降低计算复杂度。
在AI4Pain数据集上验证了该方法在GPU和CPU上的实时推理能力，并取得有竞争力的疼痛识别性能。
analysis.experiments: 在AI4Pain数据集上使用堆叠原始波形和功率谱密度表征进行评估，结果显示模型在保持计算紧凑的同时达到有竞争力的疼痛识别性能。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上评估，泛化性待验证。
未与其他轻量级方法进行详细对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级Transformer融合多视角fNIRS表征用于疼痛识别，兼顾性能与计算效率。

papers.title: Think Before you Write: QA-Guided Reasoning for Character Descriptions in Books
papers.abstract: Character description generation is an important capability for narrative-focused applications such as summarization, story analysis, and character-driven simulations. However, generating accurate character descriptions from long-form narratives (e.g., novels) is challenging: models must track evolving attributes (e.g., relationships and events), integrate evidence scattered across the text, and infer implicit details. Despite the success of reasoning-enabled LLMs on many benchmarks, we find that for character description generation their performance improves when built-in reasoning is disabled (i.e., an empty reasoning trace). Motivated by this, we propose a training framework that decouples reasoning from generation. Our approach, which can be applied on top of long-context LLMs or chunk-based methods, consists of a reasoning model that produces a structured QA reasoning trace and a generation model that conditions on this trace to produce the final character description. Experiments on two datasets (BookWorm and CroSS) show that QA-guided reasoning improves faithfulness, informativeness, and grounding over strong long-context baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出QA引导推理框架，将推理与生成解耦，提升长篇小说角色描述生成的忠实度和信息量。
analysis.research_motivation: 长篇叙事中角色描述生成面临属性追踪、证据分散和隐含细节推断等挑战，现有推理增强LLM在禁用内置推理时表现更好，表明需要更有效的推理方式。
analysis.problem: 如何从长篇叙事文本中生成准确、忠实且信息丰富的角色描述。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现对于角色描述生成任务，启用内置推理的LLM性能反而下降，而禁用推理（空推理轨迹）时表现更好。
analysis.method: 提出解耦推理与生成的训练框架：推理模型生成结构化QA推理轨迹，生成模型基于该轨迹生成最终角色描述。可应用于长上下文LLM或基于分块的方法。
contributions: 发现角色描述生成中内置推理的负面效应，并提出解耦框架。
提出QA引导推理方法，在BookWorm和CroSS数据集上提升忠实度、信息量和依据性。
analysis.experiments: 在BookWorm和CroSS两个数据集上实验，与强长上下文基线对比，显示QA引导推理在忠实度、信息量和依据性上均有提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量QA数据或推理轨迹的标注。
框架在极长文本或复杂角色关系上的泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出QA引导推理框架，将推理与生成解耦，提升长篇小说角色描述生成的忠实度和信息量。

papers.title: Hardening x402: PII-Safe Agentic Payments via Pre-Execution Metadata Filtering
papers.abstract: AI agents that pay for resources via the x402 protocol embed payment metadata - resource URLs, descriptions, and reason strings - in every HTTP payment request. This metadata is transmitted to the payment server and to the centralised facilitator API before any on-chain settlement occurs; neither party is typically bound by a data processing agreement. We present presidio-hardened-x402, the first open-source middleware that intercepts x402 payment requests before transmission to detect and redact personally identifiable information (PII), enforce declarative spending policies, and block duplicate replay attempts. To evaluate the PII filter, we construct a labeled synthetic corpus of 2,000 x402 metadata triples spanning seven use-case categories, and run a 42-configuration precision/recall sweep across two detection modes (regex, NLP) and five confidence thresholds. The recommended configuration (mode=nlp, min_score=0.4, all entity types) achieves micro-F1 = 0.894 with precision 0.972, at a p99 latency of 5.73ms - well within the 50ms overhead budget. The middleware, corpus, and all experiment code are publicly available at https://github.com/presidio-v/presidio-hardened-x402.

analysis.tldr: 提出 presidio-hardened-x402 中间件，在 x402 支付请求发送前过滤 PII，实现高精度低延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: AI Agent 通过 x402 协议支付时，支付元数据（URL、描述等）会明文传输给支付服务器和中心化 API，双方通常无数据处理协议，存在 PII 泄露风险。
analysis.problem: x402 支付请求中的元数据可能包含个人身份信息（PII），需要在传输前进行检测和脱敏。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发开源中间件 presidio-hardened-x402，在 x402 支付请求传输前拦截，使用正则或 NLP 模式检测并编辑 PII，同时执行消费策略和防重放攻击。
contributions: 首个开源的 x402 支付 PII 过滤中间件，支持检测、编辑、策略执行和防重放。
构建了包含 2000 条元数据三元组的合成语料库，覆盖 7 个用例类别。
通过 42 组配置的精确率/召回率扫描，推荐配置达到 micro-F1=0.894，p99 延迟 5.73ms。
analysis.experiments: 在合成语料库上评估 PII 过滤器，进行 42 组配置的精确率/召回率扫描，推荐配置（mode=nlp, min_score=0.4, all entity types）达到 micro-F1=0.894，精确率 0.972，p99 延迟 5.73ms。
limitations: 仅在合成语料库上评估，真实场景效果未知。
仅针对 x402 协议，其他支付协议未覆盖。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 presidio-hardened-x402 中间件，在 x402 支付请求发送前过滤 PII，实现高精度低延迟。

papers.title: METRO: Towards Strategy Induction from Expert Dialogue Transcripts for Non-collaborative Dialogues
papers.abstract: Developing non-collaborative dialogue agents traditionally requires the manual, unscalable codification of expert strategies. We propose \ours, a method that leverages large language models to autonomously induce both strategy actions and planning logic directly from raw transcripts. METRO formalizes expert knowledge into a Strategy Forest, a hierarchical structure that captures both short-term responses (nodes) and long-term strategic foresight (branches). Experimental results across two benchmarks show that METRO demonstrates promising performance, outperforming existing methods by an average of 9%-10%. Our further analysis not only reveals the success behind METRO (strategic behavioral diversity and foresight), but also demonstrates its robust cross-task transferability. This offers new insights into building non-collaborative agents in a cost-effective and scalable way. Our code is available at https://github.com/Humphrey-0125/METRO.

analysis.tldr: 提出METRO方法，利用大语言模型从专家对话记录中自动归纳策略，构建策略森林，在非协作对话任务中平均提升9%-10%。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统非协作对话代理依赖人工编码专家策略，难以扩展，亟需自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从原始专家对话记录中自动归纳策略动作和规划逻辑，构建非协作对话代理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: METRO利用大语言模型从对话记录中提取策略，构建层次化策略森林，包含短期响应节点和长期战略分支。
contributions: 提出METRO方法，自动从原始对话记录中归纳策略，无需人工编码。
构建策略森林结构，同时捕捉短期响应和长期战略规划。
在多个基准上平均提升9%-10%，并展示跨任务迁移能力。
analysis.experiments: 在两个基准上评估，METRO平均优于现有方法9%-10%，并分析了策略行为多样性和前瞻性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量专家对话记录。
策略森林的构建和推理计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出METRO方法，利用大语言模型从专家对话记录中自动归纳策略，构建策略森林，在非协作对话任务中平均提升9%-10%。

papers.title: Emulating Non-Differentiable Metrics via Knowledge-Guided Learning: Introducing the Minkowski Image Loss
papers.abstract: The ``differentiability gap'' presents a primary bottleneck in Earth system deep learning: since models cannot be trained directly on non-differentiable scientific metrics and must rely on smooth proxies (e.g., MSE), they often fail to capture high-frequency details, yielding ``blurry'' outputs. We develop a framework that bridges this gap using two different methods to deal with non-differentiable functions: the first is to analytically approximate the original non-differentiable function into a differentiable equivalent one; the second is to learn differentiable surrogates for scientific functionals. We formulate the analytical approximation by relaxing discrete topological operations using temperature-controlled sigmoids and continuous logical operators. Conversely, our neural emulator uses Lipschitz-convolutional neural networks to stabilize gradient learning via: (1) spectral normalization to bound the Lipschitz constant; and (2) hard architectural constraints enforcing geometric principles. We demonstrate this framework's utility by developing the Minkowski image loss, a differentiable equivalent for the integral-geometric measures of surface precipitation fields (area, perimeter, connected components). Validated on the EUMETNET OPERA dataset, our constrained neural surrogate achieves high emulation accuracy, completely eliminating the geometric violations observed in unconstrained baselines. However, applying these differentiable surrogates to a deterministic super-resolution task reveals a fundamental trade-off: while strict Lipschitz regularization ensures optimization stability, it inherently over-smooths gradient signals, restricting the recovery of highly localized convective textures. This work highlights the necessity of coupling such topological constraints with stochastic generative architectures to achieve full morphological realism.

analysis.tldr: 提出Minkowski图像损失，通过可微近似和神经代理弥合地球系统深度学习中的不可微指标差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 地球系统深度学习中，模型因不可微科学指标（如面积、周长）无法直接优化，依赖MSE等平滑代理导致输出模糊，缺乏高频细节。
analysis.problem: 如何使深度学习模型能够直接优化非可微的科学度量指标，同时保持训练稳定性和输出形态真实性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两种策略：1）解析近似：用温度控制sigmoid和连续逻辑算子松弛离散拓扑操作；2）神经代理：使用Lipschitz卷积神经网络，通过谱归一化和硬架构约束稳定梯度学习。基于此开发Minkowski图像损失，作为地表降水场积分几何度量（面积、周长、连通分量）的可微等价物。
contributions: 提出Minkowski图像损失，实现非可微科学指标的可微近似。
通过Lipschitz约束和架构设计稳定神经代理训练，消除几何违规。
揭示严格Lipschitz正则化在确定性超分辨率任务中导致过平滑的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在EUMETNET OPERA数据集上验证，约束神经代理达到高仿真精度，完全消除无约束基线中的几何违规。
limitations: 严格Lipschitz正则化在确定性任务中过平滑梯度信号，限制局部对流纹理恢复。
方法可能依赖特定科学指标，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Minkowski图像损失，通过可微近似和神经代理弥合地球系统深度学习中的不可微指标差距。

papers.title: Beyond RAG for Cyber Threat Intelligence: A Systematic Evaluation of Graph-Based and Agentic Retrieval
papers.abstract: Cyber threat intelligence (CTI) analysts must answer complex questions over large collections of narrative security reports. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems help language models access external knowledge, but traditional vector retrieval often struggles with queries that require reasoning over relationships between entities such as threat actors, malware, and vulnerabilities. This limitation arises because relevant evidence is often distributed across multiple text fragments and documents. Knowledge graphs address this challenge by enabling structured multi-hop reasoning through explicit representations of entities and relationships. However, multiple retrieval paradigms, including graph-based, agentic, and hybrid approaches, have emerged with different assumptions and failure modes. It remains unclear how these approaches compare in realistic CTI settings and when graph grounding improves performance. We present a systematic evaluation of four RAG architectures for CTI analysis: standard vector retrieval, graph-based retrieval over a CTI knowledge graph, an agentic variant that repairs failed graph queries, and a hybrid approach combining graph queries with text retrieval. We evaluate these systems on 3,300 CTI question-answer pairs spanning factual lookups, multi-hop relational queries, analyst-style synthesis questions, and unanswerable cases. Results show that graph grounding improves performance on structured factual queries. The hybrid graph-text approach improves answer quality by up to 35 percent on multi-hop questions compared to vector RAG, while maintaining more reliable performance than graph-only systems.

analysis.tldr: 系统评估了图检索、智能体检索和混合检索在网络安全威胁情报问答中的效果，发现混合图-文本方法在多跳问题上比向量RAG提升35%。
analysis.research_motivation: 网络安全威胁情报分析需要从大量安全报告中回答复杂问题，传统向量检索难以处理实体间关系推理，而多种检索范式（图、智能体、混合）缺乏系统对比。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估不同RAG架构（向量、图、智能体、混合）在网络安全威胁情报问答中的性能差异及图检索的适用条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建了四种RAG架构：标准向量检索、基于CTI知识图谱的图检索、修复失败图查询的智能体变体、以及图查询与文本检索结合的混合方法，并在3300个CTI问答对上进行评估。
contributions: 首次系统对比了向量、图、智能体和混合四种RAG架构在CTI分析中的性能。
发现混合图-文本方法在多跳问题上比向量RAG提升35%，且比纯图方法更可靠。
analysis.experiments: 在3300个CTI问答对上评估，涵盖事实查询、多跳关系查询、分析师综合问题和不可回答情况。
limitations: 仅针对网络安全领域，可能不适用于其他领域。
未详细说明知识图谱构建质量和覆盖范围的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统评估了图检索、智能体检索和混合检索在网络安全威胁情报问答中的效果，发现混合图-文本方法在多跳问题上比向量RAG提升35%。

papers.title: Efficient Emotion-Aware Iconic Gesture Prediction for Robot Co-Speech
papers.abstract: Co-speech gestures increase engagement and improve speech understanding. Most data-driven robot systems generate rhythmic beat-like motion, yet few integrate semantic emphasis. To address this, we propose a lightweight transformer that derives iconic gesture placement and intensity from text and emotion alone, requiring no audio input at inference time. The model outperforms GPT-4o in both semantic gesture placement classification and intensity regression on the BEAT2 dataset, while remaining computationally compact and suitable for real-time deployment on embodied agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量Transformer，仅从文本和情感预测机器人共语手势的位置与强度，无需音频，性能超GPT-4o。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器人共语手势系统多生成节拍式动作，缺乏语义强调，且依赖音频输入，计算成本高，难以实时部署。
analysis.problem: 如何仅从文本和情感信息高效预测机器人共语手势中具有语义强调的手势位置与强度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出轻量Transformer模型，输入文本和情感，输出手势位置与强度，推理时无需音频。
contributions: 提出首个仅依赖文本和情感进行语义手势预测的轻量Transformer。
在BEAT2数据集上，手势位置分类和强度回归均超越GPT-4o。
analysis.experiments: 在BEAT2数据集上评估，与GPT-4o对比，模型在分类和回归任务上表现更优，且计算紧凑。
limitations: 仅针对英文文本和特定情感标签，可能缺乏跨语言泛化。
未提及对复杂或连续手势序列的建模能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量Transformer，仅从文本和情感预测机器人共语手势的位置与强度，无需音频，性能超GPT-4o。

papers.title: Observe Less, Understand More: Cost-aware Cross-scale Observation for Remote Sensing Understanding
papers.abstract: Remote sensing understanding inherently requires multi-resolution observation, since different targets and application tasks demand different levels of spatial detail. While low-resolution (LR) imagery enables efficient global observation, high-resolution (HR) imagery provides critical local details at much higher acquisition cost and limited coverage. This motivates a cross-scale sensing strategy that selectively acquires HR imagery from LR-based global perception to improve task performance under constrained cost. Existing methods for HR sampling methods typically make selection decisions from isolated LR patches, which ignore fine-grained intra-patch importance and cross-patch contextual interactions, leading to fragmented feature representation and suboptimal scene reasoning under sparse HR observations. To address this issue, we formulate cross-scale remote sensing understanding as a unified cost-aware problem that couples fine-grained HR sampling with cross-patch representation prediction, enabling more effective task reasoning with fewer HR observations. Furthermore, we present GL-10M, a large-scale benchmark of 10 million spatially aligned multi-resolution images, enabling systematic evaluation of budget-constrained cross-scale reasoning in remote sensing. Extensive experiments on recognition and retrieval tasks show that our method consistently achieves a superior performance-cost trade-off.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种成本感知的跨尺度观测方法，通过细粒度HR采样和跨补丁表示预测，在遥感理解中以更少的高分辨率观测实现更优性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感理解需要多分辨率观测，但高分辨率图像获取成本高、覆盖有限，现有方法从孤立低分辨率补丁中采样，忽略了细粒度重要性和跨补丁上下文交互，导致特征碎片化和次优推理。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限成本下，通过选择性获取高分辨率图像来提升遥感理解任务性能，同时解决现有采样方法中特征碎片化和上下文缺失的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将跨尺度遥感理解建模为统一成本感知问题，耦合细粒度HR采样与跨补丁表示预测，实现更有效的任务推理。
contributions: 提出成本感知的跨尺度观测方法，联合优化HR采样和表示预测。
构建GL-10M大规模基准，包含1000万空间对齐的多分辨率图像，用于评估预算约束下的跨尺度推理。
analysis.experiments: 在识别和检索任务上进行了广泛实验，方法在性能-成本权衡上持续优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模对齐数据集，实际部署中获取困难。
方法在极端低预算下的表现未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种成本感知的跨尺度观测方法，通过细粒度HR采样和跨补丁表示预测，在遥感理解中以更少的高分辨率观测实现更优性能。

papers.title: An Uncertainty-Aware Loss Function Incorporating Fuzzy Logic: Application to MRI Brain Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Accurate brain image segmentation, particularly for distinguishing various tissues from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) images, plays a pivotal role in finding the neurological dis ease and medical image computing. In deep learning approaches, loss functions are very crucial for optimizing the model. In this study, we introduce a novel loss function integrating fuzzy logic to deals uncertainty issues in brain image segmentation into various tissues. It integrates the well-known categorical cross-entropy (CCE) loss function and fuzzy entropy based on fuzzy logic. By employing fuzzy logic, this loss function accounts for the inherent uncertainties in pixel classifications. The proposed loss function has been evaluated on two publicly available benchmark datasets, IBSR and OASIS, using two widely recognised architectures, U-Net and U-Net++. Experimental results demonstrate that the trained model with proposed loss function provided better results in comparison to the CCE optimisation function in terms of various performance metrics. Additionally, it effectively enhances segmentation performance while handling meaningful uncer tainty during training. The findings suggest that this approach not only improves segmentation outcomes but also contributes to the reliability of model predictions.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种融合模糊逻辑的不确定性感知损失函数，用于MRI脑图像分割，提升分割性能与可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑图像分割中像素分类存在固有不确定性，传统损失函数（如交叉熵）难以有效处理，影响模型优化与分割精度。
analysis.problem: 如何设计损失函数以在MRI脑图像分割中建模并处理像素分类的不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将模糊熵与分类交叉熵（CCE）结合，构建基于模糊逻辑的损失函数，以量化像素归属的模糊性。
contributions: 提出一种融合模糊逻辑的不确定性感知损失函数，可集成到现有分割架构中。
在IBSR和OASIS数据集上使用U-Net和U-Net++验证，相比CCE损失函数取得更优分割性能。
analysis.experiments: 在IBSR和OASIS两个公开基准数据集上，使用U-Net和U-Net++架构进行实验，与CCE损失函数对比，所提方法在多种性能指标上表现更好。
limitations: 仅针对MRI脑图像分割，泛化到其他模态或任务需进一步验证。
模糊逻辑参数可能需手动调整，缺乏自适应机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种融合模糊逻辑的不确定性感知损失函数，用于MRI脑图像分割，提升分割性能与可靠性。

papers.title: Online Reasoning Video Object Segmentation
papers.abstract: Reasoning video object segmentation predicts pixel-level masks in videos from natural-language queries that may involve implicit and temporally grounded references. However, existing methods are developed and evaluated in an offline regime, where the entire video is available at inference time and future frames can be exploited for retrospective disambiguation, deviating from real-world deployments that require strictly causal, frame-by-frame decisions. We study Online Reasoning Video Object Segmentation (ORVOS), where models must incrementally interpret queries using only past and current frames without revisiting previous predictions, while handling referent shifts as events unfold. To support evaluation, we introduce ORVOSB, a benchmark with frame-level causal annotations and referent-shift labels, comprising 210 videos, 12,907 annotated frames, and 512 queries across five reasoning categories. We further propose a baseline with continually-updated segmentation prompts and a structured temporal token reservoir for long-horizon reasoning under bounded computation. Experiments show that existing methods struggle under strict causality and referent shifts, while our baseline establishes a strong foundation for future research.

analysis.tldr: 提出在线推理视频目标分割任务、基准和基线方法，揭示现有方法在严格因果和指代转移下的不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理视频目标分割方法采用离线模式，依赖未来帧进行回顾性消歧，不符合实际部署中严格因果、逐帧决策的需求。
analysis.problem: 如何在严格因果约束下，仅利用过去和当前帧，增量式地解析自然语言查询并处理指代转移，实现在线推理视频目标分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在严格因果性和指代转移场景下表现不佳，无法处理事件展开过程中的指代变化。
analysis.method: 提出基线方法，包括持续更新的分割提示和结构化时间令牌池，用于在有限计算下进行长程推理。
contributions: 定义了在线推理视频目标分割（ORVOS）任务及其严格因果设定。
构建了ORVOSB基准，包含帧级因果标注和指代转移标签，涵盖210个视频、12907个标注帧和512个查询。
提出基线方法，通过持续更新的分割提示和结构化时间令牌池实现长程推理。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明现有方法在严格因果和指代转移下表现不佳，基线方法为未来研究奠定基础。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基线方法可能在高复杂度场景下计算开销较大。
基准规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有推理类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在线推理视频目标分割任务、基准和基线方法，揭示现有方法在严格因果和指代转移下的不足。

papers.title: Retrieval as Generation: A Unified Framework with Self-Triggered Information Planning
papers.abstract: We revisit retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) by embedding retrieval control directly into generation. Instead of treating retrieval as an external intervention, we express retrieval decisions within token-level decoding, enabling end-to-end coordination without additional controllers or classifiers. Under the paradigm of Retrieval as Generation, we propose \textbf{GRIP} (\textbf{G}eneration-guided \textbf{R}etrieval with \textbf{I}nformation \textbf{P}lanning), a unified framework in which the model regulates retrieval behavior through control-token emission. Central to GRIP is \textit{Self-Triggered Information Planning}, which allows the model to decide when to retrieve, how to reformulate queries, and when to terminate, all within a single autoregressive trajectory. This design tightly couples retrieval and reasoning and supports dynamic multi-step inference with on-the-fly evidence integration. To supervise these behaviors, we construct a structured training set covering answerable, partially answerable, and multi-hop queries, each aligned with specific token patterns. Experiments on five QA benchmarks show that GRIP surpasses strong RAG baselines and is competitive with GPT-4o while using substantially fewer parameters.

analysis.tldr: GRIP将检索控制嵌入生成过程，通过自触发信息规划实现端到端协调，在多个QA基准上超越强RAG基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统RAG将检索视为外部干预，需要额外控制器或分类器，导致检索与生成之间协调不足，限制了端到端优化。
analysis.problem: 如何将检索决策直接融入生成过程，实现检索与推理的紧密耦合，并支持动态多步推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GRIP框架，通过控制令牌发射在自回归轨迹中决定何时检索、如何重构查询以及何时终止，实现自触发信息规划。
contributions: 提出Retrieval as Generation范式，将检索控制嵌入令牌级解码。
构建结构化训练集，覆盖可回答、部分可回答和多跳查询，并对应特定令牌模式。
analysis.experiments: 在五个QA基准上实验，GRIP超越强RAG基线，且与GPT-4o竞争力相当但参数更少。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量训练数据构建。
多步推理场景下的效率可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GRIP将检索控制嵌入生成过程，通过自触发信息规划实现端到端协调，在多个QA基准上超越强RAG基线。

papers.title: One Scale at a Time: Scale-Autoregressive Modeling for Fluid Flow Distributions
papers.abstract: Analyzing unsteady fluid flows often requires access to the full distribution of possible temporal states, yet conventional PDE solvers are computationally prohibitive and learned time-stepping surrogates quickly accumulate error over long rollouts. Generative models avoid compounding error by sampling states independently, but diffusion and flow-matching methods, while accurate, are limited by the cost of many evaluations over the entire mesh. We introduce scale-autoregressive modeling (SAR) for sampling flows on unstructured meshes hierarchically from coarse to fine: it first generates a low-resolution field, then refines it by progressively sampling higher resolutions conditioned on coarser predictions. This coarse-to-fine factorization improves efficiency by concentrating computation at coarser scales, where uncertainty is greatest, while requiring fewer steps at finer scales. Across unsteady-flow benchmarks of varying complexity, SAR attains substantially lower distributional error and higher per-sample accuracy than state-of-the-art diffusion models based on multi-scale GNNs, while matching or surpassing a flow-matching Transolver (a linear-time transformer) yet running 2-7x faster than this depending on the task. Overall, SAR provides a practical tool for fast and accurate estimation of statistical flow quantities (e.g., turbulent kinetic energy and two-point correlations) in real-world settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出尺度自回归建模（SAR），通过从粗到细的分层采样高效生成非定常流场分布。
analysis.research_motivation: 非定常流分析需要完整的状态分布，但传统PDE求解器计算昂贵，学习型时间步进代理在长轨迹中误差累积，而扩散/流匹配方法虽准确但需在整个网格上进行多次评估，成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且准确地从非定常流分布中采样，避免误差累积并降低计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 粗尺度不确定性最大，需要更多计算；细尺度不确定性较小，可减少采样步数。
analysis.method: 尺度自回归建模（SAR）：在非结构化网格上从粗到细分层生成流场，先生成低分辨率场，然后以粗预测为条件逐步采样更高分辨率。
contributions: 提出尺度自回归建模（SAR）用于非定常流分布采样，实现从粗到细的高效生成。
在多个非定常流基准上，SAR比基于多尺度GNN的扩散模型取得更低的分布误差和更高的单样本精度，且比流匹配Transolver快2-7倍。
analysis.experiments: 在多个不同复杂度的非定常流基准上评估，与基于多尺度GNN的扩散模型和流匹配Transolver对比，SAR在分布误差和单样本精度上更优，速度提升2-7倍。
limitations: 可能依赖于网格层次结构的设计，对非层次化网格需额外处理。
仅针对流体流分布，泛化到其他物理场需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出尺度自回归建模（SAR），通过从粗到细的分层采样高效生成非定常流场分布。

papers.title: Scene Change Detection with Vision-Language Representation Learning
papers.abstract: Scene change detection (SCD) is crucial for urban monitoring and navigation but remains challenging in real-world environments due to lighting variations, seasonal shifts, viewpoint differences, and complex urban layouts. Existing methods rely primarily on low-level visual features, limiting their ability to accurately identify changed objects amid the visual complexity of urban scenes. In this paper, we propose LangSCD, a vision-language framework for scene change detection that overcomes this single-modal limitation by incorporating semantic reasoning through language. Our approach introduces a modular language component that leverages vision-language models (VLMs) to generate textual descriptions of scene changes, which are fused with visual features through a cross-modal feature enhancer. We further introduce a geometric-semantic matching module that refines the predicted masks by enforcing semantic consistency and spatial completeness. Existing real-world scene change detection benchmarks provide only binary change annotations, which are insufficient for downstream applications requiring fine-grained understanding of scene dynamics. To address this limitation, we introduce NYC-CD, a large-scale dataset of 8,122 real-world image pairs collected in New York City with multiclass change annotations generated through a semi-automatic pipeline. Extensive experiments across multiple street-view benchmarks demonstrate that our language and matching modules consistently improve existing change-detection architectures, achieving state-of-the-art performance and highlighting the value of integrating linguistic reasoning with visual representations for robust scene change detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出LangSCD框架，利用视觉-语言模型增强场景变化检测，并发布NYC-CD多类变化检测数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 场景变化检测在真实环境中受光照、季节、视角等变化影响大，现有方法依赖低层视觉特征，难以准确识别变化物体。
analysis.problem: 如何利用语言语义推理克服单模态视觉局限，提升场景变化检测的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有基准仅提供二值变化标注，不足以支持需要细粒度理解的后续应用。
analysis.method: 提出LangSCD框架，包含语言模块（利用VLM生成文本描述）、跨模态特征增强器、几何-语义匹配模块，并构建NYC-CD多类标注数据集。
contributions: 提出LangSCD，首个将视觉-语言模型用于场景变化检测的框架，通过语言语义推理提升性能。
发布NYC-CD数据集，包含8,122对真实街景图像及多类变化标注。
在多个街景基准上达到SOTA，验证了语言与视觉融合的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个街景基准上进行实验，所提语言和匹配模块持续改进现有变化检测架构，达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 依赖VLM生成文本的质量和效率。
数据集仅覆盖纽约市，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LangSCD框架，利用视觉-语言模型增强场景变化检测，并发布NYC-CD多类变化检测数据集。

papers.title: GS4City: Hierarchical Semantic Gaussian Splatting via City-Model Priors
papers.abstract: Recent semantic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods primarily rely on 2D foundation models, often yielding ambiguous boundaries and limited support for structured urban semantics. While city models such as CityGML encode hierarchically organized semantics together with building geometry, these labels cannot be directly mapped to Gaussian primitives. We present GS4City, a hierarchical semantic Gaussian Splatting method that incorporates city-model priors for urban scene understanding. GS4City derives reliable image-aligned masks from Level of Detail (LoD) 3 CityGML models via two-pass raycasting, explicitly using parent-child relations to validate and recover fine-grained facade elements. It then fuses these geometry-grounded masks with foundation-model predictions to establish scene-consistent instance correspondences, and learns a compact identity encoding for each Gaussian under joint 2D identity supervision and 3D spatial regularization. Experiments on the TUM2TWIN and Gold Coast datasets show that GS4City effectively incorporates structured building semantics into Gaussian scene representations, outperforming existing 2D-driven semantic 3DGS baselines, including LangSplat and Gaga, by up to 15.8 IoU points in coarse building segmentation and 14.2 mIoU points in fine-grained semantic segmentation. By bridging structured city models and photorealistic Gaussian scene representations, GS4City enables semantically queryable and structure-aware urban reconstruction. Code is available at https://github.com/Jinyzzz/GS4City.

analysis.tldr: GS4City利用城市模型先验实现层次化语义高斯泼溅，显著提升城市场景语义分割精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语义3DGS方法依赖2D基础模型，导致边界模糊且缺乏结构化城市语义支持；城市模型（如CityGML）虽包含层次化语义和几何信息，但无法直接映射到高斯原语。
analysis.problem: 如何将结构化城市模型先验融入3D高斯泼溅，实现层次化语义城市场景理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 2D基础模型预测的语义边界模糊，城市模型标签无法直接用于高斯原语。
analysis.method: 通过两遍光线追踪从LoD3 CityGML模型生成图像对齐掩码，利用父子关系验证和恢复细粒度立面元素；融合几何掩码与基础模型预测建立场景一致实例对应；学习紧凑身份编码，联合2D身份监督和3D空间正则化。
contributions: 提出GS4City，首个将城市模型先验融入层次化语义高斯泼溅的方法。
设计两遍光线追踪策略从CityGML生成可靠图像对齐掩码。
在TUM2TWIN和Gold Coast数据集上，粗粒度建筑分割提升15.8 IoU，细粒度语义分割提升14.2 mIoU。
analysis.experiments: 在TUM2TWIN和Gold Coast数据集上评估，与LangSplat、Gaga等基线相比，粗粒度建筑分割IoU提升15.8，细粒度语义分割mIoU提升14.2。
limitations: 依赖CityGML模型可用性，可能限制泛化到无城市模型区域。
两遍光线追踪计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GS4City利用城市模型先验实现层次化语义高斯泼溅，显著提升城市场景语义分割精度。

papers.title: EagleVision: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Cross-Domain Perception in High-Speed Autonomous Racing
papers.abstract: High-speed autonomous racing presents extreme perception challenges, including large relative velocities and substantial domain shifts from conventional urban-driving datasets. Existing benchmarks do not adequately capture these high-dynamic conditions. We introduce EagleVision, a unified LiDAR-based multi-task benchmark for 3D detection and trajectory prediction in high-speed racing, providing newly annotated 3D bounding boxes for the Indy Autonomous Challenge dataset (14,893 frames) and the A2RL Real competition dataset (1,163 frames), together with 12,000 simulator-generated annotated frames, all standardized under a common evaluation protocol. Using a dataset-centric transfer framework, we quantify cross-domain generalization across urban, simulator, and real racing domains. Urban pretraining improves detection over scratch training (NDS 0.72 vs. 0.69), while intermediate pretraining on real racing data achieves the best transfer to A2RL (NDS 0.726), outperforming simulator-only adaptation. For trajectory prediction, Indy-trained models surpass in-domain A2RL training on A2RL test sequences (FDE 0.947 vs. 1.250), highlighting the role of motion-distribution coverage in cross-domain forecasting. EagleVision enables systematic study of perception generalization under extreme high-speed dynamics. The dataset and benchmark are publicly available at https://avlab.io/EagleVision

analysis.tldr: EagleVision 是一个面向高速自动驾驶赛车的多任务 LiDAR 基准，包含新标注的真实与仿真数据，并系统评估了跨域感知泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 高速自动驾驶赛车面临极端感知挑战，如大相对速度和显著的域偏移，而现有基准无法充分捕捉这些高动态条件。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一的多任务基准来评估高速赛车场景下的 3D 检测和轨迹预测的跨域泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 城市预训练优于从头训练；真实赛车数据中间预训练比仅用仿真适应效果更好；Indy 训练模型在 A2RL 测试序列上轨迹预测优于域内训练，表明运动分布覆盖对跨域预测的重要性。
analysis.method: 构建统一的 LiDAR 多任务基准，包含新标注的真实数据（Indy 14,893 帧、A2RL 1,163 帧）和 12,000 帧仿真数据，并采用数据集为中心的迁移框架量化跨域泛化。
contributions: 提出了 EagleVision，首个面向高速自动驾驶赛车的统一 LiDAR 多任务基准，包含新标注的真实和仿真数据。
系统量化了城市、仿真和真实赛车域之间的跨域泛化，揭示了运动分布覆盖对轨迹预测的关键作用。
analysis.experiments: 在 3D 检测任务上，城市预训练 NDS 0.72 vs. 从头训练 0.69；真实赛车数据中间预训练在 A2RL 上 NDS 0.726，优于仅仿真适应。轨迹预测任务上，Indy 训练模型在 A2RL 测试序列上 FDE 0.947 vs. 域内训练 1.250。
limitations: 仅基于 LiDAR 模态，未涉及相机或其他传感器。
数据集规模相对较小，尤其是真实赛车数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EagleVision 是一个面向高速自动驾驶赛车的多任务 LiDAR 基准，包含新标注的真实与仿真数据，并系统评估了跨域感知泛化。

papers.title: Reasoning Resides in Layers: Restoring Temporal Reasoning in Video-Language Models with Layer-Selective Merging
papers.abstract: Multimodal adaptation equips large language models (LLMs) with perceptual capabilities, but often weakens the reasoning ability inherited from language-only pretraining. This trade-off is especially pronounced in video-language models (VLMs), where visual alignment can impair temporal reasoning (TR) over sequential events. We propose MERIT, a training-free, task-driven model merging framework for restoring TR in VLMs. MERIT searches over layer-wise self-attention merging recipes between a VLM and its paired text-only backbone using an objective that improves TR while penalizing degradation in temporal perception (TP). Across three representative VLMs and multiple challenging video benchmarks, MERIT consistently improves TR, preserves or improves TP, and generalizes beyond the search set to four distinct benchmarks. It also outperforms uniform full-model merging and random layer selection, showing that effective recovery depends on selecting the right layers. Interventional masking and frame-level attribution further show that the selected layers are disproportionately important for reasoning and shift model decisions toward temporally and causally relevant evidence. These results show that targeted, perception-aware model merging can effectively restore TR in VLMs without retraining.

analysis.tldr: 提出MERIT框架，通过层选择性合并恢复视频语言模型的时间推理能力，无需重新训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态适配会削弱LLM继承的推理能力，尤其在视频语言模型中，视觉对齐可能损害时间推理，现有方法需重新训练或全模型合并效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练的情况下，恢复视频语言模型中被视觉对齐削弱的时间推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出视觉对齐会损害时间推理，且不同层对推理的重要性不同，选择性合并特定层比全模型合并更有效。
analysis.method: MERIT：一种无训练、任务驱动的模型合并框架，通过搜索VLM与其纯文本骨干之间的逐层自注意力合并配方，优化目标为提升时间推理同时惩罚时间感知退化。
contributions: 提出MERIT框架，无需训练即可恢复VLM的时间推理能力。
通过实验证明选择性层合并优于全模型合并和随机层选择，且所选层对推理至关重要。
analysis.experiments: 在三个代表性VLM和多个视频基准上测试，MERIT一致提升时间推理，保持或提升时间感知，并泛化到四个未见基准。
limitations: 仅针对时间推理任务，可能不适用于其他推理类型。
搜索层合并配方可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MERIT框架，通过层选择性合并恢复视频语言模型的时间推理能力，无需重新训练。

papers.title: Video-based Heart Rate Estimation with Angle-guided ROI Optimization and Graph Signal Denoising
papers.abstract: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables non-contact heart rate measurement from facial videos, but its performance is significantly degraded by facial motions such as speaking and head shaking. To address this issue, we propose two plug-and-play modules. The Angle-guided ROI Adaptive Optimization module quantifies ROI-Camera angles to refine motion-affected signals and capture global motion, while the Multi-region Joint Graph Signal Denoising module jointly models intra- and inter-regional ROI signals using graph signal processing to suppress motion artifacts. The modules are compatible with reflection model-based rPPG methods and validated on three public datasets. Results show that jointly use markedly reduces MAE, with an average decrease of 20.38\% over the baseline, while ablation studies confirm the effectiveness of each module. The work demonstrates the potential of angle-guided optimization and graph-based denoising to enhance rPPG performance in motion scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出角度引导ROI优化与图信号去噪模块，提升运动场景下视频心率估计精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）可从面部视频无接触测量心率，但面部运动（如说话、摇头）会严重降低性能，现有方法对运动伪影的鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何抑制面部运动对rPPG心率估计的干扰，提高运动场景下的测量精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 面部运动导致ROI信号受运动伪影污染，传统方法难以有效分离运动与生理信号。
analysis.method: 提出两个即插即用模块：角度引导ROI自适应优化模块（量化ROI-相机角度以修正运动影响信号并捕获全局运动）和多区域联合图信号去噪模块（利用图信号处理联合建模区域内和区域间ROI信号以抑制运动伪影）。
contributions: 提出角度引导ROI自适应优化模块，通过量化ROI-相机角度来优化运动影响信号。
提出多区域联合图信号去噪模块，利用图信号处理联合建模多区域ROI信号以抑制运动伪影。
在三个公共数据集上验证，联合使用两个模块使MAE平均降低20.38%，且模块即插即用兼容反射模型类rPPG方法。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公共数据集上进行了实验，与基线方法对比，联合使用两个模块使MAE平均降低20.38%，消融实验证实了每个模块的有效性。
limitations: 可能对极端运动或遮挡场景鲁棒性有限。
模块计算开销未在摘要中提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出角度引导ROI优化与图信号去噪模块，提升运动场景下视频心率估计精度。

papers.title: Beyond Reconstruction: Reconstruction-to-Vector Diffusion for Hyperspectral Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: While Hyperspectral Anomaly Detection (HAD) excels at identifying sparse targets in complex scenes, existing models remain trapped in a scalar "reconstruction-as-endpoint" paradigm. This reliance on ambiguous scalar residuals consistently triggers sub-pixel anomaly vanishing during spatial downsampling, alongside severe confirmation bias when unpurified anomalies corrupt training weights. In this paper, we propose Reconstruction-to-Vector Diffusion (R2VD), which fundamentally redefines reconstruction as a manifold purification origin to establish a novel residual-guided generative dynamics paradigm. Our framework introduces a four-stage pipeline: (1) a Physical Prior Extraction (PPE) stage that mitigates early confirmation bias via dual-stream statistical guidance; (2) a Guided Manifold Purification (GMP) stage utilizing an OmniContext Autoencoder (OCA) to extract purified residual maps while preserving fragile sub-pixel topologies; (3) a Residual Score Modeling (RSM) stage where a Diffusion Transformer (DiT), guarded by a Physical Spectral Firewall (PSF), effectively isolates cross-spectral leakage; and (4) a Vector Dynamics Inference (VDI) stage that robustly decouples targets from backgrounds by evaluating high-dimensional vector interference patterns instead of conventional scalar errors. Comprehensive evaluations on eight datasets confirm that R2VD establishes a new state-of-the-art, delivering exceptional target detectability and background suppression. The code is available at https://github.com/Bondojijun/R2VD.

analysis.tldr: 提出R2VD框架，将高光谱异常检测从标量残差重构范式转向向量扩散生成范式，实现SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有高光谱异常检测方法受限于标量重构范式，导致亚像素异常消失和确认偏差问题，亟需新范式。
analysis.problem: 解决高光谱异常检测中亚像素异常消失和确认偏差问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出标量残差重构导致亚像素异常在空间下采样时消失，且未纯化的异常污染训练权重引发确认偏差。
analysis.method: 提出四阶段R2VD框架：物理先验提取、引导流形纯化、残差分数建模、向量动力学推理。
contributions: 提出重构到向量扩散的新范式，将重构视为流形纯化起点。
设计四阶段流水线，包括物理先验提取、OmniContext自编码器、扩散变压器和向量动力学推理。
在八个数据集上实现SOTA，提升目标可检测性和背景抑制。
analysis.experiments: 在八个数据集上进行了全面评估，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量物理先验。
四阶段流水线计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出R2VD框架，将高光谱异常检测从标量残差重构范式转向向量扩散生成范式，实现SOTA。

papers.title: ConvFormer3D-TAP: Phase/Uncertainty-Aware Front-End Fusion for Cine CMR View Classification Pipelines
papers.abstract: Reliable recognition of standard cine cardiac MRI views is essential because each view determines which cardiac anatomy is visualized and which quantitative analyses can be performed. Incorrect view identification, whether by a human reader or an automated deep learning system, can propagate errors into segmentation, volumetric assessment, strain analysis, and valve evaluation. However, accurate view classification remains challenging under routine clinical variability in scanner vendor, acquisition protocol, motion artifacts, and plane prescription. We present ConvFormer3D-TAP, a cine-specific spatiotemporal architecture that integrates 3D convolutional tokenization with multiscale self-attention. The model is trained using masked spatiotemporal reconstruction and uncertainty-weighted multi-clip fusion to enhance robustness across cardiac phases and ambiguous temporal segments. The design captures complementary cues: local anatomical structure through convolutional priors and long-range cardiac-cycle dynamics through hierarchical attention. On a cohort of 150,974 clinically acquired cine sequences spanning six standard cine cardiac MRI views, ConvFormer3D-TAP achieved 96% validation accuracy with per-class F1-scores >= 0.94 and strong calibration (ECE = 0.025; Brier = 0.040). Error analysis shows that residual confusions are concentrated in anatomically adjacent long-axis and LVOT/AV view pairs, consistent with intrinsic prescription overlap. These results support ConvFormer3D-TAP as a scalable front-end for view routing, filtering and quality control in end-to-end cMRI workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出ConvFormer3D-TAP，一种融合3D卷积与多尺度自注意力的时空架构，用于电影心脏MRI视图分类，在15万序列上达到96%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 心脏MRI视图分类是下游定量分析的基础，但临床变异性（如扫描仪厂商、运动伪影）导致准确分类困难，现有方法鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 在临床常规变异性下，实现鲁棒且准确的电影心脏MRI视图分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 错误集中在解剖相邻的视图对（如长轴与LVOT/AV），表明分类混淆源于固有的平面处方重叠。
analysis.method: 提出ConvFormer3D-TAP架构，使用3D卷积标记化与多尺度自注意力，结合掩码时空重建预训练和不确定性加权多片段融合。
contributions: 提出一种针对电影心脏MRI的时空架构，融合3D卷积与自注意力以捕获局部解剖和长程心脏周期动态。
采用掩码时空重建和不确定性加权多片段融合策略，提升对心脏相位和模糊时间段的鲁棒性。
在15万临床序列上验证，达到96%准确率，校准良好，并分析了错误模式。
analysis.experiments: 在150,974个临床获取的电影序列上评估，涵盖六种标准视图，达到96%验证准确率，每类F1>=0.94，ECE=0.025，Brier=0.040。
limitations: 仅在单一模态（电影心脏MRI）上验证，泛化到其他MRI序列或模态需进一步研究。
错误分析显示相邻视图仍有混淆，可能需结合额外解剖先验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ConvFormer3D-TAP，一种融合3D卷积与多尺度自注意力的时空架构，用于电影心脏MRI视图分类，在15万序列上达到96%准确率。

papers.title: ComSim: Building Scalable Real-World Robot Data Generation via Compositional Simulation
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in foundational models, such as large language models and world models, have greatly enhanced the capabilities of robotics, enabling robots to autonomously perform complex tasks. However, acquiring large-scale, high-quality training data for robotics remains a challenge, as it often requires substantial manual effort and is limited in its coverage of diverse real-world environments. To address this, we propose a novel hybrid approach called Compositional Simulation, which combines classical simulation and neural simulation to generate accurate action-video pairs while maintaining real-world consistency. Our approach utilizes a closed-loop real-sim-real data augmentation pipeline, leveraging a small amount of real-world data to generate diverse, large-scale training datasets that cover a broader spectrum of real-world scenarios. We train a neural simulator to transform classical simulation videos into real-world representations, improving the accuracy of policy models trained in real-world environments. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our method significantly reduces the sim2real domain gap, resulting in higher success rates in real-world policy model training. Our approach offers a scalable solution for generating robust training data and bridging the gap between simulated and real-world robotics.

analysis.tldr: 提出组合仿真方法，结合经典仿真与神经仿真生成大规模真实机器人训练数据，缩小sim2real差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人训练数据获取成本高、覆盖真实场景有限，现有仿真数据与真实环境存在域差距。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成大规模、高质量、真实一致的机器人训练数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 组合仿真：结合经典仿真和神经仿真，通过闭环实-仿-实数据增强流水线，利用少量真实数据训练神经仿真器将经典仿真视频转换为真实表示。
contributions: 提出组合仿真方法，融合经典仿真与神经仿真生成动作-视频对。
设计闭环实-仿-实数据增强流水线，利用少量真实数据生成多样化大规模训练集。
实验证明该方法显著缩小sim2real域差距，提高真实策略模型训练成功率。
analysis.experiments: 通过大量实验证明方法显著缩小sim2real域差距，提高真实策略模型训练成功率。
limitations: 可能依赖少量真实数据的质量。
神经仿真器的泛化能力可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出组合仿真方法，结合经典仿真与神经仿真生成大规模真实机器人训练数据，缩小sim2real差距。

papers.title: From Agent Loops to Structured Graphs:A Scheduler-Theoretic Framework for LLM Agent Execution
papers.abstract: The dominant paradigm for building LLM based agents is the Agent Loop, an iterative cycle where a single language model decides what to do next by reading an ever growing context window. This paradigm has three structural weaknesses: implicit dependencies between steps, unbounded recovery loops, and mutable execution history that complicates debugging. We characterize the Agent Loop as a single ready unit scheduler: at any moment, at most one executable unit is active, and the choice of which unit to activate comes from opaque LLM inference rather than an inspectable policy. This perspective places Agent Loops and graph based execution engines on a single semantic continuum. We propose SGH, Structured Graph Harness, which lifts control flow from implicit context into an explicit static DAG. SGH makes three commitments: execution plans are immutable within a plan version, planning execution and recovery are separated into three layers, and recovery follows a strict escalation protocol. These choices trade some expressiveness for controllability, verifiability, and implementability. Our contributions are fourfold: a scheduler unified framework that applies classical scheduling theory to LLM agent execution and identifies challenges introduced by non deterministic LLM nodes; a trade off analysis of controllability, expressiveness, and implementability across 70 surveyed systems; a formal specification including a node state machine with termination and soundness guarantees; and an attributable experimental framework with a seven group design for future validation. This is a position paper and design proposal. We provide a theoretical framework, design analysis, and experimental protocol, not a production implementation or empirical results.

analysis.tldr: 提出将LLM Agent执行从循环范式转向结构化DAG的调度理论框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前基于Agent Loop的LLM Agent存在隐式依赖、无界恢复循环和可变执行历史等结构缺陷，缺乏可控性和可调试性。
analysis.problem: 如何将LLM Agent执行从隐式、不可控的循环范式转变为显式、可验证的结构化执行框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SGH（Structured Graph Harness）框架，将控制流从隐式上下文提升为显式静态DAG，分离规划、执行和恢复三层，并采用严格升级协议。
contributions: 提出统一调度框架，将经典调度理论应用于LLM Agent执行，识别非确定性LLM节点带来的挑战。
对70个系统进行可控性、表达性和可实现性的权衡分析。
提供包含节点状态机及终止性和可靠性保证的形式化规范。
设计七组实验协议用于未来验证。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 本文为立场论文和设计提案，缺乏生产实现和实证结果。
框架可能牺牲部分表达性以换取可控性和可验证性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将LLM Agent执行从循环范式转向结构化DAG的调度理论框架。

papers.title: From Redaction to Restoration: Deep Learning for Medical Image Anonymization and Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Removing patient-specific information from medical images is crucial to enable sharing and open science without compromising patient identities. However, many methods currently used for deidentification have negative effects on downstream image analysis tasks because of removal of relevant but non-identifiable information. This work presents an end-to-end deep learning framework for transforming raw clinical image volumes into de-identified, analysis-ready datasets without compromising downstream utility. The methodology developed and tested in this work first detects and redacts regions likely to contain protected health information (PHI), such as burned-in text and metadata, and then uses a generative deep learning model to inpaint the redacted areas with anatomically and imaging plausible content. The proposed pipeline leverages a lightweight hybrid architecture, combining CRNN-based redaction with a latent-diffusion inpainting restoration module (Stable Diffusion 2). We evaluate the approach using both privacy-oriented metrics, which quantify residual PHI and success of redaction, and image-quality and task-based metrics, which assess the fidelity of restored volumes for representative deep learning applications. Our results suggest that the proposed method yields de-identified medical images that are visually coherent, maintaining fidelity for downstream models, while substantially reducing the risk of patient re-identification. By automating anonymization and image reconstruction within a single workflow, and dissemination of large-scale medical imaging collections, thereby lowering a key barrier to data sharing and multi-institutional collaboration in medical imaging AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出端到端深度学习框架，先检测并遮盖医学图像中的患者隐私信息，再用扩散模型修复，实现去隐私化且保持下游分析可用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像共享需去除患者隐私信息，但现有去标识方法常移除有用信息，损害下游分析性能，亟需一种既能保护隐私又不影响图像可用性的自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在去除医学图像中患者特定信息（如烧录文本、元数据）的同时，保持图像在解剖和成像上的合理性，并确保下游分析任务不受影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出端到端深度学习流水线：先用基于CRNN的检测模块定位并遮盖可能包含受保护健康信息（PHI）的区域，再用基于潜在扩散模型（Stable Diffusion 2）的修复模块生成解剖和成像上合理的内容填充遮盖区域。
contributions: 提出首个端到端深度学习框架，同时实现医学图像去隐私化和修复重建。
结合CRNN检测与潜在扩散修复，在保护隐私的同时保持图像质量和下游任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 使用隐私导向指标（量化残留PHI和遮盖成功率）以及图像质量和任务导向指标（评估修复体积对代表性深度学习应用的保真度）进行评价。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂或罕见解剖结构修复效果有限。
依赖预训练扩散模型，计算资源需求较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出端到端深度学习框架，先检测并遮盖医学图像中的患者隐私信息，再用扩散模型修复，实现去隐私化且保持下游分析可用性。

papers.title: What Do Vision-Language Models Encode for Personalized Image Aesthetics Assessment?
papers.abstract: Personalized image aesthetics assessment (PIAA) is an important research problem with practical real-world applications. While methods based on vision-language models (VLMs) are promising candidates for PIAA, it remains unclear whether they internally encode rich, multi-level aesthetic attributes required for effective personalization. In this paper, we first analyze the internal representations of VLMs to examine the presence and distribution of such aesthetic attributes, and then leverage them for lightweight, individual-level personalization without model fine-tuning. Our analysis reveals that VLMs encode diverse aesthetic attributes that propagate into the language decoder layers. Building on these representations, we demonstrate that simple linear models can perform PIAA effectively. We further analyze how aesthetic information is transferred across layers in different VLM architectures and across image domains. Our findings provide insights into how VLMs can be utilized for modeling subjective, individual aesthetic preferences. Our code is available at https://github.com/ynklab/vlm-latent-piaa.

analysis.tldr: 分析VLM内部表征中美学属性的分布，并利用线性模型实现轻量级个性化图像美学评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 个性化图像美学评估（PIAA）具有实际应用价值，但现有基于VLM的方法是否编码了足够丰富的多级美学属性尚不清楚，且通常需要模型微调，成本高。
analysis.problem: 探究VLM内部是否编码了可用于个性化美学评估的多级美学属性，并利用这些属性实现无需微调的轻量级个性化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM编码了多样化的美学属性，这些属性会传播到语言解码器层；不同VLM架构和图像域中美学信息的跨层传递方式不同。
analysis.method: 分析VLM内部表征中美学属性的存在与分布，然后使用简单线性模型（基于这些表征）进行个性化美学评估，无需模型微调。
contributions: 首次分析VLM内部表征中美学属性的存在与分布，揭示其编码了多级美学属性。
提出利用VLM内部表征的线性模型实现轻量级个性化美学评估，无需微调。
分析不同VLM架构和图像域中美学信息的跨层传递规律。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于线性模型，可能无法捕捉复杂非线性偏好。
分析局限于特定VLM架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 分析VLM内部表征中美学属性的分布，并利用线性模型实现轻量级个性化图像美学评估。

papers.title: Minimal Embodiment Enables Efficient Learning of Number Concepts in Robot
papers.abstract: Robots are increasingly entering human-interactive scenarios that require understanding of quantity. How intelligent systems acquire abstract numerical concepts from sensorimotor experience remains a fundamental challenge in cognitive science and artificial intelligence. Here we investigate embodied numerical learning using a neural network model trained to perform sequential counting through naturalistic robotic interaction with a Franka Panda manipulator. We demonstrate that embodied models achieve 96.8\% counting accuracy with only 10\% of training data, compared to 60.6\% for vision-only baselines. This advantage persists when visual-motor correspondences are randomized, indicating that embodiment functions as a structural prior that regularizes learning rather than as an information source. The model spontaneously develops biologically plausible representations: number-selective units with logarithmic tuning, mental number line organization, Weber-law scaling, and rotational dynamics encoding numerical magnitude ($r = 0.97$, slope $= 30.6°$/count). The learning trajectory parallels children's developmental progression from subset-knowers to cardinal-principle knowers. These findings demonstrate that minimal embodiment can ground abstract concepts, improve data efficiency, and yield interpretable representations aligned with biological cognition, which may contribute to embodied mathematics tutoring and safety-critical industrial applications.

analysis.tldr: 机器人通过最小具身化学习数字概念，数据效率高且表征与生物认知一致。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人进入人机交互场景需要理解数量，但智能系统如何从感觉运动经验中获取抽象数字概念是认知科学和AI的基本挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何通过具身化实现机器人高效学习数字概念。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 具身化作为结构先验正则化学习，而非信息源；模型自发发展出生物合理的表征（如对数调谐、心理数字线、韦伯定律缩放）。
analysis.method: 使用神经网络模型在Franka Panda机械臂上进行自然交互式顺序计数训练，对比视觉基线。
contributions: 证明最小具身化可显著提高数据效率（10%数据达96.8%准确率 vs 视觉基线60.6%）。
发现具身化作为结构先验而非信息源，且模型自发发展出与生物认知一致的表征。
analysis.experiments: 在Franka Panda机械臂上进行计数任务，对比视觉基线，并随机化视觉-运动对应关系验证具身化作用。
limitations: 仅涉及简单计数任务，未测试更复杂数学概念。
具身化机制的具体神经实现细节未完全揭示。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 机器人通过最小具身化学习数字概念，数据效率高且表征与生物认知一致。

papers.title: Sparse Autoencoder Decomposition of Clinical Sequence Model Representations: Feature Complexity, Task Specialisation, and Mortality Prediction
papers.abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have been applied to large language models and protein language models, but not systematically to electronic health record (EHR) foundation models. We train TopK SAEs on FlatASCEND, a 14.5-million-parameter autoregressive clinical sequence model, at all 10 residual stream extraction points on INSPECT (outpatient) and MIMIC-IV (ICU). SAE decomposition reveals progressive abstraction across transformer depth: layer-0 features are near-perfect token detectors (45.7% singleton), while layer-6 features span approximately 30 token types across multiple clinical categories (0.5% singleton). Under full-sequence simple linear probes, SAE features outperform dense representations for discrete event prediction (mortality) while dense representations outperform for continuous magnitude prediction (length of stay) - a probe-level representational phenomenon that does not extend to clinically relevant leakage-safe windows, where dense representations match or exceed SAE features across all tested settings (eICU-CRD 48-hour AUC: SAE 0.871 versus dense 0.880; base model zero-shot, SAE dictionaries trained on eICU activations; MIMIC-IV: 0.836 versus 0.914; INSPECT 1-year/3-year: 0.697 versus 0.800).
