A delta-mode intervention method reduces SAE perturbation noise by 86x, enabling cleaner feature-level experiments, though the resulting perturbation effects are larger than random controls in 3 of 4 conditions but not formally significant. Feature reproducibility across random seeds is 21%, and individual features should be interpreted as illustrative rather than stable.

analysis.tldr: 首次将稀疏自编码器应用于EHR基础模型，揭示临床序列模型表示中的特征复杂度与任务特异性，但SAE特征在死亡率预测中未优于密集表示。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）已成功应用于大语言模型和蛋白质语言模型，但尚未系统应用于电子健康记录（EHR）基础模型，而EHR模型在临床预测中具有重要应用价值。
analysis.problem: 探索SAE在EHR基础模型中的分解效果，分析特征随深度的抽象变化，并评估SAE特征在临床预测任务中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SAE分解揭示了跨Transformer深度的渐进抽象：浅层特征近乎完美检测单个token，深层特征跨多个临床类别覆盖约30种token类型。在完整序列线性探针下，SAE特征在离散事件预测（死亡率）上优于密集表示，但在连续量预测（住院时长）上不如；但在临床相关的泄露安全窗口下，密集表示在所有设置中匹配或超过SAE特征。
analysis.method: 在FlatASCEND（1450万参数自回归临床序列模型）的所有10个残差流提取点训练TopK稀疏自编码器，并在INSPECT和MIMIC-IV数据集上进行分解。
contributions: 首次系统地将SAE应用于EHR基础模型，揭示了特征随深度从单token检测到多类别抽象的渐进复杂度。
发现SAE特征与密集表示在不同预测任务（离散vs连续）和不同窗口（完整序列vs泄露安全）下的表现差异。
提出delta-mode干预方法，将SAE扰动噪声降低86倍，但特征可重复性仅21%。
analysis.experiments: 在INSPECT（门诊）、MIMIC-IV（ICU）和eICU-CRD数据集上评估死亡率预测和住院时长预测，使用线性探针和泄露安全窗口设置。摘要未提供完整实验细节。
limitations: 特征可重复性仅21%，单个特征应视为说明性而非稳定。
delta-mode干预的扰动效应在4个条件中3个大于随机对照，但未达到统计显著性。
仅在一个模型（FlatASCEND）上进行实验，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次将稀疏自编码器应用于EHR基础模型，揭示临床序列模型表示中的特征复杂度与任务特异性，但SAE特征在死亡率预测中未优于密集表示。

papers.title: Learning from Contrasts: Synthesizing Reasoning Paths from Diverse Search Trajectories
papers.abstract: Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) has been widely used for automated reasoning data exploration, but current supervision extraction methods remain inefficient. Standard approaches retain only the single highest-reward trajectory, discarding the comparative signals present in the many explored paths. Here we introduce \textbf{Contrastive Reasoning Path Synthesis (CRPS)}, a framework that transforms supervision extraction from a filtering process into a synthesis procedure. CRPS uses a structured reflective process to analyze the differences between high- and low-quality search trajectories, extracting explicit information about strategic pivots and local failure modes. These insights guide the synthesis of reasoning chains that incorporate success patterns while avoiding identified pitfalls. We show empirically that models fine-tuned on just 60K CRPS-synthesized examples match or exceed the performance of baselines trained on 590K examples derived from standard rejection sampling, a 20$\times$ reduction in dataset size. Furthermore, CRPS improves generalization on out-of-domain benchmarks, demonstrating that learning from the contrast between success and failure produces more transferable reasoning capabilities than learning from success alone.

analysis.tldr: 通过对比高低质量搜索轨迹合成推理路径，CRPS 用仅 6 万数据达到基线 59 万数据的性能，数据效率提升 20 倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前 MCTS 用于自动推理数据探索时，监督提取方法低效，仅保留最高奖励轨迹，丢弃了探索路径中的对比信号。
analysis.problem: 如何从 MCTS 搜索轨迹中高效提取监督信号，利用成功与失败路径的对比信息来合成更优的推理数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准方法仅保留单条最高奖励轨迹，忽略了多条探索路径中的比较信号；从成功与失败的对比中学习能产生更可迁移的推理能力。
analysis.method: 提出对比推理路径合成（CRPS）框架，通过结构化反思过程分析高低质量搜索轨迹的差异，提取策略转折点和局部失败模式，并据此合成融合成功模式且避免已知陷阱的推理链。
contributions: 提出 CRPS 框架，将监督提取从过滤过程转变为合成过程，利用对比信号生成推理数据。
实验表明，仅用 6 万 CRPS 合成样本即可匹配或超越基线用 59 万拒绝采样样本的性能，数据效率提升 20 倍，并提升域外泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个推理基准上微调模型，比较 CRPS 合成数据与标准拒绝采样数据的性能，并评估域外泛化。
limitations: 可能依赖 MCTS 搜索质量，对搜索策略敏感。
合成过程可能引入噪声，需进一步验证鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过对比高低质量搜索轨迹合成推理路径，CRPS 用仅 6 万数据达到基线 59 万数据的性能，数据效率提升 20 倍。

papers.title: The Missing Knowledge Layer in Cognitive Architectures for AI Agents
papers.abstract: The two most influential cognitive architecture frameworks for AI agents, CoALA [21] and JEPA [12], both lack an explicit Knowledge layer with its own persistence semantics. This gap produces a category error: systems apply cognitive decay to factual claims, or treat facts and experiences with identical update mechanics. We survey persistence semantics across existing memory systems and identify eight convergence points, from Karpathy's LLM Knowledge Base [10] to the BEAM benchmark's near-zero contradiction-resolution scores [22], all pointing to related architectural gaps. We propose a four-layer decom position (Knowledge, Memory, Wisdom, Intelligence) where each layer has fundamentally different persistence semantics: indefinite supersession, Ebbinghaus decay, evidence-gated revision, and ephemeral inference respectively. Companion implementations in Python and Rust demonstrate the architectural separation is feasible. We borrow terminology from cognitive science as a useful analogy (the Knowledge/Memory distinction echoes Tulving's trichotomy), but our layers are engineering constructs justified by persistence-semantics requirements, not by neural architecture. We argue that these distinctions demand distinct persistence semantics in engineering implementations, and that no current framework or system provides this.

analysis.tldr: 论文指出当前AI智能体认知架构缺少显式的知识层，并提出四层分解架构以区分不同的持久化语义。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有认知架构（如CoALA和JEPA）缺乏显式的知识层，导致系统对事实性声明应用认知衰减或将事实与经验用相同更新机制处理，造成分类错误，限制了AI智能体的可靠性和可解释性。
analysis.problem: 当前认知架构缺少具有独立持久化语义的知识层，导致事实性知识与经验性记忆混淆，无法正确管理不同信息的更新和保留策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过调研现有记忆系统（如Karpathy的LLM知识库、BEAM基准的零矛盾解决分数）识别出八个收敛点，均指向架构中知识层的缺失。
analysis.method: 提出四层分解架构（知识、记忆、智慧、智能），每层具有不同的持久化语义：知识层为无限替代，记忆层为艾宾浩斯衰减，智慧层为证据门控修订，智能层为短暂推理。并用Python和Rust实现验证架构分离的可行性。
contributions: 识别并论证了当前认知架构中知识层缺失的问题及其导致的分类错误
提出基于持久化语义的四层分解架构，并给出具体实现
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及用Python和Rust实现验证架构分离的可行性。
limitations: 架构的有效性缺乏大规模实验验证
持久化语义的具体参数（如衰减率）未给出明确指导
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文指出当前AI智能体认知架构缺少显式的知识层，并提出四层分解架构以区分不同的持久化语义。

papers.title: CoRe-ECG: Advancing Self-Supervised Representation Learning for 12-Lead ECG via Contrastive and Reconstructive Synergy
papers.abstract: Accurate interpretation of electrocardiogram (ECG) remains challenging due to the scarcity of labeled data and the high cost of expert annotation. Self-supervised learning (SSL) offers a promising solution by enabling models to learn expressive representations from unlabeled signals. Existing ECG SSL methods typically rely on either contrastive learning or reconstructive learning. However, each approach in isolation provides limited supervisory signals and suffers from additional limitations, including non-physiological distortions introduced by naive augmentations and trivial correlations across multiple leads that models may exploit as shortcuts. In this work, we propose CoRe-ECG, a unified contrastive and reconstructive pretraining paradigm that establishes a synergistic interaction between global semantic modeling and local structural learning. CoRe-ECG aligns global representations during reconstruction, enabling instance-level discriminative signals to guide local waveform recovery. To further enhance pretraining, we introduce Frequency Dynamic Augmentation (FDA) to adaptively perturb ECG signals based on their frequency-domain importance, and Spatio-Temporal Dual Masking (STDM) to break linear dependencies across leads, increasing the difficulty of reconstructive tasks. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple downstream ECG datasets. Ablation studies further demonstrate the necessity and complementarity of each component. This approach provides a robust and physiologically meaningful representation learning framework for ECG analysis.

analysis.tldr: CoRe-ECG通过对比与重建协同学习，结合频率动态增强和时空双掩码，在12导联心电图上实现自监督表征学习SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 心电图标注数据稀缺且专家标注成本高，现有自监督方法（对比或重建）单独使用监督信号有限，且存在非生理失真和导联间虚假相关等局限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种自监督预训练范式，既能学习全局语义又能捕捉局部结构，同时避免现有方法中的非生理失真和导联间捷径。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：对比学习或重建学习单独使用提供的监督信号有限；朴素增强引入非生理失真；多导联间存在模型可能利用的虚假相关。
analysis.method: 提出CoRe-ECG，统一对比与重建预训练范式：在重建过程中对齐全局表示，使实例级判别信号指导局部波形恢复；引入频率动态增强（FDA）根据频域重要性自适应扰动信号；引入时空双掩码（STDM）打破导联间线性依赖，增加重建难度。
contributions: 提出对比与重建协同的自监督预训练框架CoRe-ECG，实现全局语义与局部结构学习。
设计频率动态增强（FDA）和时空双掩码（STDM）两种增强策略，提升预训练效果。
在多个下游ECG数据集上取得SOTA性能，消融实验验证各组件必要性与互补性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个下游ECG数据集上评估，取得SOTA性能；消融实验验证各组件必要性与互补性。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在12导联ECG上验证，对其他类型生物信号泛化性未知。
计算开销可能较大，因涉及对比与重建双重任务及复杂增强。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CoRe-ECG通过对比与重建协同学习，结合频率动态增强和时空双掩码，在12导联心电图上实现自监督表征学习SOTA。

papers.title: LEADER: Learning Reliable Local-to-Global Correspondences for LiDAR Relocalization
papers.abstract: LiDAR relocalization has attracted increasing attention as it can deliver accurate 6-DoF pose estimation in complex 3D environments. Recent learning-based regression methods offer efficient solutions by directly predicting global poses without the need for explicit map storage. However, these methods often struggle in challenging scenes due to their equal treatment of all predicted points, which is vulnerable to noise and outliers. In this paper, we propose LEADER, a robust LiDAR-based relocalization framework enhanced by a simple, yet effective geometric encoder. Specifically, a Robust Projection-based Geometric Encoder architecture which captures multi-scale geometric features is first presented to enhance descriptiveness in geometric representation. A Truncated Relative Reliability loss is then formulated to model point-wise ambiguity and mitigate the influence of unreliable predictions. Extensive experiments on the Oxford RobotCar and NCLT datasets demonstrate that LEADER outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving 24.1% and 73.9% relative reductions in position error over existing techniques, respectively. The source code is released on https://github.com/JiansW/LEADER.

analysis.tldr: 提出LEADER框架，通过几何编码器和截断相对可靠性损失提升LiDAR重定位精度。
analysis.research_motivation: LiDAR重定位在复杂3D环境中至关重要，但现有基于学习的回归方法对所有预测点一视同仁，易受噪声和离群点影响，导致在挑战性场景中性能不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何提高LiDAR重定位在噪声和离群点下的鲁棒性和精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法平等对待所有预测点，导致对噪声和离群点敏感，在复杂场景中表现不佳。
analysis.method: 提出LEADER框架，包含鲁棒投影几何编码器（捕获多尺度几何特征）和截断相对可靠性损失（建模点级模糊性并减轻不可靠预测的影响）。
contributions: 提出鲁棒投影几何编码器，增强几何表示的描述性。
提出截断相对可靠性损失，有效处理点级不确定性。
在Oxford RobotCar和NCLT数据集上实现SOTA，位置误差分别降低24.1%和73.9%。
analysis.experiments: 在Oxford RobotCar和NCLT数据集上进行实验，与现有方法比较，LEADER在位置误差上分别降低24.1%和73.9%。
limitations: 可能对传感器噪声或极端环境（如剧烈光照变化）的鲁棒性未充分验证。
方法依赖投影几何编码器，计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LEADER框架，通过几何编码器和截断相对可靠性损失提升LiDAR重定位精度。

papers.title: LoGo-MR: Screening Breast MRI for Cancer Risk Prediction by Efficient Omni-Slice Modeling
papers.abstract: Efficient and explainable breast cancer (BC) risk prediction is critical for large-scale population-based screening. Breast MRI provides functional information for personalized risk assessment. Yet effective modeling remains challenging as fully 3D CNNs capture volumetric context at high computational cost, whereas lightweight 2D CNNs fail to model inter-slice continuity. Importantly, breast MRI modeling for shor- and long-term BC risk stratification remains underexplored. In this study, we propose LoGo-MR, a 2.5D local-global structural modeling framework for five-year BC risk prediction. Aligned with clinical interpretation, our framework first employs neighbor-slice encoding to capture subtle local cues linked to short-term risk. It then integrates transformer-enhanced multiple-instance learning (MIL) to model distributed global patterns related to long-term risk and provide interpretable slice importance. We further apply this framework across axial, sagittal, and coronal planes as LoGo3-MR to capture complementary volumetric information. This multi-plane formulation enables voxel-level risk saliency mapping, which may assist radiologists in localizing risk-relevant regions during breast MRI interpretation. Evaluated on a large breast MRI screening cohort (~7.5K), our method outperforms 2D/3D baselines and existing SOTA MIL methods, achieving AUCs of 0.77-0.69 for 1- to 5-year prediction and improving C-index by ~6% over 3D CNNs. LoGo3-MR further improves overall performance with interpretable localization across three planes, and validation across seven backbones shows consistent gains. These results highlight the clinical potential of efficient MRI-based BC risk stratification for large-scale screening. Code will be released publicly.

analysis.tldr: 提出LoGo-MR框架，通过2.5D局部-全局建模实现乳腺癌MRI风险预测，在约7500例队列中优于2D/3D基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 乳腺癌风险预测对大规模人群筛查至关重要，但现有3D CNN计算成本高，2D CNN无法建模切片间连续性，且短长期风险分层研究不足。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且可解释地利用乳腺MRI进行短期和长期乳腺癌风险预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出2.5D局部-全局结构建模框架LoGo-MR，先通过邻切片编码捕捉局部短期风险线索，再结合Transformer增强的多实例学习建模全局长期风险模式，并在三个平面（轴向、矢状、冠状）上扩展为LoGo3-MR以捕获互补体积信息。
contributions: 提出LoGo-MR框架，实现高效且可解释的乳腺癌MRI风险预测。
在大型队列（~7.5K）上验证，AUC达0.77-0.69（1-5年预测），C-index比3D CNN提升约6%。
analysis.experiments: 在约7500例乳腺MRI筛查队列上评估，与2D/3D基线和现有SOTA MIL方法比较，AUC为0.77-0.69（1-5年预测），C-index比3D CNN提升约6%，并在七个骨干网络上验证一致性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定MRI采集协议，泛化性需进一步验证。
多平面融合的计算开销未详细说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LoGo-MR框架，通过2.5D局部-全局建模实现乳腺癌MRI风险预测，在约7500例队列中优于2D/3D基线。

papers.title: FlatASCEND: Autoregressive Clinical Sequence Generation with Continuous Time Prediction and Association-Based Pharmacological Testing
papers.abstract: Autoregressive models can predict clinical events, but generating patient-conditioned multi-step trajectories that respond to intervention tokens and testing whether those responses preserve known pharmacological associations has received limited attention. We present FlatASCEND, a 14.5M-parameter autoregressive clinical sequence model using flat composite tokens and a zero-inflated log-normal time head. Standard distributional metrics (Jaccard 0.889-0.954) do not distinguish FlatASCEND from trivial baselines; the model's value lies in conditional generation from patient-specific prefixes. A prompt-shuffle ablation shows patient-specific conditioning amplifies mechanistic pharmacological effects (2.0-2.2x for steroid to glucose, diuretic to potassium) while leaving confounding-driven associations unchanged (0.9x for insulin to glucose). An incident-user framework assesses directional consistency against prior pharmacological knowledge on MIMIC-IV (N=500 per comparison): 4/10 recover correct mechanistic directions, 2 reproduce treatment-context associations, 4 are incorrect (9/10 significant, Wilcoxon p<0.05). This pattern - partial recovery under residual confounding - is consistent with learned observational associations without causal distinction. Direct preference optimisation with surrogate reward destroys all correct associations (3/3 to 0/3), illustrating reward exploitation when reward and evaluation share an outcome domain. Generative evidence is strongest for short-horizon ICU data; outpatient temporal fidelity is weaker (median 10 vs 154 days on INSPECT), and zero-shot cross-site transfer degrades without adaptation.

analysis.tldr: FlatASCEND是一个14.5M参数的自回归临床序列模型，通过扁平复合令牌和零膨胀对数正态时间头生成患者条件化的多步轨迹，并评估药理关联保持能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自回归模型能预测临床事件，但生成患者条件化的多步轨迹并验证其对干预令牌的响应是否保持已知药理关联的研究有限。
analysis.problem: 如何生成患者条件化的多步临床序列，并评估模型是否保留了已知的药理关联。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准分布指标无法区分模型与平凡基线；患者条件化增强机械药理效应但混淆关联不变；直接偏好优化破坏正确关联；生成证据在短时ICU数据中最强，门诊时间保真度弱，零样本跨站点迁移退化。
analysis.method: 使用扁平复合令牌和零膨胀对数正态时间头的14.5M参数自回归临床序列模型，结合提示洗牌消融、新用户框架和直接偏好优化进行药理关联评估。
contributions: 提出FlatASCEND模型，实现患者条件化的多步临床序列生成。
系统评估模型在药理关联保持方面的表现，揭示部分恢复但存在残余混淆的模式。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-IV（N=500每比较）和INSPECT数据集上评估，使用Jaccard指标、提示洗牌消融、新用户框架和直接偏好优化。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模型在门诊数据的时间保真度较弱。
零样本跨站点迁移性能下降。
直接偏好优化导致药理关联破坏。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlatASCEND是一个14.5M参数的自回归临床序列模型，通过扁平复合令牌和零膨胀对数正态时间头生成患者条件化的多步轨迹，并评估药理关联保持能力。

papers.title: Governance by Design: A Parsonian Institutional Architecture for Internet-Wide Agent Societies
papers.abstract: The dominant paradigm of local multi-agent systems -- orchestrated, enterprise-bounded pipelines -- is being superseded by internet-wide agent societies in which autonomous agents discover each other through open registries, interact without central orchestrators, and generate emergent social behaviors. We argue that governing such societies requires institutional design, not merely risk enumeration or process compliance. Applying Talcott Parsons' AGIL framework -- four functional imperatives (Adaptation, Goal Attainment, Integration, Latency) every viable social system must satisfy -- we derive a prescriptive sixteen-cell institutional architecture for internet-wide agent governance. Diagnostically applied to the OpenClaw ecosystem (250,000+ GitHub stars, 2M+ monthly users, 770,000+ registered agents) via a recursive sub-function analysis (64 binary indicators across 16 cells), we find at most 19% sub-function coverage (sensitivity range 17-30%) -- potential rather than operative capacity, since zero inter-cell coordination prevents existing infrastructure from participating in inter-pillar interchange. A complementary interchange media assessment finds zero of twelve inter-pillar pathways functional: the ecosystem has technical infrastructure but no active governance, no coordination layer, and no normative grounding, with the Fiduciary and Political pillars most severely underserved. Extending the diagnostic to the broader agent-native protocol stack (MCP, A2A, ANP, x402, ERC-8004), independent development teams reproduce the same structural pattern -- confirming the governance gap is a feature of market-driven development, not ecosystem immaturity. Institutional design is most effective before social patterns calcify; we conclude with a prioritized roadmap for the missing governance infrastructure.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于帕森斯AGIL框架的互联网级智能体社会制度架构，诊断现有生态系统缺乏治理协调。
analysis.research_motivation: 互联网级智能体社会缺乏有效的治理机制，现有方法仅关注风险列举或流程合规，无法应对去中心化、涌现行为的治理需求。
analysis.problem: 如何为互联网级智能体社会设计一套系统性的制度架构，以填补当前生态系统中治理、协调和规范基础的缺失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对OpenClaw生态系统的诊断显示，子功能覆盖率仅19%，且零跨单元协调，十二个支柱间交换路径全部失效；类似模式在MCP、A2A等协议栈中复现，表明治理缺失是市场驱动发展的固有特征。
analysis.method: 基于帕森斯AGIL框架（适应、目标达成、整合、潜在模式维持）推导出16单元制度架构，并通过递归子功能分析（64个二元指标）和交换媒介评估进行诊断。
contributions: 提出一个基于社会学理论的互联网级智能体社会制度架构，填补了治理设计空白。
通过大规模生态系统诊断，量化了当前治理缺失的程度，并揭示了市场驱动发展的结构性缺陷。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提供了对OpenClaw生态系统（25万+GitHub星标、200万+月活用户、77万+注册智能体）的诊断分析，以及协议栈的扩展诊断。
limitations: 架构的普适性可能受限于AGIL框架的适用边界。
诊断依赖公开数据，可能遗漏内部治理机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于帕森斯AGIL框架的互联网级智能体社会制度架构，诊断现有生态系统缺乏治理协调。

papers.title: Dynamic Summary Generation for Interpretable Multimodal Depression Detection
papers.abstract: Depression remains widely underdiagnosed and undertreated because stigma and subjective symptom ratings hinder reliable screening. To address this challenge, we propose a coarse-to-fine, multi-stage framework that leverages large language models (LLMs) for accurate and interpretable detection. The pipeline performs binary screening, five-class severity classification, and continuous regression. At each stage, an LLM produces progressively richer clinical summaries that guide a multimodal fusion module integrating text, audio, and video features, yielding predictions with transparent rationale. The system then consolidates all summaries into a concise, human-readable assessment report. Experiments on the E-DAIC and CMDC datasets show significant improvements over state-of-the-art baselines in both accuracy and interpretability.

analysis.tldr: 提出粗到细的多阶段框架，利用LLM生成动态摘要实现可解释的多模态抑郁症检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 抑郁症因污名化和主观症状评分导致筛查不可靠，亟需准确且可解释的自动检测方法。
analysis.problem: 现有抑郁症检测方法缺乏可解释性，且多模态融合不充分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 粗到细的多阶段框架：先进行二分类筛查，再五类严重程度分类，最后连续回归；每阶段LLM生成临床摘要指导多模态融合（文本、音频、视频），最终整合为可读评估报告。
contributions: 提出多阶段粗到细框架，结合LLM生成动态摘要提升可解释性。
在E-DAIC和CMDC数据集上显著优于现有基线，兼顾准确性与可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在E-DAIC和CMDC数据集上评估，与SOTA基线对比，准确性和可解释性均有显著提升。
limitations: 依赖LLM生成摘要，可能引入计算开销。
未提及跨数据集泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出粗到细的多阶段框架，利用LLM生成动态摘要实现可解释的多模态抑郁症检测。

papers.title: A Compact and Efficient 1.251 Million Parameter Machine Learning CNN Model PD36-C for Plant Disease Detection: A Case Study
papers.abstract: Deep learning has markedly advanced image based plant disease diagnosis as improved hardware and dataset quality have enabled increasingly accurate neural network models. This paper presents PD36 C, a compact convolutional neural network (1,250,694 parameters and 4.77 MB) for plant disease classification. Trained with TensorFlow Keras on the New Plant Diseases Dataset (87k images, 38 classes), PD36 C is designed for robustness and edge deployability, complemented by a Qt for Python desktop application that offers an intuitive GUI and offline inference on commodity hardware. Across experiments, training accuracy reached 0.99697 by epoch 30, and average test accuracy was 0.9953 across 38 classes. Per class performance is uniformly high; on the lower end, Corn (maize) Cercospora leaf spot achieved precision around 0.9777 and recall around 0.9634, indicating occasional confusion with visually similar categories, while on the upper end numerous classes including Apple Black rot, Cedar apple rust, Blueberry healthy, Cherry Powdery mildew, Cherry healthy, and all four grape categories achieved perfect precision 1.00 and recall of 1.00, indicating no false positives and strong coverage. These results show that with a well curated dataset and careful architectural design, small CNNs can achieve competitive accuracy compared with recent baselines while remaining practical for edge scenarios. We also note typical constraints such as adverse weather, low quality imagery, and leaves exhibiting multiple concurrent diseases that can degrade performance and warrant future work on domain robustness. Overall, PD36 C and its application pipeline contribute a field ready, efficient solution for AI assisted plant disease detection in smart agriculture.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个仅125万参数的紧凑CNN模型PD36-C，在植物病害分类上达到99.53%测试准确率，并配套桌面应用实现边缘部署。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习模型在植物病害诊断中精度高但参数量大，难以在边缘设备部署；需要兼顾精度与效率的轻量级方案。
analysis.problem: 设计一个参数少、精度高、可边缘部署的CNN模型用于植物病害分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计紧凑CNN架构PD36-C（1,250,694参数），在New Plant Diseases Dataset上使用TensorFlow/Keras训练，并开发Qt for Python桌面应用支持离线推理。
contributions: 提出PD36-C模型，仅125万参数即达到99.53%测试准确率，优于许多大模型。
提供完整的桌面应用管线，实现离线推理和边缘部署。
analysis.experiments: 在New Plant Diseases Dataset（87k图像，38类）上训练，30轮训练准确率0.99697，平均测试准确率0.9953；多数类别精确率和召回率达1.00，最低类别（玉米褐斑病）精确率0.9777、召回率0.9634。
limitations: 未在真实恶劣天气、低质量图像或多病斑叶片场景下验证。
仅针对单一数据集，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个仅125万参数的紧凑CNN模型PD36-C，在植物病害分类上达到99.53%测试准确率，并配套桌面应用实现边缘部署。

papers.title: Any 3D Scene is Worth 1K Tokens: 3D-Grounded Representation for Scene Generation at Scale
papers.abstract: 3D scene generation has long been dominated by 2D multi-view or video diffusion models. This is due not only to the lack of scene-level 3D latent representation, but also to the fact that most scene-level 3D visual data exists in the form of multi-view images or videos, which are naturally compatible with 2D diffusion architectures. Typically, these 2D-based approaches degrade 3D spatial extrapolation to 2D temporal extension, which introduces two fundamental issues: (i) representing 3D scenes via 2D views leads to significant representation redundancy, and (ii) latent space rooted in 2D inherently limits the spatial consistency of the generated 3D scenes. In this paper, we propose, for the first time, to perform 3D scene generation directly within an implicit 3D latent space to address these limitations. First, we repurpose frozen 2D representation encoders to construct our 3D Representation Autoencoder (3DRAE), which grounds view-coupled 2D semantic representations into a view-decoupled 3D latent representation. This enables representing 3D scenes observed from arbitrary numbers of views--at any resolution and aspect ratio--with fixed complexity and rich semantics. Then we introduce 3D Diffusion Transformer (3DDiT), which performs diffusion modeling in this 3D latent space, achieving remarkably efficient and spatially consistent 3D scene generation while supporting diverse conditioning configurations. Moreover, since our approach directly generates a 3D scene representation, it can be decoded to images and optional point maps along arbitrary camera trajectories without requiring per-trajectory diffusion sampling pass, which is common in 2D-based approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个直接在隐式3D潜在空间中进行3D场景生成的框架，通过3D表示自编码器和3D扩散Transformer实现高效、空间一致的生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D场景生成主要依赖2D多视图或视频扩散模型，但2D表示存在冗余且空间一致性差，缺乏场景级3D潜在表示。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个场景级3D潜在表示，并在此空间中进行高效的扩散生成，以克服2D方法的冗余和空间不一致问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 2D方法将3D空间外推退化为2D时间扩展，导致表示冗余和空间一致性受限。
analysis.method: 提出3D表示自编码器（3DRAE）将2D语义表示解耦为视图无关的3D潜在表示，再使用3D扩散Transformer（3DDiT）在该潜在空间中进行扩散建模。
contributions: 首次在隐式3D潜在空间中直接进行3D场景生成，避免了2D方法的冗余和空间不一致。
提出3DRAE，利用冻结的2D编码器构建固定复杂度、语义丰富的3D潜在表示。
提出3DDiT，在3D潜在空间中进行扩散，支持多种条件配置，且可沿任意相机轨迹解码图像和点图。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练2D编码器的质量。
3D潜在空间的解码质量可能受限于自编码器设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个直接在隐式3D潜在空间中进行3D场景生成的框架，通过3D表示自编码器和3D扩散Transformer实现高效、空间一致的生成。

papers.title: Select Smarter, Not More: Prompt-Aware Evaluation Scheduling with Submodular Guarantees
papers.abstract: Automatic prompt optimization (APO) hinges on the quality of its evaluation signal, yet scoring every prompt candidate on the full training set is prohibitively expensive. Existing methods either fix a single evaluation subset before optimization begins (principled but prompt-agnostic) or adapt it heuristically during optimization (flexible but unstable and lacking formal guarantees). We observe that APO naturally maps to an online adaptive testing problem: prompts are examinees, training examples are test items, and the scheduler should select items that best discriminate among the strongest candidates. This insight motivates Prompt-Aware Online Evaluation Scheduling (POES), which integrates an IRT-based discrimination utility, a facility-location coverage term, and switching-cost-aware warm-start swaps into a unified objective that is provably monotone submodular, yielding a (1-1/e) greedy guarantee for cold starts and bounded drift for warm-start updates. An adaptive controller modulates the exploration-exploitation balance based on optimization progress. Across 36 tasks spanning three benchmark families, POES achieves the highest overall average accuracy (6.2 percent improvement over the best baseline) with negligible token overhead (approximately 4 percent) at the same evaluation budget. Moreover, principled selection at k = 20 examples matches or exceeds the performance of naive evaluation at k = 30-50, reducing token consumption by 35-60 percent, showing that selecting smarter is more effective than selecting more. Our results demonstrate that evaluation scheduling is a first-class component of APO, not an implementation detail.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于子模函数保证的提示感知在线评估调度方法，在自动提示优化中以更少样本实现更高准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动提示优化（APO）依赖评估信号，但在完整训练集上评估每个候选提示成本过高；现有方法要么固定子集（无提示感知），要么启发式自适应（不稳定且缺乏理论保证）。
analysis.problem: 如何在APO过程中高效、稳定地选择评估子集，以最小化评估成本同时保持优化质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: APO可映射为在线自适应测试问题：提示是考生，训练示例是试题，调度器应选择最能区分强候选者的试题。
analysis.method: 提出Prompt-Aware Online Evaluation Scheduling (POES)，集成IRT区分度效用、设施位置覆盖项和切换成本感知的热启动交换，形成单调子模目标函数，冷启动时提供(1-1/e)贪心保证，热启动时漂移有界，并利用自适应控制器调节探索-利用平衡。
contributions: 将APO评估调度形式化为在线自适应测试问题，并建立子模优化框架。
提出POES方法，具有理论保证（贪心保证和漂移有界）和自适应探索-利用控制。
在36个任务上验证，POES以约4%的token开销实现平均准确率提升6.2%，且k=20的精选子集优于k=30-50的朴素评估，减少35-60% token消耗。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准家族的36个任务上评估，POES达到最高平均准确率（比最佳基线高6.2%），token开销约4%；k=20时匹配或超越k=30-50的朴素评估。
limitations: 可能依赖IRT模型的假设（如单维能力），实际中可能不成立。
子模函数构造需要领域知识，通用性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于子模函数保证的提示感知在线评估调度方法，在自动提示优化中以更少样本实现更高准确率。

papers.title: Do LLMs Know Tool Irrelevance? Demystifying Structural Alignment Bias in Tool Invocations
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in utilizing external tools. In practice, however, LLMs are often exposed to tools that are irrelevant to the user's query, in which case the desired behavior is to refrain from invocations. In this work, we identify a widespread yet overlooked mechanistic flaw in tool refusal, which we term structural alignment bias: Even when a tool fails to serve the user's goal, LLMs still tend to invoke it whenever query attributes can be validly assigned to tool parameters. To systematically study this bias, we introduce SABEval, a new dataset that decouples structural alignment from semantic relevance. Our analysis shows that structural alignment bias induces severe tool-invocation errors in LLMs, yet remains largely unaccounted for in existing evaluations. To investigate the internal mechanisms underlying this bias, we propose Contrastive Attention Attribution, which reveals two competing pathways for semantic checking and structural matching. The relative strength of these pathways drives LLMs' tool invocation decisions. Based on these findings, we further introduce a rebalancing strategy that effectively mitigates structural alignment bias, as demonstrated by extensive experiments, without degrading general tool-use capabilities.

analysis.tldr: LLM在工具调用中存在结构对齐偏差，即使工具与查询无关，只要参数匹配就会倾向调用，本文提出SABEval数据集和对比注意力归因方法分析并缓解该偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究主要关注LLM如何正确调用工具，但忽略了当工具与用户查询无关时，LLM应拒绝调用的情况。实际应用中，LLM常面临大量无关工具，而现有评估未充分覆盖这种场景。
analysis.problem: LLM在工具调用中存在的结构对齐偏差：即使工具语义上与查询无关，只要查询属性能够有效分配给工具参数，LLM仍倾向于调用该工具，导致错误调用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到结构对齐偏差是普遍存在的机制性缺陷，现有评估未充分考虑。通过对比注意力归因发现，LLM内部存在语义检查与结构匹配两条竞争通路，其相对强度决定调用决策。
analysis.method: 提出SABEval数据集用于解耦结构对齐与语义相关性；提出对比注意力归因方法分析内部机制；基于发现提出重平衡策略缓解偏差。
contributions: 识别并命名了LLM工具调用中的结构对齐偏差，揭示其机制性根源。
构建SABEval数据集，系统评估结构对齐偏差的影响。
提出对比注意力归因方法，揭示语义检查与结构匹配的竞争通路。
提出重平衡策略有效缓解偏差，且不降低通用工具调用能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到通过大量实验验证了重平衡策略的有效性，但未提供具体实验设置或结果数值。
limitations: 重平衡策略可能依赖特定模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
SABEval数据集可能未覆盖所有工具类型或领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在工具调用中存在结构对齐偏差，即使工具与查询无关，只要参数匹配就会倾向调用，本文提出SABEval数据集和对比注意力归因方法分析并缓解该偏差。

papers.title: S$^3$: Structured Sparsity Specification
papers.abstract: We introduce the Structured Sparsity Specification (S$^3$), an algebraic framework for defining, composing, and implementing structured sparse patterns. S$^3$ specifies sparsity through three components: a View that reshapes the tensor via layout composition, a Block specification that defines the atomic pruning unit, and the sparsity decision Scope. Both Block and Scope support Coupling across tensors for coordinated sparsification. S$^3$ enables precise specification of diverse sparsity structures, from fine-grained N:M patterns to coarse channel pruning, and integrates seamlessly with Optimal Brain Damage (OBD) and Surgeon (OBS). We formalize the framework mathematically, demonstrate its expressiveness on canonical patterns, and validate it experimentally via structured OBS and OBD implementations built entirely on S$^3$, which surpasses well-established second order heuristics on output reconstruction across common configurations.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化稀疏规范框架S³，统一描述多种稀疏模式并集成经典剪枝方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有结构化稀疏方法缺乏统一的代数框架来定义、组合和实现多样化的稀疏模式，导致不同稀疏结构（如N:M模式、通道剪枝）之间难以协调和复用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个通用的代数框架，能够精确指定从细粒度到粗粒度的各种结构化稀疏模式，并支持跨张量的协同稀疏化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出S³框架，包含三个核心组件：View（通过布局组合重塑张量）、Block（定义原子剪枝单元）和Scope（稀疏决策范围），并支持跨张量的Coupling。该框架可无缝集成OBD和OBS方法。
contributions: 提出了S³，一个用于定义、组合和实现结构化稀疏模式的代数框架。
通过View、Block、Scope三个组件统一描述了从N:M模式到通道剪枝的多种稀疏结构。
基于S³实现了结构化OBS和OBD，在输出重建任务上超越了已有的二阶启发式方法。
analysis.experiments: 在常见配置下，基于S³的结构化OBS和OBD实现超越了已有的二阶启发式方法（输出重建任务）。
limitations: 可能仅适用于剪枝场景，未讨论其他稀疏化应用。
实验仅在输出重建任务上验证，缺乏更广泛任务（如分类、检测）的评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构化稀疏规范框架S³，统一描述多种稀疏模式并集成经典剪枝方法。

papers.title: Network Effects and Agreement Drift in LLM Debates
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated an unprecedented ability to simulate human-like social behaviors, making them useful tools for simulating complex social systems. However, it remains unclear to what extent these simulations can be trusted to accurately capture key social mechanisms, particularly in highly unbalanced contexts involving minority groups. This paper uses a network generation model with controlled homophily and class sizes to examine how LLM agents behave collectively in multi-round debates. Moreover, our findings highlight a particular directional susceptibility that we term \textit{agreement drift}, in which agents are more likely to shift toward specific positions on the opinion scale. Overall, our findings highlight the need to disentangle structural effects from model biases before treating LLM populations as behavioral proxies for human groups.

analysis.tldr: LLM辩论中的网络效应和一致性漂移揭示了模型偏见与结构效应的混淆风险。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM被用于模拟人类社交行为，但在不平衡群体（如少数群体）情境下，模拟的可靠性未知，需要检验其能否准确捕捉关键社会机制。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM代理在多轮辩论中的集体行为，特别是网络结构（同质性、群体规模）如何影响意见演化，并识别模型固有的方向性偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现了一种称为“一致性漂移”的现象，即代理更倾向于向特定意见位置移动，表明存在方向性偏见。
analysis.method: 使用可控同质性和类大小的网络生成模型，让LLM代理进行多轮辩论，分析意见变化。
contributions: 揭示了LLM辩论中的“一致性漂移”现象，即代理意见向特定方向偏移。
强调了在将LLM群体作为人类行为代理之前，需要分离结构效应与模型偏见。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定网络结构和辩论设置。
未深入分析不同LLM架构或规模的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM辩论中的网络效应和一致性漂移揭示了模型偏见与结构效应的混淆风险。

papers.title: The Salami Slicing Threat: Exploiting Cumulative Risks in LLM Systems
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) face prominent security risks from jailbreaking, a practice that manipulates models to bypass built-in security constraints and generate unethical or unsafe content. Among various jailbreak techniques, multi-turn jailbreak attacks are more covert and persistent than single-turn counterparts, exposing critical vulnerabilities of LLMs. However, existing multi-turn jailbreak methods suffer from two fundamental limitations that affect the actual impact in real-world scenarios: (a) As models become more context-aware, any explicit harmful trigger is increasingly likely to be flagged and blocked; (b) Successful final-step triggers often require finely tuned, model-specific contexts, making such attacks highly context-dependent. To fill this gap, we propose \textit{Salami Slicing Risk}, which operates by chaining numerous low-risk inputs that individually evade alignment thresholds but cumulatively accumulate harmful intent to ultimately trigger high-risk behaviors, without heavy reliance on pre-designed contextual structures. Building on this risk, we develop Salami Attack, an automatic framework universally applicable to multiple model types and modalities. Rigorous experiments demonstrate its state-of-the-art performance across diverse models and modalities, achieving over 90\% Attack Success Rate on GPT-4o and Gemini, as well as robustness against real-world alignment defenses. We also proposed a defense strategy to constrain the Salami Attack by at least 44.8\% while achieving a maximum blocking rate of 64.8\% against other multi-turn jailbreak attacks. Our findings provide critical insights into the pervasive risks of multi-turn jailbreaking and offer actionable mitigation strategies to enhance LLM security.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种通过累积低风险输入绕过LLM安全对齐的多轮越狱攻击方法，攻击成功率超90%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单轮越狱攻击易被检测，多轮越狱虽更隐蔽但依赖显式有害触发词和精心设计的上下文，实际威胁有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖显式有害触发和特定上下文的情况下，实现高效且通用的多轮越狱攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多轮越狱攻击中，单个低风险输入可绕过对齐阈值，但累积后能触发高风险行为。
analysis.method: 提出Salami Slicing Risk概念，通过链式累积低风险输入实现越狱；并开发Salami Attack自动框架，适用于多种模型和模态。
contributions: 提出Salami Slicing Risk概念，揭示累积低风险输入可绕过安全对齐。
开发Salami Attack自动框架，在GPT-4o和Gemini上实现超90%攻击成功率。
提出防御策略，将Salami Attack成功率降低至少44.8%，并有效防御其他多轮越狱攻击。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-4o、Gemini等模型上测试，攻击成功率超90%，且对真实世界对齐防御具有鲁棒性。防御策略将攻击成功率降低至少44.8%，对其他多轮越狱攻击最大阻断率64.8%。
limitations: 防御策略可能无法完全消除攻击风险。
攻击方法可能被用于恶意目的，需谨慎使用。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种通过累积低风险输入绕过LLM安全对齐的多轮越狱攻击方法，攻击成功率超90%。

papers.title: PaperScope: A Multi-Modal Multi-Document Benchmark for Agentic Deep Research Across Massive Scientific Papers
papers.abstract: Leveraging Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to accelerate frontier scientific research is promising, yet how to rigorously evaluate such systems remains unclear. Existing benchmarks mainly focus on single-document understanding, whereas real scientific workflows require integrating evidence from multiple papers, including their text, tables, and figures. As a result, multi-modal, multi-document scientific reasoning remains underexplored and lacks systematic evaluation. To address this gap, we introduce PaperScope, a multi-modal multi-document benchmark designed for agentic deep research. PaperScope presents three advantages: (1) Structured scientific grounding. It is built on a knowledge graph of over 2,000 AI papers spanning three years, providing a structured foundation for research-oriented queries. (2) Semantically dense evidence construction. It integrates semantically related key information nodes and employs optimized random-walk article selector to sample thematically coherent paper sets, thereby ensuring adequate semantic density and task complexity. (3) Multi-task evaluation of scientific reasoning. It contains over 2,000 QA pairs across reasoning, retrieval, summarization, and problem solving, enabling evaluation of multi-step scientific reasoning. Experimental results show that even advanced systems such as OpenAI Deep Research and Tongyi Deep Research achieve limited scores on PaperScope, highlighting the difficulty of long-context retrieval and deep multi-source reasoning. PaperScope thus provides a rigorous benchmark alongside a scalable pipeline for constructing large-scale multi-modal, multi-source deep research datasets.

analysis.tldr: PaperScope 是一个多模态多文档基准，用于评估 AI 在科学论文上的深度研究能力，实验显示现有系统表现有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准主要关注单文档理解，而真实科研需要整合多篇论文的文本、表格和图表，多模态多文档科学推理缺乏系统评估。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够评估多模态多文档科学推理能力的基准，以衡量 AI 系统在真实科研场景中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于超过2000篇AI论文的知识图谱，构建结构化科学基础；通过语义密集的证据构建和优化随机游走文章选择器采样主题连贯的论文集；包含超过2000个QA对，涵盖推理、检索、总结和问题解决等多任务评估。
contributions: 提出了 PaperScope，一个多模态多文档基准，用于评估 AI 在科学论文上的深度研究能力。
提供了可扩展的流水线，用于构建大规模多模态多源深度研究数据集。
analysis.experiments: 实验显示 OpenAI Deep Research 和 Tongyi Deep Research 等先进系统在 PaperScope 上得分有限，突出了长上下文检索和深度多源推理的难度。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖AI领域论文，可能不适用于其他科学领域。
评估指标可能无法完全反映真实科研工作的复杂性和创造性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PaperScope 是一个多模态多文档基准，用于评估 AI 在科学论文上的深度研究能力，实验显示现有系统表现有限。

papers.title: Learning to Forget -- Hierarchical Episodic Memory for Lifelong Robot Deployment
papers.abstract: Robots must verbalize their past experiences when users ask "Where did you put my keys?" or "Why did the task fail?" Yet maintaining life-long episodic memory (EM) from continuous multimodal perception quickly exceeds storage limits and makes real-time query impractical, calling for selective forgetting that adapts to users' notions of relevance. We present H$^2$-EMV, a framework enabling humanoids to learn what to remember through user interaction. Our approach incrementally constructs hierarchical EM, selectively forgets using language-model-based relevance estimation conditioned on learned natural-language rules, and updates these rules given user feedback about forgotten details. Evaluations on simulated household tasks and 20.5-hour-long real-world recordings from ARMAR-7 demonstrate that H$^2$-EMV maintains question-answering accuracy while reducing memory size by 45% and query-time compute by 35%. Critically, performance improves over time - accuracy increases 70% in second-round queries by adapting to user-specific priorities - demonstrating that learned forgetting enables scalable, personalized EM for long-term human-robot collaboration.

analysis.tldr: 通过用户交互学习选择性遗忘，实现机器人终身情景记忆的高效存储与个性化查询。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人需要长期记忆过去事件以回答用户问题，但连续多模态感知产生的数据量巨大，存储和实时查询难以持续，现有方法缺乏根据用户相关性进行选择性遗忘的机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限存储和计算资源下，让机器人从连续感知中构建终身情景记忆，并学习遗忘用户认为不重要的信息，同时保持问答准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出H²-EMV框架，增量构建层次化情景记忆，利用基于语言模型的相关性估计（受学到的自然语言规则约束）进行选择性遗忘，并通过用户对遗忘细节的反馈更新规则。
contributions: 提出一种通过用户交互学习选择性遗忘的层次化情景记忆框架，实现终身机器人部署。
在模拟家庭任务和20.5小时真实机器人记录上验证，记忆大小减少45%，查询时间减少35%，且第二轮查询准确率提升70%。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟家庭任务和ARMAR-7机器人20.5小时真实世界记录上评估，测量问答准确率、记忆大小和查询时间。
limitations: 可能依赖用户反馈的质量和频率。
真实场景中语言模型的相关性估计可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过用户交互学习选择性遗忘，实现机器人终身情景记忆的高效存储与个性化查询。

papers.title: BankerToolBench: Evaluating AI Agents in End-to-End Investment Banking Workflows
papers.abstract: Existing AI benchmarks lack the fidelity to assess economically meaningful progress on professional workflows. To evaluate frontier AI agents in a high-value, labor-intensive profession, we introduce BankerToolBench (BTB): an open-source benchmark of end-to-end analytical workflows routinely performed by junior investment bankers. To develop an ecologically valid benchmark grounded in representative work environments, we collaborated with 502 investment bankers from leading firms. BTB requires agents to execute senior banker requests by navigating data rooms, using industry tools (market data platform, SEC filings database), and generating multi-file deliverables--including Excel financial models, PowerPoint pitch decks, and PDF/Word reports. Completing a BTB task takes bankers up to 21 hours, underscoring the economic stakes of successfully delegating this work to AI. BTB enables automated evaluation of any LLM or agent, scoring deliverables against 100+ rubric criteria defined by veteran investment bankers to capture stakeholder utility. Testing 9 frontier models, we find that even the best-performing model (GPT-5.4) fails nearly half of the rubric criteria and bankers rate 0% of its outputs as client-ready. Our failure analysis reveals key obstacles (such as breakdowns in cross-artifact consistency) and improvement directions for agentic AI in high-stakes professional workflows.

analysis.tldr: BankerToolBench 是一个评估 AI Agent 在投资银行端到端工作流中表现的基准，测试发现即使最强模型也远未达到客户可用标准。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 AI 基准缺乏对专业工作流经济价值的评估，投资银行工作流程复杂、价值高，亟需一个生态有效的基准来评估 AI Agent 的实际表现。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能真实反映投资银行初级分析师端到端工作流的基准，并自动评估 AI Agent 在其中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，即使最佳模型（GPT-5.4）也未能通过近一半的评估标准，且银行家认为其输出均未达到客户可用水平；失败分析揭示了跨工件一致性等关键障碍。
analysis.method: 与 502 名投资银行家合作，设计包含数据室导航、工具使用（市场数据平台、SEC 文件数据库）和多文件交付物（Excel 模型、PPT、PDF/Word 报告）的端到端工作流基准；使用 100+ 条由资深银行家定义的评分标准自动评估。
contributions: 提出了 BankerToolBench，一个开放源码的、生态有效的投资银行端到端工作流基准。
通过大规模银行家协作确保了基准的代表性和评估标准的实用性。
测试了 9 个前沿模型，揭示了当前 AI Agent 在高风险专业工作流中的关键失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 测试了 9 个前沿模型，最佳模型（GPT-5.4）失败近半评估标准，银行家对其输出客户可用性评分为 0%。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖投资银行特定工作流，泛化性有限。
评估标准由银行家定义，可能引入主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BankerToolBench 是一个评估 AI Agent 在投资银行端到端工作流中表现的基准，测试发现即使最强模型也远未达到客户可用标准。

papers.title: 3D-Anchored Lookahead Planning for Persistent Robotic Scene Memory via World-Model-Based MCTS
papers.abstract: We present 3D-Anchored Lookahead Planning (3D-ALP), a System 2 reasoning engine for robotic manipulation that combines Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) with a 3D-consistent world model as the rollout oracle. Unlike reactive policies that evaluate actions from the current camera frame only, 3D-ALP maintains a persistent camera-to-world (c2w) anchor that survives occlusion, enabling accurate replanning to object positions that are no longer directly observable. On a 5-step sequential reach task requiring spatial memory (Experiment E3), 3D-ALP achieves 0.650 0.109 success rate on memory-required steps versus 0.006 0.008 for a greedy reactive baseline (Δ=+0.645), while step 5 success reaches 0.822 against 0.000 for greedy. An ablation study (30 episodes, 3 seeds) isolates tree search spatial memory as the primary driver (+0.533, 82% of gain) with additional benefit from deeper lookahead (+0.111, 17%). We also identify and resolve four structural failure modes in applying UCT-MCTS (Upper Confidence Bounds applied to Trees [10]) to continuous robotic manipulation.

analysis.tldr: 提出3D-ALP，将MCTS与3D世界模型结合，使机器人操作具备持久空间记忆和前瞻规划能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器人操作策略多为反应式，仅依赖当前相机帧评估动作，缺乏对遮挡物体的空间记忆和长期规划能力，导致多步任务中性能急剧下降。
analysis.problem: 如何让机器人在操作过程中维持对不可见物体位置的持久记忆，并基于此进行多步前瞻规划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 反应式基线在需要空间记忆的步骤上成功率极低（0.006），而3D-ALP通过树搜索空间记忆显著提升（+0.645），且更深的lookahead带来额外增益（+0.111）。
analysis.method: 结合蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）与3D一致的世界模型作为rollout预言机，维护持久的相机到世界（c2w）锚点以抵抗遮挡，实现基于3D锚点的前瞻规划。
contributions: 提出3D-ALP，一种结合MCTS与3D世界模型的系统2推理引擎，用于机器人操作。
在需要空间记忆的多步任务上，相比反应式基线取得显著性能提升（成功率+0.645）。
通过消融实验隔离树搜索空间记忆为主要贡献（82%增益），并识别并解决了UCT-MCTS在连续机器人操作中的四种结构失效模式。
analysis.experiments: 在5步顺序到达任务（实验E3）上评估，3D-ALP在需要记忆的步骤上成功率为0.650±0.109，反应式基线为0.006±0.008；第5步成功率为0.822 vs 0.000。消融实验（30 episodes, 3 seeds）显示树搜索空间记忆贡献+0.533（82%增益），更深lookahead贡献+0.111（17%）。
limitations: 实验仅在单一5步任务上验证，泛化性未知。
MCTS计算开销可能限制实时应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出3D-ALP，将MCTS与3D世界模型结合，使机器人操作具备持久空间记忆和前瞻规划能力。

papers.title: Enhancing Multimodal Large Language Models for Ancient Chinese Character Evolution Analysis via Glyph-Driven Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: In recent years, rapid advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have increasingly stimulated research on ancient Chinese scripts. As the evolution of written characters constitutes a fundamental pathway for understanding cultural transformation and historical continuity, how MLLMs can be systematically leveraged to support and advance text evolution analysis remains an open and largely underexplored problem. To bridge this gap, we construct a comprehensive benchmark comprising 11 tasks and over 130,000 instances, specifically designed to evaluate the capability of MLLMs in analyzing the evolution of ancient Chinese scripts. We conduct extensive evaluations across multiple widely used MLLMs and observe that, while existing models demonstrate a limited ability in glyph-level comparison, their performance on core tasks-such as character recognition and evolutionary reasoning-remains substantially constrained. Motivated by these findings, we propose a glyph-driven fine-tuning framework (GEVO) that explicitly encourages models to capture evolutionary consistency in glyph transformations and enhances their understanding of text evolution. Experimental results show that even models at the 2B scale achieve consistent and comprehensive performance improvements across all evaluated tasks. To facilitate future research, we publicly release both the benchmark and the trained models\footnote{https://github.com/songruiecho/GEVO}.

analysis.tldr: 通过字形驱动的微调框架提升多模态大模型在古汉字演变分析中的能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 古文字演变是理解文化变迁和历史连续性的重要途径，但多模态大模型在该领域的系统应用尚属空白，现有模型在核心任务上表现受限。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地利用多模态大模型支持古汉字演变分析，并提升其在字符识别和演化推理等核心任务上的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有模型在字形级别比较上能力有限，在字符识别和演化推理等核心任务上表现不足。
analysis.method: 提出字形驱动的微调框架GEVO，通过显式鼓励模型捕捉字形变换中的演化一致性来增强对文字演变的理解。
contributions: 构建了包含11个任务和超过13万个实例的综合基准，用于评估多模态大模型在古汉字演变分析中的能力。
提出了字形驱动的微调框架GEVO，在2B规模模型上实现了所有评估任务的一致性能提升。
公开了基准和训练模型以促进未来研究。
analysis.experiments: 在多个广泛使用的多模态大模型上进行了评估，并展示了GEVO框架在2B规模模型上的性能提升。
limitations: 可能仅在古汉字领域验证，泛化性未知。
2B模型规模较小，更大规模模型效果未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过字形驱动的微调框架提升多模态大模型在古汉字演变分析中的能力。

papers.title: The Past Is Not Past: Memory-Enhanced Dynamic Reward Shaping
papers.abstract: Despite the success of reinforcement learning for large language models, a common failure mode is reduced sampling diversity, where the policy repeatedly generates similar erroneous behaviors. Classical entropy regularization encourages randomness under the current policy, but does not explicitly discourage recurrent failure patterns across rollouts. We propose MEDS, a Memory-Enhanced Dynamic reward Shaping framework that incorporates historical behavioral signals into reward design. By storing and leveraging intermediate model representations, we capture features of past rollouts and use density-based clustering to identify frequently recurring error patterns. Rollouts assigned to more prevalent error clusters are penalized more heavily, encouraging broader exploration while reducing repeated mistakes. Across five datasets and three base models, MEDS consistently improves average performance over existing baselines, achieving gains of up to 4.13 pass@1 points and 4.37 pass@128 points. Additional analyses using both LLM-based annotations and quantitative diversity metrics show that MEDS increases behavioral diversity during sampling.

analysis.tldr: 提出记忆增强动态奖励塑形框架MEDS，通过历史行为信号惩罚重复错误模式，提升LLM强化学习的采样多样性和性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习在LLM中虽成功，但常见失败模式是采样多样性降低，策略反复生成相似错误行为。经典熵正则化仅鼓励当前策略下的随机性，无法显式抑制跨轨迹的重复失败模式。
analysis.problem: 如何设计奖励机制以显式惩罚历史中频繁出现的错误模式，从而促进探索并减少重复错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM强化学习存在采样多样性降低、重复错误模式频发的现象，经典熵正则化无法有效解决。
analysis.method: 提出MEDS框架：存储历史模型表征，利用密度聚类识别频繁错误模式，对属于高频错误簇的轨迹施加更大惩罚，从而鼓励探索并减少重复错误。
contributions: 提出记忆增强动态奖励塑形框架MEDS，将历史行为信号融入奖励设计。
在5个数据集和3个基模型上，MEDS一致提升平均性能，pass@1最高提升4.13点，pass@128最高提升4.37点。
通过LLM标注和定量多样性指标验证MEDS增加了采样过程中的行为多样性。
analysis.experiments: 在5个数据集和3个基模型上评估，与现有基线比较，报告了pass@1和pass@128指标，并进行了多样性分析。
limitations: 可能依赖聚类超参数的选择。
历史表征的存储和聚类计算可能带来额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出记忆增强动态奖励塑形框架MEDS，通过历史行为信号惩罚重复错误模式，提升LLM强化学习的采样多样性和性能。

papers.title: Consistency of AI-Generated Exercise Prescriptions: A Repeated Generation Study Using a Large Language Model
papers.abstract: Background: Large language models (LLMs) have been explored as tools for generating personalized exercise prescriptions, yet the consistency of outputs under identical conditions remains insufficiently examined. Objective: This study evaluated the intra-model consistency of LLM-generated exercise prescriptions using a repeated generation design. Methods: Six clinical scenarios were used to generate exercise prescriptions using Gemini 2.5 Flash (20 outputs per scenario; total n = 120). Consistency was assessed across three dimensions: (1) semantic consistency using SBERT-based cosine similarity, (2) structural consistency based on the FITT principle using an AI-as-a-judge approach, and (3) safety expression consistency, including inclusion rates and sentence-level quantification. Results: Semantic similarity was high across scenarios (mean cosine similarity: 0.879-0.939), with greater consistency in clinically constrained cases. Frequency showed consistent patterns, whereas variability was observed in quantitative components, particularly exercise intensity. Unclassifiable intensity expressions were observed in 10-25% of resistance training outputs. Safety-related expressions were included in 100% of outputs; however, safety sentence counts varied significantly across scenarios (H=86.18, p less than 0.001), with clinical cases generating more safety expressions than healthy adult cases. Conclusions: LLM-generated exercise prescriptions demonstrated high semantic consistency but showed variability in key quantitative components. Reliability depends substantially on prompt structure, and additional structural constraints and expert validation are needed before clinical deployment.

analysis.tldr: LLM生成的运动处方在语义上高度一致，但在关键量化成分（如运动强度）上存在变异性，安全性表达虽全覆盖但数量差异显著。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM被探索用于生成个性化运动处方，但其在相同条件下输出的一致性尚未被充分研究，这对临床可靠性至关重要。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM生成运动处方的内部一致性，包括语义、结构和安全性表达三个维度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语义一致性高（余弦相似度0.879-0.939），临床约束场景更一致；频率成分一致，但量化成分（尤其是强度）存在变异性；10-25%的抗阻训练输出出现不可分类的强度表达；安全性表达全覆盖，但句子数量在不同场景间差异显著。
analysis.method: 使用Gemini 2.5 Flash对6个临床场景重复生成20次运动处方（共120个），通过SBERT余弦相似度评估语义一致性，AI-as-a-judge评估基于FITT原则的结构一致性，以及安全性表达的一致性。
contributions: 首次系统评估LLM生成运动处方的内部一致性，涵盖语义、结构和安全性三个维度。
揭示了LLM在量化成分（如强度）上的变异性，并指出临床部署前需要结构约束和专家验证。
analysis.experiments: 6个临床场景，每个场景20次生成，共120个处方。使用SBERT、AI-as-a-judge和统计检验（H检验）评估一致性。
limitations: 仅使用单一LLM（Gemini 2.5 Flash），可能不具泛化性。
未评估不同提示结构或模型版本的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM生成的运动处方在语义上高度一致，但在关键量化成分（如运动强度）上存在变异性，安全性表达虽全覆盖但数量差异显著。

papers.title: THEIA: Learning Complete Kleene Three-Valued Logic in a Pure-Neural Modular Architecture
papers.abstract: We present THEIA, a 2.75M modular neural architecture that learns the complete Kleene three-valued logic (K3) truth table from task data without external symbolic inference or hand-encoded K3 gate primitives. Across 5 seeds, THEIA achieves all 39 K3 rules at >99% per-rule accuracy. K3 learnability is not the central finding: Transformer baselines also reach >99% on all 39 rules, and flat MLPs match THEIA on Phase-1 accuracy within 0.04pp. The central findings are two properties of the learned system. (1) Uncertainty-verdict asymmetric propagation. The network preserves Has-Unknown at every upstream boundary (80.0/91.1/90.8/99.7% across Arith/Order/Set/Logic vs. ~52% majority) while final-verdict decodability stays at or below a 73.4% U-vs-non-U oracle reference under linear and nonlinear MLP probes. Activation patching on non-absorbent T->U configurations flips 4,898/4,898 OR pairs (4,719/4,719 AND) across 5 seeds, ruling out residual shortcuts. (2) Reliability spectrum under discretized end-to-end training, on task structures decomposable along the engine boundaries. A mod-3 sequential composition task generalizes from 5- to 500-step eval at 99.96+-0.04% (5 seeds). Under identical Gumbel-softmax training, flat MLPs collapse to chance by 50 steps; a 2x2 ResMLP depth x expansion grid reaches >=99% on only 3/20 (config, seed) trials; a pre-LN Transformer reaches 99.24+-0.34%. The 500-step figure is dominated by straight-through discretization preventing 0.999^500 compounding; the architectural separator is sustaining Phase-1 accuracy under Phase-3 end-to-end Gumbel training, where flat MLPs fail. Auxiliary: under matched optimizer settings THEIA reaches 12/12 Kleene coverage 6.5x faster than a parameter-comparable 8L Transformer; the ratio narrows to ~3.6x under Transformer-standard tuning. We did not perform a THEIA-optimal sweep; ratios are specific-config, not asymptotic.

analysis.tldr: THEIA是一个2.75M参数的模块化神经网络，能学习完整的Kleene三值逻辑真值表，并展现出不确定性-非对称传播和离散化端到端训练下的可靠性谱。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经符号方法通常依赖外部符号推理或手工编码的逻辑门原语，缺乏纯神经网络学习完整三值逻辑的能力，且对学习系统的内部属性（如不确定性传播和训练鲁棒性）理解不足。
analysis.problem: 设计一个纯神经模块化架构，使其能从任务数据中学习完整的Kleene三值逻辑（K3）真值表，并分析其不确定性传播特性和离散化端到端训练下的可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到两个核心现象：(1) 不确定性-非对称传播：网络在每个上游边界保留Has-Unknown（80-99.7% vs ~52%多数），而最终判决可解码性低于73.4%的oracle参考，激活修补排除了残余捷径；(2) 离散化端到端训练下的可靠性谱：在模3顺序组合任务中，THEIA从5步泛化到500步（99.96%），而平坦MLP在50步内崩溃，ResMLP和Transformer表现介于之间。
analysis.method: THEIA是一个2.75M参数的模块化神经网络架构，采用纯神经方式学习K3逻辑，无需外部符号推理或手工编码的K3门原语。
contributions: 提出了THEIA，一个纯神经模块化架构，能学习完整的Kleene三值逻辑真值表。
揭示了不确定性-非对称传播特性，即网络在上游边界保留未知状态，但最终判决不依赖该信息。
展示了离散化端到端训练下的可靠性谱，THEIA在长序列任务中保持高精度，而平坦MLP失败。
analysis.experiments: 在5个随机种子下，THEIA在所有39个K3规则上达到>99%的每规则准确率。Transformer基线也达到>99%，平坦MLP在Phase-1准确率上相差0.04个百分点。在模3顺序组合任务中，THEIA从5步泛化到500步（99.96%），平坦MLP在50步内崩溃，ResMLP在20个配置/种子试验中仅3个达到>=99%，Transformer达到99.24%。辅助实验显示THEIA达到12/12 Kleene覆盖的速度比8层Transformer快6.5倍（匹配优化器设置）或~3.6倍（Transformer标准调优）。
limitations: 未进行THEIA最优超参数搜索，速度比较基于特定配置而非渐近性能。
仅验证了K3逻辑，未扩展到其他逻辑系统或更复杂的推理任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: THEIA是一个2.75M参数的模块化神经网络，能学习完整的Kleene三值逻辑真值表，并展现出不确定性-非对称传播和离散化端到端训练下的可靠性谱。

papers.title: Empowering Video Translation using Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Recent developments in video translation have further enhanced cross-lingual access to video content, with multimodal large language models (MLLMs) playing an increasingly important supporting role. With strong multimodal understanding, reasoning, and generation capabilities, MLLMs-based video translation systems are overcoming the limitations of traditional cascaded pipelines that separately handle automatic speech recognition, machine translation, text-to-speech and lip synchronization. These MLLM-powered approaches not only achieve competitive or superior translation quality, but also demonstrate stronger robustness in zero-shot settings and multi-speaker scenarios, while jointly modeling semantic fidelity, timing, speaker identity, and emotional consistency. However, despite the rapid progress of MLLMs and extensive surveys on general video-language understanding, a focused and systematic review of how MLLMs empower video translation tasks is still lacking. To fill this gap, we provide the first comprehensive overview of MLLMs-based video translation, organized around a three-role taxonomy: 1) Semantic Reasoner, which characterizes how MLLMs perform video understanding, temporal reasoning, and multimodal fusion; 2) Expressive Performer, which analyzes LLM-driven and LLM-augmented techniques for expressive, controllable speech generation; and 3) Visual Synthesizer, which examines different types of video generators for high-fidelity lip-sync and visual alignment. Finally, we discuss open challenges in video understanding, temporal modeling, and multimodal alignment, and outline promising future research directions for MLLMs-powered video translation.

analysis.tldr: 首篇系统综述，从语义推理、表达生成、视觉合成三角色分类MLLM赋能的视频翻译方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统视频翻译采用级联流水线（ASR+MT+TTS+唇同步），存在误差累积、鲁棒性差、多说话人场景困难等问题；MLLM虽已展现强大能力，但缺乏针对视频翻译任务的系统综述。
analysis.problem: 如何系统梳理和分类MLLM在视频翻译中的角色与能力，并总结当前挑战与未来方向。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MLLM在零样本和多说话人场景下表现出更强鲁棒性，能联合建模语义保真度、时序、说话人身份和情感一致性。
analysis.method: 提出三角色分类法：1) 语义推理器（视频理解、时序推理、多模态融合）；2) 表达执行器（LLM驱动/增强的语音生成）；3) 视觉合成器（高保真唇同步与视觉对齐）。
contributions: 首次提供MLLM赋能视频翻译的全面综述，填补领域空白。
提出三角色分类框架，系统组织现有方法。
讨论开放挑战并指出未来研究方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述性质，未提出新方法或实验验证。
可能未覆盖所有近期工作或非英语视频翻译场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首篇系统综述，从语义推理、表达生成、视觉合成三角色分类MLLM赋能的视频翻译方法。

papers.title: A Deep Equilibrium Network for Hyperspectral Unmixing
papers.abstract: Hyperspectral unmixing (HU) is crucial for analyzing hyperspectral imagery, yet achieving accurate unmixing remains challenging. While traditional methods struggle to effectively model complex spectral-spatial features, deep learning approaches often lack physical interpretability. Unrolling-based methods, despite offering network interpretability, inadequately exploit spectral-spatial information and incur high memory costs and numerical precision issues during backpropagation. To address these limitations, we propose DEQ-Unmix, which reformulates abundance estimation as a deep equilibrium model, enabling efficient constant-memory training via implicit differentiation. It replaces the gradient operator of the data reconstruction term with a trainable convolutional network to capture spectral-spatial information. By leveraging implicit differentiation, DEQ-Unmix enables efficient and constant-memory backpropagation. Experiments on synthetic and two real-world datasets demonstrate that DEQ-Unmix achieves superior unmixing performance while maintaining constant memory cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出DEQ-Unmix，用深度平衡网络实现高效、低内存的高光谱解混。
analysis.research_motivation: 高光谱解混对分析高光谱图像至关重要，但传统方法难以建模复杂光谱-空间特征，深度学习方法缺乏物理可解释性，展开式方法虽可解释但内存成本高且数值精度差。
analysis.problem: 现有高光谱解混方法在建模光谱-空间信息、保持可解释性和降低内存成本之间难以平衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 展开式方法在反向传播时内存成本高且存在数值精度问题。
analysis.method: 将丰度估计建模为深度平衡模型，通过隐式微分实现常数内存训练，并用可训练卷积网络替代数据重建项的梯度算子以捕获光谱-空间信息。
contributions: 首次将深度平衡模型应用于高光谱解混，实现常数内存训练。
用可训练卷积网络替代梯度算子，增强光谱-空间信息利用。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和两个真实数据集上实验，DEQ-Unmix在保持常数内存成本的同时实现了更优的解混性能。
limitations: 可能对初始条件敏感
隐式微分的收敛性可能受网络设计影响
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DEQ-Unmix，用深度平衡网络实现高效、低内存的高光谱解混。

papers.title: AbLWR:A Context-Aware Listwise Ranking Framework for Antibody-Antigen Binding Affinity Prediction via Positive-Unlabeled Learning
papers.abstract: Accurate prediction of antibody-antigen binding affinity is fundamental to therapeutic design, yet remains constrained by severe label sparsity and the complexity of antigenic variations. In this paper, we propose AbLWR (Antibody-antigen binding affinity List-Wise Ranking), a novel framework that reformulates the conventional affinity regression task as a listwise ranking problem. To mitigate label sparsity, AbLWR incorporates a PU (Positive-Unlabeled) learning mechanism leveraging a dual-level contrastive objective and meta-optimized label refinement to learn robust representations. Furthermore, we address antigenic variation by employing a homologous antigen sampling strategy where Multi-Head Self-Attention (MHSA) explicitly models inter-sample relationships within training lists to capture subtle affinity nuances. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AbLWR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, improving the Precision@1 (P@1) by over 10$\%$ in randomized cross-validation experiments. Notably, case studies on Influenza and IL-33 validate its practical utility, demonstrating robust ranking consistency in distinguishing subtle viral mutations and efficiently prioritizing top-tier candidates for wet-lab screening.

analysis.tldr: 提出AbLWR框架，将抗体-抗原结合亲和力预测转化为列表排序问题，利用正-无标签学习和同源抗原采样策略提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 抗体-抗原结合亲和力预测对治疗设计至关重要，但面临标签稀疏和抗原变异复杂性的挑战，现有方法难以有效应对。
analysis.problem: 解决抗体-抗原结合亲和力预测中标签稀疏和抗原变异导致的预测不准确问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将回归任务重构为列表排序问题，引入正-无标签学习机制（含双级对比目标和元优化标签精炼），并采用同源抗原采样策略结合多头自注意力建模样本间关系。
contributions: 提出AbLWR框架，首次将抗体-抗原结合亲和力预测作为列表排序问题处理。
引入正-无标签学习机制缓解标签稀疏问题。
设计同源抗原采样策略和多头自注意力机制应对抗原变异。
analysis.experiments: 在随机交叉验证实验中，Precision@1提升超过10%；在流感和IL-33案例研究中验证了实际效用。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的同源抗原数据。
列表排序框架的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AbLWR框架，将抗体-抗原结合亲和力预测转化为列表排序问题，利用正-无标签学习和同源抗原采样策略提升性能。

papers.title: Inspectable AI for Science: A Research Object Approach to Generative AI Governance
papers.abstract: This paper introduces AI as a Research Object (AI-RO), a paradigm for governing the use of generative AI in scientific research. Instead of debating whether AI is an author or merely a tool, we propose treating AI interactions as structured, inspectable components of the research process. Under this view, the legitimacy of an AI-assisted scientific paper depends on how model use is integrated into the workflow, documented, and made accountable. Drawing on Research Object theory and FAIR principles, we propose a framework for recording model configuration, prompts, and outputs through interaction logs and metadata packaging. These properties are particularly consequential in security and privacy (S&P) research, where provenance artifacts must satisfy confidentiality constraints, integrity guarantees, and auditability requirements that generic disclosure practices do not address. We implement a lightweight writing pipeline in which a language model synthesizes human-authored structured literature review notes under explicit constraints and produces a verifiable provenance record. We present this work as a position supported by an initial demonstrative workflow, arguing that governance of generative AI in science can be implemented as structured documentation, controlled disclosure, and integrity-preserving provenance capture. Based on this example, we outline and motivate a set of necessary future developments required to make such practices practical and widely adoptable.

analysis.tldr: 提出AI作为研究对象的范式，通过结构化记录和可验证溯源来治理科学中的生成式AI使用。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前关于AI在科学中角色的争论（作者vs工具）缺乏可操作治理方案，尤其在安全与隐私领域，现有披露实践无法满足机密性、完整性和可审计性要求。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种可检查、可问责的框架来记录和验证生成式AI在科学研究中的使用，确保其合法性和可追溯性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AI-RO范式，基于研究对象理论和FAIR原则，通过交互日志和元数据打包记录模型配置、提示和输出，并实现轻量级写作管线以生成可验证溯源记录。
contributions: 提出AI as a Research Object (AI-RO) 治理范式，将AI交互视为结构化、可检查的研究组件。
设计并实现了一个轻量级写作管线，结合约束下的LLM合成与可验证溯源记录。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了一个初始演示性工作流。
limitations: 仅提供概念框架和演示性实现，缺乏大规模实证验证。
未讨论实际部署中的可扩展性和用户接受度问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AI作为研究对象的范式，通过结构化记录和可验证溯源来治理科学中的生成式AI使用。

papers.title: Mobile GUI Agent Privacy Personalization with Trajectory Induced Preference Optimization
papers.abstract: Mobile GUI agents powered by Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) can execute complex tasks on mobile devices. Despite this progress, most existing systems still optimize task success or efficiency, neglecting users' privacy personalization. In this paper, we study the often-overlooked problem of agent personalization. We observe that personalization can induce systematic structural heterogeneity in execution trajectories. For example, privacy-first users often prefer protective actions, e.g., refusing permissions, logging out, and minimizing exposure, leading to logically different execution trajectories from utility-first users. Such variable-length and structurally different trajectories make standard preference optimization unstable and less informative. To address this issue, we propose Trajectory Induced Preference Optimization (TIPO), which uses preference-intensity weighting to emphasize key privacy-related steps and padding gating to suppress alignment noise. Results on our Privacy Preference Dataset show that TIPO improves persona alignment and distinction while preserving strong task executability, achieving 65.60% SR, 46.22 Compliance, and 66.67% PD, outperforming existing optimization methods across various GUI tasks. The code and dataset will be publicly released at https://github.com/Zhixin-L/TIPO.

analysis.tldr: 提出轨迹诱导偏好优化（TIPO）方法，通过偏好强度加权和填充门控机制，实现移动GUI代理的隐私个性化对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有移动GUI代理主要优化任务成功率或效率，忽视了用户隐私个性化需求，而不同隐私偏好的用户在执行轨迹上存在系统性结构异质性，导致标准偏好优化不稳定且信息量不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用结构异质的执行轨迹（如隐私优先与效用优先用户的轨迹长度和结构不同）来有效优化移动GUI代理的隐私个性化偏好。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到隐私个性化会诱导执行轨迹的系统性结构异质性：隐私优先用户倾向于保护性操作（如拒绝权限、注销、最小化暴露），导致轨迹逻辑上与效用优先用户不同，且轨迹长度和结构可变。
analysis.method: 提出Trajectory Induced Preference Optimization (TIPO)，包含偏好强度加权（强调关键隐私步骤）和填充门控（抑制对齐噪声）两个组件。
contributions: 首次系统研究移动GUI代理的隐私个性化问题，并揭示轨迹结构异质性现象。
提出TIPO方法，通过偏好强度加权和填充门控有效处理变长结构异质轨迹的偏好优化。
构建隐私偏好数据集，实验表明TIPO在人物对齐、区分度和任务可执行性上优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在隐私偏好数据集上评估，TIPO在成功率（SR）达65.60%，合规性（Compliance）46.22，人物区分度（PD）66.67%，优于现有优化方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于移动GUI代理场景，泛化性未验证。
隐私偏好数据集的规模和多样性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轨迹诱导偏好优化（TIPO）方法，通过偏好强度加权和填充门控机制，实现移动GUI代理的隐私个性化对齐。

papers.title: Variational Latent Entropy Estimation Disentanglement: Controlled Attribute Leakage for Face Recognition
papers.abstract: Face recognition embeddings encode identity, but they also encode other factors such as gender and ethnicity. Depending on how these factors are used by a downstream system, separating them from the information needed for verification is important for both privacy and fairness. We propose Variational Latent Entropy Estimation Disentanglement (VLEED), a post-hoc method that transforms pretrained embeddings with a variational autoencoder and encourages a distilled representation where the categorical variable of interest is separated from identity-relevant information. VLEED uses a mutual information-based objective realised through the estimation of the entropy of the categorical attribute in the latent space, and provides stable training with fine-grained control over information removal. We evaluate our method on IJB-C, RFW, and VGGFace2 for gender and ethnicity disentanglement, and compare it to various state-of-the-art methods. We report verification utility, predictability of the disentangled variable under linear and nonlinear classifiers, and group disparity metrics based on false match rates. Our results show that VLEED offers a wide range of privacy-utility tradeoffs over existing methods and can also reduce recognition bias across demographic groups.

analysis.tldr: 提出VLEED方法，通过变分自编码器和互信息目标解耦人脸识别嵌入中的身份与属性信息，实现可控隐私-效用权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 人脸识别嵌入不仅编码身份信息，还编码性别、种族等属性，这些属性可能被下游系统滥用，影响隐私和公平性。现有方法难以在去除属性信息的同时保持身份识别性能。
analysis.problem: 如何从预训练的人脸识别嵌入中解耦出与身份无关的属性信息，并实现细粒度的信息移除控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出变分潜在熵估计解耦（VLEED），使用变分自编码器重构预训练嵌入，并通过估计潜在空间中分类属性的熵来构建互信息目标，实现稳定训练和可控信息移除。
contributions: 提出VLEED方法，一种后处理解耦技术，通过互信息目标实现属性信息与身份信息的分离。
在多个基准数据集上展示VLEED在隐私-效用权衡和减少识别偏差方面的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在IJB-C、RFW和VGGFace2数据集上评估性别和种族解耦，与多种SOTA方法比较，报告验证效用、属性可预测性及组间偏差指标。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练嵌入的质量。
仅针对分类属性，连续属性解耦未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VLEED方法，通过变分自编码器和互信息目标解耦人脸识别嵌入中的身份与属性信息，实现可控隐私-效用权衡。

papers.title: Evolving Many Worlds: Towards Open-Ended Discovery in Petri Dish NCA via Population-Based Training
papers.abstract: The generation of sustained, open-ended complexity from local interactions remains a fundamental challenge in artificial life. Differentiable multi-agent systems, such as Petri Dish Neural Cellular Automata (PD-NCA), exhibit rich self-organization driven purely by spatial competition; however, they are highly sensitive to hyperparameters and frequently collapse into uninteresting patterns and dynamics, such as frozen equilibria or structureless noise. In this paper, we introduce PBT-NCA, a meta-evolutionary algorithm that evolves a population of PD-NCAs subject to a composite objective that rewards both historical behavioral novelty and contemporary visual diversity. Driven by this continuous evolutionary pressure, PBT-NCA spontaneously generates a plethora of emergent lifelike phenomena over extended horizons-a hallmark of true open-endedness. Strikingly, the substrate autonomously discovers diverse morphological survival and self-organization strategies. We observe highly regular, coordinated periodic waves; spore-like scattering where homogeneous groups eject cell-like clusters to colonize distant territories; and fluid, shape-shifting macro-structures that migrate across the substrate, maintaining stable outer boundaries that enclose highly active interiors. By actively penalizing monocultures and dead states, PBT-NCA sustains a state of effective complexity that is neither globally ordered nor globally random, operating persistently at the "edge of chaos".

analysis.tldr: 提出PBT-NCA元进化算法，通过种群训练驱动Petri Dish神经细胞自动机持续产生开放式的涌现生命现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 可微分多智能体系统（如PD-NCA）虽能展现丰富的自组织行为，但高度依赖超参数且容易坍缩为无趣模式，难以实现持续的开放式复杂性。
analysis.problem: 如何通过元进化方法使PD-NCA系统避免模式坍缩，长期维持有效复杂性和涌现生命现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: PD-NCA对超参数敏感，常陷入冻结平衡或无结构噪声；PBT-NCA通过惩罚单一文化和死亡状态，使系统持续处于混沌边缘，自发产生周期性波、孢子散射和变形宏观结构等涌现现象。
analysis.method: 提出PBT-NCA，一种基于种群训练的元进化算法，演化一组PD-NCA，优化目标同时奖励历史行为新颖性和当前视觉多样性。
contributions: 提出PBT-NCA元进化框架，实现PD-NCA的开放式发现。
实验观察到多种涌现生命现象，证明系统能持续维持有效复杂性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定初始种群和超参数设置。
开放式的定量评估指标尚不明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PBT-NCA元进化算法，通过种群训练驱动Petri Dish神经细胞自动机持续产生开放式的涌现生命现象。

papers.title: Script-a-Video: Deep Structured Audio-visual Captions via Factorized Streams and Relational Grounding
papers.abstract: Advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are transforming video captioning from a descriptive endpoint into a semantic interface for both video understanding and generation. However, the dominant paradigm still casts videos as monolithic narrative paragraphs that entangle visual, auditory, and identity information. This dense coupling not only compromises representational fidelity but also limits scalability, since even local edits can trigger global rewrites. To address this structural bottleneck, we propose Multi-Stream Scene Script (MTSS), a novel paradigm that replaces monolithic text with factorized and explicitly grounded scene descriptions. MTSS is built on two core principles: Stream Factorization, which decouples a video into complementary streams (Reference, Shot, Event, and Global), and Relational Grounding, which reconnects these isolated streams through explicit identity and temporal links to maintain holistic video consistency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MTSS consistently enhances video understanding across various models, achieving an average reduction of 25% in the total error rate on Video-SALMONN-2 and an average performance gain of 67% on the Daily-Omni reasoning benchmark. It also narrows the performance gap between smaller and larger MLLMs, indicating a substantially more learnable caption interface. Finally, even without architectural adaptation, replacing monolithic prompts with MTSS in multi-shot video generation yields substantial human-rated improvements: a 45% boost in cross-shot identity consistency, a 56% boost in audio-visual alignment, and a 71% boost in temporal controllability.

analysis.tldr: 提出多流场景脚本（MTSS）范式，通过流分解和关系接地解耦视频描述，提升视频理解与生成性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频描述将视觉、听觉和身份信息耦合为单一叙事段落，导致表示保真度低、可扩展性差，局部编辑可能引发全局重写。
analysis.problem: 视频描述中视觉、听觉和身份信息的密集耦合问题，以及由此带来的表示瓶颈和编辑困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多流场景脚本（MTSS），包含流分解（将视频解耦为参考、镜头、事件和全局四个互补流）和关系接地（通过显式身份和时间链接重新连接孤立流）。
contributions: 提出MTSS范式，将视频描述从单一文本分解为因子化且显式接地的场景描述。
在视频理解任务上，MTSS在Video-SALMONN-2上平均降低25%总错误率，在Daily-Omni推理基准上平均提升67%性能。
在多镜头视频生成中，无需架构调整，MTSS在跨镜头身份一致性、音视频对齐和时间可控性上分别提升45%、56%和71%。
analysis.experiments: 在Video-SALMONN-2和Daily-Omni基准上评估视频理解，在多镜头视频生成任务上评估生成质量，均取得显著提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量流分解和关系接地标注。
未讨论对长视频或复杂场景的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多流场景脚本（MTSS）范式，通过流分解和关系接地解耦视频描述，提升视频理解与生成性能。

papers.title: Decoupled Similarity for Task-Aware Token Pruning in Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Token pruning has emerged as an effective approach to reduce the substantial computational overhead of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) by discarding less informative visual tokens while preserving performance. However, existing methods typically rely on individual attention sources from different LVLM components, resulting in incomplete and suboptimal pruning decisions due to biased attention distributions. To address this problem, we propose DeSAP, a novel Decoupled Similarity-Aware Pruning method for precise, task-aware token pruning within the visual encoder. Specifically, DeSAP introduces a decoupled similarity to capture fine-grained cross-modal relevance between visual features and text tokens, providing explicit task-related guidance for pruning. By integrating decoupled similarity with visual saliency signals derived from visual attention, DeSAP performs token pruning under the guidance of both task-related and visual cues, enabling robust pruning even under aggressive pruning ratios. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks and architectures show that DeSAP consistently outperforms SOTA methods in both accuracy and efficiency. On LLaVA-1.5-7B, DeSAP achieves a 10 times FLOPs reduction and a 2.3 times prefill speedup by retaining only 11.1% of visual tokens, while maintaining 98.1% of the original performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦相似度感知剪枝方法DeSAP，利用跨模态相关性指导视觉token剪枝，在LLaVA-1.5-7B上实现10倍FLOPs降低和2.3倍预填充加速，仅保留11.1%的token即可保持98.1%性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）计算开销大，现有token剪枝方法依赖单一注意力源，导致剪枝决策不完整且次优。
analysis.problem: 如何利用跨模态相关性实现精确、任务感知的视觉token剪枝，以在保持性能的同时大幅降低计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法依赖不同LVLM组件的单一注意力源，注意力分布存在偏差，导致剪枝决策不完整。
analysis.method: 提出DeSAP，在视觉编码器中引入解耦相似度，捕获视觉特征与文本token之间的细粒度跨模态相关性，并结合视觉显著性信号进行token剪枝。
contributions: 提出解耦相似度用于任务感知的视觉token剪枝，提供显式的任务相关指导。
集成解耦相似度与视觉显著性信号，实现鲁棒的剪枝，即使在高剪枝率下也能保持性能。
在多个基准和架构上验证，DeSAP在准确率和效率上均优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaVA-1.5-7B上，仅保留11.1%的视觉token，实现10倍FLOPs降低和2.3倍预填充加速，同时保持98.1%的原始性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视觉编码器架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
解耦相似度的计算可能引入额外开销，需权衡剪枝收益。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦相似度感知剪枝方法DeSAP，利用跨模态相关性指导视觉token剪枝，在LLaVA-1.5-7B上实现10倍FLOPs降低和2.3倍预填充加速，仅保留11.1%的token即可保持98.1%性能。

papers.title: Bridging the RGB-IR Gap: Consensus and Discrepancy Modeling for Text-Guided Multispectral Detection
papers.abstract: Text-guided multispectral object detection uses text semantics to guide semantic-aware cross-modal interaction between RGB and IR for more robust perception. However, notable limitations remain: (1) existing methods often use text only as an auxiliary semantic enhancement signal, without exploiting its guiding role to bridge the inherent granularity asymmetry between RGB and IR; and (2) conventional data-driven attention-based fusion tends to emphasize stable consensus while overlooking potentially valuable cross-modal discrepancies. To address these issues, we propose a semantic bridge fusion framework with bi-support modeling for multispectral object detection. Specifically, text is used as a shared semantic bridge to align RGB and IR responses under a unified category condition, while the recalibrated thermal semantic prior is projected onto the RGB branch for semantic-level mapping fusion. We further formulate RGB-IR interaction evidence into the regular consensus support and the complementary discrepancy support that contains potentially discriminative cues, and introduce them into fusion via dynamic recalibration as a structured inductive bias. In addition, we design a bidirectional semantic alignment module for closed-loop vision-text guidance enhancement. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed fusion framework and its superior detection performance on multispectral benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/zhenwang5372/Bridging-RGB-IR-Gap.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义桥融合框架，利用文本对齐RGB和IR模态，并建模共识与差异支持，提升多光谱目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本引导多光谱检测方法仅将文本作为辅助语义增强信号，未充分利用其桥接RGB和IR模态间粒度不对称性的能力，且数据驱动的注意力融合倾向于强调稳定共识而忽略有价值的跨模态差异。
