analysis.problem: 如何利用文本语义作为桥梁，有效对齐RGB和IR模态并同时建模共识与差异信息，提升多光谱目标检测的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出语义桥融合框架，包含：1) 以文本为共享语义桥对齐RGB和IR响应；2) 将热语义先验投影到RGB分支进行语义级映射融合；3) 将RGB-IR交互证据分为共识支持和互补差异支持，通过动态重校准作为结构化归纳偏置引入融合；4) 设计双向语义对齐模块实现闭环视觉-文本引导增强。
contributions: 提出语义桥融合框架，利用文本作为共享语义桥对齐RGB和IR模态。
引入共识与差异双支持建模，动态重校准融合跨模态信息。
设计双向语义对齐模块增强视觉-文本引导。
analysis.experiments: 在多光谱基准数据集上进行了大量实验，验证了所提框架的有效性和优越检测性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量文本描述，实际场景中文本可能不精确。
计算复杂度可能较高，需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义桥融合框架，利用文本对齐RGB和IR模态，并建模共识与差异支持，提升多光谱目标检测性能。

papers.title: Seg2Change: Adapting Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation Model for Remote Sensing Change Detection
papers.abstract: Change detection is a fundamental task in remote sensing, aiming to quantify the impacts of human activities and ecological dynamics on land-cover changes. Existing change detection methods are limited to predefined classes in training datasets, which constrains their scalability in real-world scenarios. In recent years, numerous advanced open-vocabulary semantic segmentation models have emerged for remote sensing imagery. However, there is still a lack of an effective framework for directly applying these models to open-vocabulary change detection (OVCD), a novel task that integrates vision and language to detect changes across arbitrary categories. To address these challenges, we first construct a category-agnostic change detection dataset, termed CA-CDD. Further, we design a category-agnostic change head to detect the transitions of arbitrary categories and index them to specific classes. Based on them, we propose Seg2Change, an adapter designed to adapt open-vocabulary semantic segmentation models to change detection task. Without bells and whistles, this simple yet effective framework achieves state-of-the-art OVCD performance (+9.52 IoU on WHU-CD and +5.50 mIoU on SECOND). Our code is released at https://github.com/yogurts-sy/Seg2Change.

analysis.tldr: 将开放词汇语义分割模型适配到遥感变化检测，通过类别无关变化头实现任意类别变化检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有变化检测方法局限于训练数据集的预定义类别，限制了其在真实场景中的可扩展性；而开放词汇语义分割模型虽已发展，但缺乏直接应用于开放词汇变化检测的有效框架。
analysis.problem: 如何将开放词汇语义分割模型有效适配到变化检测任务，实现任意类别的变化检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建类别无关变化检测数据集CA-CDD，设计类别无关变化头检测任意类别变化并索引到特定类，提出适配器Seg2Change。
contributions: 构建了类别无关变化检测数据集CA-CDD。
提出Seg2Change框架，将开放词汇语义分割模型适配到变化检测，实现SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在WHU-CD和SECOND数据集上评估，OVCD性能分别提升+9.52 IoU和+5.50 mIoU。
limitations: 可能依赖基础分割模型的质量。
类别无关变化头的泛化能力可能受限于数据集多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将开放词汇语义分割模型适配到遥感变化检测，通过类别无关变化头实现任意类别变化检测。

papers.title: NTIRE 2026 The 3rd Restore Any Image Model (RAIM) Challenge: AI Flash Portrait (Track 3)
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present a comprehensive overview of the NTIRE 2026 3rd Restore Any Image Model (RAIM) challenge, with a specific focus on Track 3: AI Flash Portrait. Despite significant advancements in deep learning for image restoration, existing models still encounter substantial challenges in real-world low-light portrait scenarios. Specifically, they struggle to achieve an optimal balance among noise suppression, detail preservation, and faithful illumination and color reproduction. To bridge this gap, this challenge aims to establish a novel benchmark for real-world low-light portrait restoration. We comprehensively evaluate the proposed algorithms utilizing a hybrid evaluation system that integrates objective quantitative metrics with rigorous subjective assessment protocols. For this competition, we provide a dataset containing 800 groups of real-captured low-light portrait data. Each group consists of a 1K-resolution low-light input image, a 1K ground truth (GT), and a 1K person mask. This challenge has garnered widespread attention from both academia and industry, attracting over 100 participating teams and receiving more than 3,000 valid submissions. This report details the motivation behind the challenge, the dataset construction process, the evaluation metrics, and the various phases of the competition. The released dataset and baseline code for this track are publicly available from the same \href{https://github.com/zsn1434/AI_Flash-BaseLine/tree/main}{GitHub repository}, and the official challenge webpage is hosted on \href{https://www.codabench.org/competitions/12885/}{CodaBench}.

analysis.tldr: NTIRE 2026 RAIM挑战赛Track 3聚焦AI闪光灯人像，提供800组真实低光人像数据，吸引超100支队伍参与。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像恢复模型在真实低光人像场景中难以平衡噪声抑制、细节保留和光照色彩还原，亟需专门基准和数据集推动研究。
analysis.problem: 解决真实低光人像恢复中噪声、细节与色彩平衡的难题，建立新基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 组织挑战赛，提供800组1K分辨率低光人像数据（含输入、GT、人像掩码），采用客观指标与主观评估结合的混合评价体系。
contributions: 构建了首个面向真实低光人像恢复的基准数据集（800组1K图像）。
通过大规模挑战赛（超100支队伍、3000+提交）推动该领域研究。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（800组），可能无法覆盖所有低光场景。
挑战赛结果未在摘要中披露，方法有效性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NTIRE 2026 RAIM挑战赛Track 3聚焦AI闪光灯人像，提供800组真实低光人像数据，吸引超100支队伍参与。

papers.title: RECIPER: A Dual-View Retrieval Pipeline for Procedure-Oriented Materials Question Answering
papers.abstract: Retrieving procedure-oriented evidence from materials science papers is difficult because key synthesis details are often scattered across long, context-heavy documents and are not well captured by paragraph-only dense retrieval. We present RECIPER, a dual-view retrieval pipeline that indexes both paragraph-level context and compact large language model-extracted procedural summaries, then combines the two candidate streams with lightweight lexical reranking. Across four dense retrieval backbones, RECIPER consistently improves early-rank retrieval over paragraph-only dense retrieval, achieving average gains of +3.73 in Recall@1, +2.85 in nDCG@10, and +3.13 in MRR. With BGE-large-en-v1.5, it reaches 86.82%, 97.07%, and 97.85% on Recall@1, Recall@5, and Recall@10, respectively. We further observe improved downstream question answering under automatic metrics, suggesting that procedural summaries can serve as a useful complementary retrieval signal for procedure-oriented materials question answering. Code and data are available at https://github.com/ReaganWu/RECIPER.

analysis.tldr: RECIPER 提出双视图检索流程，结合段落上下文和 LLM 提取的流程摘要，显著提升材料科学中面向流程的问答检索性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 材料科学论文中的关键合成细节分散在长且上下文密集的文档中，仅靠段落级稠密检索难以有效捕获，导致面向流程的问答证据检索困难。
analysis.problem: 如何从材料科学论文中高效检索面向流程的证据，以支持流程导向的问答任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: RECIPER 构建双视图检索流程：索引段落级上下文和 LLM 提取的紧凑流程摘要，然后通过轻量级词汇重排序合并两个候选流。
contributions: 提出双视图检索流程，结合段落和流程摘要两种视图。
在多个稠密检索骨干上一致提升早期排名检索性能，平均 Recall@1 提升 +3.73，nDCG@10 提升 +2.85，MRR 提升 +3.13。
开源代码和数据，促进可复现研究。
analysis.experiments: 在四个稠密检索骨干上评估，使用 Recall@1、nDCG@10、MRR 等指标，并观察下游问答自动指标的改进。
limitations: 流程摘要依赖 LLM 提取，可能引入噪声或遗漏细节。
仅针对材料科学领域，泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RECIPER 提出双视图检索流程，结合段落上下文和 LLM 提取的流程摘要，显著提升材料科学中面向流程的问答检索性能。

papers.title: Sign Language Recognition in the Age of LLMs
papers.abstract: Recent Vision Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong performance across a wide range of multimodal reasoning tasks. This raises the question of whether such general-purpose models can also address specialized visual recognition problems such as isolated sign language recognition (ISLR) without task-specific training. In this work, we investigate the capability of modern VLMs to perform ISLR in a zero-shot setting. We evaluate several open-source and proprietary VLMs on the WLASL300 benchmark. Our experiments show that, under prompt-only zero-shot inference, current open-source VLMs remain far behind classic supervised ISLR classifiers by a wide margin. However, follow-up experiments reveal that these models capture partial visual-semantic alignment between signs and text descriptions. Larger proprietary models achieve substantially higher accuracy, highlighting the importance of model scale and training data diversity. All our code is publicly available on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 探索通用视觉语言模型在零样本孤立手语识别上的能力，发现开源模型远逊于监督方法，但大模型展现出部分语义对齐能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用视觉语言模型在多种多模态任务上表现优异，但能否直接解决手语识别这类专业视觉问题尚不清楚，且传统方法需要大量标注数据。
analysis.problem: 评估现代视觉语言模型在零样本孤立手语识别任务上的性能，并与经典监督方法对比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 开源VLM在零样本下远落后于监督分类器，但大模型（如专有模型）准确率显著更高，表明模型规模和训练数据多样性是关键因素。
analysis.method: 在WLASL300基准上，通过提示词驱动零样本推理，评估多个开源和专有VLM的孤立手语识别准确率。
contributions: 首次系统评估现代VLM在零样本孤立手语识别上的表现
揭示开源VLM与监督方法的巨大差距，并指出模型规模和数据多样性的重要性
analysis.experiments: 在WLASL300基准上评估多个开源和专有VLM，对比经典监督ISLR分类器。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅评估了WLASL300一个数据集，泛化性未知
未深入分析模型失败的具体原因
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探索通用视觉语言模型在零样本孤立手语识别上的能力，发现开源模型远逊于监督方法，但大模型展现出部分语义对齐能力。

papers.title: Regional Explanations: Bridging Local and Global Variable Importance
papers.abstract: We analyze two widely used local attribution methods, Local Shapley Values and LIME, which aim to quantify the contribution of a feature value $x_i$ to a specific prediction $f(x_1, \dots, x_p)$. Despite their widespread use, we identify fundamental limitations in their ability to reliably detect locally important features, even under ideal conditions with exact computations and independent features. We argue that a sound local attribution method should not assign importance to features that neither influence the model output (e.g., features with zero coefficients in a linear model) nor exhibit statistical dependence with functionality-relevant features. We demonstrate that both Local SV and LIME violate this fundamental principle. To address this, we propose R-LOCO (Regional Leave Out COvariates), which bridges the gap between local and global explanations and provides more accurate attributions. R-LOCO segments the input space into regions with similar feature importance characteristics. It then applies global attribution methods within these regions, deriving an instance's feature contributions from its regional membership. This approach delivers more faithful local attributions while avoiding local explanation instability and preserving instance-specific detail often lost in global methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出R-LOCO方法，通过区域划分桥接局部与全局特征重要性解释，解决局部归因方法（如LIME、Shapley值）的不可靠问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有局部归因方法（如Local Shapley Values和LIME）在理想条件下仍无法可靠检测局部重要特征，可能将重要性赋予不相关特征，导致解释不可信。
analysis.problem: 局部归因方法在独立特征和精确计算下仍存在根本性局限，无法区分真正影响模型输出的特征与统计依赖特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，即使在线性模型中系数为零的特征，局部归因方法也可能错误地赋予重要性，且LIME和Local SV均违反“不应赋予无关特征重要性”的原则。
analysis.method: 提出R-LOCO方法，将输入空间划分为具有相似特征重要性特征的区域，然后在区域内应用全局归因方法，通过区域成员身份推导实例的特征贡献。
contributions: 揭示了局部归因方法（Local SV和LIME）在理想条件下的根本性局限。
提出了R-LOCO方法，桥接局部与全局解释，提供更忠实且稳定的局部归因。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 区域划分的粒度可能影响解释精度。
方法可能依赖全局归因方法的准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出R-LOCO方法，通过区域划分桥接局部与全局特征重要性解释，解决局部归因方法（如LIME、Shapley值）的不可靠问题。

papers.title: H-SPAM: Hierarchical Superpixel Anything Model
papers.abstract: Superpixels offer a compact image representation by grouping pixels into coherent regions. Recent methods have reached a plateau in terms of segmentation accuracy by generating noisy superpixel shapes. Moreover, most existing approaches produce a single fixed-scale partition that limits their use in vision pipelines that would benefit multi-scale representations. In this work, we introduce H-SPAM (Hierarchical Superpixel Anything Model), a unified framework for generating accurate, regular, and perfectly nested hierarchical superpixels. Starting from a fine partition, guided by deep features and external object priors, H-SPAM constructs the hierarchy through a two-phase region merging process that first preserves object consistency and then allows controlled inter-object grouping. The hierarchy can also be modulated using visual attention maps or user input to preserve important regions longer in the hierarchy. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that H-SPAM strongly outperforms existing hierarchical methods in both accuracy and regularity, while performing on par with most recent state-of-the-art non-hierarchical methods. Code and pretrained models are available: https://github.com/waldo-j/hspam.

analysis.tldr: H-SPAM 通过两阶段区域合并和深度特征引导，生成准确、规则且完美嵌套的分层超像素。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有超像素方法在分割精度上遇到瓶颈，产生噪声形状，且大多只生成单一固定尺度，限制了多尺度视觉管道的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何生成既准确又规则、且支持多尺度层次结构的超像素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在分割精度上达到平台期，生成的超像素形状有噪声，且缺乏层次结构。
analysis.method: H-SPAM 从精细分割开始，利用深度特征和外部对象先验，通过两阶段区域合并构建层次：第一阶段保持对象一致性，第二阶段允许受控的跨对象分组；层次还可通过视觉注意力图或用户输入进行调制。
contributions: 提出 H-SPAM，一个统一框架，生成准确、规则且完美嵌套的分层超像素。
设计两阶段区域合并过程，结合深度特征和外部对象先验，提升层次质量。
在标准基准上，H-SPAM 在准确性和规则性上显著优于现有分层方法，并与最新非分层方法性能相当。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上评估，H-SPAM 在准确性和规则性上强于现有分层方法，与非分层 SOTA 方法性能相当。
limitations: 可能依赖外部对象先验的质量。
层次构建的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: H-SPAM 通过两阶段区域合并和深度特征引导，生成准确、规则且完美嵌套的分层超像素。

papers.title: Measuring the Authority Stack of AI Systems: Empirical Analysis of 366,120 Forced-Choice Responses Across 8 AI Models
papers.abstract: What values, evidence preferences, and source trust hierarchies do AI systems actually exhibit when facing structured dilemmas? We present the first large-scale empirical mapping of AI decision-making across all three layers of the Authority Stack framework (S. Lee, 2026a): value priorities (L4), evidence-type preferences (L3), and source trust hierarchies (L2). Using the PRISM benchmark -- a forced-choice instrument of 14,175 unique scenarios per layer, spanning 7 professional domains, 3 severity levels, 3 decision timeframes, and 5 scenario variants -- we evaluated 8 major AI models at temperature 0, yielding 366,120 total responses. Key findings include: (1) a symmetric 4:4 split between Universalism-first and Security-first models at L4; (2) dramatic defense-domain value restructuring where Security surges to near-ceiling win-rates (95.1%-99.8%) in 6 of 8 models; (3) divergent evidence hierarchies at L3, with some models favoring empirical-scientific evidence while others prefer pattern-based or experiential evidence; (4) broad convergence on institutional source trust at L2; and (5) Paired Consistency Scores (PCS) ranging from 57.4% to 69.2%, revealing substantial framing sensitivity across scenario variants. Test-Retest Reliability (TRR) ranges from 91.7% to 98.6%, indicating that value instability stems primarily from variant sensitivity rather than stochastic noise. These findings demonstrate that AI models possess measurable -- if sometimes unstable -- Authority Stacks with consequential implications for deployment across professional domains.

analysis.tldr: 首次大规模实证绘制8个AI模型在权威堆栈框架下的价值、证据偏好和信任层级，揭示模型间显著差异与框架敏感性。
analysis.research_motivation: AI系统在结构化困境中展现的价值、证据偏好和信任层级尚缺乏大规模实证映射，现有研究未系统量化这些决策维度及其稳定性，对AI在专业领域的部署有重要影响。
analysis.problem: 如何系统测量和比较AI模型在价值优先级、证据类型偏好和来源信任层级三个层面的决策模式及其稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：(1) 模型在价值层呈4:4对称分裂（普世主义优先 vs 安全优先）；(2) 防御领域安全价值胜率飙升（95.1%-99.8%）；(3) 证据层级存在分歧（实证科学 vs 模式/经验）；(4) 来源信任层级趋同于机构信任；(5) 配对一致性得分（PCS）57.4%-69.2%，显示显著框架敏感性；(6) 重测信度（TRR）91.7%-98.6%，表明价值不稳定性主要源于变体敏感性而非随机噪声。
analysis.method: 基于权威堆栈框架（S. Lee, 2026a），使用PRISM基准（每层14,175个强制选择场景，涵盖7个专业领域、3个严重级别、3个决策时间框架和5个场景变体），在温度0下评估8个主要AI模型，共收集366,120个响应。
contributions: 首次大规模实证绘制AI模型在权威堆栈三个层面（价值、证据、信任）的决策模式。
揭示了模型间在价值优先级和证据偏好上的显著分歧，以及防御领域的价值重构现象。
量化了框架敏感性对模型决策稳定性的影响，并区分了变体敏感性与随机噪声的贡献。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了关键发现：价值层4:4分裂、防御领域安全胜率95.1%-99.8%、PCS 57.4%-69.2%、TRR 91.7%-98.6%。
limitations: 仅评估了8个模型，可能无法代表所有AI系统。
强制选择范式可能无法完全反映真实世界中的复杂决策。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次大规模实证绘制8个AI模型在权威堆栈框架下的价值、证据偏好和信任层级，揭示模型间显著差异与框架敏感性。

papers.title: 3DTV: A Feedforward Interpolation Network for Real-Time View Synthesis
papers.abstract: Real-time free-viewpoint rendering requires balancing multi-camera redundancy with the latency constraints of interactive applications. We address this challenge by combining lightweight geometry with learning and propose 3DTV, a feedforward network for real-time sparse-view interpolation. A Delaunay-based triplet selection ensures angular coverage for each target view. Building on this, we introduce a pose-aware depth module that estimates a coarse-to-fine depth pyramid, enabling efficient feature reprojection and occlusion-aware blending. Unlike methods that require scene-specific optimization, 3DTV runs feedforward without retraining, making it practical for AR/VR, telepresence, and interactive applications. Our experiments on challenging multi-view video datasets demonstrate that 3DTV consistently achieves a strong balance of quality and efficiency, outperforming recent real-time novel-view baselines. Crucially, 3DTV avoids explicit proxies, enabling robust rendering across diverse scenes. This makes it a practical solution for low-latency multi-view streaming and interactive rendering. Project Page: https://stefanmschulz.github.io/3DTV_webpage/

analysis.tldr: 3DTV 提出一种前馈插值网络，结合 Delaunay 三角选择和姿态感知深度模块，实现实时稀疏视角合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 实时自由视角渲染需要在多摄像头冗余与交互应用的低延迟约束之间取得平衡，现有方法常需场景特定优化，难以实用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖场景特定优化的情况下，实现高质量、低延迟的稀疏视角插值。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 3DTV 前馈网络，使用 Delaunay 三角选择目标视角的相邻视图，通过姿态感知深度模块估计由粗到细的深度金字塔，实现高效特征重投影和遮挡感知融合。
contributions: 提出一种前馈稀疏视角插值网络，无需场景特定优化即可运行。
引入 Delaunay 三角选择和姿态感知深度模块，提升渲染质量和效率。
analysis.experiments: 在多视角视频数据集上评估，3DTV 在质量和效率上优于近期实时新视角合成基线。
limitations: 可能对极端稀疏视角或复杂遮挡场景效果有限。
深度估计依赖姿态信息，在姿态不准确时可能退化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 3DTV 提出一种前馈插值网络，结合 Delaunay 三角选择和姿态感知深度模块，实现实时稀疏视角合成。

papers.title: Exploring Knowledge Conflicts for Faithful LLM Reasoning: Benchmark and Method
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success across a wide range of applications especially when augmented by external knowledge through retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Despite their widespread adoption, recent studies have shown that LLMs often struggle to perform faithful reasoning when conflicting knowledge is retrieved. However, existing work primarily focuses on conflicts between external knowledge and the parametric knowledge of LLMs, leaving conflicts across external knowledge largely unexplored. Meanwhile, modern RAG systems increasingly emphasize the integration of unstructured text and (semi-)structured data like knowledge graphs (KGs) to improve knowledge completeness and reasoning faithfulness. To address this gap, we introduce ConflictQA, a novel benchmark that systematically instantiates conflicts between textual evidence and KG evidence. Extensive evaluations across representative LLMs reveal that, facing such cross-source conflicts, LLMs often fail to identify reliable evidence for correct reasoning. Instead, LLMs become more sensitive to prompting choices and tend to rely exclusively on either KG or textual evidence, resulting in incorrect responses. Based on these findings, we further propose XoT, a two-stage explanation-based thinking framework tailored for reasoning over heterogeneous conflicting evidence, and verify its effectiveness with extensive experiments.

analysis.tldr: 提出冲突知识推理基准ConflictQA和两阶段解释思考框架XoT，提升LLM在异构冲突证据下的忠实推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RAG系统常整合文本和知识图谱等多源知识，但LLM在面临跨源冲突时推理不忠实，而现有研究主要关注外部知识与参数知识间的冲突，忽略了外部知识间的冲突。
analysis.problem: LLM在检索增强生成中面对文本证据与知识图谱证据之间的冲突时，难以识别可靠证据进行正确推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM面对跨源冲突时，对提示选择更敏感，倾向于仅依赖KG或文本证据，导致错误回答。
analysis.method: 提出XoT，一个两阶段基于解释的思考框架：第一阶段生成解释，第二阶段基于解释进行推理，以处理异构冲突证据。
contributions: 构建ConflictQA基准，系统实例化文本证据与KG证据之间的冲突。
揭示LLM在跨源冲突下的失败模式。
提出XoT框架，有效提升LLM在冲突证据下的推理忠实性。
analysis.experiments: 在ConflictQA基准上对代表性LLM进行广泛评估，验证XoT的有效性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对文本与KG两种证据源，未涵盖更多类型。
XoT框架的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出冲突知识推理基准ConflictQA和两阶段解释思考框架XoT，提升LLM在异构冲突证据下的忠实推理能力。

papers.title: LoViF 2026 Challenge on Human-oriented Semantic Image Quality Assessment: Methods and Results
papers.abstract: This paper reviews the LoViF 2026 Challenge on Human-oriented Semantic Image Quality Assessment. This challenge aims to raise a new direction, i.e., how to evaluate the loss of semantic information from the human perspective, intending to promote the development of some new directions, like semantic coding, processing, and semantic-oriented optimization, etc. Unlike existing datasets of quality assessment, we form a dataset of human-oriented semantic quality assessment, termed the SeIQA dataset. This dataset is divided into three parts for this competition: (i) training data: 510 pairs of degraded images and their corresponding ground truth references; (ii) validation data: 80 pairs of degraded images and their corresponding ground-truth references; (iii) testing data: 160 pairs of degraded images and their corresponding ground-truth references. The primary objective of this challenge is to establish a new and powerful benchmark for human-oriented semantic image quality assessment. There are a total of 58 teams registered in this competition, and 6 teams submitted valid solutions and fact sheets for the final testing phase. These submissions achieved state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on the SeIQA dataset.

analysis.tldr: LoViF 2026挑战赛聚焦人类视角的语义图像质量评估，发布了SeIQA数据集并总结了6个参赛团队的SOTA方案。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像质量评估数据集多关注像素级失真，缺乏从人类视角评估语义信息损失的方法，这限制了语义编码、处理等方向的发展。
analysis.problem: 如何建立人类视角下的语义图像质量评估基准，并开发能够准确预测语义质量损失的模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 组织挑战赛，构建SeIQA数据集（包含510对训练、80对验证、160对测试的退化图像与参考图像），并收集6个参赛团队的解决方案。
contributions: 提出了人类视角语义图像质量评估的新方向，并发布了SeIQA数据集。
通过挑战赛总结了6个SOTA方案，为后续研究提供了基准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及参赛方案在SeIQA数据集上达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（共750对图像），可能限制模型泛化性。
未详细说明各方案的具体方法及对比，缺乏深入分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LoViF 2026挑战赛聚焦人类视角的语义图像质量评估，发布了SeIQA数据集并总结了6个参赛团队的SOTA方案。

papers.title: Designing Adaptive Digital Nudging Systems with LLM-Driven Reasoning
papers.abstract: Digital nudging systems lack architectural guidance for translating behavioral science into software design. While research identifies nudge strategies and quality attributes, existing architectures fail to integrate multi-dimensional user modeling with ethical compliance as architectural concerns. We present an architecture that uses behavioral theory through explicit architectural decisions, treating ethics and fairness as structural guardrails rather than implementation details. A literature review synthesized 68 nudging strategies, 11 quality attributes, and 3 user profiling dimensions into architectural requirements. The architecture implements sequential processing layers with cross-cutting evaluation modules enforcing regulatory compliance. Validation with 13 software architects confirmed requirements satisfaction and domain transferability. An LLM-powered proof-of-concept in residential energy sustainability demonstrated feasibility through evaluation with 15 users, achieving high perceived intervention quality and measurable positive emotional impact. This work bridges behavioral science and software architecture by providing reusable patterns for adaptive systems that balance effectiveness with ethical constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于LLM推理的自适应数字助推系统架构，将行为科学理论与伦理合规作为架构级约束。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数字助推系统缺乏将行为科学转化为软件设计的架构指导，且未能将多维度用户建模与伦理合规作为架构关注点。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个架构，能够系统性地整合行为科学策略、多维度用户建模和伦理合规约束，并利用LLM实现自适应助推。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过文献综述综合68种助推策略、11个质量属性和3个用户画像维度，设计具有顺序处理层和横切评估模块的架构，并使用LLM驱动推理实现自适应助推。
contributions: 提出了一个将行为科学理论作为显式架构决策的数字助推系统架构，将伦理和公平性作为结构性护栏。
通过13位软件架构师的验证和15位用户的能源可持续性概念验证，证明了架构的可行性和有效性。
analysis.experiments: 通过13位软件架构师验证了需求满足度和领域可迁移性；在住宅能源可持续性场景中，15位用户评估显示高感知干预质量和积极情感影响。
limitations: 概念验证仅在单一领域（能源可持续性）进行，泛化性有待进一步验证。
用户评估样本量较小（15人），可能影响统计显著性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于LLM推理的自适应数字助推系统架构，将行为科学理论与伦理合规作为架构级约束。

papers.title: CocoaBench: Evaluating Unified Digital Agents in the Wild
papers.abstract: LLM agents now perform strongly in software engineering, deep research, GUI automation, and various other applications, while recent agent scaffolds and models are increasingly integrating these capabilities into unified systems. Yet, most evaluations still test these capabilities in isolation, which leaves a gap for more diverse use cases that require agents to combine different capabilities. We introduce CocoaBench, a benchmark for unified digital agents built from human-designed, long-horizon tasks that require flexible composition of vision, search, and coding. Tasks are specified only by an instruction and an automatic evaluation function over the final output, enabling reliable and scalable evaluation across diverse agent infrastructures. We also present CocoaAgent, a lightweight shared scaffold for controlled comparison across model backbones. Experiments show that current agents remain far from reliable on CocoaBench, with the best evaluated system achieving only 45.1% success rate. Our analysis further points to substantial room for improvement in reasoning and planning, tool use and execution, and visual grounding.

analysis.tldr: CocoaBench 是一个评估统一数字智能体的基准，要求智能体灵活组合视觉、搜索和编码能力，当前最佳系统成功率仅 45.1%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估大多孤立测试智能体的不同能力，缺乏对需要组合多种能力的多样化用例的评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够评估统一数字智能体在需要灵活组合视觉、搜索和编码能力的长期任务上的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前智能体在 CocoaBench 上表现不佳，最佳系统成功率仅 45.1%，在推理与规划、工具使用与执行、视觉定位方面存在显著改进空间。
analysis.method: 构建了 CocoaBench 基准，包含人类设计的长期任务，仅通过指令和自动评估函数指定任务；同时提出 CocoaAgent 轻量级共享脚手架，用于跨模型骨干的受控比较。
contributions: 提出了 CocoaBench，一个用于评估统一数字智能体的基准，包含需要组合视觉、搜索和编码能力的长期任务。
提供了 CocoaAgent 轻量级共享脚手架，便于跨模型骨干的受控比较。
实验揭示了当前智能体在推理与规划、工具使用与执行、视觉定位方面的不足。
analysis.experiments: 在 CocoaBench 上评估了多个智能体系统，最佳系统成功率为 45.1%，并分析了失败模式。
limitations: 基准任务可能无法覆盖所有真实世界场景。
自动评估函数可能无法完全捕捉任务完成的细微差别。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CocoaBench 是一个评估统一数字智能体的基准，要求智能体灵活组合视觉、搜索和编码能力，当前最佳系统成功率仅 45.1%。

papers.title: ShapShift: Explaining Model Prediction Shifts with Subgroup Conditional Shapley Values
papers.abstract: Changes in input distribution can induce shifts in the average predictions of machine learning models. Such prediction shifts may impact downstream business outcomes (e.g. a bank's loan approval rate), so understanding their causes can be crucial. We propose \ours{}: a Shapley value method for attributing prediction shifts to changes in the conditional probabilities of interpretable subgroups of data, where these subgroups are defined by the structure of decision trees. We initially apply this method to single decision trees, providing exact explanations based on conditional probability changes at split nodes. Next, we extend it to tree ensembles by selecting the most explanatory tree and accounting for residual effects. Finally, we propose a model-agnostic variant using surrogate trees grown with a novel objective function, allowing application to models like neural networks. While exact computation can be intensive, approximation techniques enable practical application. We show that \ours{} provides simple, faithful, and near-complete explanations of prediction shifts across model classes, aiding model monitoring in dynamic environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出ShapShift方法，用条件Shapley值将模型预测偏移归因于可解释子群的分布变化。
analysis.research_motivation: 输入分布变化会导致模型平均预测偏移，影响业务决策（如贷款审批率），理解偏移原因对模型监控至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何将模型预测偏移归因于数据中可解释子群的条件概率变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于决策树结构定义可解释子群，提出条件Shapley值方法；先用于单决策树，再扩展至树集成（选最佳树并处理残差），最后用新型目标函数训练替代树实现模型无关版本。
contributions: 提出ShapShift方法，将预测偏移归因于子群条件概率变化。
提供精确解释（单树）、扩展至树集成及模型无关变体（替代树）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 精确计算可能计算密集。
模型无关变体依赖替代树，可能损失部分保真度。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ShapShift方法，用条件Shapley值将模型预测偏移归因于可解释子群的分布变化。

papers.title: MedP-CLIP: Medical CLIP with Region-Aware Prompt Integration
papers.abstract: Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has demonstrated outstanding performance in global image understanding and zero-shot transfer through large-scale text-image alignment. However, the core of medical image analysis often lies in the fine-grained understanding of specific anatomical structures or lesion regions. Therefore, precisely comprehending region-of-interest (RoI) information provided by medical professionals or perception models becomes crucial. To address this need, we propose MedP-CLIP, a region-aware medical vision-language model (VLM). MedP-CLIP innovatively integrates medical prior knowledge and designs a feature-level region prompt integration mechanism, enabling it to flexibly respond to various prompt forms (e.g., points, bounding boxes, masks) while maintaining global contextual awareness when focusing on local regions. We pre-train the model on a meticulously constructed large-scale dataset (containing over 6.4 million medical images and 97.3 million region-level annotations), equipping it with cross-disease and cross-modality fine-grained spatial semantic understanding capabilities. Experiments demonstrate that MedP-CLIP significantly outperforms baseline methods in various medical tasks, including zero-shot recognition, interactive segmentation, and empowering multimodal large language models. This model provides a scalable, plug-and-play visual backbone for medical AI, combining holistic image understanding with precise regional analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出MedP-CLIP，通过区域感知提示集成机制增强医学CLIP对感兴趣区域的细粒度理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分析的核心在于对特定解剖结构或病灶区域的细粒度理解，而现有CLIP模型主要擅长全局图像理解，缺乏对区域级信息的精确建模能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让视觉-语言模型在保持全局上下文感知的同时，灵活地理解和响应医学图像中的区域级信息（如点、框、掩码）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MedP-CLIP，创新性地集成医学先验知识并设计特征级区域提示集成机制，支持多种提示形式（点、框、掩码），在保持全局感知的同时聚焦局部区域。
contributions: 提出区域感知的医学视觉-语言模型MedP-CLIP，实现全局与局部理解的结合。
构建大规模预训练数据集（640万+医学图像，9730万区域级标注），赋予模型跨疾病、跨模态的细粒度空间语义理解能力。
analysis.experiments: 在零样本识别、交互式分割和赋能多模态大语言模型等任务上，MedP-CLIP显著优于基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模高质量区域标注，数据获取成本高。
区域提示集成机制在极端复杂场景下的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MedP-CLIP，通过区域感知提示集成机制增强医学CLIP对感兴趣区域的细粒度理解。

papers.title: Towards Adaptive Open-Set Object Detection via Category-Level Collaboration Knowledge Mining
papers.abstract: Existing object detectors often struggle to generalize across domains while adapting to emerging novel categories. Adaptive open-set object detection (AOOD) addresses this challenge by training on base categories in the source domain and adapting to both base and novel categories in the target domain without target annotations. However, current AOOD methods remain limited by weak cross-domain representations, ambiguity among novel categories, and source-domain feature bias. To address these issues, we propose a category-level collaboration knowledge mining strategy that exploits both inter-class and intra-class relationships across domains. Specifically, we construct a clustering-based memory bank to encode class prototypes, auxiliary features, and intra-class disparity information, and iteratively update it via unsupervised clustering to enhance category-level knowledge representation. We further design a base-to-novel selection metric to discover source-domain features related to novel categories and use them to initialize novel-category classifiers. In addition, an adaptive feature assignment strategy transfers the learned category-level knowledge to the target domain and asynchronously updates the memory bank to alleviate source-domain bias. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that our method consistently surpasses state-of-the-art AOOD methods by 1.1-5.5 mAP.

analysis.tldr: 提出类别级协作知识挖掘策略，通过聚类记忆库和自适应特征分配提升自适应开放集目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有目标检测器难以跨域泛化并适应新类别，自适应开放集目标检测（AOOD）虽能解决此问题，但存在跨域表示弱、新类别模糊和源域特征偏差等局限。
analysis.problem: 如何增强跨域类别级知识表示，缓解源域偏差，并有效发现和适应目标域中的新类别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前AOOD方法受限于弱跨域表示、新类别间模糊性以及源域特征偏差。
analysis.method: 提出类别级协作知识挖掘策略，包括：1）基于聚类的记忆库编码类原型、辅助特征和类内差异信息，并通过无监督聚类迭代更新；2）基到新类别选择度量发现与新颖类别相关的源域特征，用于初始化新类别分类器；3）自适应特征分配策略将类别级知识迁移到目标域，并异步更新记忆库以缓解源域偏差。
contributions: 提出类别级协作知识挖掘策略，同时利用跨域的类间和类内关系。
设计聚类记忆库和基到新类别选择度量，有效发现并初始化新类别分类器。
引入自适应特征分配策略，缓解源域偏差并提升目标域适应能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，方法一致超越现有AOOD方法，mAP提升1.1-5.5。
limitations: 可能依赖聚类质量，对噪声或极端分布敏感。
异步更新机制可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出类别级协作知识挖掘策略，通过聚类记忆库和自适应特征分配提升自适应开放集目标检测性能。

papers.title: MathAgent: Adversarial Evolution of Constraint Graphs for Mathematical Reasoning Data Synthesis
papers.abstract: Synthesizing high-quality mathematical reasoning data without human priors remains a significant challenge. Current approaches typically rely on seed data mutation or simple prompt engineering, often suffering from mode collapse and limited logical complexity. This paper proposes a hierarchical synthesis framework that formulates data synthesis as an unsupervised optimization problem over a constraint graph followed by semantic instantiation, rather than treating it as a direct text generation task. We introduce a Legislator-Executor paradigm: The Legislator adversarially evolves structured generation blueprints encoding the constraints of the problem, while the Executor instantiates these specifications into diverse natural language scenarios. This decoupling of skeleton design from linguistic realization enables a prioritized focus on constructing complex and diverse logical structures, thereby guiding high-quality data synthesis. Experiments conducted on a total of 10 models across the Qwen, Llama, Mistral, and Gemma series demonstrate that our method achieves notable results: models fine-tuned on 1K synthesized samples outperform widely-used datasets of comparable scale (LIMO, s1K) across eight mathematical benchmarks, exhibiting superior out-of-distribution generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层约束图演化框架，通过立法者-执行者范式解耦逻辑骨架与语言实现，实现无先验的高质量数学推理数据合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数学推理数据合成方法依赖种子数据变异或简单提示工程，易出现模式坍塌且逻辑复杂度有限，难以生成高质量数据。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有人类先验的情况下，自动合成具有复杂逻辑结构的高质量数学推理数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出分层合成框架，将数据合成视为约束图上的无监督优化问题，采用立法者-执行者范式：立法者对抗演化结构化生成蓝图（编码问题约束），执行者将蓝图实例化为多样自然语言场景。
contributions: 提出基于约束图演化的数学推理数据合成方法，无需人类先验。
引入立法者-执行者范式，解耦逻辑骨架与语言实现，提升数据逻辑复杂度与多样性。
在10个模型上验证，1K合成样本微调后超越LIMO、s1K等数据集，展现强分布外泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen、Llama、Mistral、Gemma系列共10个模型上，使用1K合成样本微调，在8个数学基准上超越LIMO、s1K等数据集，并展现优越的分布外泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖约束图设计的先验知识。
合成数据的多样性可能受限于蓝图演化空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层约束图演化框架，通过立法者-执行者范式解耦逻辑骨架与语言实现，实现无先验的高质量数学推理数据合成。

papers.title: Taking a Pulse on How Generative AI is Reshaping the Software Engineering Research Landscape
papers.abstract: Context: Software engineering (SE) researchers increasingly study Generative AI (GenAI) while also incorporating it into their own research practices. Despite rapid adoption, there is limited empirical evidence on how GenAI is used in SE research and its implications for research practices and governance. Aims: We conduct a large-scale survey of 457 SE researchers publishing in top venues between 2023 and 2025. Method: Using quantitative and qualitative analyses, we examine who uses GenAI and why, where it is used across research activities, and how researchers perceive its benefits, opportunities, challenges, risks, and governance. Results: GenAI use is widespread, with many researchers reporting pressure to adopt and align their work with it. Usage is concentrated in writing and early-stage activities, while methodological and analytical tasks remain largely human-driven. Although productivity gains are widely perceived, concerns about trust, correctness, and regulatory uncertainty persist. Researchers highlight risks such as inaccuracies and bias, emphasize mitigation through human oversight and verification, and call for clearer governance, including guidance on responsible use and peer review. Conclusion: We provide a fine-grained, SE-specific characterization of GenAI use across research activities, along with taxonomies of GenAI use cases for research and peer review, opportunities, risks, mitigation strategies, and governance needs. These findings establish an empirical baseline for the responsible integration of GenAI into academic practice.

analysis.tldr: 对457名软件工程研究者的调查显示，生成式AI在研究写作和早期阶段被广泛使用，但方法论和分析任务仍以人工为主，存在信任、准确性和治理方面的担忧。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管生成式AI在软件工程研究中被迅速采用，但缺乏关于其如何被使用、对研究实践和治理影响的实证证据。
analysis.problem: 系统性地调查生成式AI在软件工程研究中的使用模式、感知收益、风险及治理需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生成式AI使用广泛，但集中在写作和早期活动；方法论和分析任务仍以人工为主；研究者感知到生产力提升，但对信任、准确性和监管不确定性存在担忧。
analysis.method: 对2023-2025年间在顶级会议发表论文的457名软件工程研究者进行大规模调查，结合定量和定性分析。
contributions: 提供了生成式AI在软件工程研究活动中使用的细粒度特征描述
构建了生成式AI在研究、同行评审、机会、风险、缓解策略和治理需求方面的分类体系
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及了基于调查的定量和定性分析结果。
limitations: 调查样本可能偏向于活跃在顶级会议的研究者
自我报告数据可能存在主观偏差
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对457名软件工程研究者的调查显示，生成式AI在研究写作和早期阶段被广泛使用，但方法论和分析任务仍以人工为主，存在信任、准确性和治理方面的担忧。

papers.title: Do Thought Streams Matter? Evaluating Reasoning in Gemini Vision-Language Models for Video Scene Understanding
papers.abstract: We benchmark how internal reasoning traces, which we call thought streams, affect video scene understanding in vision-language models. Using four configurations of Google's Gemini 2.5 Flash and Flash Lite across scenes extracted from 100 hours of video, we ask three questions: does more thinking lead to better outputs, where do the gains stop, and what do these models actually think about? We introduce three evaluation metrics. Contentfulness measures how much of the thought stream is useful scene content versus meta-commentary. Thought-Final Coverage measures how faithfully the thought stream translates into the final output. Dominant Entity Analysis identifies which subjects, actions, and settings the model focuses on. GPT-5 serves as an independent judge. We find that quality gains from additional thinking plateau quickly, with most improvement occurring in the first few hundred tokens. Flash Lite offers the best balance between quality and token usage. Tight reasoning budgets cause the model to add content in the final output that it never reasoned about, a form of compression-step hallucination. Despite being different model tiers, Flash and Flash Lite produce similar thought streams, though they differ in style: Flash discusses its reasoning process, while Lite focuses on describing the scene.

analysis.tldr: Gemini视觉语言模型的内部推理链（thought streams）在视频场景理解中收益递减，且压缩步骤会产生幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究缺乏对视觉语言模型内部推理过程（thought streams）如何影响视频理解质量的系统评估，尤其是推理链的收益边界和潜在缺陷尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 评估Gemini视觉语言模型中内部推理链（thought streams）对视频场景理解任务的有效性、收益边界及内容特性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 质量提升在推理链的前几百个token后迅速饱和；紧凑的推理预算会导致模型在最终输出中添加未推理过的内容（压缩步骤幻觉）；不同模型层级（Flash与Flash Lite）的推理链内容相似但风格不同。
analysis.method: 使用Gemini 2.5 Flash和Flash Lite的四种配置，从100小时视频中提取场景，引入三个评估指标（内容充实度、思维-最终覆盖度、主导实体分析），并以GPT-5作为独立评判。
contributions: 提出三个评估指标：内容充实度、思维-最终覆盖度、主导实体分析。
发现推理链收益快速饱和及压缩步骤幻觉现象。
analysis.experiments: 在100小时视频场景上使用四种模型配置进行实验，以GPT-5作为评判。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅评估Gemini系列模型，结论可能不泛化到其他VLM。
依赖GPT-5作为评判，可能存在评判偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Gemini视觉语言模型的内部推理链（thought streams）在视频场景理解中收益递减，且压缩步骤会产生幻觉。

papers.title: Precision Synthesis of Multi-Tracer PET via VLM-Modulated Rectified Flow for Stratifying Mild Cognitive Impairment
papers.abstract: The biological definition of Alzheimer's disease (AD) relies on multi-modal neuroimaging, yet the clinical utility of positron emission tomography (PET) is limited by cost and radiation exposure, hindering early screening at preclinical or prodromal stages. While generative models offer a promising alternative by synthesizing PET from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), achieving subject-specific precision remains a primary challenge. Here, we introduce DIReCT$++$, a Domain-Informed ReCTified flow model for synthesizing multi-tracer PET from MRI combined with fundamental clinical information. Our approach integrates a 3D rectified flow architecture to capture complex cross-modal and cross-tracer relationships with a domain-adapted vision-language model (BiomedCLIP) that provides text-guided, personalized generation using clinical scores and imaging knowledge. Extensive evaluations on multi-center datasets demonstrate that DIReCT$++$ not only produces synthetic PET images ($^{18}$F-AV-45 and $^{18}$F-FDG) of superior fidelity and generalizability but also accurately recapitulates disease-specific patterns. Crucially, combining these synthesized PET images with MRI enables precise personalized stratification of mild cognitive impairment (MCI), advancing a scalable, data-efficient tool for the early diagnosis and prognostic prediction of AD. The source code will be released on https://github.com/ladderlab-xjtu/DIReCT-PLUS.

analysis.tldr: 提出DIReCT++模型，利用VLM调制的整流流从MRI和临床信息合成多示踪剂PET，用于轻度认知障碍分层。
analysis.research_motivation: PET在阿尔茨海默病早期筛查中受限于成本和辐射暴露，而现有生成模型难以实现个体化精确合成。
analysis.problem: 如何从MRI和临床信息精确合成多示踪剂PET图像，并用于轻度认知障碍的个性化分层。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合3D整流流架构和领域适配的视觉语言模型（BiomedCLIP），利用临床评分和成像知识实现文本引导的个性化生成。
contributions: 提出DIReCT++模型，实现从MRI和临床信息合成多示踪剂PET的高保真度和泛化性。
验证合成PET与MRI结合可精确分层轻度认知障碍，为早期诊断提供可扩展工具。
analysis.experiments: 在多中心数据集上评估，合成PET图像（18F-AV-45和18F-FDG）具有优越保真度和泛化性，并能准确重现疾病特异性模式。
limitations: 可能依赖特定临床评分和成像知识，泛化到其他示踪剂或疾病需进一步验证。
未提及与真实PET相比的量化指标差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DIReCT++模型，利用VLM调制的整流流从MRI和临床信息合成多示踪剂PET，用于轻度认知障碍分层。

papers.title: EmbodiedGovBench: A Benchmark for Governance, Recovery, and Upgrade Safety in Embodied Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Recent progress in embodied AI has produced a growing ecosystem of robot policies, foundation models, and modular runtimes. However, current evaluation remains dominated by task success metrics such as completion rate or manipulation accuracy. These metrics leave a critical gap: they do not measure whether embodied systems are governable -- whether they respect capability boundaries, enforce policies, recover safely, maintain audit trails, and respond to human oversight. We present EmbodiedGovBench, a benchmark for governance-oriented evaluation of embodied agent systems. Rather than asking only whether a robot can complete a task, EmbodiedGovBench evaluates whether the system remains controllable, policy-bounded, recoverable, auditable, and evolution-safe under realistic perturbations. The benchmark covers seven governance dimensions: unauthorized capability invocation, runtime drift robustness, recovery success, policy portability, version upgrade safety, human override responsiveness, and audit completeness. We define a benchmark structure spanning single-robot and fleet settings, with scenario templates, perturbation operators, governance metrics, and baseline evaluation protocols. We describe how the benchmark can be instantiated over embodied capability runtimes with modular interfaces and contract-aware upgrade workflows. Our analysis suggests that embodied governance should become a first-class evaluation target. EmbodiedGovBench provides the initial measurement framework for that shift.

analysis.tldr: 提出 EmbodiedGovBench 基准，用于评估具身智能体系统的可治理性、恢复与升级安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前具身 AI 评估主要关注任务成功率，忽略了系统是否可治理（如遵守能力边界、执行策略、安全恢复、审计追踪、响应人类监督），存在关键评估空白。
analysis.problem: 缺乏系统性地评估具身智能体系统可治理性（governance）的基准，包括可控性、策略约束、恢复能力、审计性和升级安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建 EmbodiedGovBench 基准，覆盖七个治理维度（未授权能力调用、运行时漂移鲁棒性、恢复成功率、策略可移植性、版本升级安全性、人类覆盖响应、审计完整性），定义单机器人和集群场景模板、扰动算子、治理指标和基线评估协议。
contributions: 提出首个面向具身智能体系统可治理性评估的基准 EmbodiedGovBench。
定义七个治理维度和评估协议，涵盖单机器人和集群设置。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准的实例化依赖于模块化接口和合同感知升级工作流，可能不适用于所有具身系统。
未提供实际实验数据，有效性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 EmbodiedGovBench 基准，用于评估具身智能体系统的可治理性、恢复与升级安全性。

papers.title: NeuVolEx: Implicit Neural Features for Volume Exploration
papers.abstract: Direct volume rendering (DVR) aims to help users identify and examine regions of interest (ROIs) within volumetric data, and feature representations that support effective ROI classification and clustering play a fundamental role in volume exploration. Existing approaches typically rely on either explicit local feature representations or implicit convolutional feature representations learned from raw volumes. However, explicit local feature representations are limited in capturing broader geometric patterns and spatial correlations, while implicit convolutional feature representations do not necessarily ensure robust performance in practice, where user supervision is typically limited. Meanwhile, implicit neural representations (INRs) have recently shown strong promise in DVR for volume compression, owing to their ability to compactly parameterize continuous volumetric fields. In this work, we propose NeuVolEx, a neural volume exploration approach that extends the role of INRs beyond volume compression. Unlike prior compression methods that focus on INR outputs, NeuVolEx leverages feature representations learned during INR training as a robust basis for volume exploration. To better adapt these feature representations to exploration tasks, we augment a base INR with a structural encoder and a multi-task learning scheme that improve spatial coherence for ROI characterization. We validate NeuVolEx on two fundamental volume exploration tasks: image-based transfer function (TF) design and viewpoint recommendation. NeuVolEx enables accurate ROI classification under sparse user supervision for image-based TF design and supports unsupervised clustering to identify compact complementary viewpoints that reveal different ROI clusters. Experiments on diverse volume datasets with varying modalities and ROI complexities demonstrate NeuVolEx improves both effectiveness and usability over prior methods

analysis.tldr: NeuVolEx利用隐式神经表示中的特征进行体数据探索，在稀疏监督下实现准确的ROI分类和无监督视角推荐。
analysis.research_motivation: 体数据探索中，现有特征表示方法（显式局部特征或隐式卷积特征）在捕获空间相关性和鲁棒性方面存在局限，而隐式神经表示（INR）在压缩方面表现优异但尚未被充分用于探索任务。
analysis.problem: 如何利用INR训练过程中学习的特征表示，实现高效且鲁棒的体数据探索（ROI分类和视角推荐）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在基础INR上增加结构编码器和多任务学习方案，增强特征的空间连贯性，用于图像传递函数设计和视角推荐。
contributions: 提出NeuVolEx，将INR特征用于体数据探索，超越传统压缩用途。
设计结构编码器和多任务学习以提升特征对ROI表征的适应性。
在图像传递函数设计和视角推荐任务上验证有效性，支持稀疏监督和无监督聚类。
analysis.experiments: 在多种模态和ROI复杂度的体数据集上，NeuVolEx在有效性和可用性上优于先前方法。
limitations: 可能依赖INR训练质量，对超参数敏感。
未提及对大规模或动态数据的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NeuVolEx利用隐式神经表示中的特征进行体数据探索，在稀疏监督下实现准确的ROI分类和无监督视角推荐。

papers.title: Development and evaluation of CADe systems in low-prevalence setting: The RARE25 challenge for early detection of Barrett's neoplasia
authors: Rixta A. H. van Eijck van Heslinga
papers.abstract: Computer-aided detection (CADe) of early neoplasia in Barrett's esophagus is a low-prevalence surveillance problem in which clinically relevant findings are rare. Although many CADe systems report strong performance on balanced or enriched datasets, their behavior under realistic prevalence remains insufficiently characterized. The RARE25 challenge addresses this gap by introducing a large-scale, prevalence-aware benchmark for neoplasia detection. It includes a public training set and a hidden test set reflecting real-world incidence. Methods were evaluated using operating-point-specific metrics emphasizing high sensitivity and accounting for prevalence. Eleven teams from seven countries submitted approaches using diverse architectures, pretraining, ensembling, and calibration strategies. While several methods achieved strong discriminative performance, positive predictive values remained low, highlighting the difficulty of low-prevalence detection and the risk of overestimating clinical utility when prevalence is ignored. All methods relied on fully supervised classification despite the dominance of normal findings, indicating a lack of prevalence-agnostic approaches such as anomaly detection or one-class learning. By releasing a public dataset and a reproducible evaluation framework, RARE25 aims to support the development of CADe systems robust to prevalence shift and suitable for clinical surveillance workflows.

analysis.tldr: RARE25挑战赛揭示了低患病率下CADe系统阳性预测值低的瓶颈，并发布了首个患病率感知基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CADe系统在平衡数据集上表现良好，但在真实低患病率场景下的行为尚未充分表征，存在临床效用被高估的风险。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对低患病率场景的标准化基准和评估方法，导致CADe系统的临床适用性不明。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有参赛方法均采用全监督分类，尽管正常样本占主导；阳性预测值普遍偏低，表明低患病率检测的固有困难。
analysis.method: 构建大规模患病率感知基准，包含公开训练集和隐藏测试集，使用强调高灵敏度和考虑患病率的操作点特定指标进行评估。
contributions: 首次引入患病率感知的Barrett食管早期肿瘤CADe基准RARE25
揭示低患病率下CADe系统阳性预测值低的普遍现象
analysis.experiments: 11支队伍提交了方法，使用多种架构、预训练、集成和校准策略；评估指标强调高灵敏度并考虑患病率。
limitations: 所有方法仍依赖全监督分类，缺乏无监督或异常检测方法
阳性预测值低，临床部署仍需进一步改进
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RARE25挑战赛揭示了低患病率下CADe系统阳性预测值低的瓶颈，并发布了首个患病率感知基准。

papers.title: Do Instance Priors Help Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation?
papers.abstract: Semantic segmentation requires dense pixel-level annotations, which are costly and time-consuming to acquire. To address this, we present SeSAM, a framework that uses a foundational segmentation model, i.e. Segment Anything Model (SAM), with weak labels, including coarse masks, scribbles, and points. SAM, originally designed for instance-based segmentation, cannot be directly used for semantic segmentation tasks. In this work, we identify specific challenges faced by SAM and determine appropriate components to adapt it for class-based segmentation using weak labels. Specifically, SeSAM decomposes class masks into connected components, samples point prompts along object skeletons, selects SAM masks using weak-label coverage, and iteratively refines labels using pseudo-labels, enabling SAM-generated masks to be effectively used for semantic segmentation. Integrated with a semi-supervised learning framework, SeSAM balances ground-truth labels, SAM-based pseudo-labels, and high-confidence pseudo-labels, significantly improving segmentation quality. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks and weak annotation types show that SeSAM consistently outperforms weakly supervised baselines while substantially reducing annotation cost relative to fine supervision.

analysis.tldr: SeSAM利用SAM的实例先验和弱标签（如粗掩码、涂鸦、点）实现弱监督语义分割，显著降低标注成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 语义分割需要密集像素级标注，成本高昂且耗时，弱监督方法可降低标注负担，但现有方法性能有限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用实例分割模型SAM的实例先验，在弱标签（粗掩码、涂鸦、点）下有效进行语义分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SAM原本设计用于实例分割，直接用于语义分割存在挑战，需要识别具体问题并适配组件。
analysis.method: SeSAM框架：将类掩码分解为连通分量，沿物体骨架采样点提示，利用弱标签覆盖选择SAM掩码，并通过伪标签迭代细化标签，结合半监督学习平衡真实标签、SAM伪标签和高置信度伪标签。
contributions: 提出SeSAM框架，利用SAM的实例先验和弱标签实现弱监督语义分割。
识别SAM在语义分割中的挑战并设计适配组件（如分解、骨架采样、覆盖选择、迭代细化）。
在多个基准和弱标注类型上显著优于弱监督基线，降低标注成本。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准和弱标注类型（粗掩码、涂鸦、点）上进行实验，SeSAM一致优于弱监督基线，并显著降低标注成本。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 依赖SAM的预训练质量，可能对特定领域泛化不足。
迭代细化过程可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SeSAM利用SAM的实例先验和弱标签（如粗掩码、涂鸦、点）实现弱监督语义分割，显著降低标注成本。

papers.title: Geometry-Aware CLIP Retrieval via Local Cross-Modal Alignment and Steering
papers.abstract: CLIP retrieval is typically framed as a pointwise similarity problem in a shared embedding space. While CLIP achieves strong global cross-modal alignment, many retrieval failures arise from local geometric inconsistencies: nearby items are incorrectly ordered, leading to systematic confusions (e.g., pentagon vs. hexagon) and produces diffuse, weakly controlled result sets. Prior work largely optimizes for point wise relevance or finetuning to mitigate these problems. We instead view retrieval as a problem of neighborhood alignment. Our work introduces (1) neighborhood-level re-ranking via Hungarian matching, which rewards structural consistency; (2) query-conditioned local steering, where directions derived from contrastive neighborhoods around the query reshape retrieval. We show that these techniques improve retrieval performance on attribute-binding and compositional retrieval tasks. Together, these methods operate on local neighborhoods but serve different roles: re-ranking rewards alignment whereas local steering controls neighborhood structure. This shows that retrieval quality and controllability depend critically on local structure, which can be exploited at inference time without retraining.

analysis.tldr: 通过局部邻域对齐和查询条件引导，无需重训练即可提升CLIP检索的几何一致性与可控性。
analysis.research_motivation: CLIP检索常因局部几何不一致导致失败（如五边形与六边形混淆），现有方法多优化点级相关性或微调，忽略了邻域结构的重要性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重训练的情况下，利用局部邻域结构提升CLIP检索的准确性和可控性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出CLIP检索失败源于局部几何不一致：邻近项排序错误导致系统性混淆，且结果集分散、弱可控。
analysis.method: 提出两种基于局部邻域的方法：1) 通过匈牙利匹配进行邻域级重排序，奖励结构一致性；2) 查询条件局部引导，利用对比邻域方向重塑检索结果。
contributions: 提出邻域级重排序方法，通过匈牙利匹配奖励结构一致性。
提出查询条件局部引导，利用对比邻域方向控制检索结果。
在属性绑定和组合检索任务上验证了方法的有效性，无需重训练。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖邻域定义的质量，对噪声敏感。
仅适用于检索任务，未验证其他下游应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过局部邻域对齐和查询条件引导，无需重训练即可提升CLIP检索的几何一致性与可控性。

papers.title: Cost-optimal Sequential Testing via Doubly Robust Q-learning
papers.abstract: Clinical decision-making often involves selecting tests that are costly, invasive, or time-consuming, motivating individualized, sequential strategies for what to measure and when to stop ascertaining. We study the problem of learning cost-optimal sequential decision policies from retrospective data, where test availability depends on prior results, inducing informative missingness. Under a sequential missing-at-random mechanism, we develop a doubly robust Q-learning framework for estimating optimal policies. The method introduces path-specific inverse probability weights that account for heterogeneous test trajectories and satisfy a normalization property conditional on the observed history. By combining these weights with auxiliary contrast models, we construct orthogonal pseudo-outcomes that enable unbiased policy learning when either the acquisition model or the contrast model is correctly specified. We establish oracle inequalities for the stage-wise contrast estimators, along with convergence rates, regret bounds, and misclassification rates for the learned policy. Simulations demonstrate improved cost-adjusted performance over weighted and complete-case baselines, and an application to a prostate cancer cohort study illustrates how the method reduces testing cost without compromising predictive accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出双重稳健Q学习框架，从回顾性数据中学习成本最优的序贯测试策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床决策中测试成本高、有创或耗时，需要个性化序贯策略来优化测试选择和停止时机，但回顾性数据中测试可用性依赖于先前结果，导致信息缺失。
analysis.problem: 从回顾性数据中学习成本最优的序贯决策策略，处理测试可用性依赖历史结果带来的信息缺失问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 测试可用性依赖于先前结果，导致信息缺失；现有加权或完整案例基线方法性能不足。
analysis.method: 提出双重稳健Q学习框架，引入路径特异性逆概率权重和辅助对比模型，构建正交伪结果，实现当获取模型或对比模型之一正确指定时的无偏策略学习。
contributions: 提出双重稳健Q学习框架用于成本最优序贯测试策略学习
建立阶段对比估计量的Oracle不等式、收敛速率、遗憾界和误分类率
analysis.experiments: 模拟实验显示成本调整性能优于加权和完整案例基线；前列腺癌队列研究应用表明方法在不降低预测准确性的情况下减少测试成本。
limitations: 依赖序贯随机缺失假设
可能对高维历史数据计算复杂
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双重稳健Q学习框架，从回顾性数据中学习成本最优的序贯测试策略。

papers.title: RADA: Region-Aware Dual-encoder Auxiliary learning for Barely-supervised Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Deep learning has greatly advanced medical image segmentation, but its success relies heavily on fully supervised learning, which requires dense annotations that are costly and time-consuming for 3D volumetric scans. Barely-supervised learning reduces annotation burden by using only a few labeled slices per volume. Existing methods typically propagate sparse annotations to unlabeled slices through geometric continuity to generate pseudo-labels, but this strategy lacks semantic understanding, often resulting in low-quality pseudo-labels. Furthermore, medical image segmentation is inherently a pixel-level visual understanding task, where accuracy fundamentally depends on the quality of local, fine-grained visual features. Inspired by this, we propose RADA, a novel Region-Aware Dual-encoder Auxiliary learning pipeline which introduces a dual-encoder framework pre-trained on Alpha-CLIP to extract fine-grained, region-specific visual features from the original images and limited annotations. The framework combines image-level fine-grained visual features with text-level semantic guidance, providing region-aware semantic supervision that bridges image-level semantics and pixel-level segmentation. Integrated into a triple-view training framework, RADA achieves SOTA performance under extremely sparse annotation settings on LA2018, KiTS19 and LiTS, demonstrating robust generalization across diverse datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出区域感知双编码器辅助学习框架RADA，利用Alpha-CLIP预训练提取细粒度视觉特征，在极稀疏标注下实现SOTA医学图像分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 全监督医学图像分割依赖密集标注，成本高昂；现有极稀疏标注方法仅利用几何连续性传播伪标签，缺乏语义理解，导致伪标签质量低。
analysis.problem: 在仅使用每卷少量标注切片（极稀疏标注）的情况下，如何提升医学图像分割的精度和伪标签质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法基于几何连续性生成伪标签，缺乏语义理解，导致伪标签质量低；医学图像分割本质是像素级视觉理解，依赖局部细粒度视觉特征。
analysis.method: 提出RADA，采用双编码器框架（基于Alpha-CLIP预训练），提取细粒度区域视觉特征，结合文本级语义引导，提供区域感知语义监督，并集成到三视图训练框架中。
contributions: 提出区域感知双编码器辅助学习框架RADA，结合图像级细粒度特征和文本级语义引导。
在极稀疏标注设置下，在LA2018、KiTS19和LiTS数据集上达到SOTA性能，验证了鲁棒泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在LA2018、KiTS19和LiTS三个数据集上评估，达到SOTA性能，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 依赖Alpha-CLIP预训练模型，可能对特定模态或器官泛化有限。
三视图训练框架计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出区域感知双编码器辅助学习框架RADA，利用Alpha-CLIP预训练提取细粒度视觉特征，在极稀疏标注下实现SOTA医学图像分割。

papers.title: Boxes2Pixels: Learning Defect Segmentation from Noisy SAM Masks
papers.abstract: Accurate defect segmentation is critical for industrial inspection, yet dense pixel-level annotations are rarely available. A common workaround is to convert inexpensive bounding boxes into pseudo-masks using foundation segmentation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM). However, these pseudo-labels are systematically noisy on industrial surfaces, often hallucinating background structure while missing sparse defects. To address this limitation, a noise-robust box-to-pixel distillation framework, Boxes2Pixels, is proposed that treats SAM as a noisy teacher rather than a source of ground-truth supervision. Bounding boxes are converted into pseudo-masks offline by SAM, and a compact student is trained with (i) a hierarchical decoder over frozen DINOv2 features for semantic stability, (ii) an auxiliary binary localization head to decouple sparse foreground discovery from class prediction, and (iii) a one-sided online self-correction mechanism that relaxes background supervision when the student is confident, targeting teacher false negatives. On a manually annotated wind turbine inspection benchmark, the proposed Boxes2Pixels improves anomaly mIoU by +6.97 and binary IoU by +9.71 over the strongest baseline trained under identical weak supervision. Moreover, online self-correction increases the binary recall by +18.56, while the model employs 80\% fewer trainable parameters. Code is available at https://github.com/CLendering/Boxes2Pixels.

analysis.tldr: 提出Boxes2Pixels框架，利用噪声SAM伪掩码进行弱监督缺陷分割，通过层次化解码器、辅助定位头和在线自校正机制提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业缺陷分割中密集像素标注稀缺，常用方法将边界框通过SAM转为伪掩码，但SAM在工业表面产生系统噪声，易误检背景并漏检稀疏缺陷。
analysis.problem: 如何从噪声的SAM伪掩码中学习准确的缺陷分割模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SAM在工业表面生成的伪掩码存在系统性噪声：常将背景结构误判为缺陷，同时遗漏稀疏的真实缺陷。
analysis.method: 提出Boxes2Pixels框架，包含三个组件：基于冻结DINOv2特征的层次化解码器保持语义稳定性；辅助二值定位头解耦稀疏前景发现与类别预测；单侧在线自校正机制在学生置信时放松背景监督，针对教师假阴性。
contributions: 提出噪声鲁棒的框到像素蒸馏框架Boxes2Pixels，将SAM视为噪声教师而非真值来源。
设计层次化解码器、辅助定位头和在线自校正机制，有效处理SAM伪掩码噪声。
在风力涡轮机检测基准上，弱监督下异常mIoU提升+6.97，二值IoU提升+9.71，召回率提升+18.56，参数量减少80%。
analysis.experiments: 在手动标注的风力涡轮机检测基准上评估，与最强弱监督基线相比，异常mIoU提升+6.97，二值IoU提升+9.71，在线自校正使二值召回率提升+18.56，模型参数量减少80%。
limitations: 仅在单一工业场景（风力涡轮机）验证，泛化性未知。
依赖SAM和DINOv2预训练模型，计算资源需求可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Boxes2Pixels框架，利用噪声SAM伪掩码进行弱监督缺陷分割，通过层次化解码器、辅助定位头和在线自校正机制提升性能。

papers.title: rPPG-VQA: A Video Quality Assessment Framework for Unsupervised rPPG Training
papers.abstract: Unsupervised remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) promises to leverage unlabeled video data, but its potential is hindered by a critical challenge: training on low-quality "in-the-wild" videos severely degrades model performance. An essential step missing here is to assess the suitability of the videos for rPPG model learning before using them for the task. Existing video quality assessment (VQA) methods are mainly designed for human perception and not directly applicable to the above purpose. In this work, we propose rPPG-VQA, a novel framework for assessing video suitability for rPPG. We integrate signal-level and scene-level analyses and design a dual-branch assessment architecture. The signal-level branch evaluates the physiological signal quality of the videos via robust signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) estimation with a multi-method consensus mechanism, and the scene-level branch uses a multimodal large language model (MLLM) to identify interferences like motion and unstable lighting. Furthermore, we propose a two-stage adaptive sampling (TAS) strategy that utilizes the quality score to curate optimal training datasets. Experiments show that by training on large-scale, "in-the-wild" videos filtered by our framework, we can develop unsupervised rPPG models that achieve a substantial improvement in accuracy on standard benchmarks. Our code is available at https://github.com/Tianyang-Dai/rPPG-VQA.

analysis.tldr: 提出rPPG-VQA框架，通过信号级和场景级质量评估筛选视频，提升无监督rPPG模型训练效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 无监督rPPG依赖未标注视频，但低质量野外视频会严重降低模型性能，现有VQA方法不适用于rPPG任务。
analysis.problem: 如何评估视频对rPPG模型训练的适用性，并利用质量分数筛选高质量训练数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低质量野外视频会严重降低无监督rPPG模型性能。
analysis.method: 提出rPPG-VQA框架，包含信号级分支（多方法共识SNR估计）和场景级分支（MLLM识别干扰），并设计两阶段自适应采样策略根据质量分数筛选训练数据。
contributions: 提出rPPG-VQA框架，结合信号级和场景级分析评估视频对rPPG的适用性。
设计两阶段自适应采样策略，利用质量分数优化训练数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上，使用框架筛选后的野外视频训练无监督rPPG模型，精度显著提升。
limitations: 依赖MLLM的场景级分析可能引入额外计算开销。
框架在极端低质量视频上的效果未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出rPPG-VQA框架，通过信号级和场景级质量评估筛选视频，提升无监督rPPG模型训练效果。

papers.title: Environmental Footprint of GenAI Research: Insights from the Moshi Foundation Model
papers.abstract: New multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) are continuously being trained and deployed, following rapid development cycles. This generative AI frenzy is driving steady increases in energy consumption, greenhouse gas emissions, and a plethora of other environmental impacts linked to datacenter construction and hardware manufacturing. Mitigating the environmental consequences of GenAI remains challenging due to an overall lack of transparency by the main actors in the field. Even when the environmental impacts of specific models are mentioned, they are typically restricted to the carbon footprint of the final training run, omitting the research and development stages. In this work, we explore the impact of GenAI research through a fine-grained analysis of the compute spent to create Moshi, a 7B-parameter speech-text foundation model for real-time dialogue developed by Kyutai, a leading privately funded open science AI lab. For the first time, our study dives into the anatomy of compute-intensive MLLM research, quantifying the GPU-time invested in specific model components and training phases, as well as early experimental stages, failed training runs, debugging, and ablation studies. Additionally, we assess the environmental impacts of creating Moshi from beginning to end using a life cycle assessment methodology: we quantify energy and water consumption, greenhouse gas emissions, and mineral resource depletion associated with the production and use of datacenter hardware. Our detailed analysis allows us to provide actionable guidelines to reduce compute usage and environmental impacts of MLLM research, paving the way for more sustainable AI research.

analysis.tldr: 通过Moshi模型全生命周期分析，揭示生成式AI研究的环境足迹，并提出减少计算和环境影响的可操作指南。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI模型快速迭代导致能耗和排放持续增长，但行业缺乏透明度，现有报告仅关注最终训练碳足迹，忽略了研发阶段的环境影响。
analysis.problem: 量化生成式AI研究（包括实验、调试、失败训练等）的完整环境足迹，并识别减少计算和环境影响的机会。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对Moshi模型（7B参数语音-文本基础模型）进行细粒度计算分析，量化GPU时间在模型组件、训练阶段、早期实验、失败训练、调试和消融研究中的分配；采用生命周期评估方法量化能耗、水耗、温室气体排放和矿物资源消耗。
contributions: 首次深入分析计算密集型MLLM研究的计算解剖，涵盖研发全阶段。
提供减少MLLM研究计算使用和环境影响的 actionable 指南。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于单个模型（Moshi）的分析，泛化性可能有限。
环境评估依赖特定数据中心硬件假设，不同硬件或地域结果可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过Moshi模型全生命周期分析，揭示生成式AI研究的环境足迹，并提出减少计算和环境影响的可操作指南。

papers.title: Aletheia: Physics-Conditioned Localized Artifact Attention (PhyLAA-X) for End-to-End Generalizable and Robust Deepfake Video Detection
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art deepfake detectors achieve near-perfect in-domain accuracy yet degrade under cross-generator shifts, heavy compression, and adversarial perturbations. The core limitation remains the decoupling of semantic artifact learning from physical invariants: optical-flow discontinuities, specular-reflection inconsistencies, and cardiac-modulated reflectance (rPPG) are treated either as post-hoc features or ignored. We introduce PhyLAA-X, a novel physics-conditioned extension of Localized Artifact Attention (LAA-X). PhyLAA-X injects three end-to-end differentiable physics-derived feature volumes - optical-flow curl, specular-reflectance skewness, and spatially-upsampled rPPG power spectra - directly into the LAA-X attention computation via cross-attention gating and a resonance consistency loss. This forces the network to learn manipulation boundaries where semantic inconsistencies and physical violations co-occur - regions inherently harder for generative models to replicate consistently. PhyLAA-X is embedded across an efficient spatiotemporal ensemble (EfficientNet-B4+BiLSTM, ResNeXt-101+Transformer, Xception+causal Conv1D) with uncertainty-aware adaptive weighting. On FaceForensics++ (c23), Aletheia reaches 97.2% accuracy / 0.992 AUC-ROC; on Celeb-DF v2, 94.9% / 0.981; on DFDC, 90.8% / 0.966 - outperforming the strongest published baseline (LAA-Net [1]) by 4.1-7.3% in cross-generator settings and maintaining 79.4% accuracy under epsilon = 0.02 PGD-10 attacks. Single-backbone ablations confirm PhyLAA-X alone delivers a 4.2% cross-dataset AUC gain. The full production system is open-sourced at https://github.com/devghori1264/Aletheia (v1.2, April 2026) with pretrained weights, the adversarial corpus (referred to as ADC-2026 in this work), and complete reproducibility artifacts.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理条件化的局部伪影注意力机制PhyLAA-X，通过注入光流、镜面反射和rPPG等物理特征，显著提升深度伪造视频检测的跨生成器泛化性和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测器在域内准确率接近完美，但在跨生成器、强压缩和对抗攻击下性能急剧下降，核心原因是语义伪影学习与物理不变量的解耦。
analysis.problem: 如何将物理先验（光流不连续性、镜面反射不一致性、心源性反射rPPG）端到端地注入深度伪造检测网络，以提升跨生成器泛化性和对抗鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法将物理特征作为后处理或忽略，导致网络无法学习语义不一致与物理违反共存的操纵边界，而这些区域是生成模型难以一致复制的。
analysis.method: 提出PhyLAA-X，通过交叉注意力门控和谐振一致性损失，将三个可微的物理特征体积（光流旋度、镜面反射偏度、空间上采样的rPPG功率谱）直接注入LAA-X注意力计算，并嵌入高效时空集成模型（EfficientNet-B4+BiLSTM, ResNeXt-101+Transformer, Xception+causal Conv1D）进行不确定性感知自适应加权。
contributions: 提出PhyLAA-X，首个将物理条件化特征体积端到端注入注意力机制的深度伪造检测方法。
在FaceForensics++、Celeb-DF v2、DFDC上达到SOTA，跨生成器设置下比最强基线LAA-Net提升4.1-7.3%，并在强对抗攻击下保持79.4%准确率。
开源完整生产系统、预训练权重、对抗语料库ADC-2026及可复现工件。
analysis.experiments: 在FaceForensics++ (c23)上达到97.2%准确率/0.992 AUC-ROC；Celeb-DF v2上94.9%/0.981；DFDC上90.8%/0.966；跨生成器设置下比LAA-Net提升4.1-7.3%；epsilon=0.02 PGD-10攻击下保持79.4%准确率；单骨干消融显示PhyLAA-X带来4.2%跨数据集AUC增益。
limitations: 物理特征提取可能依赖特定假设（如rPPG需人脸区域），在极端遮挡或非正面人脸场景下可能受限。
集成模型计算开销较大，实时性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理条件化的局部伪影注意力机制PhyLAA-X，通过注入光流、镜面反射和rPPG等物理特征，显著提升深度伪造视频检测的跨生成器泛化性和鲁棒性。

papers.title: Hierarchical Textual Knowledge for Enhanced Image Clustering
papers.abstract: Image clustering aims to group images in an unsupervised fashion. Traditional methods focus on knowledge from visual space, making it difficult to distinguish between visually similar but semantically different classes. Recent advances in vision-language models enable the use of textual knowledge to enhance image clustering. However, most existing methods rely on coarse class labels or simple nouns, overlooking the rich conceptual and attribute-level semantics embedded in textual space. In this paper, we propose a knowledge-enhanced clustering (KEC) method that constructs a hierarchical concept-attribute structured knowledge with the help of large language models (LLMs) to guide clustering. Specifically, we first condense redundant textual labels into abstract concepts and then automatically extract discriminative attributes for each single concept and similar concept pairs, via structured prompts to LLMs. This knowledge is instantiated for each input image to achieve the knowledge-enhanced features. The knowledge-enhanced features with original visual features are adapted to various downstream clustering algorithms. We evaluate KEC on 20 diverse datasets, showing consistent improvements across existing methods using additional textual knowledge. KEC without training outperforms zero-shot CLIP on 14 out of 20 datasets. Furthermore, the naive use of textual knowledge may harm clustering performance, while KEC provides both accuracy and robustness.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化概念-属性知识结构，利用LLM增强图像聚类，在20个数据集上一致提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统图像聚类依赖视觉空间知识，难以区分视觉相似但语义不同的类别；现有利用文本知识的方法仅使用粗粒度类标签或简单名词，忽略了文本空间中丰富的概念和属性级语义。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大语言模型构建层次化文本知识，以有效指导图像聚类，提升对视觉相似但语义不同类别的区分能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，简单使用文本知识可能损害聚类性能，而所提方法KEC在准确性和鲁棒性上均有提升。
analysis.method: 提出知识增强聚类（KEC）方法，首先利用LLM将冗余文本标签凝练为抽象概念，然后通过结构化提示自动提取每个概念及相似概念对的判别性属性，形成层次化概念-属性知识结构；将该知识实例化到每个输入图像得到知识增强特征，并与原始视觉特征结合，适配多种下游聚类算法。
contributions: 提出层次化概念-属性知识结构，利用LLM自动构建，用于增强图像聚类。
在20个数据集上验证了KEC的通用性和鲁棒性，无需训练即可在14/20数据集上超越零样本CLIP。
analysis.experiments: 在20个多样化数据集上评估，KEC在使用额外文本知识的现有方法上取得一致改进；无需训练时在14/20数据集上优于零样本CLIP。
limitations: 依赖LLM生成质量，可能受限于LLM的偏见或错误。
层次化知识的构建需要针对不同数据集调整提示，泛化性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化概念-属性知识结构，利用LLM增强图像聚类，在20个数据集上一致提升性能。

papers.title: Naka-GS: A Bionics-inspired Dual-Branch Naka Correction and Progressive Point Pruning for Low-Light 3DGS
papers.abstract: Low-light conditions severely hinder 3D restoration and reconstruction by degrading image visibility, introducing color distortions, and contaminating geometric priors for downstream optimization. We present NAKA-GS, a bionics-inspired framework for low-light 3D Gaussian Splatting that jointly improves photometric restoration and geometric initialization. Our method starts with a Naka-guided chroma-correction network, which combines physics-prior low-light enhancement, dual-branch input modeling, frequency-decoupled correction, and mask-guided optimization to suppress bright-region chromatic artifacts and edge-structure errors. The enhanced images are then fed into a feed-forward multi-view reconstruction model to produce dense scene priors. To further improve Gaussian initialization, we introduce a lightweight Point Preprocessing Module (PPM) that performs coordinate alignment, voxel pooling, and distance-adaptive progressive pruning to remove noisy and redundant points while preserving representative structures. Without introducing heavy inference overhead, NAKA-GS improves restoration quality, training stability, and optimization efficiency for low-light 3D reconstruction. The proposed method was presented in the NTIRE 3D Restoration and Reconstruction (3DRR) Challenge, and outperformed the baseline methods by a large margin. The code is available at https://github.com/RunyuZhu/Naka-GS

analysis.tldr: 提出仿生学启发的双分支Naka校正与渐进点剪枝框架，提升低光照3D高斯泼溅的重建质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 低光照条件严重阻碍3D恢复与重建，导致图像可见度下降、颜色失真并污染几何先验，现有方法在低光照场景下性能不足。
analysis.problem: 低光照3D高斯泼溅中的光度恢复和几何初始化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低光照下图像可见度低、颜色失真、几何先验被污染，导致3D重建质量差。
analysis.method: 提出NAKA-GS框架，包含Naka引导的色度校正网络（双分支输入、频率解耦校正、掩码优化）和轻量级点预处理模块（坐标对齐、体素池化、距离自适应渐进剪枝）。
contributions: 提出仿生学启发的双分支Naka校正网络，结合物理先验和频率解耦校正抑制色差和边缘错误。
设计渐进点剪枝模块，去除噪声和冗余点同时保留代表性结构，提升初始化质量。
analysis.experiments: 在NTIRE 3DRR挑战中评估，大幅优于基线方法。
limitations: 可能对极端低光照场景泛化能力有限。
渐进剪枝策略可能在某些场景下丢失细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出仿生学启发的双分支Naka校正与渐进点剪枝框架，提升低光照3D高斯泼溅的重建质量。

papers.title: Sparse Hypergraph-Enhanced Frame-Event Object Detection with Fine-Grained MoE
papers.abstract: Integrating frame-based RGB cameras with event streams offers a promising solution for robust object detection under challenging dynamic conditions. However, the inherent heterogeneity and data redundancy of these modalities often lead to prohibitive computational overhead or suboptimal feature fusion. In this paper, we propose Hyper-FEOD, a high-performance and efficient detection framework, which synergistically optimizes multi-modal interaction through two core components. First, we introduce Sparse Hypergraph-enhanced Cross-Modal Fusion (S-HCF), which leverages the inherent sparsity of event streams to construct an event-guided activity map. By performing high-order hypergraph modeling exclusively on selected motion-critical sparse tokens, S-HCF captures complex non-local dependencies between RGB and event data while overcoming the traditional complexity bottlenecks of hypergraph computation. Second, we design a Fine-Grained Mixture of Experts (FG-MoE) Enhancement module to address the diverse semantic requirements of different image regions. This module employs specialized hypergraph experts tailored for object boundaries, internal textures, and backgrounds, utilizing a pixel-level spatial gating mechanism to adaptively route and enhance features. Combined with a load-balancing loss and zero-initialization strategy, FG-MoE ensures stable training and precise feature refinement without disrupting the pre-trained backbone's distribution. Experimental results on mainstream RGB-Event benchmarks demonstrate that Hyper-FEOD achieves a superior accuracy-efficiency trade-off, outperforming state-of-the-art methods while maintaining a lightweight footprint suitable for real-time edge deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出稀疏超图增强的帧-事件融合检测框架，通过事件引导稀疏超图建模和细粒度MoE模块实现高效多模态交互。
analysis.research_motivation: 帧相机与事件相机融合检测面临模态异构和数据冗余导致的计算开销大或特征融合次优问题，现有方法难以兼顾精度与效率。
analysis.problem: 如何高效融合RGB帧和事件流，在保持轻量级的同时提升动态场景下目标检测的精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 事件流具有天然稀疏性，不同图像区域（边界、纹理、背景）对特征融合有不同语义需求。
analysis.method: 提出Hyper-FEOD框架，包含两个核心模块：1）稀疏超图增强跨模态融合（S-HCF），利用事件稀疏性构建活动图，仅对运动关键稀疏token进行高阶超图建模；2）细粒度混合专家（FG-MoE）增强模块，针对边界、纹理、背景设计专用超图专家，通过像素级空间门控机制自适应路由特征。
contributions: 提出S-HCF模块，利用事件稀疏性降低超图计算复杂度，同时捕获RGB与事件间的非局部依赖。
设计FG-MoE模块，通过像素级门控和专用超图专家实现区域自适应特征增强。
在主流RGB-Event基准上达到精度-效率最优权衡，适合实时边缘部署。
analysis.experiments: 在主流RGB-Event基准上评估，Hyper-FEOD在精度和效率上均优于现有方法，且模型轻量适合实时边缘部署。
limitations: 可能依赖事件相机的特定硬件支持。
超图建模的稀疏性策略在极端稀疏事件下可能信息不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出稀疏超图增强的帧-事件融合检测框架，通过事件引导稀疏超图建模和细粒度MoE模块实现高效多模态交互。

papers.title: ViserDex: Visual Sim-to-Real for Robust Dexterous In-hand Reorientation
papers.abstract: In-hand object reorientation requires precise estimation of the object pose to handle complex task dynamics. While RGB sensing offers rich semantic cues for pose tracking, existing solutions rely on multi-camera setups or costly ray tracing. We present a sim-to-real framework for monocular RGB in-hand reorientation that integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to bridge the visual sim-to-real gap. Our key insight is performing domain randomization in the Gaussian representation space: by applying physically consistent, pre-rendering augmentations to 3D Gaussians, we generate photorealistic, randomized visual data for object pose estimation. The manipulation policy is trained using curriculum-based reinforcement learning with teacher-student distillation, enabling efficient learning of complex behaviors. Importantly, both perception and control models can be trained independently on consumer-grade hardware, eliminating the need for large compute clusters. Experiments show that the pose estimator trained with 3DGS data outperforms those trained using conventional rendering data in challenging visual environments. We validate the system on a physical multi-fingered hand equipped with an RGB camera, demonstrating robust reorientation of five diverse objects even under challenging lighting conditions. Our results highlight Gaussian splatting as a practical path for RGB-only dexterous manipulation. For videos of the hardware deployments and additional supplementary materials, please refer to the project website: https://rffr.leggedrobotics.com/works/viserdex/

analysis.tldr: 提出基于3D高斯泼溅的视觉仿真到现实框架，实现单目RGB灵巧手内物体重定向。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有物体重定向依赖多相机或昂贵光线追踪，单目RGB方案面临视觉仿真到现实差距，难以在真实场景中鲁棒运行。
analysis.problem: 如何利用单目RGB相机实现鲁棒的灵巧手内物体重定向，并弥合视觉仿真到现实的差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在3D高斯表示空间中进行域随机化，生成逼真且随机的视觉数据用于物体姿态估计；结合课程强化学习和师生蒸馏训练操作策略。
contributions: 提出ViserDex框架，将3D高斯泼溅集成到单目RGB灵巧手重定向的仿真到现实流程中。
在3D高斯表示空间中进行域随机化，生成高质量训练数据，优于传统渲染数据。
在真实多指手上验证了系统在挑战性光照条件下的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在真实多指手上对五种不同物体进行重定向实验，展示了在挑战性光照条件下的鲁棒性；姿态估计器在挑战性视觉环境中优于传统渲染数据训练的模型。
limitations: 可能依赖3D高斯泼溅的渲染质量，对复杂物体或极端光照的泛化能力未知。
仅验证了五种物体，规模有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于3D高斯泼溅的视觉仿真到现实框架，实现单目RGB灵巧手内物体重定向。

papers.title: From Answers to Arguments: Toward Trustworthy Clinical Diagnostic Reasoning with Toulmin-Guided Curriculum Goal-Conditioned Learning
papers.abstract: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into clinical decision support is critically obstructed by their opaque and often unreliable reasoning. In the high-stakes domain of healthcare, correct answers alone are insufficient; clinical practice demands full transparency to ensure patient safety and enable professional accountability.
