A pervasive and dangerous weakness of current LLMs is their tendency to produce "correct answers through flawed reasoning." This issue is far more than a minor academic flaw; such process errors signal a fundamental lack of robust understanding, making the model prone to broader hallucinations and unpredictable failures when faced with real-world clinical complexity. In this paper, we establish a framework for trustworthy clinical argumentation by adapting the Toulmin model to the diagnostic process. We propose a novel training pipeline: Curriculum Goal-Conditioned Learning (CGCL), designed to progressively train LLM to generate diagnostic arguments that explicitly follow this Toulmin structure. CGCL's progressive three-stage curriculum systematically builds a solid clinical argument: (1) extracting facts and generating differential diagnoses; (2) justifying a core hypothesis while rebutting alternatives; and (3) synthesizing the analysis into a final, qualified conclusion. We validate CGCL using T-Eval, a quantitative framework measuring the integrity of the diagnosis reasoning. Experiments show that our method achieves diagnostic accuracy and reasoning quality comparable to resource-intensive Reinforcement Learning (RL) methods, while offering a more stable and efficient training pipeline.

analysis.tldr: 提出图尔敏模型引导的课程目标条件学习（CGCL），逐步训练LLM生成结构化的临床诊断论证，提升推理透明度和可信度。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在临床决策支持中推理不透明且不可靠，常出现“答案正确但推理错误”的危险问题，缺乏鲁棒性和可问责性。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在临床诊断中生成透明、结构化的论证推理，而非仅输出正确答案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前LLM普遍存在“通过错误推理得出正确答案”的现象，表明模型缺乏真正的理解，易产生幻觉和不可预测的失败。
analysis.method: 提出课程目标条件学习（CGCL），包含三阶段课程：事实提取与鉴别诊断、假设论证与反驳、综合结论，并基于图尔敏模型结构化训练。
contributions: 将图尔敏论证模型适配到临床诊断过程，建立可信论证框架。
提出CGCL训练流水线，逐步训练LLM生成结构化诊断论证。
通过T-Eval框架验证，CGCL在诊断准确性和推理质量上与强化学习方法相当，且训练更稳定高效。
analysis.experiments: 使用T-Eval框架定量评估诊断推理完整性，与资源密集的强化学习方法对比，CGCL达到相当性能且训练更稳定高效。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在特定临床数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
T-Eval框架本身可能无法完全覆盖真实临床推理的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图尔敏模型引导的课程目标条件学习（CGCL），逐步训练LLM生成结构化的临床诊断论证，提升推理透明度和可信度。

papers.title: BoxTuning: Directly Injecting the Object Box for Multimodal Model Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Object-level spatial-temporal understanding is essential for video question answering, yet existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) encode frames holistically and lack explicit mechanisms for fine-grained object grounding. Recent work addresses this by serializing bounding box coordinates as text tokens, but this text-coordinate paradigm suffers from a fundamental modality mismatch: object information is inherently visual, yet encoding it as text incurs a high token cost that forces aggressive temporal downsampling. We propose BoxTuning, which resolves this mismatch by injecting object spatial-temporal information directly into the visual modality. Colored bounding boxes and trajectory trails are rendered onto video frames as visual prompts, with only a concise color-to-object legend retained as text. This reduces the token cost significantly, achieving 87-93% text token reduction in practice. It also preserves full temporal resolution, where the trajectory trails further encode inter-frame motion direction and speed within each keyframe, recovering fine-grained dynamics that text-coordinate methods are forced to discard. Experimental results on five video QA benchmarks (CLEVRER, Perception Test, STAR, NExT-QA, IntentQA) show that BoxTuning surpasses text-coordinate baselines on spatially oriented tasks and nearly eliminates the accuracy degradation observed on reasoning-centric tasks, establishing visual prompting as a more natural and efficient paradigm for conveying object information to video MLLMs.

analysis.tldr: BoxTuning通过将目标框信息直接注入视觉模态（渲染彩色框和轨迹）替代文本坐标序列，大幅降低token成本并保留完整时间分辨率，提升视频MLLM的空间理解能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频MLLM缺乏细粒度目标定位机制，文本坐标范式存在模态不匹配和高token成本问题，导致被迫进行激进的时间下采样，丢失动态细节。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地将目标空间-时间信息注入视频MLLM，避免文本坐标带来的高token开销和时间分辨率损失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文本坐标范式存在根本性模态不匹配：目标信息本质上是视觉的，但编码为文本token成本高，迫使模型降低时间分辨率，丢失帧间运动信息。
analysis.method: 将彩色边界框和轨迹轨迹直接渲染到视频帧上作为视觉提示，仅保留简洁的颜色-对象图例作为文本，实现87-93%的文本token缩减并保持全时间分辨率。
contributions: 提出BoxTuning，通过视觉提示直接注入目标空间-时间信息，解决文本坐标的模态不匹配问题。
在五个视频QA基准上超越文本坐标基线，在空间导向任务上表现更优，在推理任务上几乎消除精度下降。
analysis.experiments: 在CLEVRER、Perception Test、STAR、NExT-QA、IntentQA五个视频QA基准上评估，与文本坐标基线对比。
limitations: 可能依赖渲染质量，极端遮挡或小目标可能影响效果。
仅验证了视频QA任务，其他视频理解任务（如检测、跟踪）未测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BoxTuning通过将目标框信息直接注入视觉模态（渲染彩色框和轨迹）替代文本坐标序列，大幅降低token成本并保留完整时间分辨率，提升视频MLLM的空间理解能力。

papers.title: MADQRL: Distributed Quantum Reinforcement Learning Framework for Multi-Agent Environments
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is one of the most practical ways to learn from real-life use-cases. Motivated from the cognitive methods used by humans makes it a widely acceptable strategy in the field of artificial intelligence. Most of the environments used for RL are often high-dimensional, and traditional RL algorithms becomes computationally expensive and challenging to effectively learn from such systems. Recent advancements in practical demonstration of quantum computing (QC) theories, such as compact encoding, enhanced representation and learning algorithms, random sampling, or the inherent stochastic nature of quantum systems, have opened up new directions to tackle these challenges. Quantum reinforcement learning (QRL) is seeking significant traction over the past few years. However, the current state of quantum hardware is not enough to cater for such high-dimensional environments with complex multi-agent setup. To tackle this issue, we propose a distributed framework for QRL where multiple agents learn independently, distributing the load of joint training from individual machines. Our method works well for environments with disjoint sets of action and observation spaces, but can also be extended to other systems with reasonable approximations. We analyze the proposed method on cooperative-pong environment and our results indicate ~10% improvement from other distribution strategies, and ~5% improvement from classical models of policy representation.

analysis.tldr: 提出分布式量子强化学习框架MADQRL，用于多智能体环境，在合作Pong任务上取得约10%的分布策略提升和约5%的经典模型提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统强化学习在高维环境中计算昂贵，量子强化学习虽有潜力但受限于当前量子硬件，难以处理复杂多智能体场景。
analysis.problem: 如何利用分布式框架克服量子硬件限制，实现多智能体环境下的高效量子强化学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出分布式量子强化学习框架MADQRL，多个智能体独立学习，分散联合训练负载，适用于动作和观测空间不相交的环境，并可扩展至其他系统。
contributions: 提出首个分布式量子强化学习框架MADQRL，解决多智能体环境中的硬件限制问题。
在合作Pong环境上验证，相比其他分布策略提升约10%，相比经典策略表示提升约5%。
analysis.experiments: 在合作Pong环境上评估，结果显示约10%的分布策略提升和约5%的经典模型提升。
limitations: 当前仅验证了动作和观测空间不相交的环境，对其他系统的扩展性需进一步验证。
量子硬件限制可能影响实际部署效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分布式量子强化学习框架MADQRL，用于多智能体环境，在合作Pong任务上取得约10%的分布策略提升和约5%的经典模型提升。

papers.title: A Proposed Biomedical Data Policy Framework to Reduce Fragmentation, Improve Quality, and Incentivize Sharing in Indian Healthcare in the era of Artificial Intelligence and Digital Health
papers.abstract: India generates vast biomedical data through postgraduate research, government hospital services and audits, government schemes, private hospitals and their electronic medical record (EMR) systems, insurance programs and standalone clinics. Unfortunately, these resources remain fragmented across institutional silos and vendor-locked EMR systems. The fundamental bottleneck is not technological but economic and academic. There is a systemic misalignment of incentives that renders data sharing a high-risk, low-reward activity for individual researchers and institutions. Until India's academic promotion criteria, institutional rankings, and funding mechanisms explicitly recognize and reward data curation as professional work, the nation's AI ambitions will remain constrained by fragmented, non-interoperable datasets. We propose a multi-layered incentive architecture integrating recognition of data papers in National Medical Commission (NMC) promotion criteria, incorporation of open data metrics into the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF), adoption of Shapley Value-based revenue sharing in federated learning consortia, and establishment of institutional data stewardship as a mainstream professional role. Critical barriers to data sharing, including fear of data quality scrutiny, concerns about misinterpretation, and selective reporting bias, are addressed through mandatory data quality assessment, structured peer review, and academic credit for auditing roles. The proposed framework directly addresses regulatory constraints introduced by the Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 (DPDPA), while constructively engaging with the National Data Sharing and Accessibility Policy (NDSAP), Biotech-PRIDE Guidelines, and the Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF) guidelines.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个多层面激励框架，通过改革学术评价、机构排名和联邦学习收益分配，解决印度医疗数据碎片化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 印度医疗数据分散在机构孤岛和供应商锁定的EMR系统中，根本瓶颈在于经济和学术激励错位，导致数据共享高风险低回报，阻碍AI发展。
analysis.problem: 如何设计政策框架，通过激励对齐和监管合规，促进印度医疗数据的共享、质量提升和碎片化减少。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出数据碎片化源于激励错位，而非技术问题；数据共享被视为高风险低回报活动；存在对数据质量审查、误解和选择性报告偏见的担忧。
analysis.method: 提出多层面激励架构，包括：将数据论文纳入NMC晋升标准、将开放数据指标纳入NIRF、在联邦学习联盟中采用Shapley值收益分配、设立机构数据管理专业角色，并配套强制性数据质量评估、结构化同行评审和审计学术信用。
contributions: 提出一个整合学术、机构和经济激励的多层面数据共享框架。
针对印度DPDPA等法规，提出合规性解决方案。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架尚未经过实证验证，实际效果未知。
实施可能面临既得利益者和制度惯性阻力。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个多层面激励框架，通过改革学术评价、机构排名和联邦学习收益分配，解决印度医疗数据碎片化问题。

papers.title: MEME-Fusion@CHiPSAL 2026: Multimodal Ablation Study of Hate Detection and Sentiment Analysis on Nepali Memes
papers.abstract: Hate speech detection in Devanagari-scripted social media memes presents compounded challenges: multimodal content structure, script-specific linguistic complexity, and extreme data scarcity in low-resource settings. This paper presents our system for the CHiPSAL 2026 shared task, addressing both Subtask A (binary hate speech detection) and Subtask B (three-class sentiment classification: positive, neutral, negative). We propose a hybrid cross-modal attention fusion architecture that combines CLIP (ViT-B/32) for visual encoding with BGE-M3 for multilingual text representation, connected through 4-head self-attention and a learnable gating network that dynamically weights modality contributions on a per-sample basis. Systematic evaluation across eight model configurations demonstrates that explicit cross-modal reasoning achieves a 5.9% F1-macro improvement over text-only baselines on Subtask A, while uncovering two unexpected but critical findings: English-centric vision models exhibit near-random performance on Devanagari script, and standard ensemble methods catastrophically degrade under data scarcity (N nearly equal to 850 per fold) due to correlated overfitting. The code can be accessed at https://github.com/Tri-Yantra-Technologies/MEME-Fusion/

analysis.tldr: 针对尼泊尔语表情包的多模态仇恨检测与情感分析，提出混合跨模态注意力融合架构，在低资源场景下提升F1-macro 5.9%。
analysis.research_motivation: 社交媒体中Devanagari文字表情包的仇恨检测面临多模态内容、文字复杂性和低资源数据稀缺的多重挑战，现有方法难以有效融合视觉与文本信息。
analysis.problem: 在低资源尼泊尔语表情包上实现有效的多模态仇恨检测和情感分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 英文中心视觉模型在Devanagari文字上表现接近随机；标准集成方法在数据稀缺（每折约850样本）时因相关过拟合而性能灾难性下降。
analysis.method: 混合跨模态注意力融合架构：CLIP (ViT-B/32) 编码视觉，BGE-M3编码文本，通过4头自注意力和可学习门控网络动态加权模态贡献。
contributions: 提出一种针对低资源多模态场景的跨模态注意力融合方法，在Subtask A上比纯文本基线提升5.9% F1-macro。
揭示英文中心视觉模型在非拉丁文字上的失效模式，以及集成方法在数据稀缺下的过拟合陷阱。
analysis.experiments: 在CHiPSAL 2026共享任务的尼泊尔语表情包数据集上评估8种模型配置，包含二分类仇恨检测和三分类情感分析。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅在单一语言（尼泊尔语）和特定数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未与更多多模态基线（如直接拼接、跨模态Transformer）比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对尼泊尔语表情包的多模态仇恨检测与情感分析，提出混合跨模态注意力融合架构，在低资源场景下提升F1-macro 5.9%。

papers.title: Semantic-Geometric Dual Compression: Training-Free Visual Token Reduction for Ultra-High-Resolution Remote Sensing Understanding
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated immense potential in Earth observation. However, the massive visual tokens generated when processing Ultra-High-Resolution (UHR) imagery introduce prohibitive computational overhead, severely bottlenecking their inference efficiency. Existing visual token compression methods predominantly adopt static and uniform compression strategies, neglecting the inherent "Semantic-Geometric Duality" in remote sensing interpretation tasks. Specifically, object semantic tasks focus on the abstract semantics of objects and benefit from aggressive background pruning, whereas scene geometric tasks critically rely on the integrity of spatial topology. To address this challenge, we propose DualComp, a task-adaptive dual-stream token compression framework. Dynamically guided by a lightweight pre-trained router, DualComp decouples feature processing into two dedicated pathways. In the object semantic stream, the Spatially-Contiguous Semantic Aggregator (SCSA) utilizes size-adaptive clustering to aggregates redundant background while protecting small object. In the scene geometric stream, the Instruction-Guided Structure Recoverer (IGSR) introduces a greedy path-tracing topology completion mechanism to reconstruct spatial skeletons. Experiments on the UHR remote sensing benchmark XLRS-Bench demonstrate that DualComp accomplishes high-fidelity remote sensing interpretation at an exceptionally low computational cost, achieving simultaneous improvements in both efficiency and accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出 DualComp，一种无需训练的双流视觉 token 压缩框架，通过语义-几何双路径自适应压缩实现超高分辨率遥感图像高效理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 处理超高分辨率遥感图像时，MLLM 产生大量视觉 token 导致计算开销巨大，现有静态均匀压缩方法忽略了遥感任务中语义与几何的双重特性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲任务性能的前提下，自适应地压缩超高分辨率遥感图像的视觉 token，以降低 MLLM 推理的计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 遥感任务存在语义-几何二元性：物体语义任务可激进裁剪背景，而场景几何任务依赖空间拓扑完整性。
analysis.method: 提出 DualComp 框架，包含轻量预训练路由器动态引导双流处理：物体语义流使用 SCSA 进行尺寸自适应聚类聚合冗余背景并保护小目标；场景几何流使用 IGSR 通过贪心路径追踪拓扑补全机制重建空间骨架。
contributions: 首次提出任务自适应的双流 token 压缩框架，利用语义-几何二元性指导压缩策略。
设计 SCSA 和 IGSR 两个专用模块，分别针对物体语义和场景几何任务实现高效压缩。
在 UHR 遥感基准 XLRS-Bench 上验证了 DualComp 在效率和精度上的同时提升。
analysis.experiments: 在 UHR 遥感基准 XLRS-Bench 上进行实验，结果表明 DualComp 以极低计算成本实现高保真遥感解译，同时提升效率和精度。
limitations: 依赖预训练路由器的准确性，可能影响任务分类错误时的压缩效果。
仅针对遥感图像，泛化到其他领域需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 DualComp，一种无需训练的双流视觉 token 压缩框架，通过语义-几何双路径自适应压缩实现超高分辨率遥感图像高效理解。

papers.title: Persona Non Grata: Single-Method Safety Evaluation Is Incomplete for Persona-Imbued LLMs
papers.abstract: Personality imbuing customizes LLM behavior, but safety evaluations almost always study prompt-based personas alone. We show this is incomplete: prompting and activation steering expose *different*, architecture-dependent vulnerability profiles, and testing with only one method can miss a model's dominant failure mode. Across 5,568 judged conditions on four standard models from three architecture families, persona danger rankings under system prompting are preserved across all architectures ($ρ= 0.71$--$0.96$), but activation-steering vulnerability diverges sharply and cannot be predicted from prompt-side rankings: Llama-3.1-8B is substantially more AS-vulnerable, whereas Gemma-3-27B and Qwen3.5 are more vulnerable to prompting. The most striking illustration of this divergence is the *prosocial persona paradox*: on Llama-3.1-8B, P12 (high conscientiousness + high agreeableness) is among the safest personas under prompting yet becomes the highest-ASR activation-steered persona (ASR ~0.818). This is an inversion robust to coefficient ablation and matched-strength calibration, and replicated on DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B. A trait refusal alignment framework, in which conscientiousness is strongly anti-aligned with refusal on Llama-3.1-8B, offers a partial geometric account. Reasoning provides only partial protection: two 32B reasoning models reach 15--18% prompt-side ASR, and activation steering separates them sharply in both baseline susceptibility and persona-specific vulnerability. Heuristic trace diagnostics suggest that the safer model retains stronger policy recall and self-correction behavior, not merely longer reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 仅用提示测试LLM人格安全性不完整，激活操控会暴露不同漏洞。
analysis.research_motivation: 人格注入定制LLM行为，但安全评估几乎只研究基于提示的人格，可能遗漏模型的主要失败模式。
analysis.problem: 证明单方法安全评估（仅提示）对于人格注入的LLM是不完整的，需要结合激活操控等方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 提示和激活操控暴露不同且架构相关的漏洞；亲社会人格悖论：高尽责性+高宜人性在提示下安全，但在激活操控下最危险。
analysis.method: 在四个标准模型上，通过系统提示和激活操控两种方法注入人格，评估安全风险，并分析特质拒绝对齐框架。
contributions: 揭示提示和激活操控暴露不同漏洞，单方法评估不完整。
发现亲社会人格悖论，并给出特质拒绝对齐框架的部分解释。
analysis.experiments: 在三个架构家族的四个模型上进行了5,568个评判条件，包括Llama-3.1-8B、Gemma-3-27B、Qwen3.5和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B。
limitations: 仅基于四个模型，泛化性有限。
特质拒绝对齐框架仅为部分几何解释，未完全揭示机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 仅用提示测试LLM人格安全性不完整，激活操控会暴露不同漏洞。

papers.title: Quantum-Gated Task-interaction Knowledge Distillation for Pre-trained Model-based Class-Incremental Learning
papers.abstract: Class-incremental learning (CIL) aims to continuously accumulate knowledge from a stream of tasks and construct a unified classifier over all seen classes. Although pretrained models (PTMs) have shown promising performance in CIL, they still struggle with the entanglement of multi-task subspaces, leading to catastrophic forgetting when task routing parameters are poorly calibrated or task-level representations are rigidly fixed. To address this issue, we propose a novel Quantum-Gated Task-interaction Knowledge Distillation (QKD) framework that leverages quantum gating to guide inter-task knowledge transfer. Specifically, we introduce a quantum-gated task modulation gating mechanism to model the relational dependencies among task embedding, dynamically capturing the sample-to-task relevance for both joint training and inference across streaming tasks. Guided by the quantum gating outputs, we perform task-interaction knowledge distillation guided by these task-embedding-level correlation weights from old to new adapters, enabling the model to bridge the representation gaps between independent task subspaces. Extensive experiments demonstrate that QKD effectively mitigates forgetting and achieves state-of-the-art performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出量子门控任务交互知识蒸馏框架，缓解预训练模型在类增量学习中的多任务子空间纠缠与灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 类增量学习需要持续积累知识，但预训练模型在多任务子空间存在纠缠，导致任务路由参数校准不佳或任务表示僵化时发生灾难性遗忘。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预训练模型在类增量学习中有效解耦多任务子空间，实现任务间知识的高效迁移并缓解遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出预训练模型在类增量学习中存在多任务子空间纠缠，导致任务路由参数校准不佳或任务表示僵化时发生灾难性遗忘。
analysis.method: 提出量子门控任务交互知识蒸馏（QKD）框架，包括量子门控任务调制门控机制（建模任务嵌入关系依赖，动态捕捉样本-任务相关性）和基于量子门控输出的任务交互知识蒸馏（利用任务嵌入级相关性权重从旧适配器向新适配器迁移知识）。
contributions: 提出量子门控任务调制门控机制，动态建模任务嵌入间的依赖关系。
设计任务交互知识蒸馏方法，利用量子门控输出引导任务间知识迁移，弥合独立任务子空间的表示鸿沟。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及大量实验表明QKD有效缓解遗忘并达到最先进性能。
limitations: 量子门控机制可能引入额外计算开销。
方法在任务数量极大或类别分布极不平衡场景下的表现未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出量子门控任务交互知识蒸馏框架，缓解预训练模型在类增量学习中的多任务子空间纠缠与灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: Use of AI Tools: Guidelines to Maintain Academic Integrity in Computing Colleges
papers.abstract: The rapid adoption of AI tools such as ChatGPT has significantly transformed academic practices, offering considerable benefits for both students and faculty in computing disciplines. These tools have been shown to enhance learning efficiency, academic self-efficacy, and confidence. However, their increasing use also raises pressing concerns regarding the preservation of academic integrity -- an essential pillar of the educational process. This paper explores the implications of widespread AI tool usage within computing colleges, with a particular focus on how to align their use with the principles of academic honesty. We begin by classifying common assessment techniques employed in computing education and examine how each may be impacted by AI-assisted tools. Building on this foundation, we propose a set of general guidelines applicable across various assessment formats to help instructors responsibly integrate AI tools into their pedagogy. Furthermore, we provide targeted, assessment-specific recommendations designed to uphold educational objectives while mitigating risks of academic misconduct. These guidelines serve as a practical framework for instructors aiming to balance the pedagogical advantages of AI tools with the imperative of maintaining academic integrity in computing education. Finally, we introduce a formal model that provides a structured mathematical framework for evaluating student assessments in the presence of AI-assisted tools.

analysis.tldr: 针对计算学科中AI工具的使用，提出维护学术诚信的指南和评估模型。
analysis.research_motivation: AI工具（如ChatGPT）在计算学科中广泛使用，带来学习效率提升的同时，也引发学术诚信问题，亟需指导原则。
analysis.problem: 如何在计算学科教育中平衡AI工具的使用与学术诚信的维护。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 分类常见评估技术，提出通用指南和针对特定评估的建议，并引入形式化模型用于评估学生作业。
contributions: 提出一套通用指南，帮助教师负责任地整合AI工具。
提供针对特定评估类型的建议，以减少学术不端风险。
引入一个形式化模型，用于在AI辅助工具存在下评估学生作业。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 指南可能缺乏实证验证。
形式化模型的实际应用效果未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对计算学科中AI工具的使用，提出维护学术诚信的指南和评估模型。

papers.title: Record-Remix-Replay: Hierarchical GPU Kernel Optimization using Evolutionary Search
papers.abstract: As high-performance computing and AI workloads become increasingly dependent on GPUs, maintaining high performance across rapidly evolving hardware generations has become a major challenge. Developers often spend months tuning scientific applications to fully exploit new architectures, navigating a complex optimization space that spans algorithm design, source implementation, compiler flags and pass sequences, and kernel launch parameters. Existing approaches can effectively search parts of this space in isolation, such as launch configurations or compiler settings, but optimizing across the full space still requires substantial human expertise and iterative manual effort. In this paper, we present Record-Remix-Replay (R^3), a hierarchical optimization framework that combines LLM-driven evolutionary search, Bayesian optimization, and record-replay compilation techniques to efficiently explore GPU kernel optimizations from source-level implementation choices down to compiler pass ordering and runtime configuration. By making candidate evaluation fast and scalable, our approach enables practical end-to-end search over optimization dimensions that are typically treated separately. We show that Record-Remix-Replay can optimize full scientific applications better than traditional approaches over kernel parameters and compiler flags, while also being nearly an order of magnitude faster than modern evolutionary search approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出R³框架，结合LLM进化搜索、贝叶斯优化和记录重放编译，分层优化GPU内核。
analysis.research_motivation: GPU硬件快速演进，手动调优耗时且依赖专家经验，现有方法仅能孤立搜索部分优化空间，缺乏端到端自动化方案。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地跨源代码实现、编译器选项和运行时配置等全维度自动搜索GPU内核优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 分层优化框架R³：LLM驱动的进化搜索探索高层源码变换，贝叶斯优化调优低层编译器参数，记录重放编译加速候选评估。
contributions: 提出R³分层优化框架，统一搜索源码、编译器和运行时配置。
结合LLM进化搜索与贝叶斯优化，实现端到端自动调优。
在科学应用上优于传统方法，且速度提升近一个数量级。
analysis.experiments: 在完整科学应用上评估，R³优于传统内核参数和编译器标志调优方法，速度比现代进化搜索快近一个数量级。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM生成质量，对复杂源码变换效果未知。
框架复杂度高，部署和维护成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出R³框架，结合LLM进化搜索、贝叶斯优化和记录重放编译，分层优化GPU内核。

papers.title: Toward Human-AI Complementarity Across Diverse Tasks
papers.abstract: Human-AI complementarity, the idea that combining human and AI judgments can outperform either alone, offers a promising pathway toward robust oversight of advanced AI systems. However, whether human-AI complementarity can be achieved on realistic tasks remains an open question. We investigate this through two approaches: hybridization and two AI assistance methods (top-2 assistance and subtask delegation), evaluated on a multi-domain dataset of 1,886 samples spanning knowledge, factuality, long-context reasoning, and deception detection. We find only modest complementarity gains. Baseline hybridization yields just +0.4 percentage points (pp) over AI alone (69.3\% vs 68.9\%), limited both by a small complementarity region (only 8.9\% of items where AI errs but humans do not) and the inability of confidence-based routing to identify it, since the model's confidence is similarly distributed across correct and incorrect predictions. Applied when AI has low confidence, top-2 assistance increases human accuracy from 28.4\% to 38.3\%, surpassing AI alone (37.7\%) -- but primarily because humans adopt correct AI suggestions, not because they successfully override AI errors. These findings suggest that the primary bottleneck is not human task accuracy per se, but the ability to route decisions to humans when it matters and to design assistance methods that enable humans to catch AI mistakes. Our quantitative and qualitative analyses pinpoint where and why each method succeeds or fails, offering concrete targets for future work. We will release our dataset and code upon request to support progress toward more effective human-AI collaboration for AI oversight.

analysis.tldr: 人机互补在多样化任务中增益有限，主要瓶颈在于难以识别AI错误并设计有效辅助方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 人机互补有望提升AI系统的鲁棒监督，但在现实任务中能否实现尚不明确，现有研究缺乏系统评估。
analysis.problem: 探究人机互补在多样化任务中的实际效果，并分析其成功与失败的原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 互补增益微弱（+0.4pp），互补区域仅占8.9%，且模型置信度无法有效区分正确与错误预测；top-2辅助提升主要源于人类采纳正确建议，而非纠正AI错误。
analysis.method: 采用混合化（hybridization）和两种AI辅助方法（top-2辅助和子任务委派），在多领域数据集（1886样本）上评估。
contributions: 系统评估了人机互补在知识、事实性、长上下文推理和欺骗检测等任务上的效果
揭示了互补增益有限的根本原因：互补区域小且置信度路由失效
提供了定量和定性分析，指出未来改进方向
analysis.experiments: 在包含1886样本的多领域数据集上评估，涵盖知识、事实性、长上下文推理和欺骗检测。
limitations: 仅基于单一数据集，可能缺乏泛化性
未探索更复杂的辅助方法或动态路由策略
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 人机互补在多样化任务中增益有限，主要瓶颈在于难以识别AI错误并设计有效辅助方法。

papers.title: Frugal Knowledge Graph Construction with Local LLMs: A Zero-Shot Pipeline, Self-Consistency and Wisdom of Artificial Crowds
papers.abstract: This paper presents an empirical study of a multi-model zero-shot pipeline for knowledge graph construction and exploitation, executed entirely through local inference on consumer-grade hardware. We propose a reproducible evaluation framework integrating two external benchmarks (DocRED, HotpotQA), WebQuestionsSP-style synthetic data, and the RAGAS evaluation framework in an automated pipeline. On 500 document-level relations, our system achieves an F1 of 0.70 $\pm$ 0.041 in zero-shot, compared to 0.80 for supervised DREEAM. Text-to-query achieves an accuracy of 0.80 $\pm$ 0.06 on 200 samples. Multi-hop reasoning achieves an Exact Match (EM) of 0.46$\pm$0.04 on 500 HotpotQA questions, with a RAGAS faithfulness of 0.96 $\pm$ 0.04 on 50 samples. Beyond the pipeline, we study diversity mechanisms for difficult multi-hop reasoning. On 181 questions unsolvable at zero temperature, self-consistency (k=5, T =0.7) recovers up to 23% EM with a single Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model, but the cross-model oracle (3 architectures x 5 samples) reaches 46.4%. We highlight an agreement paradox: strong consensus among samples signals collective hallucination rather than a reliable answer, echoing the work of Moussa{ï}d et al. on the wisdom of crowds. Extending to the full pipeline (500 questions), self-consistency (k=3) raises EM from 0.46 to 0.48 $\pm$ 0.04. A confidence-routing cascade mechanism (Phi-4 $\rightarrow$ GPT-OSS, k=5) achieves an EM of 0.55 $\pm$ 0.04, the best result obtained, with 45.4% of questions rerouted. Finally, we show that V3 prompt engineering applied to other models does not reproduce the gains observed with Gemma-4, confirming the specific prompt/model interaction. The entire system runs in $\sim$5 h on a single RTX 3090, without any training, for an estimated carbon footprint of 0.09 kg CO2 eq.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种零样本、多模型的知识图谱构建与推理流水线，全部在消费级硬件上本地运行，并研究了自一致性、跨模型集成和提示工程等机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 知识图谱构建通常依赖大规模监督训练或昂贵API，而本地小模型在零样本场景下的能力尚未被充分探索，且多模型协作的收益与风险（如集体幻觉）缺乏系统研究。
analysis.problem: 如何在零样本、无训练条件下，利用多个本地小模型高效构建知识图谱并完成复杂推理任务，同时缓解幻觉并提升可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到强共识反而预示集体幻觉（一致性悖论），以及特定提示工程（V3）的收益无法跨模型迁移，表明提示-模型交互具有特异性。
analysis.method: 多模型零样本流水线，包含文档级关系抽取、文本到查询转换、多跳推理；集成自一致性采样、跨模型oracle、置信度路由级联机制（Phi-4→GPT-OSS）。
contributions: 提出并开源了完全本地化、零样本的知识图谱构建与评估流水线，在消费级GPU上运行。
系统研究了自一致性、跨模型集成和提示工程对多跳推理的影响，揭示了一致性悖论。
analysis.experiments: 在DocRED、HotpotQA、WebQuestionsSP风格合成数据上评估，报告了F1、准确率、EM、RAGAS忠实度等指标，并与监督基线DREEAM对比。
limitations: 仅使用少量模型（Phi-4、Gemma-4、GPT-OSS等），未覆盖更多架构。
零样本设置下性能仍低于监督方法，且跨模型oracle需要多次推理，成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种零样本、多模型的知识图谱构建与推理流水线，全部在消费级硬件上本地运行，并研究了自一致性、跨模型集成和提示工程等机制。

papers.title: ActorMind: Emulating Human Actor Reasoning for Speech Role-Playing
papers.abstract: Role-playing has garnered rising attention as it provides a strong foundation for human-machine interaction and facilitates sociological research. However, current work is confined to textual modalities, neglecting speech, which plays a predominant role in daily life, thus limiting genuine role-playing. To bridge this gap, we conceptualize and benchmark speech role-playing through ActorMindBench, and we present a corresponding reasoning framework, called ActorMind. Specifically, (1) Speech Role-Playing enables models to deliver spontaneous responses with personalized verbal traits based on their role, the scene, and spoken dialogue. (2) ActorMindBench is a hierarchical benchmark comprises Utterance-Level content with 7,653 utterances, Scene-Level content with 313 scenes, and Role-Level content with 6 roles. (3) ActorMind is an off-the-shelf, multi-agent, chain-of-though style reasoning framework that emulates how human actors perform in theaters. Concretely, ActorMind first reads its assigned role description via Eye Agent, then comprehends emotional cues within contextual spoken dialogues through Ear Agent. Subsequently, Brain Agent generates a descriptive emotional state, and finally, Mouth Agent delivers the scripts infused with corresponding emotion state. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of ActorMind in enhancing speech role-playing.

analysis.tldr: 提出ActorMind框架，通过模拟人类演员推理过程增强语音角色扮演能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有角色扮演局限于文本模态，忽略了语音在日常交流中的主导作用，限制了真实角色扮演的体验。
analysis.problem: 如何让模型在语音角色扮演中根据角色、场景和对话历史生成带有个性化语音特征的自发回应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ActorMind多智能体链式推理框架，包含Eye Agent（读取角色描述）、Ear Agent（理解对话情感线索）、Brain Agent（生成情感状态描述）、Mouth Agent（输出带情感状态的语音）。
contributions: 定义了语音角色扮演任务并构建了分层基准ActorMindBench（含7653个话语、313个场景、6个角色）。
提出了模拟人类演员推理的ActorMind框架，有效提升语音角色扮演效果。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明ActorMind在增强语音角色扮演方面的有效性，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 基准规模有限（仅6个角色），可能无法覆盖多样化场景。
框架依赖多智能体协作，推理效率可能较低。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ActorMind框架，通过模拟人类演员推理过程增强语音角色扮演能力。

papers.title: OmniScript: Towards Audio-Visual Script Generation for Long-Form Cinematic Video
papers.abstract: Current multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in short-form video understanding, yet translating long-form cinematic videos into detailed, temporally grounded scripts remains a significant challenge. This paper introduces the novel video-to-script (V2S) task, aiming to generate hierarchical, scene-by-scene scripts encompassing character actions, dialogues, expressions, and audio cues. To facilitate this, we construct a first-of-its-kind human-annotated benchmark and propose a temporally-aware hierarchical evaluation framework. Furthermore, we present OmniScript, an 8B-parameter omni-modal (audio-visual) language model tailored for long-form narrative comprehension. OmniScript is trained via a progressive pipeline that leverages chain-of-thought supervised fine-tuning for plot and character reasoning, followed by reinforcement learning using temporally segmented rewards. Extensive experiments demonstrate that despite its parameter efficiency, OmniScript significantly outperforms larger open-source models and achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art proprietary models, including Gemini 3-Pro, in both temporal localization and multi-field semantic accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出长视频到脚本生成任务，构建首个基准并训练8B多模态模型OmniScript，性能媲美Gemini 3-Pro。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM擅长短视频理解，但将长电影视频转化为带时间戳的详细脚本仍是重大挑战，缺乏相关基准和方法。
analysis.problem: 长视频到脚本（V2S）生成，即生成层次化、逐场景的脚本，包含角色动作、对话、表情和音频线索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出OmniScript，一个8B参数的音视频语言模型，采用渐进式训练：先进行思维链监督微调用于情节和角色推理，再使用时序分段奖励进行强化学习。
contributions: 首次定义视频到脚本（V2S）任务并构建人工标注基准。
提出时序感知的层次化评估框架。
提出OmniScript模型，通过渐进式训练在参数效率下达到与Gemini 3-Pro相当的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在自建基准上，OmniScript显著优于更大开源模型，性能与Gemini 3-Pro等专有模型相当。
limitations: 模型规模8B，可能仍受限于长视频上下文长度。
基准规模未提及，可能覆盖场景有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出长视频到脚本生成任务，构建首个基准并训练8B多模态模型OmniScript，性能媲美Gemini 3-Pro。

papers.title: Efficient Transceiver Design for Aerial Image Transmission and Large-scale Scene Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Large-scale three-dimensional (3D) scene reconstruction in low-altitude intelligent networks (LAIN) demands highly efficient wireless image transmission. However, existing schemes struggle to balance severe pilot overhead with the transmission accuracy required to maintain reconstruction fidelity. To strike a balance between efficiency and reliability, this paper proposes a novel deep learning-based end-to-end (E2E) transceiver design that integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) directly into the training process. By jointly optimizing the communication modules via the combined 3DGS rendering loss, our approach explicitly improves scene recovery quality. Furthermore, this task-driven framework enables the use of a sparse pilot scheme, significantly reducing transmission overhead while maintaining robust image recovery under low-altitude channel conditions. Extensive experiments on real-world aerial image datasets demonstrate that the proposed E2E design significantly outperforms existing baselines, delivering superior transmission performance and accurate 3D scene reconstructions.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种将3D高斯泼溅集成到训练中的端到端收发机，在低空网络中实现高效图像传输与大规模3D场景重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 低空智能网络中的大规模3D场景重建需要高效的无线图像传输，但现有方案难以平衡导频开销和传输精度，导致重建保真度下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在低空信道条件下，通过联合优化通信模块和3D重建损失，实现低开销、高保真的图像传输与场景重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于深度学习的端到端收发机，将3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）渲染损失直接集成到训练中，联合优化通信模块，并采用稀疏导频方案降低传输开销。
contributions: 首次将3DGS渲染损失引入通信收发机训练，实现任务驱动的联合优化。
提出稀疏导频方案，在低空信道条件下显著降低传输开销同时保持重建质量。
analysis.experiments: 在真实航拍图像数据集上进行实验，结果表明所提方法在传输性能和3D场景重建精度上显著优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定信道模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
3DGS的实时性可能受限于计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种将3D高斯泼溅集成到训练中的端到端收发机，在低空网络中实现高效图像传输与大规模3D场景重建。

papers.title: CDPR: Cross-modal Diffusion with Polarization for Reliable Monocular Depth Estimation
papers.abstract: Monocular depth estimation is a fundamental yet challenging task in computer vision, especially under complex conditions such as textureless surfaces, transparency, and specular reflections. Recent diffusion-based approaches have significantly advanced performance by reformulating depth prediction as a denoising process in the latent space. However, existing methods rely solely on RGB inputs, which often lack sufficient cues in challenging regions. In this work, we present CDPR - Cross-modal Diffusion with Polarization for Reliable Monocular Depth Estimation - a novel diffusion-based framework that integrates physically grounded polarization priors to enhance estimation robustness. Specifically, we encode both RGB and polarization (AoLP/DoLP) images into a shared latent space via a pre-trained Variational Autoencoder (VAE), and dynamically fuse multi-modal information through a learnable confidence-aware gating mechanism. This fusion module adaptively suppresses noisy signals in polarization inputs while preserving informative cues, particularly around reflective or transparent surfaces, and provides the integrated latent representation for subsequent monocular depth estimation. Beyond depth estimation, we further verify that our framework can be easily generalized to surface normal prediction with minimal modification, showcasing its scalability to general polarization-guided dense prediction tasks. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets validate that CDPR significantly outperforms RGB-only baselines in challenging regions while maintaining competitive performance in standard scenes.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨模态扩散框架CDPR，融合偏振先验提升单目深度估计在复杂场景下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 单目深度估计在无纹理、透明、镜面反射等复杂条件下缺乏足够线索，现有扩散方法仅依赖RGB输入，难以处理这些挑战区域。
analysis.problem: 如何利用偏振信息增强单目深度估计在困难区域的鲁棒性，同时保持标准场景下的竞争力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 偏振图像（AoLP/DoLP）在反射或透明表面附近包含丰富几何线索，但可能包含噪声信号。
analysis.method: 将RGB和偏振图像通过预训练VAE编码到共享潜空间，使用可学习的置信感知门控机制动态融合多模态信息，抑制噪声并保留有效线索，然后进行扩散去噪深度估计。
contributions: 首次将偏振先验集成到扩散框架中用于单目深度估计，提出跨模态融合机制。
设计置信感知门控融合模块，自适应处理偏振噪声并保留有效信息。
验证框架可轻松泛化到表面法线预测，展示偏振引导密集预测任务的扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上，CDPR在挑战区域显著优于仅RGB基线，在标准场景保持竞争力。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 依赖偏振相机硬件，可能限制实际部署。
融合机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨模态扩散框架CDPR，融合偏振先验提升单目深度估计在复杂场景下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Efficient Training for Cross-lingual Speech Language Models
papers.abstract: Currently, large language models (LLMs) predominantly focus on the text modality. To enable more natural human-AI interaction, speech LLMs are emerging, but building effective end-to-end speech LLMs remains challenging due to limited data and the difficulty in expanding to more languages. In this paper, we introduce Cross-lingual Speech Language Model (CSLM), an efficient training method for cross-lingual speech LLMs based on discrete speech tokens. We propose a novel alignment strategy that achieves cross-modal and cross-lingual alignment through continual pre-training. By conducting instruction fine-tuning following a speech-text interleaved chain-of-modality generation process, we enhance modal alignment at a finer granularity, thereby improving generation quality and reducing latency. CSLM aligns different modalities and languages simultaneously without the need for massive speech data, thus exhibiting good language scalability. Evaluations on cross-modal tasks, mono-lingual conversational tasks, and cross-lingual conversational tasks demonstrate CSLM's strong cross-modal alignment capabilities and general task abilities. (Code is available at: https://github.com/ictnlp/CSLM)

analysis.tldr: 提出CSLM方法，通过持续预训练和指令微调实现跨语言语音语言模型的高效训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM主要处理文本，构建端到端语音LLM面临数据有限和语言扩展困难的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何高效训练跨语言语音语言模型，实现跨模态和跨语言对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于离散语音token，通过持续预训练实现跨模态和跨语言对齐，再通过语音-文本交错模态链的指令微调增强细粒度对齐。
contributions: 提出CSLM高效训练方法，无需大量语音数据即可同时对齐不同模态和语言。
在跨模态、单语对话和跨语言对话任务上验证了模型的对齐能力和通用任务能力。
analysis.experiments: 在跨模态任务、单语对话任务和跨语言对话任务上评估，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖离散语音token的质量。
跨语言扩展性可能受限于预训练数据覆盖的语言种类。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CSLM方法，通过持续预训练和指令微调实现跨语言语音语言模型的高效训练。

papers.title: Bottleneck Tokens for Unified Multimodal Retrieval
papers.abstract: Adapting decoder-only multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for unified multimodal retrieval faces two structural gaps. First, existing methods rely on implicit pooling, which overloads the hidden state of a standard vocabulary token (e.g., <EOS>) as the sequence-level representation, a mechanism never designed for information aggregation. Second, contrastive fine-tuning specifies what the embedding should match but provides no token-level guidance on how information should be compressed into it. We address both gaps with two complementary components. Architecturally, we introduce Bottleneck Tokens (BToks), a small set of learnable tokens that serve as a fixed-capacity explicit pooling mechanism. For training, we propose Generative Information Condensation: a next-token prediction objective coupled with a Condensation Mask that severs the direct attention path from target tokens to query tokens. All predictive signals are thereby forced through the BToks, converting the generative loss into dense, token-level supervision for semantic compression. At inference time, only the input and BToks are processed in a single forward pass with negligible overhead over conventional last-token pooling. On MMEB-V2 (78 datasets, 3 modalities, 9 meta-tasks), our approach achieves state-of-the-art among 2B-scale methods under comparable data conditions, attaining an Overall score of 59.0 (+3.6 over VLM2Vec-V2) with substantial gains on semantically demanding tasks (e.g., +12.6 on Video-QA).

analysis.tldr: 引入瓶颈标记和生成式信息压缩，统一多模态检索达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有解码器多模态大模型在统一检索中面临隐式池化信息过载和缺乏压缩指导的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计显式池化机制和提供标记级监督，实现高效统一多模态检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出瓶颈标记作为显式池化，结合生成式信息压缩目标，通过掩码强制信息经瓶颈标记压缩。
contributions: 提出瓶颈标记作为固定容量的显式池化机制。
提出生成式信息压缩训练方法，将生成损失转化为标记级语义压缩监督。
analysis.experiments: 在MMEB-V2（78个数据集，3种模态，9个元任务）上，2B规模方法中达到SOTA，Overall 59.0，比VLM2Vec-V2高3.6，视频问答任务提升12.6。
limitations: 可能仅适用于解码器架构。
瓶颈标记容量固定，可能限制复杂任务性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 引入瓶颈标记和生成式信息压缩，统一多模态检索达到SOTA。

papers.title: E2E-REME: Towards End-to-End Microservices Auto-Remediation via Experience-Simulation Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Contemporary microservice systems continue to grow in scale and complexity, leading to increasingly frequent and costly failures. While recent LLM-based auto-remediation approaches have emerged, they primarily translate textual instructions into executable Ansible playbooks and rely on expert-crafted prompts, lacking runtime knowledge guidance and depending on large-scale general-purpose LLMs, which limits their accuracy and efficiency. We introduce \textit{End-to-End Microservice Remediation} (E2E-MR), a new task that requires directly generating executable playbooks from diagnosis reports to autonomously restore faulty systems. To enable rigorous evaluation, we build \textit{MicroRemed}, a benchmark that automates microservice deployment, failure injection, playbook execution, and post-repair verification. We further propose \textit{E2E-REME}, an end-to-end auto-remediation model trained via experience-simulation reinforcement fine-tuning. Experiments on public and industrial microservice platforms, compared with nine representative LLMs, show that E2E-REME achieves superior accuracy and efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出端到端微服务自动修复任务及模型E2E-REME，通过经验模拟强化微调提升修复准确率和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 微服务系统规模与复杂性增长导致故障频发，现有基于LLM的自动修复方法依赖专家提示和通用大模型，缺乏运行时知识指导，准确率和效率受限。
analysis.problem: 如何从诊断报告直接生成可执行Ansible playbook以实现端到端微服务自动修复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出E2E-REME模型，采用经验模拟强化微调（Experience-Simulation Reinforcement Fine-Tuning）训练，从诊断报告直接生成可执行playbook。
contributions: 定义了端到端微服务修复（E2E-MR）新任务。
构建了MicroRemed基准，支持自动化部署、故障注入、playbook执行和修复后验证。
提出E2E-REME模型，通过经验模拟强化微调实现高准确率和高效率的自动修复。
analysis.experiments: 在公开和工业微服务平台上与9个代表性LLM对比，E2E-REME在准确率和效率上表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖特定微服务平台的故障注入和验证环境。
强化微调的训练数据构建和泛化性未详细说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出端到端微服务自动修复任务及模型E2E-REME，通过经验模拟强化微调提升修复准确率和效率。

papers.title: LDEPrompt: Layer-importance guided Dual Expandable Prompt Pool for Pre-trained Model-based Class-Incremental Learning
papers.abstract: Prompt-based class-incremental learning methods typically construct a prompt pool consisting of multiple trainable key-prompts and perform instance-level matching to select the most suitable prompt embeddings, which has shown promising results. However, existing approaches face several limitations, including fixed prompt pools, manual selection of prompt embeddings, and strong reliance on the pretrained backbone for prompt selection. To address these issues, we propose a \textbf{L}ayer-importance guided \textbf{D}ual \textbf{E}xpandable \textbf{P}rompt Pool (\textbf{LDEPrompt}), which enables adaptive layer selection as well as dynamic freezing and expansion of the prompt pool. Extensive experiments on widely used class-incremental learning benchmarks demonstrate that LDEPrompt achieves state-of-the-art performance, validating its effectiveness and scalability.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于层重要性的双可扩展提示池，实现自适应层选择和提示池动态扩展，在类增量学习中取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于提示的类增量学习方法存在提示池固定、提示嵌入手动选择、过度依赖预训练骨干网络等问题，限制了其适应性和性能。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可自适应扩展和动态冻结的提示池，并实现层重要性引导的层选择，以提升类增量学习性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LDEPrompt，包含层重要性引导的层选择机制和双可扩展提示池（动态冻结与扩展），通过自适应选择重要层和动态调整提示池大小来克服现有方法局限。
contributions: 提出层重要性引导的层选择方法，自适应选择关键层进行提示注入。
设计双可扩展提示池，支持动态冻结和扩展，避免固定池容量限制。
analysis.experiments: 在多个广泛使用的类增量学习基准上进行了大量实验，LDEPrompt达到SOTA性能，验证了有效性和可扩展性。
limitations: 可能增加计算开销，因为需要动态评估层重要性。
提示池扩展策略的阈值或规则可能需要手动调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于层重要性的双可扩展提示池，实现自适应层选择和提示池动态扩展，在类增量学习中取得SOTA。

papers.title: Structured State-Space Regularization for Compact and Generation-Friendly Image Tokenization
papers.abstract: Image tokenizers are central to modern vision models as they often operate in latent spaces. An ideal latent space must be simultaneously compact and generation-friendly: it should capture image's essential content compactly while remaining easy to model with generative approaches. In this work, we introduce a novel regularizer to align latent spaces with these two objectives. The key idea is to guide tokenizers to mimic the hidden state dynamics of state-space models (SSMs), thereby transferring their critical property, frequency awareness, to latent features. Grounded in a theoretical analysis of SSMs, our regularizer enforces encoding of fine spatial structures and frequency-domain cues into compact latent features; leading to more effective use of representation capacity and improved generative modelability. Experiments demonstrate that our method improves generation quality in diffusion models while incurring only minimal loss in reconstruction fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化状态空间正则化，使图像分词器在保持紧凑性的同时提升生成友好性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像分词器需要在紧凑性和生成友好性之间权衡，紧凑的潜在空间往往难以被生成模型有效建模。
analysis.problem: 如何设计正则化方法使图像分词器的潜在空间同时具备紧凑性和生成友好性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于状态空间模型（SSM）的理论分析，设计正则化项引导分词器模仿SSM的隐藏状态动态，从而将频率感知特性迁移到潜在特征中。
contributions: 提出一种新的正则化方法，使图像分词器在紧凑表示中编码细粒度空间结构和频域线索。
理论分析SSM特性并证明正则化的有效性，实验表明该方法在扩散模型中提升生成质量，且重建保真度损失极小。
analysis.experiments: 在扩散模型上评估生成质量，并报告重建保真度损失极小。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的生成模型（如扩散模型）。
正则化对分词器训练稳定性的影响未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构化状态空间正则化，使图像分词器在保持紧凑性的同时提升生成友好性。

papers.title: Do Agent Rules Shape or Distort? Guardrails Beat Guidance in Coding Agents
papers.abstract: Developers increasingly guide AI coding agents through natural language instruction files (e.g., CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules), yet no controlled study has measured whether these rules actually improve agent performance or which properties make a rule beneficial. We scrape 679 such files (25,532 rules) from GitHub and conduct the first large-scale empirical evaluation, running over 5,000 agent runs with a state-of-the-art coding agent on SWE-bench Verified. Rules improve performance by 7--14 percentage points, but random rules help as much as expert-curated ones -- suggesting rules work through context priming rather than specific instruction. Negative constraints ("do not refactor unrelated code") are the only individually beneficial rule type, while positive directives ("follow code style") actively hurt -- a pattern we analyze through the lens of potential-based reward shaping (PBRS). Moreover, individual rules are mostly harmful in isolation yet collectively helpful, with no degradation up to 50 rules. These findings expose a hidden reliability risk -- well-intentioned rules routinely degrade agent performance -- and provide a clear principle for safe agent configuration: constrain what agents must not do, rather than prescribing what they should.

analysis.tldr: 对AI编码代理的规则文件进行大规模实证评估，发现负面约束规则有效，正面指令反而有害。
analysis.research_motivation: 开发者广泛使用自然语言规则文件指导AI编码代理，但缺乏控制实验验证其有效性及规则属性对性能的影响。
analysis.problem: 系统评估编码代理规则文件的实际效果，并识别有益规则的关键属性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机规则与专家规则效果相当，表明规则通过上下文启动而非具体指令起作用；负面约束是唯一有益的规则类型，正面指令有害；单个规则通常有害但集体有益，规则数量多达50条时性能不下降。
analysis.method: 从GitHub爬取679个规则文件（25,532条规则），在SWE-bench Verified上使用最先进的编码代理进行超过5,000次代理运行，进行大规模实证评估。
contributions: 首次大规模实证评估编码代理规则文件的效果，发现规则平均提升7-14个百分点。
揭示规则通过上下文启动而非具体指令起作用，负面约束是唯一有益的规则类型。
提供安全配置代理的原则：约束不应做什么，而非规定应做什么。
analysis.experiments: 在SWE-bench Verified上使用最先进的编码代理进行超过5,000次代理运行，评估679个规则文件。
limitations: 仅评估了编码代理，可能不适用于其他类型代理。
规则文件来自GitHub，可能存在选择偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对AI编码代理的规则文件进行大规模实证评估，发现负面约束规则有效，正面指令反而有害。

papers.title: FlowCoMotion: Text-to-Motion Generation via Token-Latent Flow Modeling
papers.abstract: Text-to-motion generation is driven by learning motion representations for semantic alignment with language. Existing methods rely on either continuous or discrete motion representations. However, continuous representations entangle semantics with dynamics, while discrete representations lose fine-grained motion details. In this context, we propose FlowCoMotion, a novel motion generation framework that unifies both treatments from a modeling perspective. Specifically, FlowCoMotion employs token-latent coupling to capture both semantic content and high-fidelity motion details. In the latent branch, we apply multi-view distillation to regularize the continuous latent space, while in the token branch we use discrete temporal resolution quantization to extract high-level semantic cues. The motion latent is then obtained by combining the representations from the two branches through a token-latent coupling network. Subsequently, a velocity field is predicted based on the textual conditions. An ODE solver integrates this velocity field from a simple prior, thereby guiding the sample to the potential state of the target motion. Extensive experiments show that FlowCoMotion achieves competitive performance on text-to-motion benchmarks, including HumanML3D and SnapMoGen.

analysis.tldr: FlowCoMotion通过令牌-潜变量耦合统一连续与离散运动表征，实现文本到运动生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到运动生成方法中，连续表征纠缠语义与动态细节，离散表征丢失细粒度运动信息，亟需一种统一框架兼顾两者优势。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种运动表征与生成框架，同时捕获语义内容和高保真运动细节，并实现文本条件的高质量运动生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FlowCoMotion框架，包含令牌-潜变量耦合：潜变量分支通过多视角蒸馏正则化连续空间，令牌分支使用离散时间分辨率量化提取高层语义，通过耦合网络融合两分支表征；然后基于文本条件预测速度场，利用ODE求解器从简单先验积分得到目标运动潜状态。
contributions: 提出令牌-潜变量耦合机制，统一连续与离散运动表征。
引入多视角蒸馏和离散时间分辨率量化，分别提升潜变量和令牌分支的表征质量。
在HumanML3D和SnapMoGen基准上取得竞争性能。
analysis.experiments: 在HumanML3D和SnapMoGen基准上进行实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
ODE求解器可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlowCoMotion通过令牌-潜变量耦合统一连续与离散运动表征，实现文本到运动生成。

papers.title: RESP: Reference-guided Sequential Prompting for Visual Glitch Detection in Video Games
papers.abstract: Visual glitches in video games degrade player experience and perceived quality, yet manual quality assurance cannot scale to the growing test surface of modern game development. Prior automation efforts, particularly those using vision-language models (VLMs), largely operate on single frames or rely on limited video-level baselines that struggle under realistic scene variation, making robust video-level glitch detection challenging. We present RESP, a practical multi-frame framework for gameplay glitch detection with VLMs. Our key idea is reference-guided prompting: for each test frame, we select a reference frame from earlier in the same video, establishing a visual baseline and reframing detection as within-video comparison rather than isolated classification. RESP sequentially prompts the VLM with reference/test pairs and aggregates noisy frame predictions into a stable video-level decision without fine-tuning the VLM. To enable controlled analysis of reference effects, we introduce RefGlitch, a synthetic dataset of manually labeled reference/test frame pairs with balanced coverage across five glitch types. Experiments across five VLMs and three datasets (one synthetic, two real-world) show that reference guidance consistently strengthens frame-level detection and that the improved frame-level evidence reliably transfers to stronger video-level triage under realistic QA conditions. Code and data are available at: \href{https://github.com/PipiZong/RESP_code.git}{this https URL}.

analysis.tldr: 提出参考引导的序列提示框架RESP，利用视频内帧间对比提升VLM在游戏画面异常检测中的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 游戏画面异常检测中，现有VLM方法多基于单帧或简单视频基线，难以应对真实场景变化，导致视频级检测效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视频内帧间参考信息，提升VLM在游戏画面异常检测中的帧级和视频级性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: RESP框架：对每个测试帧，从同一视频中选取早期帧作为参考，构建参考/测试帧对，通过序列提示VLM进行帧级检测，再聚合帧级预测得到视频级决策，无需微调VLM。
contributions: 提出参考引导的序列提示方法，将异常检测转化为视频内帧间比较。
构建RefGlitch合成数据集，包含五类异常的手动标注参考/测试帧对。
在五个VLM和三个数据集上验证了参考引导对帧级和视频级检测的稳定提升。
analysis.experiments: 在五个VLM和三个数据集（一个合成、两个真实）上实验，显示参考引导一致增强帧级检测，且帧级证据可靠地迁移到视频级分类。
limitations: 依赖参考帧的选择策略，可能影响性能。
合成数据集RefGlitch与真实场景存在差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出参考引导的序列提示框架RESP，利用视频内帧间对比提升VLM在游戏画面异常检测中的鲁棒性。

papers.title: MapATM: Enhancing HD Map Construction through Actor Trajectory Modeling
papers.abstract: High-definition (HD) mapping tasks, which perform lane detections and predictions, are extremely challenging due to non-ideal conditions such as view occlusions, distant lane visibility, and adverse weather conditions. Those conditions often result in compromised lane detection accuracy and reduced reliability within autonomous driving systems. To address these challenges, we introduce MapATM, a novel deep neural network that effectively leverages historical actor trajectory information to improve lane detection accuracy, where actors refer to moving vehicles. By utilizing actor trajectories as structural priors for road geometry, MapATM achieves substantial performance enhancements, notably increasing AP by 4.6 for lane dividers and mAP by 2.6 on the challenging NuScenes dataset, representing relative improvements of 10.1% and 6.1%, respectively, compared to strong baseline methods. Extensive qualitative evaluations further demonstrate MapATM's capability to consistently maintain stable and robust map reconstruction across diverse and complex driving scenarios, underscoring its practical value for autonomous driving applications.

analysis.tldr: MapATM利用历史车辆轨迹作为结构先验，提升高清地图构建中车道检测的精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 高清地图构建在遮挡、远距离和恶劣天气等非理想条件下车道检测精度低，影响自动驾驶系统可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用历史车辆轨迹信息改善车道检测和地图重建的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MapATM网络，将移动车辆的轨迹作为道路几何的结构先验，融合到车道检测模型中。
contributions: 首次利用历史车辆轨迹作为结构先验提升HD地图构建性能。
在NuScenes数据集上实现车道分隔线AP提升4.6，mAP提升2.6，相对改进10.1%和6.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在NuScenes数据集上评估，与强基线方法对比，AP和mAP均有显著提升，并进行了定性评估。
limitations: 可能依赖轨迹数据的质量和可用性。
未讨论对其他类型道路元素（如人行道）的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MapATM利用历史车辆轨迹作为结构先验，提升高清地图构建中车道检测的精度。

papers.title: ReSpinQuant: Efficient Layer-Wise LLM Quantization via Subspace Residual Rotation Approximation
papers.abstract: Rotation-based Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) has emerged as a promising solution for mitigating activation outliers in the quantization of Large Language Models (LLMs). Global rotation methods achieve inference efficiency by fusing activation rotations into attention and FFN blocks, but suffer from limited expressivity as they are constrained to use a single learnable rotation matrix across all layers. To tackle this, layer-wise transformation methods emerged, achieving superior accuracy through localized adaptation. However, layer-wise methods cannot fuse activation rotation matrices into weights, requiring online computations and causing significant overhead. In this paper, we propose ReSpinQuant, a quantization framework that resolves such overhead by leveraging offline activation rotation fusion and matching basis using efficient residual subspace rotation. This design reconciles the high expressivity of layer-wise adaptation with only negligible inference overhead. Extensive experiments on W4A4 and W3A3 quantization demonstrate that ReSpinQuant achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming global rotation methods and matching the accuracy of computationally expensive layer-wise methods with minimal overhead.

analysis.tldr: ReSpinQuant通过残差子空间旋转近似实现高效层级LLM量化，兼顾全局旋转的推理效率与层级方法的精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于旋转的后训练量化（PTQ）能缓解LLM激活异常值，但全局旋转方法表达力有限，层级方法虽精度高却因在线计算带来显著开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持层级量化高表达力的同时，消除在线旋转计算带来的推理开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全局旋转方法融合旋转矩阵到权重中实现高效推理，但受限于单一可学习旋转矩阵；层级方法通过局部自适应提升精度，但无法融合旋转矩阵，需在线计算。
analysis.method: 提出ReSpinQuant框架，通过离线激活旋转融合和匹配基的残差子空间旋转近似，实现层级适应性与可忽略的推理开销。
contributions: 提出残差子空间旋转近似方法，实现层级量化中离线融合旋转矩阵，消除在线计算开销。
在W4A4和W3A3量化设置下达到SOTA性能，精度匹配计算昂贵的层级方法，开销极小。
analysis.experiments: 在W4A4和W3A3量化设置下进行实验，结果表明ReSpinQuant优于全局旋转方法，且精度与层级方法相当。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于旋转的PTQ方法，对其他量化范式不通用。
残差子空间旋转近似在极端低比特（如W2A2）下的有效性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ReSpinQuant通过残差子空间旋转近似实现高效层级LLM量化，兼顾全局旋转的推理效率与层级方法的精度。

papers.title: Towards Proactive Information Probing: Customer Service Chatbots Harvesting Value from Conversation
papers.abstract: Customer service chatbots are increasingly expected to serve not merely as reactive support tools for users, but as strategic interfaces for harvesting high-value information and business intelligence. In response, we make three main contributions. 1) We introduce and define a novel task of Proactive Information Probing, which optimizes when to probe users for pre-specified target information while minimizing conversation turns and user friction. 2) We propose PROCHATIP, a proactive chatbot framework featuring a specialized conversation strategy module trained to master the delicate timing of probes. 3) Experiments demonstrate that PROCHATIP significantly outperforms baselines, exhibiting superior capability in both information probing and service quality. We believe that our work effectively redefines the commercial utility of chatbots, positioning them as scalable, cost-effective engines for proactive business intelligence. Our code is available at https://github.com/SCUNLP/PROCHATIP.

analysis.tldr: 提出主动信息探查任务及PROCHATIP框架，使客服聊天机器人能主动挖掘高价值信息。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有客服聊天机器人主要作为被动支持工具，未能充分利用对话中蕴含的商业情报价值，缺乏主动获取关键信息的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让客服聊天机器人在最小化对话轮次和用户摩擦的前提下，主动探查预设的目标信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PROCHATIP框架，包含一个专门的对话策略模块，训练其掌握探查的时机。
contributions: 定义并引入主动信息探查（Proactive Information Probing）新任务。
提出PROCHATIP框架，通过对话策略模块优化探查时机。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明PROCHATIP在信息探查和服务质量上显著优于基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的客服场景。
未讨论用户隐私或伦理问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出主动信息探查任务及PROCHATIP框架，使客服聊天机器人能主动挖掘高价值信息。

papers.title: Hodoscope: Unsupervised Monitoring for AI Misbehaviors
papers.abstract: Existing approaches to monitoring AI agents rely on supervised evaluation: human-written rules or LLM-based judges that check for known failure modes. However, novel misbehaviors may fall outside predefined categories entirely and LLM-based judges can be unreliable. To address this, we formulate unsupervised monitoring, drawing an analogy to unsupervised learning. Rather than checking for specific misbehaviors, an unsupervised monitor assists humans in discovering problematic agent behaviors without prior assumptions about what counts as problematic, leaving that determination to the human. We observe that problematic behaviors are often distinctive: a model exploiting a benchmark loophole exhibits actions absent from well-behaved baselines, and a vulnerability unique to one evaluation manifests as behavioral anomalies when the same model runs across multiple benchmarks. This motivates using group-wise behavioral differences as the primary signal for unsupervised monitoring. We introduce Hodoscope, a tool that operationalizes this insight. Hodoscope compares behavior distributions across groups and highlights distinctive and potentially suspicious action patterns for human review. Using Hodoscope, we discover a previously unknown vulnerability in the Commit0 benchmark (unsquashed git history allowing ground-truth recovery, inflating scores for at least five models) and independently recover known exploits on ImpossibleBench and SWE-bench. Quantitative evaluation estimates that our method reduces review effort by 6-23$\times$ compared to naive uniform sampling. Finally, we show that behavior descriptions discovered through Hodoscope could improve the detection accuracy of LLM-based judges, demonstrating a path from unsupervised to supervised monitoring.

analysis.tldr: 提出无监督监控方法Hodoscope，通过群体行为差异发现AI代理的未知失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI监控依赖监督评估（人工规则或LLM裁判），但无法覆盖未知故障模式，且LLM裁判不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何在不预设故障类别的情况下，自动发现AI代理的异常行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 问题行为往往具有区分性：利用基准漏洞的模型表现出与正常基线不同的动作；同一模型在不同基准上的行为异常可被检测。
analysis.method: Hodoscope：比较不同组（如不同模型或基准）的行为分布，突出显示独特且可疑的动作模式供人工审查。
contributions: 形式化无监督监控问题，类比无监督学习。
提出Hodoscope工具，利用群体行为差异发现未知漏洞。
在Commit0基准中发现新漏洞（未压缩的git历史导致分数膨胀），并复现已知漏洞。
定量评估显示审查效率提升6-23倍。
展示从无监督到有监督监控的路径：通过Hodoscope发现的行为描述可提升LLM裁判的检测准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在Commit0、ImpossibleBench和SWE-bench上评估，发现新漏洞并复现已知漏洞，审查效率提升6-23倍。
limitations: 依赖多个基准或模型组进行比较，单基准场景可能受限。
需要人工审查突出显示的模式，仍有一定人力成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无监督监控方法Hodoscope，通过群体行为差异发现AI代理的未知失败模式。

papers.title: Lightweight Low-Light Image Enhancement via Distribution-Normalizing Preprocessing and Depthwise U-Net
papers.abstract: We present a lightweight two-stage framework for low-light image enhancement (LLIE) that achieves competitive perceptual quality with significantly fewer parameters than existing methods. Our approach combines frozen algorithm-based preprocessing with a compact U-Net built entirely from depthwise-separable convolutions. The preprocessing normalizes the input distribution by providing complementary brightness-corrected views, enabling the trainable network to focus on residual color correction. Our method achieved 4th place in the CVPR 2026 NTIRE Efficient Low-Light Image Enhancement Challenge. We further provide extended benchmarks and ablations to demonstrate the general effectiveness of our methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级低光图像增强框架，结合分布归一化预处理和深度可分离U-Net，在NTIRE挑战赛中获得第四名。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有低光图像增强方法通常参数量大、计算成本高，难以在资源受限设备上部署，需要更高效的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持低光图像增强质量的同时显著减少模型参数量和计算复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预处理可归一化输入分布，使可训练网络专注于残差颜色校正，从而降低网络复杂度。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段使用冻结的算法预处理提供亮度校正视图，第二阶段使用全深度可分离卷积的紧凑U-Net进行残差颜色校正。
contributions: 提出轻量级两阶段低光图像增强框架，参数量显著少于现有方法。
在CVPR 2026 NTIRE挑战赛中获得第四名，并提供扩展基准和消融实验。
analysis.experiments: 在CVPR 2026 NTIRE Efficient Low-Light Image Enhancement Challenge中取得第四名，并提供了扩展基准和消融实验。
limitations: 可能对极端低光场景效果有限。
预处理步骤可能引入伪影。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级低光图像增强框架，结合分布归一化预处理和深度可分离U-Net，在NTIRE挑战赛中获得第四名。

papers.title: PRISM Risk Signal Framework: Hierarchy-Based Red Lines for AI Behavioral Risk
papers.abstract: Current approaches to AI safety define red lines at the case level: specific prompts, specific outputs, specific harms. This paper argues that red lines can be set more fundamentally -- at the level of value, evidence, and source hierarchies that govern AI reasoning. Using the PRISM (Profile-based Reasoning Integrity Stack Measurement) framework, we define a taxonomy of 27 behavioral risk signals derived from structural anomalies in how AI systems prioritize values (L4), weight evidence types (L3), and trust information sources (L2). Each signal is evaluated through a dual-threshold principle combining absolute rank position and relative win-rate gap, producing a two-tier classification (Confirmed Risk vs. Watch Signal). The hierarchy-based approach offers three advantages over case-specific red lines: it is anticipatory rather than reactive (detecting dangerous reasoning structures before they produce harmful outputs), comprehensive rather than enumerative (a single value-hierarchy signal subsumes an unlimited number of case-specific violations), and measurable rather than subjective (grounded in empirical forced-choice data). We demonstrate the framework's detection capacity using approximately 397,000 forced-choice responses from 7 AI models across three Authority Stack layers, showing that the signal taxonomy successfully discriminates between models with structurally extreme profiles, models with context-dependent risk, and models with balanced hierarchies.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于层级红线的PRISM风险信号框架，通过27种行为风险信号检测AI推理中的结构异常。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI安全红线仅在案例层面定义，无法提前发现危险推理结构，且缺乏全面性和可测量性。
analysis.problem: 如何从价值、证据和来源层级设置更根本的AI行为风险红线。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PRISM框架定义27种行为风险信号，基于AI系统在价值优先级、证据权重和来源信任方面的结构异常，采用双阈值原则（绝对排名位置和相对胜率差距）进行两级分类（确认风险与观察信号）。
contributions: 提出层级化红线方法，替代案例级红线，实现预测性、全面性和可测量性。
构建包含27种风险信号的分类体系，并通过7个模型约39.7万次强制选择响应验证其区分能力。
analysis.experiments: 使用7个AI模型在三个权威堆栈层上的约397,000次强制选择响应，验证信号分类能区分结构极端、上下文依赖和平衡层级模型。
limitations: 框架依赖强制选择数据，可能无法覆盖所有推理场景。
双阈值原则的阈值设定可能需针对不同模型调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于层级红线的PRISM风险信号框架，通过27种行为风险信号检测AI推理中的结构异常。

papers.title: AI Integrity: A New Paradigm for Verifiable AI Governance
papers.abstract: AI systems increasingly shape high-stakes decisions in healthcare, law, defense, and education, yet existing governance paradigms -- AI Ethics, AI Safety, and AI Alignment -- share a common limitation: they evaluate outcomes rather than verifying the reasoning process itself. This paper introduces AI Integrity, a concept defined as a state in which the Authority Stack of an AI system -- its layered hierarchy of values, epistemological standards, source preferences, and data selection criteria -- is protected from corruption, contamination, manipulation, and bias, and maintained in a verifiable manner. We distinguish AI Integrity from the three existing paradigms, define the Authority Stack as a 4-layer cascade model (Normative, Epistemic, Source, and Data Authority) grounded in established academic frameworks -- Schwartz Basic Human Values for normative authority, Walton argumentation schemes with GRADE/CEBM hierarchies for epistemic authority, and Source Credibility Theory for source authority -- characterize the distinction between legitimate cascading and Authority Pollution, and identify Integrity Hallucination as the central measurable threat to value consistency. We further specify the PRISM (Profile-based Reasoning Integrity Stack Measurement) framework as the operational methodology, defining six core metrics and a phased research roadmap. Unlike normative frameworks that prescribe which values are correct, AI Integrity is a procedural concept: it requires that the path from evidence to conclusion be transparent and auditable, regardless of which values a system holds.

analysis.tldr: 提出AI Integrity概念，通过可验证的Authority Stack治理AI推理过程，而非仅评估结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI治理范式（伦理、安全、对齐）均只评估输出结果，无法验证推理过程本身的完整性，导致高利害决策中难以审计和信任。
analysis.problem: 如何定义并度量AI系统从价值观到数据选择的推理过程完整性，使其可验证、可审计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式。
analysis.method: 定义Authority Stack四层模型（规范、认知、来源、数据权威），提出Integrity Hallucination作为核心威胁，并设计PRISM框架（含六个核心指标）作为操作化方法论。
contributions: 提出AI Integrity概念，区别于伦理、安全、对齐，聚焦推理过程可验证性。
构建Authority Stack级联模型，整合Schwartz价值观、Walton论证方案、GRADE/CEBM层级和来源可信度理论。
定义Integrity Hallucination威胁并设计PRISM度量框架。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: PRISM框架尚未在真实AI系统中实证验证。
Authority Stack各层级的操作化定义可能依赖领域专家判断。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AI Integrity概念，通过可验证的Authority Stack治理AI推理过程，而非仅评估结果。

papers.title: A Faster Path to Continual Learning
papers.abstract: Continual Learning (CL) aims to train neural networks on a dynamic stream of tasks without forgetting previously learned knowledge. Among optimization-based approaches, C-Flat has emerged as a promising solution due to its plug-and-play nature and its ability to encourage uniformly low-loss regions for both new and old tasks. However, C-Flat requires three additional gradient computations per iteration, imposing substantial overhead on the optimization process. In this work, we propose C-Flat Turbo, a faster yet stronger optimizer that significantly reduces the training cost. We show that the gradients associated with first-order flatness contain direction-invariant components relative to the proxy-model gradients, enabling us to skip redundant gradient computations in the perturbed ascent steps. Moreover, we observe that these flatness-promoting gradients progressively stabilize across tasks, which motivates a linear scheduling strategy with an adaptive trigger to allocate larger turbo steps for later tasks. Experiments show that C-Flat Turbo is 1.0$\times$ to 1.25$\times$ faster than C-Flat across a wide range of CL methods, while achieving comparable or even improved accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出C-Flat Turbo，通过跳过冗余梯度计算和自适应调度策略加速持续学习优化器，速度提升1.0-1.25倍且精度相当。
analysis.research_motivation: 持续学习中优化方法C-Flat虽有效但每次迭代需额外三次梯度计算，计算开销大，限制了其实际应用效率。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲性能的前提下减少C-Flat优化器的计算开销，实现更快的持续学习训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现一阶平坦性相关的梯度包含方向不变分量，可跳过冗余计算；且这些梯度在任务间逐渐稳定，支持线性调度策略。
analysis.method: 提出C-Flat Turbo，利用梯度方向不变性跳过冗余计算，并采用自适应触发的线性调度策略，对后续任务分配更大的加速步长。
contributions: 揭示了C-Flat中平坦性梯度存在方向不变分量，可跳过冗余计算。
观察到平坦性梯度随任务逐渐稳定，提出自适应线性调度策略。
实验表明C-Flat Turbo在多种CL方法上实现1.0-1.25倍加速，精度相当或更优。
analysis.experiments: 在多种持续学习方法上对比C-Flat，测量训练时间和准确率，显示加速效果和精度保持。
limitations: 加速倍数有限（最大1.25倍），可能受限于梯度计算瓶颈。
调度策略的通用性可能依赖任务序列特性。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出C-Flat Turbo，通过跳过冗余梯度计算和自适应调度策略加速持续学习优化器，速度提升1.0-1.25倍且精度相当。

papers.title: Pando: Do Interpretability Methods Work When Models Won't Explain Themselves?
papers.abstract: Mechanistic interpretability is often motivated for alignment auditing, where a model's verbal explanations can be absent, incomplete, or misleading. Yet many evaluations do not control whether black-box prompting alone can recover the target behavior, so apparent gains from white-box tools may reflect elicitation rather than internal signal; we call this the elicitation confounder. We introduce Pando, a model-organism benchmark that breaks this confound via an explanation axis: models are trained to produce either faithful explanations of the true rule, no explanation, or confident but unfaithful explanations of a disjoint distractor rule. Across 720 finetuned models implementing hidden decision-tree rules, agents predict held-out model decisions from $10$ labeled query-response pairs, optionally augmented with one interpretability tool output. When explanations are faithful, black-box elicitation matches or exceeds all white-box methods; when explanations are absent or misleading, gradient-based attribution improves accuracy by 3-5 percentage points, and relevance patching, RelP, gives the largest gains, while logit lens, sparse autoencoders, and circuit tracing provide no reliable benefit. Variance decomposition suggests gradients track decision computation, which fields causally drive the output, whereas other readouts are dominated by task representation, biases toward field identity and value. We release all models, code, and evaluation infrastructure.

analysis.tldr: 提出Pando基准，通过控制解释轴揭示可解释性方法在模型不提供真实解释时效果有限，仅梯度归因和相关性修补有微弱优势。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可解释性评估未控制黑盒提示本身能否恢复目标行为，导致白盒方法的增益可能来自信息提取而非内部信号，存在混杂因素。
analysis.problem: 如何设计实验来分离可解释性方法从模型内部提取信号与单纯通过黑盒提示获取信息的效应？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当模型提供忠实解释时，黑盒提示效果不亚于甚至超过所有白盒方法；当解释缺失或误导时，梯度归因提升3-5个百分点，相关性修补（RelP）增益最大，而logit lens、稀疏自编码器和电路追踪无可靠收益。方差分解表明梯度追踪决策计算，其他方法受任务表征和偏差主导。
analysis.method: 构建Pando基准：训练模型实现隐藏决策树规则，并控制解释轴（忠实解释、无解释、误导解释）；通过720个微调模型，让预测者基于10个标注查询-响应对，可选加一个可解释性工具输出，预测模型决策。
contributions: 提出解释轴概念和Pando基准，用于消除可解释性评估中的信息提取混杂因素。
系统比较多种可解释性方法在模型解释不同质量下的表现，发现仅梯度归因和相关性修补在解释缺失/误导时有微弱优势。
analysis.experiments: 在720个微调模型上，使用10个标注查询-响应对，评估多种可解释性工具（梯度归因、相关性修补、logit lens、稀疏自编码器、电路追踪）的预测准确率，并进行方差分解。
limitations: 仅基于隐藏决策树规则，可能无法推广到更复杂的神经网络行为。
评估任务为预测模型决策，可能不完全反映对齐审计中的实际需求。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Pando基准，通过控制解释轴揭示可解释性方法在模型不提供真实解释时效果有限，仅梯度归因和相关性修补有微弱优势。

papers.title: Rethinking Token-Level Credit Assignment in RLVR: A Polarity-Entropy Analysis
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has substantially improved the reasoning ability of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, its sparse outcome-based rewards pose a fundamental credit assignment problem. We analyze this problem through the joint lens of reward polarity and token entropy. Our diagnostic tool, the Four Quadrant Decomposition, isolates token updates by polarity and entropy, and controlled ablations show that reasoning improvements concentrate in the high-entropy quadrants. To justify this observation theoretically, we adapt Conditional Mutual Information to the autoregressive RLVR setting and prove that the credit a token can carry is upper-bounded by its entropy. This view yields testable predictions that reasoning gains arise primarily from high-entropy tokens, with unique roles for positive and negative updates. A gradient analysis of GRPO further reveals how uniform reward broadcast dilutes signal at high-entropy positions while over-crediting deterministic tokens. Grounded in these insights, we propose Entropy-Aware Policy Optimization (EAPO) that modulates token-level learning signals accordingly. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EAPO outperforms strong baselines across two model families.

analysis.tldr: 通过极性与熵的联合分析，揭示RLVR中token级信用分配问题，并提出熵感知策略优化方法EAPO。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR使用稀疏结果奖励，导致信用分配困难，现有方法缺乏对token级信号差异的深入理解。
analysis.problem: 如何分析和解决RLVR中基于稀疏结果奖励的token级信用分配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 推理改进主要集中在高熵token上，正负更新有不同作用；均匀奖励广播会稀释高熵位置的信号，同时过度奖励确定性token。
analysis.method: 提出四象限分解诊断工具，理论证明token信用上界由其熵决定，并基于此设计熵感知策略优化（EAPO）来调节token级学习信号。
contributions: 提出极性与熵联合分析框架，揭示RLVR中token级信用分配的关键现象。
从理论上证明token信用上界与熵的关系，并基于此提出EAPO方法，在多个模型上取得优于强基线的效果。
analysis.experiments: 在两个模型家族上进行了广泛实验，EAPO优于强基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于自回归的RLVR场景。
熵感知调节的具体实现细节可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过极性与熵的联合分析，揭示RLVR中token级信用分配问题，并提出熵感知策略优化方法EAPO。

papers.title: Shared Emotion Geometry Across Small Language Models: A Cross-Architecture Study of Representation, Behavior, and Methodological Confounds
papers.abstract: We extract 21-emotion vector sets from twelve small language models (six architectures x base/instruct, 1B-8B parameters) under a unified comprehension-mode pipeline at fp16 precision, and compare the resulting geometries via representational similarity analysis on raw cosine RDMs. The five mature architectures (Qwen 2.5 1.5B, SmolLM2 1.7B, Llama 3.2 3B, Mistral 7B v0.3, Llama 3.1 8B) share nearly identical 21-emotion geometry, with pairwise RDM Spearman correlations of 0.74-0.92. This universality persists across diametrically opposed behavioral profiles: Qwen 2.5 and Llama 3.2 occupy opposite poles of MTI Compliance facets yet produce nearly identical emotion RDMs (rho = 0.81), so behavioral facet differences arise above the shared emotion representation. Gemma-3 1B base, the one immature case in our dataset, exhibits extreme residual-stream anisotropy (0.997) and is restructured by RLHF across all geometric descriptors, whereas the five already-mature families show within-family base x instruct RDM correlations of rho >= 0.92 (Mistral 7B v0.3 at rho = 0.985), suggesting RLHF restructures only representations that are not yet organized. Methodologically, we show that what prior work has read as a single comprehension-vs-generation method effect in fact decomposes into four distinct layers -- a coarse method-dependent dissociation, robust sub-parameter sensitivity within generation, a true precision (fp16 vs INT8) effect, and a conflated cross-experiment bias that distorts in opposite directions for different models -- so that a single rho between two prior emotion-vector studies is not a safe basis for interpretation without the layered decomposition.

analysis.tldr: 跨架构小语言模型共享几乎相同的21种情感几何结构，行为差异源于共享表征之上，且RLHF仅重组未成熟表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 情感表示在语言模型中的几何结构是否跨架构通用，以及先前研究中的方法混淆如何影响结论，是理解模型内部表征的关键问题。
analysis.problem: 探究小语言模型中情感向量几何的跨架构一致性，并分解先前研究中方法效应（理解vs生成、精度、跨实验偏差）的混淆层。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 五种成熟架构（Qwen 2.5、SmolLM2、Llama 3.2、Mistral 7B、Llama 3.1）共享高度相似的情感几何（RDM Spearman相关0.74-0.92），即使行为差异显著（如Qwen 2.5与Llama 3.2在MTI Compliance上对立）。Gemma-3 1B作为不成熟案例，表现出极端各向异性（0.997），RLHF显著重组其表征，而成熟模型RLHF前后几何高度一致（rho≥0.92）。
analysis.method: 从12个小语言模型（6种架构×基础/指令版本，1B-8B参数）中提取21种情感向量集，采用统一理解模式流水线、fp16精度，通过原始余弦RDM的表示相似性分析比较几何结构。
contributions: 发现五种成熟架构共享几乎相同的21种情感几何，表明情感表示具有跨架构通用性。
揭示行为差异（如MTI Compliance）源于共享情感表征之上的更高层处理。
提出RLHF仅重组未成熟表征，对已组织表征影响极小。
分解先前研究中的方法效应为四个独立层：粗粒度方法依赖、生成内子参数敏感性、精度效应、跨实验偏差，指出单一相关系数不可靠。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了基于12个模型、21种情感、RDM Spearman相关等分析。
limitations: 仅研究1B-8B参数的小语言模型，未涉及更大模型或不同训练数据。
情感向量集固定为21种，可能未覆盖全部情感维度。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 跨架构小语言模型共享几乎相同的21种情感几何结构，行为差异源于共享表征之上，且RLHF仅重组未成熟表征。

papers.title: A Systematic Analysis of the Impact of Persona Steering on LLM Capabilities
papers.abstract: Imbuing Large Language Models (LLMs) with specific personas is prevalent for tailoring interaction styles, yet the impact on underlying cognitive capabilities remains unexplored. We employ the Neuron-based Personality Trait Induction (NPTI) framework to induce Big Five personality traits in LLMs and evaluate performance across six cognitive benchmarks. Our findings reveal that persona induction produces stable, reproducible shifts in cognitive task performance beyond surface-level stylistic changes.
