The study contributes to the literature by conceptualising concealment as a distinct behavioural outcome and by providing a nuanced explanation that integrates both net-effect and configurational perspectives. Practical implications emphasise the need for clear institutional policies, destigmatisation of appropriate AI use, and the cultivation of supportive learning environments to promote transparency.

analysis.tldr: 通过SEM和fsQCA揭示大学生隐藏AI使用意图的双重路径：感知污名/风险/政策不确定性通过害怕负面评价促进隐藏，而AI自我效能/公平感/社会支持通过心理安全感抑制隐藏。
analysis.research_motivation: 高等教育中学生对AI使用的隐藏行为日益普遍，但缺乏对其形成机制的深入理解，尤其是同时考虑促进和抑制因素的综合视角。
analysis.problem: 探究大学生在高等教育中隐藏AI使用意图的使能和抑制路径及其交互机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出存在两种对立机制：使能路径（感知污名、风险、政策不确定性→害怕负面评价→隐藏意图）和抑制路径（AI自我效能、公平感、社会支持→心理安全感→隐藏意图）。
analysis.method: 整合认知-情感-意动（CAC）框架，采用结构方程模型（SEM）和模糊集定性比较分析（fsQCA）双方法，基于1346名大学生数据。
contributions: 将AI使用隐藏概念化为一种独特的行为结果，并揭示其双重形成机制。
结合净效应和组态视角，通过fsQCA识别多条等效路径，强调害怕负面评价的核心作用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及SEM验证了假设关系和中介效应，fsQCA识别了多条组态路径。
limitations: 数据仅来自中国大学生，可能限制跨文化推广性。
横截面设计无法推断因果关系。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过SEM和fsQCA揭示大学生隐藏AI使用意图的双重路径：感知污名/风险/政策不确定性通过害怕负面评价促进隐藏，而AI自我效能/公平感/社会支持通过心理安全感抑制隐藏。

papers.title: Saccade Attention Networks: Using Transfer Learning of Attention to Reduce Network Sizes
papers.abstract: One of the limitations of transformer networks is the sequence length due to the quadratic nature of the attention matrix. Classical self attention uses the entire sequence length, however, the actual attention being used is sparse. Humans use a form of sparse attention when analyzing an image or scene called saccades. Focusing on key features greatly reduces computation time. By using a network (Saccade Attention Network) to learn where to attend from a large pre-trained model, we can use it to pre-process images and greatly reduce network size by reducing the input sequence length to just the key features being attended to. Our results indicate that you can reduce calculations by close to 80% and produce similar results.

analysis.tldr: 通过迁移预训练大模型的注意力机制，用小网络学习关键特征位置，将输入序列长度缩减至仅关键特征，从而大幅降低计算量并保持性能。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer 的注意力矩阵计算量与序列长度呈二次关系，导致长序列处理成本高昂；而实际注意力是稀疏的，人类视觉通过扫视（saccades）聚焦关键特征，启发我们设计更高效的注意力机制。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预训练大模型学到的注意力知识，训练一个小网络来预测图像中的关键特征位置，从而压缩输入序列长度、降低计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 经典自注意力使用整个序列，但实际注意力是稀疏的；人类视觉通过扫视聚焦关键特征，可大幅减少计算。
analysis.method: 提出 Saccade Attention Network，从大预训练模型中迁移注意力知识，训练一个小网络学习图像中需要关注的关键特征位置，然后用该网络预处理图像，仅将关键特征输入后续模型，从而减小网络规模。
contributions: 提出一种基于扫视注意力的小网络，通过迁移学习从大模型获取注意力知识，实现输入序列压缩。
实验表明该方法可减少约 80% 的计算量，同时保持与原始大模型相近的性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及计算量减少约 80% 且结果相似。
limitations: 可能依赖特定预训练模型，迁移泛化性未验证。
仅针对图像场景，未讨论对其他模态的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过迁移预训练大模型的注意力机制，用小网络学习关键特征位置，将输入序列长度缩减至仅关键特征，从而大幅降低计算量并保持性能。

papers.title: CFMS: A Coarse-to-Fine Multimodal Synthesis Framework for Enhanced Tabular Reasoning
papers.abstract: Reasoning over tabular data is a crucial capability for tasks like question answering and fact verification, as it requires models to comprehend both free-form questions and semi-structured tables. However, while methods like Chain-of-Thought (CoT) introduce reasoning chains, purely symbolic methodes are inherently limited by their blindness to holistic visual patterns. To address this, we propose the Coarse-to-Fine Multimodal Synthesis framework (CFMS), a novel two-stage paradigm that hierarchically decouples high-level visual perception from granular symbolic reasoning. In the Coarse Stage, CFMS leverages the Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to perform a one-time synthesis of a multi-perspective knowledge tuple. This tuple subsequently serves as a dynamic reasoning map to guide the fine stage, where a symbolic engine executes a targeted and efficient sequence of iterative operations over the table. Extensive experiments on the WikiTQ and TabFact benchmarks demonstrate that CFMS achieves competitive accuracy. The framework exhibits particular robustness when handling large tables and when instantiated with smaller backbone models, validating its effectiveness and generalizability.

analysis.tldr: 提出粗到细多模态合成框架CFMS，通过MLLM视觉感知与符号推理结合提升表格推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 表格推理需要理解自由文本和半结构化表格，纯符号方法忽略整体视觉模式，而纯视觉方法在细粒度推理上不足。
analysis.problem: 现有表格推理方法在粗粒度视觉感知与细粒度符号推理之间缺乏有效协同。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：粗阶段用MLLM合成多视角知识元组作为动态推理图，细阶段用符号引擎在表格上执行迭代操作。
contributions: 提出CFMS框架，将表格推理解耦为粗粒度视觉感知和细粒度符号推理两个阶段。
在WikiTQ和TabFact上验证了方法的有效性，尤其在大表格和小模型上表现鲁棒。
analysis.experiments: 在WikiTQ和TabFact基准上进行了实验，达到有竞争力的准确率，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖MLLM的视觉感知质量，对复杂表格的泛化性待验证。
两阶段框架可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出粗到细多模态合成框架CFMS，通过MLLM视觉感知与符号推理结合提升表格推理性能。

papers.title: MMR-AD: A Large-Scale Multimodal Dataset for Benchmarking General Anomaly Detection with Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: In the progress of industrial anomaly detection, general anomaly detection (GAD) is an emerging trend and also the ultimate goal. Unlike the conventional single- and multi-class AD, general AD aims to train a general AD model that can directly detect anomalies in diverse novel classes without any retraining or fine-tuning on the target data. Recently, Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown great promise in achieving general anomaly detection due to their revolutionary visual understanding and language reasoning capabilities. However, MLLM's general AD ability remains underexplored due to: (1) MLLMs are pretrained on amounts of data sourced from the Web, these data still have significant gaps with the data in AD scenarios. Moreover, the image-text pairs during pretraining are also not specifically for AD tasks. (2) The current mainstream AD datasets are image-based and not yet suitable for post-training MLLMs. To facilitate MLLM-based general AD research, we present MMR-AD, which is a comprehensive benchmark for both training and evaluating MLLM-based AD models. With MMR-AD, we reveal that the AD performance of current SOTA generalist MLLMs still falls far behind the industrial requirements. Based on MMR-AD, we also propose a baseline model, Anomaly-R1, which is a reasoning-based AD model that learns from the CoT data in MMR-AD and is further enhanced by reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments show that our Anomaly-R1 achieves remarkable improvements over generalist MLLMs in both anomaly detection and localization.

analysis.tldr: 提出大规模多模态异常检测数据集MMR-AD和基线模型Anomaly-R1，发现当前通用MLLM在异常检测上远落后于工业需求。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用异常检测（GAD）是工业异常检测的终极目标，但多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在此任务上的能力尚未充分探索，主要因为现有预训练数据与AD场景存在差距，且主流AD数据集不适合MLLM后训练。
analysis.problem: 缺乏适合MLLM训练和评估的通用异常检测数据集，导致MLLM在AD任务上的性能远低于工业要求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前最先进的通用MLLM在异常检测上的性能远落后于工业需求。
analysis.method: 构建大规模多模态数据集MMR-AD，包含训练和评估数据；提出基线模型Anomaly-R1，基于MMR-AD中的思维链数据进行学习，并通过强化学习增强。
contributions: 提出MMR-AD，首个大规模多模态通用异常检测基准数据集，支持MLLM训练和评估。
揭示当前通用MLLM在异常检测上的性能远低于工业要求。
提出Anomaly-R1基线模型，通过推理和强化学习显著提升异常检测和定位性能。
analysis.experiments: 在MMR-AD上进行了大量实验，Anomaly-R1在异常检测和定位上相比通用MLLM取得显著提升。
limitations: 数据集可能未覆盖所有工业异常类型。
Anomaly-R1的泛化能力可能受限于数据集规模。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大规模多模态异常检测数据集MMR-AD和基线模型Anomaly-R1，发现当前通用MLLM在异常检测上远落后于工业需求。

papers.title: Using Deep Learning Models Pretrained by Self-Supervised Learning for Protein Localization
papers.abstract: Background: Task-specific microscopy datasets are often small, making it difficult to train deep learning models that learn robust features. While self-supervised learning (SSL) has shown promise through pretraining on large, domain-specific datasets, generalizability across datasets with differing staining protocols and channel configurations remains underexplored. We investigated the generalizability of SSL models pretrained on ImageNet-1k and HPA FOV, evaluating their embeddings on OpenCell with and without fine-tuning, two channel-mismatch strategies, and varying fine-tuning data fractions. We additionally analyzed single-cell embeddings on a labeled OpenCell subset. Result: DINO-based ViT backbones pretrained on HPA FOV or ImageNet-1k transfer well to OpenCell even without fine-tuning. The HPA FOV-pretrained model achieved the highest zero-shot performance (macro $F_1$ 0.822 $\pm$ 0.007). Fine-tuning further improved performance to 0.860 $\pm$ 0.013. At the single-cell level, the HPA single-cell-pretrained model achieved the highest k-nearest neighbor performance across all neighborhood sizes (macro $F_1$ $\geq$ 0.796). Conclusion: SSL methods like DINO, pretrained on large domain-relevant datasets, enable effective use of deep learning features for fine-tuning on small, task-specific microscopy datasets.

analysis.tldr: 自监督预训练模型在蛋白质定位任务中表现出良好的迁移能力，即使在小样本和通道不匹配场景下也能取得高F1分数。
analysis.research_motivation: 任务特定的显微镜数据集通常很小，难以训练出鲁棒的深度学习模型，而自监督学习在大型领域数据集上预训练后有望解决这一问题，但其跨数据集泛化性尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 评估自监督预训练模型在不同染色协议和通道配置的显微镜数据集上的泛化能力，特别是针对蛋白质定位任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用DINO自监督方法在ImageNet-1k和HPA FOV数据集上预训练ViT骨干网络，然后在OpenCell数据集上进行零样本评估和微调，并测试两种通道不匹配策略和不同微调数据比例。
contributions: 系统评估了自监督预训练模型在蛋白质定位任务中的跨数据集泛化性
发现HPA FOV预训练的DINO模型在零样本和微调场景下均达到高F1分数
analysis.experiments: 在OpenCell数据集上评估，零样本宏F1达0.822±0.007，微调后提升至0.860±0.013；单细胞级别上HPA单细胞预训练模型k近邻宏F1≥0.796。
limitations: 仅评估了DINO方法，其他SSL方法未涉及
仅使用OpenCell一个目标数据集，泛化性验证有限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自监督预训练模型在蛋白质定位任务中表现出良好的迁移能力，即使在小样本和通道不匹配场景下也能取得高F1分数。

papers.title: Towards Automated Solar Panel Integrity: Hybrid Deep Feature Extraction for Advanced Surface Defect Identification
papers.abstract: To ensure energy efficiency and reliable operations, it is essential to monitor solar panels in generation plants to detect defects. It is quite labor-intensive, time consuming and costly to manually monitor large-scale solar plants and those installed in remote areas. Manual inspection may also be susceptible to human errors. Consequently, it is necessary to create an automated, intelligent defect-detection system, that ensures continuous monitoring, early fault detection, and maximum power generation. We proposed a novel hybrid method for defect detection in SOLAR plates by combining both handcrafted and deep learning features. Local Binary Pattern (LBP), Histogram of Gradients (HoG) and Gabor Filters were used for the extraction of handcrafted features. Deep features extracted by leveraging the use of DenseNet-169. Both handcrafted and deep features were concatenated and then fed to three distinct types of classifiers, including Support Vector Machines (SVM), Extreme Gradient Boost (XGBoost) and Light Gradient-Boosting Machine (LGBM). Experimental results evaluated on the augmented dataset show the superior performance, especially DenseNet-169 + Gabor (SVM), had the highest scores with 99.17% accuracy which was higher than all the other systems. In general, the proposed hybrid framework offers better defect-detection accuracy, resistance, and flexibility that has a solid basis on the real-life use of the automated PV panels monitoring system.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合手工与深度学习特征的太阳能板缺陷检测方法，DenseNet-169+Gabor+SVM达99.17%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 人工检测大型太阳能电站缺陷耗时、昂贵且易出错，需要自动化智能检测系统。
analysis.problem: 如何结合手工特征与深度特征提升太阳能板表面缺陷检测的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提取LBP、HoG、Gabor手工特征和DenseNet-169深度特征，拼接后输入SVM、XGBoost、LGBM分类器。
contributions: 提出混合手工与深度学习特征的缺陷检测框架
在增强数据集上达到99.17%准确率，优于其他方法
analysis.experiments: 在增强数据集上评估，DenseNet-169+Gabor+SVM组合准确率最高达99.17%。
limitations: 仅在增强数据集上验证，未提及真实场景泛化性
未与其他先进深度学习模型（如ResNet、EfficientNet）对比
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合手工与深度学习特征的太阳能板缺陷检测方法，DenseNet-169+Gabor+SVM达99.17%准确率。

papers.title: You Only Judge Once: Multi-response Reward Modeling in a Single Forward Pass
papers.abstract: We present a discriminative multimodal reward model that scores all candidate responses in a single forward pass. Conventional discriminative reward models evaluate each response independently, requiring multiple forward passes, one for each potential response. Our approach concatenates multiple responses with separator tokens and applies cross-entropy over their scalar scores, enabling direct comparative reasoning and efficient $N$-way preference learning. The multi-response design also yields up to $N\times$ wall-clock speedup and FLOPs reduction over conventional single-response scoring. To enable $N$-way reward evaluation beyond existing pairwise benchmarks, we construct two new benchmarks: (1) MR$^2$Bench-Image contains human-annotated rankings over responses from 8 diverse models; (2) MR$^2$Bench-Video is a large-scale video-based reward benchmark derived from 94K crowdsourced pairwise human judgments over video question-answering spanning 19 models, denoised via preference graph ensemble. Both benchmarks provide 4-response evaluation variants sampled from the full rankings. Built on a 4B vision-language backbone with LoRA fine-tuning and a lightweight MLP value head, our model achieves state-of-the-art results on six multimodal reward benchmarks, including MR$^2$Bench-Image, MR$^2$Bench-Video, and four other existing benchmarks. Our model outperforms existing larger generative and discriminative reward models. We further demonstrate that our reward model, when used in reinforcement learning with GRPO, produces improved policy models that maintain performance across standard multimodal benchmarks while substantially improving open-ended generation quality, outperforming a single-response discriminative reward model (RM) baseline by a large margin in both training stability and open-ended generation quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种多响应判别式奖励模型，通过单次前向传播同时评分多个候选回答，实现N倍加速并提升多模态奖励评估性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统判别式奖励模型对每个候选回答独立评分，需要多次前向传播，计算效率低且缺乏比较推理能力。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地对多个候选回答进行联合评分，并提升奖励模型在多模态场景下的评估性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多响应设计可带来N倍加速和FLOPs减少，且通过交叉熵损失直接比较分数能提升偏好学习效果。
analysis.method: 将多个候选回答用分隔符拼接，通过一个共享的视觉-语言骨干网络和轻量MLP值头输出所有分数，使用交叉熵损失进行N路偏好学习。
contributions: 提出多响应判别式奖励模型，单次前向传播评分所有候选回答，实现N倍加速。
构建两个新的多模态奖励基准MR^2Bench-Image和MR^2Bench-Video，支持4响应评估。
在六个多模态奖励基准上达到SOTA，并证明在GRPO强化学习中能提升策略模型性能。
analysis.experiments: 在六个多模态奖励基准上评估，包括新构建的MR^2Bench-Image和MR^2Bench-Video，以及四个现有基准。模型基于4B视觉-语言骨干，使用LoRA微调和MLP值头，在多个基准上超越现有更大规模的生成式和判别式奖励模型。
limitations: 可能对分隔符选择和响应数量敏感。
基准构建依赖人工标注，可能存在噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种多响应判别式奖励模型，通过单次前向传播同时评分多个候选回答，实现N倍加速并提升多模态奖励评估性能。

papers.title: Delving Aleatoric Uncertainty in Medical Image Segmentation via Vision Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Medical image segmentation supports clinical workflows by precisely delineating anatomical structures and lesions. However, medical image datasets medical image datasets suffer from acquisition noise and annotation ambiguity, causing pervasive data uncertainty that substantially undermines model robustness. Existing research focuses primarily on model architectural improvements and predictive reliability estimation, while systematic exploration of the intrinsic data uncertainty remains insufficient. To address this gap, this work proposes leveraging the universal representation capabilities of visual foundation models to estimate inherent data uncertainty. Specifically, we analyze the feature diversity of the model's decoded representations and quantify their singular value energy to define the semantic perception scale for each class, thereby measuring sample difficulty and aleatoric uncertainty. Based on this foundation, we design two uncertainty-driven application strategies: (1) the aleatoric uncertainty-aware data filtering mechanism to eliminate potentially noisy samples and enhance model learning quality; (2) the dynamic uncertainty-aware optimization strategy that adaptively adjusts class-specific loss weights during training based on the semantic perception scale, combined with a label denoising mechanism to improve training stability. Experimental results on five public datasets encompassing CT and MRI modalities and involving multi-organ and tumor segmentation tasks demonstrate that our method achieves significant and robust performance improvements across various mainstream network architectures, revealing the broad application potential of aleatoric uncertainty in medical image understanding and segmentation tasks.

analysis.tldr: 利用视觉基础模型估计医学图像分割中的偶然不确定性，并通过数据过滤和动态优化提升模型鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割中，数据噪声和标注歧义导致的内在数据不确定性严重损害模型鲁棒性，现有研究主要关注模型架构改进和预测可靠性估计，对数据不确定性的系统探索不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视觉基础模型估计医学图像分割中的偶然不确定性，并设计基于不确定性的应用策略以提升模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 医学图像数据集存在采集噪声和标注歧义，导致普遍的数据不确定性，影响模型鲁棒性。
analysis.method: 利用视觉基础模型的解码特征多样性，通过奇异值能量量化每个类别的语义感知尺度，从而衡量样本难度和偶然不确定性；基于此设计不确定性驱动的数据过滤机制和动态优化策略。
contributions: 提出利用视觉基础模型估计医学图像分割中偶然不确定性的方法。
设计两种不确定性驱动的应用策略：数据过滤和动态损失加权，提升模型鲁棒性和性能。
analysis.experiments: 在五个包含CT和MRI模态的公开数据集上进行多器官和肿瘤分割任务实验，结果表明方法在各种主流网络架构上取得显著且稳定的性能提升。
limitations: 可能依赖视觉基础模型的质量和泛化能力。
未讨论计算开销和实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用视觉基础模型估计医学图像分割中的偶然不确定性，并通过数据过滤和动态优化提升模型鲁棒性。

papers.title: RAG-KT: Cross-platform Explainable Knowledge Tracing with Multi-view Fusion Retrieval Generation
papers.abstract: Knowledge Tracing (KT) infers a student's knowledge state from past interactions to predict future performance. Conventional Deep Learning (DL)-based KT models are typically tied to platform-specific identifiers and latent representations, making them hard to transfer and interpret. Large Language Model (LLM)-based methods can be either ungrounded under prompting or overly domain-dependent under fine-tuning. In addition, most existing KT methods are developed and evaluated under a same-distribution assumption. In real deployments, educational data often arise from heterogeneous platforms with substantial distribution shift, which often degrades generalization. To this end, we propose RAG-KT, a retrieval-augmented paradigm that frames cross-platform KT as reliable context constrained inference with LLMs. It builds a unified multi-source structured context with cross-source alignment via Question Group abstractions and retrieves complementary rich and reliable context for each prediction, enabling grounded prediction and interpretable diagnosis. Experiments on three public KT benchmarks demonstrate consistent gains in accuracy and robustness, including strong performance under cross-platform conditions.

analysis.tldr: RAG-KT 通过检索增强生成实现跨平台可解释知识追踪，在多个基准上提升准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有知识追踪方法依赖平台特定标识和潜在表示，难以迁移和解释；LLM 方法在提示下缺乏依据或微调后过度依赖领域；且多数方法假设同分布，实际跨平台场景存在分布偏移导致泛化下降。
analysis.problem: 解决跨平台知识追踪中模型泛化性差、可解释性不足以及 LLM 方法缺乏可靠上下文的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出检索增强生成范式 RAG-KT，构建统一多源结构化上下文，通过问题组抽象实现跨源对齐，为每个预测检索互补的丰富可靠上下文，实现有依据的预测和可解释诊断。
contributions: 提出 RAG-KT 框架，将跨平台知识追踪建模为基于可靠上下文的 LLM 推理问题。
设计多源结构化上下文构建与跨源对齐方法，提升跨平台泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开知识追踪基准上实验，显示准确性和鲁棒性一致提升，尤其在跨平台条件下表现强劲。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的问题组抽象和检索库。
跨平台对齐的泛化性可能受限于问题组设计的覆盖度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RAG-KT 通过检索增强生成实现跨平台可解释知识追踪，在多个基准上提升准确性和鲁棒性。

papers.title: Continuous-time Online Learning via Mean-Field Neural Networks: Regret Analysis in Diffusion Environments
papers.abstract: We study continuous-time online learning where data are generated by a diffusion process with unknown coefficients. The learner employs a two-layer neural network, continuously updating its parameters in a non-anticipative manner. The mean-field limit of the learning dynamics corresponds to a stochastic Wasserstein gradient flow adapted to the data filtration. We establish regret bounds for both the mean-field limit and finite-particle system. Our analysis leverages the logarithmic Sobolev inequality, Polyak-Lojasiewicz condition, Malliavin calculus, and uniform-in-time propagation of chaos. Under displacement convexity, we obtain a constant static regret bound. In the general non-convex setting, we derive explicit linear regret bounds characterizing the effects of data variation, entropic exploration, and quadratic regularization. Finally, our simulations demonstrate the outperformance of the online approach and the impact of network width and regularization parameters.

analysis.tldr: 利用平均场神经网络在扩散环境下实现连续时间在线学习，并给出遗憾界分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线学习在连续时间动态环境中具有重要应用，但现有方法多针对离散时间或静态数据，缺乏对扩散过程生成数据的理论分析。
analysis.problem: 在数据由未知系数的扩散过程生成的连续时间在线学习场景中，如何设计并分析基于神经网络的在线学习算法的遗憾界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用两层神经网络，参数连续非预期更新；利用平均场极限将学习动力学建模为适应数据滤子的随机Wasserstein梯度流；结合对数Sobolev不等式、Polyak-Lojasiewicz条件、Malliavin微积分和一致时间传播混沌进行理论分析。
contributions: 建立了平均场极限和有限粒子系统的遗憾界。
在位移凸性下得到常数静态遗憾界，在一般非凸情形下得到显式线性遗憾界。
analysis.experiments: 仿真实验表明在线方法优于对比方法，并展示了网络宽度和正则化参数的影响。
limitations: 理论分析依赖于较强的凸性或正则化假设。
仿真规模可能有限，未提及实际应用场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用平均场神经网络在扩散环境下实现连续时间在线学习，并给出遗憾界分析。

papers.title: Evaluating the Limitations of Protein Sequence Representations for Parkinson's Disease Classification
papers.abstract: The identification of reliable molecular biomarkers for Parkinson's disease remains challenging due to its multifactorial nature. Although protein sequences constitute a fundamental and widely available source of biological information, their standalone discriminative capacity for complex disease classification remains unclear. In this work, we present a controlled and leakage-free evaluation of multiple representations derived exclusively from protein primary sequences, including amino acid composition, k-mers, physicochemical descriptors, hybrid representations, and embeddings from protein language models, all assessed under a nested stratified cross-validation framework to ensure unbiased performance estimation. The best-performing configuration (ProtBERT + MLP) achieves an F1-score of 0.704 +/- 0.028 and ROC-AUC of 0.748 +/- 0.047, indicating only moderate discriminative performance. Classical representations such as k-mers reach comparable F1 values (up to approximately 0.667), but exhibit highly imbalanced behavior, with recall close to 0.98 and precision around 0.50, reflecting a strong bias toward positive predictions. Across representations, performance differences remain within a narrow range (F1 between 0.60 and 0.70), while unsupervised analyses reveal no intrinsic structure aligned with class labels, and statistical testing (Friedman test, p = 0.1749) does not indicate significant differences across models. These results demonstrate substantial overlap between classes and indicate that primary sequence information alone provides limited discriminative power for Parkinson's disease classification. This work establishes a reproducible baseline and provides empirical evidence that more informative biological features, such as structural, functional, or interaction-based descriptors, are required for robust disease modeling.

analysis.tldr: 仅靠蛋白质一级序列信息对帕金森病分类的判别能力有限，最佳模型F1仅0.704。
analysis.research_motivation: 帕金森病分子生物标志物识别困难，蛋白质序列虽易获取但单独用于复杂疾病分类的判别能力尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 评估仅基于蛋白质一级序列的多种表示（包括氨基酸组成、k-mer、理化描述符、混合表示及蛋白质语言模型嵌入）对帕金森病分类的判别能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有表示的性能差异小（F1在0.60-0.70之间），无监督分析未发现与类别标签相关的内在结构，统计检验（Friedman检验，p=0.1749）未表明模型间存在显著差异，表明类别间重叠严重。
analysis.method: 在嵌套分层交叉验证框架下，对多种蛋白质序列表示（氨基酸组成、k-mer、理化描述符、混合表示、ProtBERT等）进行无泄漏评估，使用MLP等分类器。
contributions: 建立了帕金森病分类中仅基于蛋白质一级序列表示的可重复基线评估。
提供了经验证据表明一级序列信息判别能力有限，需要结构、功能或相互作用等更丰富的特征。
analysis.experiments: 在嵌套分层交叉验证下评估多种表示，最佳配置（ProtBERT+MLP）F1=0.704±0.028，ROC-AUC=0.748±0.047；k-mer达到类似F1（约0.667）但存在严重不平衡（召回率≈0.98，精确率≈0.50）。
limitations: 仅评估了蛋白质一级序列表示，未考虑结构、功能或相互作用信息。
数据集可能有限，未提及具体规模及多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 仅靠蛋白质一级序列信息对帕金森病分类的判别能力有限，最佳模型F1仅0.704。

papers.title: A molecular clock for writing systems reveals the quantitative impact of imperial power on cultural evolution
papers.abstract: Writing systems are cultural replicators whose evolution has never been studied quantitatively at global scale. We compile the Global Script Database (GSD): 300 writing and notation systems, 50 binary structural characters, and 259 phylogenetic edges spanning 5,400 years. Applying four methods -- phenetics, cladistics, Bayesian inference, and neural network clustering -- we find that scripts exhibit a detectable molecular clock. The best-fitting model (Mk+Gamma strict clock) yields a substitution rate of q = 0.226 substitutions/character/millennium (95% CI: 0.034-1.22; Delta BIC = -4.1 versus relaxed clock; Delta BIC = -1,364.7 versus Mk without rate variation). Political interventions break this clock: deviation from expected divergence times correlates with intervention intensity (Spearman rho = 0.556, p < 10^{-4}), and per-character rate analysis reveals that intervention selectively rewrites deep structural features rather than merely accelerating change (rate profile correlation rho = 0.320). We identify 30 major script replacement events and rank their destructive impact. A ceiling effect suppresses independent invention wherever writing already exists (Fisher's exact OR = 0.054, p < 10^{-6}), and colonial contact predicts script extinction (Cox HR = 5.25, p = 0.0006). The Spanish Empire extinguished the most scripts (6 of 12 contacted, 50%), followed by the Empire of Japan (3 of 9, 33.3%). Feature coding was validated by inter-rater reliability testing with two independent human coders (Cohen's kappa = 0.877; human-LLM kappa = 0.929; Fleiss' kappa = 0.911).

analysis.tldr: 构建全球文字系统数据库，发现文字演化存在分子钟，帝国干预会破坏该时钟并导致文字灭绝。
analysis.research_motivation: 文字系统作为文化复制因子，其演化从未在全球尺度上被定量研究，缺乏系统性的数据和方法来揭示其演化规律及外部干预的影响。
analysis.problem: 如何定量研究文字系统的演化速率、分支模式以及政治干预对文字演化的影响？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文字系统存在可检测的分子钟（替代率0.226/字符/千年）；政治干预会破坏分子钟，且干预强度与演化偏差正相关；干预选择性地重写深层结构特征而非仅加速变化；存在天花板效应抑制独立发明；殖民接触显著增加文字灭绝风险。
analysis.method: 构建全球文字数据库（GSD），包含300种文字系统、50个二元结构特征和259条系统发育边，应用表型学、分支学、贝叶斯推断和神经网络聚类四种方法进行分析。
contributions: 首次在全球尺度上定量研究文字系统的演化，发现分子钟现象。
量化了帝国干预对文字演化的破坏性影响，包括灭绝率、特征改写等。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了模型比较（Mk+Gamma严格钟 vs 松弛钟 vs Mk无速率变异）、相关性分析（干预强度与演化偏差）、生存分析（殖民接触与灭绝风险）等统计结果。
limitations: 数据库可能遗漏部分文字系统，尤其是非主流或已灭绝的文字。
结构特征编码可能受主观判断影响，尽管进行了信度检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建全球文字系统数据库，发现文字演化存在分子钟，帝国干预会破坏该时钟并导致文字灭绝。

papers.title: FineEdit: Fine-Grained Image Edit with Bounding Box Guidance
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based image editing models have achieved significant progress in real world applications. However, conventional models typically rely on natural language prompts, which often lack the precision required to localize target objects. Consequently, these models struggle to maintain background consistency due to their global image regeneration paradigm. Recognizing that visual cues provide an intuitive means for users to highlight specific areas of interest, we utilize bounding boxes as guidance to explicitly define the editing target. This approach ensures that the diffusion model can accurately localize the target while preserving background consistency. To achieve this, we propose FineEdit, a multi-level bounding box injection method that enables the model to utilize spatial conditions more effectively. To support this high precision guidance, we present FineEdit-1.2M, a large scale, fine-grained dataset comprising 1.2 million image editing pairs with precise bounding box annotations. Furthermore, we construct a comprehensive benchmark, termed FineEdit-Bench, which includes 1,000 images across 10 subjects to effectively evaluate region based editing capabilities. Evaluations on FineEdit-Bench demonstrate that our model significantly outperforms state-of-the-art open-source models (e.g., Qwen-Image-Edit and LongCat-Image-Edit) in instruction compliance and background preservation. Further assessments on open benchmarks (GEdit and ImgEdit Bench) confirm its superior generalization and robustness.

analysis.tldr: 提出FineEdit，利用边界框引导扩散模型实现精细图像编辑，并构建大规模数据集和基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散图像编辑模型依赖自然语言提示，难以精确定位目标对象，且全局重生成范式导致背景不一致。视觉线索（如边界框）能直观指定编辑区域，但缺乏有效利用方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用边界框作为空间条件，使扩散模型在保持背景一致性的同时，精确定位并编辑目标区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FineEdit，一种多层级边界框注入方法，使模型更有效地利用空间条件；同时构建FineEdit-1.2M数据集和FineEdit-Bench基准。
contributions: 提出多层级边界框注入方法FineEdit，实现精细图像编辑。
构建包含120万图像编辑对的大规模精细数据集FineEdit-1.2M。
构建包含1000张图像、10个主题的综合基准FineEdit-Bench。
analysis.experiments: 在FineEdit-Bench上，模型在指令遵循和背景保持上显著优于Qwen-Image-Edit和LongCat-Image-Edit等开源模型；在GEdit和ImgEdit Bench上验证了泛化性和鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖边界框标注质量，弱监督场景下性能未知。
仅评估了开源模型，未与闭源模型对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FineEdit，利用边界框引导扩散模型实现精细图像编辑，并构建大规模数据集和基准。

papers.title: Bootstrapping Video Semantic Segmentation Model via Distillation-assisted Test-Time Adaptation
papers.abstract: Fully supervised Video Semantic Segmentation (VSS) relies heavily on densely annotated video data, limiting practical applicability. Alternatively, applying pre-trained Image Semantic Segmentation (ISS) models frame-by-frame avoids annotation costs but ignores crucial temporal coherence. Recent foundation models such as SAM2 enable high-quality mask propagation yet remain impractical for direct VSS due to limited semantic understanding and computational overhead. In this paper, we propose DiTTA (Distillation-assisted Test-Time Adaptation), a novel framework that converts an ISS model into a temporally-aware VSS model through efficient test-time adaptation (TTA), without annotated videos. DiTTA distills SAM2's temporal segmentation knowledge into the ISS model during a brief, single-pass initialization phase, complemented by a lightweight temporal fusion module to aggregate cross-frame context. Crucially, DiTTA achieves robust generalization even when adapting with highly limited partial video snippets (e.g., initial 10%), significantly outperforming zero-shot refinement approaches that repeatedly invoke SAM2 during inference. Extensive experiments on VSPW and Cityscapes demonstrate DiTTA's effectiveness, achieving competitive or superior performance relative to fully-supervised VSS methods, thus providing a practical and annotation-free solution for real-world VSS tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出DiTTA框架，通过蒸馏SAM2知识到图像分割模型，实现无标注视频的语义分割测试时自适应。
analysis.research_motivation: 全监督视频语义分割依赖密集标注视频数据，成本高；逐帧应用图像分割模型忽略时序一致性；SAM2等基础模型虽能传播高质量掩码但缺乏语义理解且计算开销大。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用标注视频的情况下，将预训练的图像语义分割模型高效转化为具有时序感知能力的视频语义分割模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DiTTA框架，在测试时通过单次初始化阶段蒸馏SAM2的时序分割知识到ISS模型，并引入轻量级时序融合模块聚合跨帧上下文。
contributions: 提出DiTTA，首个利用蒸馏辅助测试时自适应将ISS模型转化为VSS模型的无标注视频方法。
仅需少量视频片段（如初始10%）即可实现鲁棒泛化，显著优于零样本细化方法。
analysis.experiments: 在VSPW和Cityscapes数据集上实验，DiTTA达到与全监督VSS方法竞争或更优的性能。
limitations: 依赖SAM2的掩码质量，若SAM2在特定场景下失败可能影响性能。
仅验证了部分视频片段的自适应，长视频或复杂场景的泛化性待进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DiTTA框架，通过蒸馏SAM2知识到图像分割模型，实现无标注视频的语义分割测试时自适应。

papers.title: Pseudo-Unification: Entropy Probing Reveals Divergent Information Patterns in Unified Multimodal Models
papers.abstract: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) were designed to combine the reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs) with the generation capability of vision models. In practice, however, this synergy remains elusive: UMMs fail to transfer LLM-like reasoning to image synthesis and exhibit divergent response behaviors. We term this phenomenon pseudo-unification. Diagnosing its internal causes is important, but existing probing methods either lack model-internal insight or ignore prompt-response dependencies. To address these limitations, we propose an information-theoretic probing framework that jointly analyzes how UMMs encode inputs and generate outputs. Applied to ten representative UMMs, our framework reveals that pseudo-unification stems from a dual divergence: (i) Modality-Asymmetric Encoding, where vision and language follow different entropy trajectories, and (ii) Pattern-Split Response, where text generation exhibits high-entropy creativity while image synthesis enforces low-entropy fidelity. Only models that unify both sides (e.g., via contextual prediction) achieve more genuine unification, enabling stronger reasoning-based text-to-image generation even with fewer parameters. Our work provides the first model-internal probing of unification, demonstrating that real multimodal synergy requires consistency in information flow, not just shared parameters.

analysis.tldr: 统一多模态模型存在“伪统一”现象，信息流不一致导致推理与生成能力分离。
analysis.research_motivation: 统一多模态模型（UMMs）旨在融合LLM推理与视觉生成能力，但实际中两者协同不佳，现有探测方法缺乏模型内部视角或忽略提示-响应依赖。
analysis.problem: 诊断UMMs中推理与生成行为不一致（伪统一）的内部原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现伪统一源于双重分歧：模态不对称编码（视觉与语言熵轨迹不同）和模式分裂响应（文本生成高熵创造性，图像合成低熵保真度）。
analysis.method: 提出信息论探测框架，联合分析UMMs如何编码输入和生成输出。
contributions: 首次对统一多模态模型进行模型内部探测，揭示伪统一现象。
提出信息论探测框架，量化模态间信息流差异。
发现上下文预测等统一策略可实现更真实的统一，提升推理驱动文本到图像生成。
analysis.experiments: 在十个代表性UMMs上应用框架，验证了伪统一现象及双重分歧。
limitations: 框架可能依赖特定模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
未探讨除熵外的其他信息论度量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 统一多模态模型存在“伪统一”现象，信息流不一致导致推理与生成能力分离。

papers.title: Progressive Deep Learning for Automated Spheno-Occipital Synchondrosis Maturation Assessment
papers.abstract: Accurate assessment of spheno-occipital synchondrosis (SOS) maturation is a key indicator of craniofacial growth and a critical determinant for orthodontic and surgical timing. However, SOS staging from cone-beam CT (CBCT) relies on subtle, continuously evolving morphological cues, leading to high inter-observer variability and poor reproducibility, especially at transitional fusion stages. We frame SOS assessment as a fine-grained visual recognition problem and propose a progressive representation-learning framework that explicitly mirrors how expert clinicians reason about synchondral fusion: from coarse anatomical structure to increasingly subtle patterns of closure. Rather than training a full-capacity network end-to-end, we sequentially grow the model by activating deeper blocks over time, allowing early layers to first encode stable cranial base morphology before higher-level layers specialize in discriminating adjacent maturation stages. This yields a curriculum over network depth that aligns deep feature learning with the biological continuum of SOS fusion. Extensive experiments across convolutional and transformer-based architectures show that this expert-inspired training strategy produces more stable optimization and consistently higher accuracy than standard training, particularly for ambiguous intermediate stages. Importantly, these gains are achieved without changing network architectures or loss functions, demonstrating that training dynamics alone can substantially improve anatomical representation learning. The proposed framework establishes a principled link between expert dental intuition and deep visual representations, enabling robust, data-efficient SOS staging from CBCT and offering a general strategy for modeling other continuous biological processes in medical imaging.

analysis.tldr: 提出渐进式深度学习框架，模拟专家推理过程，提升蝶枕软骨结合成熟度评估的准确性和稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 蝶枕软骨结合成熟度评估是正畸和手术时机关键指标，但CBCT影像中形态学线索细微且连续，导致观察者间差异大、可重复性差，尤其过渡融合阶段。
analysis.problem: 如何从CBCT影像中准确、稳定地评估SOS成熟度，特别是区分模糊的中间融合阶段。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出渐进式表征学习框架，模拟专家推理过程：从粗粒度解剖结构到细粒度闭合模式。通过逐步激活更深网络块，使早期层先编码稳定颅底形态，高层层专门区分相邻成熟阶段，形成网络深度上的课程学习。
contributions: 提出一种专家启发的渐进式训练策略，无需改变网络架构或损失函数即可提升SOS分期准确性。
在卷积和Transformer架构上验证了该方法在模糊中间阶段上的优势，并建立了专家直觉与深度视觉表征之间的原则性联系。
analysis.experiments: 在卷积和Transformer架构上进行实验，显示该方法比标准训练更稳定、准确率更高，尤其对模糊中间阶段。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有连续形态学变化的任务，泛化性需进一步验证。
渐进式训练可能增加训练时间或调参复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出渐进式深度学习框架，模拟专家推理过程，提升蝶枕软骨结合成熟度评估的准确性和稳定性。

papers.title: AmodalSVG: Amodal Image Vectorization via Semantic Layer Peeling
papers.abstract: We introduce AmodalSVG, a new framework for amodal image vectorization that produces semantically organized and geometrically complete SVG representations from natural images. Existing vectorization methods operate under a modal paradigm: tracing only visible pixels and disregarding occlusion. Consequently, the resulting SVGs are semantically entangled and geometrically incomplete, limiting SVG's structural editability. In contrast, AmodalSVG reconstructs full object geometries, including occluded regions, into independent, editable vector layers. To achieve this, AmodalSVG reformulates image vectorization as a two-stage framework, performing semantic decoupling and completion in the raster domain to produce amodally complete semantic layers, which are then independently vectorized. In the first stage, we introduce Semantic Layer Peeling (SLP), a VLM-guided strategy that progressively decomposes an image into semantically coherent layers. By hybrid inpainting, SLP recovers complete object appearances under occlusions, enabling explicit semantic decoupling. To vectorize these layers efficiently, we propose Adaptive Layered Vectorization (ALV), which dynamically modulates the primitive budget via an error-budget-driven adjustment mechanism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AmodalSVG significantly outperforms prior methods in visual fidelity. Moreover, the resulting amodal layers enable object-level editing directly in the vector domain, capabilities not supported by existing vectorization approaches. Code will be released upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出AmodalSVG框架，通过语义层剥离实现自然图像的模态无关矢量化，生成语义完整、几何完整的SVG表示。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有矢量化方法仅追踪可见像素，忽略遮挡，导致SVG语义纠缠且几何不完整，限制了结构可编辑性。
analysis.problem: 如何从自然图像中生成语义解耦、几何完整的SVG表示，支持遮挡区域重建和对象级编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段使用VLM引导的语义层剥离（SLP）逐步分解图像为语义连贯层，并通过混合修复恢复遮挡下的完整对象外观；第二阶段采用自适应分层矢量化（ALV），通过误差预算驱动调整基元数量，高效矢量化各层。
contributions: 提出AmodalSVG，首个实现模态无关图像矢量化的框架，生成语义组织和几何完整的SVG。
提出语义层剥离（SLP）策略，利用VLM引导和混合修复实现遮挡下的语义解耦与补全。
提出自适应分层矢量化（ALV），动态调整基元预算以高效矢量化语义层。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖VLM的语义理解能力，可能受限于VLM的准确性。
混合修复可能引入伪影，影响矢量化质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AmodalSVG框架，通过语义层剥离实现自然图像的模态无关矢量化，生成语义完整、几何完整的SVG表示。

papers.title: DexWorldModel: Causal Latent World Modeling towards Automated Learning of Embodied Tasks
papers.abstract: Deploying generative World-Action Models for manipulation is severely bottlenecked by redundant pixel-level reconstruction, $\mathcal{O}(T)$ memory scaling, and sequential inference latency. We introduce the Causal Latent World Model (CLWM), which employs DINOv3 features as generative targets to disentangle interaction semantics from visual noise, yielding highly robust domain generalization. To overcome memory scaling, CLWM features a Dual-State Test-Time Training (TTT) Memory that guarantees a strict $\mathcal{O}(1)$ footprint for long-horizon tasks. To overcome deployment latency, we propose Speculative Asynchronous Inference (SAI) to mask partial diffusion denoising behind physical execution, cutting blocking latency by about $50\%$. To scale robust policies, we present EmbodiChain, an online framework that establishes the Efficiency Law by injecting an infinite flow of physics-grounded trajectories during training. Extensive experiments validate that CLWM achieves state-of-the-art performance in complex dual-arm simulation and unprecedented zero-shot sim-to-real transfer on physical robots, outperforming baselines explicitly finetuned on real-world data.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果潜在世界模型CLWM，通过DINOv3特征解耦交互语义、O(1)记忆缩放和异步推理，实现零样本仿真到真实机器人迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成式世界-动作模型在操作任务中受限于像素级重建冗余、线性记忆缩放和顺序推理延迟，难以高效部署。
analysis.problem: 解决世界模型在机器人操作中的像素级重建冗余、长时记忆缩放和推理延迟问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Causal Latent World Model (CLWM)，包含DINOv3特征作为生成目标、双状态测试时训练记忆（O(1)足迹）和推测性异步推理（减少50%阻塞延迟），以及EmbodiChain在线框架注入物理轨迹。
contributions: 提出CLWM，利用DINOv3特征解耦交互语义，实现强领域泛化。
设计双状态TTT记忆，保证长时任务O(1)记忆足迹。
提出推测性异步推理，减少约50%阻塞延迟。
提出EmbodiChain在线框架，建立效率定律，实现零样本仿真到真实迁移。
analysis.experiments: 在复杂双臂仿真和物理机器人上实现零样本仿真到真实迁移，超越在真实数据上微调的基线。
limitations: 可能依赖DINOv3特征的质量。
异步推理可能引入额外同步开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出因果潜在世界模型CLWM，通过DINOv3特征解耦交互语义、O(1)记忆缩放和异步推理，实现零样本仿真到真实机器人迁移。

papers.title: QShield: Securing Neural Networks Against Adversarial Attacks using Quantum Circuits
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks remain highly vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, limiting their reliability in security- and safety-critical applications. To address this challenge, we introduce QShield, a modular hybrid quantum-classical neural network (HQCNN) architecture designed to enhance the adversarial robustness of classical deep learning models. QShield integrates a conventional convolutional neural network (CNN) backbone for feature extraction with a quantum processing module that encodes the extracted features into quantum states, applies structured entanglement operations under realistic noise models, and outputs a hybrid prediction through a dynamically weighted fusion mechanism implemented via a lightweight multilayer perceptron (MLP). We systematically evaluate both classical and hybrid quantum-classical models on the MNIST, OrganAMNIST, and CIFAR-10 datasets, using a comprehensive set of robustness, efficiency, and computational performance metrics. Our results demonstrate that classical models are highly vulnerable to adversarial attacks, whereas the proposed hybrid models with entanglement patterns maintain high predictive accuracy while substantially reducing attack success rates across a wide range of adversarial attacks. Furthermore, the proposed hybrid architecture significantly increased the computational cost required to generate adversarial examples, thereby introducing an additional layer of defense. These findings indicate that the proposed modular hybrid architecture achieves a practical balance between predictive accuracy and adversarial robustness, positioning it as a promising approach for secure and reliable machine learning in sensitive and safety-critical applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出QShield混合量子-经典神经网络架构，通过量子电路增强对抗鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度神经网络易受对抗扰动攻击，在安全关键应用中可靠性不足，现有防御方法难以兼顾准确性与鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种混合量子-经典架构，在保持高预测精度的同时显著提升模型对多种对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 经典模型在对抗攻击下高度脆弱；混合模型通过量子纠缠操作可大幅降低攻击成功率，并增加攻击者生成对抗样本的计算成本。
analysis.method: 构建模块化混合量子-经典神经网络（HQCNN），包含经典CNN特征提取、量子处理模块（编码为量子态、结构化纠缠操作、噪声模型）以及动态加权融合MLP。
contributions: 提出QShield混合量子-经典架构，融合经典CNN与量子电路增强对抗鲁棒性。
在MNIST、OrganAMNIST、CIFAR-10上系统评估，显示混合模型在保持高准确率的同时显著降低攻击成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST、OrganAMNIST、CIFAR-10数据集上评估，使用多种鲁棒性、效率和计算性能指标，对比经典与混合模型。
limitations: 量子模块可能依赖特定硬件或模拟器，实际部署成本较高。
实验仅在较小规模数据集上验证，大规模或复杂任务上的表现未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出QShield混合量子-经典神经网络架构，通过量子电路增强对抗鲁棒性。

papers.title: LiveGesture Streamable Co-Speech Gesture Generation Model
papers.abstract: We propose LiveGesture, the first fully streamable, speech-driven full-body gesture generation framework that operates with zero look-ahead and supports arbitrary sequence length. Unlike existing co-speech gesture methods, which are designed for offline generation and either treat body regions independently or entangle all joints within a single model, LiveGesture is built from the ground up for causal, region-coordinated motion generation. LiveGesture consists of two main modules: the Streamable Vector Quantized Motion Tokenizer (SVQ) and the Hierarchical Autoregressive Transformer (HAR). The SVQ tokenizer converts the motion sequence of each body region into causal, discrete motion tokens, enabling real-time, streamable token decoding. On top of SVQ, HAR employs region-expert autoregressive (xAR) transformers to model expressive, fine-grained motion dynamics for each body region. A causal spatio-temporal fusion module (xAR Fusion) then captures and integrates correlated motion dynamics across regions. Both xAR and xAR Fusion are conditioned on live, continuously arriving audio signals encoded by a streamable causal audio encoder. To enhance robustness under streaming noise and prediction errors, we introduce autoregressive masking training, which leverages uncertainty-guided token masking and random region masking to expose the model to imperfect, partially erroneous histories during training. Experiments on the BEAT2 dataset demonstrate that LiveGesture produces coherent, diverse, and beat-synchronous full-body gestures in real time, matching or surpassing state-of-the-art offline methods under true zero look-ahead conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个全流式、零前瞻的语音驱动全身手势生成框架LiveGesture，通过流式VQ分词器和分层自回归Transformer实现实时协调动作生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有共语手势方法均为离线生成，要么独立处理身体区域，要么将所有关节纠缠在单一模型中，无法支持实时流式生成，限制了在人机交互等场景中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何实现零前瞻、任意序列长度的因果式语音驱动全身手势生成，并保证区域协调和实时性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LiveGesture框架，包含流式向量量化运动分词器（SVQ）将各区域运动序列转换为因果离散token，以及分层自回归Transformer（HAR）通过区域专家自回归模型和因果时空融合模块建模区域动态与跨区域协调，并采用自回归掩码训练增强对流式噪声和预测误差的鲁棒性。
contributions: 首个全流式、零前瞻的语音驱动全身手势生成框架，支持任意序列长度。
提出流式VQ分词器和分层自回归Transformer架构，实现区域协调的因果运动生成。
引入自回归掩码训练策略，提升模型在流式噪声下的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在BEAT2数据集上实验，表明LiveGesture在零前瞻条件下实时生成连贯、多样且节拍同步的全身手势，匹配或超越最先进离线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集（BEAT2），泛化性需进一步验证。
流式设置下长程依赖建模能力可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个全流式、零前瞻的语音驱动全身手势生成框架LiveGesture，通过流式VQ分词器和分层自回归Transformer实现实时协调动作生成。

papers.title: Mem$^2$Evolve: Towards Self-Evolving Agents via Co-Evolutionary Capability Expansion and Experience Distillation
papers.abstract: While large language model--powered agents can self-evolve by accumulating experience or by dynamically creating new assets (i.e., tools or expert agents), existing frameworks typically treat these two evolutionary processes in isolation. This separation overlooks their intrinsic interdependence: the former is inherently bounded by a manually predefined static toolset, while the latter generates new assets from scratch without experiential guidance, leading to limited capability growth and unstable evolution. To address this limitation, we introduce a novel paradigm of co-evolutionary Capability Expansion and Experience Distillation. Guided by this paradigm, we propose the \textbf{Mem$^{\textbf{2}}$Evolve}, which integrates two core components: \textbf{Experience Memory} and \textbf{Asset Memory}. Specifically, Mem$^{2}$Evolve leverages accumulated experience to guide the dynamic creation of assets, thereby expanding the agent's capability space while simultaneously acquiring new experience to achieve co-evolution. Extensive experiments across 6 task categories and 8 benchmarks demonstrate that Mem$^{2}$Evolve achieves improvement of 18.53\% over standard LLMs, 11.80\% over agents evolving solely through experience, and 6.46\% over those evolving solely through asset creation, establishing it as a substantially more effective and stable self-evolving agent framework. Code is available at: https://buaa-irip-llm.github.io/Mem2Evolve.

analysis.tldr: 提出协同进化框架Mem²Evolve，通过经验记忆和资产记忆的相互促进实现智能体自我进化，在8个基准上平均提升18.53%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM智能体自我进化方法将经验积累和资产创建分离，忽略了二者的内在依赖关系，导致能力增长受限和进化不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能同时利用经验积累和资产创建并使其相互促进的自我进化框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出经验积累受限于静态工具集，而资产创建缺乏经验指导，导致能力增长有限和进化不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出Mem²Evolve框架，包含经验记忆和资产记忆两个核心组件，利用积累的经验指导动态资产创建，从而扩展能力空间并同时获取新经验，实现协同进化。
contributions: 提出协同进化能力扩展与经验蒸馏的新范式。
设计Mem²Evolve框架，集成经验记忆和资产记忆，实现经验与资产的相互促进。
在6个任务类别和8个基准上验证了有效性，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在6个任务类别和8个基准上进行实验，Mem²Evolve相比标准LLM提升18.53%，相比仅经验进化提升11.80%，相比仅资产创建提升6.46%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量初始经验或资产。
协同进化过程的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出协同进化框架Mem²Evolve，通过经验记忆和资产记忆的相互促进实现智能体自我进化，在8个基准上平均提升18.53%。

papers.title: CSPO: Alleviating Reward Ambiguity for Structured Table-to-LaTeX Generation
papers.abstract: Tables contain rich structured information, yet when stored as images their contents remain "locked" within pixels. Converting table images into LaTeX code enables faithful digitization and reuse, but current multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often fail to preserve structural, style, or content fidelity. Conventional post-training with reinforcement learning (RL) typically relies on a single aggregated reward, leading to reward ambiguity that conflates multiple behavioral aspects and hinders effective optimization. We propose Component-Specific Policy Optimization (CSPO), an RL framework that disentangles optimization across LaTeX tables components-structure, style, and content. In particular, CSPO assigns component-specific rewards and backpropagates each signal only through the tokens relevant to its component, alleviating reward ambiguity and enabling targeted component-wise optimization. To comprehensively assess performance, we introduce a set of hierarchical evaluation metrics. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of CSPO, underscoring the importance of component-specific optimization for reliable structured generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出CSPO框架，通过组件特定奖励解耦优化，缓解表格到LaTeX生成中的奖励模糊问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 表格图像转换为LaTeX代码时，现有MLLM常丢失结构、样式或内容保真度，而传统RL使用单一聚合奖励导致奖励模糊，难以有效优化多个行为方面。
analysis.problem: 表格图像到LaTeX代码生成中，多模态大模型难以同时保持结构、样式和内容保真度，且单一奖励信号无法区分不同组件的优化需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出传统RL中单一聚合奖励会导致奖励模糊，混淆多个行为方面，阻碍有效优化。
analysis.method: 提出组件特定策略优化（CSPO），为LaTeX表格的结构、样式和内容分别分配组件特定奖励，并仅通过相关token反向传播，实现解耦优化。
contributions: 提出CSPO框架，通过组件特定奖励和反向传播缓解奖励模糊问题。
引入层次化评估指标，全面评估表格到LaTeX生成性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到大量实验证明了CSPO的有效性，但未提供具体数值或基准。
limitations: 可能依赖组件划分的准确性，错误划分会影响优化效果。
组件特定奖励的设计可能需要领域知识，泛化到其他结构化生成任务需调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CSPO框架，通过组件特定奖励解耦优化，缓解表格到LaTeX生成中的奖励模糊问题。

papers.title: ReXSonoVQA: A Video QA Benchmark for Procedure-Centric Ultrasound Understanding
papers.abstract: Ultrasound acquisition requires skilled probe manipulation and real-time adjustments. Vision-language models (VLMs) could enable autonomous ultrasound systems, but existing benchmarks evaluate only static images, not dynamic procedural understanding. We introduce ReXSonoVQA, a video QA benchmark with 514 video clips and 514 questions (249 MCQ, 265 free-response) targeting three competencies: Action-Goal Reasoning, Artifact Resolution & Optimization, and Procedure Context & Planning. Zero-shot evaluation of Gemini 3 Pro, Qwen3.5-397B, LLaVA-Video-72B, and Seed 2.0 Pro shows VLMs can extract some procedural information, but troubleshooting questions remain challenging with minimal gains over text-only baselines, exposing limitations in causal reasoning. ReXSonoVQA enables developing perception systems for ultrasound training, guidance, and robotic automation.

analysis.tldr: 提出超声视频问答基准ReXSonoVQA，评估VLM在动态超声程序理解中的能力，发现因果推理仍是瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有超声基准仅评估静态图像理解，缺乏对动态操作流程的评测，阻碍了自主超声系统的发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估视觉语言模型在超声视频中理解程序性操作（如动作推理、伪影优化、流程规划）的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 零样本评估显示VLM能提取部分程序信息，但在故障排查问题上表现不佳，相比纯文本基线提升有限，暴露了因果推理能力的不足。
analysis.method: 构建包含514个视频片段和514个问题的视频问答基准，涵盖三类能力：动作-目标推理、伪影解析与优化、程序上下文与规划。
contributions: 首个面向超声程序性理解的视频问答基准ReXSonoVQA
系统评估多个先进VLM在动态超声理解上的表现，揭示因果推理瓶颈
analysis.experiments: 在Gemini 3 Pro、Qwen3.5-397B、LLaVA-Video-72B和Seed 2.0 Pro上进行零样本评估，并与文本基线对比。
limitations: 基准规模较小（514个视频-问题对），可能不足以全面反映模型能力
仅评估零样本设置，未涉及微调或领域适应
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出超声视频问答基准ReXSonoVQA，评估VLM在动态超声程序理解中的能力，发现因果推理仍是瓶颈。

papers.title: TAMISeg: Text-Aligned Multi-scale Medical Image Segmentation with Semantic Encoder Distillation
papers.abstract: Medical image segmentation remains challenging due to limited fine-grained annotations, complex anatomical structures, and image degradation from noise, low contrast, or illumination variation. We propose TAMISeg, a text-guided segmentation framework that incorporates clinical language prompts and semantic distillation as auxiliary semantic cues to enhance visual understanding and reduce reliance on pixel-level fine-grained annotations. TAMISeg integrates three core components: a consistency-aware encoder pretrained with strong perturbations for robust feature extraction, a semantic encoder distillation module with supervision from a frozen DINOv3 teacher to enhance semantic discriminability, and a scale-adaptive decoder that segments anatomical structures across different spatial scales. Experiments on the Kvasir-SEG, MosMedData+, and QaTa-COV19 datasets demonstrate that TAMISeg consistently outperforms existing uni-modal and multi-modal methods in both qualitative and quantitative evaluations. Code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/qczggaoqiang/TAMISeg.

analysis.tldr: 提出文本对齐的多尺度医学图像分割框架TAMISeg，利用临床语言提示和语义蒸馏提升分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割面临细粒度标注有限、解剖结构复杂、图像退化（噪声、低对比度、光照变化）等挑战，现有方法依赖像素级标注且视觉理解不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用临床语言提示和语义蒸馏作为辅助语义线索，减少对像素级细粒度标注的依赖，提升医学图像分割的鲁棒性和准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TAMISeg框架，包含三个核心组件：一致性感知编码器（强扰动预训练）、语义编码器蒸馏模块（冻结DINOv3教师监督）、尺度自适应解码器（多尺度解剖结构分割）。
contributions: 提出文本引导的医学图像分割框架，融合临床语言提示和语义蒸馏。
设计一致性感知编码器和尺度自适应解码器，提升鲁棒性和多尺度分割能力。
analysis.experiments: 在Kvasir-SEG、MosMedData+和QaTa-COV19数据集上，TAMISeg在定性和定量评估中一致优于现有单模态和多模态方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定临床语言提示的质量和可用性。
蒸馏模块需要预训练教师模型，计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出文本对齐的多尺度医学图像分割框架TAMISeg，利用临床语言提示和语义蒸馏提升分割性能。

papers.title: Dynamic Eraser for Guided Concept Erasure in Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Concept erasure in Text-To-Image (T2I) diffusion models is vital for safe content generation, but existing inference-time methods face significant limitations. Feature-correction approaches often cause uncontrolled over-correction, while token-level interventions struggle with semantic granularity and context. Moreover, both types of methods are prone to severe semantic drift or even complete representation collapse. To address these challenges, we present Dynamic Semantic Steering (DSS), a lightweight, training-free framework for interpretable and controllable concept erasure. DSS introduces: 1) Sensitive Semantic Boundary Modeling (SSBM) to automate the discovery of safe semantic anchors, and 2) Sensitive Semantic Guidance (SSG), which leverages cross-attention features for precise detection and performs correction via a closed-form solution derived from a well-posed objective. This ensures optimal suppression of sensitive content while preserving benign semantics. DSS achieves an average erasure rate of 91.0\%, significantly outperforming SOTA methods (from 18.6\% to 85.9\%) with minimal impact on output fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态语义引导（DSS）框架，实现扩散模型中的可解释、可控概念擦除，擦除率达91.0%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理时概念擦除方法存在过度修正、语义粒度不足、语义漂移或表示崩溃等问题，亟需轻量、无需训练且可控的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 在文本到图像扩散模型中，如何在不影响良性语义的前提下精确、可控地擦除敏感概念。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 特征修正方法常导致不受控的过度修正，token级干预难以处理语义粒度和上下文，两类方法均易出现严重语义漂移或表示完全崩溃。
analysis.method: 提出动态语义引导（DSS）框架，包含敏感语义边界建模（SSBM）自动发现安全语义锚点，以及敏感语义引导（SSG）利用交叉注意力特征进行精确检测并通过闭式解修正。
contributions: 提出轻量、无需训练的DSS框架，实现可解释且可控的概念擦除。
引入SSBM和SSG两个组件，分别用于自动发现安全锚点和精确检测与修正。
在多个概念擦除任务上达到91.0%的平均擦除率，显著优于现有方法（18.6%-85.9%），且对输出保真度影响极小。
analysis.experiments: 摘要报告了平均擦除率91.0%，对比SOTA方法（18.6%-85.9%），并提及对输出保真度影响极小，但未提供具体数据集或更多实验细节。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的敏感概念，泛化性需进一步验证。
闭式解修正可能在某些复杂场景下引入伪影。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态语义引导（DSS）框架，实现扩散模型中的可解释、可控概念擦除，擦除率达91.0%。

papers.title: EvoNash-MARL: A Closed-Loop Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Framework for Medium-Horizon Equity Allocation
papers.abstract: Medium- to long-horizon equity allocation is challenging due to weak predictive structure, non-stationary market regimes, and the degradation of signals under realistic trading constraints. Conventional approaches often rely on single predictors or loosely coupled pipelines, which limit robustness under distributional shift. This paper proposes EvoNash-MARL, a closed-loop framework that integrates reinforcement learning with population-based policy optimization and execution-aware selection to improve robustness in medium- to long-horizon allocation. The framework combines multi-agent policy populations, game-theoretic aggregation, and constraint-aware validation within a unified walk-forward design. Under a 120-window walk-forward protocol, the final configuration achieves the highest robust score among internal baselines. On out-of-sample data from 2014 to 2024, it delivers a 19.6% annualized return, compared to 11.7% for SPY, and remains stable under extended evaluation through 2026. While the framework demonstrates consistent performance under realistic constraints and across market settings, strong global statistical significance is not established under White's Reality Check (WRC) and SPA-lite tests. The results therefore provide evidence of improved robustness rather than definitive proof of superior market timing performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出EvoNash-MARL框架，结合强化学习与种群策略优化，在中等期限权益分配中提升鲁棒性，但未通过统计显著性检验。
analysis.research_motivation: 中等至长期权益分配面临预测信号弱、市场非平稳及交易约束导致信号退化等挑战，现有单预测器或松散耦合流水线方法在分布偏移下鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个在中等期限权益分配中兼顾鲁棒性与执行约束的闭环框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EvoNash-MARL，一种闭环框架，集成强化学习、基于种群的策略优化（多智能体策略种群）、博弈论聚合（纳什均衡）以及执行感知验证，采用统一的前向验证设计。
contributions: 提出EvoNash-MARL框架，将多智能体强化学习与种群优化、博弈论聚合结合，用于中等期限权益分配。
在2014-2024年样本外数据上实现19.6%年化收益，优于SPY的11.7%，并在延长至2026年的评估中保持稳定。
analysis.experiments: 在120窗口前向验证协议下，最终配置在内部基线中取得最高鲁棒分数；2014-2024年样本外数据年化收益19.6%（SPY为11.7%），延长至2026年表现稳定；但未通过White's Reality Check和SPA-lite统计显著性检验。
limitations: 未建立强全局统计显著性（WRC和SPA-lite未通过）。
结果仅提供鲁棒性改进证据，而非市场择时优越性的确凿证明。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EvoNash-MARL框架，结合强化学习与种群策略优化，在中等期限权益分配中提升鲁棒性，但未通过统计显著性检验。

papers.title: STGV: Spatio-Temporal Hash Encoding for Gaussian-based Video Representation
papers.abstract: 2D Gaussian Splatting (2DGS) has recently become a promising paradigm for high-quality video representation. However, existing methods employ content-agnostic or spatio-temporal feature overlapping embeddings to predict canonical Gaussian primitive deformations, which entangles static and dynamic components in videos and prevents modeling their distinct properties effectively. These result in inaccurate predictions for spatio-temporal deformations and unsatisfactory representation quality. To address these problems, this paper proposes a Spatio-Temporal hash encoding framework for Gaussian-based Video representation (STGV). By decomposing video features into learnable 2D spatial and 3D temporal hash encodings, STGV effectively facilitates the learning of motion patterns for dynamic components while maintaining background details for static elements. In addition, we construct a more stable and consistent initial canonical Gaussian representation through a key frame canonical initialization strategy, preventing from feature overlapping and a structurally incoherent geometry representation. Experimental results demonstrate that our method attains better video representation quality (+0.98 PSNR) against other Gaussian-based methods and achieves competitive performance in downstream video tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出时空哈希编码框架STGV，通过分解2D空间和3D时间哈希编码提升高斯视频表示质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于2D高斯泼溅的视频表示方法使用内容无关或时空特征重叠嵌入，导致静态与动态成分纠缠，无法有效建模各自特性，影响时空变形预测精度和表示质量。
analysis.problem: 如何解耦视频中的静态与动态成分，实现更精确的时空变形预测和高质量视频表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出内容无关或时空特征重叠嵌入会导致静态与动态成分纠缠，使得模型难以分别学习运动模式和背景细节，造成变形预测不准确。
analysis.method: 提出STGV框架，将视频特征分解为可学习的2D空间哈希编码和3D时间哈希编码，分别处理动态和静态成分；并通过关键帧规范初始化策略构建更稳定一致的初始规范高斯表示。
contributions: 提出时空哈希编码框架，有效解耦视频中的静态与动态成分，提升运动模式学习和背景保持能力。
设计关键帧规范初始化策略，防止特征重叠和几何结构不一致，增强初始高斯表示的稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在视频表示质量上，相比其他基于高斯的方法PSNR提升0.98，并在下游视频任务中取得有竞争力的性能。
limitations: 可能对复杂长视频的长期依赖建模不足。
哈希编码的哈希表大小和分辨率选择可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出时空哈希编码框架STGV，通过分解2D空间和3D时间哈希编码提升高斯视频表示质量。

papers.title: Reasoning as Data: Representation-Computation Unity and Its Implementation in a Domain-Algebraic Inference Engine
papers.abstract: Every existing knowledge system separates storage from computation. We show this separation is unnecessary and eliminate it. In a standard triple is_a(Apple, Company), domain context lives in the query or the programmer's mind. In a CDC four-tuple is_a(Apple, Company, @Business), domain becomes a structural field embedded in predicate arity. Any system respecting arity automatically performs domain-scoped inference without external rules. We call this representation-computation unity (RCU). From the four-tuple structure, three inference mechanisms emerge: domain-scoped closure, typed inheritance, and write-time falsification via cycle detection per domain fiber. We establish RCU formally via four theorems. RCU is implementable. We present a working symbolic engine (2400 lines Python+Prolog) resolving four engineering issues: rule-data separation, shared-fiber handling, read-only meta-layer design, and intersective convergence. A central result: CDC domain-constrained inference is distinct from Prolog with a domain argument. Two case studies validate the engine. ICD-11 classification (1247 entities, 3 axes) shows fibers resolve multiple inheritance. CBT clinical reasoning shows generalization to temporal reasoning with session turn as ordered domain index. Multi-constraint queries realize CSP arc-consistency with complexity O(m (N/K)^2), confirming the domain lattice's sparsity governs performance. When domain is structural, data computes itself.

analysis.tldr: 提出表示-计算统一（RCU）框架，通过将领域信息嵌入谓词元数实现自动领域约束推理，并构建了领域代数推理引擎。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有知识系统将存储与计算分离，导致领域上下文依赖外部查询或程序员心智，缺乏自动领域感知推理能力。
analysis.problem: 如何消除知识系统中存储与计算的分离，使领域信息成为结构内嵌属性，从而实现自动领域约束推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准三元组（如 is_a(Apple, Company)）中领域上下文丢失，需外部规则或人工干预；而四元组结构（如 is_a(Apple, Company, @Business)）将领域作为谓词元数的一部分，系统自动执行领域作用域推理。
analysis.method: 提出表示-计算统一（RCU）框架，基于四元组结构（实体、关系、值、领域）实现三种推理机制：领域作用域闭包、类型化继承、写时假证（通过每领域纤维的循环检测）。形式化四个定理，并实现一个2400行Python+Prolog的符号引擎，解决规则-数据分离、共享纤维处理、只读元层设计、交集收敛四个工程问题。
contributions: 提出表示-计算统一（RCU）概念，证明存储与计算分离是不必要的。
形式化四个定理建立RCU理论基础。
实现领域代数推理引擎，并通过ICD-11分类和CBT临床推理两个案例验证。
analysis.experiments: 两个案例研究：ICD-11分类（1247个实体，3个轴）显示纤维解决多重继承；CBT临床推理展示泛化到时序推理（会话轮次作为有序领域索引）。多约束查询实现CSP弧一致性，复杂度O(m (N/K)^2)，证实领域格稀疏性主导性能。
limitations: 引擎规模较小（2400行），可能难以扩展到超大规模知识图谱。
案例研究领域有限，未涉及更复杂的现实世界场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出表示-计算统一（RCU）框架，通过将领域信息嵌入谓词元数实现自动领域约束推理，并构建了领域代数推理引擎。

papers.title: A Survey of Spatial Memory Representations for Efficient Robot Navigation
papers.abstract: As vision-based robots navigate larger environments, their spatial memory grows without bound, eventually exhausting computational resources, particularly on embedded platforms (8-16GB shared memory, $<$30W) where adding hardware is not an option. This survey examines the spatial memory efficiency problem across 88 references spanning 52 systems (1989-2025), from occupancy grids to neural implicit representations. We introduce the $α= M_{\text{peak}} / M_{\text{map}}$, the ratio of peak runtime memory (the total RAM or GPU memory consumed during operation) to saved map size (the persistent checkpoint written to disk), exposing the gap between published map sizes and actual deployment cost. Independent profiling on an NVIDIA A100 GPU reveals that $α$ spans two orders of magnitude within neural methods alone, ranging from 2.3 (Point-SLAM) to 215 (NICE-SLAM, whose 47,MB map requires 10GB at runtime), showing that memory architecture, not paradigm label, determines deployment feasibility. We propose a standardized evaluation protocol comprising memory growth rate, query latency, memory-completeness curves, and throughput degradation, none of which current benchmarks capture. Through a Pareto frontier analysis with explicit benchmark separation, we show that no single paradigm dominates within its evaluation regime: 3DGS methods achieve the best absolute accuracy at 90-254,MB map size on Replica, while scene graphs provide semantic abstraction at predictable cost. We provide the first independently measured $α$ reference values and an $α$-aware budgeting algorithm enabling practitioners to assess deployment feasibility on target hardware prior to implementation.

analysis.tldr: 综述机器人导航中空间记忆表征的效率问题，提出峰值内存与地图大小比α，并给出标准化评估协议。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉机器人在大环境中导航时，空间记忆无限增长会耗尽计算资源，尤其在嵌入式平台（8-16GB共享内存，<30W）上无法通过增加硬件解决，现有方法仅关注地图大小而忽略实际部署内存开销。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估和优化空间记忆表征的内存效率，使机器人能在资源受限平台上高效导航。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出α在神经方法内跨越两个数量级（2.3到215），表明内存架构而非范式标签决定部署可行性。
analysis.method: 提出峰值内存与地图大小比α作为关键指标，设计标准化评估协议（内存增长率、查询延迟、内存-完整性曲线、吞吐量退化），并进行Pareto前沿分析。
contributions: 首次独立测量α参考值，揭示神经方法中α跨度两个数量级。
提出α感知预算算法，帮助从业者在实现前评估目标硬件上的部署可行性。
提出标准化评估协议，弥补当前基准的缺失。
analysis.experiments: 在NVIDIA A100 GPU上独立评测，α范围从2.3（Point-SLAM）到215（NICE-SLAM），3DGS方法在Replica上达到最佳绝对精度（90-254MB地图大小），场景图提供可预测成本的语义抽象。
limitations: 评测仅基于单一GPU（A100），可能不全面。
α感知预算算法的实际效果未在真实机器人上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述机器人导航中空间记忆表征的效率问题，提出峰值内存与地图大小比α，并给出标准化评估协议。

papers.title: Audio Flamingo Next: Next-Generation Open Audio-Language Models for Speech, Sound, and Music
papers.abstract: We present Audio Flamingo Next (AF-Next), the next-generation and most capable large audio-language model in the Audio Flamingo series, designed to advance understanding and reasoning over speech, environmental sounds and music. Compared to Audio Flamingo 3, AF-Next introduces: (i) a stronger foundational audio-language model that significantly improves accuracy across diverse audio understanding tasks; (ii) scalable strategies for constructing large-scale audio understanding and reasoning data beyond existing academic benchmarks; (iii) support for long and complex audio inputs up to 30 minutes; and (iv) Temporal Audio Chain-of-Thought, a new reasoning paradigm that explicitly grounds intermediate reasoning steps to timestamps in long audio, enabling fine-grained temporal alignment and improved interpretability. To enable these capabilities, we first conduct a systematic analysis of Audio Flamingo 3 to identify key gaps in audio understanding and reasoning. We then curate and scale new large-scale datasets totaling over 1 million hours to address these limitations and expand the existing AudioSkills-XL, LongAudio-XL, AF-Think and AF-Chat datasets. AF-Next is trained using a curriculum-based strategy spanning pre-training, mid-training and post-training stages. Extensive experiments across 20 audio understanding and reasoning benchmarks, including challenging long-audio tasks, show that AF-Next outperforms similarly sized open models by large margins and remains highly competitive with and sometimes surpasses, much larger open-weight and closed models. Beyond benchmark performance, AF-Next exhibits strong real-world utility and transfers well to unseen tasks, highlighting its robustness and generalization ability. In addition to all data, code and methods, we open-source 3 variants of AF-Next, including AF-Next-Instruct, AF-Next-Think and AF-Next-Captioner.

analysis.tldr: AF-Next 是新一代开源音频-语言模型，通过大规模数据、长音频支持和时序音频思维链，在20个基准上显著超越同类模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音频-语言模型在长音频理解、细粒度时序推理和复杂音频推理方面存在不足，且缺乏大规模高质量训练数据。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个更强的开源音频-语言模型，使其在语音、环境音和音乐的理解与推理上达到领先水平，并支持长音频和可解释的时序推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对 Audio Flamingo 3 的系统分析揭示了音频理解和推理中的关键差距，包括长音频处理能力不足、推理步骤缺乏时序对齐。
analysis.method: 提出 AF-Next，包含更强的基座模型、大规模数据构建策略（超100万小时）、长达30分钟的长音频支持，以及时序音频思维链（Temporal Audio Chain-of-Thought）新推理范式。采用课程式训练策略，包括预训练、中期训练和后训练。
contributions: 提出 AF-Next，在20个音频理解和推理基准上大幅超越同规模开源模型，并接近或超越更大模型。
开源3个变体（Instruct、Think、Captioner）及全部数据、代码和方法。
analysis.experiments: 在20个音频理解和推理基准上进行实验，包括挑战性的长音频任务，AF-Next 显著优于同规模开源模型，与更大模型竞争或超越。
limitations: 摘要未提及具体失败案例或局限性。
可能对极端噪声或罕见音频场景的泛化能力有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AF-Next 是新一代开源音频-语言模型，通过大规模数据、长音频支持和时序音频思维链，在20个基准上显著超越同类模型。

papers.title: Evaluating the Impact of Medical Image Reconstruction on Downstream AI Fairness and Performance
papers.abstract: AI-based image reconstruction models are increasingly deployed in clinical workflows to improve image quality from noisy data, such as low-dose X-rays or accelerated MRI scans. However, these models are typically evaluated using pixel-level metrics like PSNR, leaving their impact on downstream diagnostic performance and fairness unclear. We introduce a scalable evaluation framework that applies reconstruction and diagnostic AI models in tandem, which we apply to two tasks (classification, segmentation), three reconstruction approaches (U-Net, GAN, diffusion), and two data types (X-ray, MRI) to assess the potential downstream implications of reconstruction. We find that conventional reconstruction metrics poorly track task performance, where diagnostic accuracy remains largely stable even as reconstruction PSNR declines with increasing image noise. Fairness metrics exhibit greater variability, with reconstruction sometimes amplifying demographic biases, particularly regarding patient sex. However, the overall magnitude of this additional bias is modest compared to the inherent biases already present in diagnostic models. To explore potential bias mitigation, we adapt two strategies from classification literature to the reconstruction setting, but observe limited efficacy. Overall, our findings emphasize the importance of holistic performance and fairness assessments throughout the entire medical imaging workflow, especially as generative reconstruction models are increasingly deployed.

analysis.tldr: 医学图像重建对下游AI公平性和性能影响有限，但需全面评估。
analysis.research_motivation: AI图像重建模型在临床中广泛应用，但通常仅用像素级指标评估，忽略了对下游诊断性能和公平性的影响。
analysis.problem: 评估不同医学图像重建方法对下游分类和分割任务的性能及公平性的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统重建指标（如PSNR）与下游任务性能关联弱；诊断准确性在噪声增加时保持稳定；公平性指标波动较大，重建可能放大性别偏见，但幅度小于诊断模型固有偏见。
analysis.method: 提出可扩展评估框架，串联重建和诊断AI模型，应用于分类和分割任务、三种重建方法（U-Net, GAN, 扩散模型）和两种数据类型（X光, MRI）。
contributions: 系统评估了医学图像重建对下游任务性能和公平性的影响
发现传统重建指标不能反映下游性能，公平性受重建影响但幅度有限
尝试了两种公平性缓解策略但效果有限
analysis.experiments: 在分类和分割任务上，使用U-Net、GAN和扩散模型对X光和MRI数据进行实验，评估诊断准确性和公平性指标。
limitations: 仅评估了两种任务和两种数据类型，泛化性有限
公平性缓解策略效果有限，未提出有效方法
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: CASK: Core-Aware Selective KV Compression for Reasoning Traces
papers.abstract: In large language models performing long-form reasoning, the KV cache grows rapidly with decode length, creating bottlenecks in memory and inference stability. Existing reasoning-oriented KV compression has mostly followed an eviction-centered view: estimate token importance more accurately, then discard lower-ranked entries. Our analysis suggests that scorer refinement alone often fails to substantially reorganize the actual keep-set and may therefore not be the main lever for preserving reasoning behavior. We instead frame reasoning KV compression as a behavior-preserving structured consolidation problem. CASK partitions the decode-time reasoning trace into a protected core that anchors answer formation and intermediate state, and mergeable scratch with high redundancy. The core is preserved, while selective consolidation is applied only to the scratch. To address prompt-heavy regimes where the prefix can exhaust the budget before decode-stage compression becomes active, CASK further uses a two-stage design: prefix eviction followed by decode-stage consolidation. On the H100 reasoning gate, CASK shows higher full-KV continuation fidelity than TriAttention at matched budgets on both AIME24 and AIME25, with recurring cask@384 > triattention@512 crossings. In prompt-heavy replay, multi_news and vcsum act as decode-active witnesses, while qmsum and gov_report expose the prefix_budget_exhausted boundary. The overall evidence supports a simple conclusion: effective reasoning KV compression depends less on more elaborate scorer engineering than on combining core preservation with selective scratch consolidation to lower the usable budget frontier.

analysis.tldr: CASK 将推理轨迹 KV 缓存压缩重构为核心保留与选择性草稿合并，在低预算下超越 TriAttention。
analysis.research_motivation: 长推理 LLM 的 KV 缓存随解码长度快速增长，导致内存和推理稳定性瓶颈；现有方法主要依赖更精确的 token 重要性评分来驱逐低分条目，但评分优化本身难以实质性地重组保留集，从而无法有效保持推理行为。
analysis.problem: 如何在低 KV 缓存预算下，通过结构化压缩保留长推理轨迹的关键行为，避免因压缩导致推理质量下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，仅改进评分器（scorer refinement）往往无法显著改变实际保留集，因此不是保持推理行为的主要杠杆；相反，将推理轨迹划分为受保护的核心（core）和可合并的草稿（scratch）并分别处理，能更有效地降低可用预算边界。
analysis.method: CASK 将解码时推理轨迹划分为保护核心（锚定答案形成和中间状态）和可合并草稿（高冗余），核心保留，草稿选择性合并；并采用两阶段设计：前缀驱逐（prefix eviction）和解码阶段合并（decode-stage consolidation），以应对前缀占用预算的问题。
contributions: 提出将推理 KV 压缩视为行为保持的结构化合并问题，而非单纯改进评分驱逐。
设计核心保留与选择性草稿合并的两阶段压缩方法，在低预算下保持高推理保真度。
analysis.experiments: 在 H100 推理门控上，CASK 在 AIME24 和 AIME25 上以匹配预算实现了比 TriAttention 更高的全 KV 延续保真度，出现 cask@384 > triattention@512 的交叉点；在前缀重放场景中，multi_news 和 vcsum 作为解码活跃见证，qmsum 和 gov_report 暴露了前缀预算耗尽边界。
limitations: 摘要未提及对非推理任务（如通用对话）的适用性。
可能依赖推理轨迹的结构化假设（核心与草稿的划分），在无明确推理步骤的任务中效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CASK 将推理轨迹 KV 缓存压缩重构为核心保留与选择性草稿合并，在低预算下超越 TriAttention。

papers.title: ZoomR: Memory Efficient Reasoning through Multi-Granularity Key Value Retrieval
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown great performance on complex reasoning tasks but often require generating long intermediate thoughts before reaching a final answer. During generation, LLMs rely on a key-value (KV) cache for autoregressive decoding. However, the memory footprint of the KV cache grows with output length. Prior work on KV cache optimization mostly focus on compressing the long input context, while retaining the full KV cache for decoding. For tasks requiring long output generation, this leads to increased computational and memory costs. In this paper, we introduce ZoomR, a novel approach that enables LLMs to adaptively compress verbose reasoning thoughts into summaries and uses a dynamic KV cache selection policy that leverages these summaries while also strategically "zooming in" on fine-grained details. By using summary keys as a coarse-grained index during decoding, ZoomR uses the query to retrieve details for only the most important thoughts. This hierarchical strategy significantly reduces memory usage by avoiding full-cache attention at each step. Experiments across math and reasoning tasks show that our approach achieves competitive performance compared to baselines, while reducing inference memory requirements by more than $4\times$. These results demonstrate that a multi-granularity KV selection enables more memory efficient decoding, especially for long output generation.

analysis.tldr: ZoomR通过多粒度KV缓存选择策略，在长输出推理中实现4倍以上内存压缩，同时保持性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在复杂推理任务中需要生成长中间步骤，导致KV缓存内存随输出长度线性增长，现有压缩方法主要针对输入上下文而非解码阶段，长输出场景下计算和内存成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著牺牲推理性能的前提下，减少长输出生成过程中KV缓存的内存占用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ZoomR方法，将冗长的推理步骤压缩为摘要，并采用动态KV缓存选择策略：以摘要键作为粗粒度索引，在解码时根据查询仅检索最重要思想的细粒度细节，实现分层注意力，避免全缓存注意力。
contributions: 提出多粒度KV缓存选择机制，通过摘要键实现粗粒度索引和细粒度检索的动态平衡。
在数学和推理任务上验证了方法在保持竞争性能的同时，将推理内存需求降低4倍以上。
analysis.experiments: 在数学和推理任务上进行了实验，与基线相比，性能相当，推理内存减少超过4倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于需要长中间推理步骤的任务，对短输出任务收益有限。
摘要生成和检索策略的额外计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ZoomR通过多粒度KV缓存选择策略，在长输出推理中实现4倍以上内存压缩，同时保持性能。

papers.title: EviRCOD: Evidence-Guided Probabilistic Decoding for Referring Camouflaged Object Detection
papers.abstract: Referring Camouflaged Object Detection (Ref-COD) focuses on segmenting specific camouflaged targets in a query image using category-aligned references. Despite recent advances, existing methods struggle with reference-target semantic alignment, explicit uncertainty modeling, and robust boundary preservation. To address these issues, we propose EviRCOD, an integrated framework consisting of three core components: (1) a Reference-Guided Deformable Encoder (RGDE) that employs hierarchical reference-driven modulation and multi-scale deformable aggregation to inject semantic priors and align cross-scale representations; (2) an Uncertainty-Aware Evidential Decoder (UAED) that incorporates Dirichlet evidence estimation into hierarchical decoding to model uncertainty and propagate confidence across scales; and (3) a Boundary-Aware Refinement Module (BARM) that selectively enhances ambiguous boundaries by exploiting low-level edge cues and prediction confidence. Experiments on the Ref-COD benchmark demonstrate that EviRCOD achieves state-of-the-art detection performance while providing well-calibrated uncertainty estimates. Code is available at: https://github.com/blueecoffee/EviRCOD.

analysis.tldr: 提出证据引导概率解码框架EviRCOD，通过参考引导编码、不确定性感知解码和边界细化模块，提升伪装目标检测的语义对齐、不确定性建模和边界保持能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Referring Camouflaged Object Detection方法在参考-目标语义对齐、显式不确定性建模和鲁棒边界保持方面存在不足，限制了检测性能。
analysis.problem: 如何实现参考图像与伪装目标之间的精确语义对齐、显式建模预测不确定性并保持边界完整性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EviRCOD框架，包含三个核心模块：参考引导可变形编码器（RGDE）通过层次化参考驱动调制和多尺度可变形聚合注入语义先验；不确定性感知证据解码器（UAED）将狄利克雷证据估计融入层次化解码以建模不确定性；边界感知细化模块（BARM）利用低级边缘线索和预测置信度选择性增强模糊边界。
contributions: 提出RGDE实现参考引导的跨尺度语义对齐
提出UAED将证据理论引入解码过程以显式建模不确定性
提出BARM利用边缘和置信度信息细化边界
analysis.experiments: 在Ref-COD基准上达到最先进检测性能，并提供校准良好的不确定性估计。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量参考图像
计算复杂度可能较高
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出证据引导概率解码框架EviRCOD，通过参考引导编码、不确定性感知解码和边界细化模块，提升伪装目标检测的语义对齐、不确定性建模和边界保持能力。

papers.title: Beyond A Fixed Seal: Adaptive Stealing Watermark in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Watermarking provides a critical safeguard for large language model (LLM) services by facilitating the detection of LLM-generated text. Correspondingly, stealing watermark algorithms (SWAs) derive watermark information from watermarked texts generated by victim LLMs to craft highly targeted adversarial attacks, which compromise the reliability of watermarks.
