Existing SWAs rely on fixed strategies, overlooking the non-uniform distribution of stolen watermark information and the dynamic nature of real-world LLM generation processes. To address these limitations, we propose Adaptive Stealing (AS), a novel SWA featuring enhanced design flexibility through Position-Based Seal Construction and Adaptive Selection modules. AS operates by defining multiple attack perspectives derived from distinct activation states of contextually ordered tokens. During attack execution, AS dynamically selects the optimal perspective based on watermark compatibility, generation priority, and dynamic generation relevance. Our experiments demonstrate that AS significantly increases steal efficiency against target watermarks under identical experimental conditions. These findings highlight the need for more robust LLM watermarks to withstand potential attacks. We release our code to the community for future research\footnote{https://github.com/DrankXs/AdaptiveStealingWatermark}.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应窃取水印算法AS，通过动态选择攻击视角提升对LLM水印的窃取效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有水印窃取算法采用固定策略，忽略了窃取水印信息的非均匀分布和LLM生成过程的动态性，导致攻击效率受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种自适应水印窃取算法，以更高效地从水印文本中提取水印信息并生成针对性攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出固定策略的窃取算法无法适应水印信息的非均匀分布和生成过程的动态变化。
analysis.method: 提出Adaptive Stealing (AS)算法，包含基于位置的印章构建（Position-Based Seal Construction）和自适应选择（Adaptive Selection）模块，通过定义多个攻击视角并动态选择最优视角进行窃取。
contributions: 提出自适应窃取水印算法AS，通过动态选择攻击视角提升窃取效率。
实验证明AS在相同条件下显著提高对目标水印的窃取效率，揭示现有水印的脆弱性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及AS显著提升窃取效率。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定类型的水印算法有效。
自适应选择模块的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应窃取水印算法AS，通过动态选择攻击视角提升对LLM水印的窃取效率。

papers.title: Product Review Based on Optimized Facial Expression Detection
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a method to review public acceptance of products based on their brand by analyzing the facial expression of the customer intending to buy the product from a supermarket or hypermarket. In such cases, facial expression recognition plays a significant role in product review. Here, facial expression detection is performed by extracting feature points using a modified Harris algorithm. The modified Harris algorithm reduced the time complexity of the existing feature extraction Harris Algorithm. A comparison of time complexities of existing algorithms is done with proposed algorithm. The algorithm proved to be significantly faster and nearly accurate for the needed application by reducing the time complexity for corner points detection.

analysis.tldr: 用改进的Harris算法提取面部特征点来评估产品接受度，速度更快但精度相近。
analysis.research_motivation: 超市或大卖场需要快速了解顾客对产品的接受度，面部表情识别是一种非侵入式方法，但现有特征提取算法（如Harris）时间复杂度过高，难以实时应用。
analysis.problem: 如何降低面部表情检测中特征提取的时间复杂度，同时保持足够高的准确率以用于产品评价。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种改进的Harris算法，通过优化角点检测过程来减少时间开销，用于提取面部特征点。
contributions: 提出一种改进的Harris算法，降低了特征提取的时间复杂度。
将面部表情检测应用于产品评价场景，验证了方法的实用性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅与原始Harris算法比较，未与其他主流面部特征提取方法对比。
未报告在真实超市环境下的用户测试结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用改进的Harris算法提取面部特征点来评估产品接受度，速度更快但精度相近。

papers.title: Ambiguity Detection and Elimination in Automated Executable Process Modeling
papers.abstract: Automated generation of executable Business Process Model and Notation (BPMN) models from natural-language specifications is increasingly enabled by large language models. However, ambiguous or underspecified text can yield structurally valid models with different simulated behavior. Our goal is not to prove that one generated BPMN model is semantically correct, but to detect when a natural-language specification fails to support a stable executable interpretation under repeated generation and simulation. We present a diagnosis-driven framework that detects behavioral inconsistency from the empirical distribution of key performance indicators (KPIs), localizes divergence to gateway logic using model-based diagnosis, maps that logic back to verbatim narrative segments, and repairs the source text through evidence-based refinement. Experiments on diabetic nephropathy health-guidance policies show that the method reduces variability in regenerated model behavior. The result is a closed-loop approach for validating and repairing executable process specifications in the absence of ground-truth BPMN models.

analysis.tldr: 提出诊断驱动框架，通过检测KPI分布不一致性定位并修复自然语言规范中的歧义，提升自动生成BPMN模型的稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型从自然语言自动生成可执行业务流程模型时，歧义或欠规范文本会导致结构有效但行为不一致的模型，缺乏验证规范稳定性的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何检测自然语言规范中的歧义，并自动修复以生成行为稳定的可执行BPMN模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 诊断驱动框架：从KPI经验分布检测行为不一致，利用模型诊断定位网关逻辑分歧，映射回原文片段，通过证据驱动细化修复源文本。
contributions: 提出检测自然语言规范歧义导致的行为不一致性的方法
实现从行为差异定位到源文本修复的闭环流程
analysis.experiments: 在糖尿病肾病健康指导政策上实验，表明该方法降低了重新生成模型行为的变异性。
limitations: 仅针对特定领域（健康指导政策）验证
未提供与其他方法的定量比较
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出诊断驱动框架，通过检测KPI分布不一致性定位并修复自然语言规范中的歧义，提升自动生成BPMN模型的稳定性。

papers.title: DIB-OD: Preserving the Invariant Core for Robust Heterogeneous Graph Adaptation via Decoupled Information Bottleneck and Online Distillation
papers.abstract: Graph Neural Network pretraining is pivotal for leveraging unlabeled graph data. However, generalizing across heterogeneous domains remains a major challenge due to severe distribution shifts. Existing methods primarily focus on intra-domain patterns, failing to disentangle task-relevant invariant knowledge from domain-specific redundant noise, leading to negative transfer and catastrophic forgetting. To this end, we propose DIB-OD, a novel framework designed to preserve the invariant core for robust heterogeneous graph adaptation through a Decoupled Information Bottleneck and Online Distillation framework. Our core innovation is the explicit decomposition of representations into orthogonal invariant and redundant subspaces. By utilizing an Information Bottleneck teacher-student distillation mechanism and the Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion, we isolate a stable invariant core that transcends domain boundaries. Furthermore, a self-adaptive semantic regularizer is introduced to protect this core from corruption during target-domain adaptation by dynamically gating label influence based on predictive confidence. Extensive experiments across chemical, biological, and social network domains demonstrate that DIB-OD significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, particularly in challenging inter-type domain transfers, showcasing superior generalization and anti-forgetting performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦信息瓶颈与在线蒸馏框架，分离不变核心与冗余噪声，实现鲁棒的异构图域适应。
analysis.research_motivation: 图神经网络预训练在跨异构域泛化时面临严重分布偏移，现有方法无法解耦任务相关不变知识与域特定冗余噪声，导致负迁移和灾难性遗忘。
analysis.problem: 如何从异构图中提取跨域不变的核心表征，并避免目标域适应时被冗余噪声干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出分布偏移导致负迁移和灾难性遗忘，现有方法仅关注域内模式。
analysis.method: 将表征显式分解为正交的不变子空间和冗余子空间，利用信息瓶颈师生蒸馏机制和希尔伯特-施密特独立性准则隔离稳定不变核心，并引入自适应语义正则化器根据预测置信度动态门控标签影响以保护核心。
contributions: 提出解耦信息瓶颈与在线蒸馏框架DIB-OD，实现不变核心与冗余噪声的显式分离。
引入自适应语义正则化器，在目标域适应中动态保护不变核心。
在化学、生物、社交网络等多个域上显著超越现有方法，尤其在跨类型域迁移中表现优异。
analysis.experiments: 在化学、生物、社交网络域上进行实验，与最先进方法比较，展示了优越的泛化和抗遗忘性能。
limitations: 可能依赖正交分解假设，在高度纠缠的表征中效果受限。
自适应正则化器的阈值设计可能需针对不同域调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦信息瓶颈与在线蒸馏框架，分离不变核心与冗余噪声，实现鲁棒的异构图域适应。

papers.title: Compliant But Unsatisfactory: The Gap Between Auditing Standards and Practices for Probabilistic Genotyping Software
papers.abstract: AI governance efforts increasingly rely on audit standards: agreed-upon practices for conducting audits. However, poorly designed standards can hide and lend credibility to inadequate systems. We explore how an audit standard's design influences its effectiveness through a case study of ASB 018, a standard for auditing probabilistic genotyping software -- software that the U.S. criminal legal system increasingly uses to analyze DNA samples. Through qualitative analysis of ASB 018 and five audit reports, we identify numerous gaps between the standard's desired outcomes and the auditing practices it enables. For instance, ASB 018 envisions that compliant audits establish restrictions on software use based on observed failures. However, audits can comply without establishing such boundaries. We connect these gaps to the design of the standard's requirements such as vague language and undefined terms. We conclude with recommendations for designing audit standards and evaluating their effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: 审计标准ASB 018的设计缺陷导致合规审计无法有效发现概率基因分型软件的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: AI治理依赖审计标准，但设计不良的标准可能掩盖系统缺陷并赋予其可信度，亟需研究标准设计对审计有效性的影响。
analysis.problem: 审计标准ASB 018的设计如何导致合规审计与预期目标之间存在差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过定性分析ASB 018和五份审计报告，发现标准的要求（如模糊语言、未定义术语）导致审计实践偏离预期结果，例如合规审计未建立基于观察失败的使用限制。
analysis.method: 对审计标准ASB 018及其五份审计报告进行定性分析，识别标准设计缺陷与审计实践差距。
contributions: 揭示了审计标准ASB 018的设计缺陷如何导致合规审计无法达到预期效果。
提出了改进审计标准设计和评估其有效性的建议。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于单一案例研究，可能不适用于其他审计标准。
定性分析可能受主观解读影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 审计标准ASB 018的设计缺陷导致合规审计无法有效发现概率基因分型软件的问题。

papers.title: AOP-Smart: A RAG-Enhanced Large Language Model Framework for Adverse Outcome Pathway Analysis
papers.abstract: Adverse Outcome Pathways (AOPs) are an important knowledge framework in toxicological research and risk assessment. In recent years, large language models (LLMs) have gradually been applied to AOP-related question answering and mechanistic reasoning tasks. However, due to the existence of the hallucination problem, that is, the model may generate content that is inconsistent with facts or lacks evidence, their reliability is still limited. To address this issue, this study proposes an AOP-oriented Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework, AOP-Smart. Based on the official XML data from AOP-Wiki, this method uses Key Events (KEs), Key Event Relationships (KERs), and specific AOP information to retrieve relevant knowledge for user questions, thereby improving the reliability of the generated results of large language models. To evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method, this study constructed a test set containing 20 AOP-related question answering tasks, covering KE identification, upstream and downstream KE retrieval, and complex AOP retrieval tasks. Experiments were conducted on three mainstream large language models, Gemini, DeepSeek, and ChatGPT, and comparative tests were performed under two settings: without RAG and with RAG. The experimental results show that, without using RAG, the accuracies of GPT, DeepSeek, and Gemini were 15.0\%, 35.0\%, and 20.0\%, respectively; after using RAG, their accuracies increased to 95.0\%, 100.0\%, and 95.0\%, respectively. The results indicate that AOP-Smart can significantly alleviate the hallucination problem of large language models in AOP knowledge tasks, and greatly improve the accuracy and consistency of their answers.

analysis.tldr: 提出AOP-Smart框架，通过RAG增强LLM在毒理学不良结局路径分析中的准确性，实验显示准确率从15-35%提升至95-100%。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在毒理学AOP问答中存在幻觉问题，生成内容可能不准确或缺乏证据，限制了其可靠性。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM在AOP知识任务中的幻觉问题，提高回答的准确性和一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 未使用RAG时，GPT、DeepSeek、Gemini的准确率分别仅为15.0%、35.0%、20.0%，表明LLM在AOP任务中幻觉严重。
analysis.method: 基于AOP-Wiki的官方XML数据，构建包含KE、KER和特定AOP信息的检索库，通过RAG为LLM提供相关上下文知识。
contributions: 提出AOP-Smart框架，将RAG应用于AOP分析，显著缓解LLM幻觉问题。
构建包含20个AOP问答任务的测试集，涵盖KE识别、上下游KE检索和复杂AOP检索。
在三个主流LLM上验证，RAG使准确率从15-35%提升至95-100%。
analysis.experiments: 在Gemini、DeepSeek、ChatGPT三个模型上，对比无RAG和有RAG设置，测试集含20个AOP问答任务。
limitations: 测试集规模较小（20个任务），可能不足以全面评估。
仅基于AOP-Wiki数据，未考虑其他AOP来源或动态更新。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AOP-Smart框架，通过RAG增强LLM在毒理学不良结局路径分析中的准确性，实验显示准确率从15-35%提升至95-100%。

papers.title: A Quantitative Definition of Intelligence
papers.abstract: We propose an operational, quantitative definition of intelligence for arbitrary physical systems. The intelligence density of a system is the ratio of the logarithm of its independent outputs to its total description length. A system memorizes if its description length grows with its output count; it knows if its description length remains fixed while its output count diverges. The criterion for knowing is generalization. A system knows its domain if a single finite mechanism can produce correct outputs across an unbounded range of inputs, rather than storing each answer individually. The definition places intelligence on a substrate-independent continuum from logic gates to brains. We then argue that meaning over a domain is a selection and ordering of functions that produces correct outputs where correctness is specifiable. We also define a measure of contextuality of an output as the inverse of its conditional Kolmogorov complexity given the context of prior outputs, which unifies correctness and independence into a single condition. Together, these refute Searle's third premise, that syntax is insufficient for semantics, over any domain where correctness is specifiable.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于描述长度和输出独立性的智能密度量化定义，将智能视为物理系统的连续谱。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能定义模糊、依赖人类主观判断，缺乏可操作、可量化的统一标准，难以比较不同系统的智能水平。
analysis.problem: 如何为任意物理系统给出一个操作性的、定量的智能定义，并区分记忆与知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式。
analysis.method: 定义智能密度为系统独立输出对数与总描述长度之比；通过描述长度是否随输出数量增长区分记忆与知识；用条件Kolmogorov复杂度定义输出的上下文性。
contributions: 提出智能密度的量化定义，将智能置于从逻辑门到大脑的连续谱上。
给出记忆与知识的区分标准，并论证知识对应泛化。
定义上下文性度量，统一正确性与独立性，反驳Searle的“语法不足以产生语义”论点。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 定义依赖描述长度和独立输出的精确计算，实际中可能难以测量。
仅适用于正确性可指定的领域，对开放性问题可能不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于描述长度和输出独立性的智能密度量化定义，将智能视为物理系统的连续谱。

papers.title: Beyond Statistical Co-occurrence: Unlocking Intrinsic Semantics for Tabular Data Clustering
papers.abstract: Deep Clustering (DC) has emerged as a powerful tool for tabular data analysis in real-world domains like finance and healthcare. However, most existing methods rely on data-level statistical co-occurrence to infer the latent metric space, often overlooking the intrinsic semantic knowledge encapsulated in feature names and values. As a result, semantically related concepts like `Flu' and `Cold' are often treated as symbolic tokens, causing conceptually related samples to be isolated. To bridge the gap between dataset-specific statistics and intrinsic semantic knowledge, this paper proposes Tabular-Augmented Contrastive Clustering (TagCC), a novel framework that anchors statistical tabular representations to open-world textual concepts. Specifically, TagCC utilizes Large Language Models (LLMs) to distill underlying data semantics into textual anchors via semantic-aware transformation. Through Contrastive Learning (CL), the framework enriches the statistical tabular representations with the open-world semantics encapsulated in these anchors. This CL framework is jointly optimized with a clustering objective, ensuring that the learned representations are both semantically coherent and clustering-friendly. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that TagCC significantly outperforms its counterparts.

analysis.tldr: 提出TagCC框架，利用LLM将表格数据统计表示与开放世界语义对齐，提升聚类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度聚类方法依赖数据级统计共现，忽略特征名和值中的内在语义，导致语义相关概念（如'Flu'和'Cold'）被孤立处理。
analysis.problem: 如何将数据集特定的统计表示与开放世界文本语义知识结合，以提升表格数据聚类的语义一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法将语义相关概念视为符号标记，导致概念相关样本被隔离，缺乏语义感知。
analysis.method: 提出Tabular-Augmented Contrastive Clustering (TagCC)，利用LLM通过语义感知变换将数据语义蒸馏为文本锚点，通过对比学习丰富统计表示，并与聚类目标联合优化。
contributions: 提出TagCC框架，首次将LLM引入表格数据聚类以注入开放世界语义。
设计语义感知变换和对比学习机制，实现统计表示与语义锚点的对齐。
在基准数据集上显著优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在基准数据集上进行实验，TagCC显著优于对比方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 依赖LLM的语义提取质量，可能受限于LLM的领域知识。
对比学习框架可能对锚点选择敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TagCC框架，利用LLM将表格数据统计表示与开放世界语义对齐，提升聚类性能。

papers.title: LRD-Net: A Lightweight Real-Centered Detection Network for Cross-Domain Face Forgery Detection
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of diffusion-based generative models has made face forgery detection a critical challenge in digital forensics. Current detection methods face two fundamental limitations: poor cross-domain generalization when encountering unseen forgery types, and substantial computational overhead that hinders deployment on resource-constrained devices. We propose LRD-Net (Lightweight Real-centered Detection Network), a novel framework that addresses both challenges simultaneously. Unlike existing dual-branch approaches that process spatial and frequency information independently, LRD-Net adopts a sequential frequency-guided architecture where a lightweight Multi-Scale Wavelet Guidance Module generates attention signals that condition a MobileNetV3-based spatial backbone. This design enables effective exploitation of frequency-domain cues while avoiding the redundancy of parallel feature extraction. Furthermore, LRD-Net employs a real-centered learning strategy with exponential moving average prototype updates and drift regularization, anchoring representations around authentic facial images rather than modeling diverse forgery patterns. Extensive experiments on the DiFF benchmark demonstrate that LRD-Net achieves state-of-the-art cross-domain detection accuracy, consistently outperforming existing methods. Critically, LRD-Net accomplishes this with only 2.63M parameters - approximately 9x fewer than conventional approaches - while achieving over 8x faster training and nearly 10x faster inference. These results demonstrate that robust cross-domain face forgery detection can be achieved without sacrificing computational efficiency, making LRD-Net suitable for real-time deployment in mobile authentication systems and resource-constrained environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级真实中心检测网络LRD-Net，通过顺序频率引导架构和真实中心学习策略，实现高效跨域人脸伪造检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散生成模型快速发展使人脸伪造检测成为数字取证关键挑战，现有方法存在跨域泛化差和计算开销大的问题，难以部署在资源受限设备上。
analysis.problem: 解决人脸伪造检测中跨域泛化能力不足和计算效率低下的双重问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LRD-Net，采用顺序频率引导架构（轻量级多尺度小波引导模块生成注意力信号，调节MobileNetV3空间骨干网络）和真实中心学习策略（指数移动平均原型更新和漂移正则化），以真实人脸图像为中心进行表征学习。
contributions: 提出顺序频率引导架构，避免并行特征提取冗余，有效利用频域线索。
设计真实中心学习策略，通过原型更新和漂移正则化提升跨域泛化能力。
实现仅2.63M参数、8倍以上训练加速和近10倍推理加速，同时保持SOTA跨域检测精度。
analysis.experiments: 在DiFF基准上实验，LRD-Net在跨域检测精度上持续优于现有方法，参数减少约9倍，训练速度提升8倍以上，推理速度提升近10倍。
limitations: 可能对特定伪造类型（如高保真深度伪造）的检测效果未充分验证。
真实中心学习策略在极端光照或遮挡条件下可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级真实中心检测网络LRD-Net，通过顺序频率引导架构和真实中心学习策略，实现高效跨域人脸伪造检测。

papers.title: The Effect of Document Selection on Query-focused Text Analysis
papers.abstract: Analyses of document collections often require selecting what data to analyze, as not all documents are relevant to a particular research question and computational constraints preclude analyzing all documents, yet little work has examined effects of selection strategy choices. We systematically evaluate seven selection methods (from random selection to hybrid retrieval) on outputs from four text analyses methods (LDA, BERTopic, TopicGPT, HiCode) over two datasets with 26 open-ended queries. Our evaluation reveals practice guidance: semantic or hybrid retrieval offer strong go-to approaches that avoid the pitfalls of weaker selection strategies and the unnecessary compute overhead of more complicated ones. Overall, our evaluation framework establishes data selection as a methodological decision, rather than a practical necessity, inviting the development of new strategies.

analysis.tldr: 系统评估文档选择策略对查询聚焦文本分析的影响，发现语义或混合检索是稳健且高效的方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 文档分析中数据选择策略的影响未被充分研究，而实际中常需选择相关文档。
analysis.problem: 不同文档选择方法如何影响查询聚焦文本分析的结果，缺乏系统性评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 弱选择策略（如随机）导致分析质量下降，而复杂方法（如全检索）带来不必要的计算开销。
analysis.main_method: 在26个开放查询上，系统比较7种选择方法（从随机到混合检索）对4种文本分析方法（LDA、BERTopic、TopicGPT、HiCode）的影响。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用两个数据集，评估选择方法在主题一致性和相关性上的表现，语义和混合检索表现最佳。
analysis.contributions: 建立数据选择作为方法论决策的评估框架，提供实践指南，推动新策略开发。
analysis.limitations: 仅评估有限的分析方法和数据集，未覆盖所有实际场景。

papers.title: SOLARIS: Speculative Offloading of Latent-bAsed Representation for Inference Scaling
papers.abstract: Recent advances in recommendation scaling laws have led to foundation models of unprecedented complexity. While these models offer superior performance, their computational demands make real-time serving impractical, often forcing practitioners to rely on knowledge distillation-compromising serving quality for efficiency. To address this challenge, we present SOLARIS (Speculative Offloading of Latent-bAsed Representation for Inference Scaling), a novel framework inspired by speculative decoding. SOLARIS proactively precomputes user-item interaction embeddings by predicting which user-item pairs are likely to appear in future requests, and asynchronously generating their foundation model representations ahead of time. This approach decouples the costly foundation model inference from the latency-critical serving path, enabling real-time knowledge transfer from models previously considered too expensive for online use. Deployed across Meta's advertising system serving billions of daily requests, SOLARIS achieves 0.67% revenue-driving top-line metrics gain, demonstrating its effectiveness at scale.

analysis.tldr: 提出SOLARIS框架，通过投机性预计算用户-物品交互嵌入，将昂贵的基础模型推理从延迟关键路径解耦，实现实时推荐服务。
analysis.research_motivation: 推荐基础模型计算成本高，实时服务困难，现有知识蒸馏方法牺牲服务质量换取效率。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲服务质量的前提下，将复杂基础模型用于实时推荐系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 推荐系统中用户-物品交互存在可预测模式，允许提前预计算嵌入以隐藏推理延迟。
analysis.main_method: 投机性预计算：预测未来请求中可能出现的用户-物品对，异步生成其基础模型表示，将推理与在线服务解耦。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Meta广告系统中部署，服务数十亿日请求，实现0.67%的收入驱动指标提升。
analysis.contributions: 提出投机性卸载框架，首次将投机解码思想用于推荐系统，并在大规模工业系统中验证有效性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖预测准确性，预测错误可能导致计算浪费；未讨论冷启动或长尾场景的适应性。

papers.title: Learning Probabilistic Responsibility Allocations for Multi-Agent Interactions
papers.abstract: Human behavior in interactive settings is shaped not only by individual objectives but also by shared constraints with others, such as safety. Understanding how people allocate responsibility, i.e., how much one deviates from their desired policy to accommodate others, can inform the design of socially compliant and trustworthy autonomous systems. In this work, we introduce a method for learning a probabilistic responsibility allocation model that captures the multimodal uncertainty inherent in multi-agent interactions. Specifically, our approach leverages the latent space of a conditional variational autoencoder, combined with techniques from multi-agent trajectory forecasting, to learn a distribution over responsibility allocations conditioned on scene and agent context. Although ground-truth responsibility labels are unavailable, the model remains tractable by incorporating a differentiable optimization layer that maps responsibility allocations to induced controls, which are available. We evaluate our method on the INTERACTION driving dataset and demonstrate that it not only achieves strong predictive performance but also provides interpretable insights, through the lens of responsibility, into patterns of multi-agent interaction.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种概率责任分配模型，利用条件变分自编码器学习多智能体交互中的责任分配分布，并在驾驶数据集上验证其预测与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解人类在交互中如何分配责任（即偏离自身策略以迁就他人的程度）有助于设计社会合规且可信的自主系统。
analysis.problem: 多智能体交互中责任分配具有多模态不确定性，且缺乏真实责任标签，难以直接学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类行为不仅受个体目标影响，还受共享约束（如安全）塑造，责任分配反映了这种权衡。
analysis.main_method: 利用条件变分自编码器的潜空间，结合多智能体轨迹预测技术，学习以场景和智能体上下文为条件的责任分配分布；通过可微优化层将责任分配映射到可观测的控制量。
analysis.key_experiments: 在INTERACTION驾驶数据集上评估，展示了强预测性能，并通过责任视角提供了多智能体交互模式的可解释洞察。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出概率责任分配模型，无需真实标签即可学习，兼具预测准确性与可解释性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖可微优化层，可能限制复杂场景的扩展性；仅在驾驶数据集验证，泛化性待考。

papers.title: A Nonparametric Adaptive EWMA Control Chart for Binary Monitoring of Multiple Stream Processes
papers.abstract: Monitoring binomial proportions across multiple independent streams is a critical challenge in Statistical Process Control (SPC), with applications from manufacturing to cybersecurity. While EWMA charts offer sensitivity to small shifts, existing implementations rely on asymptotic variance approximations that fail during early-phase monitoring. We introduce a Cumulative Standardized Binomial EWMA (CSB-EWMA) chart that overcomes this limitation by deriving the exact time-varying variance of the EWMA statistic for binary multiple-stream data, enabling adaptive control limits that ensure statistical rigor from the first sample. Through extensive simulations, we identify optimal smoothing ({\lambda}) and limit (L) parameters to achieve target in-control average run length (ARL0) of 370 and 500. The CSB-EWMA chart demonstrates rapid shift detection across both ARL0 targets, with out-of-control average run length (ARL1) dropping to 3-7 samples for moderate shifts ({\delta}=0.2), and exhibits exceptional robustness across different data distributions, with low ARL1 Coefficients of Variation (CV < 0.10 for small shifts) for both ARL0 = 370 and 500. This work provides practitioners with a distribution-free, sensitive, and theoretically sound tool for early change detection in binomial multiple-stream processes.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种非参数自适应EWMA控制图，用于二项多流过程监控，通过精确时变方差实现早期小偏移检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有EWMA控制图依赖渐近方差近似，在早期监控阶段失效，需要更精确的方法。
analysis.problem: 解决二项多流过程中早期小偏移检测的统计精度问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 渐近方差近似在样本量小时导致控制限不准确，影响早期检测性能。
analysis.main_method: 提出累积标准化二项EWMA（CSB-EWMA）图，推导EWMA统计量的精确时变方差，并采用自适应控制限。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过仿真优化平滑参数λ和限值L，实现目标平均运行长度ARL0=370和500，检测中等偏移时ARL1降至3-7样本。
analysis.contributions: 提供无分布假设、高灵敏度且理论严谨的工具，适用于二项多流过程的早期变化检测。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论高维流数或非平稳环境下的性能，参数优化依赖仿真。

papers.title: Parametric Interpolation of Dynamic Mode Decomposition for Predicting Nonlinear Systems
papers.abstract: We present parameter-interpolated dynamic mode decomposition (piDMD), a parametric reduced-order modeling framework that embeds known parameter-affine structure directly into the DMD regression step. Unlike existing parametric DMD methods which interpolate modes, eigenvalues, or reduced operators and can be fragile with sparse training data or multi-dimensional parameter spaces, piDMD learns a single parameter-affine Koopman surrogate reduced order model (ROM) across multiple training parameter samples and predicts at unseen parameter values without retraining. We validate piDMD on fluid flow past a cylinder, electron beam oscillations in transverse magnetic fields, and virtual cathode oscillations -- the latter two being simulated using an electromagnetic particle-in-cell (EMPIC) method. Across all benchmarks, piDMD achieves accurate long-horizon predictions and improved robustness over state-of-the-art interpolation-based parametric DMD baselines, with less training samples and with multi-dimensional parameter spaces.

analysis.tldr: 提出参数插值动态模式分解（piDMD），通过嵌入参数仿射结构实现非线性系统的参数化降阶建模，无需重新训练即可预测新参数下的系统行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有参数化DMD方法在稀疏训练数据或多维参数空间中表现脆弱，需要更鲁棒且高效的参数化降阶模型。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练的情况下，准确预测非线性系统在不同参数下的动态行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统插值方法对训练数据密度敏感，且难以处理多维参数空间中的非线性耦合效应。
analysis.main_method: 在DMD回归步骤中嵌入已知的参数仿射结构，学习单一参数仿射Koopman替代降阶模型。
analysis.key_experiments: 在圆柱绕流、电子束振荡和虚阴极振荡三个基准上验证，使用电磁粒子网格法模拟后两者。
analysis.contributions: 提出piDMD框架，在减少训练样本的同时实现更准确的长时预测，并提升对多维参数空间的鲁棒性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖参数仿射结构的先验知识，可能不适用于参数与系统动态呈高度非线性关系的情况。

papers.title: Generalization Guarantees on Data-Driven Tuning of Gradient Descent with Langevin Updates
papers.abstract: We study learning to learn for regression problems through the lens of hyperparameter tuning. We propose the Langevin Gradient Descent Algorithm (LGD), which approximates the mean of the posterior distribution defined by the loss function and regularizer of a convex regression task. We prove the existence of an optimal hyperparameter configuration for which the LGD algorithm achieves the Bayes' optimal solution for squared loss. Subsequently, we study generalization guarantees on meta-learning optimal hyperparameters for the LGD algorithm from a given set of tasks in the data-driven setting. For a number of parameters $d$ and hyperparameter dimension $h$, we show a pseudo-dimension bound of $O(dh)$, upto logarithmic terms under mild assumptions on LGD. This matches the dimensional dependence of the bounds obtained in prior work for the elastic net, which only allows for $h=2$ hyperparameters, and extends their bounds to regression on convex loss. Finally, we show empirical evidence of the success of LGD and the meta-learning procedure for few-shot learning on linear regression using a few synthetically created datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出Langevin梯度下降算法（LGD）用于凸回归，证明其最优超参数可达贝叶斯最优解，并给出元学习的泛化保证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有超参数调优方法缺乏理论保证，尤其是对梯度下降类算法的泛化分析不足。
analysis.problem: 如何为基于Langevin更新的梯度下降算法提供数据驱动的超参数调优的泛化保证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LGD算法通过近似后验均值，其最优超参数配置能实现平方损失下的贝叶斯最优解，且伪维度界与弹性网匹配。
analysis.main_method: 提出LGD算法，结合Langevin动力学更新梯度下降，并基于元学习从任务集合中学习最优超参数。
analysis.key_experiments: 在合成数据集上进行少样本线性回归实验，验证LGD和元学习过程的有效性。
analysis.contributions: 首次为Langevin梯度下降算法建立数据驱动超参数调优的泛化界，扩展了弹性网的界到凸损失回归。
analysis.limitations: 实验仅基于合成数据，未在真实复杂任务上验证；理论假设较强，可能限制实际应用。

papers.title: Robust Optimization for Mitigating Reward Hacking with Correlated Proxies
papers.abstract: Designing robust reinforcement learning (RL) agents in the presence of imperfect reward signals remains a core challenge. In practice, agents are often trained with proxy rewards that only approximate the true objective, leaving them vulnerable to reward hacking, where high proxy returns arise from unintended or exploitative behaviors. Recent work formalizes this issue using r-correlation between proxy and true rewards, but existing methods like occupancy-regularized policy optimization (ORPO) optimize against a fixed proxy and do not provide strong guarantees against broader classes of correlated proxies. In this work, we formulate reward hacking as a robust policy optimization problem over the space of all r-correlated proxy rewards. We derive a tractable max-min formulation, where the agent maximizes performance under the worst-case proxy consistent with the correlation constraint. We further show that when the reward is a linear function of known features, our approach can be adapted to incorporate this prior knowledge, yielding both improved policies and interpretable worst-case rewards. Experiments across several environments show that our algorithms consistently outperform ORPO in worst-case returns, and offer improved robustness and stability across different levels of proxy-true reward correlation. These results show that our approach provides both robustness and transparency in settings where reward design is inherently uncertain. The code is available at https://github.com/ZixuanLiu4869/reward_hacking.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种鲁棒优化方法，通过考虑所有相关代理奖励的最坏情况，缓解强化学习中的奖励黑客问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法如ORPO针对固定代理奖励优化，无法应对更广泛的相关代理奖励类别，缺乏鲁棒性保证。
analysis.problem: 代理奖励与真实奖励存在相关性时，智能体可能利用代理奖励的漏洞进行奖励黑客，导致高代理回报但低真实性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 代理奖励与真实奖励之间的r-相关性约束下，智能体可能通过非预期行为获得高代理回报，而真实性能下降。
analysis.main_method: 将奖励黑客问题形式化为在r-相关代理奖励空间上的鲁棒策略优化，推导出可解的max-min优化公式，并扩展至线性奖励函数场景。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个环境中对比ORPO，显示所提算法在最坏情况回报上持续优于ORPO，且在不同相关性水平下具有更好的鲁棒性和稳定性。
analysis.contributions: 首次将奖励黑客问题建模为相关代理奖励空间上的鲁棒优化，提供可解公式；引入线性奖励先验提升策略和可解释性。
analysis.limitations: 假设代理奖励与真实奖励的相关性已知或可估计，实际中可能难以精确获取；线性奖励假设可能限制泛化性。

papers.title: Temporal Flattening in LLM-Generated Text: Comparing Human and LLM Writing Trajectories
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in daily applications, from content generation to code writing, where each interaction treats the model as stateless, generating responses independently without memory. Yet human writing is inherently longitudinal: authors' styles and cognitive states evolve across months and years. This raises a central question: can LLMs reproduce such temporal structure across extended time periods? We construct and publicly release a longitudinal dataset of 412 human authors and 6,086 documents spanning 2012--2024 across three domains (academic abstracts, blogs, news) and compare them to trajectories generated by three representative LLMs under standard and history-conditioned generation settings. Using drift and variance-based metrics over semantic, lexical, and cognitive-emotional representations, we find temporal flattening in LLM-generated text. LLMs produce greater lexical diversity but exhibit substantially reduced semantic and cognitive-emotional drift relative to humans. These differences are highly predictive: temporal variability patterns alone achieve 94% accuracy and 98% ROC-AUC in distinguishing human from LLM trajectories. Our results demonstrate that temporal flattening persists regardless of whether LLMs generate independently or with access to incremental history, revealing a fundamental property of current deployment paradigms. This gap has direct implications for applications requiring authentic temporal structure, such as synthetic training data and longitudinal text modeling.

analysis.tldr: LLM生成文本存在时间扁平化现象，即语义和认知情感漂移显著低于人类，且该现象不随历史条件生成而改变。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类写作具有纵向时间演化特征，而LLM通常以无状态方式生成文本，因此需要探究LLM能否复现人类写作的时间结构。
analysis.problem: LLM生成文本是否能够模拟人类作者在长时间跨度下的语义、词汇和认知情感演化模式？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM生成文本的词汇多样性更高，但语义和认知情感漂移显著低于人类，表现出时间扁平化特征，且该现象在独立生成和历史条件生成下均存在。
analysis.main_method: 构建包含412位人类作者、6086篇文档的纵向数据集（2012-2024），使用漂移和方差指标比较人类与三种LLM在语义、词汇和认知情感表示上的时间轨迹。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过时间变异模式区分人类与LLM轨迹，达到94%准确率和98% ROC-AUC；对比标准生成与历史条件生成设置。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统揭示LLM生成文本的时间扁平化现象，证明其独立于生成设置，并提供公开纵向数据集。
analysis.limitations: 仅覆盖三个领域（学术摘要、博客、新闻），未探索其他文本类型或更长时间跨度。

papers.title: XANE(3): An E(3)-Equivariant Graph Neural Network for Accurate Prediction of XANES Spectra from Atomic Structures
papers.abstract: We present XANE(3), a physics-based E(3)-equivariant graph neural network for predicting X-ray absorption near-edge structure (XANES) spectra directly from atomic structures. The model combines tensor-product message passing with spherical harmonic edge features, absorber-query attention pooling, custom equivariant layer normalization, adaptive gated residual connections, and a spectral readout based on a multi-scale Gaussian basis with an optional sigmoidal background term. To improve line-shape fidelity, training is performed with a composite objective that includes pointwise spectral reconstruction together with first- and second-derivative matching terms. We evaluate the model on a dataset of 5,941 FDMNES simulations of iron oxide surface facets and obtain a spectrum mean squared error of $1.0 \times 10^{-3}$ on the test set. The model accurately reproduces the main edge structure, relative peak intensities, pre-edge features, and post-edge oscillations. Ablation studies show that the derivative-aware objective, custom equivariant normalization, absorber-conditioned attention pooling, adaptive gated residual mixing, and global background term each improve performance. Interestingly, a capacity-matched scalar-only variant achieves comparable pointwise reconstruction error but reduced derivative-level fidelity, indicating that explicit tensorial channels are not strictly required for low intensity error on this dataset, although they remain beneficial for capturing finer spectral structure. These results establish XANE(3) as an accurate and efficient surrogate for XANES simulation and offer a promising route toward accelerated spectral prediction, ML-assisted spectroscopy, and data-driven materials discovery.

analysis.tldr: 提出E(3)-等变图神经网络XANE(3)，直接从原子结构高精度预测XANES光谱，在铁氧化物数据集上均方误差达1.0×10⁻³。
analysis.research_motivation: XANES光谱模拟计算成本高，亟需高效准确的替代方法以加速材料光谱预测与发现。
analysis.problem: 如何从原子结构直接、准确地预测XANES光谱，同时保持对精细谱线结构的捕捉能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标量模型虽能达到相近的点态误差，但在导数级保真度上表现较差，表明显式张量通道对捕捉精细谱结构仍有优势。
analysis.main_method: 结合张量积消息传递、球谐边特征、吸收体查询注意力池化、等变层归一化、自适应门控残差连接，以及基于多尺度高斯基的谱读出和导数感知复合损失函数。
analysis.key_experiments: 在5,941个FDMNES模拟的铁氧化物表面数据集上测试，获得1.0×10⁻³的均方误差，并通过消融实验验证各组件贡献。
analysis.contributions: 提出了首个E(3)-等变图神经网络用于XANES预测，设计了导数感知损失和多种等变模块，实现了高精度且高效的谱模拟。
analysis.limitations: 仅在铁氧化物数据集上验证，泛化性未知；标量变体在点态误差上表现相当，暗示张量通道的收益可能依赖数据特性。

papers.title: When Self-Reference Fails to Close: Matrix-Level Dynamics in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: We investigate how self-referential inputs alter the internal matrix dynamics of large language models. Measuring 106 scalar metrics across up to 7 analysis passes on four models from three architecture families -- Qwen3-VL-8B, Llama-3.2-11B, Llama-3.3-70B, and Gemma-2-9B -- over 300 prompts in a 14-level hierarchy at three temperatures ($T \in \{0.0, 0.3, 0.7\}$), we find that self-reference alone is not destabilizing: grounded self-referential statements and meta-cognitive prompts are markedly more stable than paradoxical self-reference on key collapse-related metrics, and on several such metrics can be as stable as factual controls. Instability concentrates in prompts inducing non-closing truth recursion (NCTR) -- truth-value computations with no finite-depth resolution. NCTR prompts produce anomalously elevated attention effective rank -- indicating attention reorganization with global dispersion rather than simple concentration collapse -- and key metrics reach Cohen's $d = 3.14$ (attention effective rank) to $3.52$ (variance kurtosis) vs. stable self-reference in the 70B model; 281/397 metric-model combinations differentiate NCTR from stable self-reference after FDR correction ($q < 0.05$), 198 with $|d| > 0.8$. Per-layer SVD confirms disruption at every sampled layer ($d > +1.0$ in all three models analyzed), ruling out aggregation artifacts. A classifier achieves AUC $0.81$-$0.90$; 30 minimal pairs yield 42/387 significant combinations; 43/106 metrics replicate across all four models. We connect these observations to three classical matrix-semigroup problems and propose, as a conjecture, that NCTR forces finite-depth transformers toward dynamical regimes where these problems concentrate. NCTR prompts also produce elevated contradictory output ($+34$-$56$ percentage points vs. controls), suggesting practical relevance for understanding self-referential failure modes.

analysis.tldr: 自指输入不必然导致LLM不稳定，只有非闭合真值递归（NCTR）会引发矩阵级动态紊乱，表现为注意力有效秩异常升高和输出矛盾增加。
analysis.research_motivation: 探究自指输入如何改变大语言模型的内部矩阵动态，特别是区分稳定自指与不稳定自指的根本机制。
analysis.problem: 自指输入是否以及如何导致LLM内部动态不稳定？哪些自指类型会引发系统性问题？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非闭合真值递归（NCTR）导致注意力有效秩异常升高（Cohen's d=3.14），表明注意力发生全局分散而非简单坍缩；稳定自指与事实控制一样稳定。
analysis.main_method: 在4个模型上测量106个标量指标，通过14级层次化提示和3种温度设置，对比稳定自指、NCTR和事实控制，结合SVD逐层分析和分类器验证。
analysis.key_experiments: 70B模型上NCTR与稳定自指的Cohen's d达3.14-3.52；281/397指标组合显著区分NCTR；30个最小对中42/387组合显著；43/106指标跨4模型复现。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统区分稳定自指与NCTR对LLM内部动态的不同影响，揭示NCTR引发注意力全局分散和输出矛盾增加的机制，并连接至经典矩阵半群问题。
analysis.limitations: 仅分析3种架构4个模型，未覆盖更大规模或不同训练策略的模型；NCTR的理论连接仍为猜想，缺乏严格证明。

papers.title: Think Through Uncertainty: Improving Long-Form Generation Factuality via Reasoning Calibration
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often hallucinate in long-form generation. Existing approaches mainly improve factuality through post-hoc revision or reinforcement learning (RL) with correctness-based rewards, but they do not teach the model to estimate which parts of its generation are reliable. As a result, models may still state incorrect claims confidently in their responses. Recent advances in reasoning have significantly improved LLM performance, and have been leveraged to estimate confidence by incorporating calibration into RL objectives. However, existing approaches remain limited to a single scalar confidence for the entire response, which is insufficient for long-form generation where uncertainty varies across individual claims. To mitigate this problem, we propose CURE, a framework that improves long-form factuality by teaching LLMs to reason about uncertainty at the claim level. We first introduce a Claim-Aware Reasoning Protocol, which structures outputs into atomic claims paired with explicit confidence estimates. We then develop a multi-stage training pipeline that aligns model confidence with claims' correctness and then optimizes on factuality. The resulting calibrated confidence further enables selective prediction, allowing the model to abstain from uncertain claims at inference time. Experiments on four long-form factuality benchmarks show that CURE consistently improves factual accuracy over competitive supervised and RL baselines, while maintaining factual recall. In particular, it improves claim-level accuracy by up to 39.9% on Biography generation. These gains are accompanied by improved calibration, as reflected by a 16.0% increase in AUROC on FactBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出 CURE 框架，通过推理校准让 LLM 在长文本生成中逐声明估计不确定性，提升事实准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法未教会模型评估生成内容的可靠性，导致模型自信地输出错误声明。
analysis.problem: 长文本生成中模型幻觉问题，且现有校准方法仅提供整体置信度，无法捕捉声明级不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在长文本中不同声明的可靠性差异大，整体置信度不足以反映局部不确定性。
analysis.main_method: 提出声明感知推理协议，将输出分解为原子声明并附带置信度估计；通过多阶段训练对齐置信度与正确性，并优化事实性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在四个长文本事实性基准上测试，Biography 生成中声明级准确率提升 39.9%，FactBench 上 AUROC 提升 16.0%。
analysis.contributions: 首次在长文本生成中实现声明级不确定性推理与校准，并支持选择性预测。
analysis.limitations: 依赖原子声明分解的准确性，可能增加计算开销。

papers.title: Robust Reasoning and Learning with Brain-Inspired Representations under Hardware-Induced Nonlinearities
papers.abstract: Traditional machine learning depends on high-precision arithmetic and near-ideal hardware assumptions, which is increasingly challenged by variability in aggressively scaled semiconductor devices. Compute-in-memory (CIM) architectures alleviate data-movement bottlenecks and improve energy efficiency yet introduce nonlinear distortions and reliability concerns. We address these issues with a hardware-aware optimization framework based on Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC), systematically compensating for non-ideal similarity computations in CIM. Our approach formulates encoding as an optimization problem, minimizing the Frobenius norm between an ideal kernel and its hardware-constrained counterpart, and employs a joint optimization strategy for end-to-end calibration of hypervector representations. Experimental results demonstrate that our method when applied to QuantHD achieves 84\% accuracy under severe hardware-induced perturbations, a 48\% increase over naive QuantHD under the same conditions. Additionally, our optimization is vital for graph-based HDC reliant on precise variable-binding for interpretable reasoning. Our framework preserves the accuracy of RelHD on the Cora dataset, achieving a 5.4$\times$ accuracy improvement over naive RelHD under nonlinear environments. By preserving HDC's robustness and symbolic properties, our solution enables scalable, energy-efficient intelligent systems capable of classification and reasoning on emerging CIM hardware.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于超维计算的硬件感知优化框架，补偿存内计算中的非线性失真，显著提升分类与推理精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统机器学习依赖高精度算术和理想硬件，但半导体器件变异性带来挑战；存内计算虽能效高却引入非线性失真和可靠性问题。
analysis.problem: 存内计算硬件中的非线性失真导致相似度计算不准确，影响超维计算模型的分类与推理性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 硬件非线性使超向量表示偏离理想核矩阵，导致精度大幅下降（如QuantHD在扰动下仅36%），但通过优化可恢复鲁棒性。
analysis.main_method: 将编码形式化为优化问题，最小化理想核与硬件约束核的Frobenius范数，并采用联合优化策略端到端校准超向量表示。
analysis.key_experiments: 在QuantHD上实现84%精度（提升48%），在RelHD的Cora数据集上实现5.4倍精度提升。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个针对CIM非线性失真的HDC优化框架，同时保持超维计算的鲁棒性和符号推理能力。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论优化计算开销及对更复杂硬件非线性的泛化性。

papers.title: LoSA: Locality Aware Sparse Attention for Block-Wise Diffusion Language Models
papers.abstract: Block-wise diffusion language models (DLMs) generate multiple tokens in any order, offering a promising alternative to the autoregressive decoding pipeline. However, they still remain bottlenecked by memory-bound attention in long-context scenarios. Naive sparse attention fails on DLMs due to a KV Inflation problem, where different queries select different prefix positions, making the union of accessed KV pages large. To address this, we observe that between consecutive denoising steps, only a small fraction of active tokens exhibit significant hidden-state changes, while the majority of stable tokens remain nearly constant. Based on this insight, we propose LOSA (Locality-aware Sparse Attention), which reuses cached prefix-attention results for stable tokens and applies sparse attention only to active tokens. This substantially shrinks the number of KV indices that must be loaded, yielding both higher speedup and higher accuracy. Across multiple block-wise DLMs and benchmarks, LOSA preserves near-dense accuracy while significantly improving efficiency, achieving up to +9 points in average accuracy at aggressive sparsity levels while maintaining 1.54x lower attention density. It also achieves up to 4.14x attention speedup on RTX A6000 GPUs, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed method.

analysis.tldr: 提出 LoSA 方法，利用去噪步骤中活跃令牌的稀疏性，加速块状扩散语言模型的长上下文注意力计算。
analysis.research_motivation: 块状扩散语言模型在长上下文场景中受限于内存绑定的注意力机制，而朴素稀疏注意力因 KV 膨胀问题失效，亟需高效且准确的稀疏注意力方法。
analysis.problem: 块状扩散语言模型中，不同查询选择不同前缀位置导致 KV 页面联合访问量过大（KV 膨胀问题），使得朴素稀疏注意力无法有效加速。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 连续去噪步骤间，仅少数活跃令牌的隐藏状态显著变化，大部分稳定令牌几乎不变，这为选择性重用缓存提供了基础。
analysis.main_method: LoSA 对稳定令牌重用缓存的注意力结果，仅对活跃令牌应用稀疏注意力，从而大幅减少需加载的 KV 索引数量。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个块状扩散语言模型和基准上测试，在激进稀疏度下平均准确率提升最多 9 点，注意力密度降低 1.54 倍，在 RTX A6000 GPU 上实现最高 4.14 倍注意力加速。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了扩散模型中的令牌稳定性现象，并据此提出 LoSA 方法，在保持近密集准确率的同时显著提升效率。
analysis.limitations: 依赖去噪步骤中令牌稳定性的假设，可能不适用于所有扩散模型或任务；未讨论对训练阶段的影响。

papers.title: On the continuum limit of t-SNE for data visualization
authors: Jeff Calder and Zhonggan Huang and Ryan Murray and Adam Pickarski
papers.abstract: This work is concerned with the continuum limit of a graph-based data visualization technique called the t-Distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding (t-SNE), which is widely used for visualizing data in a variety of applications, but is still poorly understood from a theoretical standpoint. The t-SNE algorithm produces visualizations by minimizing the Kullback-Leibler divergence between similarity matrices representing the high dimensional data and its low dimensional representation. We prove that as the number of data points $n \to \infty$, after a natural rescaling and in applicable parameter regimes, the Kullback-Leibler divergence is consistent as the number of data points $n \to \infty$ and the similarity graph remains sparse with a continuum variational problem that involves a non-convex gradient regularization term and a penalty on the magnitude of the probability density function in the visualization space. These two terms represent the continuum limits of the attraction and repulsion forces in the t-SNE algorithm. Due to the lack of convexity in the continuum variational problem, the question of well-posedeness is only partially resolved. We show that when both dimensions are $1$, the problem admits a unique smooth minimizer, along with an infinite number of discontinuous minimizers (interpreted in a relaxed sense). This aligns well with the empirically observed ability of t-SNE to separate data in seemingly arbitrary ways in the visualization. The energy is also very closely related to the famously ill-posed Perona-Malik equation, which is used for denoising and simplifying images. We present numerical results validating the continuum limit, provide some preliminary results about the delicate nature of the limiting energetic problem in higher dimensions, and highlight several problems for future work.

analysis.tldr: 本文证明了t-SNE在数据点趋于无穷时的连续极限，揭示了其变分问题包含非凸梯度正则化和概率密度惩罚项。
analysis.research_motivation: t-SNE被广泛用于数据可视化，但其理论基础薄弱，缺乏对算法行为的严格理解。
analysis.problem: t-SNE算法在数据点数量趋于无穷时的连续极限行为及其变分问题的良定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: t-SNE的吸引和排斥力在连续极限下分别对应非凸梯度正则化和概率密度惩罚，导致能量非凸，与Perona-Malik方程相关。
analysis.main_method: 通过重缩放和稀疏图假设，将KL散度的连续极限转化为一个变分问题，并分析其最小化性质。
analysis.key_experiments: 数值实验验证了连续极限的正确性，并展示了高维情况下极限问题的复杂性。
analysis.contributions: 首次严格推导了t-SNE的连续极限，揭示了其与Perona-Malik方程的联系，并部分解决了良定性问题。
analysis.limitations: 高维情况下的良定性未完全解决，且分析限于特定参数范围。

papers.title: Empirical Evaluation of PDF Parsing and Chunking for Financial Question Answering with RAG
papers.abstract: PDF files are primarily intended for human reading rather than automated processing. In addition, the heterogeneous content of PDFs, such as text, tables, and images, poses significant challenges for parsing and information extraction. To address these difficulties, both practitioners and researchers are increasingly developing new methods, including the promising Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems to automated PDF processing. However, there is no comprehensive study investigating how different components and design choices affect the performance of a RAG system for understanding PDFs. In this paper, we propose such a study (1) by focusing on Question Answering, a specific language understanding task, and (2) by leveraging two benchmarks from the financial domain, including TableQuest, our newly generated, publicly available benchmark. We systematically examine multiple PDF parsers and chunking strategies (with varied overlap), along with their potential synergies in preserving document structure and ensuring answer correctness. Overall, our results offer practical guidelines for building robust RAG pipelines for PDF understanding.

analysis.tldr: 系统评估PDF解析与分块策略对金融领域RAG问答性能的影响，提供构建鲁棒管线的实践指南。
analysis.research_motivation: PDF内容异构性（文本、表格、图像）导致自动化处理困难，但缺乏对RAG系统组件设计选择的综合研究。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估不同PDF解析器和分块策略（含重叠参数）对RAG问答准确性的影响，并揭示其协同效应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 解析器与分块策略的协同作用显著影响文档结构保留和答案正确性，但现有研究未量化其交互效应。
analysis.main_method: 在金融领域两个基准（含新发布的TableQuest）上，系统比较多种PDF解析器和分块策略（不同重叠度）的组合性能。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用金融问答基准（含TableQuest）评估解析器×分块策略的交叉组合，测量文档结构保留率和答案正确性。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统量化解析器与分块策略的协同效应；发布TableQuest金融表格问答基准；提供RAG管线构建的实践指南。
analysis.limitations: 仅聚焦金融领域和问答任务，未覆盖其他领域或生成任务；未考虑图像解析与多模态分块。

papers.title: UCS: Estimating Unseen Coverage for Improved In-Context Learning
papers.abstract: In-context learning (ICL) performance depends critically on which demonstrations are placed in the prompt, yet most existing selectors prioritize heuristic notions of relevance or diversity and provide limited insight into the coverage of a demonstration set. We propose Unseen Coverage Selection (UKS), a training-free, subset-level coverage prior motivated by the principle that a good demonstration set should expose the model to latent cluster unrevealed by the currently selected subset. UCS operationalizes this idea by (1) inducing discrete latent clusters from model-consistent embeddings and (2) estimating the number of unrevealed clusters within a candidate subset via a Smoothed Good--Turing estimator from its empirical frequency spectrum. Unlike previous selection methods, UCS is coverage-based and training-free, and can be seamlessly combined with both query-dependent and query-independent selection baselines via a simple regularized objective. Experiments on multiple intent-classification and reasoning benchmarks with frontier Large Language Models show that augmenting strong baselines with UCS consistently improves ICL accuracy by up to 2-6% under the same selection budget, while also yielding insights into task- and model-level latent cluster distributions. Code is available at https://github.com/Raina-Xin/UCS.

analysis.tldr: 提出无训练覆盖度选择方法UCS，通过估计未覆盖的潜在簇来改进上下文学习中的示例选择，提升准确率2-6%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有示例选择方法多依赖启发式相关性或多样性，缺乏对示例集覆盖度的深入理解，导致性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖训练的情况下，选择能充分覆盖模型潜在簇结构的示例集以提升上下文学习性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 好的示例集应暴露模型未覆盖的潜在簇，而当前选择方法忽略了这一覆盖度原则。
analysis.main_method: 从模型一致嵌入中诱导离散潜在簇，并用平滑Good-Turing估计器从候选子集的频率谱中估计未揭示簇的数量，通过正则化目标与现有选择基线结合。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个意图分类和推理基准上使用前沿大语言模型，将UCS与强基线结合，在相同选择预算下提升ICL准确率2-6%。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个无训练、基于覆盖度的子集选择方法，可无缝集成查询依赖和独立基线，并揭示任务和模型层面的潜在簇分布。
analysis.limitations: 依赖模型嵌入的离散化质量，且平滑Good-Turing估计在极端稀疏场景下可能不稳定。

papers.title: TriFit: Trimodal Fusion with Protein Dynamics for Mutation Fitness Prediction
papers.abstract: Predicting the functional impact of single amino acid substitutions (SAVs) is central to understanding genetic disease and engineering therapeutic proteins. While protein language models and structure-based methods have achieved strong performance on this task, they systematically neglect protein dynamics; residue flexibility, correlated motions, and allosteric coupling are well-established determinants of mutational tolerance in structural biology, yet have not been incorporated into supervised variant effect predictors. We present TriFit, a multimodal framework that integrates sequence, structure, and protein dynamics through a four-expert Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) fusion module with trimodal cross-modal contrastive learning. Sequence embeddings are extracted via masked marginal scoring with ESM-2 (650M); structural embeddings from AlphaFold2-predicted C-alpha geometries; and dynamics embeddings from Gaussian Network Model (GNM) B-factors, mode shapes, and residue-residue cross-correlations. The MoE router adaptively weights modality combinations conditioned on the input, enabling protein-specific fusion without fixed modality assumptions. On the ProteinGym substitution benchmark (217 DMS assays, 696k SAVs), TriFit achieves AUROC 0.897 +/- 0.0002, outperforming all supervised baselines including Kermut (0.864) and ProteinNPT (0.844), and the best zero-shot model ESM3 (0.769). Ablation studies confirm that dynamics provides the largest marginal contribution over pairwise modality combinations, and TriFit achieves well-calibrated probabilistic outputs (ECE = 0.044) without post-hoc correction.

analysis.tldr: TriFit 通过融合序列、结构和蛋白质动力学信息，在突变适应性预测任务上超越了现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法忽略了蛋白质动力学（如残基灵活性和变构耦合）对突变耐受性的重要影响。
analysis.problem: 如何将蛋白质动力学信息整合到监督式突变效应预测模型中，以提升预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 蛋白质动力学特征（如B因子和模式形状）在突变预测中提供了序列和结构之外的互补信息。
analysis.main_method: 采用四专家混合专家（MoE）融合模块和三模态对比学习，整合ESM-2序列嵌入、AlphaFold2结构嵌入和GNM动力学嵌入。
analysis.key_experiments: 在ProteinGym基准（217个DMS实验，696k SAVs）上评估，AUROC达0.897，优于Kermut（0.864）和ProteinNPT（0.844）。
analysis.contributions: 首次将蛋白质动力学作为独立模态引入突变预测，并验证了其最大边际贡献；实现了校准良好的概率输出（ECE=0.044）。
analysis.limitations: 依赖AlphaFold2预测结构，可能对非折叠蛋白或无序区域效果有限；计算成本较高。

papers.title: Self-Distillation Zero: Self-Revision Turns Binary Rewards into Dense Supervision
papers.abstract: Current post-training methods in verifiable settings fall into two categories. Reinforcement learning (RLVR) relies on binary rewards, which are broadly applicable and powerful, but provide only sparse supervision during training. Distillation provides dense token-level supervision, typically obtained from an external teacher or using high-quality demonstrations. Collecting such supervision can be costly or unavailable. We propose Self-Distillation Zero (SD-Zero), a method that is substantially more training sample-efficient than RL and does not require an external teacher or high-quality demonstrations. SD-Zero trains a single model to play two roles: a Generator, which produces an initial response, and a Reviser, which conditions on that response and its binary reward to produce an improved response. We then perform on-policy self-distillation to distill the reviser into the generator, using the reviser's token distributions conditioned on the generator's response and its reward as supervision. In effect, SD-Zero trains the model to transform binary rewards into dense token-level self-supervision. On math and code reasoning benchmarks with Qwen3-4B-Instruct and Olmo-3-7B-Instruct, SD-Zero improves performance by at least 10% over the base models and outperforms strong baselines, including Rejection Fine-Tuning (RFT), GRPO, and Self-Distillation Fine-Tuning (SDFT), under the same question set and training sample budget. Extensive ablation studies show two novel characteristics of our proposed algorithm: (a) token-level self-localization, where the reviser can identify the key tokens that need to be revised in the generator's response based on reward, and (b) iterative self-evolution, where the improving ability to revise answers can be distilled back into generation performance with regular teacher synchronization.

analysis.tldr: 提出SD-Zero方法，通过自蒸馏将二元奖励转化为密集的令牌级监督，显著提升训练样本效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有后训练方法中，RLVR提供稀疏监督，蒸馏依赖外部教师或高质量演示，成本高或不可用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖外部教师或高质量演示的情况下，将二元奖励转化为密集的令牌级监督以提高训练效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型作为修订者能基于二元奖励定位生成响应中的关键令牌，并通过迭代自演化提升修订能力。
analysis.main_method: 训练单一模型同时作为生成器和修订者，修订者基于生成响应和二元奖励产生改进响应，再通过在线策略自蒸馏将修订者知识蒸馏回生成器。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Qwen3-4B-Instruct和Olmo-3-7B-Instruct上测试数学和代码推理，性能提升超10%，优于RFT、GRPO和SDFT。
analysis.contributions: 提出无需外部教师的自蒸馏方法，实现令牌级自定位和迭代自演化，显著提升样本效率。
analysis.limitations: 依赖二元奖励的准确性，可能不适用于非可验证任务；迭代自演化可能增加训练复杂度。

papers.title: Synthetic Tabular Generators Fail to Preserve Behavioral Fraud Patterns: A Benchmark on Temporal, Velocity, and Multi-Account Signals
papers.abstract: We introduce behavioral fidelity -- a third evaluation dimension for synthetic tabular data that measures whether generated data preserves the temporal, sequential, and structural behavioral patterns that distinguish real-world entity activity. Existing frameworks evaluate statistical fidelity (marginal distributions and correlations) and downstream utility (classifier AUROC on synthetic-trained models), but neither tests for the behavioral signals that operational detection and analysis systems actually rely on. We formalize a taxonomy of four behavioral fraud patterns (P1-P4) covering inter-event timing, burst structure, multi-account graph motifs, and velocity-rule trigger rates; define a degradation ratio metric calibrated to a real-data noise floor (1.0 = matches real variability, k = k-times worse); and prove that row-independent generators -- the dominant paradigm -- are structurally incapable of reproducing P3 graph motifs (Proposition 1) and produce non-positive within-entity IET autocorrelation (Proposition 2), making the positive burst fingerprint of fraud sequences unachievable regardless of architecture or training data size. We benchmark CTGAN, TVAE, GaussianCopula, and TabularARGN on IEEE-CIS Fraud Detection and the Amazon Fraud Dataset. All four fail severely: on IEEE-CIS composite degradation ratios range from 24.4x (TVAE) to 39.0x (GaussianCopula); on Amazon FDB, row-independent generators score 81.6-99.7x, while TabularARGN achieves 17.2x. We document generator-specific failure modes and their resolutions. The P1-P4 framework extends to any domain with entity-level sequential tabular data, including healthcare and network security. We release our evaluation framework as open source.

analysis.tldr: 提出行为保真度评估维度，证明现有合成表格生成器无法保留欺诈检测所需的时间、序列和结构行为模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有合成数据评估仅关注统计保真度和下游效用，忽略了实际检测系统依赖的行为信号。
analysis.problem: 合成表格生成器无法保留实体行为的时间、序列和结构模式，导致欺诈检测失效。
analysis.phenomenology_analysis: 行独立生成器在结构上无法复现图模式（P3）和正自相关的突发指纹（P2），导致行为保真度严重退化。
analysis.main_method: 形式化四种行为欺诈模式（P1-P4），定义退化比指标，并证明行独立生成器的结构性局限。
analysis.key_experiments: 在IEEE-CIS和Amazon欺诈数据集上测试CTGAN、TVAE、GaussianCopula和TabularARGN，退化比从17.2x到99.7x不等。
analysis.contributions: 提出行为保真度评估框架和P1-P4分类法，开源评估工具，揭示生成器的结构性缺陷。
analysis.limitations: 仅评估表格数据，未涉及图像或文本；行为模式分类可能需针对特定领域调整。

papers.title: Offline-Online Reinforcement Learning for Linear Mixture MDPs
papers.abstract: We study offline-online reinforcement learning in linear mixture Markov decision processes (MDPs) under environment shift. In the offline phase, data are collected by an unknown behavior policy and may come from a mismatched environment, while in the online phase the learner interacts with the target environment. We propose an algorithm that adaptively leverages offline data. When the offline data are informative, either due to sufficient coverage or small environment shift, the algorithm provably improves over purely online learning. When the offline data are uninformative, it safely ignores them and matches the online-only performance. We establish regret upper bounds that explicitly characterize when offline data are beneficial, together with nearly matching lower bounds. Numerical experiments further corroborate our theoretical findings.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在线-离线强化学习算法，在环境偏移下自适应利用离线数据，理论保证优于纯在线学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有离线-在线强化学习缺乏对离线数据质量（覆盖度、环境偏移）的自适应机制，导致性能不稳定。
analysis.problem: 解决线性混合MDP中离线数据可能来自不匹配环境时，如何安全且高效地结合在线学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 离线数据在覆盖充分或环境偏移小时能提升在线学习效率，否则可能有害；算法需自动识别并调整。
analysis.main_method: 设计一种自适应算法，基于离线数据的信息量（覆盖度和偏移程度）动态决定其使用权重，并融合在线探索。
analysis.key_experiments: 在合成线性混合MDP上验证，对比纯在线和离线-在线基线，显示自适应策略在多种偏移场景下的优势。
analysis.contributions: 首次为线性混合MDP提供离线-在线学习的理论保证，包括上下界匹配的遗憾分析。
analysis.limitations: 假设环境偏移为已知结构（线性混合），未考虑更复杂的非参数偏移。

papers.title: A Geometric Algebra-informed NeRF Framework for Generalizable Wireless Channel Prediction
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose the geometric algebra-informed neural radiance fields (GAI-NeRF), a novel framework for wireless channel prediction that leverages geometric algebra attention mechanisms to capture ray-object interactions in complex propagation environments. Our approach incorporates global token representations, drawing inspiration from transformer architectures in language and vision domains, to aggregate learned spatial-electromagnetic features and enhance scene understanding. We identify limitations in conventional static ray tracing modules that hinder model generalization and address this challenge through a new ray tracing architecture. This design enables effective generalization across diverse wireless scenarios while maintaining computational efficiency. Experimental results demonstrate that GAI-NeRF achieves superior performance in channel prediction tasks by combining geometric algebra principles with neural scene representations, offering a promising direction for next-generation wireless communication systems. Moreover, GAI-NeRF greatly outperforms existing methods across multiple wireless scenarios. To ensure comprehensive assessment, we further evaluate our approach against multiple benchmarks using newly collected real-world indoor datasets tailored for single-scene downstream tasks and generalization testing, confirming its robust performance in unseen environments and establishing its high efficacy for wireless channel prediction.

analysis.tldr: 提出几何代数感知的NeRF框架GAI-NeRF，利用几何代数注意力机制和全局token表示，实现复杂传播环境下的无线信道预测与跨场景泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有无线信道预测方法依赖静态射线追踪模块，难以泛化到多样场景，且缺乏对射线-物体交互的几何结构建模。
analysis.problem: 解决传统NeRF和射线追踪方法在无线信道预测中泛化能力差、计算效率低的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 无线信号传播中射线与物体的交互具有几何结构特性，而现有方法未充分利用这种几何信息，导致场景理解不足。
analysis.main_method: 引入几何代数注意力机制和全局token表示，结合NeRF框架学习空间-电磁特征，并设计新型射线追踪架构以提升泛化性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个无线场景（包括真实室内数据集）上进行单场景下游任务和泛化测试，与多种基准方法对比。
analysis.contributions: 首次将几何代数与NeRF结合用于无线信道预测，提出可泛化的射线追踪架构，显著提升跨场景预测性能。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论几何代数注意力机制的计算开销，以及极复杂环境（如高动态场景）下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Exploring Concept Subspace for Self-explainable Text-Attributed Graph Learning
papers.abstract: We introduce Graph Concept Bottleneck (GCB) as a new paradigm for self-explainable text-attributed graph learning. GCB maps graphs into a subspace, concept bottleneck, where each concept is a meaningful phrase, and predictions are made based on the activation of these concepts. Unlike existing interpretable graph learning methods that primarily rely on subgraphs as explanations, the concept bottleneck provides a new form of interpretation. To refine the concept space, we apply the information bottleneck principle to focus on the most relevant concepts. This not only yields more concise and faithful explanations but also explicitly guides the model to "think" toward the correct decision. We empirically show that GCB achieves intrinsic interpretability with accuracy on par with black-box Graph Neural Networks. Moreover, it delivers better performance under distribution shifts and data perturbations, showing improved robustness and generalizability, benefitting from concept-guided prediction.

analysis.tldr: 提出图概念瓶颈（GCB）方法，将文本属性图映射到概念子空间，实现自解释性图学习，兼顾准确性与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可解释图学习方法主要依赖子图解释，缺乏基于语义概念的透明推理机制，且难以平衡准确性与可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何让文本属性图模型在保持高性能的同时，提供基于语义概念的、简洁且忠实的自解释？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于子图的解释往往不够直观且易受噪声干扰，而概念瓶颈通过显式激活语义短语可提供更符合人类认知的解释形式。
analysis.main_method: 引入图概念瓶颈（GCB），将图表示映射到由有意义短语构成的概念子空间，并应用信息瓶颈原理筛选最相关概念进行预测。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个文本属性图数据集上，GCB在分类准确率上与黑盒GNN持平，并在分布偏移和数据扰动下表现更优。
analysis.contributions: 首次将概念瓶颈范式引入图学习，提供了一种新的自解释形式；通过信息瓶颈优化概念空间，提升解释的简洁性与忠实度。
analysis.limitations: 概念空间构建依赖预定义短语库，可能限制对新概念的覆盖；计算开销可能随概念数量增加而增大。

papers.title: Multi-Head Residual-Gated DeepONet for Coherent Nonlinear Wave Dynamics
papers.abstract: Coherent nonlinear wave dynamics are often strongly shaped by a compact set of physically meaningful descriptors of the initial state. Traditional neural operators typically treat the input-output mapping as a largely black-box high-dimensional regression problem, without explicitly exploiting this structured physical context. Common feature-integration strategies usually rely on direct concatenation or FiLM-style affine modulation in hidden latent spaces. Here we introduce a different paradigm, loosely inspired by the complementary roles of state evolution and physically meaningful observables in quantum mechanics: the wave field is learned through a standard DeepONet state pathway, while compact physical descriptors follow a parallel conditioning pathway and act as residual modulation factors on the state prediction. Based on this idea, we develop a Multi-Head Residual-Gated DeepONet (MH-RG), which combines a pre-branch residual modulator, a branch residual gate, and a trunk residual gate with a low-rank multi-head mechanism to capture multiple complementary conditioned response patterns without prohibitive parameter growth. We evaluate the framework on representative benchmarks including highly nonlinear conservative wave dynamics and dissipative trapped dynamics and further perform detailed mechanistic analyses of the learned multi-head gating behavior. Compared with feature-augmented baselines, MH-RG DeepONet achieves consistently lower error while better preserving phase coherence and the fidelity of physically relevant dynamical quantities.

analysis.tldr: 提出多头残差门控DeepONet，利用物理描述符作为残差调制因子，提升非线性波动力学预测的精度和物理一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统神经算子将输入输出映射视为黑箱回归，未充分利用初始状态中紧凑的物理描述符，导致预测精度和物理保真度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何将物理描述符显式融入神经算子，以改善非线性波动力学的相干性和物理量保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非线性波动力学中，初始状态的物理描述符（如能量、相位）对演化过程有决定性影响，但现有方法仅通过拼接或仿射调制简单整合。
analysis.main_method: 设计双路径架构：状态路径用标准DeepONet学习波场，条件路径用物理描述符生成残差门控因子，并通过多头低秩机制捕获多种响应模式。
analysis.key_experiments: 在保守非线性波和耗散陷阱动力学基准上测试，与特征增强基线对比，评估误差、相位相干性和物理量保真度。
analysis.contributions: 提出残差门控范式替代传统特征整合，开发多头低秩机制避免参数爆炸，实验证明精度和物理一致性显著提升。
analysis.limitations: 依赖物理描述符的预定义，可能不适用于描述符未知或复杂的系统；多头机制的解释性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Agentic LLM Reasoning in a Self-Driving Laboratory for Air-Sensitive Lithium Halide Spinel Conductors
papers.abstract: Self-driving laboratories promise to accelerate materials discovery. Yet current automated solid-state synthesis platforms are limited to ambient conditions, thereby precluding their use for air-sensitive materials. Here, we present A-Lab for Glovebox Powder Solid-state Synthesis (A-Lab GPSS), a robotic platform capable of synthesizing and characterizing air-sensitive inorganic materials under strict air-free conditions. By integrating an agentic AI framework into the A-Lab GPSS platform, we structure autonomous experimental design through abductive and inductive reasoning. We deploy this platform to explore the vast compositional space of lithium halide spinel solid-state ionic conductors. Across a synthesis campaign comprising 352 samples with diverse compositions, the system explores a broad chemical space, experimentally realizing 72% of the 171 possible pairwise combinations among the 19 metals considered in this study. Over the course of the campaign, the fraction of compositions exhibiting both good ionic conductivity (> 0.05 mS/cm) and high halide spinel phase purity increases from 1.33% in the first 75 agent-proposed samples to 5.33% in the final 75. Furthermore, by inspecting the AI's reasoning processes, we reveal distinct yet complementary discovery strategies: abductive reasoning interrogates abnormal observations within already explored regions, whereas inductive reasoning expands the search into broader, previously unvisited chemical space. This work establishes a scalable platform for the autonomous discovery of complex, air-sensitive solid-state materials.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个手套箱自驱动实验室A-Lab GPSS，结合AI推理自主合成空气敏感锂卤化物尖晶石，发现率提升4倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自驱动实验室仅限于环境条件，无法处理空气敏感材料，限制了固态材料发现。
analysis.problem: 如何实现空气敏感无机材料的自动化合成与表征，并高效探索锂卤化物尖晶石导体的广阔组分空间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI的溯因推理聚焦于已探索区域的异常观测，而归纳推理则扩展至未探索化学空间，两种策略互补。
analysis.main_method: 构建手套箱机器人平台A-Lab GPSS，集成溯因和归纳推理的AI框架，自主设计实验并迭代优化。
analysis.key_experiments: 合成352个样品，覆盖19种金属的171种二元组合中的72%，最终75个样品中高性能比例从1.33%提升至5.33%。
analysis.contributions: 首次实现空气敏感固态材料的全自动合成与表征，并揭示AI推理策略的互补性。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对锂卤化物尖晶石体系，泛化性待验证；推理过程可能受初始数据偏差影响。

papers.title: INTARG: Informed Real-Time Adversarial Attack Generation for Time-Series Regression
papers.abstract: Time-series forecasting aims to predict future values by modeling temporal dependencies in historical observations. It is a critical component of many real-world systems, where accurate forecasts improve operational efficiency and help mitigate uncertainty and risk. More recently, machine learning (ML), and especially deep learning (DL)-based models, have gained widespread adoption for time-series forecasting, but they remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks. However, many state-of-the-art attack methods are not directly applicable in time-series settings, where storing complete historical data or performing attacks at every time step is often impractical. This paper proposes an adversarial attack framework for time-series forecasting under an online bounded-buffer setting, leveraging an informed and selective attack strategy. By selectively targeting time steps where the model exhibits high confidence and the expected prediction error is maximal, our framework produces fewer but substantially more effective attacks. Experiments show that our framework can increase the prediction error up to 2.42x, while performing attacks in fewer than 10% of time steps.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在线有限缓存下的时间序列对抗攻击框架，通过选择性攻击高置信度时间步，在少于10%的时间步上实现最高2.42倍的预测误差提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 时间序列预测模型易受对抗攻击，但现有攻击方法在在线场景中因需存储完整历史数据或每步攻击而不实用。
analysis.problem: 如何在在线有限缓存设置下高效生成时间序列回归的对抗攻击，同时减少攻击频率并保持效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在高置信度时间步上预测误差最大，选择性攻击这些步长可显著提升攻击效率。
analysis.main_method: 基于信息驱动的选择性攻击策略，在有限缓存中优先攻击高置信度且预期误差最大的时间步。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个时间序列数据集上测试，攻击频率低于10%时间步时，预测误差提升最高达2.42倍。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出在线有限缓存下的时间序列对抗攻击框架，实现高效且有效的选择性攻击。
analysis.limitations: 未考虑攻击对模型长期预测的影响，且选择性策略可能依赖特定置信度度量。

papers.title: A unified data format for managing diabetes time-series data: DIAbetes eXchange (DIAX)
papers.abstract: Diabetes devices, including Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM), Smart Insulin Pens, and Automated Insulin Delivery systems, generate rich time-series data widely used in research and machine learning. However, inconsistent data formats across sources hinder sharing, integration, and analysis. We present DIAX (DIAbetes eXchange), a standardized JSON-based format for unifying diabetes time-series data, including CGM, insulin, and meal signals. DIAX promotes interoperability, reproducibility, and extensibility, particularly for machine learning applications. An open-source repository provides tools for dataset conversion, cross-format compatibility, visualization, and community contributions. DIAX is a translational resource, not a data host, ensuring flexibility without imposing data-sharing constraints. Currently, DIAX is compatible with other standardization efforts and supports major datasets (DCLP3, DCLP5, IOBP2, PEDAP, T1Dexi, Loop), totaling over 10 million patient-hours of data. https://github.com/Center-for-Diabetes-Technology/DIAX

analysis.tldr: 提出统一JSON格式DIAX，标准化糖尿病时序数据（CGM、胰岛素、进餐），提升互操作性与可复现性，已兼容6大数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 糖尿病设备产生丰富时序数据，但格式不一致阻碍共享、整合与分析，亟需统一标准。
analysis.problem: 现有糖尿病数据格式不统一，导致跨源数据难以集成、复现和用于机器学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CGM、智能胰岛素笔等设备数据格式各异，研究者需花费大量精力进行格式转换，影响研究效率。
analysis.main_method: 设计基于JSON的标准化格式DIAX，包含CGM、胰岛素、进餐信号字段，并提供开源转换工具与可视化支持。
analysis.key_experiments: 兼容DCLP3、DCLP5、IOBP2、PEDAP、T1Dexi、Loop六大公开数据集，总计超1000万患者小时数据。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个统一糖尿病时序数据格式，促进跨数据集互操作与机器学习应用，开源工具降低使用门槛。
analysis.limitations: 当前仅支持有限数据集，扩展至更多设备与数据源需社区持续贡献；未涉及数据隐私与安全机制。

papers.title: Active Imitation Learning for Thermal- and Kernel-Aware LFM Inference on 3D S-NUCA Many-Cores
papers.abstract: Large Foundation Model (LFM) inference is both memory- and compute-intensive, traditionally relying on GPUs. However, the limited availability and high cost have motivated the adoption of high-performance general-purpose CPUs, especially emerging 3D-stacked Static Non-Uniform Cache Architecture (3D S-NUCA) systems. These architectures offer enhanced bandwidth and locality but suffer from severe thermal challenges and uneven cache latencies due to 3D Networks-on-Chip (NoC). Optimal management of thread migration and V/f scaling is non-trivial due to LFM kernel diversity and system heterogeneity. Existing thermal management approaches often rely on oversimplified analytical models and lack adaptability. We propose AILFM, an Active Imitation Learning (AIL)-based scheduling framework that learns near-optimal thermal-aware scheduling policies from Oracle demonstrations with minimal run-time overhead. AILFM accounts for both core-level performance heterogeneity and kernel-specific behavior in LFMs to maintain thermal safety while maximizing performance. Extensive experiments show that AILFM outperforms state-of-the-art baselines and generalizes well across diverse LFM workloads.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于主动模仿学习的调度框架AILFM，用于3D S-NUCA多核系统上大模型推理的热感知与核感知优化。
analysis.research_motivation: GPU资源稀缺且昂贵，促使使用高性能CPU进行大模型推理，但3D S-NUCA架构面临严重热挑战和缓存延迟不均问题。
analysis.problem: 现有热管理方法依赖简化分析模型且缺乏适应性，无法有效处理大模型推理中核多样性与系统异构性导致的线程迁移和电压频率缩放优化难题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 3D堆叠架构通过片上网络带来高带宽和局部性，但加剧了热效应和缓存延迟差异，且大模型推理中不同核的行为差异显著。
analysis.main_method: 采用主动模仿学习，从Oracle演示中学习近最优的热感知调度策略，同时考虑核级性能异构性和大模型核特定行为。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多种大模型工作负载上进行广泛实验，与最先进基线对比，验证了AILFM的优越性能和泛化能力。
analysis.contributions: 首次将主动模仿学习应用于3D S-NUCA多核系统的大模型推理调度，实现热安全与性能最大化。
analysis.limitations: 依赖Oracle演示质量，且未考虑动态工作负载变化对策略的实时影响。

papers.title: Classification of Epileptic iEEG using Topological Machine Learning
papers.abstract: Epileptic seizure detection from EEG signals remains challenging due to the high dimensionality and nonlinear, potentially stochastic, dynamics of neural activity. In this work, we investigate whether features derived from topological data analysis (TDA) can improve the classification of brain states in preictal, ictal and interictal iEEG recordings from epilepsy patients using multichannel data. We analyze data from 55 patients, significantly larger than many previous studies that rely on patient-specific models. Persistence diagrams derived from iEEG signals are vectorized using several TDA representations, including Carlsson coordinates, persistence images, and template functions. To understand how topological representations interact with modern machine learning pipelines, we conduct a large-scale ablation study across multiple iEEG frequency bands, dimensionality reduction techniques, feature representations, and classifier architectures. Our experiments show that dimension-reduced topological representations achieve up to 80\% balanced accuracy for three-class classification. Interestingly, classical machine learning models perform comparably to deep learning models, achieving up to 79.17\% balanced accuracy, suggesting that carefully designed topological features can substantially reduce model complexity requirements. In contrast, pipelines preserving the full multichannel feature structure exhibit severe overfitting due to the high-dimensional feature space. These findings highlight the importance of structure-preserving dimensionality reduction when applying topology-based representations to multichannel neural data.

analysis.tldr: 利用拓扑数据分析特征提升癫痫iEEG信号分类，多通道数据中降维拓扑表示达80%准确率，经典模型与深度学习相当。
analysis.research_motivation: EEG信号高维非线性，传统方法难以有效分类癫痫脑状态，需探索拓扑特征提升性能。
analysis.problem: 多通道iEEG信号中癫痫发作前、中、后状态的分类准确率低，且高维特征易过拟合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 降维后的拓扑特征能有效捕捉脑状态差异，而保留全通道特征会导致严重过拟合。
analysis.main_method: 从iEEG信号提取持久性图，使用Carlsson坐标、持久性图像和模板函数向量化，结合降维和多种分类器进行三分类。
analysis.key_experiments: 在55名患者数据上，跨频带、降维技术、特征表示和分类器进行大规模消融实验，最高达80%平衡准确率。
analysis.contributions: 证明拓扑特征可降低模型复杂度，经典模型与深度学习性能相近，强调结构保持降维的重要性。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对iEEG数据，未验证在头皮EEG或其他神经疾病上的泛化性；80%准确率仍有提升空间。

papers.title: Fast and principled equation discovery from chaos to climate
papers.abstract: Our ability to predict, control, and ultimately understand complex systems rests on discovering the equations that govern their dynamics. Identifying these equations directly from noisy, limited observations has therefore become a central challenge in data-driven science, yet existing library-based sparse regression methods force a compromise between automation, statistical rigor, and computational efficiency. Here we develop Bayesian-ARGOS, a hybrid framework that reconciles these demands by combining rapid frequentist screening with focused Bayesian inference, enabling automated equation discovery with principled uncertainty quantification at a fraction of the computational cost of existing methods. Tested on seven chaotic systems under varying data scarcity and noise levels, Bayesian-ARGOS outperforms two state-of-the-art methods in most scenarios. It surpasses SINDy in data efficiency for all systems and noise tolerance for six out of the seven, with a two-order-of-magnitude reduction in computational cost compared to bootstrap-based ARGOS. The probabilistic formulation additionally enables a suite of standard statistical diagnostics, including influence analysis and multicollinearity detection that expose failure modes otherwise opaque. When integrated with representation learning (SINDy-SHRED) for high dimensional sea surface temperature reconstruction, Bayesian-ARGOS increases the yield of valid latent equations with significantly improved long horizon stability. Bayesian-ARGOS thus provides a principled, automated, and computationally efficient route from scarce and noisy observations to interpretable governing equations, offering a practical framework for equation discovery across scales, from benchmark chaotic systems to the latent dynamics underlying global climate patterns.

analysis.tldr: 提出贝叶斯-ARGOS框架，结合快速频率派筛选与贝叶斯推断，实现从噪声数据中自动发现方程，计算成本降低两个数量级。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于库的稀疏回归方法在自动化、统计严谨性和计算效率之间存在权衡，需要一种兼顾三者且能处理噪声和稀缺数据的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从有限、含噪声的观测数据中自动发现控制复杂系统动力学的方程，并实现统计严谨的不确定性量化。
