analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 混沌系统对数据稀缺和噪声敏感，现有方法如SINDy在数据效率上不足，而基于bootstrap的ARGOS计算成本高。
analysis.main_method: 开发贝叶斯-ARGOS混合框架，先用快速频率派筛选候选项，再用贝叶斯推断进行聚焦估计，实现自动化方程发现与不确定性量化。
analysis.key_experiments: 在七个混沌系统上测试不同数据量和噪声水平，与SINDy和bootstrap ARGOS对比，并在高维海表温度重建中集成表示学习。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种计算高效、统计严谨的方程发现框架，在数据效率和噪声容忍度上优于SINDy，计算成本比bootstrap ARGOS降低两个数量级。
analysis.limitations: 依赖预定义的候选函数库，可能无法发现库外项；在高维系统中需结合表示学习，增加了复杂性。

papers.title: FlowBoost Reveals Phase Transitions and Spectral Structure in Finite Free Information Inequalities
papers.abstract: Using FlowBoost, a closed-loop deep generative optimization framework for extremal structure discovery, we investigate $\ell^p$-generalizations of the finite free Stam inequality for real-rooted polynomials under finite free additive convolution $\boxplus_n$. At $p=2$, FlowBoost finds the Hermite pair as the unique equality case and reveals the spectral structure of the linearized convolution map at this extremal point. As a result, we conjecture that the singular values of the doubly stochastic coupling matrix $E_n$ on the mean-zero subspace are ${2^{-k/2}:k=1,\ldots,n-1}$, independent of $n$. Conditional on this conjecture, we obtain a sharp local stability constant and the finite free CLT convergence rate, both uniform in $n$. We introduce a one-parameter family of $p$-Stam inequalities using $\ell^p$-Fisher information and prove that the Hermite pair itself violates the inequality for every $p>2$, with the sign of the deficit governed by the $\ell^p$-contraction ratio of $E_n$. Systematic computation via FlowBoost supports the conjecture that $p^*\!=2$ is the sharp critical exponent. For $p<2$, the extremal configurations undergo a bifurcation, meaning that they become non-matching pairs with bimodal root structure, converging back to the Hermite diagonal only as $p\to 2^-$. Our findings demonstrate that FlowBoost, can be an effective tool of mathematical discovery in infinite-dimensional extremal problems.

analysis.tldr: FlowBoost 发现有限自由 Stam 不等式在 p=2 时 Hermite 对为唯一极值，并揭示谱结构，p>2 时不等式被违反，p<2 时极值出现分叉。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索有限自由 Stam 不等式的 ℓ^p 推广及其极值结构，并验证 FlowBoost 在无限维极值问题中的有效性。
analysis.problem: 研究有限自由卷积下实根多项式的 ℓ^p-Stam 不等式，确定临界指数 p^* 和极值配置的相变行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: p=2 时 Hermite 对为唯一极值，p>2 时不等式被违反且符号由 ℓ^p 收缩比决定，p<2 时极值分叉为非匹配双峰结构。
analysis.main_method: 使用 FlowBoost 闭环深度生成优化框架进行极值结构发现，结合谱分析和 ℓ^p-Fisher 信息。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过 FlowBoost 系统计算支持 p^*=2 为临界指数，并验证了耦合矩阵 E_n 的奇异值猜想。
analysis.contributions: 提出 ℓ^p-Stam 不等式族，证明 Hermite 对在 p>2 时违反不等式，揭示极值分叉现象，并给出局部稳定性和 CLT 收敛速率。
analysis.limitations: 部分结果依赖于 E_n 奇异值猜想，且 FlowBoost 在无限维问题中的理论保证尚不明确。

papers.title: Saar-Voice: A Multi-Speaker Saarbr\"ucken Dialect Speech Corpus
papers.abstract: Natural language processing (NLP) and speech technologies have made significant progress in recent years; however, they remain largely focused on standardized language varieties. Dialects, despite their cultural significance and widespread use, are underrepresented in linguistic resources and computational models, resulting in performance disparities. To address this gap, we introduce Saar-Voice, a six-hour speech corpus for the Saarbr\"ucken dialect of German. The dataset was created by first collecting text through digitized books and locally sourced materials. A subset of this text was recorded by nine speakers, and we conducted analyses on both the textual and speech components to assess the dataset's characteristics and quality. We discuss methodological challenges related to orthographic and speaker variation, and explore grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P) conversion. The resulting corpus provides aligned textual and audio representations. This serves as a foundation for future research on dialect-aware text-to-speech (TTS), particularly in low-resource scenarios, including zero-shot and few-shot model adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 构建了六小时的萨尔布吕肯方言语音语料库，支持低资源方言TTS研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 方言在NLP和语音技术中资源匮乏，导致性能差距，需构建方言资源。
analysis.problem: 解决德语萨尔布吕肯方言缺乏对齐文本-语音语料库的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 方言在标准化语言模型中表现不佳，且现有资源多忽略方言变体。
analysis.main_method: 通过数字化书籍和本地材料收集文本，由9名说话人录制子集，并分析文本和语音特征。
analysis.key_experiments: 对语料库进行文本和语音分析，探索正字法和说话人变体，以及G2P转换。
analysis.contributions: 提供了首个多说话人萨尔布吕肯方言语音语料库，为低资源TTS（包括零样本和少样本适应）奠定基础。
analysis.limitations: 语料库规模较小（6小时），可能限制模型泛化能力。

papers.title: CLSGen: A Dual-Head Fine-Tuning Framework for Joint Probabilistic Classification and Verbalized Explanation
papers.abstract: With the recent progress of Large Language Models (LLMs), there is a growing interest in applying these models to solve complex and challenging problems. Modern LLMs, capable of processing long contexts and generating verbalized explanations, offer significant potential in addressing real-world applications. However, a critical hurdle in deploying LLMs for practical decision-making is their inability to provide reliable, quantitative probabilities. While task-specific fine-tuning of LLMs using traditional discriminative objectives (similar to encoder-only models) can yield probability estimates, this often leads to catastrophic forgetting and linguistic collapse. Consequently, the model loses its ability to generate explanations, severely undermining its interpretability and usability. To address this challenge, we propose CLSGen, a novel LLM fine-tuning framework designed for binary classification tasks. The CLSGen framework encompasses a new model architecture, training methodology, and data construction strategy to enable robust probability estimation without sacrificing the model's inherent explanation-generation capabilities. Experimental results across multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that models fine-tuned with CLSGen outperform existing baselines in classification metrics (AUROC and F1-score). Regarding explanation, the results showed strong alignment between predicted labels and generated justifications, as well as high readability.

analysis.tldr: 提出CLSGen双头微调框架，使LLM在二分类任务中同时输出可靠概率和可读解释，避免灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在决策中无法提供可靠概率估计，而传统微调会丧失解释生成能力，需平衡两者。
analysis.problem: 现有LLM微调方法在获得概率估计时导致灾难性遗忘和语言崩溃，失去解释能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统判别式微调虽能输出概率，但会破坏LLM的生成能力，导致解释质量下降。
analysis.main_method: 设计双头架构（分类头+生成头）、联合训练策略及数据构建方法，同时优化概率估计和解释生成。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个基准数据集上，CLSGen在AUROC和F1指标上优于基线，且生成解释与预测标签高度一致、可读性强。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个兼顾概率估计与解释生成的LLM微调框架，验证了双头训练的有效性。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对二分类任务，未扩展到多分类或更复杂场景。

papers.title: LangFlow: Continuous Diffusion Rivals Discrete in Language Modeling
papers.abstract: Continuous diffusion has been the foundation of high-fidelity, controllable, and few-step generation of many data modalities such as images. However, in language modeling, prior continuous diffusion language models (DLMs) lag behind discrete counterparts due to the sparse data space and the underexplored design space. In this work, we close this gap with LangFlow, the first continuous DLM to rival discrete diffusion, by connecting embedding-space DLMs to Flow Matching via Bregman divergence, alongside three key innovations: (1) we derive a novel ODE-based NLL bound for principled evaluation of continuous flow-based language models; (2) we propose an information-uniform principle for setting the noise schedule, which motivates a learnable noise scheduler based on a Gumbel distribution; and (3) we revise prior training protocols by incorporating self-conditioning, as we find it improves both likelihood and sample quality of embedding-space DLMs with effects substantially different from discrete diffusion. Putting everything together, LangFlow rivals top discrete DLMs on both the perplexity (PPL) and the generative perplexity (Gen. PPL), reaching a PPL of 30.0 on LM1B and 24.6 on OpenWebText. It even exceeds autoregressive baselines in zero-shot transfer on 4 out of 7 benchmarks. LangFlow provides the first clear evidence that continuous diffusion is a promising paradigm for language modeling. Homepage: https://github.com/nealchen2003/LangFlow

analysis.tldr: LangFlow 通过流匹配和三项创新，使连续扩散语言模型首次在困惑度上媲美离散扩散模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 连续扩散在图像等领域表现优异，但在语言建模中落后于离散扩散，亟需弥合这一差距。
analysis.problem: 连续扩散语言模型因稀疏数据空间和设计空间探索不足，性能不如离散扩散模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 嵌入空间扩散模型的自条件化对似然和样本质量有显著提升，且效果与离散扩散不同。
analysis.main_method: 基于 Bregman 散度连接嵌入空间扩散与流匹配，提出 ODE 负对数似然界、信息均匀噪声调度和自条件化训练协议。
analysis.key_experiments: 在 LM1B 和 OpenWebText 上达到困惑度 30.0 和 24.6，零样本迁移在 7 个基准中 4 个超越自回归基线。
analysis.contributions: 首次证明连续扩散在语言建模中可媲美离散扩散，提供原理性评估方法和创新噪声调度。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论计算效率或大规模扩展性，可能依赖特定嵌入空间。

papers.title: Psychological Concept Neurons: Can Neural Control Bias Probing and Shift Generation in LLMs?
authors: Yuto Harada and Hiro Taiyo Hamada
papers.abstract: Using psychological constructs such as the Big Five, large language models (LLMs) can imitate specific personality profiles and predict a user's personality. While LLMs can exhibit behaviors consistent with these constructs, it remains unclear where and how they are represented inside the model and how they relate to behavioral outputs. To address this gap, we focus on questionnaire-operationalized Big Five concepts, analyze the formation and localization of their internal representations, and use interventions to examine how these representations relate to behavioral outputs. In our experiment, we first use probing to examine where Big Five information emerges across model depth. We then identify neurons that respond selectively to each Big Five concept and test whether enhancing or suppressing their activations can bias latent representations and label generation in intended directions. We find that Big Five information becomes rapidly decodable in early layers and remains detectable through the final layers, while concept-selective neurons are most prevalent in mid layers and exhibit limited overlap across domains. Interventions on these neurons consistently shift probe readouts toward targeted concepts, with targeted success rates exceeding 0.8 for some concepts, indicating that the model's internal separation of Big Five personality traits can be causally steered. At the label-generation level, the same interventions often bias generated label distributions in the intended directions, but the effects are weaker, more concept-dependent, and often accompanied by cross-trait spillover, indicating that comparable control over generated labels is difficult even with interventions on a large fraction of concept-selective neurons. Overall, our findings reveal a gap between representational control and behavioral control in LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 研究揭示大语言模型中大五人格概念神经元的分布，干预可偏置内部表征但难以稳定控制生成标签。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型能模拟人格特质，但内部如何表征这些概念及其与行为输出的关系尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对模型内部人格概念神经元的定位及其因果影响生成行为的理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大五人格信息在早期层即可解码，概念选择性神经元主要分布在中层，且跨领域重叠有限。
analysis.main_method: 通过探针分析信息深度分布，识别概念选择性神经元，并实施激活增强/抑制干预。
analysis.key_experiments: 干预使探针读数偏向目标概念，成功率超0.8；但对生成标签的偏置效果较弱且存在跨特质溢出。
analysis.contributions: 首次定位大五人格概念神经元并验证其因果可控性，揭示表征控制与行为控制之间的差距。
analysis.limitations: 干预对生成标签的控制效果有限且依赖概念，存在跨特质干扰。

papers.title: HistLens: Mapping Idea Change across Concepts and Corpora
papers.abstract: Language change both reflects and shapes social processes, and the semantic evolution of foundational concepts provides a measurable trace of historical and social transformation. Despite recent advances in diachronic semantics and discourse analysis, existing computational approaches often (i) concentrate on a single concept or a single corpus, making findings difficult to compare across heterogeneous sources, and (ii) remain confined to surface lexical evidence, offering insufficient computational and interpretive granularity when concepts are expressed implicitly. We propose HistLens, a unified, SAE-based framework for multi-concept, multi-corpus conceptual-history analysis. The framework decomposes concept representations into interpretable features and tracks their activation dynamics over time and across sources, yielding comparable conceptual trajectories within a shared coordinate system. Experiments on long-span press corpora show that HistLens supports cross-concept, cross-corpus computation of patterns of idea evolution and enables implicit concept computation. By bridging conceptual modeling with interpretive needs, HistLens broadens the analytical perspectives and methodological repertoire available to social science and the humanities for diachronic text analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出 HistLens 框架，基于稀疏自编码器实现多概念、多语料库的概念语义演化分析，支持跨源比较和隐式概念计算。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有历时语义方法多聚焦单一概念或单一语料库，难以跨源比较，且局限于表层词汇证据，无法处理隐式概念。
analysis.problem: 如何统一分析多个概念在多个语料库中的语义演化轨迹，并支持隐式概念的计算与比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 概念语义演化反映社会变迁，但不同语料库和概念间的演化模式缺乏可比性，且隐式表达难以捕捉。
analysis.main_method: 构建基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）的统一框架，将概念表示分解为可解释特征，并追踪其在不同时间和语料库中的激活动态。
analysis.key_experiments: 在长跨度新闻语料库上进行实验，验证了跨概念、跨语料库的演化模式计算及隐式概念分析能力。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个支持多概念、多语料库历时概念分析的统一框架，实现可比较的概念轨迹和隐式概念计算。
analysis.limitations: 依赖预训练语言模型和SAE的表示质量，可能受语料库覆盖范围和时间粒度限制。

papers.title: KL Divergence Between Gaussians: A Step-by-Step Derivation for the Variational Autoencoder Objective
papers.abstract: Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence is a fundamental concept in information theory that quantifies the discrepancy between two probability distributions. In the context of Variational Autoencoders (VAEs), it serves as a central regularization term, imposing structure on the latent space and thereby enabling the model to exhibit generative capabilities. In this work, we present a detailed derivation of the closed-form expression for the KL divergence between Gaussian distributions, a case of particular importance in practical VAE implementations. Starting from the general definition for continuous random variables, we derive the expression for the univariate case and extend it to the multivariate setting under the assumption of diagonal covariance. Finally, we discuss the interpretation of each term in the resulting expression and its impact on the training dynamics of the model.

analysis.tldr: 详细推导了变分自编码器中高斯分布间KL散度的闭式表达式，从单变量推广到对角协方差多变量情形。
analysis.research_motivation: KL散度是VAE的核心正则项，但其高斯闭式推导常被省略，需系统梳理以帮助理解。
analysis.problem: VAE中高斯分布间KL散度的闭式表达式缺乏从基础定义到实际应用的完整推导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: KL散度项在VAE训练中平衡潜空间结构性与重构保真度，其各子项分别控制均值对齐和方差正则化。
analysis.main_method: 从连续随机变量的KL散度定义出发，逐步推导单变量高斯情形，再扩展至对角协方差多变量高斯情形。
analysis.key_experiments: 无实验，为纯理论推导，但讨论了各子项对VAE训练动态的影响。
analysis.contributions: 提供了高斯KL散度闭式表达式的完整、清晰推导，并解释了其在VAE中的物理意义。
analysis.limitations: 仅覆盖对角协方差情形，未涉及全协方差或更复杂分布；无实验验证。

papers.title: Agentic Aggregation for Parallel Scaling of Long-Horizon Agentic Tasks
papers.abstract: We study parallel test-time scaling for long-horizon agentic tasks such as agentic search and deep research, where multiple rollouts are generated in parallel and aggregated into a final response. While such scaling has proven effective for chain-of-thought reasoning, agentic tasks pose unique challenges: trajectories are long, multi-turn, and tool-augmented, and outputs are often open-ended. Aggregating only final answers discards rich information from trajectories, while concatenating all trajectories exceeds the model's context window. To address this, we propose AggAgent, an aggregation agent that treats parallel trajectories as an environment. We equip it with lightweight tools to inspect candidate solutions and search across trajectories, enabling it to navigate and synthesize information on demand. Across six benchmarks and three model families (GLM-4.7, Qwen3.5, MiniMax-M2.5), AggAgent outperforms all existing aggregation methods-by up to 5.3% absolute on average and 10.3% on two deep research tasks-while adding minimal overhead, as the aggregation cost remains bounded by a single agentic rollout. Our findings establish agentic aggregation as an effective and cost-efficient approach to parallel test-time scaling.

analysis.tldr: 提出聚合智能体（AggAgent），通过轻量工具在并行轨迹中搜索和综合信息，实现长周期智能体任务的高效并行扩展。
analysis.research_motivation: 并行测试时扩展在链式思维推理中有效，但长周期智能体任务因轨迹长、多轮、工具增强且输出开放，现有聚合方法（仅聚合最终答案或拼接轨迹）效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何有效聚合多个并行生成的智能体轨迹，以提升长周期任务（如智能体搜索和深度研究）的性能，同时控制计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅聚合最终答案会丢弃轨迹中的丰富信息，而拼接所有轨迹会超出模型上下文窗口，导致现有方法在长周期任务中表现受限。
analysis.main_method: 提出AggAgent，将并行轨迹视为环境，配备轻量工具（如检查候选解、跨轨迹搜索），按需导航和综合信息。
analysis.key_experiments: 在6个基准和3个模型家族（GLM-4.7、Qwen3.5、MiniMax-M2.5）上测试，AggAgent平均绝对提升5.3%，在两项深度研究任务上提升10.3%，聚合成本仅相当于一次智能体 rollout。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出智能体聚合方法，证明其作为并行测试时扩展的有效且经济高效的方案，显著优于现有聚合方法。
analysis.limitations: 依赖基础模型能力，聚合智能体本身可能引入额外错误；未探讨在更复杂或动态环境中的泛化性。

papers.title: Universality of first-order methods on random and deterministic matrices
papers.abstract: General first-order methods (GFOM) are a flexible class of iterative algorithms which update a state vector by matrix-vector multiplications and entrywise nonlinearities. A long line of work has sought to understand the large-n dynamics of GFOM, mostly focusing on "very random" input matrices and the approximate message passing (AMP) special case of GFOM whose state is asymptotically Gaussian. Yet, it has long remained unknown how to construct iterative algorithms that retain this Gaussianity for more structured inputs, or why existing AMP algorithms can be as effective for some deterministic matrices as they are for random matrices. We analyze diagrammatic expansions of GFOM via the limiting traffic distribution of the input matrix, the collection of all limiting values of permutation-invariant polynomials in the matrix entries, to obtain the following results: 1. We calculate the traffic distribution for the first non-trivial deterministic matrices, including (minor variants of) the Walsh-Hadamard and discrete sine and cosine transform matrices. This determines the limiting dynamics of GFOM on these inputs, resolving parts of longstanding conjectures of Marinari, Parisi, and Ritort (1994). 2. We design a new AMP iteration which unifies several previous AMP variants and generalizes to new input types, whose limiting dynamics are Gaussian conditional on some latent random variables. The asymptotic dynamics hold for a large and natural class of traffic distributions (encompassing both random and deterministic input matrices) and the algorithm's analysis gives a simple combinatorial interpretation of the Onsager correction, answering questions posed recently by Wang, Zhong, and Fan (2022).

analysis.tldr: 研究首次计算了确定性矩阵（如Walsh-Hadamard）的交通分布，并设计了统一AMP迭代，解释了一阶方法在随机与确定性矩阵上的普适性。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解一阶方法在结构化输入（如确定性矩阵）上的动力学行为，以及为何AMP算法对某些确定性矩阵同样有效。
analysis.problem: 现有理论主要针对随机矩阵，缺乏对确定性矩阵下GFOM动力学和AMP高斯性的分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过交通分布理论，发现确定性矩阵的极限动力学与随机矩阵类似，且AMP的Onsager修正具有组合解释。
analysis.main_method: 利用输入矩阵的交通分布分析GFOM的图展开，并设计新的AMP迭代统一多种变体。
analysis.key_experiments: 计算了Walsh-Hadamard、离散正弦和余弦变换矩阵的交通分布，验证了动力学预测。
analysis.contributions: 首次计算确定性矩阵的交通分布，解决Marinari等人长期猜想；设计统一AMP迭代，给出Onsager修正的组合解释。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对特定确定性矩阵，未覆盖所有结构化输入；理论分析依赖交通分布假设。

papers.title: Please Make it Sound like Human: Encoder-Decoder vs. Decoder-Only Transformers for AI-to-Human Text Style Transfer
papers.abstract: AI-generated text has become common in academic and professional writing, prompting research into detection methods. Less studied is the reverse: systematically rewriting AI-generated prose to read as genuinely human-authored. We build a parallel corpus of 25,140 paired AI-input and human-reference text chunks, identify 11 measurable stylistic markers separating the two registers, and fine-tune three models: BART-base, BART-large, and Mistral-7B-Instruct with QLoRA. BART-large achieves the highest reference similarity -- BERTScore F1 of 0.924, ROUGE-L of 0.566, and chrF++ of 55.92 -- with 17x fewer parameters than Mistral-7B. We show that Mistral-7B's higher marker shift score reflects overshoot rather than accuracy, and argue that shift accuracy is a meaningful blind spot in current style transfer evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 研究对比编码器-解码器与仅解码器模型在AI文本转人类风格上的表现，发现BART-large以更少参数取得更优效果。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成文本已广泛使用，但将AI文本系统性地改写为人类风格的研究较少，需探索有效方法。
analysis.problem: 如何将AI生成文本转换为自然的人类写作风格，并评估不同模型架构的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅解码器模型（如Mistral-7B）在风格标记偏移上得分更高，但实际是过度调整而非准确模仿人类风格。
analysis.main_method: 构建平行语料库，识别11个可测量的风格标记，微调BART-base、BART-large和Mistral-7B-Instruct（使用QLoRA）进行风格迁移。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用BERTScore、ROUGE-L和chrF++评估参考相似度，BART-large达到最高分（0.924、0.566、55.92），参数仅为Mistral-7B的1/17。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了风格迁移评估中“偏移准确性”的盲点，并证明编码器-解码器模型在参数效率上优于仅解码器模型。
analysis.limitations: 仅基于单一数据集和有限风格标记，未探索其他语言或更复杂的风格维度。

papers.title: Hidden Failures in Robustness: Why Supervised Uncertainty Quantification Needs Better Evaluation
papers.abstract: Recent work has shown that the hidden states of large language models contain signals useful for uncertainty estimation and hallucination detection, motivating a growing interest in efficient probe-based approaches. Yet it remains unclear how robust existing methods are, and which probe designs provide uncertainty estimates that are reliable under distribution shift. We present a systematic study of supervised uncertainty probes across models, tasks, and OOD settings, training over 2,000 probes while varying the representation layer, feature type, and token aggregation strategy. Our evaluation highlights poor robustness in current methods, particularly in the case of long-form generations. We also find that probe robustness is driven less by architecture and more by the probe inputs. Middle-layer representations generalise more reliably than final-layer hidden states, and aggregating across response tokens is consistently more robust than relying on single-token features. These differences are often largely invisible in-distribution but become more important under distribution shift. Informed by our evaluation, we explore a simple hybrid back-off strategy for improving robustness, arguing that better evaluation is a prerequisite for building more robust probes.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现监督不确定性探针在分布偏移下鲁棒性差，中间层表示和跨token聚合比最终层更可靠。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有探针方法在分布偏移下的鲁棒性未知，需要系统评估以指导更可靠的设计。
analysis.problem: 当前监督不确定性探针在分布偏移下可靠性不足，尤其长文本生成场景中表现差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 探针鲁棒性更多取决于输入特征（如中间层表示、跨token聚合）而非架构，且分布内差异不明显，偏移下才凸显。
analysis.main_method: 系统训练超过2000个探针，变化表示层、特征类型和token聚合策略，评估跨模型、任务和OOD设置。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多种模型和任务上测试分布内和分布偏移下的不确定性估计性能，重点分析长文本生成。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了监督探针鲁棒性差的普遍问题，并发现中间层表示和跨token聚合能提升鲁棒性。
analysis.limitations: 仅关注监督探针，未涉及无监督方法；混合回退策略简单，可能不是最优解。

papers.title: GPU Acceleration of Sparse Fully Homomorphic Encrypted DNNs
papers.abstract: Fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) has recently attracted significant attention as both a cryptographic primitive and a systems challenge. Given the latest advances in accelerated computing, FHE presents a promising opportunity for progress, with applications ranging from machine learning to information security. We target the most computationally intensive operation in deep neural networks from a hardware perspective, matrix multiplication (matmul), and adapt it for execution on AMD GPUs. We propose a new optimized method that improves the runtime and complexity of ciphertext matmul by using FIDESlib, a recent open-source FHE library designed specifically for GPUs. By exploiting sparsity in both operands, our sparse matmul implementation outperforms its CPU counterpart by up to $3.0\times$ and reduces the time complexity from cubic to semi-linear, demonstrating an improvement over existing FHE matmul implementations.

analysis.tldr: 提出在AMD GPU上利用稀疏性加速全同态加密深度神经网络的矩阵乘法，性能提升达3倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 全同态加密在机器学习等领域有广泛应用，但其计算开销巨大，尤其是矩阵乘法，需要硬件加速来提升实用性。
analysis.problem: 全同态加密深度神经网络中矩阵乘法计算密集，现有实现效率低，难以满足实际需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 矩阵乘法是DNN中最耗时的操作，且FHE密文运算复杂度高，利用稀疏性可显著降低计算量。
analysis.main_method: 基于FIDESlib库，在AMD GPU上实现稀疏矩阵乘法，利用两个操作数的稀疏性将时间复杂度从立方降至半线性。
analysis.key_experiments: 与CPU上的稀疏矩阵乘法对比，GPU加速版本性能提升高达3.0倍。
analysis.contributions: 首次在AMD GPU上实现FHE稀疏矩阵乘法，显著提升性能并降低复杂度。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对矩阵乘法操作，未涉及其他FHE运算；稀疏性假设可能不适用于所有场景。

papers.title: Self-Evolving LLM Memory Extraction Across Heterogeneous Tasks
papers.abstract: As LLM-based assistants become persistent and personalized, they must extract and retain useful information from past conversations as memory. However, the types of information worth remembering vary considerably across tasks. We formalize the \textit{heterogeneous memory extraction} task and introduce \textbf{BEHEMOTH}, a benchmark that repurposes 18 existing datasets spanning personalization, problem-solving, and agentic tasks, using a downstream utility-driven metric for systematic evaluation. Our empirical analysis confirms that no single static extraction prompt dominates across all task categories, and that existing self-evolving prompt optimization frameworks, originally designed for homogeneous distributions, degrade when training tasks are heterogeneous. To address this, we propose \textbf{CluE}, a cluster-based self-evolving strategy that groups training examples into clusters by extraction scenarios, analyzes each cluster independently, and synthesizes cross-cluster insights to update the extraction prompt. Experiments on BEHEMOTH show that CluE generalizes effectively across heterogeneous tasks ($+$9.04\% relative gain), consistently outperforming prior self-evolving frameworks.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨异构任务的LLM记忆提取方法，通过聚类自演化策略提升泛化能力，在BEHEMOTH基准上取得9.04%相对提升。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM助手需要从对话中提取记忆，但不同任务所需记忆类型差异大，现有方法缺乏统一评估和跨任务泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 现有静态提取提示无法在所有任务类别中占优，且自演化优化框架在异构任务上性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单一静态提取提示在不同任务类别上表现差异显著，异构任务分布导致自演化框架的优化效果退化。
analysis.main_method: 提出CluE聚类自演化策略，将训练样本按提取场景聚类，独立分析各簇并综合跨簇见解更新提取提示。
analysis.key_experiments: 在BEHEMOTH基准（整合18个数据集）上评估，CluE相比先前自演化框架获得+9.04%相对增益。
analysis.contributions: 形式化异构记忆提取任务，构建BEHEMOTH基准，提出CluE聚类自演化方法。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论聚类数量选择对性能的影响，以及跨任务迁移的边界条件。

papers.title: Utilizing and Calibrating Hindsight Process Rewards via Reinforcement with Mutual Information Self-Evaluation
papers.abstract: To overcome the sparse reward challenge in reinforcement learning (RL) for agents based on large language models (LLMs), we propose Mutual Information Self-Evaluation (MISE), an RL paradigm that utilizes hindsight generative self-evaluation as dense reward signals while simultaneously calibrating them against the environmental feedbacks. Empirically, MISE enables an agent to learn autonomously from dense internal rewards supplementing sparse extrinsic signals. Theoretically, our work provides the first formal foundation for the paradigm of generative self-rewarding. We prove that utilizing hindsight self-evaluation rewards is equivalent to minimizing an objective that combines mutual information with a KL divergence term between the policy and a proxy reward policy. This theoretical insight then informs and justifies our calibration step, which actively aligns these rewards with the optimal policy. Extensive experiments show that MISE outperforms strong baselines, enabling open-source LLMs about 7B parameters to achieve performance comparable to GPT-4o on validation without expert supervision.

analysis.tldr: 提出MISE框架，利用事后生成式自我评估作为密集奖励信号，并通过互信息理论校准，显著提升LLM强化学习性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 解决LLM强化学习中稀疏奖励问题，探索如何利用事后自我评估生成密集奖励信号。
analysis.problem: 传统强化学习在LLM中面临稀疏奖励挑战，缺乏有效的密集奖励信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 事后自我评估奖励可提供密集信号，但存在偏差，需与环境反馈校准。
analysis.main_method: 提出MISE范式，结合互信息自我评估生成密集奖励，并通过理论推导的校准步骤对齐最优策略。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个基准任务上，7B参数开源LLM达到GPT-4o级别性能，无需专家监督。
analysis.contributions: 首次为生成式自我奖励提供形式化基础，证明事后自我评估等价于最小化互信息与KL散度目标。
analysis.limitations: 依赖自我评估质量，可能受模型生成能力限制；校准步骤增加计算开销。

papers.title: CArtBench: Evaluating Vision-Language Models on Chinese Art Understanding, Interpretation, and Authenticity
papers.abstract: We introduce CARTBENCH, a museum-grounded benchmark for evaluating vision-language models (VLMs) on Chinese artworks beyond short-form recognition and QA. CARTBENCH comprises four subtasks: CURATORQA for evidence-grounded recognition and reasoning, CATALOGCAPTION for structured four-section expert-style appreciation, REINTERPRET for defensible reinterpretation with expert ratings, and CONNOISSEURPAIRS for diagnostic authenticity discrimination under visually similar confounds. CARTBENCH is built by aligning image-bearing Palace Museum objects from Wikidata with authoritative catalog pages, spanning five art categories across multiple dynasties. Across nine representative VLMs, we find that high overall CURATORQA accuracy can mask sharp drops on hard evidence linking and style-to-period inference; long-form appreciation remains far from expert references; and authenticity-oriented diagnostic discrimination stays near chance, underscoring the difficulty of connoisseur-level reasoning for current models.

analysis.tldr: 提出CArtBench基准，评估VLMs在中国艺术品上的理解、解读与真伪鉴别能力，发现模型在证据推理、长文鉴赏和真伪诊断上表现不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准多聚焦短文本识别与问答，缺乏对中国艺术品深层理解与真伪鉴别的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 当前VLMs在中国艺术品的长文鉴赏、证据推理和真伪鉴别任务上表现不佳，尤其是面对视觉相似干扰时。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在整体准确率高时，硬证据链接和风格-时期推理准确率骤降；长文鉴赏远逊专家；真伪诊断接近随机水平。
analysis.main_method: 构建基于故宫博物院藏品与Wikidata对齐的基准，包含四个子任务：CURATORQA、CATALOGCAPTION、REINTERPRET和CONNOISSEURPAIRS。
analysis.key_experiments: 在9个代表性VLM上评估，涵盖五个艺术类别和多个朝代，对比模型与专家表现。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出针对中国艺术品鉴赏与真伪鉴别的多维度基准，揭示当前VLMs在专家级推理上的显著差距。
analysis.limitations: 基准仅覆盖故宫藏品，可能无法泛化至其他艺术来源；真伪任务依赖人工构造的视觉干扰对。

papers.title: Inter-Layer Hessian Analysis of Neural Networks with DAG Architectures
papers.abstract: Modern automatic differentiation frameworks (JAX, PyTorch) return the Hessian of the loss function as a monolithic tensor, without exposing the internal structure of inter-layer interactions. This paper presents an analytical formalism that explicitly decomposes the full Hessian into blocks indexed by the DAG of an arbitrary architecture. The canonical decomposition $H = H^{GN} + H^T$ separates the Gauss--Newton component (convex part) from the tensor component (residual curvature responsible for saddle points). For piecewise-linear activations (ReLU), the tensor component of the input Hessian vanishes ($H^{T}_{v,w}\!\equiv\!0$ a.e., $H^f_{v,w}\!=\!H^{GN}_{v,w}\!\succeq\!0$); the full parametric Hessian contains residual terms that do not reduce to the GGN. Building on this decomposition, we introduce diagnostic metrics (inter-layer resonance~$\mathcal{R}$, geometric coupling~$\mathcal{C}$, stable rank~$\mathcal{D}$, GN-Gap) that are estimated stochastically in $O(P)$ time and reveal structural curvature interactions between layers. The theoretical analysis explains exponential decay of resonance in vanilla networks and its preservation under skip connections; empirical validation spans fully connected MLPs (Exp.\,1--5) and convolutional architectures (ResNet-18, ${\sim}11$M~parameters, Exp.\,6). When the architecture reduces to a single node, all definitions collapse to the standard Hessian $\nabla^2_\theta\mathcal{L}(\theta)\in\mathbb{R}^{p\times p}$.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种将神经网络损失函数的Hessian矩阵按DAG结构分解为块矩阵的解析形式，并引入诊断指标分析层间曲率交互。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代自动微分框架将Hessian视为整体张量，缺乏层间交互的内部结构信息，阻碍了对优化景观的深入理解。
analysis.problem: 如何显式分解神经网络损失函数的Hessian矩阵，以揭示层间曲率交互并诊断优化困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Hessian可分解为Gauss-Newton凸分量和残差张量分量（对应鞍点），且ReLU激活下输入Hessian的张量分量几乎处处为零。
analysis.main_method: 基于DAG架构的块分解H = H^{GN} + H^T，并引入层间共振、几何耦合、稳定秩和GN-Gap等随机估计指标。
analysis.key_experiments: 在MLP（实验1-5）和ResNet-18（约1100万参数，实验6）上验证，显示普通网络中共振指数指数衰减，跳跃连接可保持共振。
analysis.contributions: 首次提供Hessian的DAG结构分解形式，提出高效随机估计的诊断指标，并理论解释跳跃连接对曲率交互的影响。
analysis.limitations: 主要针对ReLU激活函数，其他激活函数（如sigmoid）的张量分量行为未分析；随机估计的精度和计算开销需进一步验证。

papers.title: MIXAR: Scaling Autoregressive Pixel-based Language Models to Multiple Languages and Scripts
papers.abstract: Pixel-based language models are gaining momentum as alternatives to traditional token-based approaches, promising to circumvent tokenization challenges. However, the inherent perceptual diversity across languages poses a significant hurdle for multilingual generalization in pixel space. This paper introduces MIXAR, the first generative pixel-based language model trained on eight different languages utilizing a range of different scripts. We empirically evaluate MIXAR against previous pixel-based models as well as comparable tokenizer-based models, demonstrating substantial performance improvement on discriminative and generative multilingual tasks. Additionally, we show how MIXAR is robust to languages never seen during the training. These results are further strengthened when scaling the model to 0.5B parameters which not only improves its capabilities in generative tasks like LAMBADA but also its robustness when challenged with input perturbations such as orthographic attacks.

analysis.tldr: MIXAR 是首个基于像素的多语言生成模型，在八种不同语言上训练，显著优于现有像素模型和分词模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 像素级语言模型可避免分词问题，但跨语言视觉多样性阻碍了多语言泛化，亟需解决方案。
analysis.problem: 现有像素模型在多语言场景下泛化能力差，难以处理不同文字系统的视觉差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同语言的文字在像素空间呈现显著感知差异，导致模型难以共享跨语言表示。
analysis.main_method: 提出 MIXAR 模型，在八种不同语言和文字系统上训练生成式像素语言模型，并扩展至 0.5B 参数。
analysis.key_experiments: 在判别和生成多语言任务上评估，包括 LAMBADA 和正交攻击鲁棒性测试，与基线模型对比。
analysis.contributions: 首个多语言像素生成模型，展示跨语言泛化能力和对未见语言的鲁棒性，参数扩展进一步提升性能。
analysis.limitations: 仅覆盖八种语言，更多语言和文字系统的扩展性待验证；像素模型计算效率可能较低。

papers.title: Computation of Least Trimmed Squares: A Branch-and-Bound framework with Hyperplane Arrangement Enhancements
papers.abstract: We study computational aspects of a key problem in robust statistics -- the penalized least trimmed squares (LTS) regression problem, a robust estimator that mitigates the influence of outliers in data by capping residuals with large magnitudes. Although statistically attractive, penalized LTS is NP-hard, and existing mixed-integer optimization (MIO) formulations scale poorly due to weak relaxations and exponential worst-case complexity in the number of observations. We propose a new MIO formulation that embeds hyperplane arrangement logic into a perspective reformulation, explicitly enforcing structural properties of optimal solutions. We show that, if the number of features is fixed, the resulting branch-and-bound tree is of polynomial size in the sample size. Moreover, we develop a tailored branch-and-bound algorithm that uses first-order methods with dual bounds to solve node relaxations efficiently. Computational experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate substantial improvements over existing MIO approaches: on synthetic instances with 5000 samples and 20 features, our tailored solver reaches a 1% gap in 1 minute while competing approaches fail to do so within one hour. These gains enable exact robust regression at significantly larger sample sizes in low-dimensional settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合超平面排列的混合整数优化框架，显著提升最小修剪平方回归的计算效率，在低维大样本场景下实现精确鲁棒回归。
analysis.research_motivation: 最小修剪平方回归是鲁棒统计中的关键方法，但现有混合整数优化方法因松弛弱和指数级复杂度而难以处理大规模数据。
analysis.problem: 解决惩罚最小修剪平方回归的NP-hard问题，克服现有方法在观测数增加时计算规模指数级增长的瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最优解具有结构性质，可通过超平面排列显式约束，从而在特征数固定时将分支定界树规模控制在样本数的多项式级别。
analysis.main_method: 将超平面排列逻辑嵌入视角重构，形成新的混合整数优化公式，并设计定制分支定界算法，利用一阶方法计算节点松弛的对偶界。
analysis.key_experiments: 在5000样本、20特征的合成数据上，定制求解器1分钟内达到1%的间隙，而现有方法1小时内无法收敛；真实数据实验也验证了改进。
analysis.contributions: 提出多项式规模的分支定界树理论保证，开发高效定制算法，将精确鲁棒回归的可行样本量提升至数千级别。
analysis.limitations: 方法在特征数固定时有效，高维场景下性能可能下降；依赖超平面排列的显式构造，实现复杂度较高。

papers.title: Relax: An Asynchronous Reinforcement Learning Engine for Omni-Modal Post-Training at Scale
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training has proven effective at unlocking reasoning, self-reflection, and tool-use capabilities in large language models. As models extend to omni-modal inputs and agentic multi-turn workflows, RL training systems face three interdependent challenges: heterogeneous data flows, operational robustness at scale, and the staleness -- throughput tradeoff. We present \textbf{Relax} (Reinforcement Engine Leveraging Agentic X-modality), an open-source RL training engine that addresses these challenges through three co-designed architectural layers. First, an \emph{omni-native architecture} builds multimodal support into the full stack -- from data preprocessing and modality-aware parallelism to inference generation -- rather than retrofitting it onto a text-centric pipeline. Second, each RL role runs as an independent, fault-isolated service that can be scaled, recovered, and upgraded without global coordination. Third, service-level decoupling enables asynchronous training via the TransferQueue data bus, where a single staleness parameter smoothly interpolates among on-policy, near-on-policy, and fully asynchronous execution. Relax achieves a 1.20$\times$ end-to-end speedup over veRL on Qwen3-4B on-policy training. Its fully async mode delivers a 1.76$\times$ speedup over colocate on Qwen3-4B and a 2.00$\times$ speedup on Qwen3-Omni-30B, while all modes converge to the same reward level. Relax supports R3 (Rollout Routing Replay)~\cite{ma2025r3} for MoE models with only 1.9\% overhead, compared to 32\% degradation in veRL under the same configuration. It further demonstrates stable omni-modal RL convergence on Qwen3-Omni across image, text, and audio, sustaining over 2{,}000 steps on video without degradation. Relax is available at https://github.com/rednote-ai/Relax.

analysis.tldr: 提出异步强化学习引擎Relax，支持全模态后训练，通过解耦架构实现1.2-2倍加速，并保持收敛稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RL训练系统难以同时处理异构数据流、大规模运行鲁棒性和陈旧性-吞吐量权衡。
analysis.problem: 多模态和智能体多轮工作流中，RL训练面临数据异构、扩展鲁棒性差、陈旧性与吞吐量矛盾。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统文本中心管线改造为多模态时效率低，同步训练受限于陈旧性-吞吐量权衡，异步训练可能影响收敛。
analysis.main_method: 设计全模态原生架构、独立故障隔离服务、以及通过TransferQueue数据总线实现异步训练，用单一陈旧性参数控制策略更新程度。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Qwen3-4B上比veRL快1.2倍，异步模式快1.76倍；在Qwen3-Omni-30B上快2倍；支持MoE模型仅1.9%开销。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个开源全模态异步RL引擎，解耦架构实现灵活扩展，实验证明加速且收敛稳定。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论超大规模集群（如千卡）下的性能，异步模式对超长序列的稳定性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Phonological distances for linguistic typology and the origin of Indo-European languages
papers.abstract: We show that short-range phoneme dependencies encode large-scale patterns of linguistic relatedness, with direct implications for quantitative typology and evolutionary linguistics. Specifically, using an information-theoretic framework, we argue that phoneme sequences modeled as second-order Markov chains essentially capture the statistical correlations of a phonological system. This finding enables us to quantify distances among 67 modern languages from a multilingual parallel corpus employing a distance metric that incorporates articulatory features of phonemes. The resulting phonological distance matrix recovers major language families and reveals signatures of contact-induced convergence. Remarkably, we obtain a clear correlation with geographic distance, allowing us to constrain a plausible homeland region for the Indo-European family, consistent with the Steppe hypothesis.

analysis.tldr: 通过音位序列的二阶马尔可夫链模型，量化67种现代语言的音系距离，揭示语言谱系关系并支持印欧语系起源的草原假说。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索短程音位依赖能否编码大规模语言亲缘关系，为定量类型学和演化语言学提供新工具。
analysis.problem: 传统语言分类依赖词汇或语法特征，缺乏基于音系统计相关性的量化距离方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 音位序列的二阶马尔可夫链能捕捉音系系统的统计相关性，且音系距离与地理距离显著相关。
analysis.main_method: 采用信息论框架，将音位序列建模为二阶马尔可夫链，结合发音特征的距离度量计算多语言平行语料库中的音系距离矩阵。
analysis.key_experiments: 对67种现代语言计算音系距离矩阵，恢复主要语系结构并检测接触诱导趋同，通过地理距离相关性约束印欧语系起源区域。
analysis.contributions: 提出基于音位统计相关性的语言距离量化方法，验证其恢复语系和检测语言接触的能力，为印欧语系起源提供新证据。
analysis.limitations: 依赖平行语料库的覆盖范围，未考虑音位变体或历时音变的影响。

papers.title: Eliciting Medical Reasoning with Knowledge-enhanced Data Synthesis: A Semi-Supervised Reinforcement Learning Approach
papers.abstract: While large language models hold promise for complex medical applications, their development is hindered by the scarcity of high-quality reasoning data. To address this issue, existing approaches typically distill chain-of-thought reasoning traces from large proprietary models via supervised fine-tuning, then conduct reinforcement learning (RL). These methods exhibit limited improvement on underrepresented domains like rare diseases while incurring substantial costs from generating complex reasoning chains. To efficiently enhance medical reasoning, we propose MedSSR, a Medical Knowledge-enhanced data Synthesis and Semi-supervised Reinforcement learning framework. Our framework first employs rare disease knowledge to synthesize distribution-controllable reasoning questions. We then utilize the policy model itself to generate high-quality pseudo-labels. This enables a two-stage, intrinsic-to-extrinsic training paradigm: self-supervised RL on the pseudo-labeled synthetic data, followed by supervised RL on the human-annotated real data. MedSSR scales model training efficiently without relying on costly trace distillation. Extensive experiments on Qwen and Llama demonstrate that our method outperforms existing methods across ten medical benchmarks, achieving up to +5.93% gain on rare-disease tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/tdlhl/MedSSR.

analysis.tldr: 提出MedSSR框架，通过知识增强数据合成和半监督强化学习，高效提升大语言模型在医学推理任务上的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖从大型专有模型蒸馏推理链，成本高且对罕见病等低资源领域提升有限。
analysis.problem: 医学领域缺乏高质量推理数据，尤其是罕见病等低资源场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统监督微调和强化学习方法在罕见病任务上表现不佳，且生成复杂推理链成本高昂。
analysis.main_method: 利用罕见病知识合成分布可控的推理问题，通过策略模型自生成伪标签，采用自监督RL（伪标签数据）和监督RL（真实数据）的两阶段训练。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Qwen和Llama模型上，基于十个医学基准测试，罕见病任务提升达+5.93%。
analysis.contributions: 提出无需昂贵蒸馏的医学推理增强框架，结合知识合成与半监督RL，显著提升罕见病性能。
analysis.limitations: 依赖罕见病知识库的质量和覆盖范围，伪标签质量可能影响自监督阶段效果。

papers.title: Human Centered Non Intrusive Driver State Modeling Using Personalized Physiological Signals in Real World Automated Driving
papers.abstract: In vehicles with partial or conditional driving automation (SAE Levels 2-3), the driver remains responsible for supervising the system and responding to take-over requests. Therefore, reliable driver monitoring is essential for safe human-automation collaboration. However, most existing Driver Monitoring Systems rely on generalized models that ignore individual physiological variability. In this study, we examine the feasibility of personalized driver state modeling using non-intrusive physiological sensing during real-world automated driving. We conducted experiments in an SAE Level 2 vehicle using an Empatica E4 wearable sensor to capture multimodal physiological signals, including electrodermal activity, heart rate, temperature, and motion data. To leverage deep learning architectures designed for images, we transformed the physiological signals into two-dimensional representations and processed them using a multimodal architecture based on pre-trained ResNet50 feature extractors. Experiments across four drivers demonstrate substantial interindividual variability in physiological patterns related to driver awareness. Personalized models achieved an average accuracy of 92.68%, whereas generalized models trained on multiple users dropped to an accuracy of 54%, revealing substantial limitations in cross-user generalization. These results underscore the necessity of adaptive, personalized driver monitoring systems for future automated vehicles and imply that autonomous systems should adapt to each driver's unique physiological profile.

analysis.tldr: 通过个性化生理信号建模，在真实自动驾驶中实现92.68%的驾驶员状态识别准确率，远超通用模型的54%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有驾驶员监控系统使用通用模型，忽略个体生理差异，导致在真实自动驾驶场景中性能不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何利用非侵入式生理信号实现个性化驾驶员状态建模，以克服通用模型在跨用户泛化上的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同驾驶员在意识状态相关的生理模式上表现出显著个体差异，通用模型无法捕捉这些差异。
analysis.main_method: 将多模态生理信号（EDA、心率、温度、运动）转换为二维表示，使用预训练ResNet50特征提取器构建多模态深度学习架构。
analysis.key_experiments: 在SAE Level 2车辆中，使用Empatica E4传感器采集4名驾驶员的真实驾驶数据，比较个性化模型与通用模型的准确率。
analysis.contributions: 证明了非侵入式个性化生理建模在真实自动驾驶中的可行性，揭示了通用模型的严重性能下降。
analysis.limitations: 仅涉及4名驾驶员，样本量小；未考虑长期驾驶或不同路况的影响。

papers.title: Triviality Corrected Endogenous Reward
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning for open-ended text generation is constrained by the lack of verifiable rewards, necessitating reliance on judge models that require either annotated data or powerful closed-source models. Inspired by recent work on unsupervised reinforcement learning for mathematical reasoning using confidence-based endogenous rewards, we investigate whether this principle can be adapted to open-ended writing tasks. We find that directly applying confidence rewards leads to Triviality Bias: the policy collapses toward high-probability outputs, reducing diversity and meaningful content. We propose TCER (Triviality Corrected Endogenous Reward), which addresses this bias by rewarding the relative information gain between a specialist policy and a generalist reference policy, modulated by a probability-dependent correction mechanism. Across multiple writing benchmarks and model architectures, TCER achieves consistent improvements without external supervision. Furthermore, TCER also transfers effectively to mathematical reasoning, validating the generality of our approach across different generation tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出TCER方法，通过修正置信度奖励中的琐碎性偏差，实现无需外部监督的开放文本生成强化学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放文本生成缺乏可验证奖励，现有方法依赖标注数据或强大闭源模型，需探索无监督强化学习方案。
analysis.problem: 直接应用置信度奖励会导致策略崩溃至高频输出，降低生成多样性和有意义内容。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 置信度奖励偏好高概率输出，使模型倾向于生成安全但无信息量的文本，即琐碎性偏差。
analysis.main_method: TCER通过专家策略与通用参考策略的相对信息增益作为奖励，并引入概率依赖修正机制。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个写作基准和模型架构上验证，TCER一致提升性能；在数学推理任务上同样有效。
analysis.contributions: 首次识别并解决置信度奖励的琐碎性偏差；提出无需外部监督的通用奖励修正方法。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论对超长文本生成的效果；修正机制可能增加计算开销。

papers.title: DuET: Dual Execution for Test Output Prediction with Generated Code and Pseudocode
papers.abstract: This work addresses test output prediction, a key challenge in test case generation. To improve the reliability of predicted outputs by LLMs, prior approaches generate code first to ground predictions. One grounding strategy is direct execution of generated code, but even minor errors can cause failures. To address this, we introduce LLM-based pseudocode execution, which grounds prediction on more error-resilient pseudocode and simulates execution via LLM reasoning. We further propose DuET, a dual-execution framework that combines both approaches by functional majority voting. Our analysis shows the two approaches are complementary in overcoming the limitations of direct execution suffering from code errors, and pseudocode reasoning from hallucination. On LiveCodeBench, DuET achieves the state-of-the-art performance, improving Pass@1 by 13.6 pp.

analysis.tldr: 提出 DuET 框架，结合代码直接执行与伪代码 LLM 推理，通过功能多数投票提升测试输出预测的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM 在测试输出预测中可靠性不足，直接执行代码易因小错误失败，需更鲁棒的方法。
analysis.problem: 测试输出预测中，直接执行生成代码因错误易失败，而伪代码推理可能产生幻觉，两者各有局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 代码执行对语法错误敏感，伪代码推理更鲁棒但可能偏离实际语义，两者互补。
analysis.main_method: 提出 DuET 双执行框架，分别通过代码直接执行和伪代码 LLM 推理生成预测，再以功能多数投票融合结果。
analysis.key_experiments: 在 LiveCodeBench 上评估，DuET 的 Pass@1 提升 13.6 个百分点，达到最先进性能。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出双执行框架结合代码执行与伪代码推理，通过互补克服各自局限，显著提升测试输出预测准确性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖 LLM 的伪代码推理能力，可能受模型规模影响；未探讨其他执行策略的融合。

papers.title: Obtaining Partition Crossover masks using Statistical Linkage Learning for solving noised optimization problems with hidden variable dependency structure
papers.abstract: In optimization problems, some variable subsets may have a joint non-linear or non-monotonical influence on the function value. Therefore, knowledge of variable dependencies may be crucial for effective optimization, and many state-of-the-art optimizers leverage it to improve performance. However, some real-world problem instances may be the subject of noise of various origins. In such a case, variable dependencies relevant to optimization may be hard or impossible to tell using dependency checks sufficient for problems without noise, making highly effective operators, e.g., Partition Crossover (PX), useless. Therefore, we use Statistical Linkage Learning (SLL) to decompose problems with noise and propose a new SLL-dedicated mask construction algorithm. We prove that if the quality of the SLL-based decomposition is sufficiently high, the proposed clustering algorithm yields masks equivalent to PX masks for the noise-free instances. The experiments show that the optimizer using the proposed mechanisms remains equally effective despite the noise level and outperforms state-of-the-art optimizers for the problems with high noise.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于统计链接学习的掩码构造算法，使分区交叉在噪声优化问题中仍能有效利用变量依赖关系。
analysis.research_motivation: 噪声会破坏变量依赖关系的检测，导致高效算子（如分区交叉）失效，需要鲁棒的分解方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在噪声环境下准确识别变量依赖关系，并生成有效的分区交叉掩码以优化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 噪声使传统依赖检测方法不可靠，但统计链接学习能通过概率建模捕捉隐藏依赖结构。
analysis.main_method: 使用统计链接学习分解问题，并设计新的掩码构造算法，在分解质量足够高时生成等价于无噪声分区交叉的掩码。
analysis.key_experiments: 在噪声水平变化的问题上测试，证明所提优化器在噪声环境下保持效果，并优于现有最先进优化器。
analysis.contributions: 提出噪声鲁棒的掩码构造算法，理论证明其与无噪声分区交叉的等价性，实验验证高噪声下的优越性能。
analysis.limitations: 依赖统计链接学习的分解质量，可能对极端噪声或复杂依赖结构敏感。

papers.title: Generative Path-Finding Method for Wasserstein Gradient Flow
papers.abstract: Wasserstein gradient flows (WGFs) describe the evolution of probability distributions in Wasserstein space as steepest descent dynamics for a free energy functional. Computing the full path from an arbitrary initial distribution to equilibrium is challenging, especially in high dimensions. Eulerian methods suffer from the curse of dimensionality, while existing Lagrangian approaches based on particles or generative maps do not naturally improve efficiency through time step tuning. We propose GenWGP, a generative path finding framework for Wasserstein gradient paths. GenWGP learns a generative flow that transports mass from an initial density to an unknown equilibrium distribution by minimizing a path loss that encodes the full trajectory and its terminal equilibrium condition. The loss is derived from a geometric action functional motivated by Dawson Gartner large deviation theory for empirical distributions of interacting diffusion systems. We formulate both a finite horizon action under physical time parametrization and a reparameterization invariant geometric action based on Wasserstein arclength. Using normalizing flows, GenWGP computes a geometric curve toward equilibrium while enforcing approximately constant intrinsic speed between adjacent network layers, so that discretized distributions remain nearly equidistant in the Wasserstein metric along the path. This avoids delicate time stepping constraints and enables stable training that is largely independent of temporal or geometric discretization. Experiments on Fokker Planck and aggregation type problems show that GenWGP matches or exceeds high fidelity reference solutions with only about a dozen discretization points while capturing complex dynamics.

analysis.tldr: 提出GenWGP框架，用生成流学习Wasserstein梯度流的完整路径，避免时间步长限制，仅需少量离散点即可匹配高保真解。
analysis.research_motivation: Wasserstein梯度流在高维空间中计算困难，现有欧拉方法受维度诅咒，拉格朗日方法无法通过时间步长调优提升效率。
analysis.problem: 如何高效计算从任意初始分布到平衡态的Wasserstein梯度流完整路径，特别是在高维场景下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Wasserstein梯度流路径中，相邻分布间的Wasserstein距离在恒定内禀速度下近似等距，这允许稳定训练而不依赖精细时间离散。
analysis.main_method: 通过最小化基于Dawson-Gartner大偏差理论的几何作用量损失，学习一个生成流（使用归一化流）来传输质量，并强制相邻层间恒定内禀速度。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Fokker-Planck和聚集类型问题上测试，仅用约12个离散点即可匹配或超越高保真参考解，并捕捉复杂动力学。
analysis.contributions: 提出无需时间步长调优的生成路径框架，利用几何作用量损失和恒定速度约束实现稳定高效训练。
analysis.limitations: 依赖归一化流的表达能力，可能在高维复杂分布上存在扩展性挑战；未讨论对非凸自由能泛函的适用性。

papers.title: The Price of Ignorance: Information-Free Quotation for Data Retention in Machine Unlearning
papers.abstract: When users exercise data deletion rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and similar regulations, mobile network operators face a tradeoff: excessive machine unlearning degrades model accuracy and incurs retraining costs, yet existing pricing mechanisms for data retention require the server to know every user's private privacy and accuracy preferences, which is infeasible under the very regulations that motivate unlearning. We ask: what is the welfare cost of operating without this private information? We design an information-free ascending quotation mechanism where the server broadcasts progressively higher prices and users self-select their data supply, requiring no knowledge of users' parameters. Under complete information, the protocol admits a unique subgame-perfect Nash equilibrium characterized by single-period selling. We formalize the Price of Ignorance -- the welfare gap between optimal personalized pricing (which knows everything) and our information-free quotation (which knows nothing) -- and prove a three-regime efficiency ordering. Numerical evaluation across seven mechanisms and 5000 Monte Carlo runs shows that this price is near zero: the information-free mechanism achieves >=99% of the welfare of its information-intensive benchmarks, while providing noise-robust guarantees and comparable fairness.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需用户隐私信息的数据保留定价机制，在机器学习卸载场景下实现接近最优的福利效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据保留定价机制需要服务器知道每个用户的隐私和精度偏好，这在GDPR等法规下不可行。
analysis.problem: 如何在服务器完全不知道用户私人参数的情况下，设计数据保留的定价机制以最大化社会福利。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 信息缺失会导致福利损失，但通过自选择机制可以大幅缩小这一差距。
analysis.main_method: 设计一种信息自由的升价报价机制，服务器广播递增价格，用户自选择数据供应量。
analysis.key_experiments: 在7种机制和5000次蒙特卡洛模拟中，信息自由机制达到信息密集型基准福利的99%以上。
analysis.contributions: 形式化了“无知代价”概念，证明了三种效率排序区域，并提供了噪声鲁棒和公平性保证。
analysis.limitations: 假设用户理性且完全自利，未考虑动态博弈或恶意行为。

papers.title: Machine-learning modeling of magnetization dynamics in quasi-equilibrium and driven metallic spin systems
papers.abstract: We review recent advances in machine-learning (ML) force-field methods for large-scale Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert (LLG) simulations of metallic spin systems. We generalize the Behler-Parrinello (BP) ML architecture -- originally developed for quantum molecular dynamics -- to construct scalable and transferable ML models capable of capturing the intricate dependence of electron-mediated exchange fields on the local magnetic environment characteristic of itinerant magnets. A central ingredient of this framework is the implementation of symmetry-aware magnetic descriptors based on group-theoretical bispectrum formalisms. Leveraging these ML force fields, LLG simulations faithfully reproduce hallmark non-collinear magnetic orders -- such as the $120^\circ$ and tetrahedral states -- on the triangular lattice, and successfully capture the complex spin textures emerging in the mixed-phase states of a square-lattice double-exchange model under thermal quench. We further discuss a generalized potential theory that extends the BP formalism to incorporate both conservative and nonconservative electronic torques, thereby enabling ML models to learn nonequilibrium exchange fields from computationally demanding microscopic approaches such as nonequilibrium Green's-function techniques. This extension yields quantitatively accurate predictions of voltage-driven domain-wall motion and establishes a foundation for quantum-accurate, multiscale modeling of nonequilibrium spin dynamics and spintronic functionalities.

analysis.tldr: 将机器学习力场方法推广至金属自旋系统的LLG模拟，实现准平衡与驱动下自旋动力学的精确建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统LLG模拟依赖经验参数，难以准确描述巡游磁体中电子介导交换场的复杂环境依赖性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建可扩展且可迁移的机器学习模型，以捕捉金属自旋系统中非共线磁序和非平衡自旋动力学。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 三角晶格上的120°和四面体态等非共线磁序，以及方晶格双交换模型热淬火后的复杂自旋织构，均需精确建模。
analysis.main_method: 推广Behler-Parrinello架构，引入基于群论双谱的对称感知磁描述子，并扩展势理论以包含非保守电子力矩。
analysis.key_experiments: LLG模拟成功复现三角晶格非共线磁序，并捕捉方晶格混合相态的自旋织构；电压驱动畴壁运动预测与微观方法定量一致。
analysis.contributions: 提出适用于金属自旋系统的机器学习力场框架，实现量子精确的多尺度非平衡自旋动力学建模。
analysis.limitations: 方法依赖高质量训练数据，且对复杂自旋轨道耦合系统的适用性有待验证。

papers.title: CAGenMol: Condition-Aware Diffusion Language Model for Goal-Directed Molecular Generation
papers.abstract: Goal-directed molecular generation requires satisfying heterogeneous constraints such as protein--ligand compatibility and multi-objective drug-like properties, yet existing methods often optimize these constraints in isolation, failing to reconcile conflicting objectives (e.g., affinity vs. safety), and struggle to navigate the non-differentiable chemical space without compromising structural validity. To address these challenges, we propose CAGenMol, a condition-aware discrete diffusion framework over molecular sequences that formulates molecular design as conditional denoising guided by heterogeneous structural and property signals. By coupling discrete diffusion with reinforcement learning, the model aligns the generation trajectory with non-differentiable objectives while preserving chemical validity and diversity. The non-autoregressive nature of diffusion language model further enables iterative refinement of molecular fragments at inference time. Experiments on structure-conditioned, property-conditioned, and dual-conditioned benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over state-of-the-art methods in binding affinity, drug-likeness, and success rate, highlighting the effectiveness of our framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出条件感知离散扩散框架CAGenMol，结合强化学习实现多约束目标导向分子生成，在亲和力、类药性和成功率上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法孤立优化分子约束，难以调和冲突目标（如亲和力与安全性），且无法有效处理非可微化学空间。
analysis.problem: 如何同时满足蛋白质-配体兼容性和多目标类药性质等异构约束，并保持分子结构有效性和多样性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多约束优化中目标冲突导致生成分子顾此失彼，非自回归扩散模型可迭代细化分子片段以平衡约束。
analysis.main_method: 构建条件感知离散扩散语言模型，将分子设计视为条件去噪过程，并耦合强化学习对齐非可微目标。
analysis.key_experiments: 在结构条件、性质条件和双条件基准上测试，与SOTA方法比较结合亲和力、类药性和成功率。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个融合离散扩散与强化学习的条件感知框架，实现多约束协同优化；非自回归推理支持分子片段迭代精炼。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论计算效率；可能依赖特定分子表示（SMILES）的局限性。

papers.title: Structural Consequences of Policy-Based Interventions on the Global Supply Chain Network
papers.abstract: As global political tensions rise and the anticipation of additional tariffs from the United States on international trade increases, the issues of economic independence and supply chain resilience become more prominent. The importance of supply chain resilience has been further underscored by disruptions caused by the COVID-19 pandemic and the ongoing war in Ukraine. In light of these challenges, ranging from geopolitical instability to product supply uncertainties, governments are increasingly focused on adopting new trade policies. This study explores the impact of several of these policies on the global electric vehicle (EV) supply chain network, with a particular focus on their effects on country clusters and the broader structure of international trade. Specifically, we analyse three key policies: Country Plus One, Friendshoring, and Reshoring. Our findings show that Friendshoring, contrary to expectations, leads to greater globalisation by increasing the number of supply links across friendly countries, potentially raising transaction costs. The Country Plus One policy similarly enhances network density through redundant links, while the Reshoring policy creates challenges in the EV sector due to the high number of irreplaceable products. Additionally, the effects of these policies vary across industries; for instance, mining goods being less affected in Country Plus One than the Friendshoring policy.

analysis.tldr: 研究分析三种贸易政策对全球电动汽车供应链网络的影响，发现友岸外包反而增加全球化程度，回岸政策面临不可替代产品挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 全球政治紧张和供应链中断（如疫情、俄乌战争）凸显经济独立和供应链韧性的重要性，政府需评估新贸易政策的影响。
analysis.problem: 现有研究缺乏对具体贸易政策（如友岸外包、回岸）如何改变全球供应链网络结构的量化分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 友岸外包政策意外地增加了友好国家间的供应链接，导致全球化程度提高和交易成本上升；回岸政策因电动汽车行业存在大量不可替代产品而面临实施困难。
analysis.main_method: 构建全球电动汽车供应链网络模型，模拟分析Country Plus One、友岸外包和回岸三种政策对网络密度、国家集群和贸易结构的影响。
analysis.key_experiments: 基于全球电动汽车贸易数据，对比三种政策场景下的网络密度、冗余链接和行业差异（如采矿业与制造业）。
analysis.contributions: 首次量化比较三种贸易政策对供应链网络结构的差异化影响，揭示友岸外包的意外全球化效应和回岸政策的行业局限性。
analysis.limitations: 仅聚焦电动汽车行业，未考虑政策动态调整和长期经济成本；模型假设可能简化现实贸易复杂性。

papers.title: Bridging What the Model Thinks and How It Speaks: Self-Aware Speech Language Models for Expressive Speech Generation
papers.abstract: Speech Language Models (SLMs) exhibit strong semantic understanding, yet their generated speech often sounds flat and fails to convey expressive intent, undermining user engagement. We term this mismatch the semantic understanding-acoustic realization gap. We attribute this gap to two key deficiencies: (1) intent transmission failure, where SLMs fail to provide the stable utterance-level intent needed for expressive delivery; and (2) realization-unaware training, where no feedback signal verifies whether acoustic outputs faithfully reflect intended expression. To address these issues, we propose SA-SLM (Self-Aware Speech Language Model), built on the principle that the model should be aware of what it thinks during generation and how it speaks during training. SA-SLM addresses this gap through two core contributions: (1) Intent-Aware Bridging, which uses a Variational Information Bottleneck (VIB) objective to translate the model's internal semantics into temporally smooth expressive intent, making speech generation aware of what the model intends to express; and (2) Realization-Aware Alignment, which repurposes the model as its own critic to verify and align acoustic realization with intended expressive intent via rubric-based feedback. Trained on only 800 hours of expressive speech data, our 3B parameter SA-SLM surpasses all open-source baselines and comes within 0.08 points of GPT-4o-Audio in overall expressiveness on the EchoMind benchmark.

analysis.tldr: 提出SA-SLM，通过意图感知桥接和实现感知对齐，弥合语音语言模型的语义理解与声学表达之间的鸿沟。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语音语言模型生成的语音平淡、缺乏表现力，无法传达表达意图，影响用户参与度。
analysis.problem: 语音语言模型存在语义理解与声学实现之间的差距，即意图传递失败和实现无感知训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型内部语义理解强，但声学输出无法忠实反映表达意图，导致生成语音缺乏表现力。
analysis.main_method: 提出SA-SLM，包含意图感知桥接（使用变分信息瓶颈提取平滑意图）和实现感知对齐（模型作为批评者通过规则反馈对齐声学实现）。
analysis.key_experiments: 在800小时表现性语音数据上训练3B参数模型，在EchoMind基准上超越所有开源基线，与GPT-4o-Audio仅差0.08分。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出语义理解-声学实现差距问题，并设计自感知框架同时解决意图传递和训练反馈缺失。
analysis.limitations: 依赖800小时表现性语音数据，可能对低资源语言或场景泛化性有限。

papers.title: Learning How Much to Think: Difficulty-Aware Dynamic MoEs for Graph Node Classification
papers.abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures offer a scalable path for Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) in node classification tasks but typically rely on static and rigid routing strategies that enforce a uniform expert budget or coarse-grained expert toggles on all nodes. This limitation overlooks the varying discriminative difficulty of nodes and leads to under-fitting for hard nodes and redundant computation for easy ones. To resolve this issue, we propose D2MoE, a novel framework that shifts the focus from static expert selection to node-wise expert resource allocation. By using predictive entropy as a real-time proxy for difficulty, D2MoE employs a difficulty-driven top-p routing mechanism to adaptively concentrate expert resources on hard nodes while reducing overhead for easy ones, achieving continuous and fine-grained expert budget scaling for node classification. Experiments on 13 benchmarks demonstrate that D2MoE achieves consistent state-of-the-art performance, surpassing leading baselines by up to 7.92% in accuracy on heterophilous graphs. Notably, on large-scale graphs, it reduces memory consumption by up to 73.07% and training time by 46.53% compared to the best-performing Graph MoE, thereby validating its superior efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出难度感知动态MoE框架D2MoE，根据节点难度自适应分配专家资源，在节点分类任务中提升性能并降低计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图MoE使用静态路由策略，对所有节点分配统一专家预算，忽略了节点难度差异，导致难节点欠拟合、易节点计算冗余。
analysis.problem: 如何根据节点判别难度动态分配专家资源，以平衡难节点的拟合能力和易节点的计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 节点分类难度存在显著差异，静态专家分配无法适应这种异质性，导致难节点性能不足而简单节点浪费计算。
analysis.main_method: 提出D2MoE框架，使用预测熵作为难度实时代理，通过难度驱动的top-p路由机制自适应调整每个节点的专家资源分配。
analysis.key_experiments: 在13个基准数据集上评估，在异配图上准确率提升高达7.92%，在大规模图上内存减少73.07%，训练时间减少46.53%。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出节点级难度感知的专家资源分配方法，实现连续细粒度的专家预算缩放，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.limitations: 依赖预测熵作为难度代理，可能受模型初始化和训练动态影响；未探讨在动态图或时序图上的适用性。

papers.title: GlobalCY I: A JAX Framework for Globally Defined and Symmetry-Aware Neural K\"ahler Potentials
papers.abstract: We present \emph{GlobalCY}, a JAX-based framework for globally defined and symmetry-aware neural K\"ahler-potential models on projective hypersurface Calabi--Yau geometries. The central problem is that local-input neural K\"ahler-potential models can train successfully while still failing the geometry-sensitive diagnostics that matter in hard quartic regimes, especially near singular and near-singular members of the Cefal\'u family. To study this, we compare three model families -- a local-input baseline, a globally defined invariant model, and a symmetry-aware global model -- on the hard Cefal\'u cases $\lambda=0.75$ and $\lambda=1.0$ using a fixed multi-seed protocol and a geometry-aware diagnostic suite. In this benchmark, the globally defined invariant model is the strongest overall family, outperforming the local baseline on the two clearest geometric comparison metrics, negative-eigenvalue frequency and projective-invariance drift, in both cases. The gains are strongest at $\lambda=0.75$, while $\lambda=1.0$ remains more difficult. The current symmetry-aware model improves projective-invariance drift relative to the local baseline, but does not yet surpass the plain global invariant model. These results show that global invariant structure is a meaningful architectural constraint for learned K\"ahler-potential modeling in hard quartic Calabi--Yau settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出JAX框架GlobalCY，用全局对称感知的神经Kähler势模型改进Calabi-Yau几何的硬四次区域诊断。
analysis.research_motivation: 局部输入神经Kähler势模型在硬四次区域（如Cefalú族近奇异成员）中训练成功但几何敏感诊断失败，需全局结构约束。
analysis.problem: 局部模型无法通过几何敏感诊断（负特征值频率和射影不变漂移），尤其在λ=0.75和1.0的Cefalú族中。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全局不变模型在负特征值频率和射影不变漂移上显著优于局部基线，λ=0.75增益最强，λ=1.0仍困难；对称感知模型仅改善漂移但未超越全局不变模型。
analysis.main_method: 基于JAX构建三种模型族：局部输入基线、全局定义不变模型、对称感知全局模型，采用固定多种子协议和几何感知诊断套件。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Cefalú族λ=0.75和1.0上比较三种模型，使用负特征值频率和射影不变漂移作为关键几何指标。
analysis.contributions: 证明全局不变结构是硬四次Calabi-Yau设置中学习Kähler势的有意义架构约束，提供JAX框架。
analysis.limitations: 对称感知模型未超越全局不变模型，λ=1.0仍具挑战性，可能需更复杂对称编码。

papers.title: Active Bayesian Inference for Robust Control under Sensor False Data Injection Attacks
papers.abstract: We present a framework for bridging the gap between sensor attack detection and recovery in cyber-physical systems. The proposed framework models modern-day, complex perception pipelines as bipartite graphs, which combined with anomaly detector alerts defines a Bayesian network for inferring compromised sensors. An active probing strategy exploits system nonlinearities to maximize distinguishability between attack hypotheses, while compromised sensors are selectively disabled to maintain reliable state estimation. We propose a threshold-based probing strategy and show its effectiveness via a simplified partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) formulation. Experiments on an inverted pendulum under single and multi-sensor attacks show that our method significantly outperforms outlier-robust and prediction-based baselines, especially under prolonged attacks.

analysis.tldr: 提出主动贝叶斯推理框架，通过二分图建模和主动探测策略，在传感器攻击下实现鲁棒控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法在传感器攻击检测与恢复之间存在鸿沟，缺乏系统性的推理与主动应对机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在复杂感知系统中，在传感器遭受虚假数据注入攻击时，实现可靠的传感器状态推断和鲁棒控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 攻击下传感器异常检测器虽能发出警报，但无法区分具体被攻击传感器，且长时间攻击会累积误差。
analysis.main_method: 将感知管道建模为二分图，结合异常检测器定义贝叶斯网络；提出基于阈值的主动探测策略，利用系统非线性最大化攻击假设的可区分性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在倒立摆系统上测试单传感器和多传感器攻击场景，与离群鲁棒和基于预测的基线方法对比。
analysis.contributions: 首次将主动推理与传感器攻击恢复结合，提出可操作的阈值探测策略，显著提升长时间攻击下的控制性能。
analysis.limitations: 方法依赖系统非线性特性，可能不适用于线性系统；阈值选择需手动调整。

papers.title: Exact Certification of Neural Networks and Partition Aggregation Ensembles against Label Poisoning
papers.abstract: Label-flipping attacks, which corrupt training labels to induce misclassifications at inference, remain a major threat to supervised learning models. This drives the need for robustness certificates that provide formal guarantees about a model's robustness under adversarially corrupted labels. Existing certification frameworks rely on ensemble techniques such as smoothing or partition-aggregation, but treat the corresponding base classifiers as black boxes, yielding overly conservative guarantees. We introduce EnsembleCert, the first certification framework for partition-aggregation ensembles that utilizes white-box knowledge of the base classifiers. Concretely, EnsembleCert yields tighter guarantees than black-box approaches by aggregating per-partition white-box certificates to compute ensemble-level guarantees in polynomial time. To extract white-box knowledge from the base classifiers efficiently, we develop ScaLabelCert, a method that leverages the equivalence between sufficiently wide neural networks and kernel methods using the neural tangent kernel. ScaLabelCert yields the first exact, polynomial-time calculable certificate for neural networks against label-flipping attacks. EnsembleCert is either on par, or significantly outperforms the existing partition-based black box certificates. Exemplary, on CIFAR-10, our method can certify upto +26.5% more label flips in median over the test set compared to the existing black-box approach while requiring 100 times fewer partitions, thus, challenging the prevailing notion that heavy partitioning is a necessity for strong certified robustness.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个利用白盒知识的分区聚合集成认证框架，通过神经正切核实现神经网络标签翻转攻击的精确多项式时间认证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有标签翻转攻击认证方法将基分类器视为黑盒，导致认证结果过于保守，需要更精确的认证框架。
analysis.problem: 如何利用基分类器的白盒知识，为分区聚合集成模型提供更紧致的标签翻转攻击鲁棒性认证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 黑盒方法因忽略基分类器内部结构而高估不确定性，白盒知识可显著提升认证精度，且无需大量分区。
analysis.main_method: 提出EnsembleCert框架，通过聚合每个分区的白盒认证结果计算集成级保证；并开发ScaLabelCert方法，利用神经正切核将宽神经网络等价为核方法，实现精确多项式时间认证。
analysis.key_experiments: 在CIFAR-10上，相比黑盒方法，中位数认证标签翻转量提升26.5%，且所需分区数减少100倍。
analysis.contributions: 首个白盒分区聚合集成认证框架；首个神经网络标签翻转攻击的精确多项式时间证书；挑战了强鲁棒性需大量分区的传统认知。
analysis.limitations: 依赖网络宽度足够大的假设，对窄网络或非核方法场景的适用性未验证；计算复杂度仍受分区数影响。

papers.title: Geometry-Aware Localized Watermarking for Copyright Protection in Embedding-as-a-Service
papers.abstract: Embedding-as-a-Service (EaaS) has become an important semantic infrastructure for natural language and multimedia applications, but it is highly vulnerable to model stealing and copyright infringement. Existing EaaS watermarking methods face a fundamental robustness--utility--verifiability tension: trigger-based methods are fragile to paraphrasing, transformation-based methods are sensitive to dimensional perturbation, and region-based methods may incur false positives due to coincidental geometric affinity. To address this problem, we propose GeoMark, a geometry-aware localized watermarking framework for EaaS copyright protection. GeoMark uses a natural in-manifold embedding as a shared watermark target, constructs geometry-separated anchors with explicit target--anchor margins, and activates watermark injection only within adaptive local neighborhoods. This design decouples where watermarking is triggered from what ownership is attributed to, achieving localized triggering and centralized attribution. Experiments on four benchmark datasets show that GeoMark preserves downstream utility and geometric fidelity while maintaining robust copyright verification under paraphrasing, dimensional perturbation, and CSE (Clustering, Selection, Elimination) attacks, with improved verification stability and low false-positive risk.

analysis.tldr: 提出GeoMark，一种几何感知的局部水印框架，用于EaaS版权保护，在保持下游效用的同时实现鲁棒验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有EaaS水印方法在鲁棒性、效用和可验证性之间存在根本性矛盾，亟需一种能平衡三者且低误报风险的方案。
analysis.problem: 现有水印方法易受改写、维度扰动攻击，且区域方法因几何亲和性导致误报，无法同时满足鲁棒、实用和可验证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 触发式水印脆弱，变换式对扰动敏感，区域式因偶然几何相似性产生误报，根源在于触发与归属未解耦。
analysis.main_method: 利用流形内嵌自然嵌入作为共享水印目标，构建几何分离锚点并设定显式目标-锚点边界，仅在自适应局部邻域激活水印注入。
analysis.key_experiments: 在四个基准数据集上测试，评估改写、维度扰动和CSE攻击下的下游效用、几何保真度和验证稳定性。
analysis.contributions: 首次实现水印触发与归属解耦，提出局部触发与集中归属机制，显著降低误报风险并提升鲁棒性。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论对大规模动态嵌入服务的扩展性，以及锚点选择对几何分离的敏感性。

papers.title: BRIDGE and TCH-Net: Heterogeneous Benchmark and Multi-Branch Baseline for Cross-Domain IoT Botnet Detection
papers.abstract: IoT botnet detection has advanced, yet most published systems are validated on a single dataset and rarely generalise across environments. Heterogeneous feature spaces make multi-dataset training practically impossible without discarding semantic interpretability or introducing data integrity violations. No prior work has addressed both problems with a formally specified, reproducible methodology. This paper does. We introduce BRIDGE (Benchmark Reference for IoT Domain Generalisation Evaluation), the first formally specified heterogeneous multi-dataset benchmark for IoT intrusion detection, unifying CICIDS-2017, CIC-IoT-2023, Bot-IoT, Edge-IIoTset, and N-BaIoT through a 46-feature semantic canonical vocabulary grounded in CICFlowMeter nomenclature, with genuine-equivalence-only feature mapping, explicit zero-filling, and per-dataset coverage from 15% to 93%. A leave-one-dataset-out (LODO) protocol makes the generalisation gap precisely measurable: all five evaluated architectures achieve mean LODO F1 between 0.39 and 0.47, and we establish the first community generalisation baseline at mean LODO F1 = 0.5577, a result that shifts the agenda from single-benchmark optimisation toward cross-environment generalisation. We propose TCH-Net, a multi-branch network fusing a three-path Temporal branch (residual convolutional-BiGRU, stride-downsampled BiGRU, pre-LayerNorm Transformer), a provenance-conditioned Contextual branch, and a Statistical branch via Cross-Branch Gated Attention Fusion (CB-GAF) with learnable sigmoid gates for dynamic feature-wise mixing. Across five random seeds, TCH-Net achieves F1 = 0.8296 +/- 0.0028, AUC = 0.9380 +/- 0.0025, and MCC = 0.6972 +/- 0.0056, outperforming all twelve baselines (p < 0.05, Wilcoxon) and recording the highest LODO F1 overall. BRIDGE and the full pipeline are at https://github.com/Ammar-ss/TCH-Net.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个异构多数据集基准BRIDGE和跨域泛化基线，以及多分支网络TCH-Net，显著提升IoT僵尸网络检测的跨环境泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有IoT僵尸网络检测方法多在单一数据集上验证，缺乏跨环境泛化能力，且异构特征空间阻碍多数据集联合训练。
analysis.problem: 解决IoT入侵检测中异构特征空间导致的多数据集训练困难，以及缺乏正式定义的跨域泛化评估基准的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有模型在单一数据集上表现良好，但跨数据集时泛化性能显著下降，表明存在严重的域偏移问题。
analysis.main_method: 提出BRIDGE基准，通过46维语义规范词汇统一五个数据集；提出TCH-Net多分支网络，融合时间、上下文和统计分支，并使用跨分支门控注意力融合。
analysis.key_experiments: 在五个数据集上采用留一数据集（LODO）协议评估，TCH-Net在12个基线中取得最优F1=0.8296，LODO F1最高。
analysis.contributions: 首个正式定义的异构多数据集基准BRIDGE，首个跨域泛化基线，以及性能领先的TCH-Net网络。
analysis.limitations: BRIDGE的46维特征覆盖率为15%-93%，部分数据集特征缺失可能影响泛化评估的完整性。

papers.title: Learning Discrete Diffusion of Graphs via Free-Energy Gradient Flows
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based models on continuous spaces have seen substantial recent progress through the mathematical framework of gradient flows, leveraging the Wasserstein-2 (${W}_2$) metric via the Jordan-Kinderlehrer-Otto (JKO) scheme. Despite the increasing popularity of diffusion models on discrete spaces using continuous-time Markov chains, a parallel theoretical framework based on gradient flows has remained elusive due to intrinsic challenges in translating the ${W}_2$ distance directly into these settings. In this work, we propose the first computational approach addressing these challenges, leveraging an appropriate metric $W_K$ on the simplex of probability distributions, which enables us to interpret widely used discrete diffusion paths, such as the discrete heat equation, as gradient flows of specific free-energy functionals. Through this theoretical insight, we introduce a novel methodology for learning diffusion dynamics over discrete spaces, which recovers the underlying functional directly by leveraging first-order optimality conditions for the JKO scheme. The resulting method optimizes a simple quadratic loss, trains extremely fast, does not require individual sample trajectories, and only needs a numerical preprocessing computing $W_K$-geodesics. We validate our method through extensive numerical experiments on synthetic data, showing that we can recover the underlying functional for a variety of graph classes.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个基于梯度流的离散图扩散学习方法，利用W_K度量解释离散扩散路径，通过JKO方案优化二次损失实现快速训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 连续空间扩散模型通过梯度流框架取得显著进展，但离散空间缺乏类似理论框架，限制了离散扩散模型的理论理解和应用。
analysis.problem: 如何将Wasserstein-2梯度流框架扩展到离散空间，以解释和优化离散扩散过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 离散热方程等扩散路径可视为特定自由能泛函的梯度流，但直接平移W_2度量存在内在挑战。
analysis.main_method: 利用W_K度量在概率分布单纯形上定义梯度流，通过JKO方案的一阶最优性条件直接学习自由能泛函，优化简单二次损失。
analysis.key_experiments: 在合成数据上对多种图类进行数值实验，验证了方法能恢复底层自由能泛函。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出离散空间扩散的梯度流计算框架，无需样本轨迹，训练快速且仅需数值预处理计算W_K测地线。
analysis.limitations: 依赖W_K测地线的数值预处理，可能对大规模图计算成本较高；实验仅限合成数据，未在真实数据集验证。

papers.title: Transactional Attention: Semantic Sponsorship for KV-Cache Retention
papers.abstract: At K=16 tokens (0.4% of a 4K context), every existing KV-cache compression method achieves 0% on credential retrieval. The failure mode is dormant tokens: credentials, API keys, and configuration values that receive near-zero attention but become essential at generation time. Because these tokens lack the statistical signals that eviction policies rely on, no method based on attention scores, reconstruction loss, or learned retention gates retains them. We introduce Transactional Attention (TA), a sponsorship mechanism in which structural anchor patterns (e.g., "key:", "password:") protect adjacent value-bearing tokens from eviction. TA achieves 100% credential retrieval at K=16 where six baselines (H2O, TOVA, SnapKV, StreamingLLM, PyramidKV, DynamicKV) achieve 0%, and sustains 100% accuracy across 200 function-calling trials. TA-Fast, an attention-free variant, reduces memory overhead by 52% and is compatible with SDPA and FlashAttention. TA is orthogonal to existing compression methods and adds less than 1% latency overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出Transactional Attention机制，通过结构锚点保护关键令牌不被KV缓存驱逐，在极低缓存下实现100%凭证检索。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有KV缓存压缩方法在低缓存预算下完全丢失凭证等关键令牌，导致生成任务失败。
analysis.problem: 休眠令牌（如凭证、API密钥）在注意力中得分极低，现有驱逐策略无法保留它们。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 凭证令牌在注意力中缺乏统计信号，但生成时不可或缺，传统方法基于注意力分数或重建损失无法识别其重要性。
analysis.main_method: Transactional Attention通过结构锚点模式（如'key:'）赞助相邻值令牌，保护其不被驱逐，并提供无注意力变体TA-Fast。
analysis.key_experiments: 在K=16时TA实现100%凭证检索，而六种基线均为0%；在200次函数调用中保持100%准确率。
analysis.contributions: 提出赞助机制解决休眠令牌问题，与现有压缩方法正交，延迟开销低于1%。
analysis.limitations: 依赖预定义的结构锚点模式，可能不适用于无固定模式的场景。

papers.title: Representation-Aligned Multi-Scale Personalization for Federated Learning
papers.abstract: In federated learning (FL), accommodating clients with diverse resource constraints remains a significant challenge. A widely adopted approach is to use a shared full-size model, from which each client extracts a submodel aligned with its computational budget. However, regardless of the specific scoring strategy, these methods rely on the same global backbone, limiting both structural diversity and representational adaptation across clients. This paper presents FRAMP, a unified framework for personalized and resource-adaptive federated learning. Instead of relying on a fixed global model, FRAMP generates client-specific models from compact client descriptors, enabling fine-grained adaptation to both data characteristics and computational budgets. Each client trains a tailored lightweight submodel and aligns its learned representation with others to maintain global semantic consistency. Extensive experiments on vision and graph benchmarks demonstrate that FRAMP enhances generalization and adaptivity across a wide range of client settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出FRAMP框架，通过客户端描述符生成个性化子模型，实现联邦学习中资源自适应与表示对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有联邦学习方法依赖共享全局模型，限制了客户端结构多样性和表示适应性，难以应对异构资源约束。
analysis.problem: 如何在联邦学习中为资源异构的客户端生成个性化模型，同时保持全局语义一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 共享全局模型导致子模型结构单一，无法充分适应客户端数据特征和计算预算，影响泛化性能。
